query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01' , @ToDate='2018-01-31'; SET @RefLName='%%',@RefFName='%john%'; SELECT CONCAT(r.LName, ',', r.FName) AS RefName, COUNT(*) AS NumReferred FROM referral r LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ra.RefType = 1 WHERE NOT (r.LName LIKE @RefLName AND r.FName LIKE @RefFName) GROUP BY r.ReferralNum;

request:
For day set and provider selected, the production, adjustments, and writeoffs.
With totals and a patient count, where patient is counted if there is some production on that day.
query: SET @ReportDate='2013-01-15',@ProvAbbr='15'; SELECT A.Patient,A.Production,A.Adjust,A.Writeoff FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT('Report Date: ',DATE_FORMAT(@ReportDate, '%m/%d/%Y'),' .') AS Patient,CONCAT('Provider: ',@ProvAbbr,' .') AS Production, LPAD('.',15,' ') AS Adjust,'' AS Writeoff UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,p.MiddleI) AS Patient, FORMAT(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='Fee' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Production, FORMAT(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='Adj' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Adjust, FORMAT(-SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Writeoff FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.Writeoff),0) TranAmount, pl.ProvNum ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=RawPatTrans.ProvNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=RawPatTrans.PatNum WHERE RawPatTrans.TranDate=@ReportDate AND pv.Abbr=@ProvAbbr GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT('PatientCount: ',SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(Totals.Production)>0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS Patient, FORMAT(SUM(Totals.Production),2) AS Production,FORMAT(SUM(Totals.Adjust),2) AS Adjust, FORMAT(SUM(Totals.Writeoff),2) AS Writeoff FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='Fee' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Production, SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='Adj' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Adjust, -SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Writeoff FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.Writeoff),0) TranAmount, pl.ProvNum ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=RawPatTrans.ProvNum WHERE RawPatTrans.TranDate=@ReportDate AND pv.Abbr=@ProvAbbr GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) Totals UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder,'Net Production' AS Patient, FORMAT(SUM(NetTotals.Production)+SUM(NetTotals.Adjust)+SUM(NetTotals.Writeoff),2) AS Production,'','' FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='Fee' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Production, SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='Adj' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Adjust, -SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Writeoff FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.Writeoff),0) TranAmount, pl.ProvNum ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=RawPatTrans.ProvNum WHERE RawPatTrans.TranDate=@ReportDate AND pv.Abbr=@ProvAbbr GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) NetTotals ) A WHERE ((A.ItemOrder=2 AND ABS(A.Production)>0.005) OR A.ItemOrder!=2) ORDER BY A.ItemOrder,A.Patient;

request: List of patients whose first visit is before @FromDate variable, production and income from procedures completed in date range, age of patient and date of first visit. Included adjustment and writeoff amounts to calculate total production (Production+Adjustments-Writeoffs). Also included patient income and insurance income for calculating total income. Set date range for desired time span.
query: SET @FromDate='2012-01-01' , @ToDate='2012-06-07'; SELECT D.PatNum, D.Age, D.DateFirstVisit, D.$Production, D.$Adjustments, D.$Writeoff, D.$Production+D.$Adjustments-D.$Writeoff AS $TotalProduction, SUM(COALESCE(ps.SplitAmt, 0)) AS $PatIncome, D.$InsIncome, SUM(COALESCE(ps.SplitAmt, 0))+D.$InsIncome AS $TotalIncome FROM (SELECT C.*, SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff, 0)) AS $Writeoff, SUM(COALESCE(cp.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS $InsIncome FROM (SELECT B.*, SUM(COALESCE(ad.AdjAmt, 0)) AS $Adjustments FROM (SELECT A.*, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee, 0)) AS $Production FROM (SELECT DISTINCT(p.PatNum), (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) AS Age, DATE(p.DateFirstVisit) AS DateFirstVisit FROM patient p WHERE DATE(p.DateFirstVisit) < @FromDate AND DATE(p.DateFirstVisit) > '0001-01-01' AND (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) >10) A INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = A.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY A.PatNum) B LEFT JOIN adjustment ad ON ad.PatNum=B.PatNum AND ad.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY B.PatNum) C LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.PatNum=C.PatNum AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY C.PatNum) D LEFT JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.PatNum=D.PatNum AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY D.PatNum ORDER BY DateFirstVisit;

request: List of patients whose first visit is between date range, production and income from procedures completed in date range, age of patient and date of first visit. Included adjustment and writeoff amounts to calculate total production (Production+Adjustments-Writeoffs). Also included patient income and insurance income for calculating total income. Set date range for desired time span.
query: SET @FromDate='2012-01-01' , @ToDate='2012-06-07'; SELECT D.PatNum, D.Age, D.DateFirstVisit, D.$Production, D.$Adjustments, D.$Writeoff, D.$Production+D.$Adjustments-D.$Writeoff AS $TotalProduction, SUM(COALESCE(ps.SplitAmt, 0)) AS $PatIncome, D.$InsIncome, SUM(COALESCE(ps.SplitAmt, 0))+D.$InsIncome AS $TotalIncome FROM (SELECT C.*, SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff, 0)) AS $Writeoff, SUM(COALESCE(cp.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS $InsIncome FROM (SELECT B.*, SUM(COALESCE(ad.AdjAmt, 0)) AS $Adjustments FROM (SELECT A.*, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee, 0)) AS $Production FROM (SELECT DISTINCT(p.PatNum), (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) AS Age, DATE(p.DateFirstVisit) AS DateFirstVisit FROM patient p WHERE DATE(p.DateFirstVisit) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) >10) A INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = A.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY A.PatNum) B LEFT JOIN adjustment ad ON ad.PatNum=B.PatNum AND ad.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY B.PatNum) C LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.PatNum=C.PatNum AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY C.PatNum) D LEFT JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.PatNum=D.PatNum AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY D.PatNum ORDER BY DateFirstVisit;

request: Recalled patients in a given time period, prophy or perio special type recalls only
query: SET @pos=0, @FromDate='2013-01-01', @ToDate='2013-04-01'; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS ' FROM ( SELECT p.FName,p.LName,r.DatePrevious,rt.request FROM patient p INNER JOIN recall r ON r.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN recalltype rt ON rt.RecallTypeNum=r.RecallTypeNum WHERE r.DatePrevious BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND r.RecallTypeNum IN (SELECT pr.ValueString FROM preference pr WHERE pr.PrefName LIKE '%RecallTypeSpecial%') GROUP BY p.PatNum,r.DatePrevious ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName,r.DatePrevious ASC ) A;

request: All recalls with DateDue in the date range, with date scheduled, date of patient's last completed procedure, and patient's current primary insurance carrier
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT p.FName ,p.LName ,IFNULL(( SELECT rtype.request FROM recalltype rtype WHERE rtype.RecallTypeNum = r.RecallTypeNum ),'') AS 'RecallType' ,IF(r.IsDisabled,'Yes','No') AS 'Disabled?' ,DATE_FORMAT(r.DateDue,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Due' ,IFNULL(NULLIF(DATE_FORMAT(r.DateScheduled,'%m/%d/%Y'),'01/01/0001'),'NOT SCHEDULED') AS 'Scheduled' ,IFNULL(( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 13 AND def.DefNum = r.RecallStatus ),'') AS 'RecallStatus' ,IFNULL(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(pl.ProcDate),'%m/%d/%Y') FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.PatNum = r.PatNum ),'NOT SEEN') AS 'LastVisit' ,IFNULL(( SELECT ca.CarrierName FROM carrier ca INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 WHERE pp.PatNum = r.PatNum ),'NO INSURANCE') AS 'PriCarrier' FROM recall r INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = r.PatNum WHERE r.DateDue BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY r.PatNum, r.RecallNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, r.RecallTypeNum, r.RecallNum

request:
For all procedures completed in the date range, the fee schedule attached to the claim, sum of procedure fees,
sum of writeoffs, and net production=procedure fees - writeoffs. For the writeoff amount: If the claim is received
or supplemental we use the actual writeoff amount. If the claim is not received or if the procedure is complete and there
is an estimate but no claim has been created yet, then we use the writeoff estimate.
query: SET @StartDate='2012-01-01',@EndDate='2012-12-31'; SELECT (CASE WHEN ISNULL(A.request) THEN 'NoInsurance' ELSE A.request END) AS FeeSchedule, SUM(A.GrossProd) AS $GrossProduction_,SUM(A.Writeoff) AS '$Writeoff(est)_',SUM(A.GrossProd)-SUM(A.Writeoff) AS $NetProduction_ FROM ( SELECT fs.request,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS GrossProd, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1,4) THEN cp.Writeoff WHEN cp.Status IN (0,6) AND cp.WriteoffEst!=-1 THEN cp.WriteoffEst ELSE 0 END) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum=ip.FeeSched GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) A GROUP BY A.request;

request: Production, Total Production, Patient Payments, Insurance Payments, and Insurance Estimates broken down by Patient and Date of Service within a date range. With Aging of account. Balance information uses patient table aging; if on a version prior to 22.2, manual aging must be run before running this query for accurate balance information.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-08-14', @ToDate='2023-08-25'; SELECT Tbl.PatNum AS 'Pat , CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'Patient' , Tbl.ServiceDate AS 'Service Date' , COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(Tbl.DateClaimSent), '') AS 'Claim Sent Dates' , COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Production), '') AS 'Production' , COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(Tbl.ProcedureCodes), '') AS 'Procedures' , (CASE WHEN (ISNULL(MAX(Tbl.Production)) AND ISNULL(MAX(Tbl.AdjustmentsForDate)) AND ISNULL(MAX(Tbl.WriteOffsForDate))) THEN '' ELSE CAST((COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Production), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.AdjustmentsForDate), 0) - COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.WriteOffsForDate), 0) ) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) END) AS 'Total Production' , COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(Tbl.DatePatientPayment), '') AS 'Patient Payment Dates' , COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.AmountofPatientPayment), '') AS 'Amount Patient Payment' , COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsurancePaymentAmount), '') AS 'Insurance Payment Amount' , COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsurancePaymentEstimate), '') AS 'Insurance Payment Estimate' , COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(Tbl.DateInsurancePayment), '') AS 'Insurance Payment Dates' , COALESCE((CASE WHEN Aging.0to30 = 0.00 THEN '' ELSE Aging.0to30 END), '') AS 'Balance 0-30 Days' , COALESCE((CASE WHEN Aging.31to60 = 0.00 THEN '' ELSE Aging.31to60 END), '') AS '31-60 Days' , COALESCE((CASE WHEN Aging.61to90 = 0.00 THEN '' ELSE Aging.61to90 END), '') AS '61-90 Days' , COALESCE((CASE WHEN Aging.Over90 = 0.00 THEN '' ELSE Aging.Over90 END), '') AS 'Over 90 Days' , COALESCE(Aging.Total, '0.00') AS 'Total Balance' FROM( SELECT adj.PatNum , adj.AdjDate AS 'ServiceDate' , NULL AS 'DateClaimSent' , NULL AS 'Production' , NULL AS 'ProcedureCodes' , NULL AS 'DatePatientPayment' , NULL AS 'AmountofPatientPayment' , NULL AS 'InsurancePaymentAmount' , NULL AS 'InsurancePaymentEstimate' , NULL AS 'DateInsurancePayment' , CAST(SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'AdjustmentsForDate' , NULL AS 'WriteOffsForDate' FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY adj.PatNum, adj.AdjDate UNION ALL SELECT pay.PatNum , pay.PayDate AS 'ServiceDate' , NULL AS 'DateClaimSent' , NULL AS 'Production' , NULL AS 'ProcedureCodes' , pay.PayDate AS 'DatePatientPayment' , CAST(SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'AmountofPatientPayment' , NULL AS 'InsurancePaymentAmount' , NULL AS 'InsurancePaymentEstimate' , NULL AS 'DateInsurancePayment' , NULL AS 'AdjustmentsForDate' , NULL AS 'WriteOffsForDate' FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate UNION ALL SELECT Procs.PatNum , Procs.ProcDate AS 'ServiceDate' , COALESCE(Claims.DateSent,'') AS 'DateClaimSent' , COALESCE(Procs.FeesForDate,'') AS 'Production' , COALESCE(Procs.ProcedureCodes,'') AS 'ProcedureCodes' , NULL AS 'DatePatientPayment' , NULL AS 'AmountofPatientPayment' , COALESCE(Claims.FeesForDate,'') AS 'InsurancePaymentAmount' , COALESCE(Claims.EstFeesForDate,'') AS 'InsurancePaymentEstimate' , COALESCE(Claims.DateCP,'') AS 'DateInsurancePayment' , NULL AS 'AdjustmentsForDate' , Claims.WriteOffForDate AS 'WriteOffsForDate' FROM ( SELECT proc.PatNum , proc.ProcDate , CAST(SUM(proc.ProcFee * (proc.UnitQty + proc.BaseUnits)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'FeesForDate' , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(pc.ProcCode,'') ORDER BY pc.ProcCode) AS 'ProcedureCodes' FROM procedurelog proc INNER JOIN procedureCode pc ON proc.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode != '~GRP~' WHERE proc.ProcStatus = 2 AND proc.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY proc.PatNum, proc.ProcDate ) Procs LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum , cp.ProcDate , CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status IN(1, 4) THEN cp.InsPayAmt END) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'FeesForDate' , CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status = 0 THEN cp.InsPayEst END) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'EstFeesForDate' , COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN c.DateSent = '0001-01-01' THEN 'Not Sent' ELSE c.DateSent END) ORDER BY c.DateSent), '') AS 'DateSent' , COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN cp.Status = 0 THEN 'NotYetPaid' ELSE cp.DateCP END) ORDER BY cp.DateCP), '') AS 'DateCP' , COALESCE(CAST(SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)), '') AS 'WriteOffForDate' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim c ON c.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum WHERE cp.Status IN(0, 1, 4) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum, cp.ProcDate ) Claims ON Claims.PatNum = Procs.PatNum AND Claims.ProcDate = Procs.ProcDate GROUP BY Procs.PatNum, Procs.ProcDate ) Tbl LEFT JOIN patient p ON Tbl.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT g.PatNum AS 'Guarantor' , CAST(ROUND(g.Bal_0_30, 2) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS '0to30' , CAST(ROUND(g.Bal_31_60, 2) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS '31to60' , CAST(ROUND(g.Bal_61_90, 2) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS '61to90' , CAST(ROUND(g.BalOver90, 2) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Over90' , CAST(ROUND(g.BalTotal, 2) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Total' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor WHERE ABS(g.BalTotal) > 0.005 GROUP BY g.PatNum )Aging ON Aging.Guarantor = p.Guarantor GROUP BY Tbl.ServiceDate, Tbl.PatNum ORDER BY Tbl.ServiceDate, Tbl.PatNum

request: Claims with a Custom Tracking type set with date of service in a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT c.PatNum ,c.PatNum AS 'Pat ,c.DateService AS 'Date of Service' ,c.DateSent AS 'Date Sent' ,c.DateReceived AS 'Date Received' ,c.PlanNum ,c.ProvTreat ,c.ClaimFee AS '$ClaimFee_' ,c.InsPayEst AS '$InsPayEst_' ,c.InsPayAmt AS '$InsPayAmt_' ,c.DedApplied AS '$DedApplied_' ,c.ReasonUnderpaid AS 'Reason Underpaid' ,c.ClaimNote AS 'Claim Note' ,d.ItemName AS 'Custom Tracking' ,COALESCE(tuser.User, 'Unknown') AS 'Custom Tracking User' FROM claim c LEFT JOIN( SELECT ct.ClaimNum ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(uo.UserName ORDER BY ct.DateTimeEntry DESC), ',', 1) AS 'User' FROM claimtracking ct INNER JOIN userod uo ON ct.UserNum = uo.UserNum WHERE ct.TrackingType = 'StatusHistory' GROUP BY ct.ClaimNum ) tuser ON tuser.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN Definition d ON c.CustomTracking = d.DefNum WHERE c.DateService BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND c.CustomTracking != 0 ORDER BY c.DateService, c.PatNum

request: Total production by assistant over date range, ONLY COUNTS completed production in appointments!
query: SET @FromDate='2017-01-01', @ToDate='2017-01-31' ; SELECT CONCAT(e.FName, ' ',e.LName) AS Assistant, SUM(ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS $Production__ FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.AptNum=pl.AptNum INNER JOIN employee e ON a.Assistant=e.EmployeeNum WHERE ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY a.Assistant;

request: Scheduled and unscheduled procedures for patients with a scheduled appointment in a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2016-04-19', @ToDate='2016-04-21'; SELECT patient.PatNum ,CONCAT(pv.LName, ', ',pv.FName) AS Provider ,COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime, '%l:%i %p %m/%d/%Y'),'Unscheduled') AS 'Appt Date-Time' ,pc.ProcCode ,LEFT(AbbrDesc,13) AS AbbrDesc ,(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty))AS '$Fee_' ,( (pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) -(COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayEst),0) +COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0)) ) AS '$PatPort_' ,LEFT(a.Note, 30) AS AbrAptNote FROM ( SELECT app.PatNum FROM appointment app WHERE app.AptStatus IN(1,4) AND app.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY app.PatNum ) patient INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON patient.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN appointment a ON a.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND a.AptStatus IN(1,4) AND a.AptDateTime > CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 6 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY patient.PatNum,COALESCE(a.AptDateTime,'3000-01-01');

request: Daily Production by provider, excluding hidden and secondary providers
query: SET @FromDate='2025-05-01', @ToDate='2025-05-31'; SELECT IF(s1.Seq = 1,main.Abbr,'Totals') AS 'Provider' ,IF(s1.Seq = 1,main.LName,'') AS 'ProvLName' ,IF(s1.Seq = 1,main.FName,'') AS 'ProvFName' ,IF(s1.Seq = 1,main.DaysWorked,SUM(main.DaysWorked)) AS 'DaysWorked' ,FORMAT(IF(s1.Seq = 1,main.GrossProd,SUM(main.GrossProd)),2) AS 'GrossProd' ,FORMAT(IF(s1.Seq = 1,main.Writeoffs,SUM(main.Writeoffs)),2) AS 'Writeoff' ,FORMAT(IF(s1.Seq = 1,main.Adjustments,SUM(main.Adjustments)),2) AS 'Adjustment' ,FORMAT( IF(s1.Seq = 1 ,main.GrossProd + main.Writeoffs + main.Adjustments ,SUM(main.GrossProd) + SUM(main.Writeoffs) + SUM(main.Adjustments)) ,2) AS 'NetProd' ,FORMAT(IFNULL(IF(s1.Seq = 1,main.GrossProd / main.DaysWorked,SUM(main.GrossProd) / SUM(main.DaysWorked)),0),2) AS 'AvgGrossProd' ,FORMAT(IFNULL( IF(s1.Seq = 1 ,(main.GrossProd + main.Writeoffs + main.Adjustments) / main.DaysWorked ,(SUM(main.GrossProd) + SUM(main.Writeoffs) + SUM(main.Adjustments)) / SUM(main.DaysWorked)) ,0),2) AS 'AvgNetProd' FROM ( SELECT pr.Abbr ,pr.ProvNum ,pr.LName ,pr.FName ,( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) AS 'DaysWorked' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ),0) AS 'GrossProd' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(-cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,5,7) AND cp.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ),0) AS 'Writeoffs' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(a.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment a WHERE a.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND a.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ),0) AS 'Adjustments' FROM provider pr WHERE !pr.IsHidden AND !pr.IsSecondary GROUP BY pr.ProvNum ORDER BY pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum ) main LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_2 s1 ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(s1.Seq = 1,CONCAT(s1.Seq,'+',main.ProvNum),s1.Seq) ORDER BY s1.Seq, main.Abbr, main.ProvNum

request: Insurance aging report. Outstanding insurance estimates aged by date of service 0 to 30, 30 to 60, 60 to 90 etc. Summed by carrier
query: SELECT A.CarrierName, SUM(Ins0to30) AS $Ins0to30_ , SUM(Ins30to60) AS $Ins30to60_, SUM(Ins60to90) AS $Ins60to90_, SUM(InsOver90) AS $InsOver90_, SUM(InsPayEst) AS $SumInsPayEst_ FROM ( SELECT ClaimNum, InsPayEst, DateService, ip.CarrierNum, carrier.CarrierName, IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))> 90,InsPayEst,0) AS 'InsOver90', IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))> 60,IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))<= 90, InsPayEst,0),0) AS 'Ins60to90', IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))> 30,IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))<= 60, InsPayEst,0),0) AS 'Ins30to60', IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))<= 30,InsPayEst,0) AS 'Ins0to30' FROM claim INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=claim.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE ClaimStatus='S' AND ClaimType!="PreAuth" ) A GROUP BY A.CarrierNum;

request: Time Card summary for all Employees for last full month. With custom multiplier
query: SET @FromDate=DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01') , @ToDate=DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01')- INTERVAL 1 DAY; SET @Multiplier=2; SELECT *,(OverTime+RegHours) AS HoursWorked, ((OverTime+RegHours)*@Multiplier) AS HoursWithMult, ((OverTime+RegHours)*(2*@Multiplier)) AS HoursWithMultHyg FROM ( SELECT e.FName, e.LName, FORMAT( SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus IN(0,1)), TIMEDIFF(TimeDisplayed2, TimeDisplayed1),0)))/3600,2 ) AS RawHours, FORMAT( (IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.RegHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum=e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.OTimeHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum=e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),IF(c.AdjustIsOverRidden, c.Adjust, c.AdjustAuto),0))))/3600,2 ) AS AdHours, FORMAT( SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(c.TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus=2), TIMEDIFF(c.TimeDisplayed2, c.TimeDisplayed1),0)))/3600,2 ) AS BreakTot, FORMAT( (SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(c.TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus=2), TIMEDIFF(c.TimeDisplayed2, c.TimeDisplayed1),0)))+ SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),IF(c.AdjustIsOverRidden, c.Adjust, c.AdjustAuto),0))) )/3600,2 ) AS BreakAdj, FORMAT( (IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.OTimeHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum =e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) AND c.OTimeHours<>'-01:00:00', (c.OTimeHours),0)))+ SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),c.OTimeAuto,0))))/3600,2 ) AS OverTime, FORMAT( (IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.RegHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum =e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(c.TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus IN(0,1)), TIMEDIFF(c.TimeDisplayed2, c.TimeDisplayed1),0)))+ SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),IF(c.AdjustIsOverRidden, c.Adjust, c.AdjustAuto),0)))- SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) AND c.OTimeHours<>'-01:00:00', c.OTimeHours,0)))- SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) , c.OTimeAuto,0))))/3600,2 ) AS RegHours FROM employee e LEFT JOIN clockevent c ON c.EmployeeNum=e.EmployeeNum AND (DATE(c.TimeDisplayed1) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) GROUP BY c.EmployeeNum ) a

request: Count of unique active patients seen in a date range with the specified code completed
query: SET @FromDate='2013-10-25' , @ToDate='2013-11-25'; SET @Code='%11107%'; SELECT COUNT(*) AS 'Number of unique patients seen' FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pc.ProcCode LIKE @Code AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND p.PatStatus=0 ) A

request: Insurance info for patients with apts in date range with plannotes and custom patfield
query: SET @FromDate='2013-10-30', @ToDate='2013-11-30'; SELECT p.LName, p.FName, p.Birthdate, a.AptDateTime, p.SSN, IFNULL(c.CarrierName, 'none') PriCarrier,IFNULL(ins.SubscriberID, 'none') PriSubID, IFNULL(c.Phone,'none') PriCarPhone, IFNULL(c2.CarrierName, 'none') SecCarrier, IFNULL(c2.Phone,'none') SecCarPhone, ip.PlanNote AS PriPlanNote, ip2.PlanNote AS SecPlanNote, pf.FieldValue AS 'InsuranceLastVerified' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON p.PatNum=a.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ins ON ins.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ins.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp2 ON pp2.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp2.Ordinal=2 LEFT JOIN inssub ins2 ON ins2.InsSubNum=pp2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip2 ON ip2.PlanNum=ins2.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier c2 ON c2.CarrierNum=ip2.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patfield pf ON pf.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pf.FieldName LIKE '%Insurance Last Verified%' WHERE DATE(a.aptdatetime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate;

request: Waiting Room Report, shows time each patient arrived, length waiting, was seated, chair time, dismissed time, Dentist on appointment and Operatory. Also gives average waiting time in minutes
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01' , @ToDate='2020-01-31'; SELECT tmp1.PatName, tmp1.PatNum, tmp1.AptDateTime, tmp1.ProvNum, tmp1.Op, tmp1.TimeArrived, tmp1.TimeSeated, tmp1.TimeDismiss, tmp1.WaitTime, tmp1.ChairTime FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PatName', LEFT(a.PatNum,15) AS 'PatNum', AptDateTime, a.ProvNum, a.Op, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%r') ELSE '' END),12) AS TimeArrived, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%r') ELSE '' END),12) AS TimeSeated, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%r') ELSE '' END),12) AS TimeDismiss, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeSeated)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeArrived)),'%H:%i') ELSE '' END),5) AS WaitTime, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeDismissed)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeSeated)),'%H:%i') ELSE '' END),5) AS ChairTime FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 2 ORDER BY a.AptDateTime )tmp1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Average Wait' AS 'Pat Name', '' AS 'Pat Num', '' AS 'AptDateTime', '' AS ProvNum, '' AS Op, '' AS TimeArrived, '' AS TimeSeated, '' AS TimeDismiss, FORMAT( (SELECT (SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(tmp1.WaitTime))/COUNT(tmp1.WaitTime))/60 FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Pat Name', LEFT(a.PatNum,15) AS 'Pat Num', AptDateTime, a.ProvNum, a.Op, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%r') ELSE '' END),12) AS TimeArrived, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%r') ELSE '' END),12) AS TimeSeated, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%r') ELSE '' END),12) AS TimeDismiss, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeSeated)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeArrived)),'%H:%i') ELSE '' END),5) AS WaitTime, LEFT((CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeDismissed)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeSeated)),'%H:%i') ELSE '' END),5) AS ChairTime FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 2 ORDER BY a.AptDateTime )tmp1 WHERE tmp1.WaitTime<>''),1 ) AS WaitTime, '' AS ChairTime;

request: Daily procedures report in custom date range with claim and carrier information
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-12-01', @ToDate ='2024-12-23'; SELECT pl.ProcDate ,p.PatNum AS 'Pat ,p.PatNum ,pc.ProcCode ,pl.ToothNum ,LEFT(pc.Descript,40) AS 'request' ,car.CarrierName ,car.Phone ,(CASE WHEN cl.ClaimStatus = 'U' THEN 'Unsent' WHEN cl.ClaimStatus = 'H' THEN 'HoldForPrimary' WHEN cl.ClaimStatus = 'W' THEN 'WaitingToSend' WHEN cl.ClaimStatus = 'S' THEN 'Sent' WHEN cl.ClaimStatus = 'R' THEN 'Received' ELSE '' END) AS 'ClaimStatus' ,FORMAT(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty),2) AS 'ProcFee' ,FORMAT(cp.InsPayAmt,2) 'InsPayAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cp.ClaimNum = cl.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON ip.CarrierNum = car.CarrierNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND cp.Status IN (0,1,6) AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum,cp.ClaimProcNum ORDER BY pl.ProcDate,p.LName, p.FName,p.PatNum,CarrierName,pc.ProcCode,ToothNum,pl.ProcNum,cp.ClaimProcNum;

request: Production and income report over date range with specific provider and billing type. Insurance writeoffs by ins payment date, so assume that any PPOs are entered as Category Percentage.
query: SET @FromDate='2013-11-06' , @ToDate='2013-12-01'; SET @BillingType='%Standard%', @ProviderAbbr='%Doc1%'; SELECT DATE AS ServiceDate,$Prod_,$Adjust_,$Writeoff_,$TotProd_,$PatIncome_,$InsIncome_,$TotIncome_ FROM( SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder, DATE_FORMAT(Trans.TDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS DATE, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType='Cap' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Prod_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Adjust_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Writeoff_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff','Cap') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $TotProd_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $PatIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $InsIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $TotIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProcDate AS TDate,pl.ProvNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON pl.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProviderAbbr AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.AdjDate AS TDate,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum=a.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON a.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProviderAbbr UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType, ps.DatePay AS TDate,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum=ps.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON ps.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProviderAbbr UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TDate,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON cp.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProviderAbbr AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TDate,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON cp.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProviderAbbr AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Cap' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TDate,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,-cp.Writeoff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON cp.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE cp.Status=7 AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProviderAbbr AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) Trans GROUP BY Trans.TDate UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder, ' NULL AS $Prod_, NULL AS $Adjust_, NULL AS $Writeoff_, NULL AS $TotProd_, NULL AS $PatIncome_, NULL AS $InsIncome_, NULL AS $TotIncome_ UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT('ProviderAbbr: ',REPLACE(@ProviderAbbr,'%','')) AS DATE, NULL AS $Prod_, NULL AS $Adjust_, NULL AS $Writeoff_, NULL AS $TotProd_, NULL AS $PatIncome_, NULL AS $InsIncome_, NULL AS $TotIncome_ UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT('BillingType: ',REPLACE(@BillingType,'%','')) AS DATE, NULL AS $Prod_, NULL AS $Adjust_, NULL AS $Writeoff_, NULL AS $TotProd_, NULL AS $PatIncome_, NULL AS $InsIncome_, NULL AS $TotIncome_ UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT('ToDate: ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS DATE, NULL AS $Prod_, NULL AS $Adjust_, NULL AS $Writeoff_, NULL AS $TotProd_, NULL AS $PatIncome_, NULL AS $InsIncome_, NULL AS $TotIncome_ UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT('FromDate: ',DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS DATE, NULL AS $Prod_, NULL AS $Adjust_, NULL AS $Writeoff_, NULL AS $TotProd_, NULL AS $PatIncome_, NULL AS $InsIncome_, NULL AS $TotIncome_ ) A ORDER BY ItemOrder,DATE;

request: Patients seen in the last 3 years with Address, City, State, Zip, Birthdate, Date of last visit, and Primary and Secondary insurance carrier names.
query: SELECT p.LName,p.FName, p.Address,p.Address2,p.City,p.State,p.Zip, p.Birthdate, lastvisit.LDate AS 'DateLastVisit', carrier1.CarrierName AS 'PrimaryInsCarrier', carrier2.CarrierName AS 'SecondaryInsCarrier' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT PatNum,MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS LDate FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum ) lastvisit ON lastvisit.Patnum=p.PatNum AND lastvisit.LDate>(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 3 YEAR) LEFT JOIN patplan pp1 ON pp1.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp1.ORDINAL=1 LEFT JOIN inssub iss1 ON pp1.InsSubNum=iss1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum=iss1.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier carrier1 ON carrier1.CarrierNum=ip1.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp2 ON pp2.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp2.ORDINAL=2 LEFT JOIN inssub iss2 ON pp2.InsSubNum=iss2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip2 ON ip2.PlanNum=iss2.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier carrier2 ON carrier2.CarrierNum=ip2.CarrierNum WHERE p.PatStatus=0 ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName,Birthdate ASC

request: Outstanding Insurance Claims older than 1 day old with PatNum,MedicaidID,Birthdate and Subscriber's SSN
query: SELECT car.CarrierName, p.MedicaidID, sub.SSN AS 'SubscriberSSN', p.Birthdate, p.PatNum AS 'Pat CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PatientName', (CASE WHEN c.ClaimType='P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN c.ClaimType='S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN c.ClaimType='Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE c.ClaimType END) AS ClaimType, c.DateService, c.DateSent, c.ClaimFee AS '$Amount_' FROM claim c INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=c.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON iss.InsSubNum=c.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum=iss.Subscriber WHERE c.ClaimStatus='S' AND c.DateSent < (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND c.ClaimType != 'PreAuth' ORDER BY car.CarrierName,c.DateService;

request: Shows all transactions for the date set, MTD totals, YTD totals and A/R as of date set.
query: SET @Date='2019-06-03'; SELECT CONCAT('Day Sheet For: ',DATE_FORMAT(@Date,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'ID - Name','' AS Dr,'' AS request, '' AS TxArea,NULL AS Charge,NULL AS Adjust,NULL AS Writeoff,NULL AS Payment UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'ID - Name','' AS Dr,'' AS request,'' AS TxArea,NULL AS Charge,NULL AS Adjust,NULL AS Writeoff,NULL AS Payment UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(AllTrans.PatNum,' - ',AllTrans.LName,', ',AllTrans.FName) AS 'ID - Name',pv.Abbr AS Dr, LEFT(AllTrans.request,35) AS request,AllTrans.TxArea,FORMAT(AllTrans.Charge,2) AS Charge,FORMAT(AllTrans.Adjust,2) AS Adjust,FORMAT(-AllTrans.Writeoff,2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT(-AllTrans.Payment,2) AS Payment FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,A.ProvNum, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Fee' THEN CONCAT(pc.ProcCode,' - ',pc.Descript) WHEN A.TranType IN('Pay','Adj') THEN CONCAT(A.TranType,' - ',d.ItemName) WHEN A.TranType='Writeoff' THEN CONCAT(A.TranType,' - ',c.CarrierName) ELSE 'Payment Plan' END) AS request, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND (pc.TreatArea IN(4,5,6)) THEN A.Surf WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND pc.TreatArea=1 THEN CONCAT(A.ToothNum, ", ", A.Surf) WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND pc.TreatArea=2 THEN A.ToothNum WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND pc.TreatArea=7 THEN A.ToothRange WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND pc.TreatArea NOT IN(1,2,4,5,6,7) THEN 'Mouth' ELSE '' END) AS TxArea, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Fee' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE NULL END) AS Charge, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Adj' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE NULL END) AS Adjust, NULL AS Writeoff, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Pay' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE NULL END) AS Payment FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount,pl.ProvNum ProvNum,pl.CodeNum CODE,pl.Surf Surf,pl.ToothNum ToothNum,pl.ToothRange ToothRange FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.DatePay TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount,ps.ProvNum ProvNum,p.PayType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 AND ps.SplitAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum,a.AdjType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM adjustment a ) A INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=A.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=A.Code LEFT JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=A.Code LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=A.Code WHERE A.TranDate=@Date UNION ALL ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,A.ProvNum, CONCAT(A.TranType,' - ',c.CarrierName) AS request, '' AS TxArea,NULL AS Charge,NULL AS Adjust, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Writeoff' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE NULL END) AS Writeoff, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='InsPay' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE NULL END) AS Payment FROM ( SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.InsPayAmt<>0 GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.DateCp UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.Writeoff<>0 ) A INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=A.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=A.Code WHERE A.TranDate=@Date ) ORDER BY LName,FName,request ) AllTrans LEFT JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=AllTrans.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT '','','',' UNION ALL SELECT '','','','Totals:' AS TxArea, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Charge)>0.01 THEN B.Charge ELSE 0 END),2) AS Charge, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Adjust)>0.01 THEN B.Adjust ELSE 0 END),2) AS Adjust, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Writeoff)>0.01 THEN B.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Payment)>0.01 THEN B.Payment ELSE 0 END),2) AS Payment FROM ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Fee' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Charge, SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Adj' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Adjust, -SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Writeoff' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Writeoff, -SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType IN('Pay','InsPay') THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Payment FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount,pl.ProvNum ProvNum,pl.CodeNum CODE,pl.Surf Surf,pl.ToothNum ToothNum,pl.ToothRange ToothRange FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.DatePay TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount,ps.ProvNum ProvNum,p.PayType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum,a.AdjType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) ) A WHERE A.TranDate=@Date AND A.TranAmount<>0 ) B UNION ALL SELECT '','','',' UNION ALL SELECT '','','','MTD:' AS TxArea, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Charge)>0.01 THEN B.Charge ELSE 0 END),2) AS Charge, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Adjust)>0.01 THEN B.Adjust ELSE 0 END),2) AS Adjust, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Writeoff)>0.01 THEN B.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Payment)>0.01 THEN B.Payment ELSE 0 END),2) AS Payment FROM ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Fee' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Charge, SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Adj' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Adjust, -SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Writeoff' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Writeoff, -SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType IN('Pay','InsPay') THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Payment FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount,pl.ProvNum ProvNum,pl.CodeNum CODE,pl.Surf Surf,pl.ToothNum ToothNum,pl.ToothRange ToothRange FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.DatePay TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount,ps.ProvNum ProvNum,p.PayType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum,a.AdjType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) ) A WHERE MONTH(A.TranDate)=MONTH(@Date) AND YEAR(A.TranDate)=YEAR(@Date) AND A.TranAmount<>0 ) B UNION ALL SELECT '','','','YTD:' AS TxArea, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Charge)>0.01 THEN B.Charge ELSE 0 END),2) AS Charge, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Adjust)>0.01 THEN B.Adjust ELSE 0 END),2) AS Adjust, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Writeoff)>0.01 THEN B.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT((CASE WHEN ABS(B.Payment)>0.01 THEN B.Payment ELSE 0 END),2) AS Payment FROM ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Fee' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Charge, SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Adj' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Adjust, -SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Writeoff' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Writeoff, -SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType IN('Pay','InsPay') THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Payment FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount,pl.ProvNum ProvNum,pl.CodeNum CODE,pl.Surf Surf,pl.ToothNum ToothNum,pl.ToothRange ToothRange FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.DatePay TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount,ps.ProvNum ProvNum,p.PayType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum,a.AdjType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) ) A WHERE YEAR(A.TranDate)=YEAR(@Date) AND A.TranAmount<>0 ) B UNION ALL SELECT '','','',' UNION ALL ( SELECT '','','','A/R:' AS TxArea,FORMAT(SUM(B.FamBal),2) AS Charge,'','','' FROM ( SELECT SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS FamBal FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType, pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.DatePay TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType, a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Capitat' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt TranAmount FROM payplan pp ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=RawPatTrans.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON patient.Guarantor=g.PatNum WHERE TranAmount<>0 AND TranDate<=@Date GROUP BY g.PatNum )B WHERE B.FamBal>0.001 ) UNION ALL SELECT '','','',' UNION ALL SELECT '','','New Patients: Cur:', SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(A.ProcDate)=@Date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 'MTD:',SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ProcDate)=MONTH(@Date) AND YEAR(A.ProcDate)=YEAR(@Date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 'YTD:',SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(A.ProcDate)=YEAR(@Date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS ProcDate FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate<=@Date GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) A UNION ALL SELECT '','','Patients Seen: Cur:', (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PatNum) FROM procedurelog WHERE ProcDate=@Date AND ProcStatus=2), 'MTD:',(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PatNum) FROM procedurelog WHERE MONTH(ProcDate)=MONTH(@Date) AND YEAR(ProcDate)=YEAR(@Date) AND ProcStatus=2 AND ProcDate<=@Date), 'YTD:',(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PatNum) FROM procedurelog WHERE YEAR(ProcDate)=YEAR(@Date) AND ProcStatus=2 AND ProcDate<=@Date);

request: Time Card summary for all Employees with days worked and avg hours per day
query: SET @FromDate='2013-10-29', @ToDate='2013-11-11'; SELECT e.FName,e.LName, FORMAT(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus IN(0,1)), TIMEDIFF(TimeDisplayed2, TimeDisplayed1),0)))/3600,2) AS RawHours, FORMAT( (IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.RegHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum=e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.OTimeHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum=e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),IF(c.AdjustIsOverRidden, c.Adjust, c.AdjustAuto),0))))/3600 ,2) AS AdHours, FORMAT(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(c.TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus=2), TIMEDIFF(c.TimeDisplayed2, c.TimeDisplayed1),0)))/3600,2) AS BreakTot, FORMAT( (SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(c.TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus=2), TIMEDIFF(c.TimeDisplayed2, c.TimeDisplayed1),0)))+ SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),IF(c.AdjustIsOverRidden, c.Adjust, c.AdjustAuto),0))) )/3600,2 ) AS BreakAdj, FORMAT( (IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.OTimeHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum =e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) AND c.OTimeHours<>'-01:00:00', (c.OTimeHours),0)))+ SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),c.OTimeAuto,0))))/3600,2 ) AS OverTime, FORMAT( (IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.RegHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum =e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(c.TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus IN(0,1)), TIMEDIFF(c.TimeDisplayed2, c.TimeDisplayed1),0)))+ SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),IF(c.AdjustIsOverRidden, c.Adjust, c.AdjustAuto),0)))- SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) AND c.OTimeHours<>'-01:00:00', c.OTimeHours,0)))- SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) , c.OTimeAuto,0))))/3600,2 ) AS RegHours , daysworked.Days AS 'DaysWorked', FORMAT( (((IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.RegHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum =e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(c.TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus IN(0,1)), TIMEDIFF(c.TimeDisplayed2, c.TimeDisplayed1),0)))+ SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),IF(c.AdjustIsOverRidden, c.Adjust, c.AdjustAuto),0)))- SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) AND c.OTimeHours<>'-01:00:00', c.OTimeHours,0)))- SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) , c.OTimeAuto,0))))/3600) + ((IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.OTimeHours)) FROM timeadjust ta WHERE ta.EmployeeNum =e.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ta.TimeEntry) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0) + SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) AND c.OTimeHours<>'-01:00:00', (c.OTimeHours),0)))+ SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF(c.ClockStatus IN(0,1),c.OTimeAuto,0))))/3600)) /daysworked.Days,2) AS AvgHoursPerDay FROM employee e INNER JOIN clockevent c ON c.EmployeeNum=e.EmployeeNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT c.EmployeeNum,COUNT(*) AS Days FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT c.EmployeeNum,DATE(c.TimeDisplayed1) FROM clockevent c WHERE c.ClockStatus IN(0,1) AND DATE(c.TimeDisplayed1) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) c GROUP BY EmployeeNum ) daysworked ON daysworked.EmployeeNum=e.EmployeeNum WHERE (DATE(c.TimeDisplayed1) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) GROUP BY c.EmployeeNum;

request: List of active patients with no appointments in the last 18 months, includes phone numbers and date last seen
query: SET @FromDate=(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 18 MONTH) ,@ToDate=CURDATE(); SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS Patient, CONCAT(" ",LEFT(p.HmPhone,13),"- ",LEFT(p.WkPhone,13),"- ",LEFT(p.WirelessPhone,13)) AS 'Phone Hm-Wk-Cell', lastvisit.LDate AS 'Date Last Seen' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum AND (DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2) INNER JOIN ( SELECT PatNum,MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS LDate FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum ) lastvisit ON lastvisit.Patnum=p.PatNum AND lastvisit.LDate>(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 3 YEAR) WHERE ISNULL(ap.aptnum) AND p.PatStatus=0 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ASC;

request: List of active patients that had a procedure or appointment completed 18 months ago, with no appointments in the last 18 months. Includes phone numbers and last completed procedure date
query: SET @FromDate=(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 18 MONTH) ,@ToDate=CURDATE(); SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS Patient, p.HmPhone, p.WkPhone, p.WirelessPhone, COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(lastvisitproc.LDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),'Never') AS 'Last Completed Procedure Date', COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(lastvisitappt.LDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),'Never') AS 'Last Appointment Date' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum AND (DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND @ToDate) AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PatNum,MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS LDate FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum ) lastvisitproc ON lastvisitproc.Patnum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PatNum,MAX(DATE(a.AptDateTime)) AS LDate FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY PatNum ) lastvisitappt ON lastvisitappt.Patnum=p.PatNum WHERE ( p.PatNum IN( SELECT a.PatNum FROM appointment a WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime)=@FromDate AND a.AptStatus=2 ) OR p.PatNum IN( SELECT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate=@FromDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 ) ) AND ISNULL(ap.aptnum) AND p.PatStatus=0 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ASC;

request: Total production in a date range by procedure code from patients who have a given fee schedule (Fee schedule from primary insurance if it exists, then fee schedule rarely used, and if that isn't set use primary provider fee schedule)
query: SET @FromDate='2013-01-01' , @ToDate='2013-12-31'; SET @FeeSchedule='%Standard%'; SELECT (CASE WHEN NOT ISNULL(fs1.request) THEN fs1.request WHEN NOT ISNULL(fs2.request) THEN fs2.request ELSE fs3.request END) AS FeeShedule, pc.ProcCode,pc.AbbrDesc,SUM(pl.TotalFee) AS '$TotalProduction_',COUNT(*) AS NumberCompleted FROM patient INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TotalFee, pl.ProcStatus, pl.ProcDate, pl.PatNum, pl.CodeNum, pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate )pl ON patient.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum= pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=patient.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ib.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN feesched fs1 ON fs1.FeeSchedNum=ip.FeeSched LEFT JOIN feesched fs2 ON fs2.FeeSchedNum=patient.FeeSched INNER JOIN provider pv ON patient.PriProv=pv.ProvNum INNER JOIN feesched fs3 ON fs3.FeeSchedNum=pv.FeeSched WHERE (CASE WHEN NOT ISNULL(fs1.request) THEN fs1.request WHEN NOT ISNULL(fs2.request) THEN fs2.request ELSE fs3.request END) LIKE @FeeSchedule GROUP BY pc.ProcCode ORDER BY ProcCode ASC;

request: Completed appointments in a date range with total production, insurance carriers, insurance estimates, insurance payments, and amount patient paid on date of appointment
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-01-31'; SELECT DISTINCT a.PatNum, DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'AppointmentDate', FORMAT(SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)), 2) AS '$TotalProduction_', a.InsCarriers, FORMAT(a.InsEstimate , 2)AS '$InsEstimate_', FORMAT(a.InsPaid, 2)AS '$InsPaid_', FORMAT(a.PatPaidOnAptDate, 2) AS '$PatPaidOnAptDate_', FORMAT(a.Writeoff, 2) AS '$WriteOff_', FORMAT(a.TotalCollected, 2) AS '$TotalCollected_', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee),0)-COALESCE(a.InsPaid,0)-COALESCE(a.WriteOff,0)-COALESCE(a.PatPaidOnAptDate,0), 2) AS '$ExpectedRemainingPayment_' FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ap.PatNum, ap.AptDateTime, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT car.CarrierName ORDER BY car.CarrierName SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'InsCarriers', SUM(CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride!=-1 THEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE cp.InsEstTotal END) AS 'InsEstimate', SUM(InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPaid', pay.TotalPayAmt AS 'PatPaidOnAptDate', SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'WriteOff', COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0)+COALESCE(pay.TotalPayAmt,0) AS 'TotalCollected', ap.AptNum FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=ap.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate=DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AND pl.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate, SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS TotalPayAmt FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pay.PayAmt > 0 GROUP BY pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate ) pay ON pay.PatNum=ap.PatNum AND pay.PayDate=DATE(ap.AptDateTime) WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ap.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY ap.AptNum ) a LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=a.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate=DATE(a.AptDateTime) AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY DATE(a.AptDateTime),a.PatNum;

request: Patients that have active popups on their account (For versions 13.2 and older)
query: SELECT popup.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM popup INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=popup.PatNum WHERE popup.IsDisabled=0 GROUP BY popup.PatNum ORDER BY LName,FName

request: Production, Writeoffs, Adjustments, Net Production, Ins Payments, Patient Payments and Total Payments by fee schedule in a date range. Payments and writeoffs by procdate
query: SET @FromDate='2013-10-01' , @ToDate='2013-10-31'; SELECT A.FeeSchedule, A.$Production_,A.$Adjustment_,A.$Writeoff_,(A.$Production_+A.$Adjustment_+A.$Writeoff_) AS $NetProd_,A.$InsPay_,A.$PatPay_,A.$TotPay_ FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN (fs1.request IS NULL AND fs2.request IS NULL) THEN fs3.request WHEN (fs1.request IS NULL AND fs2.request IS NOT NULL) THEN fs2.request WHEN (fs1.request IS NOT NULL) THEN fs1.request ELSE NULL END) AS FeeSchedule, SUM(CASE WHEN (RawTable.TranType='Fee') THEN RawTable.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Production_, SUM(CASE WHEN (RawTable.TranType='Adj') THEN RawTable.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Adjustment_, SUM(CASE WHEN (RawTable.TranType='Writeoff') THEN RawTable.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Writeoff_, SUM(CASE WHEN (RawTable.TranType='InsPay') THEN RawTable.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $InsPay_, SUM(CASE WHEN (RawTable.TranType='Pay') THEN RawTable.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $PatPay_, SUM(CASE WHEN (RawTable.TranType='Pay' OR RawTable.TranType='InsPay') THEN RawTable.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $TotPay_ FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType, cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status = '7' UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum,ps.ProcDate TranDate,ps.SplitAmt TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType, a.PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate TranDate,cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,0) ) RawTable INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=RawTable.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pv ON p.PriProv=pv.ProvNum INNER JOIN feesched fs3 ON fs3.FeeSchedNum=pv.FeeSched LEFT JOIN feesched fs2 ON fs2.FeeSchedNum=p.FeeSched LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum LEFT JOIN feesched fs1 ON ip.FeeSched=fs1.FeeSchedNum WHERE RawTable.TranDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY FeeSchedule) A ORDER BY FeeSchedule;

request: Daily procedures report in custom date range for a specific provider and procedure codes with procedure fees, ins payments, writeoffs, and totals
query: SET @FromDate='2022-01-01', @ToDate='2022-03-29'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @ProcCodes=''; SELECT a.Provider ,a.Name ,a.Date ,a.ProcCode ,a.ProcFee ,a.InsPayAmt ,a.WriteOff FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'Name' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,pc.ProcCode ,pl.ProcFee ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status = 1 THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride = -1 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEst = -1 THEN 0 ELSE cp.WriteOffEst END) ELSE cp.WriteOffEstOverride END) END) AS 'WriteOff' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,6) WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder ,' ,' ,NULL AS 'Date' ,NULL AS ProcCode ,NULL AS ProcFee ,NULL AS 'InsPayAmt' ,NULL AS 'WriteOff' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder ,'Total:' AS 'Provider' ,NULL AS 'Name' ,NULL AS 'Date' ,NULL AS ProcCode ,SUM(b.ProcFee) AS ProcFee ,SUM(b.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,SUM(b.WriteOff) AS 'WriteOff' FROM ( SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'Name' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,pc.ProcCode ,pl.ProcFee ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status = 1 THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride = -1 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEst = -1 THEN 0 ELSE cp.WriteOffEst END) ELSE cp.WriteOffEstOverride END) END) AS 'WriteOff' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,6) WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY pl.ProcNum )b ) a ORDER BY a.ItemOrder, a.Date, a.Name, a.ProcCode

request: Archived Patients (Guarantors) with Balances
query: SELECT PatNum, PatStatus, BalTotal FROM patient WHERE PatStatus=3 AND BalTotal>'0.01'

request: Patient payments by date of paysplit in a date range for a specific provider with total
query: SET @ProvAbbr='%Doc%'; SET @FromDate='2013-06-01', @ToDate='2013-12-31'; SELECT B.Abbr AS 'Provider Abbr', B.DateEntry AS 'Payment Entry Date', B.SplitAmt AS '$Payment Amount_' FROM( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder, prov.Abbr, DATE_FORMAT(pays.DateEntry,'%m/%d/%Y') AS DateEntry, pays.SplitAmt FROM paysplit pays INNER JOIN provider prov ON pays.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND pays.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'Total:' AS 'Abbr', NULL AS DateEntry, SUM(A.SplitAmt) AS SplitAmt FROM ( SELECT prov.Abbr, pays.DateEntry, pays.SplitAmt FROM paysplit pays INNER JOIN provider prov ON pays.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND pays.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) A ) B ORDER BY B.ItemOrder,B.DateEntry

request: Production in a date range summed by procedure category. With number completed, total production, average production per procedure, and Percent of production in a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT (CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' to') WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN def.ItemName WHEN 4 THEN 'Totals:' END) AS 'Category' ,(CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y') WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN COUNT(procs.CodeNum) WHEN 4 THEN COUNT(procs.CodeNum) ELSE '' END) AS 'CodeCount' ,IF(s1.Seq IN (3,4),SUM(IFNULL(procs.Count,0)),'') AS 'ProcCount' ,(CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN CAST(SUM(IFNULL(procs.Fee,0)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) WHEN s1.Seq = 4 THEN CAST(SUM(IFNULL(procs.Fee,0)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ELSE '' END) AS 'ProcFee' ,IF(s1.Seq IN (3,4), CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(procs.Fee,0)) / SUM(IFNULL(procs.Count,0)),0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)),'') AS 'ProcFeeAvg' ,IF(s1.Seq = 3,CONCAT(CAST(IFNULL((SUM(IFNULL(procs.Fee,0)) / SUM(SUM(IFNULL(procs.Fee,0))) OVER (PARTITION BY s1.Seq)) * 100,0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)),'%'),'') AS 'ProcFee%' FROM procedurecode pc INNER JOIN definition def ON pc.ProcCat = def.DefNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.CodeNum ,COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcNum) AS 'Count' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) AS 'Fee' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.CodeNum ) procs ON procs.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_4 s1 ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(s1.Seq = 3,CONCAT(s1.Seq,'+',pc.ProcCat),s1.Seq) ORDER BY s1.Seq, def.ItemName, pc.ProcCat

request: Patient level aging for patients with specific primary provider. Set @AsOf date and @ProvAbbr at top.
query: SET @AsOf='2013-12-16'; SET @ProvAbbr='%Abbot%'; SELECT E.Patient AS Patient, E.PatNum AS 'Pat E.ProvAbbr AS 'Provider', E.0to30 AS '0-30 Days', E.31to60 AS '31-60 Days', E.61to90 AS '61-90 Days', E.Over90 AS '>90 Days', E.Total AS 'Total', E.InsEst AS 'Ins Est', E.PatEst AS 'Patient Est' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Patient, D.PatNum, prov.Abbr AS ProvAbbr, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60 THEN D.Charges0to30 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90 THEN D.Charges31to60 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<=D.ChargesOver90 THEN D.Charges61to90 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits>=D.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.Bal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.InsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.Bal-COALESCE(D.InsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,p.PriProv,SUM(B.PatBal) AS Bal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS Charges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS Charges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS Charges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS ChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS Credits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS InsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum ) D INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=D.PriProv WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND ABS(D.Bal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor,NULL AS PatNum,NULL AS ProvAbbr, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60 THEN D.Charges0to30 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90 THEN D.Charges31to60 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<=D.ChargesOver90 THEN D.Charges61to90 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits>=D.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.Bal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.InsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.Bal-COALESCE(D.InsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,p.PriProv,SUM(B.PatBal) AS Bal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS Charges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS Charges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS Charges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS ChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS Credits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS InsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum ) D INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=D.PriProv WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND ABS(D.Bal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Patient;

request:
Daily Production and income report not counting Canadian lab fees (as of version 13.1)
Counts insurance writeoffs by ins payment date, so assume that any PPOs are entered as Category Percentage
For all providers. Modified 01-23-2013 to account for capitation writeoffs in production amounts.
Modified 5-10-2013 to match the daily/monthly P&I report by Cameron.
query: SET @FromDate='2013-12-16' , @ToDate='2013-12-18'; SELECT Trans.TransDate AS 'Date', SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType='Cap' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Production_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Adjustment_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Writeoff_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff','Cap') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $NetProd_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $PatIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $InsIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $TotalIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProvNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, pl.ProcDate AS TransDate FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE '99___' WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, a.AdjDate AS TransDate FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff,ps.DatePay AS TransDate FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0,cp.DateCP AS TransDate FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE '99___' INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff, cp.DateCP AS TransDate FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE '99___' WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Cap' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,-cp.Writeoff AS Writeoff,cp.DateCP AS TransDate FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE '99___' WHERE cp.Status=7 AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) Trans GROUP BY Trans.TransDate ORDER BY Trans.TransDate

request: Procedures treatment planned in a date range grouped by provider and procedure code, with a specified provider
query: SET @FromDate='2024-04-01', @ToDate='2024-04-30'; SET @Provs=''; SELECT 'Date Range:' AS 'Provider Abbr' ,DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Procedure Code' ,'To' AS 'request' ,DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Total Treatment Planned' ,'' AS 'Total Completed of TP' ,'' AS '% Completed of TP' ,'' AS 'Total Completed' UNION ALL SELECT ' ,' ,' ,' ,' ,' ,' UNION ALL SELECT core.Abbr AS 'Provider Abbr' ,IFNULL(core.ProcCode,'No Procs') AS 'Procedure Code' ,IFNULL(core.AbbrDesc,'') AS 'request' ,IFNULL(core.TotalTP,'') AS 'Total Treatment Planned' ,IFNULL(core.TotCompTP,'') AS 'Total Completed of TP' ,IFNULL(core.Percent,'') AS '% Completed of TP' ,IFNULL(core.TotComp,'') AS 'Total Completed' FROM ( SELECT pr.ProvNum ,pr.Abbr ,procs.CodeNum ,procs.ProcCode ,procs.AbbrDesc ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(procs.ID='TP',procs.ProcNum,NULL)) AS 'TotalTP' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(procs.ID='TP' AND procs.ProcStatus = 2 ,procs.ProcNum,NULL)) AS 'TotCompTP' ,ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT IF(procs.ID='TP' AND procs.ProcStatus = 2 ,procs.ProcNum,NULL)) / COUNT(DISTINCT IF(procs.ID='TP',procs.ProcNum,NULL))) * 100 ,2) AS 'Percent' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(procs.ID='C',procs.ProcNum,NULL)) AS 'TotComp' FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'TP' AS 'ID' ,pl.ProvNum ,pl.ProcNum ,pc.CodeNum ,pc.ProcCode ,pc.AbbrDesc ,pl.ProcStatus FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum WHERE pl.DateTP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) UNION ALL SELECT 'C' AS 'ID' ,plc.ProvNum ,plc.ProcNum ,pcc.CodeNum ,pcc.ProcCode ,pcc.AbbrDesc ,NULL FROM procedurelog plc INNER JOIN procedurecode pcc ON plc.CodeNum = pcc.CodeNum WHERE plc.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND plc.ProcStatus = 2 ) procs ON procs.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Provs)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Provs)) GROUP BY pr.ProvNum, procs.CodeNum ORDER BY pr.Abbr, procs.ProcCode ) core

request: Daily procedures report with amount paid to date for each procedure by treating provider. As of 7.2 only works if you split patient payments to procedures.
