Also shows total amount patient paid in date range. For all providers, leave variable like: Provider='%%'. For all procedures, leave variable blank like: ProcList=''.
query: SET @FromDate='2017-01-01',@ToDate='2017-01-15',@Provider='%%', @ProcList="D2790,D0150"; SET @ProcListUse=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProcList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProcList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT display.PatNum ,display.ProcCode ,display.Prov ,display.ProcDate ,display.ToothNum ,display.AbbrDesc ,FORMAT(display.ProcFee, 2) AS $ProcFee_ ,FORMAT(display.InsPayEst, 2) AS $InsPayEst_ ,FORMAT(display.InsPayAmt, 2) AS $InsPayAmt_ ,FORMAT(display.PatPayAmt, 2) AS $PatPayAmt_ ,FORMAT(display.PatPayAmt + display.InsPayAmt, 2) AS $TotalPaid_ ,FORMAT(display.PaidInDateRange, 2) AS $PaidInDateRange_ FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,p.LName ,p.FName ,pc.ProcCode ,pr.Abbr AS Prov ,pl.ProcDate ,pl.ToothNum ,pc.AbbrDesc ,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS ProcFee ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN(6,0,1,4) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS InsPayEst ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS InsPayAmt ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS PatPayAmt ,COALESCE(pay.PayAmt,0) AS PaidInDateRange FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcListUse INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr LIKE @Provider LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pay.PatNum ,SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS PayAmt FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pay.PatNum ) pay ON pay.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) display ORDER BY display.ProcDate,display.LName,display.FName;

request: Patient payments by date of paysplit in a date range for a specific provider with total
query: SET @ProvAbbr='%Doc%'; SET @FromDate='2013-06-01', @ToDate='2013-12-31'; SELECT B.Abbr AS 'Provider Abbr', B.PName AS 'Patient Name',B.PayDate AS 'Payment Date', B.DateEntry AS 'Payment Split Date', B.SplitAmt AS '$Payment Amount_' FROM( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder, prov.Abbr, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PName', DATE_FORMAT(pay.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS PayDate, DATE_FORMAT(pays.DateEntry,'%m/%d/%Y') AS DateEntry, pays.SplitAmt FROM paysplit pays INNER JOIN patient p ON pays.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON pays.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=pays.PayNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND pays.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'Total:' AS 'Abbr', NULL AS 'PName', NULL AS PayDate, NULL AS DateEntry, SUM(A.SplitAmt) AS SplitAmt FROM ( SELECT prov.Abbr, pays.DateEntry, pays.SplitAmt FROM paysplit pays INNER JOIN provider prov ON pays.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND pays.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) A ) B ORDER BY B.ItemOrder,B.DateEntry

request: Billed amounts for capitation claims sent or received with date of service in a date range, having specific carrier name. Grouped by patient and date of service
query: SET @FromDate='2013-01-01', @ToDate='2013-12-31'; SET @CarrierName='%Dental Health Service%'; SELECT p.LName AS 'Last Name', p.FName AS 'First Name', cp.ProcDate AS 'Date of Service', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT car.CarrierName ORDER BY car.CarrierName SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'Carrier Name', SUM(cp.FeeBilled) AS '$Amount Billed_' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN claim c ON cp.ClaimNum=c.ClaimNum AND c.ClaimType='Cap' AND c.ClaimStatus IN ('S','R') INNER JOIN insplan ip ON c.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON ip.CarrierNum=car.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status=5 GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ORDER BY cp.ProcDate,p.LName,p.FName

request:
Daily production and income report with filter to show insured patients, uninsured patients, or all patients.
Counts insurance writeoffs by ins payment date, so assume that any PPOs are entered as Category Percentage for all providers.
Set @FromDate and @ToDate for date range at top. 
Set @InsuredOnly to 'YES' to only show insured patients, to 'NO' to only show uninsured patients, and to 'ALL' to show both.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-06-28' , @ToDate='2022-06-28'; SET @InsuredOnly='ALL'; SELECT a.Date, p.PatNum, a.request, COALESCE(pr.Abbr, "(none)") AS 'Prov', a.$Prod_, a.$Adjust_, a.$WritOff_, a.$TotProd_, a.$PatIncome_, a.$InsIncome_, a.$TotIncome_ FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_' FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType = d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum = pa.PayNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType = d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum ) a ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = a.ProvNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 WHERE ((@InsuredOnly='YES' AND pp.PatPlanNum IS NOT NULL) OR (@InsuredOnly='NO' AND pp.PatPlanNum IS NULL) OR @InsuredOnly='ALL') ORDER BY a.DATE, p.LName, p.FName, p.MiddleI;

request: New patients in a date range showing procedures, fees, and providers on first appt, patient info, who they were referred from and date of next scheduled appointment
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01' , @ToDate='2018-01-31'; SELECT patprocs.PatNum 'PatNum ' ,patprocs.Patient ,DATE_FORMAT(patprocs.DateFirstVisit,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'First Visit' ,patprocs.Codes AS 'Procedures' ,patprocs.Fees AS '$Fee_' ,patprocs.Provs AS 'Provider' ,patprocs.Email ,patprocs.HmPhone AS 'Home Phone', patprocs.WirelessPhone AS 'Wireless Phone', patprocs.WkPhone AS 'Work Phone', patprocs.Address ,( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(r.LName,' ',r.FName) ORDER BY CONCAT(r.LName,' ',r.FName) SEPARATOR ', ') AS RefFrom FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum AND ra.RefType = 1 WHERE ra.PatNum = patprocs.PatNum ) AS 'Referred From' ,COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(( SELECT MIN(DATE(ap.AptDateTime)) AS ApptDate FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptStatus = 1 AND ap.AptDateTime >= NOW() AND ap.PatNum = patprocs.PatNum ),'%m/%d/%Y'),'None') AS 'Next Scheduled Appt' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum ,CONCAT(patient.LName, ', ', patient.FName) Patient ,patient.DateFirstVisit, patient.Email, patient.HmPhone, patient.WirelessPhone, patient.WkPhone ,CONCAT(patient.Address,' ',patient.Address2,' ',patient.City,' ',patient.State,' ',patient.Zip) AS 'Address' ,SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)) Fees ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT procedurecode.ProcCode) Codes ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT provider.Abbr) Provs FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcDate = patient.DateFirstVisit AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum WHERE patient.DateFirstVisit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum )patprocs GROUP BY patprocs.PatNum ORDER BY patprocs.Patient

request: Appointments report with name and email. Set date range and provider abbreviation at top. Age will show as NONE if a birthdate is not set.
query: SET @FromDate='2019-02-15', @ToDate='2019-02-15'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(appointment.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Apt Date', patient.FName AS 'First Name', patient.LName AS 'Last Name', (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE 'NONE' END) AS 'Age', DATE_FORMAT(appointment.AptDateTime,'%l:%u %p') AS 'Apt Time', LENGTH(appointment.Pattern)*5 AS 'Length', appointment.ProcDescript AS 'request', patient.WirelessPhone AS 'Mobile Number', patient.HmPhone AS 'Home Number', patient.Email FROM appointment INNER JOIN patient ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum INNER JOIN provider provd ON provd.ProvNum=appointment.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider provh ON provh.ProvNum=appointment.ProvHyg WHERE appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND AptStatus != '3' AND AptStatus != '6' AND (provd.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr OR provh.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr) ORDER BY appointment.AptDateTime

request: Patient information for active patients with a specific site name. Also shows insurance carrier names.
query: SET @Sites=''; SET @Sites=(CASE WHEN @Sites='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Sites,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT IFNULL(site.request,'NoSite') AS 'Site', CONCAT( TRIM(p.LName), ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(p.Preferred)) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', TRIM(p.Preferred),'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', TRIM(p.FName), (CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(p.MiddleI)) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', TRIM(p.MiddleI)) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName', DATE_FORMAT(p.Birthdate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date of Birth', p.MedicaidID, COALESCE(MAX((CASE WHEN pp.Ordinal = 1 THEN car.CarrierName ELSE NULL END)),'') AS 'Primary Ins Carrier', COALESCE(MAX((CASE WHEN pp.Ordinal = 2 THEN car.CarrierName ELSE NULL END)),'') AS 'Secondary Ins Carrier', p.GradeLevel FROM patient p LEFT JOIN site ON site.SiteNum=p.SiteNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal IN(1,2) LEFT JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE IFNULL(site.request,'NoSite') REGEXP @Sites AND p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Planned tracker with address
query: SELECT tplanned.PatNum ,DATE(tplanned.AptDateTime) AS 'Date' ,tplanned.UnschedStatus ,tplanned.ProvNum ,tplanned.ProcDescript ,tplanned.Note ,CONCAT(tplanned.Address,' ',tplanned.Address2,' ',tplanned.City,' ',tplanned.State,' ',tplanned.Zip) AS Address FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,a.AptDateTime ,a.UnschedStatus ,a.ProvNum ,a.ProcDescript ,a.Note ,a.AptNum ,p.Address ,p.Address2 ,p.City ,p.State ,p.Zip FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE a.AptStatus=6 AND p.PatStatus=0 ORDER BY a.UnschedStatus,a.AptDateTime ) tplanned LEFT JOIN appointment tregular ON tplanned.AptNum=tregular.NextAptNum WHERE tregular.AptNum IS NULL;

request: Active patients with PatNum, Date of First Visit and Address, and SubscriberID
query: SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count',A.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,p.DateFirstVisit,p.Address,p.Address2,p.City,p.State,p.Zip, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(car.CarrierName,' - ',iss.SubscriberID) ORDER BY pp.Ordinal SEPARATOR ', ') AS SubscriberID FROM patient p LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY p.PatNum ) A ORDER BY A.LName, A.FName

request: Appointment List report with medicaid ID
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-20' , @ToDate='2014-01-22'; SELECT DATE(a.AptDateTime)AS 'DateApt', p.PatNum, (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) ELSE 'None Entered' END) AS 'Age', DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%l:%i %p') AS 'TimeApt', FORMAT(LENGTH(a.Pattern)*5,0) AS 'Length', a.ProcDescript, p.HmPhone AS 'Home Ph.', p.WkPhone AS 'Work Ph.', p.WirelessPhone AS 'Cell Ph.', p.MedicaidID FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE (DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName;

request: Aging for families with any balance with patient and insurance estimates separated
query: SET @AsOf='2014-02-03'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS Guarantor,E.Total AS 'Total Balance', E.Pat0to30 AS 'Pat 0-30 Days',E.Pat31to60 AS 'Pat 31-60 Days', E.Pat61to90 AS 'Pat 61-90 Days',E.PatOver90 AS 'Pat >90 Days', E.InsEst0to30 AS 'Ins 0-30 Days',E.InsEst31to60 AS 'Ins 31-60 Days', E.InsEst61to90 AS 'Ins 61-90 Days',E.InsEstOver90 AS 'Ins >90 Days' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0)) ,2),2) AS PatOver90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0),2),2) AS InsEst0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0),2),2) AS InsEst31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0),2),2) AS InsEst61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0),2),2) AS InsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90 FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'Totals:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0))) ,2),2) AS PatOver90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst0to30),0),2),2) AS InsEst0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst31to60),0),2),2) AS InsEst31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst61to90),0),2),2) AS InsEst61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEstOver90),0),2),2) AS InsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90 FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Aging for families with any balance with more aging ranges, up to >24 months
query: SET @AsOf='2014-02-03'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS Guarantor, E.0to30D AS '0-30 Days', E.31to60D AS '31-60 Days', E.61to90D AS '61-90 Days', E.91Dto12M AS '91 Days-12 Months', E.12to18M AS '12-18 Months', E.18to24M AS '18-24 Months', E.Over24M AS '>24 Months', E.Total AS Total, E.InsEst AS '-Ins Est', E.PatEst AS '=Patient' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M+D.FamCharges61to90D+D.FamCharges31to60D THEN D.FamCharges0to30D WHEN D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M+D.FamCharges61to90D+D.FamCharges31to60D+D.FamCharges0to30D<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M+D.FamCharges61to90D+D.FamCharges31to60D+D.FamCharges0to30D-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30D, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M+D.FamCharges61to90D THEN D.FamCharges31to60D WHEN D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M+D.FamCharges61to90D+D.FamCharges31to60D<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M+D.FamCharges61to90D+D.FamCharges31to60D-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60D, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M THEN D.FamCharges61to90D WHEN D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M+D.FamCharges61to90D<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M+D.FamCharges61to90D-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90D, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M THEN D.FamCharges91Dto12M WHEN D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M+D.FamCharges91Dto12M-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 91Dto12M, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M THEN D.FamCharges12to18M WHEN D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M+D.FamCharges12to18M-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 12to18M, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver24M THEN D.FamCharges18to24M WHEN D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver24M+D.FamCharges18to24M-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 18to24M, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver24M THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver24M-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over24M, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal, SUM(B.Charges0to30D) AS FamCharges0to30D,SUM(B.Charges31to60D) AS FamCharges31to60D, SUM(B.Charges61to90D) AS FamCharges61to90D,SUM(B.Charges91Dto12M) AS FamCharges91Dto12M, SUM(B.Charges12to18M) AS FamCharges12to18M,SUM(B.Charges18to24M) AS FamCharges18to24M, SUM(B.ChargesOver24M) AS FamChargesOver24M, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30D, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60D, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90D, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 12 MONTH)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges91Dto12M, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 12 MONTH) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 18 MONTH)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges12to18M, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 18 MONTH) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 24 MONTH)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges18to24M, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 24 MONTH)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver24M, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.Guarantor;

request: Daily payments grouped by payment type and pay date
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SET @PaymentTypes = ''; SELECT (CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN 'Date Range: ' WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN core.PaidOn WHEN 4 THEN '' END) AS 'Pay Date' ,(CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'), ' - ', DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN core.PayType WHEN 4 THEN '' END) AS 'Payment Type' ,(CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN core.AmtPaid WHEN 4 THEN SUM(core.AmtPaid) END) AS 'Amount Paid' FROM ( SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'PaidOn' ,CONCAT('Patient Payment - ',def.ItemName) AS 'PayType' ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'AmtPaid' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = pay.PayType AND IF(LENGTH(@PaymentTypes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemName,@PaymentTypes)) WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY ps.DatePay, `PayType` UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'PaidOn' ,CONCAT('Insurance Payment - ', defcp.ItemName) AS 'PayType' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'AmtPaid' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition defcp ON defcp.DefNum = cpay.PayType AND IF(LENGTH(@PaymentTypes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(defcp.ItemName,@PaymentTypes)) WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY cp.DateCP, `PayType` ) core LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_4 s1 ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN CONCAT(s1.Seq, '+', core.PaidOn, '|', core.PayType) ELSE s1.Seq END) ORDER BY s1.Seq, core.PaidOn, core.PayType

SET @StartDate='2013-02-01', @EndDate='2014-02-28', @CarrierName='%%'; SELECT car.CarrierName, CONCAT(CONCAT(patSub.LName,', '),patSub.FName) AS 'Subscriber', patSub.SSN AS 'Subsc SSN', CONCAT(CONCAT(patPat.LName,', '),patPat.FName) AS 'Patient', patPat.Birthdate AS 'Pat DOB', pc.ProcCode AS 'Code', pc.Descript AS 'Proc request', pl.ToothNum AS 'Tth', pl.Surf AS 'Surf', pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.ProcFee AS 'UCR Fee', pl.ProcFee-cp.WriteOff AS 'Co-Pay' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient patPat ON pl.PatNum = patPat.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 AND cp.NoBillIns = 0 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum AND ip.PlanType='c' INNER JOIN inssub ib ON cp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient patSub ON patSub.PatNum = ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum AND (car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName) WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate

request: Count of patients under set age with specific code completed and date of first visit before certain date. Also gives a count of all patients under set age and date of first visit before certain date. Patients with no birthdate set count as age 0.
query: SET @EarliestVisit='2014-01-01',@ProcedureCode='D1351',@AgeLessThan='12'; SET @pos=0; SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) FROM patient p LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum WHERE (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) ELSE 0 END) < @AgeLessThan AND p.PatStatus=0 AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pc.ProcCode LIKE @ProcedureCode AND p.DateFirstVisit <= @EarliestVisit ) AS 'Patients with Code Completed', ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) FROM patient p WHERE (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) ELSE 0 END) < @AgeLessThan AND p.PatStatus=0 AND p.DateFirstVisit <= @EarliestVisit ) AS 'Total Patients'

request: Inactive patients with last completed procedure date before specific date, that have never had specified procedure code completed.
query: SET @LastVisitBefore='2020-03-31'; SET @WithoutCode='N4148'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat , p.PatNum , LEFT(p.WkPhone, 16) AS WkPhone , LEFT(p.HmPhone, 16) AS HmPhone , LEFT(p.WirelessPhone, 16) AS CellPhone , DATE_FORMAT(lastvisit.DateLastVisit, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'LastVisit' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum , MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS 'DateLastVisit' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) lastvisit ON lastvisit.PatNum = p.PatNum AND lastvisit.DateLastVisit <= DATE(@LastVisitBefore) WHERE p.PatStatus = 2 AND p.PatNum NOT IN( SELECT DISTINCT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode LIKE @WithoutCode WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 ) ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName

request: List of insurance plans with patient name, subscriber name, carrier name, and patient's relationship to subscriber
query: SELECT CONCAT(sub.LName,', ',sub.FName) AS 'Subscriber Name', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', (CASE pp.Relationship WHEN 0 THEN 'Self' WHEN 1 THEN 'Spouse' WHEN 2 THEN 'Child' WHEN 3 THEN 'Employee' WHEN 4 THEN 'HandicapDep' WHEN 5 THEN 'SignifOther' WHEN 6 THEN 'InjuredPlaintiff' WHEN 7 THEN 'LifePartner' WHEN 8 THEN 'Dependent' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS 'Relationship to Subscriber' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum=iss.Subscriber ORDER BY sub.LName,sub.FName,car.CarrierName,p.LName,p.FName

request: Medicaid payments for a date range with location name of the providing service
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-01-15'; SELECT car.CarrierName AS 'Insurance Carrier', cl.DateService AS 'Date of Service', CONCAT(prov.LName,', ',prov.FName) AS 'Provider Name', prov.NationalProvID AS 'Provider NPI', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', ib.SubscriberID AS 'Medicaid ID', SUM(cp.FeeBilled) AS '$Charged Amount_', cl.InsPayAmt AS '$Medicaid Payment_' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=cl.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patient p ON cl.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cl.ProvTreat WHERE cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND car.CarrierName LIKE '%Medicaid%' GROUP BY cl.ClaimNum ORDER BY cl.DateService,prov.LName,prov.FName,p.LName,p.FName

request: Count of unique Patient status patients with a Medicaid carrier
query: SET @Medicaid='medicaid'; SET @MedReg = IF(LENGTH(@Medicaid) = 0, '^', REPLACE(@Medicaid,',','|')); SELECT (CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN ca.CarrierName WHEN 2 THEN ' , (CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN pp.PatNum WHEN 2 THEN ' FROM carrier ca INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pp.Patnum AND p.PatStatus = 0 LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_3 s1 ON TRUE WHERE ca.CarrierName REGEXP @MedReg GROUP BY IF(s1.Seq = 1, CONCAT(s1.Seq, '+', ca.CarrierName), s1.Seq)

request: List of active patients and their race (Version 13.2 and above)
query: SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat p.LName, p.FName, COALESCE(races.Race,'None') AS 'Patient Race' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pr.PatNum,GROUP_CONCAT((CASE pr.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecify' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' END) ORDER BY pr.Race SEPARATOR ', ') AS Race FROM patientrace pr WHERE pr.Race NOT IN (6,10,11) GROUP BY pr.PatNum ) races ON races.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE p.PatStatus=0

request: Count of patients for each patient status
query: SELECT p.PatStatus, COUNT(p.PatNum) AS 'Number of Patients' FROM patient p GROUP BY p.PatStatus ORDER BY `Number of Patients` DESC

request: Daily payments report like internal report, grouped by check, showing splits by provider separately
query: SET @FromDate ='2021-04-01', @ToDate ='2021-04-30'; SELECT pay.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type' ,pay.Date ,IFNULL(pay.CarrierName,'') AS 'Carrier' ,pay.PatientName AS 'Patient Name (one of)' ,IFNULL(pay.Provider,'No Provider') AS 'Provider' ,IFNULL(pay.Clinic,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,pay.CheckNum AS 'Check ,pay.Amt AS 'Amt' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder' ,'Insurance Check' AS 'PaymentType' ,DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date' ,carrier.CarrierName ,MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName' ,provider.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,clinic.Abbr AS 'Clinic' ,claimpayment.CheckNum ,FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),2) AS 'Amt' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claimproc.ClinicNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN(1,4) AND claimpayment.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY claimproc.DateCP, claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum , provider.ProvNum, claimproc.ClinicNum , carrier.CarrierName UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder ,'' AS 'PaymentType' ,'' AS 'Date' ,'' AS CarrierName ,'' AS 'PatientName' ,'' AS 'Provider' ,'' AS 'Clinic' ,'' AS CheckNum ,' ' AS 'Amt' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS 'ItemOrder' ,IF(ISNULL(definition.ItemName),'Transfer',definition.ItemName) AS 'PaymentType' ,DATE_FORMAT(payment.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date' ,NULL AS 'Carrier' ,MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName' ,provider.Abbr 'Provider' ,clinic.Abbr AS 'Clinic' ,payment.CheckNum ,FORMAT(SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum = paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType = definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON paysplit.ClinicNum = clinic.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY payment.PayNum, payment.PayDate , provider.ProvNum, clinic.ClinicNum ) pay ORDER BY pay.ItemOrder, pay.PaymentType, pay.Date, pay.PatientName, pay.Provider, pay.Clinic, pay.Amt

request: Daily production and income report with writeoffs by insurance payment date. Like internal.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-09-01', @ToDate='2025-09-30'; SET @Providers=''; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,core.TranDate,'') AS 'Date' , IF(dup.Num = 1,p.PatNum,' ') AS 'PatNum' , IF(dup.Num = 1,core.request,'') AS 'request' , IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Provider,'') AS 'Prov' , IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Clinic,'') AS 'Clinic' , CAST(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Fee,SUM(core.Fee)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Production' , CAST(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Adj,SUM(core.Adj)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Adjust' , CAST(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.InsW,SUM(core.InsW)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Write-off' , CAST(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Fee + core.Adj + core.InsW,SUM(core.Fee) + SUM(core.Adj) + SUM(core.InsW)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Total Prod' , CAST(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.PtInc,SUM(core.PtInc)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Pt Income' , CAST(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.InsInc,SUM(core.InsInc)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Ins Income' , CAST(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.PtInc + core.InsInc,SUM(core.PtInc) + SUM(core.InsInc)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Total Income' FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.PatNum , pc.Descript AS 'request' , prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' , IFNULL(clinic.request,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' , pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cap.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cap WHERE cap.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cap.Status = 7 ),0) AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'InsW' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr,@Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , adj.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , adj.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , adj.PatNum , adjtype.ItemName AS 'request' , prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' , IFNULL(clinic.request,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' , 0 AS 'Fee' , adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'InsW' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum = adj.AdjType INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = adj.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr,@Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) UNION ALL SELECT 'WriteOff' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , cp.PatNum , CONCAT(COALESCE(pc.AbbrDesc,''),IF(ISNULL(pc.AbbrDesc),'',' '),car.CarrierName) AS 'request' , prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' , IFNULL(clinic.request,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' , 0 AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'Adj' , -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr,@Providers)) INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = cp.ClinicNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND cp.Status IN (1,4) AND ABS(cp.WriteOff) > .0001 GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , CONCAT_WS('+',ps.PatNum,ps.ProvNum,ps.ClinicNum,pay.PayType,ps.DatePay) AS 'PriKey' , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , ps.PatNum , IF(pay.PayType = 0,'Income Transfer',paytype.ItemName) AS 'request' , COALESCE(prov.Abbr,'Unearned') AS 'Provider' , IFNULL(clinic.request,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' , 0 AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'InsW' , SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON paytype.DefNum = pay.PayType LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = ps.ClinicNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(prov.Abbr,'Unearned'),@Providers)) AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN ( SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X' ) GROUP BY ps.PatNum, ps.ProvNum, ps.ClinicNum, pay.PayType, ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType' , CONCAT_WS('+',cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum,cp.PlanNum,cp.ClinicNum,claimpay.CheckDate) AS 'PriKey' , claimpay.CheckDate AS 'TranDate' , cp.PatNum , car.CarrierName AS 'request' , prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' , IFNULL(clinic.request,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' , 0 AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'InsW' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr,@Providers)) INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum AND claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = cp.ClinicNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY cp.PatNum, cp.ProvNum, cp.PlanNum, cp.ClinicNum, claimpay.CheckDate ) core INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = core.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',core.PriKey),dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.TranDate, p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, core.request, core.Provider, core.PriKey

request: List of active patients who have not had specified procedure treatment planned or completed AND do not have any recall entries
query: SET @ProcCode='%D0120%'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat p.LName, p.FName FROM patient p WHERE p.PatStatus=0 AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT * FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND pl.PatNum=p.PatNum ) AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT * FROM recall r WHERE r.PatNum=p.PatNum ) ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Payments report with additional column showing total check amount. Set date range for payment date at top
query: SET @FromDate='2022-08-01', @ToDate='2022-08-31'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Payment Date', a.PatNum AS 'Pat a.PatientName AS 'Patient Name', a.PayType AS 'Payment Type', a.CarrierName AS 'Carrier Name', a.Provider, a.Clinic, a.Amt AS '$Amount_', a.CheckNum, a.TotalCheckAmt AS '$Total Check Amount_' FROM ( SELECT 2 AS 'ItemOrder', claimproc.DateCP AS 'PayDate', CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS 'PatientName', patient.PatNum, 'Insurance Payment' AS 'PayType', carrier.CarrierName, provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', claimpayment.CheckNum, SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) AS 'Amt', claimpayment.CheckAmt AS 'TotalCheckAmt' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claimproc.ClinicNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN(1, 4) AND claimpayment.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY claimproc.DateCP, claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum, provider.ProvNum, claimproc.ClinicNum, carrier.CarrierName, provider.Abbr, clinic.request, claimpayment.CheckNum UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder', payment.PayDate AS 'PayDate', CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS 'PatientName', patient.PatNum, definition.ItemName AS 'PayType', '' AS 'CarrierName', provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', payment.CheckNum, SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) AS 'Amt', payment.PayAmt AS 'TotalCheckAmt' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum = paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType = definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON payment.ClinicNum = clinic.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND payment.PayType != 0 GROUP BY payment.PayNum, payment.PayDate, provider.ProvNum, payment.ClinicNum, provider.Abbr, clinic.request, payment.CheckNum, definition.ItemName )a ORDER BY a.ItemOrder, a.PayDate, a.PatientName

request: Daily production and income report with patient billing type and provider totals.
query: SET @FromDate='2013-12-01' , @ToDate='2013-12-31'; SELECT C.Date AS 'Date', C.Patient, C.BillingType AS 'Billing Type', C.request, C.Prov AS 'Provider', C.$Prod_, C.$Adjust_, C.$WritOff_, C.$TotProd_, C.$PatIncome_, C.$InsIncome_, C.$TotIncome_ FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, DATE_FORMAT(A.Date,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'Patient', bt.ItemName AS 'BillingType', A.request, pr.Abbr AS 'Prov', A.$Prod_, A.$Adjust_, A.$WritOff_, A.$TotProd_, A.$PatIncome_, A.$InsIncome_, A.$TotIncome_ FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_' FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum INNER JOIN definition bt ON bt.DefNum=p.BillingType UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'Date', ' ' ' ' 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'Date', 'Provider Totals:' AS 'Patient', CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'BillingType', '' AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Prov', SUM(B.$Prod_) AS '$Prod_', SUM(B.$Adjust_) AS '$Adjust_', SUM(B.$WritOff_) AS '$WritOff_', SUM(B.$TotProd_) AS '$TotProd_', SUM(B.$PatIncome_) AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(B.$InsIncome_) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(B.$TotIncome_) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM provider prov INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_' FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) B ON B.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum GROUP BY B.ProvNum ) C ORDER BY C.ItemOrder,C.Date, C.Patient

request: Patients that have had one or more of the specified codes completed in the date range.
query: SET @FromDate="2020-07-01", @ToDate="2020-09-30", @ProcList="11111,43423,11107,01202,01112,01107,01101,01102,01103"; SET @pos=0, @ProcList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProcList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProcList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', pats.LName, pats.FName FROM ( SELECT p.LName, p.FName FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum IN ( SELECT DISTINCT PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName ) pats

request: Active patients with no scheduled apts. Shows the date of last visit, date last recall, next recall due date, if they have treatment planned procedures or not, and their outstanding account balance
query: SET @daysIntervalStart=365, @daysIntervalEnd=0; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name' ,DATE_FORMAT(lastappt.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date Last Visit' ,(CASE WHEN (lastrecall.LastRecallDate != '0001-01-01' AND NOT ISNULL(lastrecall.LastRecallDate)) THEN DATE_FORMAT(lastrecall.LastRecallDate,'%m/%d/%Y') ELSE 'Never' END) AS 'Last Recall Date' ,(CASE WHEN (nextrecall.NextRecallDate != '0001-01-01' AND NOT ISNULL(nextrecall.NextRecallDate)) THEN DATE_FORMAT(nextrecall.NextRecallDate,'%m/%d/%Y') ELSE 'Never' END) AS 'Next Recall Due Date' ,(CASE WHEN p.PatNum IN( SELECT DISTINCT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 1 ) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) AS 'Unfinished Tx Plan?' ,g.BalTotal AS '$Outstanding Balance_' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT PatNum FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus = 1 ) schedappt ON p.PatNum = schedappt.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PatNum ,MAX(AptDateTime) AS 'AptDateTime' FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY PatNum ) lastappt ON p.PatNum = lastappt.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.PatNum ,MIN(DateDue) AS 'NextRecallDate' FROM recall r WHERE r.IsDisabled = 0 GROUP BY r.PatNum ) nextrecall ON nextrecall.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.PatNum ,MAX(DatePrevious) AS 'LastRecallDate' FROM recall r GROUP BY r.PatNum ) lastrecall ON lastrecall.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor WHERE schedappt.PatNum IS NULL AND ((TO_DAYS(CURDATE()) - TO_DAYS(lastappt.AptDateTime)) BETWEEN @daysIntervalEnd AND @daysIntervalStart) AND p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY lastappt.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ASC

request: Daily Writeoff report broken down by procedure, with insurance payment date in date range.  Totals by procedure code at the bottom.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-01-31'; SELECT A.InsPaymentDate AS 'Payment Date', A.PatientName AS 'Patient Name', A.Carrier AS 'Carrier', A.ProcedureCode AS 'Procedure Code', A.Provider AS 'Provider', A.Clinic AS 'Clinic', A.WriteoffAmount AS 'Writeoff Amount' FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'InsPaymentDate', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatientName', car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', pc.ProcCode AS 'ProcedureCode', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', cl.request AS 'Clinic', FORMAT(cp.WriteOff,2) AS 'WriteoffAmount' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.WriteOff > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, ' ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'InsPaymentDate', 'Totals:' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Carrier', pc.ProcCode AS 'ProcedureCode', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Clinic', FORMAT(SUM(cp.WriteOff),2) AS 'WriteoffAmount' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.WriteOff > 0 GROUP BY pc.CodeNum ) A ORDER BY A.ItemOrder,A.ProcedureCode,A.InsPaymentDate,A.PatientName;

request: The top most used procedure codes for completed procedures in specific date range. You can specify your own limit for how many results you get
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-04-01', @ToDate ='2024-04-30'; SET @Limit =25; SET @pos=0; SELECT display.Category ,display.ProcCode AS 'Procedure Code' ,display.request ,display.TimesUsed ,CAST(display.AvgFee AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'AvgFee' ,CAST(display.TotalAmt AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS '$Total Amount' FROM ( SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'RowCount' ,core.Category ,core.ProcCode ,core.request ,core.TimesUsed ,core.AvgFee AS 'AvgFee' ,core.TotalAmt AS 'TotalAmt' FROM ( SELECT proccat.ItemName AS 'Category' ,pc.ProcCode AS 'ProcCode' ,pc.Descript AS 'request' ,COUNT(pl.ProcNum) AS 'TimesUsed' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) / COUNT(pl.ProcNum) AS 'AvgFee' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) AS 'TotalAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition proccat ON proccat.DefNum = pc.ProcCat WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.CodeNum ORDER BY TimesUsed DESC, pc.ProcCode ) core ) display WHERE RowCount <= @Limit ORDER BY RowCount

request: List of new patients in a date range, with their referral source and their overall net production
query: SET @FromDate = '2022-01-01', @ToDate = '2022-01-30'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @Broken FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ("D9986","D9987"); SET @prod = 0.00, @wo = 0.00, @adj = 0.00, @pat = 0; SELECT (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.PatNum WHEN dup.Num IN (2,4) THEN " ELSE '' END) AS "Pat ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.Patient WHEN dup.Num IN (2,4) THEN " ELSE '' END) AS "Patient Name" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT core.RefName SEPARATOR " | ") WHEN dup.Num IN (2,4) THEN " WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN "Total of Above Patients: " ELSE core.RefName END) AS "Referral Source" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN '' WHEN dup.Num IN (2,4) THEN " ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum) END) AS " ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN FORMAT(COALESCE(core.Production,0),2) WHEN dup.Num IN (2,4) THEN " WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN FORMAT(@prod,2) ELSE FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.Production,0)),2) END) AS "Fees" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN FORMAT(COALESCE(core.Adjustment,0),2) WHEN dup.Num IN (2,4) THEN " WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN FORMAT(@adj,2) ELSE FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.Adjustment,0)),2) END) AS "Adjusts" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN FORMAT(COALESCE(-core.Writeoffs,0),2) WHEN dup.Num IN (2,4) THEN " WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN FORMAT(-@wo,2) ELSE FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(-core.Writeoffs,0)),2) END) AS "Writeoffs" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN FORMAT(COALESCE(core.Production,0) + COALESCE(core.Adjustment,0) - COALESCE(core.Writeoffs,0),2) WHEN dup.Num IN (2,4) THEN " WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN FORMAT(@prod + @adj - @wo,2) ELSE FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.Production,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(core.Adjustment,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(core.Writeoffs,0)),2) END) AS "Net Production" FROM ( SELECT ref.ReferralNum ,ref.RefName ,ref.PatCount ,newpat.PatNum ,newpat.Patient ,newpat.ReferralNum AS "NPR" ,newpat.Production ,newpat.Adjustment ,newpat.Writeoffs ,newpat.FirstSeen ,IF(newpat.PatNum != @pat , CONCAT_WS("|",@pat := newpat.PatNum, @prod := @prod + newpat.Production, @adj := @adj + newpat.Adjustment, @wo := @wo + newpat.Writeoffs) , CONCAT_WS("|",@pat,@prod,@adj,@wo) ) AS "Test" FROM ( SELECT r.ReferralNum ,CONCAT(r.LName,IF(LENGTH(r.FName) > 0,CONCAT(', ', r.FName),'')) AS "RefName" ,( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pat.PatNum) FROM patient pat INNER JOIN refattach ra ON pat.PatNum = ra.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 WHERE ra.ReferralNum = r.ReferralNum ) AS "PatCount" FROM referral r ) ref INNER JOIN ( SELECT p.PatNum ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS "Patient" ,GROUP_CONCAT(r.ReferralNum) AS "ReferralNum" ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pl1.ProcFee * (pl1.UnitQty + pl1.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog pl1 WHERE pl1.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl1.PatNum = p.PatNum ),0) AS "Production" ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1,4) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END)) FROM procedurelog pl2 INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON pl2.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6) WHERE pl2.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl2.PatNum = p.PatNum ),0) AS "Writeoffs" ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.PatNum = p.PatNum ),0) AS "Adjustment" ,visit1.Date AS "FirstSeen" FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral r ON ra.ReferralNum = r.ReferralNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS "Date" FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum,@Broken) GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) visit1 ON visit1.PatNum = p.PatNum AND visit1.Date BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY p.PatNum ) newpat ON FIND_IN_SET(ref.ReferralNum,newpat.ReferralNum) ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS "Num" UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,"+",core.PatNum) WHEN dup.Num IN (2,3,4) THEN dup.Num WHEN dup.Num = 5 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,"+",core.ReferralNum) END) ORDER BY dup.Num, `Patient Name`, COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum) DESC, SUM(COALESCE(core.Production,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(core.Adjustment,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(core.Writeoffs,0)) DESC

request: Daily payments report with insurance payment type
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-02-01'; SELECT Pay.PaySource AS 'Pay Source', Pay.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type', Pay.Date, Pay.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', Pay.PatientName AS 'Patient Name (one of)', Pay.Provider, Pay.Clinic, Pay.CheckNum AS 'Check Pay.Amt AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, 'Insurance' AS PaySource, definition.ItemName AS 'PaymentType', CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date', carrier.CarrierName, MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', claimpayment.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),2) AS 'Amt' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=claimproc.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN definition ON claimpayment.PayType=definition.DefNum WHERE (claimproc.Status=1 OR claimproc.Status=4) AND claimpayment.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%c/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)), claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum,provider.ProvNum, claimproc.ClinicNum,carrier.CarrierName,provider.Abbr, clinic.request,claimpayment.CheckNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS PaySource, '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Clinic', '' AS CheckNum, '' AS 'Amt' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, 'Patient' AS PaySource, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE definition.ItemName END) AS 'PaymentType', CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(payment.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date', NULL AS 'Carrier', MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', payment.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum=paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType=definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON payment.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY payment.PayNum,payment.PayDate,provider.ProvNum,payment.ClinicNum,provider.Abbr,clinic.request,payment.CheckNum,definition.ItemName ) Pay ORDER BY Pay.ItemOrder,Pay.PaymentType,Pay.Date,Pay.PatientName

request: Broken appointments with appointment date in date range showing user that broke the appointment
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-05-01', @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', A.* FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ApptDate', DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%h:%i %p') AS 'ApptTime', (CASE WHEN a.IsNewPatient=1 THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS 'New Patient?', p.PatNum AS 'Pat CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5))<200 THEN(YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) ELSE 0 END) AS 'Age', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'Procedure', a.Note, DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%b') AS 'Month', DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%W') AS 'Day of Week', usr.UserName AS 'UserName' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.PermType=26 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%Broken%' INNER JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum=sl.UserNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus=5 GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, p.LName, p.FName )A

request: Total unique broken appointments with appointment date in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-05-01'; SELECT A.Category AS 'Item', A.Totals AS 'Appt Total' FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, '' AS SpecOrder, 'Day of Week:' AS 'Category', '' AS 'Totals' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, DAYOFWEEK(a.AptDateTime) AS SpecOrder, DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%W') AS 'Category', COUNT(DISTINCT a.AptNum) AS 'Totals' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.PermType=26 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%Broken%' INNER JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum=sl.UserNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus=5 GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(a.AptDateTime) UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, '' AS SpecOrder, '' AS 'Category', '' AS 'Totals' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, '' AS SpecOrder, 'Month:' AS 'Category', '' AS 'Totals' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder, MONTH(a.AptDateTime) AS SpecOrder, DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%b') AS 'Category', COUNT(DISTINCT a.AptNum) AS 'Totals' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.PermType=26 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%Broken%' INNER JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum=sl.UserNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus=5 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%b') UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder, '' AS SpecOrder, '' AS 'Category', '' AS 'Totals' UNION ALL SELECT 7 AS ItemOrder, '' AS SpecOrder, 'Procedure Code:' AS 'Category', '' AS 'Totals' UNION ALL SELECT 8 AS ItemOrder, pc.ProcCode AS SpecOrder, pc.ProcCode AS 'Category', COUNT(DISTINCT a.AptNum) AS 'Totals' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.PermType=26 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%Broken%' INNER JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum=sl.UserNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus=5 AND pc.ProcCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pc.ProcCode UNION ALL SELECT 9 AS ItemOrder, '' AS SpecOrder, '' AS 'Category', '' AS 'Totals' UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS ItemOrder, '' AS SpecOrder, 'Username:' AS 'Category', '' AS 'Totals' UNION ALL SELECT 11 AS ItemOrder, usr.UserName AS SpecOrder, usr.UserName AS 'Category', COUNT(DISTINCT a.AptNum) AS 'Totals' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.PermType=26 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%Broken%' INNER JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum=sl.UserNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus=5 GROUP BY usr.UserName ) A ORDER BY A.ItemOrder, A.SpecOrder

request: List of patients who have a specific insurance or specific employer, and their interval for recall.
query: SET @Carrier='%%'; SET @Employer='%%'; SET @RecallType='Perio'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'Patient' , IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) < 120, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()), 'Not Entered') AS 'Age' , c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' , e.EmpName AS 'Employer' , CONCAT( IF(CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(r.RecallInterval, 10, 2), 31, 0), 1, 7), 2, 10) = 0 , '' , CONCAT(CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(r.RecallInterval, 10, 2), 31, 0), 1, 7), 2, 10), 'y ') ) , IF(CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(r.RecallInterval, 10, 2), 31, 0), 8, 8), 2, 10) = 0 , '' , CONCAT(CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(r.RecallInterval, 10, 2), 31, 0), 8, 8), 2, 10), 'm ') ) , IF(CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(r.RecallInterval, 10, 2), 31, 0), 16, 8), 2, 10) = 0 , '' , CONCAT(CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(r.RecallInterval, 10, 2), 31, 0), 16, 8), 2, 10), 'w ') ) , IF(CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(r.RecallInterval, 10, 2), 31, 0), 24, 8), 2, 10) = 0 , '' , CONCAT(CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(r.RecallInterval, 10, 2), 31, 0), 24, 8), 2, 10), 'd') ) ) AS 'Recall Interval' , p.Address , p.Address2 , p.City , p.State , p.Zip FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub ss ON pp.InsSubNum = ss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = ss.PlanNum INNER JOIN employer e ON e.EmployerNum = ip.EmployerNum AND e.EmpName LIKE @Employer INNER JOIN carrier c ON ip.CarrierNum = c.CarrierNum AND c.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier INNER JOIN recall r ON r.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN recalltype rc ON r.RecallTypeNum = rc.RecallTypeNum AND rc.request LIKE @RecallType GROUP BY r.RecallNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Daily production and income report with totals by provider and month to date
query: SET @FromDate='2018-02-12' , @ToDate='2018-05-15'; SELECT B.Date AS 'Date', (CASE WHEN B.OrderSpace='1' THEN '' ELSE B.Patient END) AS 'Patient', B.`Pat B.ProcCode, B.request, B.ToothNum, B.Surf, B.Prov, B.$Prod_ AS 'Prod', B.$Adjust_ AS 'Adjust', B.$TotProd_ AS 'TotProd', B.$TotIncome_ AS 'TotIncome' FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, A.Date, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'Patient', p.PatNum AS 'Pat A.ProcCode, A.request, A.ToothNum, A.Surf, pr.Abbr AS 'Prov', FORMAT(A.$Prod_,2) AS '$Prod_', FORMAT(A.$Adjust_,2) AS '$Adjust_', FORMAT(A.$TotProd_,2) AS '$TotProd_', FORMAT(A.$TotIncome_,2) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, IFNULL(d.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, '' AS DATE, 'Provider Total:' AS 'Patient', '' AS PatNum, '' AS ProcCode, '' AS request, '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, pr.Abbr AS 'Prov', FORMAT(SUM(A.$Prod_),2) AS '$Prod_', FORMAT(SUM(A.$Adjust_),2) AS '$Adjust_', FORMAT(SUM(A.$TotProd_),2) AS '$TotProd_', FORMAT(SUM(A.$TotIncome_),2) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, IFNULL(d.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum GROUP BY pr.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, '' AS DATE, 'MonthToDate Total:' AS 'Patient', '' AS PatNum, '' AS ProcCode, '' AS request, '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS 'Prov', '' AS $Prod_, '' AS $Adjust_, FORMAT(SUM(A.$TotProd_),2) AS '$TotProd_', FORMAT(SUM(A.$TotIncome_),2) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate <= @ToDate AND MONTH(pl.ProcDate)=MONTH(@FromDate) AND YEAR(pl.ProcDate)=YEAR(@FromDate) UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate <= @ToDate AND MONTH(a.AdjDate)=MONTH(@FromDate) AND YEAR(a.AdjDate)=YEAR(@FromDate) AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, IFNULL(d.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay <= @ToDate AND MONTH(ps.DatePay)=MONTH(@FromDate) AND YEAR(ps.DatePay)=YEAR(@FromDate) UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP <= @ToDate AND MONTH(cp.DateCP)=MONTH(@FromDate) AND YEAR(cp.DateCP)=YEAR(@FromDate) GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON
