@FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.ClinicNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Cap' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.ClinicNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,-cp.Writeoff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status=7 AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) Trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=Trans.ClinicNum GROUP BY Trans.ClinicNum,Trans.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'Clinic', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Production', '' AS 'Adjustment', '' AS 'WriteOff', '' AS 'NetProd', '' AS 'TotalIncome' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder, 'Clinic Totals:' AS 'Clinic', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Production', '' AS 'Adjustment', '' AS 'WriteOff', '' AS 'NetProd', '' AS 'TotalIncome' UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder, COALESCE(c.request,'-NONE-') AS 'Clinic', '' AS 'Provider', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType='Cap' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Production, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Adjustment, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff','Cap') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS NetProd, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS TotalIncome FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProvNum,pl.ClinicNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.ProvNum,a.ClinicNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.ProvNum,ps.ClinicNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.ClinicNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.ClinicNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Cap' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.ClinicNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,-cp.Writeoff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status=7 AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) Trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=Trans.ClinicNum GROUP BY Trans.ClinicNum UNION ALL SELECT 7 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'Clinic', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Production', '' AS 'Adjustment', '' AS 'WriteOff', '' AS 'NetProd', '' AS 'TotalIncome' UNION ALL SELECT 8 AS ItemOrder, 'Grand Total:' AS 'Clinic', '' AS 'Provider', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType='Cap' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Production, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Adjustment, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff','Cap') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS NetProd, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS TotalIncome FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProvNum,pl.ClinicNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.ProvNum,a.ClinicNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.ProvNum,ps.ClinicNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.ClinicNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.ClinicNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Cap' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.ClinicNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,-cp.Writeoff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status=7 AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) Trans ) A ORDER BY A.ItemOrder, A.Clinic, A.Provider;

request: Scheduled appointments in specific operatory.
query: SET @OperatoryName='%%'; SET @OperatoryVisibility='HIDDEN'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN operatory op ON op.OperatoryNum=ap.Op AND (CASE WHEN @OperatoryVisibility LIKE '%HIDDEN%' THEN op.IsHidden=1 ELSE op.IsHidden=0 END) AND op.OpName LIKE @OperatoryName INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) ORDER BY op.OpName, ap.AptDateTime;

request: Outstanding claims for a particular family. Set guarantor at top
query: SET @LName = '%Smith%', @FName = '%John%'; SELECT LEFT(ca.CarrierName, 20) AS 'Carrier Name' ,ca.Phone AS 'Carrier Phone' ,(CASE cl.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE cl.ClaimType END) AS 'ClaimType' ,CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,inssub.SubscriberID ,cl.DateService ,cl.DateSent ,cl.ClaimFee ,cl.InsPayEst FROM claim cl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cl.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor INNER JOIN insplan i ON i.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = cl.InsSubNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = i.CarrierNum WHERE cl.ClaimStatus = 'S' AND g.LName LIKE @LName AND g.FName LIKE @FName ORDER BY cl.DateService;

request: Appointments completed in date range, showing appointments that were scheduled on that same day for a future date.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT A.Patient, A.TreatingDentist, A.TreatingHygienist, DATE_FORMAT(A.InitialApptDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'InitialApptDate', (CASE WHEN A.InitialApptHyg>0 AND A.InitialApptRest=0 THEN 'Hygiene' WHEN A.InitialApptHyg=0 AND A.InitialApptRest>0 THEN 'Restorative' WHEN A.InitialApptHyg=0 AND A.InitialApptRest=0 THEN 'Neither' ELSE 'Both' END) AS 'InitialApptType', DATE_FORMAT(A.FutureApptDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'FutureApptDate', (CASE WHEN A.FutureApptHyg>0 AND A.FutureApptRest=0 THEN 'Hygiene' WHEN A.FutureApptHyg=0 AND A.FutureApptRest>0 THEN 'Restorative' WHEN A.FutureApptHyg=0 AND A.FutureApptRest=0 THEN 'Neither' ELSE 'Both' END) AS 'FutureApptType' FROM ( SELECT apts.Patient, apts.AptNum, nextap.AptNum AS 'NextAptNum', apts.InitialApptDate, apts.InitialApptHyg, apts.InitialApptRest, apts.TreatingDentist, apts.TreatingHygienist, nextap.AptDateTime AS 'FutureApptDate', SUM((CASE WHEN nextpc.ProcCode IN('D0120', 'D0150', 'D4910', 'D4341', 'D4342', 'D4999', 'D1110', 'D1120', 'D1206', 'D1208', 'D4355', 'D4381') AND nextpc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D0330', 'D0210', 'D0220', 'D0230', 'D0274', 'D0277') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'FutureApptHyg', SUM((CASE WHEN nextpc.ProcCode NOT IN('D0120', 'D0150', 'D4910', 'D4341', 'D4342', 'D4999', 'D1110', 'D1120', 'D1206', 'D1208', 'D4355', 'D4381') AND nextpc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D0330', 'D0210', 'D0220', 'D0230', 'D0274', 'D0277') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) )AS 'FutureApptRest' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', ap.AptNum, ap.AptDateTime AS 'InitialApptDate', SUM((CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D0120', 'D0150', 'D4910', 'D4341', 'D4342', 'D4999', 'D1110', 'D1120', 'D1206', 'D1208', 'D4355', 'D4381') AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D0330', 'D0210', 'D0220', 'D0230', 'D0274', 'D0277') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) )AS 'InitialApptHyg', SUM((CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode NOT IN('D0120', 'D0150', 'D4910', 'D4341', 'D4342', 'D4999', 'D1110', 'D1120', 'D1206', 'D1208', 'D4355', 'D4381') AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D0330', 'D0210', 'D0220', 'D0230', 'D0274', 'D0277') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) )AS 'InitialApptRest', provd.Abbr AS 'TreatingDentist', provh.Abbr AS 'TreatingHygienist', ap.AptDateTime, ap.PatNum FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum INNER JOIN provider provd ON provd.ProvNum=ap.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN provider provh ON provh.ProvNum=ap.ProvHyg WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ap.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY ap.AptNum )apts LEFT JOIN histappointment ha ON ha.PatNum = apts.PatNum AND ha.HistApptAction = 0 AND DATE(ha.HistDateTStamp) = DATE(apts.AptDateTime) AND ha.AptNum != apts.AptNum LEFT JOIN appointment nextap ON nextap.AptNum = ha.AptNum AND nextap.AptStatus IN (1,2,3,4) LEFT JOIN procedurelog nextpl ON nextpl.AptNum=nextap.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode nextpc ON nextpc.CodeNum=nextpl.CodeNum GROUP BY apts.AptNum,nextap.AptNum ) A ORDER BY A.Patient,A.InitialApptDate,A.FutureApptDate,A.AptNum,A.NextAptNum;

request: Avg turnaround time in days for claims grouped by carrier. Shows claims with DateSent and DateReceived in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2014-05-01', @ToDate='2014-05-31'; SELECT A.Carrier AS 'Carrier Name', A.ClaimsSent AS 'Claims Sent', A.TurnAround AS 'Turnaround Time (Days)', A.AvgTurnaround AS 'Avg Turnaround Time (Days)' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Carrier', 'TO' AS 'ClaimsSent', DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m%/%d/%Y') AS 'Turnaround', '' AS 'AvgTurnaround' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', COUNT(DISTINCT c.ClaimNum) AS 'ClaimsSent', SUM(c.TurnaroundDays) AS 'Turnaround', FORMAT(SUM(c.TurnaroundDays) / COUNT(DISTINCT c.ClaimNum),2) AS 'AvgTurnaround' FROM ( SELECT TO_DAYS(c.DateReceived)-TO_DAYS(c.DateSent) TurnaroundDays,c.ClaimNum,car.CarrierName FROM claim c INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON c.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cp.InsPayAmt > 0 AND cp.Status IN (1,4) INNER JOIN insplan ip ON c.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND c.DateReceived BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY c.ClaimNum ) c GROUP BY c.CarrierName UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder, 'Total:' AS 'Carrier', COUNT(DISTINCT c.ClaimNum) AS 'ClaimsSent', SUM(c.TurnaroundDays) AS 'Turnaround', FORMAT(SUM(c.TurnaroundDays) / COUNT(DISTINCT c.ClaimNum),2) AS 'AvgTurnaround' FROM ( SELECT TO_DAYS(c.DateReceived)-TO_DAYS(c.DateSent) TurnaroundDays,c.ClaimNum,car.CarrierName FROM claim c INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON c.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cp.InsPayAmt > 0 AND cp.Status IN (1,4) INNER JOIN insplan ip ON c.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND c.DateReceived BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY c.ClaimNum ) c ) A ORDER BY A.ItemOrder,A.Carrier;

request: Claims with date of service in date range, that have an insurance payment within 28 days of date of service
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-05-01'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', DATE_FORMAT(c.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date Of Service', DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Payment Date', (CASE c.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE c.ClaimType END) AS 'ClaimType', car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$Amount Paid_' FROM claim c INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON c.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND c.DateService >= (cp.DateCP - INTERVAL 28 DAY) AND cp.InsPayAmt > 0 AND cp.Status IN (1,4) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON c.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY c.ClaimNum,cp.DateCP ORDER BY c.DateService, c.ClaimNum;

request: Monthly Production and income report for a specific provider with a medicaid payment column
query: SET @FromDate='2022-05-01' , @ToDate='2022-05-31'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @MedicaidCarrierName='%MEDICAID%'; SET @WriteoffByDateOfService='NO'; SELECT trans.TransDate AS 'Date' ,DATE_FORMAT(trans.TransDate,"%W") AS 'WeekDay' ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'Prod' THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Production_ ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'Sched' THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Sched_ ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'Adj' THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Adjustment_ ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'Writeoff' THEN trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Writeoff_ ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj','Sched') THEN trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $NetProd_ ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $PatIncome_ ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType IN('InsPay') THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $InsIncome_ ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType IN('MedicaidPay') THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $MedicaidInc_ ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay','MedicaidPay') THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $TotalIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType ,pl.ProcDate AS TransDate ,pl.ProvNum ,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount ,0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Sched' AS TranType ,DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS TransDate ,ap.ProvNum ,COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)),0) AS TranAmount ,0 AS Writeoff FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON ap.AptNum = pl.AptNum WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY ap.AptNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType ,a.AdjDate AS TransDate ,a.ProvNum ,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount ,0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType ,ps.DatePay AS TransDate ,ps.ProvNum ,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount ,0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount = 0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType ,cp.DateCP AS TransDate ,cp.ProvNum ,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount ,0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum = cpm.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName NOT LIKE @MedicaidCarrierName WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'MedicaidPay' AS TranType ,cp.DateCP AS TransDate ,cp.ProvNum ,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount ,0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum = cpm.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @MedicaidCarrierName WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType ,(CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService = 'YES' THEN cp.ProcDate ELSE cp.DateCP END) AS TransDate ,cp.ProvNum ,0 AS TranAmount ,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE ( CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService = 'YES' THEN (cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) ELSE (cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) END ) AND ( CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService = 'YES' THEN (cp.Status IN(1,4,0)) ELSE (cp.Status IN(1,4)) END ) ) trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum = trans.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY trans.TransDate ORDER BY trans.TransDate;

request: Insurance carrier list showing hidden carriers
query: SELECT CarrierName, Phone, Address, City, State, Zip, ElectID, (CASE WHEN carrier.IsHidden=1 THEN 'HIDDEN' ELSE '' END) AS 'Hidden', COUNT(insplan.PlanNum) AS 'Plans' FROM carrier LEFT JOIN insplan ON insplan.CarrierNum=carrier.CarrierNum WHERE CarrierName LIKE '%%' GROUP BY carrier.CarrierNum ORDER BY CarrierName;

request: Count of unique patients seen in a date range broken down by day
query: SET @FromDate='2014-05-01' , @ToDate='2014-06-01'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate,'%W') AS 'WeekDay', DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS 'Number of unique patients seen' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcDate ORDER BY pl.ProcDate;

request: Audit trail deleted adjustment entries in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-02-01'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(sl.LogDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'Log Recorded', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', sl.LogText, sl.CompName AS 'Computer Deleted From', userod.UserName AS 'User that Deleted' FROM securitylog sl INNER JOIN userod ON userod.UserNum=sl.UserNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=sl.PatNum WHERE sl.PermType=18 AND sl.LogText LIKE 'Delete%' AND DATE(sl.LogDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY sl.LogDateTime;

request: Unsent Claim Information
query: SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', ib.SubscriberID AS 'Subscriber ID', CONCAT(subp.LName,', ',subp.FName) AS 'Subscriber Name', car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier Name', cl.DateService AS 'Date of Service', GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(pc.ProcCode,'-',(CASE WHEN pl.ToothNum='' THEN ' ' ELSE pl.ToothNum END),'-',pl.Surf) ORDER BY pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ' | ') AS 'Procedure Code - Tooth - Surfaces', SUM(cp.FeeBilled) AS '$Fee Billed (UCR)_', SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS '$Insurance Estimate_', cl.ClaimIdentifier AS 'Claim Identifier Number', provb.Abbr AS 'Billing Provider', provt.Abbr AS 'Treating Provider' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN patient p ON cl.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient subp ON subp.PatNum=ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=cl.ClaimNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider provt ON provt.ProvNum=cl.ProvTreat INNER JOIN provider provb ON provb.ProvNum=cl.ProvBill WHERE cl.ClaimStatus IN ('U','H','W') GROUP BY cl.ClaimNum ORDER BY car.CarrierName, p.LName, p.FName, ib.SubscriberID, cl.ClaimIdentifier;

request: Aging for families with negative balance with address information
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SELECT E.ChartNumber, E.Guarantor AS Guarantor, E.Total AS 'Total Bal', E.InsEst AS '-Ins Est', E.PatEst AS '=Patient Bal', CONCAT(E.Address,' ',E.Address2) AS Address, E.City, E.State, E.Zip FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst, D.ChartNumber,D.Address,D.Address2,D.City,D.State,D.Zip FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst,g.ChartNumber,g.Address,g.Address2,g.City,g.State,g.Zip FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal<-0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Patients with $1500 or more in production and payments in date range with contact information
query: SET @FromDate='2014-05-01', @ToDate='2014-05-31'; SELECT p.LName, p.FName, CONCAT(p.Address,' ',p.Address2) AS 'Address', p.City, p.State, p.Zip, p.HmPhone, p.WirelessPhone, prod.TotalProd AS '$Total Production_', (COALESCE(inspay.TotalInsPay,0)+COALESCE(patpay.TotalPatPay,0)) AS '$Total Payment_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS 'TotalProd' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) prod ON prod.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'TotalInsPay' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) inspay ON inspay.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pay.PatNum, SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS 'TotalPatPay' FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pay.PatNum ) patpay ON patpay.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE prod.TotalProd>=1500 AND (COALESCE(inspay.TotalInsPay,0)+COALESCE(patpay.TotalPatPay,0))>=1500 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName;

request: Patients with appt scheduled or complete in date range that have $1500 or more in payments over entire practice history
query: SET @FromDate='2014-05-01', @ToDate='2014-05-31'; SELECT p.LName, p.FName, CONCAT(p.Address,' ',p.Address2) AS 'Address', p.City, p.State, p.Zip, p.HmPhone, p.WirelessPhone, patpay.TotalPatPay AS '$PatPayment_', inspay.TotalInsPay AS '$InsPayment_', (COALESCE(inspay.TotalInsPay,0)+COALESCE(patpay.TotalPatPay,0)) AS '$Total Payment_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT ap.PatNum FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY ap.PatNum ) appts ON appts.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'TotalInsPay' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.DateCP <= CURDATE() GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) inspay ON inspay.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pay.PatNum, SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS 'TotalPatPay' FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate <= CURDATE() GROUP BY pay.PatNum ) patpay ON patpay.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE (COALESCE(inspay.TotalInsPay,0)+COALESCE(patpay.TotalPatPay,0))>=1500 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName;

request: Count of appointments that were created and broken in the date range, broken down by hour.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-01-01', @ToDate='2022-12-31'; SET @StartTime = '9', @EndTime = '15'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(times.LogDateTime,'%h:00%p') AS 'Hour', SUM(CASE WHEN times.PermType=25 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Appt Created', SUM(CASE WHEN times.PermType=27 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Appt Broken' FROM ( SELECT sl.LogDateTime, sl.PermType FROM securitylog sl WHERE (sl.PermType=25 OR (sl.PermType = 27 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%Broken%')) AND sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY - INTERVAL 1 SECOND AND HOUR(sl.LogDateTime) BETWEEN @StartTime AND @EndTime ) times GROUP BY HOUR(times.LogDateTime) ORDER BY HOUR(times.LogDateTime)

request: Total fee billed to each insurance carrier from claims with service date in date range.  Not counting preauths
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-02-01'; SELECT car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier Name', SUM(cl.ClaimFee) AS '$Amount Billed_' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cl.ClaimStatus IN ('S','R') AND cl.ClaimType != 'PreAuth' GROUP BY car.CarrierNum ORDER BY car.CarrierName;

request: Treatment plans created in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-02-01'; SELECT tp.PatNum AS 'Pat CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', DATE_FORMAT(tp.DateTP,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date of TP', tp.Heading AS 'TP Name', (CASE WHEN tp.Signature='' THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END) AS 'Signed?', prov.Abbr AS 'Treating Dentist', SUM(proctp.FeeAmt) AS '$Fee_', SUM(proctp.PriInsAmt) AS '$Pri Ins_', SUM(proctp.SecInsAmt) AS '$Sec Ins_', SUM(proctp.PatAmt) AS '$Patient Portion_' FROM treatplan tp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=tp.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=p.PriProv LEFT JOIN proctp ON proctp.TreatPlanNum=tp.TreatPlanNum WHERE tp.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY tp.TreatPlanNum ORDER BY tp.DateTP, p.LName, p.FName;

request: Callback information for appointments completed in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-05-01', @ToDate='2025-05-31'; SET @From = IF(LENGTH(@FromDate) = 0,CURDATE(),@FromDate), @To = IF(LENGTH(@ToDate) = 0, CURDATE(), @ToDate); SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat Num' , p.PatNum , a.AptDateTime , IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ', ') FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum WHERE pl.AptNum = a.AptNum ),'') AS 'Procedures' , p.HmPhone , p.WkPhone , p.WirelessPhone FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@From) AND DATE(@To) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, a.AptDateTime, a.AptNum

request: Race/Ethnicity totals for active patients by clinic
query: SELECT COALESCE(pats.Clinic, 'NO CLINIC') AS 'Clinic' , pats.RaceEth AS 'Race/Ethnicity' , COUNT(DISTINCT pats.PatNum) AS 'Patient Count' , ( SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 AND patient.ClinicNum = pats.ClinicNum ) AS 'Pats in Clinic' , ROUND(( (COUNT(DISTINCT pats.PatNum) / (SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 AND patient.ClinicNum = pats.ClinicNum) ) * 100), 2) AS '% of Clinic' FROM ( SELECT patsraw.Clinic , patsraw.ClinicNum , patsraw.PatNum , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (CASE patsraw.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' WHEN 10 THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 11 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyEthnicity' ELSE 'None' END) ORDER BY FIELD(patsraw.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11) SEPARATOR ', ' ) AS 'RaceEth' FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum , pr.Race , c.request AS 'Clinic' , p.ClinicNum FROM patient p LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN patientrace pr ON pr.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 ) patsraw GROUP BY patsraw.PatNum ) pats GROUP BY pats.ClinicNum, pats.RaceEth ORDER BY pats.Clinic, (CASE WHEN pats.RaceEth = 'None' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), pats.RaceEth

request: Insurance (Estimates or Paid) for a month (by date of service) showing insurance payment date
query: SET @FromDate='2013-10-01' , @ToDate='2014-07-11'; SELECT cl.PatNum, cl.InsPayEst, cl.InsPayAmt, cl.ClaimFee, cl.Writeoff AS '$Writeoff', cl.DateService, cl.DateSent, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(cpay.CheckDate,'%m/%d/%Y') ORDER BY cpay.CheckDate SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'PaymentDate', ca.CarrierName, ca.Phone FROM claim cl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cl.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan i ON i.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=i.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=cl.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE (cl.ClaimStatus='S' OR cl.ClaimStatus = 'R' OR cl.Claimstatus='W') AND (cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) AND ClaimType<>'PreAuth' GROUP BY cl.ClaimNum ORDER BY ca.CarrierName,p.LName,p.FName,cl.DateService;

request: Completed Procedures in date range with $0.00 fee amounts, showing the global fee from a specified fee schedule
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2026-01-31'; SET @FeeSched='Standard'; SET @Codes='D0150,D0120'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,pl.PatNum AS 'Pat ,pl.ProcDate ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,pc.ProcCode ,FORMAT(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty), 2) AS 'ProcFee' ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(FORMAT(f.Amount, 2) ORDER BY fs.FeeSchedNum SEPARATOR ', ') FROM fee f INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum = f.FeeSched AND fs.request = @FeeSched WHERE f.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND f.ProvNum = 0 AND f.ClinicNum = 0 ), 'NO FEE SET') AS 'FeeSchedFee' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode != '~GRP~' AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @Codes)) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee = 0 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY pl.ProcDate, p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, pl.ProcNum;

request: Active patients seen in the date range by specific provider whose age at time of service is within the age range
query: SET @StartAge=65, @EndAge=100; SET @FromDate='2011-06-01' , @ToDate='2014-08-31'; SET @ProvAbbr='Doc1'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat p.LName, p.FName, (YEAR(pl.ProcDate)-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(pl.ProcDate,5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) AS 'AgeAtApt', pl.ProcDate, prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND (pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus=2 INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr WHERE ((YEAR(pl.ProcDate)-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(pl.ProcDate,5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge) AND p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName;

request: Insurance estimates with a date of service in date range that have a different pay entry date from the payment date
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-08-01'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum WHERE cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateEntry!=cp.DateCP ORDER BY cl.DateService, p.LName, p.FName, pc.ProcCode

request: Appointments in date range with no procedures attached
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-05-01'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', ap.AptDateTime, ap.AptStatus FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum WHERE ISNULL(pl.Procnum) AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2,3,4,5) AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY ap.AptDateTime

request: Referrals entered in date range, with date first appointment, and date next appt
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01' , @ToDate='2018-08-12'; SELECT CONCAT(rf.LName,', ', rf.FName) AS Referrer, DATE_FORMAT(ra.RefDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS RefDate, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', DATE_FORMAT(MIN(DATE(firstap.AptDateTime)),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'FirstAppt', DATE_FORMAT(MIN(DATE(nextap.AptDateTime)),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'NextAppt' FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN referral rf ON ra.ReferralNum=rf.ReferralNum AND rf.NotPerson=0 LEFT JOIN appointment firstap ON firstap.PatNum=p.PatNum AND firstap.AptStatus IN (1,2) LEFT JOIN appointment nextap ON nextap.PatNum=p.PatNum AND DATE(nextap.AptDateTime)>=CURDATE() AND nextap.AptStatus IN (1,4) GROUP BY ra.RefAttachNum ORDER BY rf.LName, rf.FName, ra.RefDate, p.LName, p.FName;

request: Active Patients with birthday in date range, with Age, Birthdate, Name, Address, and Email.  Sorted by day of month for birthday.  Does not show patients without email set
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-15', @ToDate='2014-02-13'; SELECT p.LName, p.FName,(YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) AS 'Age', p.BirthDate, p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.State, p.ZIP,p.Email FROM patient p WHERE p.PatStatus=0 AND DATE_FORMAT(p.BirthDate,'%m-%d') BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m-%d') AND p.Email LIKE '%@%' ORDER BY MONTH(BirthDate),DAY(BirthDate),p.LName, p.FName;

request: Patients with date last seen in date range with address information
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01' , @ToDate='2014-12-31'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', A.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', CONCAT(p.Address,' ',p.Address2) AS 'Address',p.City,p.State,p.Zip,p.HmPhone,p.WirelessPhone, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(pl.ProcDate),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'LastSeen' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY pl.PatNum HAVING MAX(pl.ProcDate) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ) A

request: Unscheduled appointments with original scheduled date in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-03-01'; SELECT ap.PatNum, ap.AptDateTime, GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode) AS 'Procs' FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE ap.AptStatus=3 AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ap.AptNum ORDER BY ap.AptDateTime

request: Patients with no referrals entered (to or from) before @AsOf date
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SELECT p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM patient p LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ra.RefDate < @AsOf WHERE ISNULL(ra.RefAttachNum) ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Saved and signed treatment plans generated in the date range that contain procedures with specific PriorityName that have not yet been completed
query: SET @PriorityName='%TopPriority%'; SET @FromDate = '2022-01-01'; SET @ToDate = '2022-01-31'; SELECT pl.PatNum ,p.PatStatus ,DATE_FORMAT(tp.DateTP,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Saved TP Date' ,tp.Heading AS 'TP Heading' ,FORMAT(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)),2) AS TotalFees ,COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcNum) AS ProcCount ,COALESCE(c.CarrierName,'NoPrimaryIns') AS PriIns ,COALESCE(c2.CarrierName,'NoSecondaryIns') AS SecIns ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y'),'NoScheApt') ORDER BY COALESCE(DATE(a.AptDateTime),'NoScheApt') SEPARATOR ', ') AS FutureSchedDates ,GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN a.AptNum IS NOT NULL THEN pc.AbbrDesc ELSE NULL END) AS ProcsOnApts FROM treatplan tp INNER JOIN proctp tppl ON tppl.TreatPlanNum=tp.TreatPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=tppl.ProcNumOrig AND pl.ProcStatus=1 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=pl.Priority AND d.ItemName LIKE @PriorityName LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp2 ON pp2.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp2.Ordinal=2 LEFT JOIN inssub ib2 ON ib2.InsSubNum=pp2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip2 ON ip2.PlanNum=ib2.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier c2 ON c2.CarrierNum=ip2.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN appointment a ON a.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND a.AptStatus=1 AND a.AptDateTime >= CURDATE() WHERE tp.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND NOT ISNULL(tp.Signature) AND tp.Signature!='' GROUP BY pl.PatNum,tp.TreatPlanNum ORDER BY p.PatStatus,p.LName,p.FName,tp.DateTP;

request: Count of active patients by primary provider
query: SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', COUNT(PatNum) AS 'Active Patients' FROM provider prov LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PriProv=prov.ProvNum AND p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY prov.ProvNum ORDER BY Prov.Abbr

request: Patients seen in date range and which provider they saw (based on completed procedures), with ability to specify provider.  Does not show hygienists
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-08-22'; SET @ProvAbbr='%Abbot%'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.IsSecondary=0 AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum, prov.ProvNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, prov.Abbr;

request: Count of patients seen in date range (by completed procedure)
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-08-25'; SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' to ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'Date Range',COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS 'Patients Seen' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcFee>0 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate;

request: Patients with specific fee schedule set as Fee Schedule (rarely used) in the patient edit window
query: SET @FeeSchedule='%Standard%'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM patient p INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum=p.FeeSched AND fs.request LIKE @FeeSchedule ORDER BY fs.request, p.LName, p.FName;

request: Email addresses of active patients seen in date range with date last seen in date range, with next sched appt
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01' , @ToDate='2014-08-28'; SELECT p.PatNum, p.EMail, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(pl.ProcDate),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'LastSeen', DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ap.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'NextScheduledAppt' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND (pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ap.AptStatus = 1 AND ap.AptDateTime >= CURDATE() WHERE EMail LIKE "%@%" AND p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ORDER BY p.Guarantor;

request: Patients referred out in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-12-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', DATE_FORMAT(ra.RefDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date Referred', CONCAT(prov.LName,', ',prov.FName) AS 'Referred From', CONCAT(ref.LName,', ',ref.FName) AS 'Referred To', ( SELECT ItemName FROM definition WHERE definition.DefNUm = ref.Specialty ) AS 'Specialty', (CASE ra.RefToStatus WHEN 1 THEN 'Declined' WHEN 2 THEN 'Scheduled' WHEN 3 THEN 'Consulted' WHEN 4 THEN 'InTreatment' WHEN 5 THEN 'Complete' ELSE 'None' END) AS 'Status' FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral ref ON ra.ReferralNum = ref.ReferralNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ra.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = ra.ProvNum WHERE ra.RefType = 0 AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY ra.RefDate;

request: Daily procedures report with procedure category
query: SET @FromDate='2014-08-30', @ToDate='2014-09-30'; SET @ProcCode='%%'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SELECT procedurelog.ProcDate, CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS 'Patient Name', definition.ItemName AS 'Procedure Category', procedurecode.ProcCode, procedurelog.ToothNum, procedurecode.Descript AS 'request', provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', procedurelog.ProcFee-IFNULL(SUM(claimproc.WriteOff),0) AS '$ProcFee_' FROM procedurelog LEFT JOIN claimproc ON procedurelog.ProcNum=claimproc.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status='7' INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=procedurelog.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=procedurelog.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode INNER JOIN definition ON definition.DefNum=procedurecode.ProcCat INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=procedurelog.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = '2' AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcNum ORDER BY procedurelog.ProcDate,patient.LName,patient.FName,patient.MiddleI,procedurecode.ProcCode,ToothNum

request: Average Collection Period Ratio for given month and year
query: SET @ReportDate='2014-06-01'; SELECT COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(@ReportDate,'%M %Y'),'ERROR') AS 'Month', COALESCE(CONCAT(ROUND(( (( (SUM(CASE WHEN GuarTrans.StartAR > 0.005 THEN GuarTrans.StartAR ELSE 0 END) +SUM(CASE WHEN GuarTrans.EndAR > 0.005 THEN GuarTrans.EndAR ELSE 0 END)) /2 )* DAY(LAST_DAY(@ReportDate)) ) / SUM(GuarTrans.TotalProduction) ),1),' Days'),'ERROR') AS 'Collection Ratio' FROM ( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@ReportDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'StartAR', SUM((CASE WHEN TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@ReportDate) THEN TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'EndAR', SUM((CASE WHEN TranType IN ('Fee','Adj','InsWriteoff') AND TranDate BETWEEN DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(@ReportDate),'-',MONTH(@ReportDate),'-01')) AND LAST_DAY(@ReportDate) THEN TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'TotalProduction' FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,(CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'InsWriteoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN patient p ON RawPatTrans.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE TranDate<=CURDATE() GROUP BY p.Guarantor ) GuarTrans

request: Average Collection Period Ratio for given month and year
query: SET @ReportDate='2014-08-01'; SELECT COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(@ReportDate,'%M %Y'),'ERROR') AS 'Month', COALESCE(CONCAT(ROUND(( (( (SUM(CASE WHEN GuarTrans.StartAR > 0.005 THEN GuarTrans.StartAR ELSE 0 END) +SUM(CASE WHEN GuarTrans.EndAR > 0.005 THEN GuarTrans.EndAR ELSE 0 END)) /2 )* DAY(LAST_DAY(@ReportDate)) ) / SUM(GuarTrans.TotalProduction) ),1),' Days'),'ERROR') AS 'Collection Ratio' FROM ( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@ReportDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'StartAR', SUM((CASE WHEN TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@ReportDate) THEN TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'EndAR', SUM((CASE WHEN TranType IN ('Fee','Adj','InsWriteoff') AND TranDate BETWEEN DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(@ReportDate),'-',MONTH(@ReportDate),'-01')) AND LAST_DAY(@ReportDate) THEN TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'TotalProduction' FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'InsWriteoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN patient p ON RawPatTrans.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE TranDate<=CURDATE() GROUP BY p.Guarantor ) GuarTrans

request: Patients that have had one or more of specified codes completed in the date range.
query: SET @FromDate = '2019-08-01', @ToDate = '2019-08-23', @ProcList = ''; SET @pos=0, @ProcList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProcList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProcList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', a.LName, a.FName, a.Address, a.Address2, a.City, a.State, a.Zip, a.Email, a.ProcCode, a.ProcDate FROM ( SELECT p.LName, p.FName, p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.State, p.Zip, p.Email, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcDate FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName ) a

request: Count of procedures of each code, matching specified code/code part entered, that are completed in date range by specified provider abbreviation entered. Can run for all codes and providers.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-01-10'; SET @Proc='%D0%', @ProvAbbr='%%'; SELECT provider.Abbr AS 'Prov', procedurecode.ProcCode, procedurecode.Descript, COUNT(*) AS ' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum=procedurecode.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode LIKE @Proc INNER JOIN provider ON procedurelog.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY procedurelog.ProvNum,procedurecode.ProcCode ORDER BY provider.Abbr,procedurecode.ProcCode;

request: Patients with appointments in date range with current total family balance.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-10-01', @ToDate='2014-10-17'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ap.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'Appointment DateTime',p.LName,p.FName,g.BalTotal AS '$TotalFamBalance_' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) ORDER BY ap.AptDateTime, p.LName, p.FName

request: Payplan principal totals by guarantor
query: SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pp.Guarantor GROUP BY p.PatNum

request: Patients with a value entered for a specific patfield
query: SET @PatFieldName='TestPatField'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', A.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', p.PatNum AS 'Pat pf.FieldName, pf.FieldValue FROM patient p INNER JOIN patfield pf ON pf.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pf.FieldName LIKE @PatFieldName ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ) A

request: List of patients with specific active problem seen by provider in the date range
query: SET @ProblemName='%Test%'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @StartDate='2014-01-01', @EndDate='2014-09-01'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', A.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name' FROM disease dis INNER JOIN diseasedef ddef ON ddef.DiseaseDefNum=dis.DiseaseDefNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=dis.PatNum WHERE dis.ProbStatus=0 AND ddef.DiseaseName LIKE @ProblemName AND EXISTS ( SELECT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ) A

request: List of patients with specific active medication seen by provider in the date range
query: SET @MedicationName='%Test%'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @StartDate='2014-01-01', @EndDate='2014-09-01'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', A.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name' FROM medicationpat medpat LEFT JOIN medication med ON med.MedicationNum=medpat.MedicationNum LEFT JOIN medication medgen ON medgen.MedicationNum=med.GenericNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=medpat.PatNum WHERE (medpat.DateStop='0001-01-01' OR medpat.DateStop <= @EndDate) AND (CASE WHEN medpat.MedicationNum!=0 THEN (med.MedName LIKE @MedicationName OR medgen.MedName LIKE @MedicationName) ELSE (medpat.MedDescript LIKE @MedicationName) END) AND EXISTS ( SELECT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ) A

request: Number of patients seen in date range with a specific billing type
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-09-01'; SET @BillingType='%%'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS 'Patients Seen', bt.ItemName FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN definition bt ON p.BillingType=bt.DefNum AND bt.ItemName LIKE @BillingType WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY bt.ItemName

request: Office patient counts. Counts patients with scheduled recalls, patients seen in last two years, active and inactive patients, and of patients with any scheduled appointment
query: SELECT 'Patients with Future Recall Scheduled' AS 'Count Type', COUNT(*) AS 'Count of Patients' FROM ( SELECT r.PatNum, MIN(a.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDateTime', (CASE WHEN r.IsDisabled=0 THEN 'Enabled' ELSE 'Disabled' END) AS IsRecDisabled, GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode) AS 'Recall Procs in Apt' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON a.AptNum=pl.AptNum INNER JOIN recall r ON r.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN recalltrigger rt ON rt.RecallTypeNum=r.RecallTypeNum AND pl.CodeNum=rt.CodeNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE a.AptDateTime > NOW() AND (a.AptStatus=1 OR a.AptStatus=4) GROUP BY r.PatNum ) A UNION ALL SELECT 'Patients seen in last two years' AS 'Count Type', PatCount AS 'Count of Patients' FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PatNum) AS PatCount FROM procedurelog WHERE ProcStatus=2 AND ProcDate>=CURDATE() -INTERVAL 2 YEAR ) B UNION ALL SELECT 'Active Patients' AS 'Count Type', PatCount AS 'Count of Patients' FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PatNum) AS PatCount FROM patient WHERE PatStatus=0 ) C UNION ALL SELECT 'Inactive Patients' AS 'Count Type', PatCount AS 'Count of Patients' FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PatNum) AS PatCount FROM patient WHERE PatStatus=2 ) D UNION ALL SELECT 'Patients with any scheduled apts' AS 'Count Type', PatCount AS 'Count of Patients' FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PatNum) AS PatCount FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus=1 ) E;

request: Office A/R totals at the end of each month for 12 months from the AsOf date
query: SET @AsOf='2013-11-19'; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS RawPatTrans; CREATE TABLE RawPatTrans SELECT * FROM( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 )A; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(@AsOf),'%M %Y') AS MONTH, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf)-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf)-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf)-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf)-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf) GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf)) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>LAST_DAY(@AsOf))) AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf) GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%M %Y') AS MONTH, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH) GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH))) AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 1 MONTH) GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH),'%M %Y') AS MONTH, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH) GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH))) AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 2 MONTH) GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 3 MONTH),'%M %Y') AS MONTH, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 9 MONTH) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 9 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 9 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 9 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 9 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 9 MONTH)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 9 MONTH)) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 9 MONTH))) AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 9 MONTH) GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH),'%M %Y') AS MONTH, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH) GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH)) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH))) AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 10 MONTH) GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH),'%M %Y') AS MONTH, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH)-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH)-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH)-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH) GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH)) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH))) AND cp.ProcDate<=LAST_DAY(@AsOf+INTERVAL 11 MONTH) GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS RawPatTrans;

request: New patients report with clinic totals and grand total
query: SET @StartDate='2025-02-01', @EndDate='2025-02-28'; SET @ExcludedCodes = 'D9986,D9987'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @ExcludedCodeNums FROM procedurecode pc WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ExcludedCodes); SELECT IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', result.dateFirstProc, '') AS 'DateFirstProc' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN CONCAT(result.LName, ', ', result.FName) WHEN 'ClinicTotal' THEN CONCAT('Clinic Total: ', COUNT(DISTINCT result.PatNum), ' Pats') WHEN 'Total' THEN CONCAT('Office Total: ', COUNT(DISTINCT result.PatNum), ' Pats') ELSE '' END) AS 'Patient' ,IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', result.RefName, '') AS 'Referral' ,IF(dup.Type NOT IN('Separator', 'Total'), result.Clinic, '') AS 'Clinic' ,IF(dup.Type != 'Separator',FORMAT(SUM(ROUND(result.HowMuch, 2)), 2), '') AS 'Production' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum ,table1.dateFirstProc ,patient.LName ,patient.FName ,patient.ClinicNum ,COALESCE(cl.request, 'NONE') AS 'Clinic' ,COALESCE(CONCAT(referral.LName, IF(referral.FName = '', '', ','), referral.FName), '') AS 'RefName' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)) FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 ), 0) AS 'HowMuch' FROM ( SELECT proclog.PatNum ,MIN(proclog.ProcDate) AS 'dateFirstProc' FROM procedurelog proclog WHERE proclog.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(proclog.CodeNum, @ExcludedCodeNums) AND proclog.PatNum IN( SELECT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@StartDate) AND DATE(@EndDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 ) GROUP BY proclog.PatNum HAVING dateFirstProc BETWEEN DATE(@StartDate) AND DATE(@EndDate) ) table1 INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = table1.PatNum LEFT JOIN refattach ON refattach.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 AND refattach.ItemOrder = ( SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.PatNum = refattach.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 ) LEFT JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum = refattach.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = patient.ClinicNum GROUP BY patient.PatNum, RefName ORDER BY dateFirstProc, patient.LName, patient.FName ) result INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num', 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS 'Num', 'Separator' AS 'Type' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS 'Num', 'ClinicTotal' AS 'Type' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS 'Num', 'Separator' AS 'Type' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS 'Num', 'Total' AS 'Type' ) AS dup ON TRUE GROUP BY dup.Num , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN CONCAT(result.PatNum, '++', result.RefName) WHEN 'ClinicTotal' THEN result.ClinicNum ELSE TRUE END) ORDER BY dup.Num ,(CASE WHEN result.Clinic = 'NONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) , IF(dup.Type = 'ClinicTotal', result.Clinic, 0) , Patient, result.PatNum

request: Clinic ordered aging for families with a positive balance. Shows totals for each clinic
query: SET @AsOf='2014-08-12'; SELECT A.PatNum AS 'Pat A.Guarantor, A.Clinic, A.Total AS 'FamBal', A.0to30, A.31to60, A.61to90, A.Over90 FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, D.PatNum, CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, COALESCE(D.Clinic,'NONE') AS 'Clinic' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, c.request AS Clinic FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType, pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.ProcDate TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType, a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Capitat' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum PatNum, pp.PayPlanDate TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt TranAmount FROM payplan pp ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranAmount<> 0 AND TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN clinic c ON g.ClinicNum=c.ClinicNum GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.001 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS PatNum, '' AS Guarantor, '' AS 0to30, '' AS 31to60, '' AS 61to90, '' AS Over90, '' AS Total, '' AS 'Clinic' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PatNum', 'Clinic Totals:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(E.0to30),2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(E.31to60),2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(E.61to90),2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(E.Over90),2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(E.Total),2),2) AS Total, E.Clinic FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, D.PatNum, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) AS 0to30, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN
