D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) AS 31to60, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) AS 61to90, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) AS Over90, D.FamBal AS Total, COALESCE(D.Clinic,'NONE') AS 'Clinic' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, c.request AS Clinic FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType, pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.ProcDate TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType, a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Capitat' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum PatNum, pp.PayPlanDate TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt TranAmount FROM payplan pp ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranAmount<> 0 AND TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN clinic c ON g.ClinicNum=c.ClinicNum GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.001 ) E GROUP BY E.Clinic ) A ORDER BY A.ItemOrder,A.Clinic, A.Guarantor;

request: Clinic ordered aging for families with no outstanding claims and a positive balance at least 60 days older than the AsOf date. Shows totals for each clinic
query: SET @AsOf='2014-07-01'; SELECT A.PatNum AS 'Pat A.Guarantor, A.Clinic, A.Total AS 'FamBal', A.61to90, A.Over90 FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, E.PatNum, E.Guarantor AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(E.0to30,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(E.31to60,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(E.61to90,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(E.Over90,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(E.Total,2),2) AS Total, E.Clinic FROM ( SELECT D.PatNum, CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) AS 0to30, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) AS 31to60, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) AS 61to90, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) AS Over90, D.FamBal AS Total, COALESCE(D.Clinic,'NONE') AS 'Clinic' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, c.request AS Clinic FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType, pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.ProcDate TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType, a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Capitat' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum PatNum, pp.PayPlanDate TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt TranAmount FROM payplan pp ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranAmount<> 0 AND TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN clinic c ON g.ClinicNum=c.ClinicNum WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT cp.PatNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient pat ON pat.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN patient guar ON guar.PatNum=pat.Guarantor WHERE guar.PatNum=g.PatNum AND cp.Status=0 ) GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.001 ) E WHERE E.61to90>0 OR E.Over90>0 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS PatNum, '' AS Guarantor, '' AS 0to30, '' AS 31to60, '' AS 61to90, '' AS Over90, '' AS Total, '' AS 'Clinic' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PatNum', 'Clinic Totals:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(F.0to30),2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(F.31to60),2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(F.61to90),2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(F.Over90),2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(F.Total),2),2) AS Total, F.Clinic FROM ( SELECT E.PatNum, E.Guarantor, E.0to30, E.31to60, E.61to90, E.Over90, E.Total, E.Clinic FROM ( SELECT D.PatNum, CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) AS 0to30, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) AS 31to60, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) AS 61to90, (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) AS Over90, D.FamBal AS Total, COALESCE(D.Clinic,'NONE') AS 'Clinic' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, c.request AS Clinic FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType, pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.ProcDate TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType, a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Capitat' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum PatNum, pp.PayPlanDate TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt TranAmount FROM payplan pp ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranAmount<> 0 AND TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN clinic c ON g.ClinicNum=c.ClinicNum WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT cp.PatNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient pat ON pat.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN patient guar ON guar.PatNum=pat.Guarantor WHERE guar.PatNum=g.PatNum AND cp.Status=0 ) GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.001 ) E WHERE E.61to90>0 OR E.Over90>0 ) F GROUP BY F.Clinic ) A ORDER BY A.ItemOrder,A.Clinic, A.Guarantor;

request: Scheduled, Completed, and Broken appointments in the specified date range and clinic with a specified provider
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-12-31'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @Providers=''; SELECT pref.ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference pref WHERE pref.PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT (CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (1,2) THEN IFNULL(clin.Abbr, 'None') WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Clinic' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN DATE(apt.AptDateTime) WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Date' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (1,2) THEN pr.Abbr WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Provider' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, IF(LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0, CONCAT(' ''', p.Preferred, ''' '), ' '), p.MiddleI) WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Patient' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) < 120, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()), 'Unknown') WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Age' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN (CASE apt.AptStatus WHEN 1 THEN 'Scheduled' WHEN 2 THEN 'Complete' WHEN 5 THEN 'Broken' END) WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Appt Status' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN TIME_FORMAT(apt.AptDateTime, '%h:%i %p') WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Time' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(apt.Pattern) * 5 WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Length' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN apt.ProcDescript WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE CONCAT('Total Number of Appts: ', COUNT(DISTINCT apt.AptNum)) END) AS 'request' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN p.HmPhone WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Home Ph.' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN p.WkPhone WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Work Ph.' , (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN p.WirelessPhone WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Cell Ph.' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = apt.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = apt.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_4 s1 ON TRUE WHERE apt.AptStatus IN (1,2,5) AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 OR @EasyNoClinics, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(clin.Abbr, 'None'), @Clinics)) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN CONCAT(s1.Seq, '|', apt.AptNum) WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,3) THEN CONCAT(s1.Seq, '|', apt.ClinicNum) ELSE s1.Seq END) ORDER BY IF(s1.Seq = 4, 'b', 'a'), IFNULL(clin.Abbr, 'None'), s1.Seq, apt.ClinicNum, apt.AptDateTime, apt.AptNum, p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum

request: Aging report with guarantor preferred name, date of last patient payment, and sum of patient payments made on last patient payment date where the account balance is greater than 0
query: SELECT A.Guarantor, A.BillingType, A.Bal_0_30, A.Bal_31_60, A.Bal_61_90, A.BalOver90,A.InsEst, A.BalTotal, (A.BalTotal-A.InsEst) AS '$=Patient', DateLastPay, (SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=paysplit.PatNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay=DATE(A.DateLastPay) AND p.Guarantor=A.GPat) AS $SumPaidLast_ FROM ( SELECT LEFT(CONCAT(g.LName, ' ,', g.FName) , 20) AS Guarantor, G.PatNum AS GPat, LEFT(def.ItemName,16) AS 'BillingType', g.Bal_0_30, g.Bal_31_60, g.Bal_61_90, g.BalOver90, g.InsEst, g.BalTotal, (SELECT MAX(paysplit.DatePay) FROM paysplit INNER JOIN patient paypat ON paypat.PatNum=paysplit.PatNum WHERE paypat.Guarantor=p.Guarantor) AS 'DateLastPay' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=g.BillingType GROUP BY g.PatNum HAVING ((g.BalTotal-g.InsEst) > 0.01) ) A;

request: Counts the number of completed appointments per provider or hygienist for appointments completed in a date range
query: SET @StartDate='2016-01-01', @EndDate='2016-01-31'; SELECT A.Abbr 'Prov/Hyg',COUNT(DISTINCT A.AptNum) AS ' FROM( SELECT prov.Abbr,appt.AptNum, appt.AptDateTime FROM appointment appt INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=appt.ProvNum WHERE appt.AptStatus=2 AND appt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY UNION ALL SELECT hyg.Abbr,appt.AptNum, appt.AptDateTime FROM appointment appt INNER JOIN provider hyg ON hyg.ProvNum=appt.ProvHyg WHERE appt.AptStatus=2 AND appt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY )A GROUP BY A.Abbr ORDER BY A.Abbr

request: List of referred out patients by doctor, including referral specialty and status, and the referred out procedure information
query: SET @StartDate='2021-08-01', @EndDate='2021-08-31'; SELECT p.PatNum AS PatID, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS "Patient", DATE_FORMAT(ra.RefDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS "ReferralDate", ELT(ra.RefToStatus + 1,"None","Declined","Scheduled","Consulted","InTreatment","Complete") AS "ReferralStatus", CONCAT(r.LName,', ',r.FName) AS ReferralName, IF(r.Specialty = 0 AND r.PatNum != 0 ,"Patient" ,COALESCE(( SELECT d.ItemName FROM DEFINITION d WHERE d.DefNum = r.Specialty ),"Unknown") ) AS "ReferralSpecialty", ra.Note AS "PatientNote", ra.DateProcComplete, pr.Abbr AS 'ProcProvider', pl.ProcDate, pl.Priority, (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=5 THEN 'Referred Out' ELSE pl.ProcStatus END) AS 'ProcStatus', pc.ProcCode FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = ra.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 5 INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND ra.RefType = 0 AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate ORDER BY r.LName, r.FName, ra.RefDate;

request: List of invoices in a date range showing patient information and file name
query: SET @StartDate='2014-01-01', @EndDate=CURDATE(); SELECT st.DateSent,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient',st.PatNum AS `Pat FROM statement st LEFT JOIN document doc ON doc.DocNum=st.DocNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=st.PatNum WHERE st.IsInvoice=1 AND st.DateSent BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate ORDER BY st.DateSent,p.LName,p.FName

request: Count of procedures treatment planned for the current date for each patient, and how many of those procedures are scheduled in an appointment for today or in the future
query: SET @CurrentDate=CURDATE(); SELECT Z.LName,Z.FName,Z.NumProcTPToday,Z.NumProcTPSched FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,'Report Date:' AS LName, DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'FName', '' AS 'NumProcTPToday', '' AS 'NumProcTPSched' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'' AS LName, '' AS 'FName', '' AS 'NumProcTPToday', '' AS 'NumProcTPSched' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, p.LName,p.FName,A.NumOfProcs AS 'NumProcTPToday', (CASE WHEN B.AptNumS IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE B.AptNumS END) AS 'NumProcTPSched' FROM patient p INNER JOIN( SELECT COUNT(pl.ProcNum) AS NumOfProcs, pl.DateTP, pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.DateTP=@CurrentDate AND pl.ProcStatus=1 GROUP BY pl.PatNum )A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT COUNT(a.AptNum) AS 'AptNumS',a.PatNum FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum AND pl.DateTP=@CurrentDate AND pl.ProcStatus=1 WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime)>=@CurrentDate AND a.AptStatus IN (1,4) GROUP BY a.PatNum )B ON B.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE A.DateTP=@CurrentDate GROUP BY p.PatNum )Z ORDER BY Z.ItemOrder,Z.LName,Z.FName,Z.NumProcTPToday

request: Appointment list separated by clinic in date range with appointment count by provider and clinic
query: SET @FromDate='2017-07-01', @ToDate='2017-07-30'; SELECT (CASE WHEN Q.ItemOrder=4 THEN ' Q.WorkPh AS 'Work Ph.',Q.CellPh AS 'Cell Ph.',Q.Dentist AS 'Dentist',Q.Hygienist AS 'Hygienist',Q.IsHygiene AS 'is Hygiene' FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(cl.request) THEN 'Unspecified' ELSE cl.request END) AS 'Clinic', DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'Date', TRIM(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(CONCAT('(',p.Preferred),') ') ELSE '' END),p.fname), ' '),p.middlei)) AS 'Patient', (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) ELSE '' END) AS 'Age', DATE_FORMAT(ap.AptDateTime, '%h:%i %p') AS 'Time', LENGTH(ap.Pattern)*5 AS 'Length', ap.ProcDescript AS 'request', p.HmPhone AS 'HomePh', p.WkPhone AS 'WorkPh', p.WirelessPhone AS 'CellPh', pr.Abbr AS 'Dentist', hyg.Abbr AS 'Hygienist', (CASE WHEN ap.IsHygiene=1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) AS 'isHygiene' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON ap.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=ap.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider hyg ON hyg.ProvNum=ap.ProvHyg LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ap.ClinicNum WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND AptStatus NOT IN ('3','6') UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(cl.request) THEN 'Unspecified' ELSE cl.request END) AS 'Clinic', ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON ap.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ap.ClinicNum WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND AptStatus NOT IN (3,6) GROUP BY cl.ClinicNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(cl.request) THEN 'Unspecified' ELSE cl.request END) AS 'Clinic', '' AS 'Date', '' AS 'Patient', '' AS 'Age', '' AS 'Time', '' AS 'Length', CONCAT('Number of Apts by ',prov.Prov,': ',COUNT(prov.Prov)) AS 'request', '' AS 'Home Ph.', '' AS 'Work Ph.', '' AS 'Cell Ph.', '' AS 'Dentist', '' AS 'Hygienist', '' AS 'isHygiene' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON ap.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ap.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT (CASE WHEN apt.IsHygiene=1 THEN COALESCE(hyg.Abbr,pr.Abbr,'') ELSE COALESCE(pr.Abbr,hyg.Abbr,'') END) AS Prov, apt.AptNum FROM appointment apt LEFT JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=apt.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider hyg ON hyg.ProvNum=apt.ProvHyg INNER JOIN patient p ON apt.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=apt.ClinicNum WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus NOT IN ('3','6') )prov ON prov.AptNum=ap.AptNum WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND AptStatus NOT IN ('3','6') GROUP BY cl.ClinicNum,prov.Prov UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(cl.request) THEN 'Unspecified' ELSE cl.request END) AS 'Clinic', '' AS 'Date', '' AS 'Patient', '' AS 'Age', '' AS 'Time', '' AS 'Length', CONCAT('Total Number of Apts: ',COUNT(ap.AptNum)) AS 'request', '' AS 'Home Ph.', '' AS 'Work Ph.', '' AS 'Cell Ph.', '' AS 'Dentist', '' AS 'Hygienist', '' AS 'isHygiene' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON ap.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ap.ClinicNum WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND AptStatus NOT IN ('3','6') GROUP BY cl.ClinicNum UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder, 'All Clinics' AS 'Clinic', '' AS 'Date', '' AS 'Patient', '' AS 'Age', '' AS 'Time', '' AS 'Length', CONCAT('Total Number of Apts: ',COUNT(ap.AptNum)) AS 'request', '' AS 'Home Ph.', '' AS 'Work Ph.', '' AS 'Cell Ph.', '' AS 'Dentist', '' AS 'Hygienist', '' AS 'isHygiene' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON ap.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ap.ClinicNum WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND AptStatus NOT IN ('3','6') )Q ORDER BY (CASE WHEN ItemOrder IN (6) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),(CASE WHEN Q.Clinic='Unspecified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),Q.Clinic,ItemOrder,Q.Date

request: Insurance claim procedures with UCR fee of specified fee schedule, the insurance estimate, estimated patient portion, and amount insurance paid for claims with a date of a service in the specified date range, with the specified treat provider. Can exclude specific procedure codes
query: SET @ExcludeProcCodes =''; SET @FromDate ='2024-12-01', @ToDate ='2024-12-31'; SET @ProvTreat ='%%'; SET @FeeSchedDescr ='Office Fees'; SELECT cl.PatNum ,cl.DateService ,prov.Abbr AS 'ProcTreat' ,pc.ProcCode ,CAST(cp.InsPayEst AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'InsPayEst' ,CAST((pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) - cp.InsPayEst - cp.WriteOffEst AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'EstPatPortion' ,CAST(IFNULL(fees.Amount,0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'UCR Fee' ,CAST(cp.InsPayAmt AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,car.CarrierName FROM claim cl INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cl.ProvTreat AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvTreat LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.Amount ,f.CodeNum FROM fee f INNER JOIN feesched fs ON f.FeeSched = fs.FeeSchedNum AND fs.request = @FeeSchedDescr WHERE f.ProvNum = 0 AND f.ClinicNum = 0 ) fees ON pc.CodeNum = fees.CodeNum WHERE DateService BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludeProcCodes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ExcludeProcCodes)) GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum ORDER BY cl.DateService, pl.PatNum, pl.ProcNum, cp.ClaimProcNum

request: Guarantors of active patients who have been seen in the date range where the guarantor has mailing address information filled out.
query: SET @StartDate='2009-01-01',@EndDate='2014-08-31'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS ' FROM( SELECT g.LName,g.FName,g.Address,g.Address2,g.City,g.State,g.Zip FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor WHERE p.PatStatus=0 AND (g.Address!='' OR g.Address2!='') AND g.City!='' AND g.State!='' AND g.Zip!='' AND POSITION('*' IN g.LName)=0 GROUP BY g.PatNum ORDER BY g.LName,g.FName ) A

request: Sheets created in a date range with specific sheet requests
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-01-31'; SET @Sheets=''; SET @Sheets=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Sheets) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE REPLACE(@Sheets,',','|') END); SELECT sh.DateTimeSheet ,p.PatNum ,sh.request AS 'SheetName' ,p.BillingType FROM sheet sh INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=sh.PatNum WHERE sh.DateTimeSheet BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND sh.request REGEXP @Sheets ORDER BY sh.request, p.LName, p.FName, sh.DateTimeSheet, sh.SheetNum;

request: Count of patients seen by provider, split by primary ins carrier at time of service in date range
query: SET @StartDate='2014-03-01', @EndDate='2014-09-01'; SELECT p.Abbr AS 'Provider', car1.CarrierName, COUNT(DISTINCT cl.PatNum) AS 'CountPats' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=cl.ClaimNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1) INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 INNER JOIN provider p ON p.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum INNER JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car1 ON car1.CarrierNum=ip1.CarrierNum WHERE cl.ClaimType='P' AND cl.ClaimStatus IN('R','S') AND cl.DateService BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY p.ProvNum, car1.CarrierNum ORDER BY p.Abbr, car1.CarrierName;

request: Completed procedures in date range that have more than one 'CapCom' status insurance estimate
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate= '2014-12-05'; SELECT pl.PatNum AS 'Pat pl.ProcDate, COUNT(*) AS ' pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedureCode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status = 7 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY pl.ProcDate, pl.PatNum, pc.ProcCode

request:
Production per Operatory for appointments in the date range.
Production will be for procedures attached to an appointment in the operatory.
If the procedure is attached to a received claim, the writeoff will be subtracted from the production if applicable.
If the procedure is not attached to a claim or attached to an unreceived claim, the writeoff estimate will be subtracted if applicable.
Only operatories with production in the date range will be listed, so operatories with zero production will not show.
query: SET @StartDate='2014-01-01',@EndDate='2014-12-31'; SELECT A.OpName AS Operatory,SUM(A.Prod) AS $Production_ FROM ( SELECT o.OpName,a.Op,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status=1 THEN cp.WriteOff WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride!=-1 THEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN cp.WriteOffEst!=-1 THEN WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END) AS Prod FROM appointment a INNER JOIN operatory o ON o.OperatoryNum=a.Op INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus IN(1,2) LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,6) WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) A GROUP BY A.Op HAVING SUM(Prod)>0 ORDER BY A.OpName;

request:
List of patients seen in a date range with age, race, carrier, number of visits and other information, for FQHC grant
Patient Name, Age, Number of Visits (a visit is a unique date of service), Patfield ('Sliding Scale ' in this example), Carrier Name (primary if any) and Race for patients seen in given date range
query: SET @StartDate= '2014-01-01'; SET @EndDate= '2014-12-31'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS Num, A.* FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum, (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) ELSE 'NONE' END) AS 'Age', COUNT(DISTINCT(pl.ProcDate)) AS Visits, ca.CarrierName, (SELECT MAX(FieldValue) FROM patfield WHERE patfield.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FieldName='Sliding Scale') AS 'Slide', (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT((CASE pr.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' WHEN 10 THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 11 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyEthnicity' ELSE 'None' END) ORDER BY FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11) SEPARATOR ', ') FROM patientrace pr WHERE pr.PatNum=p.PatNum) AS 'RaceEth', p.AddrNote FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ) A;

request: Patients seen by practice and specified provider
query: SET @ProviderName='Alice'; SET @StartDate='2014-10-01', @EndDate='2015-01-20'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.PatNum) AS ' FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pl.AptNum) AS 'NumApts',COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS 'NumPats' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr=@ProviderName WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate )numProv ON numProv.NumApts WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate;

request: Number of patients per billing type.  Includes patients with specified patfield as its own billing type.
query: SET @PatFieldName='Sliding scale fee'; SELECT A.BillingType, COUNT(A.BillingType) AS ' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN pf.FieldName IS NULL THEN def.ItemName ELSE @PatFieldName END) BillingType FROM patient p LEFT JOIN patfield pf ON pf.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pf.FieldName=@PatFieldName INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=p.BillingType )A GROUP BY A.BillingType;

request: Count of broken and completed appointments, individually and summed, also shows percentages of broken and completed appointments
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-12-31'; SELECT COUNT(A.AptNum) AS TotalApt, SUM(CASE WHEN a.AptStatus=2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN a.AptStatus=5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.AptStatus=2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(A.AptNum)*100,2),2),'%') AS '%Complete', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.AptStatus=5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(A.AptNum)*100,2),2),'%') AS '%Broken' FROM( SELECT a.AptNum,a.AptStatus FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus IN(2,5) AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY )A;

request: Number of procedures completed grouped by specific procedure code ranges in date range
query: SET @ProviderName='Alice'; SET @StartDate='2014-10-01', @EndDate='2015-01-23'; SELECT A.ProcType,COUNT(A.ProcType) AS ' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D0190' THEN 'Screening' WHEN pc.ProcCode LIKE 'D1%' THEN 'Preventitive' WHEN pc.ProcCode LIKE 'D2%' THEN 'Restorative' WHEN pc.ProcCode LIKE 'D7%' THEN 'Extraction' WHEN pc.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D5110' AND 'D5140' THEN 'Dentures' WHEN pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'D1%' AND pc.ProcCode!='D0190' AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'D2%' AND (pc.ProcCode NOT BETWEEN 'D5110' AND 'D5140') AND pc.ProcCode LIKE 'D%' THEN 'Other' ELSE 'N/A' END) AS ProcType FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProviderName WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 )A GROUP BY A.ProcType

request: Daily payments report for specific clinic.  Patient payments show payment type in carrier column.  Shows practice title as clinic if no clinic set
query: SET @FromDate='2024-10-01', @ToDate='2024-10-10'; SET @Clinic='%%'; SELECT Pay.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type' ,Pay.Date ,Pay.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' ,Pay.PatientName AS 'Patient Name (one of)' ,Pay.Provider ,Pay.Clinic ,Pay.CheckNum AS 'Check ,Pay.Amt AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder ,'Insurance Check' AS 'PaymentType' ,CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date' ,carrier.CarrierName ,MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName' ,provider.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,COALESCE(clinic.request,(SELECT preference.ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName='PracticeTitle'),'') AS 'Clinic' ,claimpayment.CheckNum ,FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),2) AS 'Amt' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=claimproc.ClinicNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4) AND claimpayment.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @Clinic='%%' THEN TRUE ELSE clinic.Abbr LIKE @Clinic END) GROUP BY CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%c/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)), claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum, provider.ProvNum, claimproc.ClinicNum, carrier.CarrierName, provider.Abbr, clinic.request, claimpayment.CheckNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Clinic', '' AS CheckNum, '' AS 'Amt' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder ,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE definition.ItemName END) AS 'PaymentType' ,CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(payment.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date' ,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE definition.ItemName END) AS 'Carrier' ,MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName' ,provider.Abbr 'Provider' ,COALESCE(clinic.request,(SELECT preference.ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName='PracticeTitle'),'') AS 'Clinic' ,payment.CheckNum ,FORMAT(SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum=paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType=definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON payment.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @Clinic='%%' THEN TRUE ELSE clinic.Abbr LIKE @Clinic END) GROUP BY payment.PayNum, payment.PayDate, provider.ProvNum, payment.ClinicNum, provider.Abbr, clinic.request, payment.CheckNum, definition.ItemName ) Pay ORDER BY Pay.ItemOrder,Pay.PaymentType,Pay.Date,Pay.PatientName

request: Count of each procedures code completed in date range by a specific provider
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-10-10'; SET @ProvAbbr='Doc1'; SELECT provider.Abbr AS 'Prov',procedurecode.ProcCode,procedurecode.Descript,COUNT(*) AS ' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum=procedurecode.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider ON procedurelog.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY procedurelog.ProvNum,procedurecode.ProcCode ORDER BY provider.Abbr,procedurecode.ProcCode;

request: Active patients without specific codes completed in the date range showing date last completed appointment
query: SET @FromDate=(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 6 MONTH), @ToDate=CURDATE(); SET @ProcCodes='D0150|D1110|D1120|D0120'; SET @ProcCodes=(CASE WHEN @ProcCodes='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcCodes,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ap.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'Last Appt', p.HmPhone, p.WirelessPhone, p.WkPhone FROM patient p LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ap.AptStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) procs ON p.PatNum = procs.PatNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND ISNULL(procs.PatNum) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName

request: Patient payments by date of paysplit in a date range for a specific provider with total. Only shows when paysplit date is different than payment date.
query: SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @FromDate='2014-08-01', @ToDate='2014-09-27'; SELECT B.Abbr AS 'Provider Abbr', B.PName AS 'Patient Name',B.PayDate AS 'Payment Date', B.DateEntry AS 'Payment Split Date', B.SplitAmt AS '$Payment Amount_', B.PayNote AS 'Payment Note' FROM( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder, prov.Abbr, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PName', DATE_FORMAT(pay.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS PayDate, DATE_FORMAT(pays.DateEntry,'%m/%d/%Y') AS DateEntry, pay.PayNote, pays.SplitAmt FROM paysplit pays INNER JOIN patient p ON pays.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON pays.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=pays.PayNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND pays.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pays.DateEntry != pay.PayDate UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'Total:' AS 'Abbr', NULL AS 'PName', NULL AS PayDate, NULL AS DateEntry, NULL AS PayNote, SUM(A.SplitAmt) AS SplitAmt FROM ( SELECT prov.Abbr, pays.DateEntry, pays.SplitAmt FROM paysplit pays INNER JOIN provider prov ON pays.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=pays.PayNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND pays.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pays.DateEntry != pay.PayDate ) A ) B ORDER BY B.ItemOrder,B.DateEntry

request: Outstanding Insurance Claims sent in date range.  Only shows claims for PPO insurance plans. Does not show PreAuth claims
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-09-01'; SELECT car.CarrierName, p.MedicaidID, sub.SSN AS 'SubscriberSSN', p.Birthdate, p.PatNum AS 'Pat CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PatientName', (CASE WHEN c.ClaimType='P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN c.ClaimType='S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN c.ClaimType='Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE c.ClaimType END) AS ClaimType, c.DateService, c.DateSent, c.ClaimFee AS '$Amount_' FROM claim c INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=c.PlanNum AND ip.PlanType='p' INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON iss.InsSubNum=c.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum=iss.Subscriber WHERE c.ClaimStatus='S' AND c.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND c.ClaimType != 'PreAuth' ORDER BY car.CarrierName,c.DateService;

request: List of patients that have treatment planned procedures
query: SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', p.HmPhone, p.WkPhone, p.WirelessPhone, DATE_FORMAT((SELECT MAX(pl.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Last Visit', SUM(tp.ProcFee) AS '$TreatPlan Total_', p.BillingType FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog tp ON p.PatNum=tp.PatNum AND tp.ProcStatus=1 GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName;

request: Insurance and patient income for payments received during the date range summed by carrier name and employer name.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-10-01', @ToDate='2023-10-31'; SET @CarrierName='%%'; SET @EmployerName='%%'; SELECT sumcaremppat.Carrier , sumcaremppat.Employer , SUM(sumcaremppat.InsIncome) AS '$InsIncome_' , SUM(sumcaremppat.PatIncome) AS '$PatIncome_' FROM ( SELECT sumplanpat.PatNum , sumplanpat.Carrier , sumplanpat.Employer , SUM(sumplanpat.InsIncome) AS 'InsIncome' , sumplanpat.PatIncome AS 'PatIncome' FROM ( SELECT pay.PatNum , pay.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' , pay.EmpName AS 'Employer' , SUM(pay.InsIncome) AS 'InsIncome' , SUM(pay.PatIncome) AS 'PatIncome' FROM ( SELECT cp.PatNum , ip.PlanNum , car.CarrierName , COALESCE(emp.EmpName, 'None') AS 'EmpName' , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsIncome' , 0 AS 'PatIncome' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName LEFT JOIN employer emp ON emp.EmployerNum = ip.EmployerNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND COALESCE(emp.EmpName, 'None') LIKE @EmployerName AND cp.Status IN (1, 4) AND cp.InsPayAmt != 0 GROUP BY cp.PatNum, ip.PlanNum UNION ALL SELECT ps.PatNum , insinfo.PlanNum , insinfo.CarrierName , COALESCE(insinfo.EmpName, 'None') AS 'EmpName' , 0 AS 'InsIncome' , SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PatIncome' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum , ip.PlanNum , car.CarrierName , emp.EmpName FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName LEFT JOIN employer emp ON emp.EmployerNum = ip.EmployerNum WHERE ((cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (0, 1,4, 6)) OR (cp.DateCp BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (1, 4))) AND COALESCE(emp.EmpName, 'None') LIKE @EmployerName GROUP BY cp.PatNum, ip.PlanNum ) insinfo ON insinfo.PatNum = ps.PatNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ps.SplitAmt != 0 GROUP BY ps.PatNum, insinfo.PlanNum ) pay GROUP BY pay.PatNum, pay.PlanNum ) sumplanpat GROUP BY sumplanpat.PatNum, sumplanpat.Carrier, sumplanpat.Employer ) sumcaremppat GROUP BY sumcaremppat.Carrier, sumcaremppat.Employer HAVING `$InsIncome_` > 0 OR `$PatIncome_` > 0 ORDER BY sumcaremppat.Carrier, sumcaremppat.Employer

request: Completed procedures attached to claims with carrier name and subscriberID.  Will show multiple rows for a procedure if attached to two different claims
query: SET @FromDate= '2014-08-01', @ToDate='2014-08-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', p.PatNum AS 'Pat p.Birthdate, DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ProcDate', pc.ProcCode, car.CarrierName, isb.SubscriberID FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1) LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN inssub isb ON isb.InsSubNum=cp.InsSubNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY pl.ProcDate, p.LName, p.FName, pc.ProcCode, car.CarrierName;

request: Appointment list with patient info
query: SET @FromDate='2014-10-12', @ToDate='2014-11-12'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) ELSE '' END) AS 'Age', DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%h:%i %p') AS 'Time', LENGTH(a.Pattern)*5 AS 'Length', a.ProcDescript AS 'request', p.HmPhone AS 'Home Ph.', p.WkPhone AS 'Work Ph.', p.WirelessPhone AS 'Cell Ph.' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus != 3 AND a.AptStatus != 6 ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, p.LName, p.FName

request: Appointment list with patient and provider info
query: SET @FromDate='2014-10-12', @ToDate='2014-11-12'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', prov.Abbr AS 'Dentist', hyg.Abbr AS 'Hyg', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) ELSE '' END) AS 'Age', DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%h:%i %p') AS 'Time', LENGTH(a.Pattern)*5 AS 'Length', a.ProcDescript AS 'request' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=a.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider hyg ON hyg.ProvNum=a.ProvHyg WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus != 3 AND a.AptStatus != 6 ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, p.LName, p.FName

request: Insurance payments with payment date in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2014-11-01',@ToDate='2014-11-15'; SELECT p.PatNum, pc.ProcCode, pr.Abbr AS Prov, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS $InsPayAmt_, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS $ProcFee_ FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum= pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY pl.ProcDate,p.LName,p.FName;

SET @StartDate='2014-07-01', @EndDate='2014-08-31', @CarrierName='%%'; SELECT car.CarrierName, CONCAT(CONCAT(patSub.LName,', '),patSub.FName) AS 'Subscriber', patSub.SSN AS 'Subsc SSN', CONCAT(CONCAT(patPat.LName,', '),patPat.FName) AS 'Patient', patPat.Birthdate AS 'Pat DOB', pc.ProcCode AS 'Code', pc.Descript AS 'Proc request', pl.ToothNum AS 'Tth', pl.Surf AS 'Surf', pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.ProcFee-cp.WriteOff AS 'Co-Pay', emp.EmpName AS 'Employer', patPat.Zip AS 'Pat Zip', ib.SubscriberID, (CASE pp.Relationship WHEN 0 THEN 'Self' WHEN 1 THEN 'Spouse' WHEN 2 THEN 'Child' WHEN 3 THEN 'Employee' WHEN 4 THEN 'HandicapDep' WHEN 5 THEN 'SignifOther' WHEN 6 THEN 'InjuredPlantiff' WHEN 7 THEN 'LifePartner' WHEN 8 THEN 'Dependant' ELSE '' END ) AS 'RelationToSubscriber' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient patPat ON pl.PatNum = patPat.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 AND cp.NoBillIns = 0 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum AND ip.PlanType='c' INNER JOIN inssub ib ON cp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient patSub ON patSub.PatNum = ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum AND (car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName) INNER JOIN employer emp ON emp.EmployerNum=ip.EmployerNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND pp.InsSubNum=ib.InsSubNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate

request: Count of patients seen in date range, and how many of those seen were new patients.  Patients seen and new patients based on completed appointment.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-11-01', @ToDate='2014-11-18'; SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'Title', '' AS ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Patients Seen' AS 'Title', COUNT(DISTINCT patSeen.PatNum) AS ' FROM ( SELECT a.PatNum FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY a.PatNum ) patSeen UNION ALL SELECT 'New Pats Seen' AS 'Title', COUNT(DISTINCT newPat.PatNum) AS ' FROM ( SELECT a.PatNum FROM appointment a INNER JOIN ( SELECT a.PatNum, DATE(MIN(a.AptDateTime)) AS 'FirstVisit' FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY a.PatNum ) FirstVisit ON FirstVisit.Patnum=a.PatNum AND FirstVisit.FirstVisit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY a.PatNum ) newPat

request: List of claims with total ins payments entered.
query: SELECT c.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM claim c INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=c.ClaimNum WHERE cp.ProcNum=0 AND cp.Status!=3 GROUP BY c.ClaimNum

request: Daily procedures report with procedure category, birthdate and tooth surface
query: SET @FromDate='2014-08-30', @ToDate='2014-09-30'; SET @ProcCode='%%'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SELECT procedurelog.ProcDate, CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS 'Patient Name', patient.Birthdate, definition.ItemName AS 'Procedure Category', procedurecode.ProcCode, procedurelog.ToothNum, procedurelog.Surf, procedurecode.Descript AS 'request', provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', procedurelog.ProcFee-IFNULL(SUM(claimproc.WriteOff),0) AS '$ProcFee_' FROM procedurelog LEFT JOIN claimproc ON procedurelog.ProcNum=claimproc.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status='7' INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=procedurelog.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=procedurelog.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode INNER JOIN definition ON definition.DefNum=procedurecode.ProcCat INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=procedurelog.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = '2' AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcNum ORDER BY procedurelog.ProcDate,patient.LName,patient.FName,patient.MiddleI,procedurecode.ProcCode,ToothNum

request: Claims sent or received with service date in date range for specified carrier.  Does not include pre-auths
query: SET @CarrierName='%%'; SET @FromDate='2014-08-01' , @ToDate='2014-08-31'; SELECT CarrierName, COUNT(cl.ClaimNum) AS ' FORMAT(100*(COUNT(cl.ClaimNum)/(SELECT COUNT(claim.ClaimNum) FROM claim INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum=claim.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=insplan.CarrierNum AND carrier.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName WHERE claim.ClaimType<>'PreAuth' AND claim.ClaimStatus IN('R','S') AND claim.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) ),2) AS '%Claims ', SUM(cl.ClaimFee) AS '$ClaimFees', SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsPaidAmt' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN insplan i ON i.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=i.CarrierNum AND ca.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName WHERE cl.ClaimType<>'PreAuth' AND cl.ClaimStatus IN('R','S') AND cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ca.CarrierName ORDER BY ca.CarrierName;

request: Scheduled appointments in a date range with production, insurance carriers, and insurance estimates for procedures on those appointments
query: SET @FromDate='2024-08-01', @ToDate='2024-08-15'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'AppointmentDate' ,a.PatNum AS 'Pat ,a.Patient ,a.Dentist ,a.Hygienist ,SUM((pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))) AS '$GrossProduction_' ,a.InsCarriers ,a.InsEstimate AS '$InsEstimate_' FROM ( SELECT ap.AptDateTime ,p.PatNum ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,doc.Abbr AS 'Dentist' ,hyg.Abbr AS 'Hygienist' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT car.CarrierName ORDER BY car.CarrierName SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'InsCarriers' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride!=-1 THEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE cp.InsEstTotal END) AS 'InsEstimate' ,ap.AptNum FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = ap.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider doc ON doc.ProvNum = ap.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider hyg ON hyg.ProvNum = ap.ProvHyg WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ap.AptStatus = 1 GROUP BY ap.PatNum, ap.AptNum ) a LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = a.AptNum GROUP BY a.AptDateTime, a.AptNum, a.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT ' ,' ,' ,' ,' ,' ,' ,' UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'AppointmentDate' ,'' AS 'Pat ,CONCAT(' ,'' AS Dentist ,'Average Per Appointment: ' AS Hygienist ,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(b.GrossProduction)/COUNT(*),2),2) AS '$GrossProduction_' ,'' InsCarriers ,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(b.InsEstimate)/COUNT(*),2),2) AS '$InsEstimate_' FROM ( SELECT SUM((pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))) AS 'GrossProduction' ,a.InsEstimate AS 'InsEstimate' FROM ( SELECT ap.AptDateTime ,p.PatNum ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,doc.Abbr AS 'Dentist' ,hyg.Abbr AS 'Hygienist' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT car.CarrierName ORDER BY car.CarrierName SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'InsCarriers' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride!=-1 THEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE cp.InsEstTotal END) AS 'InsEstimate' ,ap.AptNum FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = ap.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider doc ON doc.ProvNum = ap.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider hyg ON hyg.ProvNum = ap.ProvHyg WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ap.AptStatus = 1 GROUP BY ap.PatNum, ap.AptNum ) a LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = a.AptNum GROUP BY a.PatNum, a.AptNum ) b

request: Daily payment report grouped by patient.  Like internal report
query: SET @FromDate='2014-11-01', @ToDate='2014-11-30'; SELECT pays.PayDate AS 'PaymentDate', pays.CarrierName, pays.Patient, pays.Provider, pays.ClinicDesc, pays.CheckNum, pays.Amt, pays.PaymentType FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder, ' 'Insurance Payments:' AS CarrierName, ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%c/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) PayDate, car.CarrierName, MAX(CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI)) Patient, prov.Abbr AS Provider, clin.request AS ClinicDesc, cpay.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),2) AS Amt, paytype.ItemName AS PaymentType FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpay.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON cpay.PayType=paytype.DefNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%c/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)),cp.ClaimPaymentNum,prov.ProvNum,cp.ClinicNum,car.CarrierName,prov.Abbr,clin.request,cpay.CheckNum,p.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS PayDate, '' AS CarrierName, '' AS Patient, '' AS Provider, '' AS ClinicDesc, '' AS CheckNum, '' AS Amt, '' AS PaymentType UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, ' 'Patient Payments:' AS CarrierName, ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(pay.PayDate,'%c/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS PayDate, '' AS CarrierName, MAX(CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI)) AS Patient, prov.Abbr AS Provider, clin.request AS ClinicDesc, pay.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(ps.SplitAmt),2) AS Amt, paytype.ItemName AS PaymentType FROM payment pay LEFT JOIN paysplit ps ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient p ON pay.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON ps.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType=paytype.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON pay.ClinicNum=clin.ClinicNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pay.PayNum,pay.PayDate,prov.ProvNum,pay.ClinicNum,prov.Abbr,clin.request,pay.CheckNum,paytype.ItemName,p.PatNum ) pays ORDER BY pays.ItemOrder,pays.PaymentType,pays.PayDate,pays.Patient

request: Patients with In-Person statements generated in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2014-11-01', @ToDate='2014-11-26'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', statement.DateSent AS 'Statements Date' FROM statement INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=statement.PatNum WHERE statement.Mode_=1 AND statement.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, statement.DateSent

request: Name and address information for guarantors of the last 3000 accounts seen
query: SELECT A.FName, A.LName, A.Address, A.Address2, A.City, A.State, A.Zip, A.DateLastSeen FROM ( SELECT g.FName, g.LName, g.Address, g.Address2, g.City, g.State, g.Zip, MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS 'DateLastSeen' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY g.PatNum ) A ORDER BY A.DateLastSeen DESC LIMIT 3000;

request: Count of active patients grouped by employer set on the patient
query: SELECT emp.EmpName, COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS ' FROM patient p INNER JOIN employer emp ON emp.EmployerNum=p.EmployerNum WHERE p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY p.EmployerNum

request: Referrer list with address and phone information only showing doctors
query: SELECT ref.LName, ref.FName, ref.Title, ref.Address, ref.Address2, ref.City, ref.ST, ref.Zip, ref.Telephone FROM referral ref WHERE ref.IsDoctor=1

request: Finance charges added today
query: SET @AdjDate=CURDATE(); SET @AdjType=(SELECT preference.ValueString FROM preference WHERE preference.PrefName='FinanceChargeAdjustmentType'); SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=a.PatNum WHERE a.AdjType=@AdjType AND a.AdjDate=@AdjDate ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Count of total appointments completed in date range, and how many of those had a D0120, D0145, or D0150
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-01-31'; SELECT appts.Date, appts.TotalAppts AS ' FROM( SELECT DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'Date', COUNT(ap.AptNum) AS 'TotalAppts' FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY DATE(ap.AptDateTime) ) appts LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'Date', COUNT(DISTINCT ap.AptNum) AS 'TotalAppts' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode IN ('D0120','D0145','D0150') WHERE ap.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY DATE(ap.AptDateTime) ) hygappts ON appts.Date=hygappts.Date ORDER BY appts.Date;

request: List of referred out patients by doctor, including referral specialty and status, referring provider, and the referred out procedure information
query: SET @StartDate='2021-12-01', @EndDate='2021-12-31'; SELECT p.PatNum AS PatID, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', DATE_FORMAT(ra.RefDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ReferralDate', (CASE WHEN ra.RefToStatus=0 THEN 'None' WHEN ra.RefToStatus=1 THEN 'Declined' WHEN ra.RefToStatus=2 THEN 'Scheduled' WHEN ra.RefToStatus=3 THEN 'Consulted' WHEN ra.RefToStatus=4 THEN 'InTreatment' ELSE 'Complete' END ) AS ReferralStatus, CONCAT(r.LName,', ',r.FName) AS 'ReferralName', (CASE WHEN r.Specialty=0 THEN 'General' WHEN r.Specialty=1 THEN 'Hygienist' WHEN r.Specialty=2 THEN 'Endodontics' WHEN r.Specialty=3 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN r.Specialty=4 THEN 'Perio' WHEN r.Specialty=5 THEN 'Prosth' WHEN r.Specialty=6 THEN 'Ortho' WHEN r.Specialty=7 THEN 'Denturist' WHEN r.Specialty=8 THEN 'Surgery' WHEN r.Specialty=9 THEN 'Assistant' WHEN r.Specialty=10 THEN 'Labtech' WHEN r.Specialty=11 THEN 'Pathology' WHEN r.Specialty=12 THEN 'PublicHealth' WHEN r.Specialty=13 THEN 'Radiology' ELSE 'Unknown' END ) AS 'ReferralSpecialty', ra.Note AS 'PatientNote', ra.DateProcComplete, pr.Abbr AS 'ProcProvider', refprov.Abbr AS 'RefProvider', pl.ProcDate, COALESCE(( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.defnum = pl.Priority ), "") AS 'Priority', (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=5 THEN 'Referred Out' ELSE pl.ProcStatus END) AS 'ProcStatus', pc.ProcCode FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ra.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 5 INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN provider refprov ON refprov.ProvNum = ra.ProvNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND ra.RefType = 0 AND (ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate) ORDER BY r.LName, r.FName, ra.RefDate;

request: List of all supplies
query: SELECT supply.SupplyNum, supplier.Name AS 'Supplier', supply.CatalogNumber, supply.Descript, cat.ItemName AS 'Category', supply.ItemOrder, supply.LevelDesired, supply.IsHidden, supply.Price AS '$Price_' FROM supply INNER JOIN supplier ON supplier.SupplierNum=supply.SupplierNum INNER JOIN definition cat ON cat.DefNum=supply.Category ORDER BY supplier.Name, supply.Descript

request: Statements with date in date range for specified statement modes
query: SET @FromDate='2024-09-01', @ToDate='2024-09-30'; SET @Mode='Mail'; SELECT statement.PatNum AS 'Pat , CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name' , statement.DateSent AS 'Date' , (CASE WHEN statement.Mode_=0 THEN 'Mail' WHEN statement.Mode_=1 THEN 'InPerson' WHEN statement.Mode_=2 THEN 'Email' ELSE 'Electronic' END) AS 'Mode' , (CASE WHEN statement.IsInvoice THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) AS 'Invoice' , (CASE WHEN statement.IsSent=0 THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END) AS 'Sent' FROM statement INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=statement.PatNum WHERE statement.DateSent BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@Mode) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ELT(statement.Mode_ + 1, 'Mail', 'InPerson', 'Email', 'Electronic'), @Mode)) ORDER BY statement.DateSent, p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, statement.StatementNum

request: Patients seen at specific clinics in date range that did not have insurance at time of service
query: SET @ClinicNames='Relaxation Dental'; SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-10-01'; SELECT pl.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum AND c.request REGEXP @ClinicNames INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT cp.PatNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,6,5,7,8) ) GROUP BY pl.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Patients with completed procedures in date range showing summary fee, writeoffs, writeoff estimates, ins payments, ins estimates, and patient portion for the patient's procedures
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SET @Providers=''; SELECT main.PatNum AS 'Pat ,CONCAT(main.LName,', ',main.FName) AS 'Patient Name' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(main.Fee),0)-COALESCE(SUM(main.CapWriteOff),0), 2) AS '$Fees' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(main.WriteOffEst),0), 2) AS '$WriteOffEst' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(main.WriteOff),0), 2) AS '$WriteOffs' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(main.InsPayEst),0), 2) AS '$InsPayEsts' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(main.InsPayAmt),0), 2) AS '$InsPayAmt' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(main.Fee),0)-COALESCE(SUM(main.CapWriteOff),0)-COALESCE(SUM(main.WriteOffEst),0)-COALESCE(SUM(main.WriteOff),0)-COALESCE(SUM(main.InsPayEst),0)-COALESCE(SUM(main.InsPayAmt),0), 2) AS '$Patient Portion' FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,p.LName ,p.FName ,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'Fee' ,( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 ) AS 'CapWriteoff' ,( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride=-1 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEst=-1 THEN 0 ELSE (cp.WriteOffEst) END) ELSE (cp.WriteOffEstOverride) END) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,6) ) AS 'WriteOffEst' ,( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ) AS 'WriteOff' ,( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status=0 THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE (CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride=-1 THEN(cp.InsEstTotal) ELSE (cp.InsEstTotalOverride) END) END) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,6) ) AS 'InsPayEst' ,( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ) AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers)) WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) main GROUP BY main.PatNum ORDER BY main.LName, main.FName, main.PatNum

request: Outstanding insurance claims.  Like internal report
query: SET @DaysOldMin='30', @DaysOldMax=''; SET @ProviderAbbr='%%'; SET @IncludePreauth='Y'; SELECT carrier.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', carrier.Phone, (CASE claim.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE claim.ClaimType END) AS 'Type', CONCAT(patient.PatNum,'-',patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS 'Patient Name', claim.DateService AS 'Date of Service', claim.DateSent AS 'Date Sent', claim.ClaimFee AS '$Amount_' FROM claim INNER JOIN insplan ON claim.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patient ON claim.PatNum = patient.PatNum INNER JOIN provider provtreat ON provtreat.ProvNum=claim.ProvTreat AND provtreat.Abbr LIKE @ProviderAbbr WHERE claim.ClaimStatus='S' AND (CASE WHEN @DaysOldMin='' THEN TRUE ELSE (claim.DateSent <= CURDATE()-INTERVAL @DaysOldMin DAY) END) AND (CASE WHEN @DaysOldMax='' THEN TRUE ELSE (claim.DateSent >= CURDATE()-INTERVAL @DaysOldMax DAY) END) AND (CASE WHEN @IncludePreauth='YES' THEN TRUE ELSE (claim.ClaimType!='Preauth') END) ORDER BY carrier.Phone,insplan.PlanNum;

request: Payment Plan report for patients with specific billing type, with Principal, Paid, DueNow, Due in 10 days, Balance, and DaysPastDue with totals
query: SET @BillingType = '%%'; SET @ClosedPayPlan = 'Y'; SELECT B.Guarantor, B.BillingType, B.Ins, B.Principal, B.Paid, B.DueNow AS 'Due Now', B.DueTen AS 'Due in 10 Days', B.Bal, B.DaysPastDue FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder', CONCAT(A.LName,', ',(CASE WHEN A.Preferred!='' THEN CONCAT('\'',A.Preferred,'\' ') ELSE '' END),A.FName,' ',A.MiddleI) AS 'Guarantor', A.BillingType, (CASE WHEN A.PlanNum=0 THEN '' ELSE 'X' END) AS 'Ins', FORMAT(A.Principal,2) AS 'Principal', FORMAT(A.Paid,2) AS 'Paid', FORMAT(A.AccumDue-A.paid,2) AS 'DueNow', FORMAT(A.DueTen-A.Paid,2) AS 'DueTen', FORMAT(A.Principal-A.Paid,2) AS 'Bal', A.DaysPastDue FROM( SELECT FName, LName, MiddleI, PlanNum, Preferred, d.ItemName AS 'BillingType', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(Principal+Interest) FROM payplancharge WHERE payplancharge.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum AND payplancharge.ChargeType = 0 AND payplancharge.ChargeDate <= CURDATE() ),0) AS 'AccumDue', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(Principal+Interest) FROM payplancharge WHERE payplancharge.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum AND payplancharge.ChargeType = 0 AND ChargeDate <= CURDATE() + INTERVAL (SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName='PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays') DAY ),0) AS 'DueTen', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum ),0) AS 'Paid', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(Principal) FROM payplancharge WHERE payplancharge.PayPlanNum=payplan.PayPlanNum AND payplancharge.ChargeType = 0 ),0) AS 'Principal', COALESCE(dayspastdue.DaysPastDue,0) AS 'DaysPastDue' FROM payplan LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.PayPlanNum, TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(MIN(A.ChargeDate)) AS 'DaysPastDue' FROM ( SELECT ppc.PayPlanNum, ppc.ChargeDate, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(pastppc.Principal + pastppc.Interest),2),2) AS 'DueAmt', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum ),0) AS 'Paid' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplancharge pastppc ON pastppc.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum AND pastppc.ChargeType = 0 AND pastppc.ChargeDate <= ppc.ChargeDate WHERE ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND ppc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE() GROUP BY ppc.PayPlanChargeNum ) A WHERE A.DueAmt > A.Paid GROUP BY A.PayPlanNum ) dayspastdue ON dayspastdue.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = payplan.Guarantor INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum = patient.BillingType AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType WHERE (CASE WHEN @ClosedPayPlan = 'Y' THEN TRUE ELSE (payplan.IsClosed = FALSE) END) GROUP BY payplan.PayPlanNum ) A UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, 'Totals:' AS Guarantor, '' AS BillingType, '' AS Ins, FORMAT(SUM(A.Principal),2) AS Principal, FORMAT(SUM(A.Paid),2) AS Paid, FORMAT(SUM(A.AccumDue)-SUM(A.Paid),2) AS DueNow, FORMAT(SUM(A.DueTen)-SUM(A.Paid),2) AS DueTen, FORMAT(SUM(A.Principal)-SUM(A.Paid),2) AS Bal, '' AS 'DaysPastDue' FROM( SELECT FName, LName, MiddleI, PlanNum, Preferred, d.ItemName AS 'BillingType', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(Principal+Interest) FROM payplancharge WHERE payplancharge.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum AND payplancharge.ChargeType = 0 AND payplancharge.ChargeDate <= CURDATE() ),0) AS 'AccumDue', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(Principal+Interest) FROM payplancharge WHERE payplancharge.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum AND payplancharge.ChargeType = 0 AND ChargeDate <= CURDATE() + INTERVAL (SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName='PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays') DAY ),0) AS 'DueTen', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum ),0) AS 'Paid', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(Principal) FROM payplancharge WHERE payplancharge.PayPlanNum=payplan.PayPlanNum AND payplancharge.ChargeType = 0 ),0) AS 'Principal', COALESCE(dayspastdue.DaysPastDue,0) AS 'DaysPastDue' FROM payplan LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.PayPlanNum, TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(MIN(A.ChargeDate)) AS 'DaysPastDue' FROM ( SELECT ppc.PayPlanNum, ppc.ChargeDate, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(pastppc.Principal + pastppc.Interest),2),2) AS 'DueAmt', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum ),0) AS 'Paid' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplancharge pastppc ON pastppc.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum AND pastppc.ChargeType = 0 AND pastppc.ChargeDate <= ppc.ChargeDate WHERE ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND ppc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE() GROUP BY ppc.PayPlanChargeNum ) A WHERE A.DueAmt > A.Paid GROUP BY A.PayPlanNum ) dayspastdue ON dayspastdue.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = payplan.Guarantor INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum = patient.BillingType AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType WHERE (CASE WHEN @ClosedPayPlan = 'Y' THEN TRUE ELSE (payplan.IsClosed = FALSE) END) GROUP BY payplan.PayPlanNum ) A ) B ORDER BY ItemOrder,Guarantor

request: Production and income report showing daily, monthly and fiscal year to date totals
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @FiscalYearStart='2014-01-01'; SELECT 'Daily:' AS 'Range', SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Production_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Adjustment_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Writeoff_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj','Sched') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $NetProd_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $PatIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='InsPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $InsIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $TotalIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProcDate AS TransDate,pl.ProvNum,SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate=@AsOf GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.AdjDate AS TransDate,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.DatePay AS TransDate,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP=@AsOf AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP=@AsOf AND cp.Status IN(1,4) ) Trans UNION ALL SELECT 'Monthly:' AS 'Range', SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Production_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Adjustment_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Writeoff_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj','Sched') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $NetProd_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $PatIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='InsPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $InsIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $TotalIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProcDate AS TransDate,pl.ProvNum,SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND @AsOf GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.AdjDate AS TransDate,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.DatePay AS TransDate,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND @AsOf AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND @AsOf AND cp.Status IN(1,4) ) Trans UNION ALL SELECT 'FiscalYTD:' AS 'Range', SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Production_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Adjustment_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Writeoff_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj','Sched') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $NetProd_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $PatIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='InsPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $InsIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $TotalIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProcDate AS TransDate,pl.ProvNum,SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FiscalYearStart AND @AsOf GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.AdjDate AS TransDate,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FiscalYearStart AND @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.DatePay AS TransDate,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FiscalYearStart AND @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FiscalYearStart AND @AsOf AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FiscalYearStart AND @AsOf AND cp.Status IN(1,4) ) Trans

request: Number of appointments completed, scheduled or ASAP created in date range that contain a specific procedure code
query: SET @FromDate='2014-12-11', @ToDate='2015-01-13'; SET @ProcCode='D0120'; SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'Appt Date Range', @ProcCode AS 'Procedure Code', COUNT(DISTINCT ap.AptNum) AS ' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=ap.AptNum AND sl.PermType=25 AND DATE(sl.LogDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,2,4)

request: Account aged balances summed by primary provider of guarantor with totals.  Only counts positive balances
query: (SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Primary Provider', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(Bal_0_30),2),2) AS 'Bal 0-30', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(Bal_31_60),2),2) AS 'Bal 31-60', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(Bal_61_90),2),2) AS 'Bal 61-90', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(BalOver90),2),2) AS 'Bal Over90', FORMAT(ROUND((SUM(BalTotal)-SUM(Bal_0_30)-SUM(Bal_31_60)-SUM(Bal_61_90)-SUM(BalOver90)),2),2) AS 'Other Bal', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(BalTotal),2),2) AS 'Bal Total', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(InsEst),2),2) AS 'InsEst', FORMAT(ROUND((SUM(BalTotal) -SUM(InsEst)),2),2) AS 'PatPortion' FROM patient g INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=g.PriProv WHERE g.PatNum=g.Guarantor AND g.BalTotal > 0 GROUP BY PriProv ORDER BY prov.Abbr) UNION ALL (SELECT ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL (SELECT 'Total:' AS 'Primary Provider', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(Bal_0_30),2),2) AS 'Bal 0-30', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(Bal_31_60),2),2) AS 'Bal 31-60', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(Bal_61_90),2),2) AS 'Bal 61-90', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(BalOver90),2),2) AS 'Bal Over90', FORMAT(ROUND((SUM(BalTotal)-SUM(Bal_0_30)-SUM(Bal_31_60)-SUM(Bal_61_90)-SUM(BalOver90)),2),2) AS 'Other Bal', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(BalTotal),2),2) AS 'Bal Total', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(InsEst),2),2) AS 'InsEst', FORMAT(ROUND((SUM(BalTotal) -SUM(InsEst)),2),2) AS 'PatPortion' FROM patient g INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=g.PriProv WHERE g.PatNum=g.Guarantor AND g.BalTotal > 0) UNION ALL (SELECT '' AS 'Primary Provider', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND((SUM(Bal_0_30)/SUM(BalTotal)*100),2),2),'%') AS 'Bal 0-30', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND((SUM(Bal_31_60)/SUM(BalTotal)*100),2),2),'%') AS 'Bal 31-60', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND((SUM(Bal_61_90)/SUM(BalTotal)*100),2),2),'%') AS 'Bal 61-90', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND((SUM(BalOver90)/SUM(BalTotal)*100),2),2),'%') AS 'Bal Over90', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(((SUM(BalTotal)-SUM(Bal_0_30)-SUM(Bal_31_60)-SUM(Bal_61_90)-SUM(BalOver90))/SUM(BalTotal)*100),2),2),'%') AS 'Other Bal', '100%' AS 'Bal Total', '' AS 'InsEst', '' AS 'PatPortion' FROM patient g INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=g.PriProv WHERE g.PatNum=g.Guarantor AND g.BalTotal > 0)

request: Number of patients with claim sent or received in date range for specific carrier
query: SET @FromDate = '2023-01-01', @ToDate = '2023-01-31'; SET @CarrierName = 'Medicaid'; SELECT car.CarrierName ,COUNT(DISTINCT c.PatNum) AS ' FROM claim c INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = c.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName WHERE (c.DateSent BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) OR c.DateReceived BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate)) AND c.ClaimStatus IN ('S','R') GROUP BY car.CarrierNum

request: List of patients with claim sent or received in date range for specific carrier
