query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-12-31'; SET @CarrierName='Medicaid'; SELECT car.CarrierName, p.ChartNumber, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' FROM claim c INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=c.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=c.PatNum WHERE c.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND c.ClaimStatus IN ('S','R') GROUP BY c.PatNum,p.ChartNumber

request: Count of patients with completed procedures in date range by clinic.  A patient may count twice if seen at two different clinics, so % may not add up to 100
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-12-31'; SELECT COALESCE(cl.request,'NO CLINIC') AS 'Clinic', COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS 'Pats Seen', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum)/(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PatNum) FROM procedurelog WHERE ProcStatus=2 AND ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate)*100),2),2),'%') AS 'Percentage of Total Seen' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cl.ClinicNum UNION ALL SELECT ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Total:' AS 'Clinic', COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS 'Pats Seen', '100.00%' AS 'Percentage of Total Seen' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate

request: Wiki page creators and most recent editors.  Searchable by username and page title
query: SET @PageCreatedByUserName='%%'; SET @PageLastEditedByUserName='%%'; SET @PageTitle='%%'; SELECT COALESCE((CASE WHEN ISNULL(createdatetime.CreateDateTime) THEN lasteditor.UserName ELSE creator.UserName END),'NO CREATOR') AS 'Creator', COALESCE(createdatetime.CreateDateTime, wikipage.DateTimeSaved) AS 'Date page created', wikipage.PageTitle AS 'Title of wiki page', (CASE WHEN ISNULL(createdatetime.CreateDateTime) THEN '' ELSE wikipage.DateTimeSaved END) AS 'Date most recent edit', (CASE WHEN ISNULL(createdatetime.CreateDateTime) THEN '' ELSE lasteditor.UserName END) AS 'User most recent edit' FROM wikipage INNER JOIN userod lasteditor ON lasteditor.UserNum=wikipage.UserNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT wikipagehist.PageTitle, MIN(wikipagehist.DateTimeSaved) AS 'CreateDateTime' FROM wikipagehist GROUP BY wikipagehist.PageTitle ) createdatetime ON createdatetime.PageTitle=wikipage.PageTitle LEFT JOIN wikipagehist originalpage ON originalpage.PageTitle=wikipage.PageTitle AND originalpage.DateTimeSaved=createdatetime.CreateDateTime AND originalpage.IsDeleted=0 LEFT JOIN userod creator ON creator.UserNum=originalpage.UserNum WHERE wikipage.PageTitle LIKE @PageTitle HAVING `Creator` LIKE @PageCreatedByUserName AND `User most recent edit` LIKE @PageLastEditedByUserName ORDER BY `Creator`, wikipage.PageTitle

request: Payment plans report.  Only shows not completed payment plans
query: SELECT A.Guarantor, A.Ins, A.Principal AS '$Principal_', A.AmtPaid AS '$AmtPaid_', A.CurCharges AS '$CurChargesAmt_',A.Charges10Days AS 'ChargesAmt10Days', A.CurCharges-A.AmtPaid AS '$DueNow_', A.Charges10Days-A.AmtPaid AS '$Due in 10 Days_' FROM( SELECT CONCAT(LName,', ',FName) AS 'Guarantor',LName,FName, (CASE WHEN PlanNum=0 THEN '' ELSE 'X' END) AS 'Ins', COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Principal) FROM payplancharge WHERE payplancharge.PayPlanNum=payplan.PayPlanNum AND payplancharge.ChargeType=0),0) 'Principal', (CASE WHEN PlanNum=0 THEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum=payplan.PayPlanNum AND paysplit.PayPlanNum!=0),0) ELSE COALESCE((SELECT SUM(InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.PayPlanNum=payplan.PayPlanNum AND claimproc.Status IN(1,4,5) AND claimproc.PayPlanNum!=0),0) END) AS 'AmtPaid', COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Principal+Interest) FROM payplancharge WHERE payplancharge.PayPlanNum=payplan.PayPlanNum AND payplancharge.ChargeType=0 AND ChargeDate <= CURDATE()),0) 'CurCharges', COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Principal+Interest) FROM payplancharge WHERE payplancharge.PayPlanNum=payplan.PayPlanNum AND payplancharge.ChargeType=0 AND ChargeDate <= ADDDATE(CURDATE(),10)),0) 'Charges10Days' FROM payplan LEFT JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=payplan.Guarantor GROUP BY payplan.PayPlanNum HAVING 'Amt Paid' < 'Principal' )A ORDER BY A.LName,A.FName

request: List of all patients that had account activity on the date set
query: SET @Date='2014-12-12'; SELECT CONCAT('Day Sheet For: ',DATE_FORMAT(@Date,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'ID - Name', '' AS Dr, '' AS request, '' AS TxArea, NULL AS Charge, NULL AS Adjust, NULL AS WriteoffEst, NULL AS NetCharges, NULL AS Bal, NULL AS PriIns, NULL AS SecIns UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'ID - Name', '' AS Dr, '' AS request, '' AS TxArea, NULL AS Charge, NULL AS Adjust, NULL AS WriteoffEst, NULL AS NetCharges, NULL AS Bal, NULL AS PriIns, NULL AS SecIns UNION ALL SELECT LEFT((CASE WHEN AllTrans.ItemOrder=0 THEN CONCAT(AllTrans.PatNum,' - ',AllTrans.LName,', ',AllTrans.FName) ELSE '' END),30) AS 'ID - Name', pv.Abbr AS Dr, LEFT(AllTrans.request,35) AS request, AllTrans.TxArea, FORMAT(AllTrans.Charge,2) AS Charge, FORMAT(AllTrans.Adjust,2) AS Adjust, FORMAT(-AllTrans.Writeoff,2) AS WriteoffEst, (CASE WHEN AllTrans.ItemOrder=1 THEN FORMAT(COALESCE(AllTrans.Charge,0)+COALESCE(AllTrans.Adjust,0)+COALESCE(AllTrans.Writeoff,0),2) ELSE NULL END) AS NetCharges, FORMAT(AllTrans.Bal,2) AS Bal, (CASE WHEN AllTrans.ItemOrder IN (0,1,2) THEN car1.CarrierName ELSE '' END) AS PriIns, (CASE WHEN AllTrans.ItemOrder IN (0,1,2) THEN car2.CarrierName ELSE '' END) AS SecIns FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, p.PatNum, p.LName, p.FName, A.ProvNum, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Fee' THEN CONCAT(pc.ProcCode,' - ',pc.Descript) WHEN A.TranType IN('Pay','Adj') THEN CONCAT(A.TranType,' - ',d.ItemName) WHEN A.TranType='Writeoff' THEN CONCAT(A.TranType,' - ',c.CarrierName) ELSE 'Payment Plan' END) AS request, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND (pc.TreatArea IN(4,5,6)) THEN A.Surf WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND pc.TreatArea=1 THEN CONCAT(A.ToothNum, ", ", A.Surf) WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND pc.TreatArea=2 THEN A.ToothNum WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND pc.TreatArea=7 THEN A.ToothRange WHEN A.TranType='Fee' AND pc.TreatArea NOT IN(1,2,4,5,6,7) THEN 'Mouth' ELSE '' END) AS TxArea, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Fee' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE NULL END) AS Charge, (CASE WHEN A.TranType='Adj' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE NULL END) AS Adjust, NULL AS Writeoff, NULL AS Bal FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount,pl.ProvNum ProvNum,pl.CodeNum CODE,pl.Surf Surf,pl.ToothNum ToothNum,pl.ToothRange ToothRange FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate=@Date UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum,a.AdjType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt<>0 AND a.AdjDate=@Date ) A INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=A.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=A.Code LEFT JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=A.Code LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=A.Code WHERE A.TranDate=@Date UNION ALL (SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, p.PatNum, p.LName, p.FName, A.ProvNum, CONCAT(A.TranType,' - ',c.CarrierName) AS request, '' AS TxArea, NULL AS Charge, NULL AS Adjust, SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Writeoff' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE NULL END) AS Writeoff, NULL AS Bal FROM ( SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.ProcDate TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4) AND cp.Writeoff<>0 AND cp.ProcDate=@Date UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.ProcDate TranDate,-cp.WriteoffEst TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (6) AND cp.WriteoffEst<>0 AND cp.ProcDate=@Date AND cp.NoBillIns=0 ) A INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=A.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=A.Code GROUP BY p.PatNum,A.TranType) UNION ALL (SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder, C.PatNum, p.LName, p.FName, '' AS Dr, 'Previous Balance' AS request, '' AS TxArea, NULL AS Charge, NULL AS Adjust, NULL AS Writeoff, (CASE WHEN ABS(C.PrevBal)>0.01 THEN C.PrevBal ELSE 0 END) AS Bal FROM ( SELECT B.PatNum,SUM(CASE WHEN (B.TranDate<@Date) THEN B.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS PrevBal,MAX(B.TranDate) AS DateLast FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount,pl.ProvNum ProvNum,pl.CodeNum CODE,pl.Surf Surf,pl.ToothNum ToothNum,pl.ToothRange ToothRange FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.ProcDate TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount,ps.ProvNum ProvNum,p.PayType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 AND ps.SplitAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.InsPayAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum,a.AdjType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.Writeoff<>0 ) B WHERE B.TranDate<=@Date GROUP BY B.PatNum HAVING DateLast=@Date ) C INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=C.PatNum) UNION ALL (SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, C.PatNum, p.LName, p.FName, '' AS Dr, 'Ending Balance' AS request, '' AS TxArea, NULL AS Charge, NULL AS Adjust, NULL AS Writeoff, (CASE WHEN ABS(C.CurBal)>0.01 THEN C.CurBal ELSE 0 END) AS Bal FROM ( SELECT B.PatNum,SUM(CASE WHEN (B.TranDate<=@Date) THEN B.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS CurBal,MAX(B.TranDate) AS DateLast FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount,pl.ProvNum ProvNum,pl.CodeNum CODE,pl.Surf Surf,pl.ToothNum ToothNum,pl.ToothRange ToothRange FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.ProcDate TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount,ps.ProvNum ProvNum,p.PayType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 AND ps.SplitAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.InsPayAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum,a.AdjType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.Writeoff<>0 ) B WHERE B.TranDate<=@Date GROUP BY B.PatNum HAVING DateLast=@Date ) C INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=C.PatNum) UNION ALL (SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, C.PatNum, p.LName, p.FName, '' AS Dr, '' AS request, '' AS TxArea, NULL AS Charge, NULL AS Adjust, NULL AS Writeoff, NULL AS Bal FROM ( SELECT B.PatNum,MAX(B.TranDate) AS DateLast FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount,pl.ProvNum ProvNum,pl.CodeNum CODE,pl.Surf Surf,pl.ToothNum ToothNum,pl.ToothRange ToothRange FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.ProcDate TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount,ps.ProvNum ProvNum,p.PayType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 AND ps.SplitAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount,cp.ProvNum ProvNum,ip.CarrierNum CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.InsPayAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount,a.ProvNum ProvNum,a.AdjType CODE,NULL,NULL,NULL FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt<>0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.Writeoff<>0 ) B WHERE B.TranDate<=@Date GROUP BY B.PatNum HAVING DateLast=@Date ) C INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=C.PatNum) ORDER BY LName,FName,ItemOrder,request ) AllTrans LEFT JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=AllTrans.ProvNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=AllTrans.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp1 ON pp1.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp1.ORDINAL=1 LEFT JOIN inssub iss1 ON pp1.InsSubNum=iss1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum=iss1.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car1 ON car1.CarrierNum=ip1.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp2 ON pp2.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp2.ORDINAL=2 LEFT JOIN inssub iss2 ON pp2.InsSubNum=iss2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip2 ON ip2.PlanNum=iss2.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car2 ON car2.CarrierNum=ip2.CarrierNum END) AS Charge, SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Adj' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Adjust, -SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Writeoff' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Writeoff FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount,pl.ProvNum ProvNum,pl.CodeNum CODE,pl.Surf Surf,pl.ToothNum ToothNum,pl.ToothRange ToothRange FROM cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum,cp.ProcDate TranDate,-cp.WriteoffEst pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (6) AND cp.NoBillIns=0 ) A WHERE END) AS Charge, SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Adj' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Adjust, -SUM(CASE WHEN A.TranType='Writeoff' THEN A.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Writeoff FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS request: Appointments in date range with user that created the appointment
query: SET @FromDate='2015-03-12', @ToDate='2015-03-12'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ap.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y %l:%i %p') AS 'ApptDateTime', ap.AptStatus, ap.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum LEFT JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=ap.AptNum AND sl.PermType=25 LEFT JOIN userod ON userod.UserNum=sl.UserNum WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,4,5,2) ORDER BY ap.AptDateTime, p.LName, p.FName

request: Payment amounts made in date range summed by the payor and who the payment was split to
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-12-31'; SELECT CONCAT(payor.LName,', ',payor.FName) AS 'Payor', CONCAT(payee.LName,', ',payee.FName) AS 'Payed For', SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) AS '$PaymentAmt_' FROM payment INNER JOIN paysplit ON paysplit.PayNum=payment.PayNum INNER JOIN patient payor ON payor.PatNum=payment.PatNum INNER JOIN patient payee ON payee.PatNum=paysplit.PatNum WHERE payment.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND paysplit.SplitAmt != 0 GROUP BY payor.PatNum, payee.PatNum ORDER BY payor.LName, payor.FName, payee.LName, payee.FName

request: Total insurance income with check date in date range broken up by carrier and InsPaymentType
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-12-31'; SELECT CarrierName, SUM((CASE WHEN paytype.ItemName='Check' THEN claimpayment.CheckAmt ELSE 0 END)) AS '$CheckAmt_', SUM((CASE WHEN paytype.ItemName='EFT' THEN claimpayment.CheckAmt ELSE 0 END)) AS '$EFTAmt_', SUM((CASE WHEN (paytype.ItemName!='Check' AND paytype.ItemName!='EFT') THEN claimpayment.CheckAmt ELSE 0 END)) AS '$OtherAmt_', SUM(claimpayment.CheckAmt) AS $TotalIncome FROM claimpayment INNER JOIN definition paytype ON claimpayment.PayType=paytype.DefNum AND paytype.Category=32 WHERE CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY CarrierName ORDER BY CarrierName;

request: Patients with a specified procedure code completed in date range, with no future scheduled appointment with a specified procedure code
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01' , @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ProcCodes='D0120,D0140'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' , pc.ProcCode , DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ProcDate' , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(MIN(futureap.AptDate),'%m/%d/%Y'),'NONE') AS 'FutureSchedAppt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDate' , ap.PatNum FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = ap.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes) WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND ap.AptDateTime >= CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY ap.PatNum ) futureap ON futureap.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND ISNULL(futureap.PatNum) GROUP BY pl.PatNum, pl.ProcNum ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName, pl.ProcDate

request: Appointment list report showing appointment notes.  May need to be exported to excel to see full note.
query: SET @FromDate = '2021-10-01', @ToDate = '2021-10-11'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(appointment.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', CONCAT( patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', patient.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName', (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,patient.Birthdate,CURDATE()) < 120 THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,patient.Birthdate,CURDATE()) ELSE '' END) AS 'Age', DATE_FORMAT(appointment.AptDateTime,'%h:%i %p') AS 'Time', LENGTH(appointment.Pattern) * 5 AS 'Length', appointment.ProcDescript AS 'request', patient.HmPhone, patient.WkPhone, patient.WirelessPhone AS 'CellPhone', appointment.Note AS 'Appt Notes' FROM appointment INNER JOIN patient ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum WHERE appointment.AptStatus NOT IN (3,6) AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY appointment.AptDateTime,PatName

request: Outstanding insurance claims with claim fees separated into aged columns
query: SET @IncludePreauth='N'; SELECT b.Carrier AS 'Carrier', b.CarrierPhone AS 'CarrierPhone', b.ClaimType AS 'ClaimType', b.GroupNum AS 'GroupNum', b.DateSent AS 'DateSent', b.DateService AS 'DateService', b.Subscriber AS 'Subscriber', b.SubscriberID AS 'SubscriberID', b.Patient AS 'Patient', b.BirthDate AS 'Birth Date', b.InsEstimate AS 'InsEstimate', b.ClaimFee0to30 AS 'ClaimFee0to30', b.ClaimFee31to60 AS 'ClaimFee31to60', b.ClaimFee61to90 AS 'ClaimFee61to90', b.ClaimFeeOver90 AS 'ClaimFeeOver90', b.Total AS 'Total' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder', car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', car.Phone AS 'CarrierPhone', (CASE c.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE c.ClaimType END) AS 'ClaimType', ip.GroupNum AS 'GroupNum', DATE_FORMAT(c.DateSent,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'DateSent', DATE_FORMAT(c.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'DateService', CONCAT(sub.LName,', ',sub.FName) AS 'Subscriber', ib.SubscriberID AS 'SubscriberID', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', (CASE WHEN p.BirthDate = '0001-01-01' THEN '' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(p.Birthdate,'%m/%d/%Y') END) AS 'BirthDate', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayEst),0),2),2) AS 'InsEstimate', FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN ((c.DateService <= CURDATE()) AND c.DateService >= (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS 'ClaimFee0to30', FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN ((c.DateService < (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AND c.DateService >= (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS 'ClaimFee31to60', FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN ((c.DateService < (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 60 DAY)) AND c.DateService >= (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS 'ClaimFee61to90', FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN (c.DateService < (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS 'ClaimFeeOver90', FORMAT(ROUND(c.ClaimFee,2),2) AS 'Total' FROM claim c LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum AND cp.Status IN (0,5) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = c.PlanNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = c.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum = ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.ClaimStatus='S' AND (CASE WHEN @IncludePreauth='Y' THEN TRUE ELSE (c.ClaimType != 'PreAuth') END) GROUP BY c.ClaimNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS 'ItemOrder', '' AS 'Carrier', '' AS 'CarrierPhone', '' AS 'ClaimType', '' AS 'GroupNum', '' AS 'DateSent', '' AS 'DateService', '' AS 'Subscriber', '' AS 'SubscriberID', '' AS 'Patient', '' AS 'BirthDate', '' AS 'InsEstimate', '' AS 'ClaimFee0to30', '' AS 'ClaimFee31to60', '' AS 'ClaimFee61to90', '' AS 'ClaimFeeOver90', '' AS 'Total' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS 'ItemOrder', 'Totals:' AS 'Carrier', '' AS 'CarrierPhone', '' AS 'ClaimType', '' AS 'GroupNum', '' AS 'DateSent', '' AS 'DateService', '' AS 'Subscriber', '' AS 'SubscriberID', '' AS 'Patient', '' AS 'BirthDate', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(a.InsEstimate),0),2),2) AS 'InsEstimate', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(a.ClaimFee0to30),2),2) AS 'ClaimFee0to30', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(a.ClaimFee31to60),2),2) AS 'ClaimFee31to60', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(a.ClaimFee61to90),2),2) AS 'ClaimFee61to90', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(a.ClaimFeeOver90),2),2) AS 'ClaimFeeOver90', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(a.Total),2),2) AS 'Total' FROM ( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS 'InsEstimate', (CASE WHEN ((c.DateService <= CURDATE()) AND c.DateService >= (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFee0to30', (CASE WHEN ((c.DateService < (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AND c.DateService >= (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFee31to60', (CASE WHEN ((c.DateService < (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 60 DAY)) AND c.DateService >= (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFee61to90', (CASE WHEN (c.DateService < (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFeeOver90', c.ClaimFee AS 'Total' FROM claim c LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum AND cp.Status IN (0,5) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = c.PlanNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = c.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum = ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.ClaimStatus='S' AND (CASE WHEN @IncludePreauth='Y' THEN TRUE ELSE (c.ClaimType != 'PreAuth') END) GROUP BY c.ClaimNum ) a ) b ORDER BY b.ItemOrder, b.Carrier, b.DateService, b.Patient, FIELD(b.ClaimType,'Primary','Secondary','Other','Capitation','PreAuth')

request: Outstanding insurance claims with claim fees separated into aged columns
query: SET @IncludePreauth='Y'; SELECT B.Col1 AS '',B.Col2 AS '',B.Col3 AS '',B.Col4 AS '',B.Col5 AS '',B.Col6 AS '',B.Col7 AS '',B.Col8 AS '',B.Col9 AS '',B.Col10 AS '',B.Col11 AS '' FROM ( SELECT 'Carrier' AS Col1,'CarrierPhone' AS Col2,'ClaimType' AS Col3,'GroupNum' AS Col4,'DateSent' AS Col5, 'InsEst' AS Col6,'CF0to30' AS Col7,'CF31to60' AS Col8,'CF61to90' AS Col9,'CFOver90' AS Col10,'Total' 'SubItemOrder', '' AS 'OrderCarrier', '' AS 'OrderDateService', '' AS 'OrderPatient', '' AS 'OrderClaimType', '' AS 'OrderClaimNum' UNION ALL SELECT ' ' 0 AS 'ItemOrder', 2 AS 'SubItemOrder', '' AS FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayEst),0),2),2) AS Col6, FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN ((c.DateService<=CURDATE()) AND c.DateService>=(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Col7, FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN ((c.DateService<(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AND c.DateService>=(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Col8, FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN ((c.DateService<(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) AND c.DateService>=(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Col9, FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN (c.DateService<(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Col10, FORMAT(ROUND(c.ClaimFee,2),2) AS Col11 , 1 AS 'ItemOrder', 0 AS 'SubItemOrder', car.CarrierName AS 'OrderCarrier', DATE_FORMAT(c.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'OrderDateService', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'OrderPatient', (CASE c.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE c.ClaimType END) AS 'OrderClaimType', c.ClaimNum AS 'OrderClaimNum' FROM claim c LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=c.ClaimNum AND cp.Status IN (0,5) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=c.PlanNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=c.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum=ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.ClaimStatus='S' AND (CASE WHEN @IncludePreauth='Y' THEN TRUE ELSE (c.ClaimType!='PreAuth') END) GROUP BY c.ClaimNum UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(c.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y') AS Col1, CONCAT(sub.LName,', ',sub.FName) AS Col2, ib.SubscriberID AS Col3, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Col4, (CASE WHEN p.BirthDate='0001-01-01' THEN '' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(p.Birthdate,'%m/%d/%Y') END) AS Col5, NULL AS Col6,NULL AS Col7,NULL AS Col8,NULL AS Col9,NULL AS Col10,NULL AS Col11, 1 AS 'ItemOrder', 1 AS 'SubItemOrder', car.CarrierName AS 'OrderCarrier', DATE_FORMAT(c.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'OrderDateService', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'OrderPatient', (CASE c.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE c.ClaimType END) AS 'OrderClaimType', c.ClaimNum AS 'OrderClaimNum' FROM claim c LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=c.ClaimNum AND cp.Status IN (0,5) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=c.PlanNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=c.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum=ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.ClaimStatus='S' AND (CASE WHEN @IncludePreauth='Y' THEN TRUE ELSE (c.ClaimType!='PreAuth') END) GROUP BY c.ClaimNum UNION ALL SELECT '' AS Col1, '' AS Col2, '' AS Col3, '' AS Col4, '' AS Col5, '' AS Col6, '' AS Col7, '' AS Col8, '' AS Col9, '' AS Col10, '' AS Col11, 1 AS 'ItemOrder', 2 AS 'SubItemOrder', car.CarrierName AS 'OrderCarrier', DATE_FORMAT(c.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'OrderDateService', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'OrderPatient', (CASE c.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE c.ClaimType END) AS 'OrderClaimType', c.ClaimNum AS 'OrderClaimNum' FROM claim c LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=c.ClaimNum AND cp.Status IN (0,5) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=c.PlanNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=c.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum=ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.ClaimStatus='S' AND (CASE WHEN @IncludePreauth='Y' THEN TRUE ELSE (c.ClaimType!='PreAuth') END) GROUP BY c.ClaimNum UNION ALL SELECT ' ' 2 AS 'ItemOrder', 0 AS 'SubItemOrder', '' AS 'OrderCarrier', '' AS 'OrderDateService', '' AS 'OrderPatient', '' AS 'OrderClaimType', '' AS 'OrderClaimNum' UNION ALL SELECT 'Totals:' AS Col1, '' AS Col2, '' AS Col3, '' AS Col4, '' AS Col5, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(A.InsEstimate),0),2),2) AS Col6, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(A.ClaimFee0to30),2),2) AS Col7, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(A.ClaimFee31to60),2),2) AS Col8, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(A.ClaimFee61to90),2),2) AS Col9, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(A.ClaimFeeOver90),2),2) AS Col10, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(A.Total),2),2) AS Col11 , 2 AS 'ItemOrder', 1 AS 'SubItemOrder', '' AS 'OrderCarrier', '' AS 'OrderDateService', '' AS 'OrderPatient', '' AS 'OrderClaimType', '' AS 'OrderClaimNum' FROM ( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS 'InsEstimate', (CASE WHEN ((c.DateService<=CURDATE()) AND c.DateService>=(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFee0to30', (CASE WHEN ((c.DateService<(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AND c.DateService>=(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFee31to60', (CASE WHEN ((c.DateService<(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) AND c.DateService>=(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFee61to90', (CASE WHEN (c.DateService<(CURDATE()-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN c.ClaimFee ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFeeOver90', c.ClaimFee AS 'Total' FROM claim c LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=c.ClaimNum AND cp.Status IN (0,5) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=c.PlanNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=c.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum=ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.ClaimStatus='S' AND (CASE WHEN @IncludePreauth='Y' THEN TRUE ELSE (c.ClaimType!='PreAuth') END) GROUP BY c.ClaimNum ) A ) B ORDER BY B.ItemOrder, B.OrderCarrier,B.OrderClaimNum, B.OrderDateService, B.OrderPatient, FIELD(B.OrderClaimType,'Primary','Secondary','Other','Capitation','PreAuth'), B.SubItemOrder

request: Patients with first completed procedure in date range showing current primary ins carrier
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT table1.dateFirstProc AS 'Date' , patient.PatNum , ( SELECT CONCAT(referral.LName,IF(referral.FName='','',','),referral.FName) AS 'Name' FROM refattach INNER JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum=refattach.ReferralNum WHERE patient.PatNum=refattach.PatNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 AND refattach.ItemOrder=( SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.PatNum=refattach.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 ) ) AS 'Referral' , CAST(( SELECT SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee*(procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 ) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'HowMuch' , car1.CarrierName AS 'Primary Ins' FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , MIN(procedurelog.ProcDate) AS 'dateFirstProc' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum HAVING `dateFirstProc` BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) table1 INNER JOIN patient ON table1.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp1 ON pp1.PatNum=patient.PatNum AND pp1.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub iss1 ON pp1.InsSubNum=iss1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum=iss1.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car1 ON car1.CarrierNum=ip1.CarrierNum GROUP BY patient.LName,patient.FName,patient.PatNum,`Referral` ORDER BY table1.dateFirstProc, patient.LName, patient.FName, patient.PatNum

request: Patients who have treatment planned procedures showing total amount of proc fees and total amount of unscheduled treatment planned proc fees
query: SET @FromDate='2018-09-01' , @ToDate='2021-09-05'; SELECT pa.PatNum AS `Pat ,CONCAT(pa.LName,', ',pa.FName) AS 'Patient' ,pa.HmPhone ,pa.WirelessPhone ,pa.WkPhone ,ROUND(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)), 2) AS '$TotTreatPlanFees_' ,ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN ISNULL(ap.AptNum) THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) ELSE 0 END)),0), 2) AS '$TotUnschedFees_' FROM patient pa INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pa.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) WHERE pl.ProcStatus=1 AND pl.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pa.PatNum ORDER BY pa.LName,pa.FName;

request: Adjustments of the specified type with adjustment date in the specified date range associated with the specified providers
query: SET @FromDate = '2023-01-01', @ToDate = '2023-10-31'; SET @Providers = ''; SET @AdjTypes = ''; SET @MinAdjAmt = '1.00'; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Date,'') AS "Date" ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.PatientName WHEN 4 THEN "Grand Total" ELSE '' END) AS "Patient Name" ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Prov,'') AS "Provider" ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Clinic,'') AS "Clinic" ,IF(dup.Num IN (1,2),core.AdjType,'') AS "Adjustment Type" ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Note,'') AS "Note" ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(core.Amount,2) WHEN 3 THEN '' ELSE FORMAT(SUM(core.Amount),2) END) AS "Adj Amount" ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Carrier,'') AS "Primary Carrier" FROM ( SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' ,adj.AdjNum ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PatientName' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Prov' ,IFNULL(cli.request,"Unassigned") AS 'Clinic' ,def.ItemName AS 'AdjType' ,adj.AdjNote AS 'Note' ,adj.AdjAmt AS 'Amount' ,IFNULL(ins.CarName,"Uninsured") AS "Carrier" FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = adj.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON adj.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Providers)) INNER JOIN definition def ON adj.AdjType = def.DefNum AND IF(LENGTH(@AdjTypes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemName,@AdjTypes)) INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = adj.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic cli ON cli.ClinicNum = adj.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pp.PatNUm ,ca.CarrierName AS "CarName" FROM carrier ca INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 GROUP BY pp.PatNum ) ins ON ins.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND ABS(adj.AdjAmt) > @MinAdjAmt ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS "Num" UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,"+",core.AdjNum) WHEN dup.Num IN (2,3) THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,"+",core.AdjType) ELSE dup.Num END) ORDER BY IF(dup.Num = 4,2,1),core.AdjType

request: Unscheduled Appointments in a date range
query: SET @StartDate='2012-01-01',@EndDate='2016-04-30'; SELECT PatNum, AptDateTime FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus=3 AND AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY AptDateTime;

request: Treatment acceptance (scheduled or complete in an appointment).  Also shows total fee amounts.
query: SET @StartDate='2012-05-01' , @EndDate='2015-05-31'; SELECT 'TP and Scheduled (apt complete or still scheduled)' AS ProcCondition,SUM(pl.ProcFee) AS $TotalFees_ FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN appointment ap ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND DATE(pl.DateTP) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND AptStatus IN (1,2) UNION ALL SELECT 'Treatment Planned' AS ProcCondition, SUM(pl.ProcFee) AS $TotalFees_ FROM procedurelog pl WHERE DATE(pl.DateTP) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Percent (TP & Sched/TP)' AS ProcCondition, 100*(( SELECT SUM(pl2.ProcFee) FROM procedurelog pl2 INNER JOIN appointment ap2 ON pl2.AptNum=ap2.AptNum AND DATE(pl2.DateTP) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ap2.AptStatus IN (1,2) )/SUM(pl.ProcFee) ) AS $TotalFees_ FROM procedurelog pl WHERE DATE(pl.DateTP) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate;

request: List of Insurance payments that need finalization and Partial Insurance Checks Entered.
query: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'Partial Payments' AS PatNum, 'Check Date' AS 'Check Date','D.O.S.', 'Check Amt' AS 'Check Amt' UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'PatNum',claimpayment.CheckDate,'',claimpayment.CheckAmt FROM claimpayment WHERE claimpayment.IsPartial = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Unfinalized Claims - PatNum' AS PatID, 'ClaimPayDate' AS 'ChecKDate','D.O.S.', 'InsPayAmt' AS 'Check Amt' UNION ALL SELECT claimproc.PatNum AS PatID,claimproc.DateCP,claimproc.ProcDate AS 'D.O.S.',claimproc.FeeBilled FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = 0 AND claimproc.InsPayAmt != 0 AND claimproc.Status IN(1,4,5) ) partialpayments

request: New patients with first appointment in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2023-01-01', @ToDate='2023-01-31'; SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(p.FName, ' ', p.LName) AS 'Name', DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'Appointment', prd.Abbr AS 'Dentist', prh.Abbr AS 'Hygienist', a.Op FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) LEFT JOIN provider prd ON prd.ProvNum = a.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider prh ON prh.ProvNum = a.ProvHyg INNER JOIN ( SELECT a.PatNum, MIN(a.AptDateTime) AS 'FirstApptDate' FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) GROUP BY a.PatNum ) firstap ON firstap.PatNum = p.PatNum AND firstap.FirstApptDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND firstap.FirstApptDate = a.AptDateTime ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, a.AptNum

request: EHR query - Percentage of Patient Encounters by NPI
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01' , @ToDate='2015-12-31'; SET @ProvNPI='1234567890'; (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT A.Abbr ORDER BY A.Abbr SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'ProvAbbr', A.NationalProvID, A.CarrierName, A.GroupName, COUNT(DISTINCT A.PatNum) AS 'Patients', COUNT(DISTINCT A.ProcDate,A.PatNum,A.NationalProvID) AS Appointments, FORMAT((COUNT(DISTINCT A.ProcDate,A.PatNum,A.NationalProvID)/( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT B.ProcDate,B.PatNum,B.NationalProvID) FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum,prov.NationalProvID FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.NationalProvID=@ProvNPI WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY prov.NationalProvID,ca.CarrierName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum,ip.GroupName UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum,prov.NationalProvID FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.NationalProvID=@ProvNPI LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) GROUP BY prov.NationalProvID,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum ) B) )*100,2) AS '% of visits (by Provider)' FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum,prov.NationalProvID,prov.Abbr FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.NationalProvID=@ProvNPI WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY prov.NationalProvID,ca.CarrierName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum,ip.GroupName UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum,prov.NationalProvID,prov.Abbr FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.NationalProvID=@ProvNPI LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) GROUP BY prov.NationalProvID,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum ) A GROUP BY A.NationalProvID,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName ORDER BY A.NationalProvID,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName) UNION ALL (SELECT '' AS 'ProvAbbr', '' AS NationalProvID, 'Distinct Office Total', '', COUNT(DISTINCT B.PatNum) AS 'Patients', COUNT(DISTINCT B.ProcDate,B.PatNum,B.NationalProvID) AS 'Appointments', '' AS '% of visits (by Provider)' FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum,prov.NationalProvID FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.NationalProvID=@ProvNPI WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY prov.NationalProvID,ca.CarrierName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum,ip.GroupName UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum,prov.NationalProvID FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.NationalProvID=@ProvNPI LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) GROUP BY prov.NationalProvID,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum ) B);

request: EHR query - Percentage of Patient Encounters for all Providers
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01' , @ToDate='2015-12-31'; SELECT A.ProvNum, A.CarrierName, A.GroupName, COUNT(DISTINCT A.PatNum) AS 'Patients', COUNT(DISTINCT A.ProcDate,A.PatNum,A.ProvNum) AS Appointments, FORMAT((COUNT(DISTINCT A.ProcDate,A.PatNum,A.ProvNum)/( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT B.ProcDate,B.PatNum,B.ProvNum) FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProvNum,ca.CarrierName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) GROUP BY pl.ProvNum,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum ) B WHERE B.ProvNum=A.ProvNum) )*100,2) AS '% of visits (by Provider)' FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProvNum,ca.CarrierName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) GROUP BY pl.ProvNum,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcNum ) A GROUP BY A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName ORDER BY A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName;

request: EHR Query - Percentage of Patient Encounters - Recent Conversion
query: SET @FromDate='2011-01-01' , @ToDate='2011-03-31'; SELECT A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName,COUNT(DISTINCT A.PatNum) AS 'Patients', COUNT(DISTINCT A.ProcDate,A.PatNum,A.ProvNum) AS Appointments, FORMAT((COUNT(DISTINCT A.ProcDate,A.PatNum,A.ProvNum)/( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT B.ProcDate,B.PatNum,B.ProvNum) FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON pp.InsSubNum=ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ib.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) AND ISNULL(pp.PatNum) ) B WHERE B.ProvNum=A.ProvNum) )*100,1) AS '% of visits (by Provider)' FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON pp.InsSubNum=ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ib.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) AND ISNULL(pp.PatNum) ) A GROUP BY A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName ORDER BY A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName;

request: EHR Query - Split by Encounter - Claim Details by NPI
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01' , @ToDate='2015-03-31'; SET @ProvNPI='1234567890'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT B.ProvAbbr ORDER BY B.ProvAbbr SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'ProvAbbr', B.NationalProvID, B.CarrierName,B.GroupName,B.PatNum,DATE_FORMAT(B.BirthDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'BirthDate',B.SubscriberIDs,B.ProcDate, SUM(CASE WHEN ISNULL(pl.ProcFee) THEN 0 ELSE (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) END) AS $ProcFees_, SUM(B.InsPayAmt) AS $InsPayAmt_, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT B.ProcCodes ORDER BY B.ProcCodes SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'ProcCodes' FROM ( SELECT A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName,A.PatNum, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT A.SubscriberID) AS SubscriberIDs, A.ProcDate,A.ProcNum,SUM(A.InsPayAmt) AS InsPayAmt,A.NationalProvID,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT A.Abbr ORDER BY A.Abbr SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'ProvAbbr',A.Birthdate,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT A.ProcCode) AS ProcCodes FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum, ib.SubscriberID AS SubscriberID,pl.ProcNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS InsPayAmt,prov.NationalProvID,prov.Abbr,p.Birthdate,pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.NationalProvID=@ProvNPI WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate,cp.ProvNum, ib.SubscriberID AS SubscriberID,cp.ProcNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS InsPayAmt,prov.NationalProvID,prov.Abbr,p.Birthdate,'InsPaymentNotSplit' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum AND prov.NationalProvID=@ProvNPI WHERE cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.ProcNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum, 'N/A' AS SubscriberID,pl.ProcNum,0 ,prov.NationalProvID,prov.Abbr,p.Birthdate,pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.NationalProvID=@ProvNPI LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) ) A GROUP BY A.NationalProvID,A.CarrierName,A.PatNum,A.ProcDate,A.ProcNum,A.GroupName ) B LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=B.ProcNum GROUP BY B.NationalProvID,B.CarrierName,B.PatNum,B.ProcDate,B.GroupName ORDER BY B.NationalProvID,B.CarrierName,B.ProcDate;

request: EHR Query - Split by Encounter - Claim Details for all Providers
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01' , @ToDate='2015-12-31'; SELECT B.ProvNum,B.CarrierName,B.GroupName,B.PatNum,DATE_FORMAT(B.BirthDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'BirthDate',B.SubscriberIDs,B.ProcDate, SUM(CASE WHEN ISNULL(pl.ProcFee) THEN 0 ELSE (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) END) AS $ProcFees_, SUM(B.InsPayAmt) AS $InsPayAmt_, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT B.ProcCodes ORDER BY B.ProcCodes SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'ProcCodes' FROM ( SELECT A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName,A.PatNum, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT A.SubscriberID) AS SubscriberIDs, A.ProcDate,A.ProcNum,SUM(A.InsPayAmt) AS InsPayAmt,A.Birthdate,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT A.ProcCode) AS ProcCodes FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum, ib.SubscriberID AS SubscriberID,pl.ProcNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS InsPayAmt,p.Birthdate,pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate,cp.ProvNum, ib.SubscriberID AS SubscriberID,cp.ProcNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS InsPayAmt,p.Birthdate,'InsPaymentNotSplit' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum WHERE cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.ProcNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum, 'N/A' AS SubscriberID,pl.ProcNum,0 ,p.Birthdate,pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) ) A GROUP BY A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.PatNum,A.ProcDate,A.ProcNum,A.GroupName ) B LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=B.ProcNum GROUP BY B.ProvNum,B.CarrierName,B.PatNum,B.ProcDate,B.GroupName ORDER BY B.ProvNum,B.CarrierName,B.ProcDate;

request: EHR Query - Split by Encounter - Claim Details Recent Conversion
query: SET @FromDate='2013-01-05' , @ToDate='2013-01-07'; SELECT B.ProvNum,B.CarrierName,B.GroupName,B.PatNum,DATE_FORMAT(B.BirthDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'BirthDate',B.SubscriberIDs,B.ProcDate, SUM(CASE WHEN ISNULL(pl.ProcFee) THEN 0 ELSE (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) END) AS $ProcFees_, SUM(B.InsPayAmt) AS $InsPayAmt_, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT B.ProcCodes ORDER BY B.ProcCodes SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'ProcCodes' FROM ( SELECT A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.GroupName,A.PatNum, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT A.SubscriberID) AS SubscriberIDs, A.ProcDate,A.ProcNum,SUM(A.InsPayAmt) AS InsPayAmt,A.Birthdate,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT A.ProcCode) AS ProcCodes FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum, ib.SubscriberID AS SubscriberID,pl.ProcNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS InsPayAmt,p.Birthdate,pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate,cp.ProvNum, ib.SubscriberID AS SubscriberID,cp.ProcNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS InsPayAmt,p.Birthdate,'InsPaymentNotSplit' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=cl.InsSubNum WHERE cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.ProcNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT ca.CarrierName AS CarrierName,ip.GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum, ib.SubscriberID AS SubscriberID,pl.ProcNum,0 AS InsPayAmt,p.Birthdate,pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON pp.InsSubNum=ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ib.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) UNION ALL SELECT 'NoIns' AS CarrierName,'N/A' AS GroupName,pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum, 'N/A' AS SubscriberID,pl.ProcNum,0 ,p.Birthdate,pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'N%' INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) OR cp.ClaimNum=0) AND ISNULL(pp.PatNum) ) A GROUP BY A.ProvNum,A.CarrierName,A.PatNum,A.ProcDate,A.ProcNum,A.GroupName ) B LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=B.ProcNum GROUP BY B.ProvNum,B.CarrierName,B.PatNum,B.ProcDate,B.GroupName ORDER BY B.ProvNum,B.CarrierName,B.ProcDate;

request: EHR Attestation, Texas Medicaid. "Supporting Documentation for Patient Volume"
query: SET @FromDate='2013-01-01', @ToDate='2014-12-31'; SET @CarrierName='%Medicaid%'; SELECT 'Open Dental Software' AS 'Source of Patient Volume Report', p.MedicaidID AS 'Medicaid Client Number', cl.DateService AS 'Date of Service', (CASE WHEN cl.ClaimStatus='R' THEN (CASE WHEN cl.InsPayAmt=0 THEN 'Denied' ELSE 'Paid' END) WHEN cl.ClaimStatus='S' THEN 'Not Received' ELSE 'Not Sent' END) AS 'Claim Status', (CASE WHEN pt.NationalProvID='' THEN 'NPI not entered' ELSE pt.NationalProvID END) AS 'Performing Provider NPI', (CASE WHEN pb.NationalProvID='' THEN 'NPI not entered' ELSE pb.NationalProvID END) AS 'Billing NPI', (CASE WHEN pb.UsingTIN=1 THEN pb.SSN ELSE 'TIN not entered' END) AS 'Billing TIN' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pt ON pt.ProvNum=cl.ProvTreat INNER JOIN provider pb ON pb.ProvNum=cl.ProvBill INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON ip.CarrierNum=car.CarrierNum WHERE cl.ClaimType!='PreAuth' AND cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName ORDER BY cl.DateService, pt.NationalProvID

request:
List of patients with procedures scheduled on a specific date with all of their scheduled/unscheduled procedures listed.
Shows net production for date and net production for the month to date listed at the bottom. 
The date can be manually set by changing the value of @DaySheetDate to a date, eg 2015-06-12. Defaults to current date: CURDATE()
query: SET @DaySheetDate = CURDATE(); SET @RecallType='%%'; SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',IF(patient.Preferred='','',CONCAT('"',patient.Preferred,'" ')),patient.FName) AS Patient, patient.Birthdate, patient.HmPhone, patient.WirelessPhone, g.BalTotal, (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(r.DateDue), '%m/%d/%Y') FROM recall r INNER JOIN recalltype rt ON r.RecallTypeNum = rt.RecallTypeNum AND IF(@RecallType = '%%', rt.request IN('Prophy','Perio'), rt.request LIKE @RecallType) WHERE r.IsDisabled = 0 ) AS 'RecallDueDate', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT((CASE WHEN pl.AptNum != 0 THEN pc.ProcCode ELSE NULL END)),'') AS 'Scheduled Procs', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT((CASE WHEN pl.AptNum = 0 THEN pc.ProcCode ELSE NULL END)),'') AS 'Unscheduled Procs' FROM patient INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = patient.Guarantor INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON patient.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 AND pl.ProcDate = @DaySheetDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum GROUP BY patient.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'NetProd-Today:','NetProd-MTD:','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TransDate=@DaySheetDate THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)-(SUM(IFNULL((CASE WHEN TransDate = @DaySheetDate THEN trans.WriteOff ELSE 0 END),0))),2),2) AS 'Patient', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN trans.ProcStatus = 2 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)-(SUM(IFNULL(trans.Writeoff,0))),2),2) AS 'Birthdate', '' AS HmPhone, '' AS WirelessPhone, '' AS BalTotal, '' AS DateDue, '' AS 'Scheduled Procs', '' AS 'Unscheduled Procs' FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType, pl.ProcDate AS TransDate, pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff, pl.PatNum, pl.ProcStatus AS ProcStatus FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType, cp.ProcDate AS TransDate, cp.ProvNum, 0 AS TranAmount, (CASE WHEN cp.Status = 6 THEN cp.WriteOffEst ELSE cp.WriteOff END) AS Writeoff, cp.PatNum, 0 AS ProcStatus FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-%d') AND cp.Status IN(1,4,0,6) ) trans

request: Production totals for additional products sold by office, such as tooth brushes, in a date range with fees totaled at the bottom.
query: SET @ProcCodes = 'N1111|N1112|N1113'; SET @FromDate = '2010-01-01', @ToDate = '2015-06-17'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(procedurelog.ProcDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ProcedureDate', CONCAT(patient.lname, ', ', patient.FName) AS Patient, procedurecode.AbbrDesc AS 'ProcAbbr', provider.Abbr AS 'ProvAbbr', procedurelog.ProcFee FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes LEFT JOIN provider ON procedurelog.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = '2' UNION ALL SELECT ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'ProcedureDate', 'Total:' AS Patient, '' AS 'ProcAbbr', '' AS 'ProvAbbr', SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee) AS ProcFee FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes LEFT JOIN provider ON procedurelog.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = '2'

request:
Treatment plan for a patient with the total amount of the treatment planned procedures. 
Change the @PatNum to the patient number you would like to view.
query: SET @PatNum='541'; SELECT (CASE WHEN pl.Priority=0 THEN '' ELSE pl.Priority END) AS 'Priority', pl.ToothNum AS Tth, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode AS 'Code', pc.Descript AS request, FORMAT(ROUND(pl.ProcFee,2),2) AS 'Fee', FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL((CASE WHEN cp1.InsEstTotalOverride =-1 THEN cp1.InsEstTotal ELSE cp1.InsEstTotalOverride END),0),2),2) AS 'PrimaryInsEst', FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL((CASE WHEN cp2.InsEstTotalOverride =-1 THEN cp2.InsEstTotal ELSE cp2.InsEstTotalOverride END),0),2),2) AS 'SecondaryInsEst', FORMAT(ROUND(pl.Discount,2),2) AS 'Discount', FORMAT(ROUND((pl.ProcFee - (IFNULL((CASE WHEN cp1.InsEstTotalOverride =-1 THEN cp1.InsEstTotal ELSE cp1.InsEstTotalOverride END),0) + IFNULL((CASE WHEN cp2.InsEstTotalOverride =-1 THEN cp2.InsEstTotal ELSE cp2.InsEstTotalOverride END),0) + pl.Discount)),2),2) AS 'Patient Portion' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN patplan ord1 ON pl.PatNum = ord1.PatNum AND ord1.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN patplan ord2 ON pl.PatNum = ord2.PatNum AND ord2.Ordinal = 2 LEFT JOIN inssub is1 ON ord1.InsSubNum = is1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN inssub is2 ON ord2.InsSubNum = is2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp1 ON is1.PlanNum = cp1.PlanNum AND cp1.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp1.Status=6 LEFT JOIN claimproc cp2 ON is2.PlanNum = cp2.PlanNum AND cp2.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp1.Status=6 WHERE pl.PatNum=@PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=1 UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', '','','','', '', '' AS request UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', '','', '', '', 'Treatment Total', CONCAT('$', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM((pl.ProcFee - (IFNULL((CASE WHEN cp1.InsEstTotalOverride =-1 THEN cp1.InsEstTotal ELSE cp1.InsEstTotalOverride END),0) + IFNULL((CASE WHEN cp2.InsEstTotalOverride =-1 THEN cp2.InsEstTotal ELSE cp2.InsEstTotalOverride END),0) + pl.Discount))),2),2)) FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN patplan ord1 ON pl.PatNum = ord1.PatNum AND ord1.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN patplan ord2 ON pl.PatNum = ord2.PatNum AND ord2.Ordinal = 2 LEFT JOIN inssub is1 ON ord1.InsSubNum = is1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN inssub is2 ON ord2.InsSubNum = is2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp1 ON is1.PlanNum = cp1.PlanNum AND cp1.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp2 ON is2.PlanNum = cp2.PlanNum AND cp2.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.PatNum=@PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=1 UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', '' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'Please understand that this is AN ESTIMATE ONLY. While we try to' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'anticipate all treatment which may be required, there are cases where' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'the extent of a dental problem cannot be fully understood until' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'treatment has begun. Unforeseen changes in treatment can result in' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'additional cost and we will inform you of any changes at the time of' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'the visit. If you have dental insurance, please be aware that your' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'coverage may be different if you have not already met your deductible,' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'or your yearly maximum has been reached.' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', '' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'I have received a copy of the above treatment estimate and acknowledge' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'that I am financially responsible for the estimated patient portion of' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'the charges at each visit. I understand the risks, benefits, costs,' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'and alternatives to care.' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', '' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', '' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'Signature ______________________________________________________' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', '' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', '' AS request, '','','','', '' UNION ALL SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, '', 'Date ______________________________' AS request, '','','','', '';

request:
Special claim breakdown report. Shows number of claims submitted, total fees submitted, 
total insurance estimate, total insurance collected, insurance not paid, %not paid, and claims still open.
query: SET @SetDate = '2015-03-01'; SET @EndDate = DATE_SUB(@SetDate, INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(@SetDate) DAY); SELECT B.WeekRange AS 'WeekRange', IFNULL(A.Claims,0) AS ' FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL(A.TotalFee,0),2),2) AS 'Total Fees', FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL(A.TotalEst,0),2),2) AS 'Total EstIns', FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL(A.TotalCollect,0),2),2) AS 'Total CollectedIns', FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL(A.WriteOffs,0),2),2) AS 'WriteOffs', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL(A.PerNP * 100,0),2),2),'%') AS 'NotPaid%', FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL(A.Rem,0),2),2) AS 'RemInsPay', (IFNULL(A.Open,0)) AS 'Open Claims' FROM( SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 1 WEEK) + INTERVAL 1 DAY ,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ', DATE_FORMAT(@EndDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 2 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 1 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 3 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 2 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 4 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 3 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 5 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 4 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 6 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 5 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 7 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 6 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 8 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 7 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 9 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 8 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 10 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 9 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 11 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 10 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 12 WEEK)+ INTERVAL 1 DAY,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT((@EndDate - INTERVAL 11 WEEK),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange' )B LEFT JOIN( SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((MIN(claim.DateService) - INTERVAL (DAYOFWEEK(MIN(claim.DateService))-1) DAY),'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ', DATE_FORMAT((MIN(claim.DateService) - INTERVAL (DAYOFWEEK(MIN(claim.DateService))-7) DAY),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'WeekRange', COUNT((claim.ClaimNum)) AS 'Claims', SUM((IFNULL(claim.ClaimFee,0))) AS 'TotalFee', SUM((IFNULL(claim.InsPayEst,0))) AS 'TotalEst', SUM((IFNULL(claim.InsPayAmt,0))) AS 'TotalCollect', SUM((IFNULL((CASE WHEN claim.ClaimStatus = 'S' THEN claim.InsPayEst END),0))) - SUM((IFNULL((CASE WHEN claim.ClaimStatus = 'S' THEN claim.InsPayAmt END),0))) AS 'Rem', (SUM((IFNULL(claim.InsPayEst,0))) - SUM((IFNULL(claim.InsPayAmt,0))))/SUM((IFNULL(claim.InsPayEst,0))) AS 'PerNP', IFNULL(SUM(claim.ClaimStatus = 'S'),0) AS 'Open', SUM((CASE WHEN TRUE THEN claim.WriteOff END)) AS Writeoffs FROM( SELECT claim.* FROM claim LEFT JOIN claimproc ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog ON claimproc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum WHERE claim.DateService BETWEEN DATE_SUB(@EndDate, INTERVAL 12 WEEK) AND @EndDate AND procedurecode.ProcCode != 'D8090' GROUP BY claim.ClaimNum )claim GROUP BY CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT((claim.DateService - INTERVAL (DAYOFWEEK(claim.DateService)-1) DAY),'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ', DATE_FORMAT((claim.DateService - INTERVAL (DAYOFWEEK(claim.DateService)-7) DAY),'%m/%d/%Y')) )A ON A.WeekRange = B.WeekRange

request: List of active patients divided into age group of 0-36mo, 37mo-6yr, 7-14, 15-21, 22-40, 41-65, >65, with percentages for those age groups.
query: SET @ActivePatCount=(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus=0); SELECT Q.AgeRange,Q.PatCount,Q.PatPerc AS 'Pat%' FROM( SELECT A.AgeRange, A.PatCount, FORMAT(ROUND(A.PatCount/@ActivePatCount*100,2),2) AS 'PatPerc' FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, 'Birth-36mo' AS AgeRange, COUNT(DISTINCT(p.patnum)) AS PatCount FROM patient p WHERE (YEAR(CURDATE( )) - YEAR(p.Birthdate)) * 12 + (MONTH(CURDATE( )) - MONTH(p.Birthdate)) - IF(DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE( )) < DAYOFMONTH(p.Birthdate),1,0) BETWEEN 0 AND 36 AND p.PatStatus=0 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '37mo-6yr' AS AgeRange, COUNT(DISTINCT(p.patnum)) AS PatCount FROM patient p WHERE (YEAR(CURDATE( )) - YEAR(p.Birthdate)) * 12 + (MONTH(CURDATE( )) - MONTH(p.Birthdate)) - IF(DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE( )) < DAYOFMONTH(p.Birthdate),1,0) BETWEEN 37 AND 83 AND p.PatStatus=0 UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, '7-14' AS AgeRange, COUNT(DISTINCT(p.patnum)) AS PatCount FROM patient p WHERE (YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - YEAR(p.Birthdate) - (RIGHT(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 5) < RIGHT(p.Birthdate, 5))) BETWEEN 7 AND 14 AND p.PatStatus=0 UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, '15-21' AS AgeRange, COUNT(DISTINCT(p.patnum)) AS PatCount FROM patient p WHERE (YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - YEAR(p.Birthdate) - (RIGHT(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 5) < RIGHT(p.Birthdate, 5))) BETWEEN 15 AND 21 AND p.PatStatus=0 UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder, '22-40' AS AgeRange, COUNT(DISTINCT(p.patnum)) AS PatCount FROM patient p WHERE (YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - YEAR(p.Birthdate) - (RIGHT(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 5) < RIGHT(p.Birthdate, 5))) BETWEEN 22 AND 40 AND p.PatStatus=0 UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder, '41-65' AS AgeRange, COUNT(DISTINCT(p.patnum)) AS PatCount FROM patient p WHERE (YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - YEAR(p.Birthdate) - (RIGHT(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 5) < RIGHT(p.Birthdate, 5))) BETWEEN 41 AND 65 AND p.PatStatus=0 UNION ALL SELECT 7 AS ItemOrder, '>65' AS AgeRange, COUNT(DISTINCT(p.patnum)) AS PatCount FROM patient p WHERE (YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - YEAR(p.Birthdate) - (RIGHT(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 5) < RIGHT(p.Birthdate, 5))) > 65 AND p.PatStatus=0 )A GROUP BY AgeRange ORDER BY ItemOrder )Q

request: Count of new patients with a completed procedure in date range.  Also shows a count of patients with a scheduled appointment and no completed procedure in date range.
query: SET @StartDate = '2023-04-01', @EndDate = '2024-04-30'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN A.FirstProc BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate THEN A.PatNum END) AS 'NewPat(CompletedProc)', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN A.FirstProc IS NULL AND NOT ISNULL(appt.PatNum) THEN A.PatNum END) AS 'NewPat(ApptSched/NoCompProc)' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum, MIN(IF(!ISNULL(pc.CodeNum),procedurelog.ProcDate, NULL)) AS FirstProc FROM patient LEFT JOIN procedurelog ON patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON procedurelog.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') GROUP BY patient.PatNum ) A LEFT JOIN appointment appt ON appt.PatNum = A.PatNum AND appt.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND DATE(appt.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate

request: Patients with appointments on a given date, with patient/family balance and the dates of patient/family outstanding claims that have a DOS > 30 days from the given date listed.
query: SET @SetDate = '2015-03-16' ; SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(appointment.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%i:%s')) AS "Appointment", CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName) AS "Patient", FORMAT(ROUND(patAging.PatEst,2),2) AS "PatBal", FORMAT(ROUND(guarAging.FamBal,2),2) AS "FamBal", famClaim.PatClaims, famClaim.FamClaims FROM appointment INNER JOIN patient ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum INNER JOIN patient guar ON patient.Guarantor = guar.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patient.PatNum, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN patient.PatNum=claim.PatNum THEN DATE_FORMAT(claim.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y') END)) AS "PatClaims", GROUP_CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(claim.DateService, '%m/%d/%Y')) AS "FamClaims" FROM patient INNER JOIN patient fam ON fam.Guarantor = patient.Guarantor LEFT JOIN claim claim ON fam.PatNum = claim.PatNum AND claim.ClaimStatus IN ('W', 'S') AND DATEDIFF(@SetDate, claim.DateService)>30 AND claim.DateService!='0001-01-01' GROUP BY patient.PatNum ) famClaim ON famClaim.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT D.PatNum,D.FamBal AS PatEst,D.FamBal FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,pl.ClinicNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,ps.ClinicNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,a.ClinicNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount,cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount,MAX(ppc.ClinicNum) AS ClinicNum FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@SetDate GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) patAging ON patAging.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT D.PatNum,D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0) AS PatEst,D.FamBal FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,pl.ClinicNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,ps.ClinicNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,a.ClinicNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount,cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount,MAX(ppc.ClinicNum) AS ClinicNum FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@SetDate GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=CURDATE()) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>CURDATE())) AND cp.ProcDate<=@SetDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) guarAging ON guarAging.PatNum=guar.PatNum WHERE DATE(appointment.AptDateTime)=@SetDate GROUP BY appointment.AptNum

request: List of insured patients with a scheduled appointment in date range, with Name, PatNum, and FamFinUrgNote listed.
