query: SET @StartDate='2025-06-01', @EndDate='2025-06-30'; SELECT patient.PatNum AS 'Pat Num' , patient.PatNum , COALESCE(( SELECT g.FamFinUrgNote FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum = patient.Guarantor ),'') AS 'FamFinUrgNote' FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ap ON patient.PatNum = ap.PatNum AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@StartDate) AND DATE(@EndDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ap.AptStatus = 1 INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 GROUP BY patient.PatNum ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName, patient.PatNum

request: Count of patients that have had at least one procedure from a list of procedure codes completed in a date range, group by the day of the week the procedure was completed.
query: SET @FromDate='2021-01-01' , @ToDate='2021-01-31'; SET @Codes='D0120,D0140,M1112,M1115'; SELECT DAYNAME(pl.ProcDate) AS DayOfWk, COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS ' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient g ON p.Guarantor = g.PatNum LEFT JOIN procnote pn ON pl.procnum = pn.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @Codes)) GROUP BY DAYNAME(pl.ProcDate) ORDER BY DAYOFWEEK(pl.ProcDate)

request:
Completed appointments in a date range with the total production, insurance carriers, insurance estimates, insurance payments,
  amount patient paid on date of appointment, and patient next visit date listed. Provider production totals for the date range are listed at the bottom.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT core.PatNum ,DATE_FORMAT(core.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'AppointmentDate' ,FORMAT(core.ProcFees,2) AS 'TotalProduction' ,IFNULL(core.InsCarriers, 'None') AS 'Carriers' ,FORMAT(core.InsEstimate,2) AS 'InsEstimate' ,FORMAT(core.InsPaid,2) AS 'InsPaid' ,FORMAT(core.PatPaid,2) AS 'PatPaidOnAptDate' ,FORMAT(core.Writeoff,2) AS 'WriteOff' ,FORMAT(core.InsPaid + core.PatPaid,2) AS 'TotalCollected' ,FORMAT(core.ProcFees - core.InsPaid - core.WriteOff - core.PatPaid,2) AS 'ExpectedRemainingPayment', core.NextAppt AS 'NextVisit' FROM ( SELECT ap.PatNum ,ap.AptDateTime ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ins.InsCarriers SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'InsCarriers' ,SUM(COALESCE(ins.InsEstimate,0)) AS 'InsEstimate' ,SUM(COALESCE(ins.InsPaid,0)) AS 'InsPaid' ,SUM(COALESCE(ins.WriteOff,0)) AS 'WriteOff' ,SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits+pl.UnitQty),0)) AS 'ProcFees' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PatNum = ap.PatNum AND ps.DatePay = DATE(ap.AptDateTime) ),0) AS 'PatPaid' ,COALESCE(( SELECT MIN(sched.AptDateTime) FROM appointment sched WHERE sched.PatNum = ap.PatNum AND sched.AptDateTime > CURDATE() AND sched.AptStatus = 1 LIMIT 1 ), 'Not Scheduled') AS 'NextAppt' FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = ap.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate = DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum ,SUM(IF(cp.Status IN (0,1) ,COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.InsEstTotalOverride,-1) ,cp.InsEstTotal) ,0)) AS 'InsEstimate' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPaid' ,SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'WriteOff' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT car.CarrierName ORDER BY car.CarrierName SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'InsCarriers' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) ins ON ins.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ap.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY ap.PatNum, DATE(ap.AptDateTime) ORDER BY DATE(ap.AptDateTime) ) core UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT '','','ProvAbbr:','TotalProvProd:','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'Patnum' ,'' AS 'AppointmentDate' ,tpr.Abbr AS 'TotalProduction' ,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(tpl.ProcFee * (tpl.UnitQty + tpl.BaseUnits)), 2), 2) AS 'Carriers' ,'' AS 'InsEstimate' ,'' AS 'InsPaid' ,'' AS 'PatPaidOnAptDate' ,'' AS 'WriteOff' ,'' AS 'TotalCollected' ,'' AS 'ExpectedRemainingPayment' ,'' AS 'NextVisit' FROM procedurelog tpl INNER JOIN provider tpr ON tpr.ProvNum = tpl.ProvNum WHERE tpl.ProcStatus = 2 AND tpl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY tpr.ProvNum

request: GroupName and Production of a user-specified insurance plan with Average Production/Patient with that insurance plan listed.
query: SET @FromDate ="2023-02-01", @ToDate ="2023-02-28"; SET @CarrierName ='%denti-cal%'; SELECT carrier.CarrierName AS "CarrierName" ,insplan.GroupName AS "GroupName" ,FORMAT(SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)),2) AS "$Production_" ,COUNT(DISTINCT procedurelog.PatNum) AS " ,FORMAT(SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)) / COUNT(DISTINCT procedurelog.PatNum),2) AS "$AvgProd/Patient_" FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN claimproc ON procedurelog.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim ON claimproc.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = 'P' INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = claim.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON insplan.CarrierNum = carrier.CarrierNum AND carrier.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY insplan.GroupName

request: All patients that have values for a specified patient field def. Shows the total ProcFees of all treatment planned procedures per patient.
query: SET @FieldName='%fielddefname%'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS ' FROM( SELECT patfield.PatNum, FieldName, FieldValue, FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee),0),2),2) AS TxTotal FROM patfield LEFT JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum = patfield.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 1 WHERE FieldName LIKE @FieldName GROUP BY patfield.PatNum ORDER BY FieldName,FieldValue )A ORDER BY '

request: Percentage of Male, Female, and Unknown patients with at least one completed procedure within a date range, grouped by clinic.
query: SET @StartDate = '2013-01-01', @EndDate = '2015-07-07'; SELECT A.* FROM( SELECT IFNULL(clinic.request, 'Unassigned') AS ClinicName, COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum) AS ' FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN patient.Gender = 0 THEN patient.PatNum ELSE NULL END)/COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum))*100,2),2) AS 'Male%', FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN patient.Gender = 1 THEN patient.PatNum ELSE NULL END)/COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum))*100,2),2) AS 'Female%', FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN patient.Gender = 2 THEN patient.PatNum ELSE NULL END)/COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum))*100,2),2) AS 'Unknown%' FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN clinic ON procedurelog.ClinicNum = clinic.ClinicNum WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum ORDER BY clinic.request )A UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Totals:', COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum), FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN patient.Gender = 0 THEN patient.PatNum ELSE NULL END)/COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum))*100,2),2) AS 'Male%', FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN patient.Gender = 1 THEN patient.PatNum ELSE NULL END)/COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum))*100,2),2) AS 'Female%', FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN patient.Gender = 2 THEN patient.PatNum ELSE NULL END)/COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum))*100,2),2) AS 'Unknown%' FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0

request: Count of patients in an age range who have had a procedure completed in the date range per clinic, grouped by age.
query: SET @StartDate = '2013-09-01', @EndDate = '2014-10-30'; SET @StartAge = 0, @EndAge = 20; SELECT A.* FROM( SELECT IFNULL(clinic.request, 'Unassigned') AS Clinic, (YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)-(RIGHT(procedurelog.ProcDate,5)<RIGHT (patient.Birthdate,5))) AS Age, COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum) AS ' FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum WHERE (YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)-(RIGHT(procedurelog.ProcDate,5)<RIGHT (patient.Birthdate,5))) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge AND patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY procedurelog.ClinicNum, Age ORDER BY clinic.request, Age )A UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'All Clinic Totals', 'Age',' UNION ALL SELECT B.* FROM( SELECT '', (YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)-(RIGHT(procedurelog.ProcDate,5)<RIGHT (patient.Birthdate,5))) AS Age, COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum) AS ' FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE (YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)-(RIGHT(procedurelog.ProcDate,5)<RIGHT (patient.Birthdate,5))) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge AND patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY Age ORDER BY Age )B

request:
Patients who have had a completed procedure in the date range with their clinic and race/ethnicity 

listed.
query: SET @StartDate = '2013-01-01', @EndDate = '2015-07-07'; SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum AS 'Pat IFNULL(clinic.request, 'Unassigned') AS Clinic, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT CASE WHEN patientrace.Race = 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN patientrace.Race = 1 THEN 'African American' WHEN patientrace.Race = 2 THEN 'American Indian' WHEN patientrace.Race = 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN patientrace.Race = 4 THEN 'Declined to Specify Race' WHEN patientrace.Race = 5 THEN 'Hawaiian or Pacific Islander' WHEN patientrace.Race = 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN patientrace.Race = 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN patientrace.Race = 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN patientrace.Race = 9 THEN 'White' WHEN patientrace.Race = 10 THEN 'Not Hispanic' WHEN patientrace.Race = 11 THEN 'Declined to Specify Ethnicity' ELSE 'Not Specified' END ) AS Ethnicity,'' AS ' FROM patient LEFT JOIN patientrace ON patient.PatNum = patientrace.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN clinic ON procedurelog.ClinicNum = clinic.ClinicNum GROUP BY patient.PatNum ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName )A UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT '','','Totals/Clinic:','','','' UNION ALL SELECT B.* FROM( SELECT '' AS PatNum,'' AS LName,'' AS FName, IFNULL(clinic.request, 'Unassigned') AS Clinic, (CASE WHEN patientrace.Race = 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN patientrace.Race = 1 THEN 'African American' WHEN patientrace.Race = 2 THEN 'American Indian' WHEN patientrace.Race = 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN patientrace.Race = 4 THEN 'Declined to Specify Race' WHEN patientrace.Race = 5 THEN 'Hawaiian or Pacific Islander' WHEN patientrace.Race = 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN patientrace.Race = 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN patientrace.Race = 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN patientrace.Race = 9 THEN 'White' WHEN patientrace.Race = 10 THEN 'Not Hispanic' WHEN patientrace.Race = 11 THEN 'Declined to Specify Ethnicity' ELSE 'Not Specified' END ) AS Ethnicity, COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum) AS ' FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN clinic ON procedurelog.ClinicNum = clinic.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN patientrace ON patient.PatNum = patientrace.PatNum GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum, patientrace.Race ORDER BY clinic.request, Ethnicity )B UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT '','','','Grand Totals:','','' UNION ALL SELECT C.* FROM( SELECT '' AS PatNum, '' AS LName, '' AS FName,'' AS Clinic, (CASE WHEN patientrace.Race = 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN patientrace.Race = 1 THEN 'African American' WHEN patientrace.Race = 2 THEN 'American Indian' WHEN patientrace.Race = 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN patientrace.Race = 4 THEN 'Declined to Specify Race' WHEN patientrace.Race = 5 THEN 'Hawaiian or Pacific Islander' WHEN patientrace.Race = 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN patientrace.Race = 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN patientrace.Race = 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN patientrace.Race = 9 THEN 'White' WHEN patientrace.Race = 10 THEN 'Not Hispanic' WHEN patientrace.Race = 11 THEN 'Declined to Specify Ethnicity' ELSE 'Not Specified' END ) AS Ethnicity, COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum) AS ' FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN clinic ON procedurelog.ClinicNum = clinic.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN patientrace ON patient.PatNum = patientrace.PatNum GROUP BY patientrace.Race ORDER BY Ethnicity )C

request: ProcDate, Provider, Clinic, ProcCode, Fee, and InsPayEst for completed procedures in a date range of a specific provider and carrier.
query: SET @StartDate = '2014-01-01', @EndDate = '2015-06-26'; SET @ProvNum = 1, @CarrierName = '%%'; SELECT procedurelog.ProcDate, provider.Abbr AS 'ProvAbbr', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', procedurecode.ProcCode, procedurelog.ProcFee*(procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits) AS 'ProcFee', SUM(claimproc.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN claimproc ON procedurelog.ProcNum=claimproc.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0,1,4,5,6,7,8) INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = claimproc.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum AND carrier.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=procedurelog.ClinicNum INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=claimproc.ProvNum AND provider.ProvNum = @ProvNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcNum

request: Days scheduled as open, days worked, and the total number of days in the date range.
query: SET @FromDate = '2015-08-18', @ToDate = '2015-08-19'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SchedDate) AS DaysOpen, COUNT(DISTINCT procedurelog.ProcDate) AS DaysWorked, DATEDIFF(@ToDate, @FromDate)+1 AS Days FROM SCHEDULE LEFT JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcDate = schedule.SchedDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHERE SchedType=1 AND SchedDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate;

request: List of completed procedures in date range.
query: SET @FromDate= '2015-01-01', @ToDate='2015-01-31'; SELECT pl.ProcDate, CONCAT(pa.LName,', ',pa.FName) AS 'PatientName', pr.Abbr AS 'Provider', ProcCode AS 'Procedure', pc.Descript AS 'Procedure request', pa.HmPhone, pa.WirelessPhone FROM patient pa INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pa.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY pr.Abbr, ProcDate, 'PatientName'

request: Deposits made for a specified date range. Showing clinic and payment types attached to the deposit.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01' , @ToDate='2020-01-31'; SELECT d.DateDeposit AS 'DateDeposit', d.Amount AS '$Amount_', d.Memo, d.BankAccountInfo, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(c.Clinic) FROM ( SELECT pa.DepositNum, COALESCE(c.Abbr, 'None') AS 'Clinic' FROM payment pa LEFT JOIN clinic c ON pa.ClinicNum = c.ClinicNum WHERE pa.DepositNum IN(SELECT d.DepositNum FROM deposit d WHERE d.DateDeposit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) GROUP BY pa.ClinicNum, pa.DepositNum UNION SELECT pa.DepositNum, COALESCE(c.Abbr, 'None') AS 'Clinic' FROM claimpayment pa LEFT JOIN clinic c ON pa.ClinicNum = c.ClinicNum WHERE pa.DepositNum IN(SELECT d.DepositNum FROM deposit d WHERE d.DateDeposit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) GROUP BY pa.ClinicNum, pa.DepositNum ) c WHERE c.DepositNum = d.DepositNum ), 'None') AS 'Clinics', COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(c.PayType) FROM ( SELECT pa.DepositNum, COALESCE(def.ItemName, 'None') AS 'PayType' FROM payment pa LEFT JOIN definition def ON pa.PayType = def.DefNum WHERE pa.DepositNum IN(SELECT d.DepositNum FROM deposit d WHERE d.DateDeposit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) GROUP BY pa.PayType, pa.DepositNum UNION SELECT pa.DepositNum, CONCAT('Ins-', COALESCE(def.ItemName, 'None')) AS 'PayType' FROM claimpayment pa LEFT JOIN definition def ON pa.PayType = def.DefNum WHERE pa.DepositNum IN(SELECT d.DepositNum FROM deposit d WHERE d.DateDeposit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) GROUP BY pa.PayType, pa.DepositNum ) c WHERE c.DepositNum = d.DepositNum ), 'None') AS 'PaymentTypes' FROM deposit d WHERE d.DateDeposit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY d.DepositNum ORDER BY DateDeposit

request: Scheduled appointments in a date range showing production, insurance carrier, and insurance estimates for procedures attached to the appointment.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(A.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'AppointmentDate' ,A.ChartNumber AS 'Chart ,A.Patient ,SUM((pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))) AS '$GrossProduction_' ,A.InsCarriers ,A.InsEstimate AS '$InsEstimate_' FROM ( SELECT ap.AptDateTime ,p.ChartNumber ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT car.CarrierName ORDER BY car.CarrierName SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'InsCarriers' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride!=-1 THEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE cp.InsEstTotal END) AS 'InsEstimate' ,ap.AptNum FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus=1 LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND ap.AptStatus=1 GROUP BY ap.PatNum,ap.AptNum ) A LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=A.AptNum GROUP BY A.ChartNumber,A.AptNum ORDER BY DATE(A.AptDateTime),A.Chartnumber

request: Daily procedures report, showing tooth quadrant information
query: SET @FromDate= '2015-01-01', @ToDate='2015-01-31'; SELECT pl.ProcDate, CONCAT(pa.LName,', ',pa.FName,' ',pa.MiddleI) AS PatName, ProcCode, pl.ToothNum, (CASE WHEN pl.Surf IN('UL', 'UR', 'LR', 'LL') THEN pl.surf ELSE 'NoQuadrant' END ) AS Quad, pc.Descript,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider', c.request AS 'Clinic', pl.ProcFee-(CASE WHEN ISNULL(claimproc.WriteOff) THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(claimproc.WriteOff)) END) AS $Fee FROM patient pa INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pa.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimproc ON pl.ProcNum=claimproc.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status='7' LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND pl.ProcDate >=@FromDate AND pl.ProcDate <=@ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY pl.ProcDate,PatName

request: Daily production and income report showing payments, adjustments, and patient income. Ordered by procedures in a specific order.
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01' , @ToDate='2015-01-31'; SELECT A.Date, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'Patient', A.request, pr.Abbr AS 'Prov', A.$Prod_, A.$Adjust_, A.$WritOff_, A.$TotProd_, A.$PatIncome_, A.$InsIncome_, A.$TotIncome_ FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pc.ProcCode, pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', 0 AS 'TypeOrder' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', '' AS ProcCode, a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', 4 AS 'TypeOrder' FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', '' AS ProcCode, ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_', 2 AS 'TypeOrder' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', '' AS ProcCode, cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_', 3 AS 'TypeOrder' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum ORDER BY A.Date, p.LName, p.FName, A.TypeOrder ASC,(CASE A.ProcCode WHEN 'D1110' THEN 1 WHEN 'D1120' THEN 2 WHEN 'D1201' THEN 3 WHEN 'D1203' THEN 4 WHEN 'D1204' THEN 5 WHEN 'D1205' THEN 6 WHEN 'D1206' THEN 7 WHEN 'D1208' THEN 8 WHEN 'D0120' THEN 9 WHEN 'D0140' THEN 11 WHEN 'D0150' THEN 12 WHEN 'D0270' THEN 13 WHEN 'D0272' THEN 14 WHEN 'D0273' THEN 15 WHEN 'D0274' THEN 16 WHEN 'D0220' THEN 17 WHEN 'D0230' THEN 18 ELSE 19 END), A.ProcCode,A.request

request: List of Quick Notes Ordered By Category
query: SELECT qpc.request AS 'Category', qpn.Abbreviation, qpn.Note FROM quickpastenote qpn INNER JOIN quickpastecat qpc ON qpn.QuickPasteCatNum=qpc.QuickPasteCatNum ORDER BY Category

request: Treatment planned procedures treatment planned in the specified date range with a specified provider attached, for Patient status patients
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Providers=''; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @ProcCategoriesExcluded=''; SELECT pl.PatNum AS 'Pat Num' , pl.PatNum , pl.DateTP , pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' , pc.ProcCode , pc.Descript AS 'Procrequest' , ( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 4 AND def.DefNum = p.BillingType ) AS 'BillingType' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 AND pl.DateTP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ProcCodes)) AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCategoriesExcluded) = 0, TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ProcCategoriesExcluded)) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Providers)) WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, pl.DateTP, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcNum

request: Patients with a particular insurance carrier, seen by a specific provider, within a date range.
query: SET @FromDate ='2025-01-01', @ToDate ='2025-01-31'; SET @Carrier='%%'; SET @Provider='%%'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'PatID' ,p.LName ,p.FName ,p.Email ,p.HmPhone ,p.WirelessPhone ,p.WkPhone ,p.Address ,p.Address2 ,p.City ,p.State ,p.Zip ,COALESCE(car1.CarrierName,'None') AS 'PrimaryIns' ,COALESCE(car2.CarrierName,'None') AS 'SecondaryIns' ,MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS 'DateLastProc' ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr LIKE @Provider LEFT JOIN patplan pp1 ON pp1.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pp1.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN inssub iss1 ON pp1.InsSubNum = iss1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum = iss1.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car1 ON car1.CarrierNum = ip1.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp2 ON pp2.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pp2.Ordinal = 2 LEFT JOIN inssub iss2 ON pp2.InsSubNum = iss2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip2 ON ip2.PlanNum = iss2.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car2 ON car2.CarrierNum = ip2.CarrierNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND ( car1.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier OR car2.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier ) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum

request: Patients with an appointment today, showing if that appointment has any recall triggers.  Also shows years since last pano, months since last BW's, and months since lastFMX.
query: SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat IFNULL(FORMAT(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),(SELECT MAX(pano.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog pano INNER JOIN procedurecode panocode ON pano.CodeNum=panocode.CodeNum WHERE panocode.ProcCode='D0330' AND pano.ProcStatus=2 AND pano.PatNum=p.PatNum))/365,1) ,'None') AS 'YrsPano', (CASE WHEN ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedurelog pl2 INNER JOIN recall r2 ON r2.PatNum=pl2.PatNum INNER JOIN recalltrigger rt2 ON rt2.RecallTypeNum=r2.RecallTypeNum AND pl2.CodeNum=rt2.CodeNum WHERE pl2.AptNum=a.AptNum)>0) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END ) AS 'RecallApt', (CASE WHEN (IFNULL(FORMAT(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), (SELECT MAX(Mo2BW.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog Mo2BW INNER JOIN procedurecode Mo2BWcode ON Mo2BW.CodeNum=Mo2BWcode.CodeNum WHERE Mo2BWcode.ProcCode='D0272' AND Mo2BW.ProcStatus=2 AND Mo2BW.PatNum=p.PatNum))/30,1),'None')) >= 6.0 THEN 'Due' ELSE IFNULL(FORMAT(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),(SELECT MAX(Mo2BW.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog Mo2BW INNER JOIN procedurecode Mo2BWcode ON Mo2BW.CodeNum=Mo2BWcode.CodeNum WHERE Mo2BWcode.ProcCode='D0272' AND Mo2BW.ProcStatus=2 AND Mo2BW.PatNum=p.PatNum))/30,1),'None') END ) AS 'Mo2BW', (CASE WHEN (IFNULL(FORMAT(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), (SELECT MAX(Mo4BW.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog Mo4BW INNER JOIN procedurecode Mo4BWcode ON Mo4BW.CodeNum=Mo4BWcode.CodeNum WHERE Mo4BWcode.ProcCode='D0274' AND Mo4BW.ProcStatus=2 AND Mo4BW.PatNum=p.PatNum))/30,1),'None')) >= 6.0 THEN 'Due' ELSE IFNULL(FORMAT(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),(SELECT MAX(Mo4BW.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog Mo4BW INNER JOIN procedurecode Mo4BWcode ON Mo4BW.CodeNum=Mo4BWcode.CodeNum WHERE Mo4BWcode.ProcCode='D0274' AND Mo4BW.ProcStatus=2 AND Mo4BW.PatNum=p.PatNum))/30,1),'None') END ) AS 'Mo4BW', (CASE WHEN (IFNULL(FORMAT(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), (SELECT MAX(MoFMX.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog MoFMX INNER JOIN procedurecode MoFMXcode ON MoFMX.CodeNum=MoFMXcode.CodeNum WHERE MoFMXcode.ProcCode='D0210' AND MoFMX.ProcStatus=2 AND MoFMX.PatNum=p.PatNum))/30,1),'None')) >= 60.0 THEN 'Due' ELSE IFNULL(FORMAT(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),(SELECT MAX(MoFMX.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog MoFMX INNER JOIN procedurecode MoFMXcode ON MoFMX.CodeNum=MoFMXcode.CodeNum WHERE MoFMXcode.ProcCode='D0210' AND MoFMX.ProcStatus=2 AND MoFMX.PatNum=p.PatNum))/30,1),'None') END ) AS 'MoFMX' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum AND DATE(a.AptDateTime)=CURDATE() AND a.AptStatus IN (1,2,4,5) ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, 'RecallApt' DESC

request: List of patients with completed appointment in specified date range, whose birthdate falls between specified dates
query: SET @FromDate = '2021-12-01', @ToDate = '2021-12-31'; SET @StartBirthdate = '1978-01-07', @EndBirthdate = '2003-01-07'; SET @Pos=0; SELECT @pos := @pos + 1 AS 'Row ,core.LName ,core.FName ,core.HmPhone ,core.WkPhone ,core.WirelessPhone ,core.Birthdate ,core.ApptDateTime FROM ( SELECT patient.LName ,patient.FName ,patient.HmPhone ,patient.WkPhone ,patient.WirelessPhone ,patient.Birthdate ,a.AptDateTime AS ApptDateTime FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHERE patient.Birthdate BETWEEN @StartBirthdate AND @EndBirthdate ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName, patient.Birthdate, a.AptDateTime ) core;

request: Day sheet for date range showing production, income, and visits by provider with provider totals.  Like Windent Day Sheet Summary Listing report
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2014-01-31'; SELECT A.Date AS 'TransDate', A.Production AS Charges, A.ChrgAdj AS 'Adj', A.Writeoff AS 'Writeoff', A.NetProd AS NetCharges, A.CountAppts AS Visits, A.PatPay AS 'Pat Pay', A.InsIncome AS 'Ins Pay', A.TotalIncome AS 'Net Payments' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, DATE_FORMAT(DATE(Trans.TranDate),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', pv.Abbr AS 'Provider', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Production, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS ChrgAdj, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS NetProd, COALESCE(apts.CountAppts,'') AS 'CountAppts', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS PatPay, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'InsPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS InsIncome, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS TotalIncome FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProvNum,SUM(pl.ProcFee*(CASE pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits END))-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.procnum=cp.procnum AND cp.status='7' WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = '2' GROUP BY pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, a.AdjDate FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, ps.DatePay FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0, cp.DateCP FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff, cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4,0) AND cp.WriteOff>0.005 ) Trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.AptDateTime, a.ProvNum, COUNT(a.AptNum) AS 'CountAppts' FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY a.ProvNum,DATE(a.AptDateTime) ) apts ON apts.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum AND DATE(apts.AptDateTime)=Trans.TranDate GROUP BY pv.ProvNum,Trans.TranDate UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, pv.Abbr AS AptDate, pv.Abbr AS 'Provider', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Production, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS ChrgAdj, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS NetProd, COALESCE(apts.CountAppts,0) AS 'CountAppts', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS PatPay, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'InsPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS InsIncome, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS TotalIncome FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProvNum,SUM(pl.ProcFee*(CASE pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits END))-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.procnum=cp.procnum AND cp.status='7' WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = '2' GROUP BY pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, a.AdjDate FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, ps.DatePay FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0, cp.DateCP FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff, cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4,0) AND cp.WriteOff>0.005 ) Trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.AptDateTime, a.ProvNum, COUNT(a.AptNum) AS 'CountAppts' FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY a.ProvNum ) apts ON apts.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum GROUP BY pv.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, ' pv.Abbr AS 'Provider', ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProvNum,SUM(pl.ProcFee*(CASE pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits END))-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.procnum=cp.procnum AND cp.status='7' WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = '2' GROUP BY pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, a.AdjDate FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, ps.DatePay FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0, cp.DateCP FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff, cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4,0) AND cp.WriteOff>0.005 ) Trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum GROUP BY pv.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, '' AS AptDate, pv.Abbr AS 'Provider', '' AS Production, '' AS ChrgAdj, '' AS Writeoff, '' AS NetProd, '', '' AS PatPay, '' AS InsIncome, '' AS TotalIncome FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProvNum,SUM(pl.ProcFee*(CASE pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits END))-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.procnum=cp.procnum AND cp.status='7' WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = '2' GROUP BY pl.ProcDate,pl.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, a.AdjDate FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff, ps.DatePay FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0, cp.DateCP FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff, cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4,0) AND cp.WriteOff>0.005 ) Trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum GROUP BY pv.ProvNum ) A ORDER BY A.Provider, A.ItemOrder, A.Date;

request: List of appointments for specific provider in date range showing info on next scheduled/ASAP appointment if any
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01', @ToDate='2015-03-30'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE(A.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'AptDate', A.ChartNum, A.Patient, A.ClinicNum, A.AptProcs AS CompletedAptProcs, A.Prov AS AptProv, A.CompletedUserName AS 'SetCompleteByUser', COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A.NextSchedAptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y'),'None') AS NextApt, SchedAptInfo.NextAptUserName AS 'NextApptCreatedUser', SchedAptInfo.NextClinicNum AS NextAptClinic, SchedAptInfo.NextAptProcs, SchedAptInfo.Prov AS NextAptProv FROM ( SELECT a.PatNum, a.AptNum, a.AptDateTime, p.ChartNumber AS ChartNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'Patient', (CASE WHEN a.ClinicNum=0 THEN 'None' ELSE c.request END) AS ClinicNum, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ', ') AS AptProcs, (CASE WHEN a.isHygiene THEN pr2.Abbr ELSE pr.Abbr END) AS Prov, sl.CompName AS CompletedCompName, usr.UserName AS CompletedUserName, MIN(SchedApts.NextAptDateTime) AS 'NextSchedAptDateTime' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON a.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider pr2 ON a.ProvHyg=pr2.ProvNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON a.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sl.FKey,MIN(sl.LogDateTime) AS LastSetComp FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.PermType=27 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%set complete%' GROUP BY sl.FKey ) lastLog ON lastLog.FKey=a.AptNum LEFT JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.LogDateTime=lastLog.LastSetComp LEFT JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum=sl.UserNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON a.ClinicNum=c.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.PatNum,a.AptDateTime AS 'NextAptDateTime' FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND DATE(a.AptDateTime)>@FromDate GROUP BY a.PatNum,a.AptNum ) SchedApts ON SchedApts.PatNum=A.PatNum AND a.AptDateTime < SchedApts.NextAptDateTime WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY p.PatNum,a.AptNum ORDER BY DATE(a.AptDateTime),p.LName,p.FName ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.PatNum, a.AptDateTime AS AptDateTime, sl.CompName AS NextAptCompName, usr.UserName AS NextAptUserName, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ', ') AS NextAptProcs, (CASE WHEN a.isHygiene THEN pr2.Abbr ELSE pr.Abbr END) AS Prov, (CASE WHEN a.ClinicNum=0 THEN 'None' ELSE c.request END) AS NextClinicNum FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON a.AptNum=pl.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.PermType=25 LEFT JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum=sl.UserNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON a.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider pr2 ON a.ProvHyg=pr2.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON a.ClinicNum=c.ClinicNum WHERE a.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND DATE(a.AptDateTime)>@FromDate GROUP BY a.PatNum,a.AptNum ) SchedAptInfo ON SchedAptInfo.PatNum=A.PatNum AND SchedAptInfo.AptDateTime=A.NextSchedAptDateTime WHERE A.Prov LIKE @ProvAbbr ORDER BY A.AptDateTime, A.Patient

request: List of guarantors of accounts with current balance for entire family showing as a credit (negative balance).  Date restriction is the last completed procedure for any family member.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate ='2015-12-31'; SELECT g.PatNum AS 'Pat g.LName, g.FName, g.Address, g.Address2, g.City, g.State, g.Zip, DATE_FORMAT(DateLastSeen.LastCompProc, '%m/%d/%Y') AS DateLastSeen, SUM(ROUND(g.BalTotal,2))AS $BalTotal_ FROM patient g INNER JOIN ( SELECT p.Guarantor, MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS LastCompProc FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY p.Guarantor ) DateLastSeen ON DateLastSeen.Guarantor=g.PatNum WHERE g.Guarantor=g.PatNum AND g.BalTotal < -0.005 AND DateLastSeen.LastCompProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY g.PatNum ORDER BY g.LName,g.FName,DateLastSeen

request: Patients with a "referral from" source and their first completed procedure in date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01' , @ToDate='2018-01-31'; SET @RefLName='%',@RefFName='%'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', CONCAT(referral.LName,', ',referral.FName) AS RefSource, prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=1 THEN 'Treatment Planned' WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 THEN 'Complete' END) AS 'Procedure Status', pl.ProcFee AS '$Fee_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) INNER JOIN provider prov ON pl.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS 'minProc', pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) FirstVisit ON FirstVisit.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FirstVisit.minProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN refattach ON p.PatNum=refattach.PatNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 AND refattach.ItemOrder=( SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.PatNum=refattach.PatNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 ) INNER JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum=refattach.ReferralNum AND referral.FName LIKE @RefFName AND referral.LName LIKE @RefLName ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, pl.ProcStatus DESC, pc.ProcCode, prov.Abbr;

request: List of patients with allergies matching a specific allergy request.  Also shows patient information.
query: SET @AllergyName='%%'; SET @ActiveAllergiesOnly='Yes'; SELECT allergy.PatNum AS 'Pat , p.PatNum , allergydef.request AS 'Allergy' , allergy.Reaction , (CASE WHEN allergy.StatusIsActive = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS 'Is Active' , (CASE WHEN allergy.DateAdverseReaction = '0001-01-01' THEN '' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(allergy.DateAdverseReaction,'%m/%d/%Y') END) AS 'DateAdverseReaction' , allergy.SnomedReaction AS 'SNOMEDCTReaction' FROM allergy INNER JOIN allergydef ON allergy.AllergyDefNum = allergydef.AllergyDefNum AND allergydef.request LIKE @AllergyName INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = allergy.PatNum WHERE IF(@ActiveAllergiesOnly = 'Yes', allergy.StatusIsActive, TRUE) ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, allergydef.request, allergy.DateAdverseReaction

request: List of all TP procedures that have priority not in specified priority list, treatment planned in date range.
query: SET @ExcludedPriorityNames = 'Recmend|1|2'; SET @StartDate='2009-01-01', @EndDate='2016-12-31'; SELECT PatNum,ProcCode,ProcFee,Surf,ToothNum,DateTP,d.ItemName AS Priority FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=pl.Priority WHERE pl.ProcStatus=1 AND d.ItemName NOT REGEXP @ExcludedPriorityNames AND DateTP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate ORDER BY PatNum;

request: Like internal Adjustment Report but filtered for adjustments greater than specified amount.
query: SET @Clinic = '%%'; SET @StartDate = '2021-01-01', @EndDate = '2021-12-31'; SET @AdjAmt = 700; SELECT adjustment.AdjDate ,CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,', ',patient.MiddleI) Patient ,pv.Abbr Provider ,COALESCE(clinic.request,'Unassigned') Clinic ,definition.ItemName request ,adjustment.AdjNote ,adjustment.AdjAmt FROM patient INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.PatNum=patient.PatNum AND adjustment.AdjDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND adjustment.AdjAmt > @AdjAmt INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=adjustment.ProvNum INNER JOIN definition ON adjustment.AdjType=definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=adjustment.ClinicNum WHERE (CASE WHEN @Clinic='%%' THEN TRUE ELSE clinic.request LIKE @Clinic END) ORDER BY adjustment.AdjDate

request:
All patient and insurance checks for a date range and given providers with the date of service
   and the total for each provider at the bottom, sorted by patient name
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-01-01', @ToDate ='2024-08-06'; SET @Providers = ''; SET @Providers = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Providers) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE REPLACE(@Providers,',','|') END); SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,display.PatNum,'') AS 'PatNum' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,display.PaymentType,'') AS 'PayType' ,display.Abbr AS 'Abbr' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,display.PayDate,'') AS 'Date' ,FORMAT(ROUND(IF(dup.Num = 1,display.PaymentAmt,SUM(display.PaymentAmt)),2),2) AS 'PaymentAmt' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,display.DOS,'') AS 'Date Of Service' FROM ( SELECT core.PatNum ,core.PaymentType ,provider.Abbr ,provider.provnum ,core.PayDate ,core.PaymentAmt ,core.DOS ,patient.LName ,patient.FName ,core.PriKey FROM patient INNER JOIN ( SELECT paysplit.PatNum ,definition.ItemName AS 'PaymentType' ,ProvNum ,paysplit.DatePay AS 'PayDate' ,SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) AS 'PaymentAmt' ,'' AS 'DOS' ,payment.PayNum AS 'PriKey' FROM payment INNER JOIN paysplit ON paysplit.PayNum = payment.PayNum AND paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) INNER JOIN definition ON definition.DefNum = payment.PayType GROUP BY paysplit.PatNum, definition.ItemName, paysplit.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT claimproc.PatNum ,'Ins Payment' AS 'PaymentType' ,claimproc.ProvNum ,claimproc.DateCP AS 'Date' ,SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) AS PaymentAmt ,claimproc.ProcDate AS 'DOS' ,claimproc.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND claimproc.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY claimproc.PatNum, claimproc.DateCP ) core ON core.PatNum = patient.PatNum INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = core.ProvNum WHERE Abbr REGEXP @Providers AND PaymentAmt > 0 ) display LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(display.PaymentType,'+',display.PriKey,'+',display.PatNum),display.ProvNum) ORDER BY dup.Num, IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(display.PayDate, display.LName, display.FName, display.PatNum, display.PaymentType, display.PriKey),display.ProvNum)

request: Monthly Production and income report for a specific provider with a medicaid payment column
query: SET @FromDate='2015-05-01' , @ToDate='2015-05-31'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @MedicaidCarrierName='%MEDICAID%'; SET @WriteoffByDateOfService='NO'; SET @BillingType='%Standard%'; SELECT Trans.TransDate AS 'Date', DATE_FORMAT(Trans.TransDate,"%W") AS 'WeekDay', SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Production_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Sched' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Sched_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Adjustment_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Writeoff_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj','Sched') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $NetProd_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $PatIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $InsIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('MedicaidPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $MedicaidInc_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay','MedicaidPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $TotalIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProcDate AS TransDate,pl.ProvNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient pa ON pl.PatNum=pa.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pa.BillingType AND def.Category=4 AND def.ItemName LIKE @BillingType LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status='7' WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Sched' AS TranType,DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS TransDate,ap.ProvNum,COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient pa ON ap.PatNum=pa.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pa.BillingType AND def.Category=4 AND def.ItemName LIKE @BillingType LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON ap.AptNum = pl.AptNum WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ap.AptNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.AdjDate AS TransDate,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN patient pa ON a.PatNum=pa.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pa.BillingType AND def.Category=4 AND def.ItemName LIKE @BillingType WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.DatePay AS TransDate,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN patient pa ON ps.PatNum=pa.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pa.BillingType AND def.Category=4 AND def.ItemName LIKE @BillingType WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient pa ON cp.PatNum=pa.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pa.BillingType AND def.Category=4 AND def.ItemName LIKE @BillingType INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName NOT LIKE @MedicaidCarrierName WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'MedicaidPay' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient pa ON cp.PatNum=pa.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pa.BillingType AND def.Category=4 AND def.ItemName LIKE @BillingType INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @MedicaidCarrierName WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,(CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN cp.ProcDate ELSE cp.DateCP END) AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient pa ON cp.PatNum=pa.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pa.BillingType AND def.ItemName LIKE @BillingType WHERE (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN (cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) ELSE (cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) END) AND (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN (cp.Status IN(1,4,0)) ELSE (cp.Status IN(1,4)) END) ) Trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY Trans.TransDate ORDER BY Trans.TransDate;

request: Email and home address of active patients without insurance
query: SELECT p.Guarantor,p.LName,p.FName,p.Email,p.Address,p.Address2,p.City,p.State,p.Zip FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor WHERE p.PatNum NOT IN(SELECT PatNum FROM patplan) AND p.PatStatus=0 ORDER BY g.LName,g.FName,p.LName,p.FName

request: Problem breakdown by age.  Shows total number of patients with problem, and percentages of under 21, as well as 21 and over.
query: SET @ProblemList = 'ADHD,Asthma,Diabetes,Depression,Autistic,Hearing impaired,Vision impaired,Autism,Developmental Delay'; SELECT dd.DiseaseName, SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) < 21 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Under21, SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) >= 21 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) < 180 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 21andOver, SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) > 180 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NoAge, COUNT(*) AS TotalCountPatWithCondition, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) < 21 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2),2),'%') AS 'Under21%', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) >= 21 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) < 180 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2),2),'%') AS '21andOver%', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) > 180 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2),2),'%') AS 'NoAge%' FROM patient p INNER JOIN disease d ON p.PatNum=d.PatNum AND p.PatStatus=0 INNER JOIN diseasedef dd ON d.DiseaseDefNum=dd.DiseaseDefNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProblemList)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(dd.DiseaseName, @ProblemList)) GROUP BY dd.DiseaseName ORDER BY dd.DiseaseName

request: Custom Daysheet report. Shows Fees, payments, and adjustments by provider with subtotals, grand totals, payment type breakdowns, and Current/MTD/YTD/PrevMonth info.
query: SET @DaySheetDate = '2019-05-08'; SET @Providers=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pr.ProvNum) FROM provider pr WHERE FIND_IN_SET(REPLACE(pr.Abbr,', ',','),@Providers) INTO @Providers; SELECT '' AS Provider, '' AS Patient, '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, CONCAT('Daysheet ran for ', DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%m/%d/%Y')) AS Descr, '' AS ProcCode, '' AS Fee, '' AS Payment, '' AS Adj, '' AS Wrteoffs UNION ALL SELECT '' AS Provider, '' AS Patient, '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS Descr, '' AS ProcCode, '' AS Fee, '' AS Payment, '' AS Adj, '' AS Wrteoffs UNION ALL SELECT b.Provider, b.PatientName, b.ToothNum, b.Surf, b.Descr, b.ProcCode, b.Fee, b.Payment, b.Adj, b.Writeoffs FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN InternalOrder != 1 THEN '' ELSE a.Provider END) AS 'Provider', a.PatientName, a.ToothNum, a.Surf, LEFT(a.request, 30) AS 'Descr', a.ProcCode, a.Fee, a.Payment, a.Adj, a.Writeoffs FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, 1 AS InternalOrder, result.Provider AS 'Provider', result.PatNum, result.PatName AS 'PatientName', result.ToothNum, result.Surf, COALESCE(result.request, 'NoPayType') AS 'request', DATE_FORMAT(result.Date, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', result.ProcCode, FORMAT(result.Fee, 2) AS 'Fee', FORMAT(result.PtInc+result.InsInc, 2) AS 'Payment', FORMAT(result.Adj, 2) AS 'Adj', FORMAT(result.InsW, 2) AS 'Writeoffs' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName, ', '), p.FName), ' '), p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', pc.Descript AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff, 0)), 0) AS 'Fee', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode, 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.ProvNum, @Providers)) LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate = @DaySheetDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', adjtype.ItemName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', '' AS 'ToothNum', '' AS 'Surf', '' AS 'ProcCode', adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum = adj.AdjType INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = adj.ProvNum AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.ProvNum, @Providers)) WHERE adj.AdjDate = @DaySheetDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', CONCAT(pc.AbbrDesc, ' ', car.CarrierName) AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode, 0 AS 'Adj', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1, 4) AND cp.WriteOff > 0.0001 AND cp.DateCP = @DaySheetDate AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @Providers)) GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', paytype.ItemName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', '' AS 'ToothNum', '' AS 'Surf', '' AS 'ProcCode', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType = paytype.DefNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum WHERE pay.PayDate = @DaySheetDate AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @Providers)) GROUP BY ps.PatNum, ps.ProvNum, ps.ClinicNum, PayType, ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', car.CarrierName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', '' AS 'ToothNum', '' AS 'Surf', '' AS 'ProcCode', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1, 4) AND claimpay.CheckDate = @DaySheetDate AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @Providers)) GROUP BY cp.PatNum, cp.ProvNum, cp.PlanNum, cp.ClinicNum, claimpay.CheckDate ) result UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder', 2 AS 'InternalOrder', result.Provider AS 'Provider', '', '' AS 'Patient Name', '', '', '', '' AS 'Date', '', '' AS 'Fee', '' AS 'Payment', '' AS 'Adj', '' AS 'Writeoffs' FROM ( SELECT DATE(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', pc.Descript AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff, 0)), 0) AS 'Fee', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode, 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.ProvNum, @Providers)) LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate = @DaySheetDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', adjtype.ItemName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', '' AS 'ToothNum', '' AS 'Surf', '' AS 'ProcCode', adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum = adj.AdjType INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = adj.ProvNum AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.ProvNum, @Providers)) WHERE adj.AdjDate = @DaySheetDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', CONCAT(pc.AbbrDesc, ' ', car.CarrierName) AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode, 0 AS 'Adj', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1, 4) AND cp.WriteOff > 0.0001 AND cp.DateCP = @DaySheetDate AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @Providers)) GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', paytype.ItemName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', '' AS 'ToothNum', '' AS 'Surf', '' AS 'ProcCode', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType = paytype.DefNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum WHERE pay.PayDate = @DaySheetDate AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @Providers)) GROUP BY ps.PatNum, ps.ProvNum, ps.ClinicNum, PayType, ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', car.CarrierName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', '' AS 'ToothNum', '' AS 'Surf', '' AS 'ProcCode', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1, 4) AND claimpay.CheckDate = @DaySheetDate AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @Providers)) GROUP BY cp.PatNum, cp.ProvNum, cp.PlanNum, cp.ClinicNum, claimpay.CheckDate ) result GROUP BY result.Provider UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder', 3 AS 'InternalOrder', result.Provider AS 'Provider', CONCAT('Total Records: ', COUNT(result.Provider)), '' AS 'Patient Name', '' AS 'ToothNum', '' AS 'Surf', '' AS 'ProcCode', '' AS 'Date', 'Subtotal:', FORMAT(SUM(result.Fee), 2) AS 'Fee', FORMAT(SUM(result.PtInc)+SUM(result.InsInc), 2) AS 'Payment', FORMAT(SUM(result.Adj), 2) AS 'Adj', FORMAT(SUM(result.InsW), 2) AS 'Writeoffs' FROM ( SELECT DATE(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', pc.Descript AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff, 0)), 0) AS 'Fee', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode, 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.ProvNum, @Providers)) LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate = @DaySheetDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date', p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', adjtype.ItemName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', '' AS 'ToothNum', '' AS 'Surf', '' AS 'ProcCode', adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum = pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ("D9986","D9987") WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum )newpats INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = newpats.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate = newpats.FirstVisit AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @Providers)) INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ("D9986","D9987") GROUP BY newpats.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder, 'Patients Seen:' AS TranType, pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.PatNum AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ("D9986","D9987") WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01')) - INTERVAL 1 MONTH AND DATE(@DaySheetDate) AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @Providers)) ) rawtrans WHERE TranDate >= DATE(DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01')) - INTERVAL 1 MONTH GROUP BY rawtrans.TranType ORDER BY ItemOrder, TranType )q

request: All patients with values for a specified patient field def name and their last communication log and task information
query: SET @FieldName='%%'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS ' FROM ( SELECT pf.PatNum AS 'Pat CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', pf.FieldName AS 'PatFieldName', pf.FieldValue AS 'PatFieldValue', DATE_FORMAT(cl.CommDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'LastCommLogDateTime', cltype.ItemName AS 'LastCommLogType', cl.Note AS 'LastCommLogNote', DATE_FORMAT(t.DateTask,'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'LastTaskDateTime', t.Descript AS 'LastTaskrequest' FROM patfield pf INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pf.PatNum LEFT JOIN commlog cl ON cl.PatNum=pf.PatNum AND (SELECT CommDateTime FROM commlog WHERE PatNum=pf.PatNum ORDER BY CommDateTime DESC LIMIT 1)=cl.CommDateTime LEFT JOIN definition cltype ON cltype.DefNum=cl.CommType LEFT JOIN task t ON t.KeyNum=pf.PatNum AND (SELECT DateTask FROM task WHERE KeyNum=pf.PatNum ORDER BY DateTask DESC LIMIT 1)=t.DateTask WHERE pf.FieldName LIKE @FieldName ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName,pf.FieldName ) A

request: Total production and insurance payments for completed procedures in date range
query: SET @StartDate='2019-06-01', @EndDate='2019-06-01'; SET @ProcCode='%%'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SELECT pl.ProcDate, prov.Abbr AS 'Prov', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', prov.FeeSched, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS $Fee_, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,5,7) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum),0) AS $WriteOff_, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(a.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND a.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum),0) AS $Adj_, (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))-COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS WriteOff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,5,7) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum),0)+COALESCE((SELECT SUM(a.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND a.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum),0) AS $TotProd_, ( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN cp.Status=0 THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE cp.InsPayAmt END)) AS InsPayAmt FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,5,7) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ) AS $InsPayAmt_ FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate ORDER BY pl.ProcDate, prov.Abbr, p.LName, p.FName, pc.ProcCode

request: Production, Total Production, and Patient Payments, broken down by Patient and Date of Service within a date range. With Aging of account and next appointment information
query: SET @FromDate='2014-09-01', @ToDate='2014-09-16', @AgingDate=CURDATE(); SELECT Tbl.PatNum AS 'Pat CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', Tbl.ServiceDate AS 'DateService', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(Tbl.DateClaimSent),'') AS 'DateClaimSent', CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Prod),0)=0 THEN '' ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Prod),0),2),2) END AS 'Production', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(Tbl.ProcCodes),'') AS 'Procedures', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(Tbl.DatePatPay),'') AS 'DatePatPay', CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Prod),0)+COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Adj),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.WriteOff),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsPayAmt),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsPayEst),0)=0 THEN '' ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Prod),0)+COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Adj),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.WriteOff),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsPayAmt),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsPayEst),0),2),2) END AS 'PatPortion', CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.PatPayAmt),0)=0 THEN '' ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.PatPayAmt),0),2),2) END AS 'PatPayAmt', CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Prod),0)+COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Adj),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.WriteOff),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsPayAmt),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsPayEst),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.PatPayAmt),0)=0 THEN '' ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Prod),0)+COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.Adj),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.WriteOff),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsPayAmt),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.InsPayEst),0)-COALESCE(MAX(Tbl.PatPayAmt),0),2),2) END AS 'PatPort - PatPayAmt', COALESCE((CASE WHEN Aging.0to30=0.00 THEN '' ELSE Aging.0to30 END),'') AS 'Balance 0-30 Days', COALESCE((CASE WHEN Aging.31to60=0.00 THEN '' ELSE Aging.31to60 END),'') AS '31-60 Days', COALESCE((CASE WHEN Aging.61to90=0.00 THEN '' ELSE Aging.61to90 END),'') AS '61-90 Days', COALESCE((CASE WHEN Aging.Over90=0.00 THEN '' ELSE Aging.Over90 END),'') AS 'Over 90 Days', COALESCE(Aging.Total,'0.00') AS 'Total Balance', DATE_FORMAT(apts.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS NextSchedAptDate, apts.UserName AS UserCreateNextApt, apts.Procs AS NextSchedAptProcs FROM( SELECT adj.PatNum,adj.AdjDate AS ServiceDate,NULL AS DateClaimSent,NULL AS Prod,NULL AS ProcCodes, NULL AS DatePatPay,NULL AS PatPayAmt,NULL AS InsPayAmt,NULL AS InsPayEst,SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS Adj,NULL AS WriteOff FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY adj.PatNum,adj.AdjDate UNION ALL SELECT pay.PatNum,pay.PayDate AS ServiceDate,NULL AS DateClaimSent,NULL AS Prod,NULL AS ProcCodes, pay.PayDate AS DatePatPay,SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS PatPayAmt,NULL AS InsPayAmt,NULL AS InsPayEst,NULL AS Adj,NULL AS WriteOff FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pay.PatNum,pay.PayDate UNION ALL SELECT procs.PatNum,procs.ProcDate AS ServiceDate,COALESCE(claims.DateSent,'') AS DateClaimSent,procs.FeesForDate AS Prod, procs.ProcCodes,NULL AS DatePatPay,NULL AS PatPayAmt,COALESCE(claims.InsPayAmt,0) AS InsPayAmt, COALESCE(claims.InsPayEst,0) AS InsPayEst,NULL AS Adj,COALESCE(claims.WriteOff,0) AS WriteOff FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,SUM(pl.ProcFee) AS FeesForDate,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ', ') AS ProcCodes FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode!='~GRP~' WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate ) procs LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status IN(1,4) THEN cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) AS InsPayAmt, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status=0 THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS InsPayEst, COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN c.DateSent='0001-01-01' THEN 'Not Sent' ELSE c.DateSent END) ORDER BY c.DateSent),'') AS DateSent, COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),'') AS WriteOff FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claim c ON c.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum WHERE cp.Status IN(0,1,4) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) claims ON claims.PatNum=procs.PatNum AND claims.ProcDate=procs.ProcDate GROUP BY procs.PatNum,procs.ProcDate ) Tbl LEFT JOIN patient p ON Tbl.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT D.PatNum AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AgingDate AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingDate-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingDate-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingDate-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingDate-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingDate-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingDate-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AgingDate) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AgingDate GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 )Aging ON Aging.Guarantor=p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.PatNum, a.AptDateTime, usr.UserName,GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ', ') AS Procs FROM appointment a INNER JOIN ( SELECT apt.PatNum,MIN(apt.AptDateTime) AS NextSchedApt FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus=1 AND apt.AptDateTime>CURDATE() GROUP BY apt.PatNum ) nextapt ON nextapt.PatNum=a.PatNum AND nextapt.NextSchedApt=a.AptDateTime LEFT JOIN securitylog sl ON sl. FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.PermType=25 LEFT JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum=sl.UserNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE a.AptStatus=1 AND a.AptDateTime>CURDATE() GROUP BY a.AptNum ) apts ON apts.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY Tbl.PatNum,Tbl.ServiceDate ORDER BY Tbl.ServiceDate,Tbl.PatNum

request: Procedure code totals by ProcCode and provider for completed procedures with completion date in date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-11-01', @ToDate='2020-11-04'; SELECT ( SELECT Abbr FROM provider WHERE ProvNum = A.ProvNum ) AS 'Provider', A.ProcCode, COUNT(A.ProcCode) AS 'Quantity', SUM(A.ProcFee) AS $ProcFee_, SUM(A.WriteOffs) AS $WriteOffs_, SUM(A.Adjustments) AS $Adjustments_, SUM(A.NetProd) AS $NetProd_ FROM ( SELECT pl.ProvNum, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(cp.CapWriteoff,0) AS 'ProcFee', COALESCE(cp.WriteOffs,0) AS 'WriteOffs', SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt,0)) AS 'Adjustments', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) +SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt,0)) -COALESCE(cp.CapWriteoff,0) -COALESCE(cp.WriteOffs,0) AS 'NetProd' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(IF(cp.Status = 7, cp.Writeoff, 0)) AS 'CapWriteoff', SUM(IF(cp.Status IN (1,4), cp.WriteOff, 0)) AS WriteOffs, cp.ProcNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,7) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.ProcNum != 0 GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) A GROUP BY A.ProvNum, A.ProcCode ORDER BY A.ProvNum, A.ProcCode

request: Completed procedures with date of completion in date range showing production, writeoffs, adjustments, and net production.
query: SET @FromDate = '2020-01-10', @ToDate = '2020-01-10'; SET @Provider = '%%'; SELECT provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', CONCAT(patient.LName, ', ', patient.FName, ' ', patient.MiddleI) AS 'Patient Name', pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) -IFNULL(COALESCE(cp.CapWriteoff, 0), 0) AS '$ProcFee_', COALESCE(cp.WriteOffs, 0) AS '$WriteOffs_', COALESCE(SUM(adj.AdjAmt), 0) AS '$Adjustments_', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(COALESCE(cp.CapWriteoff,0),0) -COALESCE(cp.WriteOffs, 0) +COALESCE(SUM(adj.AdjAmt), 0) AS '$NetProd_', pl.DateEntryC AS 'DateCompletedProcedure' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(IF(cp.Status = 7, cp.Writeoff, 0)) AS 'CapWriteoff', SUM(IF(cp.Status IN (1,4), cp.WriteOff, 0)) AS WriteOffs, cp.ProcNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,7) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.ProcNum != 0 GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr LIKE @Provider LEFT JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.DateEntryC BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY provider.ProvNum, patient.LName, patient.FName, pc.ProcCode

request: List of appointments in date range showing user that created appointment and when the appointment was created
query: SET @FromDate='2013-12-03' , @ToDate='2014-12-03'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%W') AS 'Day', DATE(a.AptDateTime)AS 'DateApt', p.PatNum, (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) AS 'Age', DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%h:%i %p') AS 'TimeApt', a.AptStatus, FORMAT(LENGTH(a.Pattern)*5,0) AS 'Length', a.ProcDescript, CONCAT(" ", LEFT(HmPhone,13), "- ", LEFT(WkPhone,13), "- ",LEFT(WirelessPhone,13)) AS 'Phone Hm-Wk-Cell', usr.UserName, DATE_FORMAT(sl.LogDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'DateApptCreated' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.PermType=25 LEFT JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum=sl.UserNum WHERE (DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName;

request: Patients who had their first appointment in date range with first appointment gross and net production/income
query: SET @AsOf='2018-01-01'; SELECT C.DateFirstApt, C.Patient, C.ReferralSource, C.Zip, C.FeeSchedule, C.1stVisitTotProd AS '$1stVisitTotProd_', C.1stVisitTotAdj AS '$1stVisitTotAdj_', C.1stVisitTotWriteOffs AS '$1stVisitTotWriteOffs_', C.1stVisitNetProd AS '$1stVisitNetProd_', (CASE WHEN ps.PayDate=C.DateFirstApt THEN ps.PayAmt ELSE 0 END) AS '$1stVisitTotPtInc_', C.1stVisitTotInsInc AS '$1stVisitTotInsInc_', (CASE WHEN ps.PayDate=C.DateFirstApt THEN ps.PayAmt ELSE 0 END)+C.1stVisitTotInsInc AS '$1stVisitTotInc_', C.CompTotProd AS '$CompTotProd_', C.CompTotAdj AS '$CompTotAdj_', C.CompTotWriteOffs AS '$CompTotWriteOffs_', C.CompNetProd AS '$CompNetProd_', SUM(COALESCE(ps.PayAmt,0)) AS '$CompTotPtInc_', C.CompTotInsInc AS '$CompTotInsInc_', SUM(COALESCE(ps.PayAmt,0))+C.CompTotInsInc AS '$CompTotInc_', C.TpTotProd AS '$TpTotProd_', C.TpWriteOffEst AS '$TpWriteOffEst_', C.TpNetProd AS '$TpNetProd_', C.DateLastSentPreAuth,
