C.DateLastRecPreAuth, C.NumOfApts AS ' C.NetProdAfterFirstVisit, C.DateLastApt, C.DateNextApt FROM( SELECT B.DateFirstApt,B.Patient,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.LName,', ',r.FName SEPARATOR ' | ') AS 'ReferralSource',B.Zip,B.FeeSchedule, B.1stVisitTotProd,B.1stVisitTotAdj,B.1stVisitTotWriteOffs,B.1stVisitNetProd,B.1stVisitTotInsInc,B.CompTotProd,B.CompTotAdj,B.CompTotWriteOffs, B.CompNetProd,B.CompTotInsInc,B.TpTotProd,B.TpWriteOffEst,B.TpNetProd,B.DateLastSentPreAuth,B.DateLastRecPreAuth,B.NumOfApts, B.CompNetProd-B.1stVisitNetProd AS 'NetProdAfterFirstVisit', B.DateLastApt,B.DateNextApt,B.LName,B.FName,B.PatNum FROM( SELECT A.1stVisitTotAdj+SUM((CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate=A.DateFirstApt THEN COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt,0) ELSE 0 END)) AS 1stVisitTotAdj, A.1stVisitNetProd+COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate=A.DateFirstApt THEN adj.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END)),0) AS 1stVisitNetProd, A.CompTotAdj+SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt,0)) AS CompTotAdj, A.CompNetProd+SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt,0)) AS CompNetProd, A.PatNum,A.Zip,A.DateFirstApt,A.Patient,A.FeeSchedule,A.TpTotProd,A.TpWriteOffEst,A.TpNetProd,A.DateLastRecPreAuth,A.DateLastSentPreAuth, A.NumOfApts,A.DateNextApt,A.DateLastApt,A.1stVisitTotProd,A.1stVisitTotWriteOffs,A.CompTotProd,A.CompTotWriteOffs, A.LName,A.FName,A.1stVisitTotInsInc,A.CompTotInsInc FROM( SELECT p.PatNum,p.Zip,apts.DateFirstApt,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient',p.LName,p.FName, IFNULL(fs.request,IFNULL((SELECT fs1.request FROM feesched fs1 WHERE fs1.FeeSchedNum=p.FeeSched), (SELECT fs2.request FROM feesched fs2,provider WHERE p.PriProv=provider.ProvNum AND fs2.FeeSchedNum=provider.FeeSched))) AS FeeSchedule, COALESCE(tp.GrossProd,0) AS 'TpTotProd', COALESCE(tp.WriteOff,0) AS 'TpWriteOffEst', COALESCE(tp.GrossProd,0)-COALESCE(tp.WriteOff,0) AS 'TpNetProd', COALESCE(lastPA.DateLastSentPreAuth,'') AS 'DateLastSentPreAuth',COALESCE(lastPA.DateLastRecPreAuth,'') AS 'DateLastRecPreAuth', COALESCE(apts.CountApts,0) AS 'NumOfApts', COALESCE(nextapt.DateNextApt,'') AS 'DateNextApt', COALESCE(apts.DateLastApt,'') AS 'DateLastApt', (CASE WHEN trans.ProcDate=apts.DateFirstApt THEN COALESCE(trans.GrossProd,0) ELSE 0 END) AS '1stVisitTotProd', (CASE WHEN trans.ProcDate=apts.DateFirstApt THEN COALESCE(trans.AdjAmt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS '1stVisitTotAdj', (CASE WHEN trans.ProcDate=apts.DateFirstApt THEN COALESCE(trans.WriteOff,0) ELSE 0 END) AS '1stVisitTotWriteOffs', (CASE WHEN trans.ProcDate=apts.DateFirstApt THEN COALESCE(trans.GrossProd,0)+COALESCE(trans.AdjAmt,0)-COALESCE(trans.WriteOff,0) ELSE 0 END) AS '1stVisitNetProd', (CASE WHEN trans.ProcDate=apts.DateFirstApt THEN COALESCE(trans.InsPayAmt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS '1stVisitTotInsInc', SUM(COALESCE(trans.GrossProd,0)) AS 'CompTotProd', SUM(COALESCE(trans.AdjAmt,0)) AS 'CompTotAdj', SUM(COALESCE(trans.WriteOff,0)) AS 'CompTotWriteOffs', SUM(COALESCE(trans.GrossProd,0)+COALESCE(trans.AdjAmt,0)-COALESCE(trans.WriteOff,0)) AS 'CompNetProd', SUM(COALESCE(trans.InsPayAmt,0)) AS 'CompTotInsInc' FROM patient p INNER JOIN( SELECT COUNT(a.AptNum) AS 'CountApts',MAX(DATE(a.AptDateTime)) AS 'DateLastApt',MIN(DATE(a.AptDateTime)) AS 'DateFirstApt',a.PatNum FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY a.PatNum HAVING MIN(DATE(a.AptDateTime))>@AsOf ) apts ON apts.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS GrossProd,SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt,0)) AS AdjAmt,SUM(COALESCE(wo.WriteOff,0)) AS WriteOff, pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,ins.InsPayAmt FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT adj.ProcNum,SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt,0)) AS AdjAmt FROM adjustment adj GROUP BY adj.ProcNum ) adj ON pl.ProcNum=adj.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum,SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff,0)) AS WriteOff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,0) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) wo ON wo.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum,SUM(COALESCE(cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS InsPayAmt FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,0) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) ins ON ins.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate ) trans ON trans.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT MIN(DATE(a.AptDateTime)) AS 'DateNextApt',a.PatNum FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus=1 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime)>=CURDATE() GROUP BY a.PatNum ) nextapt ON nextapt.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT pl.PatNum,SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS GrossProd,SUM(COALESCE(wo.WriteOff,0)) AS WriteOff,SUM(COALESCE(ip.InsPayEst)) AS InsPayEst FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D2000' AND 'D9999' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum,SUM((CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride>0 THEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN cp.WriteOffEst>0 THEN cp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END)) AS WriteOff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status=6 GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) wo ON wo.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS InsPayEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status=6 GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) ip ON ip.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=1 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) tp ON tp.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT MAX(DATE_FORMAT(cl.DateReceived,'%Y-%m-%d')) AS 'DateLastRecPreAuth',MAX(DATE_FORMAT(cl.DateSent,'%Y-%m-%d')) AS 'DateLastSentPreAuth', pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=2 INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimStatus IN ('R','S') AND cl.ClaimType='PreAuth' GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) lastPA ON lastPA.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub iss ON iss.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum LEFT JOIN feesched fs ON ip.FeeSched=fs.FeeSchedNum GROUP BY p.PatNum )A LEFT JOIN( SELECT SUM(a.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt,a.AdjDate,a.PatNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.ProcNum=0 AND a.AdjDate>=@AsOf GROUP BY a.PatNum,a.AdjDate ) adj ON adj.PatNum=A.PatNum GROUP BY A.PatNum )B LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=B.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 LEFT JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum GROUP BY B.PatNum )C LEFT JOIN( SELECT ps.PatNum,SUM(COALESCE(ps.SplitAmt,0)) AS PayAmt,ps.DatePay AS PayDate FROM paysplit ps GROUP BY ps.PatNum,ps.DatePay )ps ON ps.PatNum=C.PatNum GROUP BY C.PatNum ORDER BY C.LName,C.FName

request: Recall info for patients due in date range that don't have any future scheduled appointment.  Only shows patients with any insurance carrier, showing date of last visit
query: SET @StartDate='2022-01-01' , @EndDate='2022-01-01'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count' ,p.LName ,p.FName ,r.DateDue ,d.ItemName AS 'RecallStatus' ,rt.request AS 'Type' ,( SELECT CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ProcDate),'%m/%d/%Y'), CHAR) FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum=patient.PatNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND patient.PatStatus=0 AND p.PatNum=patient.PatNum GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum ) AS 'LastVisit(any)', c.CarrierName FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN recall r ON p.PatNum=r.PatNum INNER JOIN recalltype rt ON rt.RecallTypeNum=r.RecallTypeNum LEFT JOIN definition d ON r.RecallStatus=d.DefNum WHERE (DateDue BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT a.PatNum FROM appointment a WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime)>=CURDATE() AND a.AptStatus=1 AND a.PatNum=p.PatNum ) ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName;

request: Gross production, count of procedures, and count of visits for specified providers.  If two providers have the same name they will be shown on one row.
query: SET @StartDate='2014-11-20', @EndDate='2014-11-20'; SET @ProvAbbrs=''; SELECT CONCAT(prov.LName,', ',prov.FName) AS 'Provider Name', GROUP_CONCAT(prov.Abbr ORDER BY prov.Abbr SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'Provider Abbrs', SUM(COALESCE(apt.CountApts,0)) AS CountVisits, SUM(COALESCE(procs.CountProcs,0)) AS CountProcs, SUM(COALESCE(gp.GrossProd,0)) AS $GrossProd_, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN prov.IsSecondary=0 THEN 'Dentist' ELSE 'Hygenist' END) ORDER BY prov.IsSecondary DESC) AS 'ProvType' FROM provider prov LEFT JOIN( SELECT A.ProvNum,COUNT(DISTINCT A.AptNum) AS CountApts FROM( SELECT apt.AptNum,apt.ProvNum FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT apt.AptNum,apt.ProvHyg FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus=2 )A GROUP BY A.ProvNum )apt ON apt.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT pl.ProvNum, COUNT(pl.ProcNum) AS CountProcs FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProvNum )procs ON procs.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT pl.ProvNum,SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))-COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS GrossProd FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pl.ProvNum )gp ON gp.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE prov.Abbr REGEXP IF(@ProvAbbrs='', '.*',@ProvAbbrs) GROUP BY prov.LName, prov.FName ORDER BY ProvType, prov.LName, prov.FName

request: Daily production and income report with writeoffs by procedure date.  Also shows number of unique patient visits and average net production per unique patient.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-04-01', @ToDate='2014-05-01'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(result.Date,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', result.Provider AS 'Prov', SUM(result.Fee) AS '$Production_', SUM(result.Adj) AS '$Adjust_', SUM(result.InsW) AS '$Writeoff_', SUM(result.Fee)+SUM(result.Adj)+SUM(result.InsW) AS '$NetProd_', SUM(result.CountPats) AS 'NumberOfPatsSeen', COALESCE((SUM(result.Fee)+SUM(result.Adj)+SUM(result.InsW))/SUM(result.CountPats),0) AS '$AvgNetProdPerPat_', SUM(result.PtInc) AS '$Pt Income_', SUM(result.InsInc) AS '$Ins Income_' FROM ( SELECT DATE(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'CountPats', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status='7' WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'CountPats', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=adj.ProvNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.ProcDate AS 'Date', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'CountPats', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4 OR cp.Status=0) AND cp.WriteOff > '.0001' AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'CountPats', SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType=paytype.DefNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=ps.ProvNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum,ps.ProvNum,ps.ClinicNum,PayType,ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'CountPats', 0 AS 'PtInc', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum,cp.PlanNum,cp.ClinicNum,claimpay.CheckDate UNION ALL SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS 'CountPats', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcDate,prov.Abbr ) result GROUP BY result.Date,result.Provider ORDER BY result.Date,result.Provider

request: Daily payments grouped by payment type and pay date with subtotals and grand total
query: SET @StartDate='2012-01-01', @EndDate='2015-01-03'; SELECT (CASE WHEN InternalOrder IN(2,4,5) AND ItemOrder=2 THEN '' ELSE A.PayDate END) AS 'Pay Date',A.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type',A.$PaymentAmt_ AS 'PaymentAmt' FROM( SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,1 AS InternalOrder,DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y')AS PayDate,CONCAT('Insurance Payment - ',d.ItemName) AS PaymentType,FORMAT(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),2) AS '$PaymentAmt_' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cpy.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=cpy.PayType WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) GROUP BY cpy.PayType,cp.DateCP UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,3 AS InternalOrder,DATE_FORMAT(ps.DatePay,'%m/%d/%Y') AS PayDate,CONCAT('Patient Payment - ',d.ItemName) AS PaymentType,FORMAT(SUM(ps.SplitAmt),2) AS '$PaymentAmt_' FROM payment pm INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=pm.PayType INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.PayNum=pm.PayNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pm.PayType,ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,2 AS InternalOrder,DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y')AS PayDate,'Insurance Subtotal:' AS PaymentType,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),2),2) AS '$PaymentAmt_' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cpy.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) GROUP BY cp.DateCP UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,4 AS InternalOrder,DATE_FORMAT(ps.DatePay,'%m/%d/%Y') AS PayDate,'Patient Subtotal:' AS PaymentType,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(ps.SplitAmt),2),2) AS '$PaymentAmt_' FROM payment pm INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=pm.PayType INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.PayNum=pm.PayNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,5 AS InternalOrder,Q.PayDate AS PayDate,'' AS PaymentType,'' AS '$PaymentAmt_' FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y')AS PayDate FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cpy.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=cpy.PayType WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) GROUP BY cpy.PayType,cp.DateCP UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ps.DatePay,'%m/%d/%Y') AS PayDate FROM payment pm INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=pm.PayType INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.PayNum=pm.PayNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pm.PayType,ps.DatePay )Q GROUP BY Q.PayDate UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,1 AS InternalOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,1 AS InternalOrder,'Date Range:' AS PayDate,CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@StartDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT(@EndDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS PaymentType,'' AS '$PaymentAmt_' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder,1 AS InternalOrder,'Ins Total:' AS PayDate,'' AS PaymentType,B.PaymentAmt AS '$PaymentAmt_' FROM( SELECT FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),2),2) AS 'PaymentAmt' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cpy.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) )B UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder,2 AS InternalOrder,'Pat Total:' AS PayDate,'' AS PaymentType,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(ps.SplitAmt),2),2) AS '$PaymentAmt_' FROM payment pm INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=pm.PayType INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.PayNum=pm.PayNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder,1 AS InternalOrder,'Grand Total:' AS PayDate,'' AS PaymentType,B.PaymentAmt AS '$PaymentAmt_' FROM( SELECT FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt)+C.PayAmt,2),2) AS 'PaymentAmt' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cpy.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PayAmt' FROM payment pm INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=pm.PayType INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.PayNum=pm.PayNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate )C WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) )B ) A ORDER BY A.ItemOrder,A.PayDate,InternalOrder,A.PaymentType

request: Special daily report. Shows patients seen and reappointments by provider.  Also shows procedures completed and total hygiene production
query: SET @StartDate=CURDATE()-INTERVAL 1 DAY; SET @EndDate=CURDATE()-INTERVAL 1 DAY; SET @ProvAbbr = ''; SET @ProvAbbr=(CASE WHEN @ProvAbbr='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProvAbbr,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT 'Provider:' AS Column1,'PatsSeen:' AS Column2,'PatsReappted:' AS Column3,'Reappted%:' AS Column4 UNION ALL SELECT prov.Abbr AS Provider, COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS CountPatsSeen, COUNT(DISTINCT apcreate.PatNum) AS CountPatsReappointed, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT apcreate.PatNum)/COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum)*100,2),2),'%') AS ReappointmentPercent FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr REGEXP @ProvAbbr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sl.PatNum,DATE(sl.LogDateTime) AS LogDate FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.PermType=25 AND DATE(sl.LogDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY sl.PatNum,DATE(sl.LogDateTime) )apcreate ON apcreate.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND apcreate.LogDate=pl.ProcDate WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY prov.Abbr UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Provider:','Patient:','ProcCode:','IsRarelyUsedCode:' UNION ALL SELECT prov.Abbr AS Provider, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient, pc.ProcCode, (CASE WHEN def.ItemName LIKE '%Rarely Used%' THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS IsRarelyUsedCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr REGEXP @ProvAbbr INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pc.ProcCat INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Total D4XXX Gross Prod:', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee),0),2),2) AS TotalD4XXXProd,'','' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode LIKE 'D4%' WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Total Hyg Gross Prod:', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee),0),2),2) AS TotalHygGrossProd,'','' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.IsHygiene=1 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate

request: Referred Procedure information.  Like Internal.
query: SET @StartDate='2012-10-01', @EndDate='2015-12-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient,CONCAT(r.LName,', ',r.FName,' ',r.MName) AS 'Referred To', (CASE WHEN pc.LaymanTerm!='' THEN pc.LaymanTerm ELSE pc.Descript END) AS request,ra.Note,ra.RefDate, (CASE WHEN ra.DateProcComplete<'1880-01-01' THEN 'Not Entered' ELSE ra.DateProcComplete END) AS 'DateDone', (CASE ra.RefToStatus WHEN 0 THEN 'None' WHEN 1 THEN 'Declined' WHEN 2 THEN 'Scheduled' WHEN 3 THEN 'Consulted' WHEN 4 THEN 'InTreatment' ELSE 'Complete' END) AS 'Status' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON pl.ProcNum=ra.ProcNum LEFT JOIN referral r ON ra.ReferralNum=r.ReferralNum WHERE ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate

request: List of procedures not billed to insurance  by specific provider.  Like internal Not Billed to Insurance report.
query: SET @StartDate='2014-10-10',@EndDate='2015-01-24'; SET @ProviderName='%%'; SELECT CONCAT(p.PatNum,'-',p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatientName',pl.ProcDate,pc.Descript,pl.ProcFee FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcFee>0 AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr LIKE @ProviderName INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.NoBillIns=0 AND cp.Status=6 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum AND ip.IsMedical=0 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName

request: List of patients with first visits in the date range.
query: SET @StartDate='2018-01-01', @EndDate='2018-01-25'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS RunningCount, A.* FROM( SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)),0.00),2),2) AS AptCompletedProd,COALESCE(pltp.SchedProd,0.00) AS ProdTP, pr.Abbr AS AptPriProv,prhyg.Abbr AS AptSecProv,COALESCE(pay.PayAmt,0.00) AS PayAmt,nextvisit.DateNextVisit,COALESCE(nextvisit.NextVisitProd,0.00) AS NextVisitProd FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus=2 AND a.AptDateTime=(SELECT MIN(apt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.PatNum=p.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus=2) AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(pltp.ProcFee),2),2) AS SchedProd,p.PatNum,pltp.DateTP FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pltp ON pltp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pltp.ProcStatus=1 AND pltp.DateTP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY p.PatNum,pltp.DateTP )pltp ON pltp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pltp.DateTP=DATE(a.AptDateTime) LEFT JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=a.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider prhyg ON prhyg.ProvNum=a.ProvHyg LEFT JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey=a.AptNum AND sl.PermType=25 LEFT JOIN userod ur ON ur.UserNum=sl.UserNum LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.ItemOrder=(SELECT MIN(rat.ItemOrder) FROM refattach rat WHERE rat.RefType = 1 AND p.PatNum=rat.PatNum) LEFT JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT ps.PatNum,ps.DatePay,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(ps.SplitAmt),2),2) AS PayAmt FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum,ps.DatePay )pay ON pay.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pay.DatePay=DATE(a.AptDateTime) LEFT JOIN( SELECT appt.PatNum,DATE(Q.DateNextVisit) AS DateNextVisit,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(plog.ProcFee),2),2) AS NextVisitProd FROM( SELECT a.PatNum,MIN(a.AptDateTime) AS DateNextVisit FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus=1 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime)>=@StartDate GROUP BY a.PatNum )Q INNER JOIN appointment appt ON appt.PatNum=Q.PatNum AND appt.AptDateTime=Q.DateNextVisit AND appt.AptStatus=1 INNER JOIN procedurelog plog ON plog.AptNum=appt.AptNum AND plog.ProcStatus=1 GROUP BY appt.AptNum )nextvisit ON nextvisit.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY DateFirstVisit,p.LName,p.FName )A

request: Treatment planned procedure report.  Shows count of TP'd procs in date range, the % of them that were completed, count of D1330 TP'd, and % of D1330 completed.
query: SET @StartDate='2015-02-11',@EndDate='2015-02-11'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS CountTP, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate THEN pl.PatNum ELSE NULL END))/COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum)*100,2),2),'%') AS PercentTpAndComp, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1330' THEN pl.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS CountD1330Tp, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pc.ProcCode='D1330' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate THEN pl.PatNum ELSE NULL END))/COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1330' THEN pl.PatNum ELSE NULL END))*100,2),2),'%') AS PercentD1330Comp, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode LIKE 'D7%' THEN pl.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS CountTpSurgCodes, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pc.ProcCode LIKE 'D7%' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate THEN pl.PatNum ELSE NULL END))/COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode LIKE 'D7%' THEN pl.PatNum ELSE NULL END))*100,2),2),'%') AS PercentCompSurgCodes FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.DateTP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2)

request: Special monthly breakdown report.  Shows the count of new patients, distinct patient visits, net production, income, and number of broken appointments per month for date range
query: SET @StartDate='2023-01-01',@EndDate='2023-09-20'; SELECT 'NewPatCount' AS 'Title' ,'' AS 'Value' UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT z.* FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE(firstApt.FirstVisit),'%M %Y') AS 'MONTH' ,COUNT(p.PatNum) AS 'Value' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT Q.PatNum ,Q.FirstVisit AS FirstVisit FROM( SELECT apt.PatNum ,MIN(apt.AptDateTime) AS FirstVisit FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus IN(1,2,4) GROUP BY apt.PatNum )Q WHERE DATE(Q.FirstVisit) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate ) firstApt ON firstApt.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(DATE(firstApt.FirstVisit),'%M %Y') ORDER BY YEAR(DATE(firstApt.FirstVisit)),MONTH(DATE(firstApt.FirstVisit)) )z UNION ALL SELECT '','' UNION ALL SELECT 'PatCount','' UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT z.* FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE(apt.AptDateTime),'%M %Y') AS MONTH ,COUNT(apt.AptNum) AS 'Value' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(DATE(apt.AptDateTime),'%M %Y') ORDER BY YEAR(DATE(apt.AptDateTime)),MONTH(DATE(apt.AptDateTime)) )z UNION ALL SELECT '','' UNION ALL SELECT 'NetProd','' UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT z.* FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(prod.Date,'%M %Y') AS MONTH ,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(prod.Fee) + SUM(prod.Adj) + SUM(prod.InsW),2),2) AS 'Value' FROM ( SELECT DATE(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date' ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) - IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'InsW' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = '7' WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Fee' ,adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'InsW' FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Fee' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,-SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW' FROM claimproc cp WHERE (cp.Status = 1 OR cp.Status = 4) AND cp.WriteOff > '.0001' AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum ) prod GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(prod.Date,'%M %Y') ORDER BY YEAR(prod.Date),MONTH(prod.Date) )z UNION ALL SELECT '','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Income','' UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT z.* FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(Pay.Date,'%M %Y') AS 'Month' ,CONCAT(Pay.PaymentType,': ',Pay.Amt) AS 'Value' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT('Ins-',definition.ItemName) AS 'PaymentType' ,claimproc.DateCP AS 'Date' ,FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),2) AS 'Amt' FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claimpayment ON claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum = claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition ON definition.DefNum = claimpayment.PayType WHERE (claimproc.Status = 1 OR claimproc.Status = 4) AND claimproc.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%M %Y'),definition.ItemName UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('Pat-',definition.ItemName) AS 'PaymentType' ,paysplit.DatePay AS 'Date' ,FORMAT(SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payment ON payment.PayNum = paysplit.PayNum INNER JOIN definition ON payment.PayType = definition.DefNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(paysplit.DatePay,'%M %Y'),definition.ItemName ) Pay ORDER BY YEAR(Pay.Date),MONTH(Pay.Date),Pay.PaymentType LIMIT 9999999999999999 )z UNION ALL SELECT '','' UNION ALL SELECT 'BrokenApptCount','' UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT Z.* FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE(apt.AptDateTime),'%M %Y') AS 'Month' ,COUNT(apt.AptNum) AS 'Value' FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 5 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(DATE(apt.AptDateTime),'%M %Y') ORDER BY YEAR(DATE(apt.AptDateTime)),MONTH(DATE(apt.AptDateTime)) )z

request: Special aging report.  Shows normal aging totals and breaks down insurance estimate and patient portion into aged columns.
query: SET @AsOf='2014-04-28'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS Title, E.0to30 AS '0-30 Days',E.31to60 AS '31-60 Days', E.61to90 AS '61-90 Days',E.Over90 AS '>90 Days',E.Total AS Total FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,'Balance Totals:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ),2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ),2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ),2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ),2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 AND ps.DatePay<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND a.AdjDate<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.DateCp<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 AND pp.PayPlanDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'PatPortion Totals:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(InsEst.InsEst0to30,0) ),2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(InsEst.InsEst31to60,0) ),2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(InsEst.InsEst61to90,0) ),2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(InsEst.InsEstOver90,0) ),2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(InsEst.InsEstBal,0)),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal, SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30, SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90, SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, 0 AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 AND ps.DatePay<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND a.AdjDate<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.DateCp<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 AND pp.PayPlanDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.Guarantor,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEstBal, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS InsEst0to30, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS InsEst31to60, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS InsEst61to90, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS InsEstOver90 FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY p.Guarantor ) InsEst ON InsEst.Guarantor=D.PatNum WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,'InsEst Totals:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(InsEst.InsEst0to30,0)),2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(InsEst.InsEst31to60,0)),2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(InsEst.InsEst61to90,0)),2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(InsEst.InsEstOver90,0)),2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(InsEst.InsEstBal,0)),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal, SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30, SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90, SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, 0 AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 AND ps.DatePay<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND a.AdjDate<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.DateCp<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 AND pp.PayPlanDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.Guarantor,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEstBal, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS InsEst0to30, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS InsEst31to60, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS InsEst61to90, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS InsEstOver90 FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY p.Guarantor ) InsEst ON InsEst.Guarantor=D.PatNum WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder;

request: Daily procedure report showing provider.  Like internal, grouped by procedure and provider.
query: SET @StartDate='2014-03-05',@EndDate='2015-03-05'; SELECT pr.Abbr AS Provider,def.ItemName AS Category, pc.ProcCode, pc.Descript AS request, COUNT(*) AS Quantity, FORMAT(ROUND(AVG(pl.ProcFee),2),2) AS AverageFee, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(pl.ProcFee),2),2) AS TotalFees FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pc.ProcCat INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pr.Abbr,pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pr.Abbr,def.ItemOrder,pc.ProcCode

request: Current balance for families with a credit amount, billing type, last visit date, and next visit date
query: SELECT aging.Guarantor AS 'Pat ,aging.Guarantor ,aging.Total AS '$TotalCreditBal_' ,def.ItemName AS 'BillingType' ,MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS 'DateLastVisit' ,MIN(DATE(nextappt.AptDateTime)) AS 'DateNextVisit' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum AS Guarantor ,g.LName ,g.FName ,g.BillingType ,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(B.PatBal),2),2) AS Total FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum ,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType ,pl.PatNum AS PatNum ,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate ,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount ,pl.ClinicNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType ,ps.PatNum AS PatNum ,ps.DatePay AS TranDate ,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount ,ps.ClinicNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType ,a.PatNum AS PatNum ,a.AdjDate AS TranDate ,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount ,a.ClinicNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType ,cp.PatNum AS PatNum ,cp.DateCp AS TranDate ,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount ,cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType ,pp.PatNum AS PatNum ,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate ,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount ,MAX(ppc.ClinicNum) AS ClinicNum FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=CURDATE() GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ( ( cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=CURDATE() ) OR ( cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>CURDATE() ) ) AND cp.ProcDate<=CURDATE() GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum HAVING SUM(B.PatBal)<-0.005 ) aging INNER JOIN patient p ON aging.Guarantor=p.Guarantor INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN appointment nextappt ON nextappt.PatNum=p.PatNum AND nextappt.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND nextappt.AptDateTime BETWEEN CURDATE() AND CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=aging.BillingType GROUP BY aging.Guarantor ORDER BY aging.LName,aging.FName

request: "Patient" status patients whose last completed procedure was on or prior to the specified date, who have insurance with the specified carrier, and who have no future scheduled appointments
query: SET @SinceDate='2022-01-01'; SET @Carrier='%%'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count' ,core.PatNum ,core.Patient ,core.HmPhone ,core.WkPhone ,core.WirelessPhone ,core.LastVisit ,core.CarrierName FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS Patient ,p.HmPhone ,p.WkPhone ,p.WirelessPhone ,DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ProcDate),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'LastVisit' ,c.CarrierName FROM patient p LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum AND ap.AptStatus=1 AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime)>=CURDATE() INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub i ON pp.InsSubNum=i.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON i.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON ip.CarrierNum=c.CarrierNum AND c.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier WHERE ISNULL(ap.aptnum) AND PatStatus=0 GROUP BY p.PatNum HAVING (MAX(pl.ProcDate)<=@SinceDate) ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ASC ) core

request: Determines amount collected from original referral source using user-defined field 'origin' filtered by the patient's first visit.
query: SET @PatFieldName='origin'; SET @StartDate='2015-01-01', @EndDate='2015-08-04'; SELECT A.OriginSource,A.PatCount,PatPay AS $PatPay_,InsPay AS $InsPay_,PatPay+InsPay AS $TotalPay_ FROM ( SELECT pf.FieldValue AS OriginSource, COUNT(DISTINCT pf.PatNum) AS PatCount, SUM(py.PayAmt) AS PatPay FROM patfield pf LEFT JOIN patient p ON pf.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT PatNum,MIN(ProcDate) AS FirstVisit FROM ( SELECT PatNum,ProcDate FROM procedurelog WHERE YEAR(ProcDate)>1880 ) D GROUP BY PatNum ) C ON p.PatNum=C.PatNum AND C.FirstVisit BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate LEFT JOIN payment py ON p.PatNum=py.PatNum WHERE pf.FieldName LIKE @PatFieldName GROUP BY pf.FieldValue ) A INNER JOIN ( SELECT pf.FieldValue AS OriginSource, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPay FROM patfield pf LEFT JOIN patient p ON pf.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT PatNum,MIN(ProcDate) AS FirstVisit FROM ( SELECT PatNum,ProcDate FROM procedurelog WHERE YEAR(ProcDate)>1880 ) D GROUP BY PatNum ) C ON p.PatNum=C.PatNum AND C.FirstVisit BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum WHERE pf.FieldName LIKE @PatFieldName AND cp.ClaimPaymentNum!=0 GROUP BY pf.FieldValue ) B ON A.OriginSource=B.OriginSource ORDER BY A.OriginSource

request: Lab cases that are unattached to an appointment or attached to an appointment that is not complete. Shows patient name, provider, birthdate, the laboratory, the date sent and received, the status of the lab case, and the lab case instructions.
query: SELECT p.FName,p.LName, pr.Abbr AS 'Provider', p.Birthdate, l.request AS 'Laboratory', lc.DateTimeSent AS 'DateSent', lc.DateTimeRecd AS 'DateReceived', IF(YEAR(lc.DateTimeChecked)>1880,'QualityChecked',IF(YEAR(lc.DateTimeRecd)>1880,'Received',IF(YEAR(lc.DateTimeSent)>1880,'Sent',IF(YEAR(lc.DateTimeCreated)>1880,'Created','Unknown')))) AS LabStatus, lc.Instructions AS 'LabCaseNotes' FROM labcase lc LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON lc.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND ap.AptStatus=2 INNER JOIN patient p ON lc.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN laboratory l ON l.LaboratoryNum=lc.LaboratoryNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=lc.ProvNum WHERE ISNULL(ap.AptNum) ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName

request: Active (status) patients with no scheduled apt who have not been in for a time period with the date of their last completed apt. Also shows phone numbers
query: SET @CodesToExclude='D0120|D2393|D7210'; SET @daysIntervalStart=365, @daysIntervalEnd=0; SELECT patient.PatNum, patient.HmPhone, patient.WkPhone, patient.WirelessPhone, ( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee) FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pc.ProcCode NOT REGEXP @CodesToExclude AND pl.PatNum=patient.PatNum ) AS '$CompletedProcTotal_', ( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=1 AND pl.PatNum=patient.PatNum ) AS '$TreatmentPlanTotal_', tmp2.AptDateTime AS DateLastVisit FROM patient LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT PatNum FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus=1 ) tmp1 ON patient.PatNum=tmp1.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PatNum,MAX(AptDateTime) AS 'AptDateTime' FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum ) tmp2 ON patient.PatNum=tmp2.PatNum WHERE tmp1.PatNum IS NULL AND ((TO_DAYS(CURDATE()) - TO_DAYS(tmp2.AptDateTime)) BETWEEN @daysIntervalEnd AND @daysIntervalStart) AND patient.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY tmp2.PatNum ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName ASC;

request: Return the names of all patients of a specified age with a specified procedure code completed by a specified provider within a specified date range
query: SET @PatAge=25; SET @ProcCode='%D1110%'; SET @Provider='%ProviderAbbr%'; SET @StartDate='2015-01-01', @EndDate='2015-12-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS PatName,pr.Abbr AS Provider,TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) AS Age,pc.ProcCode,pl.ProcDate FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr LIKE @Provider WHERE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE())=@PatAge AND p.PatStatus=0 ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName,pr.Abbr,pl.ProcDate

request: Displays production, payments by carrier, adjustments, and the carrier's percentage of patients for each insurance carrier.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Carriers='Delta,Aetna'; SET @Carriers = IF(LENGTH(@Carriers)=0, '^', CONCAT('', REPLACE(@Carriers, ',', '|'))); SELECT ca.CarrierName ,SUM(cl.ClaimFee) AS '$Prod' ,SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsPaid' ,CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cl.InsPayAmt)/SUM(cl.ClaimFee)*100, 2),2),'%') AS 'InsPaid%' ,SUM(cl.Writeoff) AS '$WriteOff' ,CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cl.Writeoff)/SUM(cl.ClaimFee)*100, 2),2),'%') AS 'WO%' ,CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT cl.PatNum)/(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient)*100, 2),2),'%') AS 'PatsOnPlan%' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN insplan inp ON cl.PlanNum=inp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON inp.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum AND ca.CarrierName REGEXP @Carriers WHERE cl.DateReceived BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND cl.ClaimStatus='R' AND cl.ClaimType NOT IN('PreAuth','Cap') GROUP BY ca.CarrierNum ORDER BY ca.CarrierName;

request: Shows the count of the patients seen by a provider within a date range by age, race, insurance, and sliding scale.
query: SET @ProviderName='RN'; SET @StartDate='2014-11-01', @EndDate='2015-06-30'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Birthdate='0001-01-01' THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'NoBday', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,B.Birthdate,CURDATE()) < 18 THEN B.PatNum END) AS '0-17', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,B.Birthdate,CURDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 64 THEN B.PatNum END) AS '18-64', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Birthdate!='0001-01-01' AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,B.Birthdate,CURDATE()) >= 65 THEN B.PatNum END) AS '65+', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,B.Birthdate,CURDATE()) < 18 THEN B.PatNum END) +COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,B.Birthdate,CURDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 64 THEN B.PatNum END) +COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Birthdate!='0001-01-01' AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,B.Birthdate,CURDATE()) >= 65 THEN B.PatNum END) +COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Birthdate='0001-01-01' THEN B.PatNum END) AS Total, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Race=3 THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'Asian', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Race=1 THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'Black', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Race=6 THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'Hisp', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Race=9 THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'White', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(B.Race,11) IN(0,2,4,5,7,8,10,11) THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'Other', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Race=3 THEN B.PatNum END) +COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Race=1 THEN B.PatNum END) +COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Race=6 THEN B.PatNum END) +COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.Race=9 THEN B.PatNum END) +COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(B.Race,11) IN(0,2,4,5,7,8,10,11) THEN B.PatNum END) AS Total, COUNT(DISTINCT B.PatNum) -COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT ISNULL(B.PatPlanNum) AND B.CarrierName NOT LIKE "%DentaQuest, LLC-VA Claims%" AND B.PatNum NOT IN (SELECT PatNum FROM patfield WHERE FieldName='Federal, State and Outside programs' AND FieldValue="FAMIS") THEN B.PatNum END) -COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="FAMIS" THEN B.PatNum END) -COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.CarrierName LIKE "%DentaQuest, LLC-VA Claims%" AND B.PatNum NOT IN (SELECT PatNum FROM patfield WHERE FieldName='Federal, State and Outside programs' AND FieldValue="FAMIS") THEN B.PatNum END) -COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="A" THEN B.PatNum END) -COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="B" THEN B.PatNum END) -COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="C" THEN B.PatNum END) -COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="D" THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'Unins', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT ISNULL(B.PatPlanNum) AND B.CarrierName NOT LIKE "%DentaQuest, LLC-VA Claims%" AND B.PatNum NOT IN (SELECT PatNum FROM patfield WHERE FieldName='Federal, State and Outside programs' AND FieldValue="FAMIS") THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'Ins(Priv)', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="FAMIS" THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'FAMIS', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.CarrierName LIKE "%DentaQuest, LLC-VA Claims%" AND B.PatNum NOT IN (SELECT PatNum FROM patfield WHERE FieldName='Federal, State and Outside programs' AND FieldValue="FAMIS") THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'Medicaid', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="A" THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'A', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="B" THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'B', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="C" THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'C', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.FieldValue="D" THEN B.PatNum END) AS 'D', COUNT(DISTINCT B.PatNum) AS Total FROM ( SELECT A.PatNum,A.Birthdate,A.PatRace AS Race,pf.FieldName,pf.FieldValue,pp.PatPlanNum,ca.CarrierName FROM ( SELECT a.PatNum,p.Birthdate,MIN(ptr.Race) AS PatRace FROM appointment a INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=a.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr LIKE @ProviderName INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN patientrace ptr ON p.PatNum=ptr.PatNum WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY a.PatNum ) A LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=A.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ins ON pp.InsSubNum=ins.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan inp ON ins.PlanNum=inp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON inp.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patfield pf ON A.PatNum=pf.PatNum AND (pf.FieldName="Sliding Scale" OR pf.FieldName="Federal, State and Outside programs") ) B;

request: List of claims that have not been received. Shows the date sent, date service, carrier information, claim status, claim fee and ins payment estimates.
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient,cl.DateSent,cl.DateService, ca.CarrierName, ca.Phone, cl.ClaimStatus,cl.ClaimFee AS '$ClaimFee_',cl.InsPayEst AS '$InsPayEst_', CONCAT("$",FORMAT(ROUND(cl.InsPayEst,2),2)," ", (CASE WHEN cl.InsPayEst<0.005 THEN '' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,cl.DateSent,@AsOf)>120 THEN '>120' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,cl.DateSent,@AsOf)>90 THEN '91-120' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,cl.DateSent,@AsOf)>60 THEN '61-90' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,cl.DateSent,@AsOf)>30 THEN '31-60' ELSE '0-30' END)) AS ClaimAge, (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,cl.DateSent,@AsOf) BETWEEN 0 AND 30 THEN FORMAT(ROUND(cl.InsPayEst,2),2) ELSE 0.00 END) AS '0-30', (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,cl.DateSent,@AsOf) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN FORMAT(ROUND(cl.InsPayEst,2),2) ELSE 0.00 END) AS '31-60', (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,cl.DateSent,@AsOf) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN FORMAT(ROUND(cl.InsPayEst,2),2) ELSE 0.00 END) AS '61-90', (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,cl.DateSent,@AsOf) BETWEEN 91 AND 120 THEN FORMAT(ROUND(cl.InsPayEst,2),2) ELSE 0.00 END) AS '91-120', (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,cl.DateSent,@AsOf)>120 THEN FORMAT(ROUND(cl.InsPayEst,2),2) ELSE 0.00 END) AS '>120' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cl.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan i ON i.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=i.CarrierNum WHERE cl.ClaimStatus IN('S', 'h', 'u', 'w', 'p') ORDER BY ca.CarrierName,p.LName,p.FName,cl.DateSent,cl.DateService;

request: Net production and writeoffs by insurance carrier.
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01', @ToDate='2015-07-01'; SELECT carrier.CarrierName, SUM(claimproc.FeeBilled-claimproc.WriteOff) AS '$Net Production_', SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) AS '$WriteOff_' FROM claimproc INNER JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4,0) AND claimproc.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY carrier.CarrierNum ORDER BY carrier.CarrierName;

request: Daily report that shows each providers new patients, broken appointments, daily gross production, daily insurance income, daily patient income, daily total income, month to date production, and month to date income. The total of each type of patient and insurance payment type is broken down per payment type below each provider.
query: SET @DateOfReport='2015-07-22'; SELECT (CASE WHEN main.ItemOrder=3 THEN " main.NewPats, (CASE WHEN main.ItemOrder=3 THEN ' (CASE WHEN main.ItemOrder IN (2,5) THEN "" WHEN main.ItemOrder=3 THEN ' (CASE WHEN main.ItemOrder IN (2,5) THEN "" WHEN main.ItemOrder=3 THEN ' (CASE WHEN main.ItemOrder IN (2,5) THEN "" WHEN main.ItemOrder=3 THEN ' (CASE WHEN main.ItemOrder IN (2,5) THEN "" WHEN main.ItemOrder=3 THEN ' (CASE WHEN main.ItemOrder IN (2,5) THEN "" WHEN main.ItemOrder=3 THEN ' (CASE WHEN main.ItemOrder IN (2,5) THEN "" WHEN main.ItemOrder=3 THEN ' main.PayType,main.PayAmt AS PayAmnts FROM ( SELECT 0 AS IsTotal,1 AS ItemOrder,pr.Abbr,COALESCE(newp.NewPats,0) AS NewPats, COALESCE(brkappt.BrokenAppts,0) AS BrokenAppts, COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN mtdprod.ProcDate=@DateOfReport THEN mtdprod.MTDGross END)),0) AS 'GrossProd', COALESCE(mtdinc.DayInsInc,0) AS InsIncome, COALESCE(mtdinc.DayPatInc,0) AS PatIncome, COALESCE(mtdinc.DayTotInc,0) AS TotalIncome, COALESCE(SUM(mtdprod.MTDGross),0) AS 'MTDGrossProd', COALESCE(mtdinc.MTDTotalInc,0) AS MTDTotalInc,"" AS PayType,"" AS PayAmt FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ap.ProvNum,COUNT(ap.PatNum) AS NewPats FROM( SELECT appt.ProvNum,appt.PatNum FROM( SELECT PatNum,MIN(AptDateTime) AS FirstAppt FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum )A INNER JOIN appointment appt ON appt.PatNum=A.PatNum AND appt.AptDateTime=A.FirstAppt WHERE DATE(appt.AptDateTime)=@DateOfReport )ap GROUP BY ap.ProvNum ) newp ON newp.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ad.ProvNum,COUNT(DISTINCT ad.AdjNum) AS BrokenAppts FROM adjustment ad WHERE ad.AdjType=(SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName='BrokenAppointmentAdjustmentType') AND ad.AdjDate=@DateOfReport GROUP BY ad.ProvNum ) brkappt ON brkappt.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS MTDGross FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status='7' WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DateOfReport,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DateOfReport AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) mtdprod ON pr.ProvNum=mtdprod.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.ProvNum,COALESCE(SUM(A.PayAmt),0) AS MTDTotalInc, SUM((CASE WHEN A.PayDate=@DateOfReport AND A.PayType='InsPay' THEN PayAmt END)) AS DayInsInc, SUM((CASE WHEN A.PayDate=@DateOfReport AND A.PayType='PatPay' THEN PayAmt END)) AS DayPatInc, SUM((CASE WHEN A.PayDate=@DateOfReport THEN PayAmt END)) AS DayTotInc FROM( SELECT 'InsPay' AS PayType,cp.ProvNum,cpy.CheckDate AS PayDate,cp.InsPayAmt AS PayAmt FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpy.ClaimPaymentNum AND cpy.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DateOfReport,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DateOfReport UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay',ps.ProvNum,ps.DatePay,ps.SplitAmt FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DateOfReport,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DateOfReport )A GROUP BY A.ProvNum ) mtdinc ON pr.ProvNum=mtdinc.ProvNum WHERE pr.IsHidden=0 GROUP BY pr.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS IsTotal,2 AS ItemOrder,pr.Abbr,"","","","","","","","",CONCAT('Total ',COALESCE(def.ItemName,'Insurance')),FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(A.PayAmt),2),2) AS TotalAmt FROM( SELECT cpy.PayType,cp.ProvNum,cpy.CheckDate AS PayDate,cp.InsPayAmt AS PayAmt FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpy.ClaimPaymentNum AND cpy.CheckDate=@DateOfReport UNION ALL SELECT py.PayType,ps.ProvNum,ps.DatePay,ps.SplitAmt FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment py ON py.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.DatePay=@DateOfReport )A LEFT JOIN definition def ON A.PayType=def.DefNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON A.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE pr.IsHidden=0 GROUP BY A.ProvNum,A.PayType UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS IsTotal,3 AS ItemOrder,pr.Abbr," FROM provider pr WHERE pr.IsHidden=0 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS IsTotal,4 AS ItemOrder,'',SUM(A.NewPats), SUM(A.BrokenAppts), SUM(A.GrossProd), SUM(A.InsIncome), SUM(A.PatIncome), SUM(A.TotalIncome), SUM(A.MTDGrossProd), SUM(A.MTDTotalInc), "","" FROM( SELECT 1 AS IsTotal,4 AS ItemOrder,pr.Abbr,COALESCE(newp.NewPats,0) AS NewPats, COALESCE(brkappt.BrokenAppts,0) AS BrokenAppts, COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN mtdprod.ProcDate=@DateOfReport THEN mtdprod.MTDGross END)),0) AS 'GrossProd', COALESCE(mtdinc.DayInsInc,0) AS InsIncome, COALESCE(mtdinc.DayPatInc,0) AS PatIncome, COALESCE(mtdinc.DayTotInc,0) AS TotalIncome, COALESCE(SUM(mtdprod.MTDGross),0) AS 'MTDGrossProd', COALESCE(mtdinc.MTDTotalInc,0) AS MTDTotalInc FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ap.ProvNum,COUNT(ap.PatNum) AS NewPats FROM( SELECT appt.ProvNum,appt.PatNum FROM( SELECT PatNum,MIN(AptDateTime) AS FirstAppt FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum )A INNER JOIN appointment appt ON appt.PatNum=A.PatNum AND appt.AptDateTime=A.FirstAppt WHERE DATE(appt.AptDateTime)=@DateOfReport )ap GROUP BY ap.ProvNum ) newp ON newp.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ad.ProvNum,COUNT(DISTINCT ad.AdjNum) AS BrokenAppts FROM adjustment ad WHERE ad.AdjType=(SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName='BrokenAppointmentAdjustmentType') AND ad.AdjDate=@DateOfReport GROUP BY ad.ProvNum ) brkappt ON brkappt.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum,pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS MTDGross FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status='7' WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DateOfReport,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DateOfReport AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) mtdprod ON pr.ProvNum=mtdprod.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.ProvNum,COALESCE(SUM(A.PayAmt),0) AS MTDTotalInc, SUM((CASE WHEN A.PayDate=@DateOfReport AND A.PayType='InsPay' THEN PayAmt END)) AS DayInsInc, SUM((CASE WHEN A.PayDate=@DateOfReport AND A.PayType='PatPay' THEN PayAmt END)) AS DayPatInc, SUM((CASE WHEN A.PayDate=@DateOfReport THEN PayAmt END)) AS DayTotInc FROM( SELECT 'InsPay' AS PayType,cp.ProvNum,cpy.CheckDate AS PayDate,cp.InsPayAmt AS PayAmt FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpy.ClaimPaymentNum AND cpy.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DateOfReport,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DateOfReport UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay',ps.ProvNum,ps.DatePay,ps.SplitAmt FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DateOfReport,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DateOfReport )A GROUP BY A.ProvNum ) mtdinc ON pr.ProvNum=mtdinc.ProvNum WHERE pr.IsHidden=0 GROUP BY pr.ProvNum )A UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS IsTotal,5 AS ItemOrder,"","","","","","","","","",CONCAT('Total ',COALESCE(def.ItemName,'Insurance')),FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(A.PayAmt),2),2) AS TotalAmt FROM( SELECT cpy.PayType,cp.ProvNum,cpy.CheckDate AS PayDate,cp.InsPayAmt AS PayAmt FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpy.ClaimPaymentNum AND cpy.CheckDate=@DateOfReport UNION ALL SELECT py.PayType,ps.ProvNum,ps.DatePay,ps.SplitAmt FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment py ON py.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.DatePay=@DateOfReport )A LEFT JOIN definition def ON A.PayType=def.DefNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON A.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE pr.IsHidden=0 GROUP BY A.PayType ) main ORDER BY main.IsTotal,main.Abbr,main.ItemOrder,main.NewPats;

request: List of appointments scheduled for tomorrow with estimated insurance and production.
query: SET @Tomorrow=DATE_ADD(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 1 DAY); SET @Clinic='%%'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS Patient, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS '$Prod_', SUM(IFNULL(A.WriteOff,0)) AS '$WriteOff_', SUM(IFNULL(A.InsEst,0)) AS '$InsEst_', SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))-SUM(IFNULL(A.WriteOff,0))-SUM(IFNULL(A.InsEst,0)) AS '$PatPortion_' FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=ap.ClinicNum INNER JOIN patient p ON ap.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON ap.AptNum=pl.AptNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride!=-1 THEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride ELSE (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEst!=-1 THEN cp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END) END) AS WriteOff, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride!=-1 THEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE (CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotal!=-1 THEN cp.InsEstTotal ELSE 0 END) END) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )A ON pl.ProcNum=A.ProcNum WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime)=@Tomorrow AND (CASE WHEN @clinic = '%%' THEN TRUE ELSE c.request LIKE @Clinic END) AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName

request: Total writeoff amount by carrier with writeoffs for each patient on that carrier. Date range is based on procedure date.
query: SET @StartDate='2015-01-01', @EndDate='2015-12-31'; SELECT A.Name,A.WriteOff AS 'WriteOff' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder',ca.CarrierName AS 'Name',FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cp.WriteOff),2),2) AS 'WriteOff',ca.CarrierName,ca.CarrierNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN claim cl ON cp.ClaimNum=cl.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cl.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum GROUP BY ca.CarrierNum UNION ALL SELECT 2,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName),FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cp.WriteOff),2),2),ca.CarrierName,ca.CarrierNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN claim cl ON cp.ClaimNum=cl.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cl.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY ca.CarrierNum,cp.PatNum HAVING SUM(cp.WriteOff)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 3," FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN claim cl ON cp.ClaimNum=cl.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cl.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum GROUP BY ca.CarrierNum ) A ORDER BY A.CarrierName,A.CarrierNum,A.ItemOrder

request: Patient level aging for patients by treating provider/provider on the payments/provider on the adjustments.
query: SET @AsOf='2016-02-03'; SET @ProvAbbr='%KPC%'; SELECT E.Patient AS Patient, E.PatNum AS 'Pat E.ProvAbbr AS 'Provider', E.0to30 AS '0-30 Days', E.31to60 AS '31-60 Days', E.61to90 AS '61-90 Days', E.Over90 AS '>90 Days', E.Total AS 'Total', E.InsEst AS 'Ins Est', E.PatEst AS 'Patient Est' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Patient, D.PatNum, prov.Abbr AS ProvAbbr, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60 THEN D.Charges0to30 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90 THEN D.Charges31to60 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<=D.ChargesOver90 THEN D.Charges61to90 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits>=D.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.Bal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.InsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.Bal-COALESCE(D.InsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,B.ProvNum,SUM(B.PatBal) AS Bal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS Charges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS Charges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS Charges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS ChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS Credits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS InsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,ps.ProvNum, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.ProvNum, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,cp.ProvNum, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,p.PriProv, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProvNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum AND C.ProvNum=B.ProvNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum,B.ProvNum ) D INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=D.ProvNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND ABS(D.Bal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor,'' AS PatNum,'' AS ProvAbbr, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60 THEN D.Charges0to30 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90 THEN D.Charges31to60 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<=D.ChargesOver90 THEN D.Charges61to90 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits>=D.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.Bal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.InsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.Bal-COALESCE(D.InsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,B.ProvNum,SUM(B.PatBal) AS Bal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS Charges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS Charges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS Charges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS ChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS Credits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS InsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,ps.ProvNum, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.ProvNum, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,cp.ProvNum, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,p.PriProv, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum,B.ProvNum ) D INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=D.ProvNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND ABS(D.Bal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Patient,E.ProvAbbr;

request: For patients with their first visit in date range, showing the date of first visit, whether they have insurance, the sum of TP procedures, the amount they paid on the first visit, and the date of the next visit.  Will only show patients with a specified patient field.
query: SET @FromDate='2015-06-01', @ToDate='2015-06-30'; SET @PatFieldName='%%'; SELECT A.ProvNum,pf.FieldName,p.LName,p.FName,A.FirstVisit, (CASE WHEN p.HasIns='I' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) AS 'Insured', (SELECT SUM(pl2.ProcFee) FROM procedurelog pl2 WHERE pl2.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl2.ProcStatus=1) AS $TreatmentPlan_, (SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ps.DatePay=MIN(pl.ProcDate)) AS $PayFirstVisit_, IFNULL((SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ap.AptDateTime),'%m-%d-%Y') FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.PatNum=p.PatNum AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime)>DATE(A.FirstVisit) AND ap.AptStatus IN ('1','2')),'NONE') AS NextVisit FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum,pl.ProvNum,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS FirstVisit FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum )A INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=A.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate=A.FirstVisit INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN patfield pf ON A.PatNum=pf.PatNum AND pf.FieldName LIKE @PatFieldName WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (A.FirstVisit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY A.FirstVisit;

request: Count of broken and completed appointments, also shows percentages of broken and broken appointments for patients under age 18.
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01', @ToDate='2015-12-31'; SELECT COUNT(A.AptNum) AS TotalApt, SUM(CASE WHEN a.AptStatus=2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN a.AptStatus=5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.AptStatus=2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(A.AptNum)*100,2),2),'%') AS '%Complete', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.AptStatus=5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(A.AptNum)*100,2),2),'%') AS '%Broken', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.AptStatus=5 AND A.PatAge<18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/SUM(CASE WHEN A.PatAge<18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*100,2),2),'%') AS '%BrokenUnder18' FROM( SELECT a.AptNum,a.AptStatus,TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,a.AptDateTime) AS PatAge FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=a.PatNum WHERE a.AptStatus IN(2,5) AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate )A;

request: List insurance plans with a specified plan note and count of patient status patients that currently have each plan
query: SET @InsPlanNote='%%'; SELECT LEFT(c.CarrierName, 15) AS 'CarrierName' ,LEFT(ip.GroupName, 20) AS 'GroupName' ,ip.GroupNum ,COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS 'PatientCount' ,ip.PlanNote FROM carrier c INNER JOIN insplan ip ON c.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND ip.PlanNote LIKE @InsPlanNote INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient p ON pp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY c.CarrierName, ip.GroupName, ip.PlanNote HAVING `PatientCount` > 1 ORDER BY c.CarrierName, ip.GroupName, ip.PlanNote, ip.PlanNum

request: Failed Restoration Procedures. Shows procedures that had the same procedure done multiple times on different dates on the same tooth. Count column is the number of procedures done for that patient for that procedure code with the same tooth before the date of service. The procedure will show if the date of service is within the date range. Total Failed is the number of repeat procedures that were done for the same patient on the same tooth. Total Restorative is the total number of procedures completed for the specified procedure codes within the date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-01-01',@ToDate='2024-12-31'; SET @ProcCodes='D2140|D2150|D2160|D2161|D2330|D2331|D2332|D2335|D2391|D2392|D2393|D2394'; SELECT 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 INTO @CountIdentical, @PreviousPat, @PreviousTth, @PreviousCode, @Failed; SELECT main.OriginalDate AS 'DateOriginal' , main.DateOfService , main.Count , main.FName , main.LName , main.PatID , main.Surf , main.Tooth ,
