main.ProcCode , main.Provider , main.Clinic FROM ( SELECT core.OriginalDate , core.ProcDate AS 'DateOfService' , (CASE WHEN @PreviousPat = core.PatNum AND @PreviousTth = core.ToothNum AND @PreviousCode = core.ProcCode THEN @CountIdentical := @CountIdentical + 1 ELSE @CountIdentical := 0 END) AS 'Count' , core.FName , core.LName , @PreviousPat := core.PatNum AS 'PatID' , core.Surf , @PreviousTth := core.ToothNum AS 'Tooth' , @PreviousCode := core.ProcCode AS 'ProcCode' , core.Abbr AS 'Provider' , core.Clinic FROM ( SELECT proccore.OriginalDate , pl.ProcDate , p.FName , p.LName , pl.PatNum , pl.Surf , pl.ToothNum , proccore.ProcCode , (CASE WHEN pl.ProcDate != proccore.MaxProcDate AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) THEN @Failed := @Failed + 1 ELSE @Failed END) AS 'Failed' , prov.Abbr , COALESCE(( SELECT clin.Abbr FROM clinic clin WHERE clin.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum ), 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' FROM ( SELECT COUNT(plog.ProcNum) AS 'Count' , plog.PatNum , plog.Surf , plog.ToothNum , pcode.ProcCode , MIN(plog.ProcDate) AS 'OriginalDate' , plog.CodeNum , MAX(plog.ProcDate) AS 'MaxProcDate' FROM procedurelog plog INNER JOIN procedurecode pcode ON pcode.CodeNum = plog.CodeNum AND pcode.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes WHERE plog.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY plog.PatNum, pcode.ProcCode, plog.ToothNum HAVING COUNT(plog.ProcNum) > 1 ) proccore INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = proccore.PatNum AND pl.CodeNum = proccore.CodeNum AND pl.ToothNum = proccore.ToothNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum WHERE MaxProcDate != OriginalDate ORDER BY p.PatNum, pl.ProcDate, pl.ToothNum ) core ) main WHERE main.DateOfService BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'DateOriginal' , '' AS 'DateOfService' , '' AS 'Count' , '' AS 'FName' , '' AS 'LName' , '' AS 'PatID' , '' AS 'Surf' , 'Total Failed' AS 'Tooth' , @Failed AS 'ProcCode' , '' AS 'Provider' , '' AS 'Clinic' UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'DateOriginal' , '' AS 'DateOfService' , '' AS 'Count' , '' AS 'FName' , '' AS 'LName' , '' AS 'PatID' , '' AS 'Surf' , 'Total Restorative' AS 'Tooth' , COUNT(pl.ProcNum) AS 'ProcCode' , '' AS 'Provider' , '' AS 'Clinic' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate);

request: Shows patients who have had a referral within the date range. Also shows their next scheduled appointment if they have one.
query: SET @DateStart='2015-09-01',@DateEnd='2015-10-31'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat ID',CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS 'Patient Name',p.Email,ra.RefDate AS 'Date of Referral',COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(MIN(DATE(ap.AptDateTime)),'%m/%d/%Y'),"") AS 'Next Appointment' FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @DateStart AND @DateEnd LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum AND ap.AptDateTime>=CURDATE() GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName;

request: Detailed recall list. Shows all the fields in the internal recall list plus carrier, patient status, and date of last appointment. The number of patients could be slightly different from the internal report because this query includes patients of all statuses except deleted.
query: SET @StartDate='2024-12-01', @EndDate='2025-02-28'; SET @SortBy='DateDue'; SET @ShowReminders=''; SET @Prov='%%'; SET @Clinic='%%'; SET @Site='%%'; SET @Carrier='%%'; SELECT ValueString INTO @PrefRecallShowIfFirst FROM preference WHERE PrefName='RecallShowIfDaysFirstReminder'; SELECT ValueString INTO @PrefRecallShowIfSecond FROM preference WHERE PrefName='RecallShowIfDaysSecondReminder'; SELECT DefNum INTO @RecallDefNum FROM definition WHERE ItemValue='RECALL' AND Category=27; SELECT ValueString INTO @RecallTypesShowing FROM preference WHERE PrefName='RecallTypesShowingInList'; SELECT ValueString INTO @RecallExcludeIfFutureAppt FROM preference WHERE PrefName='RecallExcludeIfAnyFutureAppt'; SELECT ValueString INTO @BalanceDontSubractInsurance FROM preference WHERE PrefName='BalancesDontSubtractIns'; SELECT ValueString INTO @MaxReminders FROM preference WHERE PrefName='RecallMaxNumberReminders'; SELECT main.PatNum ,main.PreferredName ,main.PatNum AS 'Pat Num' ,main.BalTotal ,main.BillingType ,IF(main.Age=999, 'Unknown', main.Age) AS 'Age' ,main.DateDue ,main.Clinic ,main.DateLastReminder ,main.DisableUntilBalance ,main.DateDisabledUntil ,main.GuarEmail ,main.WirelessPhone ,main.WkPhone ,main.HmPhone ,main.Email ,main.Provider ,main.Site ,main.InsEst ,main.NumberOfReminders ,main.PreferRecallMethod ,main.RecallInterval ,main.RecallStatus ,main.Recalltype ,main.Carrier ,main.PatStatus ,main.EstBalance ,main.AddrNote ,main.Note ,main.GuarName ,main.DateLastAppointment FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PatName' ,p.Preferred AS 'PreferredName' ,recall.PatNum ,patguar.BalTotal ,defbill.ItemName AS 'BillingType' ,CAST(CASE WHEN p.Birthdate = '0001-01-01' THEN 999 ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) END AS SIGNED) AS 'Age' ,p.Birthdate ,recall.DateDue ,COALESCE(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,COALESCE(MAX(commlog.CommDateTime),'') AS 'DateLastReminder' ,recall.DisableUntilBalance ,IF(YEAR(DisableUntilDate)<1880,'',DisableUntilDate) AS 'DateDisabledUntil' ,patguar.Email 'GuarEmail' ,p.WirelessPhone ,p.WkPhone ,p.HmPhone ,p.Email ,COALESCE(pr.Abbr,'None') AS Provider ,COALESCE(site.request,'Unassigned') AS 'Site' ,patguar.InsEst ,COUNT(DISTINCT commlog.CommlogNum) 'NumberOfReminders' ,(CASE WHEN p.PreferRecallMethod = 0 THEN 'None' WHEN p.PreferRecallMethod = 1 THEN 'DoNotCall' WHEN p.PreferRecallMethod = 2 THEN 'HmPhone' WHEN p.PreferRecallMethod = 3 THEN 'WkPhone' WHEN p.PreferRecallMethod = 4 THEN 'WirelessPh' WHEN p.PreferRecallMethod = 5 THEN 'Email' WHEN p.PreferRecallMethod = 6 THEN 'SeeNotes' WHEN p.PreferRecallMethod = 7 THEN 'Mail' WHEN p.PreferRecallMethod = 8 THEN 'TextMessage' ELSE '' END) AS PreferRecallMethod ,CONCAT(CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(recall.RecallInterval,10,2),31,0),1,7),2,10),'y ', CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(recall.RecallInterval,10,2),31,0),8,8),2,10),'m ', CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(recall.RecallInterval,10,2),31,0),16,8),2,10),'w ', CONV(SUBSTRING(LPAD(CONV(recall.RecallInterval,10,2),31,0),24,8),2,10),'d ' ) AS RecallInterval ,COALESCE(defstatus.ItemName,'') AS 'RecallStatus' ,recalltype.request 'Recalltype' ,COALESCE(car.CarrierName,'Uninsured') AS 'Carrier' ,(CASE WHEN p.PatStatus = 0 THEN 'Patient' WHEN p.PatStatus = 1 THEN 'NonPatient' WHEN p.PatStatus = 2 THEN 'Inactive' WHEN p.PatStatus = 3 THEN 'Archived' WHEN p.PatStatus = 4 THEN 'Deleted' WHEN p.PatStatus = 5 THEN 'Deceased' WHEN p.PatStatus = 6 THEN 'Prospective' END) AS PatStatus ,patguar.EstBalance ,p.AddrNote ,recall.Note ,CONCAT(patguar.LName,', ',patguar.FName) AS 'GuarName' ,COALESCE(lastapt.LastAppointment,'') AS 'DateLastAppointment' FROM recall LEFT JOIN patient p ON recall.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN patient patguar ON p.Guarantor = patguar.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = p.PriProv LEFT JOIN site ON site.SiteNum = p.SiteNum LEFT JOIN definition defbill ON defbill.DefNum = p.BillingType LEFT JOIN recalltype ON recall.RecallTypeNum = recalltype.RecallTypeNum LEFT JOIN definition defstatus ON defstatus.DefNum = recall.RecallStatus LEFT JOIN commlog ON commlog.PatNum = recall.PatNum AND CommDateTime > recall.DatePrevious AND commlog.CommType = @RecallDefNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN inssub ins ON pp.InsSubNum = ins.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan inp ON ins.PlanNum = inp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON inp.CarrierNum = car.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PatNum ,DATE(MAX(AptDateTime)) AS 'LastAppointment' FROM appointment GROUP BY PatNum ) lastapt ON lastapt.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE p.PatStatus != 4 AND recall.DateDue BETWEEN DATE(@StartDate) AND DATE(@EndDate) AND recall.IsDisabled = 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(recall.RecallTypeNum,@RecallTypesShowing)>0 AND (IF(@RecallExcludeIfFutureAppt, NOT EXISTS( SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE appointment.PatNum = recall.PatNum AND appointment.AptDateTime > CURDATE() AND appointment.AptStatus IN(1,4) ),YEAR(recall.DateScheduled) < 1880)) AND recall.DisableUntilDate <= CURDATE() AND (recall.DisableUntilBalance = 0 OR IF(@BalanceDontSubtractInsurance,p.BalTotal,p.BalTotal-p.InsEst) < recall.DisableUntilBalance) GROUP BY recall.PatNum,recall.RecallTypeNum HAVING IF(LENGTH(@ShowReminders) = 0, TRUE, NumberOfReminders = @ShowReminders) ) main WHERE main.Provider LIKE @Prov AND main.Clinic LIKE @Clinic AND main.Site LIKE @Site AND main.Carrier LIKE @Carrier AND (IF(main.NumberOfReminders=1,(@PrefRecallShowIfFirst!=-1 AND (DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),DateLastReminder))>@PrefRecallShowIfFirst),TRUE)) AND (IF(main.NumberOfReminders>1,(@PrefRecallShowIfSecond!=-1 AND (DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),DateLastReminder))>@PrefRecallShowIfSecond),TRUE)) AND (@MaxReminders=-1 OR main.NumberOfReminders<=@MaxReminders) ORDER BY IF(@SortBy = 'DateDue', main.DateDue, NULL) , IF(@SortBy = 'BillingType', main.BillingType, NULL) , IF(@SortBy = 'Age', main.Age, NULL) , main.PatName, main.PatNum

request: Shows a count of procedures per location. Location is an appointment field name. The procedures included are Sealant, Prophy, Flouride, and Hygienist Instructions. The Sealant procedures are further broken for certain teeth.
query: SET @StartDate='2015-10-01',@EndDate='2015-10-31'; SET @Location='%%'; SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(af.FieldValue,"Unassigned") AS ApptFieldLocation,COUNT(DISTINCT ap.PatNum) AS TotalPatSeen,COUNT(DISTINCT ap.AptNum) AS TotalPatVisit, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' THEN ap.PatNum END)) AS TotalPatSealant, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D0140' THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Screening, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1120' THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Prophy, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1208' THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS FluorideTreat, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1206' THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS FluorideVarnish, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1330' THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS HygInstruction, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' AND pl.ToothNum NOT IN(2,3,14,15,18,19,30,31) THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS SealantOther, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode NOT IN('D1351','D0140','D1120','D1208','D1206','D1330') THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS OtherProcs, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' AND pl.ToothNum=2 THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Sealent2, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' AND pl.ToothNum=3 THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Sealent3, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' AND pl.ToothNum=14 THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Sealent14, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' AND pl.ToothNum=15 THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Sealent15, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' AND pl.ToothNum=18 THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Sealent18, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' AND pl.ToothNum=19 THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Sealent19, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' AND pl.ToothNum=30 THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Sealent30, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode='D1351' AND pl.ToothNum=31 THEN pl.ProcNum END) AS Sealent31 FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN apptfield af ON af.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND af.FieldName='Location' LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY af.FieldValue ORDER BY af.FieldName ) A WHERE A.ApptFieldLocation LIKE @Location;

request: Shows a breakdown of procedures by specified providers per location. Location is an appointment field name. Displays PatNum, Patient Name, Proc Date, Provider, Proc Code, Tooth Num, and Clinic.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Location='%%'; SET @Providers=''; SELECT COALESCE(af.FieldValue, 'Unassigned') AS 'ApptFieldLocation' ,pl.PatNum ,p.LName ,p.FName ,pl.ProcDate ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,pc.ProcCode ,pl.ToothNum ,COALESCE(cl.request, 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = ap.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN apptfield af ON af.AptNum = ap.AptNum AND af.FieldName = 'Location' WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND COALESCE(af.FieldValue, 'Unassigned') LIKE @Location ORDER BY af.FieldName

request: Custom Day Sheet Summary Report. Displays MTD Productions, Collections, Adjustments, A\R Impact, Total Walkouts, Estimated Insurance, Collection Ratio, Patients Seen, New Patient Count, Average Production Per Visit, and Average Collection Per Visit. Aging in this query does not consider payment plans.
query: SET @FromDate='2015-08-01',@ToDate='2015-08-31'; SET @Clinic='%%'; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(A.Services),0), COALESCE(SUM(A.ProcDiscount),0) INTO @Services,@ProcDiscount FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS Services,procDiscount.DiscountAmt AS ProcDiscount FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ProcNum,SUM(AdjAmt) AS DiscountAmt FROM adjustment WHERE AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ProcNum ) procDiscount ON procDiscount.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum )A; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN def.ItemName LIKE '%cash%' THEN ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS CashPay, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN def.ItemName LIKE '%check%' THEN ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS CheckPay, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN def.ItemName NOT LIKE '%check%' AND def.ItemName NOT LIKE '%cash%' THEN ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS PatOtherPay INTO @CashPay,@CheckPay,@PatOtherPay FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ps.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic INNER JOIN payment py ON py.PayNum=ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=py.PayType WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) AS InsPay INTO @InsPay FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum AND cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5); SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ad.AdjAmt>0 THEN ad.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS PosAdj, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ad.AdjAmt<0 THEN ad.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS NegAdj INTO @PosAdj,@NegAdj FROM adjustment ad INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ad.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic WHERE ad.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ad.ProcNum=0; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(claimproc.WriteOff),0) INTO @WriteOff FROM claimproc INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=claimproc.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic WHERE claimproc.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND claimproc.Status IN (1,4,5); SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranDate<@FromDate THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),0) AS BeginAR, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),0) AS ChangeAR INTO @BeginAR,@ChangeAR FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(cp.WriteOff,0) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate<=@ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ps.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic WHERE ps.DatePay<=@ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=a.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND AdjDate<=@ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCP AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5) AND cp.DateCp<=@ToDate ) RawPatTrans; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cl.InsPayEst),0) AS InsEst INTO @InsEst FROM claim cl INNER JOIN clinic cli ON cli.ClinicNum=cl.ClinicNum AND cli.request LIKE @Clinic WHERE cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cl.ClaimStatus='S'; SELECT COUNT(ap.PatNum) AS PatientsSeen, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN NOT ISNULL(FirstApt.DateFirstProc) THEN ap.PatNum END)) AS NewPatients INTO @PatientsSeen,@NewPatients FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ap.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.AptNum,A.DateFirstProc FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum,MIN(ProcDate) DateFirstProc FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') WHERE ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum HAVING dateFirstProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate )A INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=A.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate=A.DateFirstProc GROUP BY pl.AptNum ) FirstApt ON FirstApt.AptNum=ap.AptNum WHERE ap.AptStatus=2 AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY; SET @Collections=@CashPay+@CheckPay+@PatOtherPay+@InsPay; SELECT "Services" AS "Category ",(CASE WHEN @Services<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Services,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services,2),2) END) AS "Production", "" AS "Collections","" AS "Adjustments ","" AS " - - - - - - - ", (CASE WHEN @Services<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Services,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services,2),2) END) AS "A\\R Impact" UNION ALL SELECT "ProcDiscount",(CASE WHEN @ProcDiscount<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@ProcDiscount,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@ProcDiscount,2),2) END),"","","", (CASE WHEN @ProcDiscount<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@ProcDiscount,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@ProcDiscount,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "WriteOff",(CASE WHEN @WriteOff<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@WriteOff,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@WriteOff,2),2) END),"","","", (CASE WHEN @WriteOff<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@WriteOff,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@WriteOff,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "NegAdj","","",(CASE WHEN @NegAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@NegAdj,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@NegAdj,2),2) END),"", (CASE WHEN @NegAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@NegAdj,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@NegAdj,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "PosAdj","","",(CASE WHEN @PosAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@PosAdj,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PosAdj,2),2) END),"", (CASE WHEN @PosAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@PosAdj,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PosAdj,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "CashPay","",(CASE WHEN @CashPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@CashPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@CashPay,2),2) END),"","", (CASE WHEN @CashPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@CashPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@CashPay,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "CheckPay","",(CASE WHEN @CheckPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@CheckPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@CheckPay,2),2) END),"","", (CASE WHEN @CheckPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@CheckPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@CheckPay,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "OtherPay","",(CASE WHEN @PatOtherPay+@InsPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@PatOtherPay+@InsPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PatOtherPay+@InsPay,2),2) END),"","", (CASE WHEN @PatOtherPay+@InsPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@PatOtherPay+@InsPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PatOtherPay+@InsPay,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "Total",(CASE WHEN @Services+@ProcDiscount-@WriteOff<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-(@Services+@ProcDiscount-@WriteOff),2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services+@ProcDiscount-@WriteOff,2),2) END), (CASE WHEN @Collections<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections,2),2) END), (CASE WHEN @PosAdj+@NegAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-(@PosAdj+@NegAdj),2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PosAdj+@NegAdj,2),2) END),"","" UNION ALL SELECT "","","","","Begin A\\R",(CASE WHEN @BeginAR<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@BeginAR,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@BeginAR,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "","","","","Change A\\R",(CASE WHEN @ChangeAR<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@ChangeAR,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@ChangeAR,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "","","","","Ending A\\R",(CASE WHEN @BeginAR+@ChangeAR<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-(@BeginAR+@ChangeAR),2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@BeginAR+@ChangeAR,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "Total Payments",(CASE WHEN @Collections<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Total Production",(CASE WHEN @Services<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Services,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Total Walkout",(CASE WHEN @Services+@NegAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-(@Services+@NegAdj),2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services+@NegAdj,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Less Est Ins",(CASE WHEN @InsEst<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@InsEst,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@InsEst,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Total Collections",(CASE WHEN @Collections<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Collections Ratio",COALESCE((CASE WHEN @Collections/@Services<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections/@Services,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections/@Services,2),2) END),0.00),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "AvgProdPerVisit",COALESCE((CASE WHEN @Services/@PatientsSeen<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Services/@PatientsSeen,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services/@PatientsSeen,2),2) END),0.00),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "AvgCollectionPerVisit",COALESCE((CASE WHEN @Collections/@PatientsSeen<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections/@PatientsSeen,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections/@PatientsSeen,2),2) END),0.00),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Patients Seen",@PatientsSeen,"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "NewPatCount",@NewPatients,"","","","";

request: Total of patient payments by payment type and date of payment.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-08-01' , @ToDate='2023-08-31'; SELECT payment.PayDate AS 'Payment Date', definition.ItemName AS 'Payment Type', SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) AS '$Payment Amount_' FROM payment INNER JOIN paysplit ON paysplit.PayNum = payment.PayNum INNER JOIN definition ON definition.DefNum = payment.PayType WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY payment.PayDate, payment.PayType ORDER BY payment.PayDate, definition.ItemName

request: Gross and net production of appointments by the users that created the appointment in date range with specified procedures excluded.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-12', @ToDate='2015-07-15'; SELECT B.UserName,SUM(B.Production) AS '$Gross Production_',SUM(B.NetProduction) AS '$Net Production_' FROM ( SELECT Z.UserName,Z.Production-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS Production,Z.NetProduction FROM( SELECT A.UserName, A.Production, A.Production-(CASE WHEN A.AptStatus IN (1,4) THEN SUM(A.WriteOffEst) WHEN A.AptStatus=2 THEN SUM(A.WriteOff) ELSE 0 END) AS NetProduction,A.ProcNum FROM ( SELECT userod.UserName,ap.AptNum,pl.ProcNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS Production,ap.AptStatus, COALESCE((CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride!=-1 THEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN cp.WriteOffEst!=-1 THEN cp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END),0) AS WriteOffEst, COALESCE(cp.WriteOff,0) AS WriteOff FROM userod LEFT JOIN securitylog sl ON userod.UserNum=sl.UserNum AND sl.PermType=25 LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON sl.FKey=ap.AptNum AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,4,2) AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON ap.AptNum=pl.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D0150','D0120','D0145','D0180','D1110','D1120','D1206','D1208','D0220','D0230','D0274','D0330','D0272','D4355','D1351') LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum ) A GROUP BY A.ProcNum ) Z LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=Z.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 GROUP BY Z.ProcNum ) B GROUP BY B.UserName ORDER BY B.UserName

request: Count of patients with completed appointments in date range.  Shows how many of those patients have a future appointment in the next 7 months, and whether or not that appointment was completed.
query: SET @StartDate='2023-01-01', @EndDate='2023-01-31'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,COUNT(DISTINCT apt.PatNum) AS 'CountPats' ,COUNT(DISTINCT futureApts.PatNum) AS 'CountFutureAppt' ,COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN futureApts.AptStatus = 2 THEN futureApts.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'CountFutureApptComp' ,FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT futureApts.PatNum) / COUNT(DISTINCT apt.PatNum) * 100, 2), 2) AS '%FutureApptSched' ,FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN futureApts.AptStatus = 2 THEN futureApts.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) / COUNT(DISTINCT apt.PatNum) * 100, 2), 2) AS '%FutureApptComp' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT apt.PatNum ,MAX((CASE apt.AptStatus WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 4 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END)) AS 'AptStatus' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr WHERE apt.AptStatus IN (1, 2, 4) AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 7 MONTH + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY apt.PatNum ) futureApts ON futureApts.PatNum = apt.PatNum WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY prov.Abbr

request: List of patients and their gross income for specific referral source.
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01', @ToDate='2018-01-30'; SET @RefFName='%%'; SET @RefLName='%%'; SELECT B.PatientName ,B.GrossIncome ,B.RefSource FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder ,A.PatientName ,FORMAT(ROUND(A.GrossIncome,2),2) AS GrossIncome ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.LName,', ',r.FName ORDER BY ra.ItemOrder SEPARATOR ' | ') AS RefSource FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS PatientName ,SUM(result.PtInc+result.InsInc) AS 'GrossIncome' FROM ( SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName' ,p.PatNum ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName' ,p.PatNum ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) result INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=result.PatNum GROUP BY result.PatNum )A INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=A.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum AND r.LName LIKE @RefLName AND r.FName LIKE @RefFName GROUP BY A.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder ,'Total:' AS PatientName ,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(B.GrossIncome),2),2) AS GrossIncome,'' AS RefSource FROM( SELECT A.GrossIncome FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS PatientName ,SUM(result.PtInc+result.InsInc) AS 'GrossIncome' FROM ( SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName' ,p.PatNum ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName' ,p.PatNum ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) result INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=result.PatNum GROUP BY result.PatNum )A INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=A.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum AND r.LName LIKE @RefLName AND r.FName LIKE @RefFName GROUP BY A.PatNum )B )B ORDER BY ItemOrder,B.PatientName

request: Special Production and Income report.  Shows total collections, hygiene collection percent, provider collection percent, new patients, and gross prod per new patient
query: SET @FromDate='2015-02-01', @ToDate='2015-05-01'; SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS ReportDates,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(result.Fee),2),2) AS 'GrossProd', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(result.Adj),2),2) AS 'TotAdj', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(result.Fee+result.Adj),2),2) AS 'TotAdjustedProd', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(result.PtInc+result.InsInc),2),2) AS 'Collections', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN result.IsSecondary=1 THEN result.PtInc+result.InsInc ELSE 0 END)/SUM(result.PtInc+result.InsInc)*100,2),2),'%') AS 'HygColl%', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN result.IsSecondary=0 THEN result.PtInc+result.InsInc ELSE 0 END)/SUM(result.PtInc+result.InsInc)*100,2),2),'%') AS 'ProvColl%', SUM(result.NewPats) AS NewPats, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(result.Fee)/SUM(result.NewPats),2),2) AS GrossProdPerNewPat FROM ( SELECT DATE(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date', CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc', prov.IsSecondary, 0 AS NewPats FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status='7' WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date', CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc', prov.IsSecondary, 0 AS NewPats FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum=adj.AdjType INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=adj.ProvNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc', prov.IsSecondary, 0 AS NewPats FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType=paytype.DefNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=ps.ProvNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum,ps.ProvNum,PayType,ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'PtInc', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc', prov.IsSecondary, 0 AS NewPats FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum,cp.PlanNum,claimpay.CheckDate UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'Date', '' AS 'PatName', '' AS 'Provider', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc', 0 AS 'IsSecondary', COUNT(p.PatNum) AS NewPats FROM patient p WHERE p.DateFirstVisit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) result UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT '','Provider:','GrossProd:','Collections:','Prod/hr:','Coll/hr:','Perio%:','','' UNION ALL SELECT '',Q.Prov,Q.GrossProd,Q.Collections,FORMAT(COALESCE(Q.GrossProd/hrs.Hours,0),2) AS ProdPerHour, FORMAT(COALESCE(Q.Collections/hrs.Hours,0),2) AS CollPerHour,Q.PerioPerc AS 'Perio%','','' FROM( SELECT result.Provider AS 'Prov',result.ProvNum, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(result.Fee),2),2) AS 'GrossProd', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(result.PtInc+result.InsInc),2),2) AS 'Collections', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN result.ProcCode LIKE 'D4%' THEN result.Fee ELSE 0 END))/SUM(result.Fee)*100,0),2),2),'%') AS 'PerioPerc' FROM ( SELECT DATE(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date', CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', pc.Descript AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', prov.ProvNum, clinic.request AS 'Clinic', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc', pc.ProcCode AS ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status='7' LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date', CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', adjtype.ItemName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', prov.ProvNum, clinic.request AS 'Clinic', 0 AS 'Fee', adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc', '' AS ProcCode FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum=adj.AdjType INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=adj.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', CONCAT(CONCAT(pc.AbbrDesc,' '),car.CarrierName) AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', prov.ProvNum, clinic.request AS 'Clinic', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc', '' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.WriteOff > '.0001' AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', paytype.ItemName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', prov.ProvNum, clinic.request AS 'Clinic', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc', '' AS ProcCode FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType=paytype.DefNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=ps.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=ps.ClinicNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum,ps.ProvNum,ps.ClinicNum,PayType,ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', car.CarrierName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', prov.ProvNum, clinic.request AS 'Clinic', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc', '' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum,cp.PlanNum,cp.ClinicNum,claimpay.CheckDate ) result GROUP BY result.Provider ) Q INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=Q.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT em.LName,em.FName, (SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND ce.ClockStatus IN(0,1)), TIMEDIFF(TimeDisplayed2, TimeDisplayed1),0)))+ SUM((CASE WHEN ce.AdjustIsOverridden=1 THEN TIME_TO_SEC(ce.Adjust) ELSE TIME_TO_SEC(ce.AdjustAuto) END)))/3600 AS Hours FROM employee em INNER JOIN clockevent ce ON ce.EmployeeNum=em.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ce.TimeDisplayed1) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY em.EmployeeNum ) hrs ON hrs.LName=pr.LName AND hrs.FName=pr.FName GROUP BY pr.ProvNum

request: Special day sheet broken down by provider.
query: SET @DaySheetDate='2022-10-05'; SET @ShowActivityEvenIfHidden=0; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SET @LastProv=-1; SELECT 'Report Date:' AS Provider,DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Type','' AS Current,'' AS MonthToDate,'' AS YearToDate,'' AS LastMonth UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT b.Provider, b.Type, b.Current, b.MonthToDate, b.YearToDate, b.LastMonth FROM( SELECT (CASE WHEN a.Type='Charges:' THEN 'Practice Totals' ELSE '' END) AS Provider, (CASE WHEN a.Type LIKE 'Space%' THEN '' ELSE a.Type END) AS 'Type', a.Current, a.MonthToDate, a.YearToDate, a.LastMonth FROM( SELECT pr.Abbr AS Provider, pr.ProvNum, 'Charges:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(prod.Current),0),2),2) AS Current, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(prod.MonthToDate),0),2),2) AS MonthToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(prod.YearToDate),0),2),2) AS YearToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(prod.LastMonth),0),2),2) AS LastMonth FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, SUM(CASE WHEN q.ProcDate=@DaySheetDate THEN q.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS Current, SUM(CASE WHEN q.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS MonthToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS YearToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN q.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM( SELECT pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN (pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate) ELSE (pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate) END) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) prod ON prod.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, prod.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr,pr.ProvNum, 'Ins Writeoffs:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(wo.Current),0),2),2) AS Current, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(wo.MonthToDate),0),2),2) AS MonthToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(wo.YearToDate),0),2),2) AS YearToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(wo.LastMonth),0),2),2) AS LastMonth FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, SUM(CASE WHEN q.DateCP=@DaySheetDate THEN q.InsW ELSE 0 END) AS Current, SUM(CASE WHEN q.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.InsW ELSE 0 END) AS MonthToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.InsW ELSE 0 END) AS YearToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN q.InsW ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM( SELECT cp.ProvNum, cp.DateCP, SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.WriteOff > 0.0001 AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) wo ON wo.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, wo.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'Credit Adjustments:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(credadj.Current),0),2),2) AS Current, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(credadj.MonthToDate),0),2),2) AS MonthToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(credadj.YearToDate),0),2),2) AS YearToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(credadj.LastMonth),0),2),2) AS LastMonth FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT adj.ProvNum, SUM(CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate=@DaySheetDate THEN -adj.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END) AS Current, SUM(CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN -adj.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END) AS MonthToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN -adj.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END) AS YearToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN -adj.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM adjustment adj WHERE (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) AND adj.AdjAmt < -.005 GROUP BY adj.ProvNum ) credadj ON credadj.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, credadj.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'Charge Adjustments:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(chargeadj.Current),0),2),2) AS Current, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(chargeadj.MonthToDate),0),2),2) AS MonthToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(chargeadj.YearToDate),0),2),2) AS YearToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(chargeadj.LastMonth),0),2),2) AS LastMonth FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT adj.ProvNum, SUM(CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate=@DaySheetDate THEN adj.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END) AS Current, SUM(CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN adj.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END) AS MonthToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN adj.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END) AS YearToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN adj.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM adjustment adj WHERE (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) AND adj.AdjAmt > .005 ) chargeadj ON chargeadj.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, chargeadj.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT '','','Space1','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'Patient Payments:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ptinc.Current),0),2),2) AS Current, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ptinc.MonthToDate),0),2),2) AS MonthToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ptinc.YearToDate),0),2),2) AS YearToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ptinc.LastMonth),0),2),2) AS LastMonth FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'ProvNum', 'None' AS 'Abbr', 1 AS 'IsHiddenReport', 0 AS 'ProvStatus' UNION ALL SELECT pr.ProvNum, pr.Abbr, pr.IsHiddenReport, pr.ProvStatus FROM provider pr ) pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, SUM(CASE WHEN q.PayDate=@DaySheetDate THEN q.PtInc ELSE 0 END) AS Current, SUM(CASE WHEN q.PayDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.PtInc ELSE 0 END) AS MonthToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.PayDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.PtInc ELSE 0 END) AS YearToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.PayDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN q.PtInc ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM( SELECT ps.ProvNum, pay.PayDate, SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN pay.PayDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE pay.PayDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) GROUP BY ps.PatNum, ps.ProvNum, pay.PayDate ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) ptinc ON ptinc.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, ptinc.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'Ins Payments:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(insinc.Current),0),2),2) AS Current, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(insinc.MonthToDate),0),2),2) AS MonthToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(insinc.YearToDate),0),2),2) AS YearToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(insinc.LastMonth),0),2),2) AS LastMonth FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, SUM(CASE WHEN q.CheckDate=@DaySheetDate THEN q.InsInc ELSE 0 END) AS Current, SUM(CASE WHEN q.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.InsInc ELSE 0 END) AS MonthToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.InsInc ELSE 0 END) AS YearToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN q.InsInc ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM( SELECT cp.ProvNum, claimpay.CheckDate, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum,cp.PlanNum,claimpay.CheckDate ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) insinc ON insinc.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, insinc.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'Total Payments:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(totinc.Current),0),2),2) AS Current, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(totinc.MonthToDate),0),2),2) AS MonthToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(totinc.YearToDate),0),2),2) AS YearToDate, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(totinc.LastMonth),0),2),2) AS LastMonth FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'ProvNum', 'None' AS 'Abbr', 1 AS 'IsHiddenReport', 0 AS 'ProvStatus' UNION ALL SELECT pr.ProvNum, pr.Abbr, pr.IsHiddenReport, pr.ProvStatus FROM provider pr ) pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, SUM(CASE WHEN q.Date=@DaySheetDate THEN q.Inc ELSE 0 END) AS Current, SUM(CASE WHEN q.Date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.Inc ELSE 0 END) AS MonthToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.Date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.Inc ELSE 0 END) AS YearToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN q.Date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN q.Inc ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM( SELECT cp.ProvNum, claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'Inc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum,cp.PlanNum,claimpay.CheckDate UNION ALL SELECT ps.ProvNum, pay.PayDate AS 'Date', SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Inc' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN pay.PayDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE pay.PayDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) GROUP BY ps.PatNum,ps.ProvNum,pay.PayDate ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) totinc ON totinc.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, totinc.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT '','','Space2','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'New Pats Seen:' AS 'Type', COALESCE(SUM(newpatsseen.Current),0) AS Current, COALESCE(SUM(newpatsseen.MonthToDate),0) AS MonthToDate, COALESCE(SUM(newpatsseen.YearToDate),0) AS YearToDate, COALESCE(SUM(newpatsseen.LastMonth),0) AS LastMonth FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate=@DaySheetDate THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS Current, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS MonthToDate, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS YearToDate, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS LastMonth FROM( SELECT ap.ProvNum, ap.PatNum, DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS AptDate FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=ap.ProvNum WHERE ap.AptStatus=2 AND ap.AptDateTime= ( SELECT MIN(appointment.AptDateTime) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.PatNum=ap.PatNum AND appointment.AptStatus=2 ) AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) newpatsseen ON newpatsseen.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, newpatsseen.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'Pats Seen:' AS 'Type', COALESCE(SUM(patsseen.Current),0) AS Current, COALESCE(SUM(patsseen.MonthToDate),0) AS MonthToDate, COALESCE(SUM(patsseen.YearToDate),0) AS YearToDate, COALESCE(SUM(patsseen.LastMonth),0) AS LastMonth FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate=@DaySheetDate THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS Current, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS MonthToDate, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS YearToDate, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS LastMonth FROM( SELECT ap.ProvNum, ap.PatNum, DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS AptDate FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = ap.ProvNum WHERE ap.AptStatus = 2 AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) patsseen ON patsseen.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, patsseen.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'Prod Per Pat:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(COALESCE(COALESCE(SUM(prodperpat.CurrentProd),0)/COALESCE(SUM(prodperpat.CurrentCount),0),0),2) AS Current, FORMAT(COALESCE(COALESCE(SUM(prodperpat.MonthToDateProd),0)/COALESCE(SUM(prodperpat.MonthToDateCount),0),0),2) AS MonthToDate, FORMAT(COALESCE(COALESCE(SUM(prodperpat.YearToDateProd),0)/COALESCE(SUM(prodperpat.YearToDateCount),0),0),2) AS YearToDate, FORMAT(COALESCE(COALESCE(SUM(prodperpat.LastMonthProd),0)/COALESCE(SUM(prodperpat.LastMonthCount),0),0),2) AS LastMonth FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, COALESCE(prod.Current,0) AS 'CurrentProd', COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate=@DaySheetDate THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)),0) AS 'CurrentCount', COALESCE(prod.MonthToDate,0) AS 'MonthToDateProd', COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)),0) AS 'MonthToDateCount', COALESCE(prod.YearToDate,0) AS 'YearToDateProd', COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)),0) AS 'YearToDateCount', COALESCE(prod.LastMonth,0) AS 'LastMonthProd', COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN q.AptDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN q.PatNum ELSE NULL END)),0) AS 'LastMonthCount' FROM( SELECT ap.ProvNum, ap.PatNum, DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS AptDate FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = ap.ProvNum WHERE ap.AptStatus = 2 AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) ) q LEFT JOIN( SELECT prod.ProvNum, SUM(CASE WHEN prod.ProcDate=@DaySheetDate THEN prod.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS Current, SUM(CASE WHEN prod.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN prod.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS MonthToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN prod.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN prod.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS YearToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN prod.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN prod.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM( SELECT pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum )prod GROUP BY prod.ProvNum )prod ON prod.ProvNum=q.ProvNum GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) prodperpat ON prodperpat.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, prodperpat.YearToDateProd > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT '','','Space3','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'Tot Ins Pay Est:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(totinspayest.Current),0),2),2) AS Current,'','','' FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, -SUM(q.InsEst) AS Current FROM( SELECT cp.ProvNum, cp.InsPayEst AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate=@DaySheetDate ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) totinspayest ON totinspayest.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, totinspayest.Current > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum, 'Tot Writeoff Est:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(totwoest.Current),0),2),2) AS Current,'','','' FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, -SUM(q.WriteOffEst) AS Current FROM( SELECT cp.ProvNum, cp.Writeoff AS prov.ProvNum = ap.ProvNum WHERE ap.AptStatus = 2 AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) ) q LEFT JOIN( SELECT prod.ProvNum, SUM(CASE WHEN prod.ProcDate=@DaySheetDate THEN prod.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS Current, SUM(CASE WHEN prod.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN prod.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS MonthToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN prod.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate,'%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate THEN prod.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS YearToDate, SUM(CASE WHEN prod.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH) THEN prod.Fee ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM( SELECT pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')<DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') THEN pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate-INTERVAL 1 MONTH,'%Y-%m-01') AND @DaySheetDate ELSE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@DaySheetDate, '%Y-01-01') AND @DaySheetDate END) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum )prod GROUP BY prod.ProvNum )prod ON prod.ProvNum=q.ProvNum GROUP BY q.ProvNum )prodperpat ON prodperpat.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, prodperpat.YearToDate > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 GROUP BY pr.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(pr.Abbr,' - ',CONCAT(pr.LName,', ',pr.FName)) AS Provider,pr.ProvNum,'Space3','','','','' FROM provider pr WHERE pr.IsHiddenReport = 0 AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(pr.Abbr,' - ',CONCAT(pr.LName,', ',pr.FName)) AS Provider, pr.ProvNum, 'Tot Ins Pay Est:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(totinspayest.Current,0),2),2) AS Current,'','','' FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, -SUM(q.InsEst) AS Current FROM( SELECT cp.ProvNum, cp.InsPayEst AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate=@DaySheetDate ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) totinspayest ON totinspayest.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, totinspayest.Current > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 GROUP BY pr.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(pr.Abbr,' - ',CONCAT(pr.LName,', ',pr.FName)) AS Provider, pr.ProvNum, 'Tot Writeoff Est:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(totwoest.Current,0),2),2) AS Current,'','','' FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, -SUM(q.WriteOffEst) AS Current FROM( SELECT cp.ProvNum, cp.Writeoff AS WriteOffEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate=@DaySheetDate ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum )totwoest ON totwoest.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, totwoest.Current > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 GROUP BY pr.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(pr.Abbr,' - ',CONCAT(pr.LName,', ',pr.FName)) AS Provider, pr.ProvNum, 'Tot Pat Portion Est:' AS 'Type', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(patport.Current,0),2),2) AS Current,'','','' FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN( SELECT q.ProvNum, SUM(q.Current) AS Current FROM( SELECT cp.ProvNum, -(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS Current FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate=@DaySheetDate UNION ALL SELECT z.ProvNum, SUM(z.Fee) AS Current FROM( SELECT pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate=@DaySheetDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) z GROUP BY z.ProvNum ) q GROUP BY q.ProvNum ) patport ON patport.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum WHERE IF(@ShowActivityEvenIfHidden, patport.Current > 0, pr.IsHiddenReport = 0) AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 GROUP BY pr.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(pr.Abbr,' - ',CONCAT(pr.LName,', ',pr.FName)) AS Provider,pr.ProvNum,'Dash',' FROM provider pr WHERE pr.IsHiddenReport = 0 AND pr.ProvStatus = 0 ) a ORDER BY a.Provider,a.ProvNum,FIELD(a.Type,'Dash','Charges:','Ins Writeoffs:','Credit Adjustments:','Charge Adjustments:','Space1', 'Patient Payments:','Ins Payments:','Total Payments:','Space2','New Pats Seen:','Pats Seen:','Prod Per Pat:','Space3', 'Tot Ins Pay Est:','Tot Writeoff Est:','Tot Pat Portion Est:') ) b

request: Monthly Production and income report for a specific provider
query: SET @FromDate='2019-01-01' , @ToDate='2019-01-31'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @WriteoffByDateOfService = ''; SELECT Trans.TransDate AS 'Date', DATE_FORMAT(Trans.TransDate,"%W") AS 'WeekDay', SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Production_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Sched' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Sched_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $Adjustment_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $Writeoff_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj','Sched') THEN Trans.TranAmount WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Writeoff') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS $NetProd_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('InsPayEst','InsPayEst2') THEN -Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $EstInsIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj','Sched','InsPayEst','InsPayEst2') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $EstPatIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $PatIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $InsIncome_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS $TotalIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProcDate AS TransDate,pl.ProvNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status='7' WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Sched' AS TranType,DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS TransDate,ap.ProvNum,COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)),0) AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON ap.AptNum = pl.AptNum WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ap.AptNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.AdjDate AS TransDate,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType,ps.DatePay AS TransDate,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount=0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,(CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN cp.ProcDate ELSE cp.DateCP END) AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,0 AS TranAmount,-cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN cp.ProcDate ELSE cp.DateCP END) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(@WriteoffByDateOfService='YES',cp.Status IN(0,1,4),cp.Status IN(1,4)) UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPayEst' AS TranType,cp.ProcDate AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum, -((COALESCE((CASE WHEN cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4 THEN(cp.WriteOff) ELSE(CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride=-1 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEst=-1 THEN 0 ELSE cp.WriteOffEst END) ELSE (cp.WriteOffEstOverride)END) END),0)) +(COALESCE((CASE WHEN cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4 THEN(cp.InsPayAmt) ELSE (CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride=-1 THEN(cp.InsEstTotal) ELSE (cp.InsEstTotalOverride)END) END),0)) ) AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(0,1,4,6) UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPayEst2' AS TranType,DATE(appt.AptDateTime) AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum, -((COALESCE((CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride=-1 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEst=-1 THEN 0 ELSE cp.WriteOffEst END) ELSE (cp.WriteOffEstOverride)END),0)) +(COALESCE((CASE WHEN cp.Status=0 THEN(cp.InsPayEst) WHEN cp.Status=6 THEN(CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride=-1 THEN(cp.InsEstTotal) ELSE (cp.InsEstTotalOverride)END) END),0)) ) AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus=1 INNER JOIN appointment appt ON appt.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND appt.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND DATE(appt.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum AND cp.Status IN(0,6) ) Trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum=Trans.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY Trans.TransDate ORDER BY Trans.TransDate;

request: List of procedures TPed in the date range.  Will only show procedures still TPed.  Also shows if they are scheduled, as well as some appointment information
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-28' , @ToDate='2015-06-28'; SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT pa.PatNum AS 'Pat DATE_FORMAT(pl.DateTP,'%m-%d-%Y') AS 'DateTP', pr.Abbr AS 'Provider', ProcFee AS ProcAmt, IF(ISNULL(appt.AptNum), "Unattached", "Attached") AS HasApt, prov.Abbr AS 'ApptProv',appt.AptDateTime AS ApptDateTime FROM patient pa INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pa.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum= pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D0120','D0270','D0272','D0274','D1110','D1120','D1206') INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN appointment appt ON appt.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND appt.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND appt.IsHygiene=0 LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=appt.ProvNum WHERE ProcStatus=1 AND DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY DateTP,pa.LName, pa.FName ) A UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT '','','',(CASE WHEN HasApt='Unattached' THEN 'Unattached Prod:' ELSE 'Attached Prod:' END),SUM(ProcFee),'','','','','','' FROM ( SELECT pa.PatNum AS 'Pat DATE_FORMAT(pl.DateTP,'%m-%d-%Y') AS 'DateTP', pr.Abbr AS 'Provider', ProcFee, IF(ISNULL(appt.AptNum), "Unattached", "Attached") AS HasApt, prov.Abbr AS 'ApptProv',appt.AptDateTime AS ApptDateTime FROM patient pa INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pa.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum= pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D0120','D0270','D0272','D0274','D1110','D1120','D1206') INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN appointment appt ON appt.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND appt.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND appt.IsHygiene=0 LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=appt.ProvNum WHERE ProcStatus=1 AND DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY DateTP,pa.LName, pa.FName ) A GROUP BY HasApt

request: List of outstanding PPO claims with a specific clinic
query: SET @clinic = '%Relaxation Dental%'; SELECT cl.request AS 'Clinic', ca.CarrierName,CONCAT(pa.FName,' ',pa.LName) AS 'Patient Name',DATE_FORMAT(pa.Birthdate,"%m/%d/%Y") AS DOB , CONCAT(pat.FName,' ',pat.LName) AS 'Subscriber Name',ins.SubscriberID, DATE_FORMAT(pat.Birthdate,"%m/%d/%Y") AS 'Subscriber DOB' FROM patient pa INNER JOIN claim cla ON pa.PatNum=cla.PatNum AND cla.ClaimStatus='S' INNER JOIN inssub ins ON cla.InsSubNum=ins.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ins.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum AND ip.PlanType='p' INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patient pat ON ins.Subscriber=pat.PatNum INNER JOIN clinic cl ON pa.ClinicNum=cl.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @clinic

request: Procedures not billed to insurance report. Optionally can be filtered by clinic
query: SET @FromDate ='2025-01-01', @ToDate ='2025-02-14'; SET @Clinics =''; SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS 'PatientName' ,procedurelog.ProcDate ,procedurecode.Descript ,CAST(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'ProcFee' FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND procedurelog.ProcFee > 0 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum INNER JOIN claimproc ON claimproc.procnum = procedurelog.procnum AND claimproc.NoBillIns = 0 AND claimproc.Status = 6 INNER JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum AND insplan.IsMedical = 0 LEFT JOIN clinic ON procedurelog.ClinicNum = clinic.ClinicNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(clinic.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinics)) GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcNum ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName, patient.PatNum, procedurelog.ProcNum

request: Completed Procedures in date range with counts for individual procedure codes and percentage of individual procedure code/total procedures completed.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-04-19', @ToDate='2016-04-21'; SET @TotalCmplt = (SELECT COUNT(procedurelog.ProcNum) FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2); SELECT procedurecode.ProcCode , procedurecode.Descript , COUNT(procedurecode.ProcCode) AS 'ProcsPerCode' ,@TotalCmplt AS 'TotalProcs' ,CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(procedurecode.ProcCode)/@TotalCmplt)*100,2),2),'%') AS 'PerCode%' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY procedurecode.ProcCode ORDER BY procedurecode.ProcCode

request: Custom A/R report for families with members that have not had a completed procedure since a specified date.
query: SET @LastProcDate = '2015-09-10'; SET @AgingAsOf='2015-09-04'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS Guarantor, E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS', E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS', E.91to180 AS '91-180 DAYS', E.181to360 AS '181-360 DAYS', E.Over360 AS '>360 DAYS', E.Total AS TOTAL, E.InsEst AS '-INS EST', E.PatEst AS '=PATIENT' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder, D.PatNum AS GuarantorNum, CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (D.FamCharges0to30) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (D.FamCharges31to60) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (D.FamCharges61to90) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (D.FamCharges91to180) ,2),2) AS 91to180, FORMAT(ROUND( (D.FamCharges181to360) ,2),2) AS 181to360, FORMAT(ROUND( (D.FamChargesOver360) ,2),2) AS Over360, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30)-SUM(B.Credits0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60)-SUM(B.Credits31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90)-SUM(B.Credits61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.Charges91to180)-SUM(B.Credits91to180) AS FamCharges91to180, SUM(B.Charges181to360)-SUM(B.Credits181to360) AS FamCharges181to360,SUM(B.ChargesOver360)-SUM(B.CreditsOver360) AS FamChargesOver360, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AgingAsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 180 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges91to180, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 180 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 360 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges181to360, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 360 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver360, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AgingAsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits0to30, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits31to60, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits61to90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 180 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits91to180, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 180 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 360 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits181to360, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AgingAsOf-INTERVAL 360 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS CreditsOver360 FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,(CASE WHEN ps.ProcNum != 0 THEN ProcDate ELSE ps.DatePay END) AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AgingAsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AgingAsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AgingAsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AgingAsOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) E INNER JOIN ( SELECT Guarantor FROM( SELECT patient.PatNum, patient.Guarantor, MAX(procedurelog.ProcDate)DateLastProc FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY patient.PatNum )A WHERE DateLastProc < @LastProcDate GROUP BY A.Guarantor )P ON E.GuarantorNum = P.Guarantor ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Daily payments report like internal report without provider split.
query: SET @FromDate='2015-09-09', @ToDate='2015-09-11'; SELECT Pay.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type', Pay.Date, Pay.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', Pay.PatientName AS 'Patient Name (one of)', Pay.CheckNum AS 'Check Pay.Amt AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, 'Insurance Check' AS 'PaymentType', CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date', carrier.CarrierName, MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', claimpayment.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),2) AS 'Amt' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=claimproc.ClinicNum WHERE (claimproc.Status=1 OR claimproc.Status=4) AND claimpayment.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Clinic', '' AS CheckNum, '' AS 'Amt' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE definition.ItemName END) AS 'PaymentType', CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(payment.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date', NULL AS 'Carrier', MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', payment.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum=paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType=definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON payment.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY payment.PayNum ) Pay ORDER BY Pay.ItemOrder,Pay.PaymentType,Pay.Date,Pay.PatientName

request: Patient, total fees, and claim information from completed Appointments within a specified date range with claims from a specified carrier.
