query: SET @CarrierName = '%DentaQuest%'; SET @FromDate = '2022-09-14', @ToDate = '2022-09-15'; SET @pos = 0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS ' ,d.Patient ,d.Appointment ,d.AptFees AS '$AptFees_' ,d.PatInsCarrier ,d.InsPayAmt AS '$InsPayAmt_' FROM( SELECT CONCAT(c.LName, ', ', c.FName) AS 'Patient' ,DATE_FORMAT(c.Appointment, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'Appointment' ,SUM(c.ProcFee) AS 'AptFees' ,c.PatInsCarrier ,SUM(c.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM( SELECT b.LName ,b.Fname ,b.AptDateTime AS 'Appointment' ,b.ProcFee ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT carrier.CarrierName ORDER BY (CASE WHEN claim.ClaimType = 'P' THEN 1 WHEN claim.ClaimType = 'S' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'PatInsCarrier' ,COALESCE(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),0) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,b.AptNum ,b.PatNum FROM( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee*(CASE procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits END)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'ProcFee' ,appointment.AptDateTime ,patient.LName ,patient.FName ,procedurelog.ProcNum ,appointment.AptNum ,patient.PatNum FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON procedurelog.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcNum )b INNER JOIN claimproc ON claimproc.ProcNum = B.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0,1,4,5) INNER JOIN claim ON claimproc.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType != 'PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ON claim.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum AND carrier.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName GROUP BY b.ProcNum )c GROUP BY c.AptNum ORDER BY c.Appointment, c.LName, c.FName )d

request: Custom production and income report like internal report with writeoffs by insurance payment date and no day splits.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-01-01', @ToDate='2023-12-31'; SELECT CAST(SUM(result.Fee) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Production' , CAST(SUM(result.Adj) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Adjust' , CAST(SUM(result.InsW) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Writeoff' , CAST(SUM(result.Fee) + (SUM(result.Adj) + SUM(result.InsW)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'NetProd' , CAST(SUM(result.PtInc) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'PtIncome' , CAST(SUM(result.InsInc) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'InsIncome' , CAST(SUM(result.PtInc) + SUM(result.InsInc) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'TotIncome' FROM ( SELECT DATE(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date' , CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName' , pc.Descript AS 'request' , prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' , clinic.request AS 'Clinic' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'InsW' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' , CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName' , adjtype.ItemName AS 'request' , prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' , clinic.request AS 'Clinic' , 0 AS 'Fee' , adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'InsW' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum = adj.AdjType INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = adj.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date' , CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName' , CONCAT(CONCAT(pc.AbbrDesc,' '),car.CarrierName) AS 'request' , prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' , clinic.request AS 'Clinic' , 0 AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'Adj' , -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = cp.ClinicNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND ABS(cp.WriteOff) >= 0.005 AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date' , CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName' , paytype.ItemName AS 'request' , prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' , clinic.request AS 'Clinic' , 0 AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'InsW' , SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType = paytype.DefNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = ps.ClinicNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum, ps.ProvNum, ps.ClinicNum, PayType, ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date' , CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName' , car.CarrierName AS 'request' , prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' , clinic.request AS 'Clinic' , 0 AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'InsW' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNuM INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = cp.ClinicNum WHERE (cp.Status = 1 OR cp.Status = 4) AND claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum, cp.ProvNum, cp.PlanNum, cp.ClinicNum, claimpay.CheckDate ) result ORDER BY result.Date, result.PatName, result.request, result.Provider

request: Aging for families with any balance
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR, E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS',E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS',E.Over90 AS '>90 DAYS',E.Total AS TOTAL, E.InsEst AS '-INS EST',E.PatEst AS '=PATIENT' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN D.PatNum IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 2 END) AS ItemOrder, (CASE WHEN D.PatNum IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) ELSE 'Totals:' END) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(D.FamInsEst),0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal)-COALESCE(SUM(D.FamInsEst),0),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum WITH ROLLUP ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 GROUP BY D.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Aging for families with any balance. Includes 91-120 column.
query: SET @AsOf='2015-11-03'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR, E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS',E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS',E.91to120 AS '91-120 DAYS', E.Over120 AS '>120 DAYS',E.Total AS TOTAL, E.InsEst AS '-INS EST',E.PatEst AS '=PATIENT' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN D.FamCharges91to120 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 91to120, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over120, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.Charges91to120) AS FamCharges91to120,SUM(B.ChargesOver120) AS FamChargesOver120, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges91to120, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver120, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,pl.ClinicNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,ps.ClinicNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,a.ClinicNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount,cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount,MAX(ppc.ClinicNum) AS ClinicNum FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN D.FamCharges91to120 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 91to120, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over120, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.Charges91to120) AS FamCharges91to120,SUM(B.ChargesOver120) AS FamChargesOver120, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges91to120, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver120, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Aging for families with any balance with 90 - 120 and billing type filter. A/R for versions 14.3 through 16.1
query: SET @AsOf='2016-08-15'; SET @BillingTypes='Standard Account|Bad Debt - Precollections|Bad Debt - Sent to Collections'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR,E.BillingType, E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS',E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS',E.91to120 AS '91-120 DAYS', E.Over120 AS '>120 DAYS',E.Total AS TOTAL, E.InsEst AS '-INS EST',E.PatEst AS '=PATIENT' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN D.FamCharges91to120 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 91to120, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over120, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst, D.BillingType FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.Charges91to120) AS FamCharges91to120,SUM(B.ChargesOver120) AS FamChargesOver120, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst,d.ItemName AS BillingType FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges91to120, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver120, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,pl.ClinicNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,ps.ClinicNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,a.ClinicNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount,cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount,MAX(ppc.ClinicNum) AS ClinicNum FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor INNER JOIN definition d ON g.BillingType=d.DefNum WHERE d.ItemName REGEXP @BillingTypes GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN D.FamCharges91to120 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 91to120, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over120, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst, '' AS BillingType FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.Charges91to120) AS FamCharges91to120,SUM(B.ChargesOver120) AS FamChargesOver120, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges91to120, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver120, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor INNER JOIN definition d ON g.BillingType=d.DefNum WHERE d.ItemName REGEXP @BillingTypes GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'Billing Type Breakdown:',' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder,'' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN D.FamCharges91to120 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 91to120, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over120, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst, D.BillingType FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.Charges91to120) AS FamCharges91to120,SUM(B.ChargesOver120) AS FamChargesOver120, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst,d.ItemName AS BillingType FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges91to120, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver120, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,pl.ClinicNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,ps.ClinicNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,a.ClinicNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount,cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount,MAX(ppc.ClinicNum) AS ClinicNum FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor INNER JOIN definition d ON g.BillingType=d.DefNum WHERE d.ItemName REGEXP @BillingTypes GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 GROUP BY BillingType ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Aging for families with any balance with last family payment date. A/R for versions 14.3 to 16.1.
query: SET @AsOf='2015-11-03'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR, E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS',E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS',E.Over90 AS '>90 DAYS',E.Total AS TOTAL, E.InsEst AS '-INS EST',E.PatEst AS '=PATIENT', (CASE WHEN E.FamLastPmt='01/01/0001' THEN 'NoPayments' ELSE E.FamLastPmt END) AS FamLastPmt FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst, DATE_FORMAT(D.FamLastPmt,"%m/%d/%Y") AS FamLastPmt FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst,MAX(COALESCE(PayDate.PatLastPmt,'0001-01-01')) AS FamLastPmt FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount,pl.ClinicNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,ps.ClinicNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount,a.ClinicNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount,cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount,MAX(ppc.ClinicNum) AS ClinicNum FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.PatNum,MAX(ps.DatePay) AS PatLastPmt FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay<=@AsOf GROUP BY ps.PatNum ) PayDate ON PayDate.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst, '' AS FamLastPmt FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Special aging for families with any balance that subtracts writeoff estimates from aged balances. Includes 91-120 day column as well as >120 day column. Our internal aging report has a column named '-INS EST' that we subtract from the family balance to give an estimated patient portion. The '-INS EST' column is the amount insurance is expected to pay plus the estimated writeoff amount. This query instead takes the writeoff amount and subtracts it from the aged family balance based on the procedure date. So instead of subtracting it out of the 'TOTAL' column, it is subtracted from each of the aged columns, which are then summed to equal the 'TOTAL' column. The '-INS EST' column is now just the estimated insurance payment amount. If compared to our internal aging report, the '=PATIENT' column should not change. The 'TOTAL' column is the amount an office might actually expect to receive from their outstanding production, provided the estimated writeoffs are correct. This does inclued negative balances.
query: SET @AsOf='2015-11-03'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR, E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS',E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS',E.91to120 AS '91-120 DAYS', E.Over120 AS '>120 DAYS',E.Total AS TOTAL, E.InsEst AS '-INS EST',E.PatEst AS '=PATIENT' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN D.FamCharges91to120 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 91to120, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over120, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst,0)) AS FamBal, SUM(B.Charges0to30)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst0to30,0)) AS FamCharges0to30, SUM(B.Charges31to60)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst31to60,0)) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst61to90,0)) AS FamCharges61to90, SUM(B.Charges91to120)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst91to120,0)) AS FamCharges91to120, SUM(B.ChargesOver120)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEstOver120,0)) AS FamChargesOver120, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits,SUM(COALESCE(InsPay.InsPayEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges91to120, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver120, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS InsPayEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) InsPay ON InsPay.PatNum=B.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS WOEst, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEst0to30, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEst31to60, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEst61to90, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEst91to120, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEstOver120 FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) WO ON WO.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN D.FamCharges91to120 WHEN D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120+D.FamCharges91to120-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 91to120, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver120 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver120-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over120, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst,0)) AS FamBal, SUM(B.Charges0to30)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst0to30,0)) AS FamCharges0to30, SUM(B.Charges31to60)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst31to60,0)) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst61to90,0)) AS FamCharges61to90, SUM(B.Charges91to120)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEst91to120,0)) AS FamCharges91to120, SUM(B.ChargesOver120)-SUM(COALESCE(WO.WOEstOver120,0)) AS FamChargesOver120, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits,SUM(COALESCE(InsPay.InsPayEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges91to120, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver120, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS InsPayEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) InsPay ON InsPay.PatNum=B.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS WOEst, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEst0to30, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEst31to60, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEst61to90, SUM(CASE WHEN (cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND cp.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEst91to120, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY) THEN cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS WOEstOver120 FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) WO ON WO.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Commlog entries with a key word by PatNum
query: SET @Anote='%%', @PatID='00'; SELECT PatNum, CommDateTime,Note FROM commlog WHERE NOTE LIKE @ANote AND LENGTH(Note)>1 AND PatNum=@PatID ORDER BY DATE(CommDateTime) DESC, Note;

request: Displays a list of subscribers for a specified insurance carrier.
query: SET @pos=0, @CarrierStartsWith='%%'; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count',A.* FROM ( SELECT carrier.CarrierName, CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS SubscriberName, carrier.Phone, insplan.Groupname FROM insplan INNER JOIN inssub ON insplan.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=inssub.Subscriber INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=insplan.CarrierNum AND carrier.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierStartsWith INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.InsSubNum = inssub.InsSubNum GROUP BY inssub.InsSubNum ORDER BY carrier.CarrierName,patient.LName )A;

request: Insurance plans with patient name, subscriber name, carrier name, and patient's relationship to subscriber where the subscriber is different from the patient and relationship is self.
query: SELECT CONCAT(sub.LName,', ',sub.FName) AS 'Subscriber Name', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', (CASE pp.Relationship WHEN 0 THEN 'Self' WHEN 1 THEN 'Spouse' WHEN 2 THEN 'Child' WHEN 3 THEN 'Employee' WHEN 4 THEN 'HandicapDep' WHEN 5 THEN 'SignifOther' WHEN 6 THEN 'InjuredPlaintiff' WHEN 7 THEN 'LifePartner' WHEN 8 THEN 'Dependent' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS 'Relationship to Subscriber' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patient sub ON sub.PatNum=iss.Subscriber WHERE p.PatNum!=iss.Subscriber AND pp.Relationship=0

request: Mailing information for guarantors with invalid zip codes.
query: SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', A.* FROM ( SELECT g.LName, g.FName, g.Address, g.Address2, g.City, g.State, g.Zip, g.BalTotal FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor WHERE p.PatStatus=0 AND g.Zip NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]{5}$|^[0-9]{5}-[0-9]{4}$' GROUP BY g.PatNum ORDER BY g.LName, g.FName ) A;

request: Completed procedures not associated with an appointment (great for tracking down why P & I report does not match production in the Appt module)
query: SET @FromDate='2015-11-01',@ToDate='2015-11-30'; SELECT pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate,pc.ProcCode,FORMAT(ROUND(pl.ProcFee,2),2) AS ProcFee,'NoApt' AS AptDate FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.AptNum=0 ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName

request: Patients not assigned to a clinic
query: SELECT patient.PatNum,patient.LName,patient.FName,patient.ClinicNum FROM patient WHERE patient.ClinicNum=0 AND patient.PatStatus=0 ORDER BY patient.LName,patient.FName

request: Scheduled or broken appointments with completed procedures - like DBM
query: SELECT CONCAT(LName, ', ',FName, ' ', MiddleI) AS Patient, pc.ProcCode, pc.Descript, pl.ProcDate,ap.AptDateTime, pl.ProvNum FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ap ON patient.PatNum=ap.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON ap.AptNum=pl.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum= pc.CodeNum WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,4,5) AND pl.ProcStatus=2 ORDER BY Lname, FName

request: Completed Appointments with treatment planned procedures - like DBM
query: SELECT CONCAT(LName, ', ',FName, ' ', MiddleI) AS Patient, pc.ProcCode, pc.Descript, pl.ProcDate, ap.AptDateTime, pl.ProvNum FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ap ON patient.PatNum=ap.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON ap.AptNum=pl.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum= pc.CodeNum WHERE ap.AptStatus=2 AND pl.ProcStatus=1 ORDER BY Lname, Fname

request: Claims with Insurance Payment attached that has the Status as not 'Received'
query: SET @FromDate='2014-03-22', @ToDate='2015-03-22'; SELECT carrier.CarrierName, c.PatNum, DATE_FORMAT(c.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Service Date', c.ClaimFee, c.InsPayEst, c.InsPayAmt, c.WriteOff,(c.ClaimFee-c.InsPayAmt-c.Writeoff) AS $Rem, c.DateReceived, c.DedApplied, c.ClaimStatus FROM claim c INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=c.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=c.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND c.ClaimStatus!='R' AND cp.ClaimPaymentNum!=0 ORDER BY CarrierName;

request: Report for UDS reporting for FQHC Dental Sealant Measure. Refer to the UDS Manual for 2015 for more information.
query: SET @ReportYear = '2015'; SET @ReportingDateStart = CONCAT(@ReportYear,'-','01','-','01'), @ReportingDateEnd = CONCAT(@ReportYear,'-','12','-','31'); SET @PatientDOBStart = @ReportingDateStart - INTERVAL 9 YEAR, @PatientDOBEnd = @ReportingDateEnd - INTERVAL 6 YEAR; SELECT provider.LName, COUNT(ColA.DenominatorPat) AS 'A', 'Refer to Column A' AS 'B', COUNT(ColC.NumeratorPat) AS 'C', FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(ColC.NumeratorPat)/COUNT(ColA.DenominatorPat)) * 100,2),2) AS '%' FROM ( SELECT denom.PatNum AS DenominatorPat,denom.ProvNum FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT initial.PatNum, initial.ProvNum FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProvNum, patient.PatNum, procedurelog.MedicalCode, procedurecode.ProcCode FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @ReportingDateStart AND @ReportingDateEnd AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum WHERE patient.Birthdate BETWEEN @PatientDOBStart AND @PatientDOBEnd HAVING procedurelog.MedicalCode IN ('99201','99202','99203','99204','99205','99212','99213','99214','99215','99391','99392','99393','99394','99381','99382','99383','99384','99395','99385') OR procedurecode.ProcCode IN ('D0120','D0145','D0150','D0180','D0191','D0140','D0160','D0170') )initial INNER JOIN procedurelog ON initial.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @ReportingDateStart AND @ReportingDateEnd AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum WHERE initial.ProcCode IN ('D0120','D0145','D0150','D0180','D0191') AND (procedurecode.ProcCode IN ('D0602','D0603') OR procedurelog.SnomedBodySite IN ('609399004','609401005','609402003','609403008')) )denom WHERE denom.PatNum NOT IN ( SELECT A.PatNum FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, COUNT(DISTINCT procedurelog.ToothNum) AS ToothNums FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN (CASE WHEN (procedurelog.DiagnosticCode IN ('520.6','520.8','520.9') OR procedurelog.DiagnosticCode2 IN ('520.6','520.8','520.9') OR procedurelog.DiagnosticCode3 IN ('520.6','520.8','520.9') OR procedurelog.DiagnosticCode4 IN ('520.6','520.8','520.9') OR procedurelog.DiagnosticCode IN ('520.6','520.8','520.9') OR procedurelog.SnomedBodySite IN (procedurelog.SnomedBodySite = '234713009' OR procedurecode.ProcCode = 'D1351') THEN @ReportingDateStart ELSE @ReportingDateEnd END) AND procedurelog.ToothNum IN (14,3,19,30) AND (procedurelog.DiagnosticCode IN ('520.6', '520.8', '520.9', 'K00.6', '520.3','521.00','521.09','521.0','521.02','521.03','522.0','522.5', '234713009','2955000','4237001','5494004','25840002','32620007', '42711005','44385007','44758003','65413006','75037000','76719002', '80753001','80967001','84752003','95247003','95249000','95252008', NumeratorPat FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, COUNT(DISTINCT procedurelog.ToothNum) AS ToothNums FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @ReportingDateStart AND @ReportingDateEnd AND procedurelog.ToothNum IN (14,3,19,30) AND (procedurelog.SnomedBodySite = '234713009' OR procedurecode.ProcCode = 'D1351') GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum )Numer )ColC ON ColC.NumeratorPat = ColA.DenominatorPat INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = ColA.ProvNum GROUP BY LName UNION ALL SELECT '________','_______','_________________','_______','_______' UNION ALL SELECT 'Totals:', COUNT(ColA.DenominatorPat) AS 'A', 'Refer to Column A' AS 'B', COUNT(ColC.NumeratorPat) AS 'C', FORMAT(ROUND((COUNT(ColC.NumeratorPat)/COUNT(ColA.DenominatorPat)) * 100,2),2) AS '%' FROM ( SELECT denom.PatNum AS DenominatorPat,denom.ProvNum FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT initial.PatNum, initial.ProvNum FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProvNum, patient.PatNum, procedurelog.MedicalCode, procedurecode.ProcCode FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode IN ('D1352','D2140','D2150','D2160','D2161', 'D2335','D2391','D2392','D2393','D2394','D2410','D2420','D2430', 'D2510','D2520','D2530','D2542','D2543','D2544','D2610','D2620', request: Aging for families with any balance.  Includes aging of credits.
query: SET @AsOf='2018-09-19'; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR, E.PatNum AS 'Pat E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS',E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS',E.Over90 AS '>90 DAYS',E.Total AS TOTAL FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, D.PatNum, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60 THEN -D.FamCredits0to30 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCredits0to30<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCredits31to60-D.FamCredits0to30+D.FamCharges END) END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90 THEN -D.FamCredits31to60 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCharges END) END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver90 THEN -D.FamCredits61to90 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCharges END) END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges>=D.FamCreditsOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCharges-D.FamCreditsOver90 END) END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum, g.LName, g.FName, SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal, SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30, SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90, SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(B.Credits0to30) AS FamCredits0to30, SUM(B.Credits31to60) AS FamCredits31to60, SUM(B.Credits61to90) AS FamCredits61to90, SUM(B.CreditsOver90) AS FamCreditsOver90, SUM(B.Charges) AS FamCharges FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits0to30, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits31to60, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits61to90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS CreditsOver90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor, '' AS '', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60 THEN -D.FamCredits0to30 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCredits0to30<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCredits31to60-D.FamCredits0to30+D.FamCharges END) END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90 THEN -D.FamCredits31to60 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCharges END) END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver90 THEN -D.FamCredits61to90 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCharges END) END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges>=D.FamCreditsOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCharges-D.FamCreditsOver90 END) END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(B.Credits0to30) AS FamCredits0to30,SUM(B.Credits31to60) AS FamCredits31to60,SUM(B.Credits61to90) AS FamCredits61to90,SUM(B.CreditsOver90) AS FamCreditsOver90,SUM(B.Charges) AS FamCharges FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits0to30, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits31to60, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits61to90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS CreditsOver90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Families with a positive balance who have had at least two statements sent to them since their last payment, and where the guarantor has a specified billing type
query: SET @BillingTypes=''; SELECT CONCAT(g.LName,', ',g.FName) AS 'Account Holder' ,def.ItemName AS 'Biling Type' ,lastPay.PayDate AS 'LastPaidOn' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(ISNULL(lastPay.Guarantor) OR st.DateSent > lastPay.PayDate,st.StatementNum,NULL)) AS 'Statements' ,g.HmPhone ,g.WirelessPhone ,g.WkPhone FROM patient g INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = g.BillingType AND def.Category = 4 AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemName,@BillingTypes)) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Guarantor = g.PatNum INNER JOIN statement st ON st.PatNum = p.PatNum AND st.IsSent LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(py.PayDate) AS 'PayDate' ,p.Guarantor FROM payment py INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.PayNum = py.PayNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ps.PatNum WHERE py.PayAmt > 0.005 GROUP BY p.Guarantor ) lastPay ON lastPay.Guarantor = g.PatNum WHERE g.BalTotal > 0.005 GROUP BY g.PatNum HAVING `Statements` > 1;

request: New Patients report showing patient age, the patient's next appointment date, procedures codes and fees.  Like internal New Patients report. Optionally excludes patients with no production.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ExcludeNoProd='0'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT bkn.CodeNum) INTO @Broken FROM procedurecode bkn WHERE bkn.ProcCode IN ('D9986','D9987'); SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Date,'') AS 'Date' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.LName,'') AS 'Last Name' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.FName,'') AS 'First Name' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Age,'') AS 'Current Age' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Referral,'') AS 'Referred From' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Lifetime,SUM(core.Lifetime)),2) AS 'Lifetime Gross Prod' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.NextAppt,'') AS 'Date Next Appt' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.NextCodes,'') AS 'Next Appt Procs' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.NextFees,SUM(core.NextFees)),2) AS 'Next Appt Fees' FROM ( SELECT fv.dateFirstVisit AS 'Date' ,p.LName ,p.FName ,p.PatNum ,(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) > 120 THEN 'Not Entered' ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) END) AS 'Age' ,IFNULL(( SELECT CONCAT(r.LName, IF(LENGTH(r.FName) = 0,'',CONCAT(' ',r.FName))) FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum WHERE ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.ItemOrder = ( SELECT MIN(refa.ItemOrder) FROM refattach refa WHERE refa.RefType = 1 AND refa.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AND ra.PatNum = p.PatNum ),'') AS 'Referral' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(prod.ProcFee * (prod.UnitQty + prod.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog prod WHERE prod.ProcStatus = 2 AND prod.PatNum = p.PatNum ),0) AS 'Lifetime' ,IFNULL(nv.NextAptDT,'') AS 'NextAppt' ,IFNULL(nv.NextApptCodes,0) AS 'NextCodes' ,IFNULL(nv.NextApptFee,0) AS 'NextFees' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS 'dateFirstVisit' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum,@Broken) GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) fv ON fv.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT aptCore.PatNum ,aptCore.NextAptDT ,SUM(IFNULL(pl1.ProcFee * (pl1.UnitQty + pl1.BaseUnits),0)) AS 'NextApptFee' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pc.ProcCode) AS
