'NextApptCodes' FROM ( SELECT a.PatNum ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(a.AptDateTime ORDER BY a.AptDateTime ASC SEPARATOR '|'),'|',1) AS 'NextAptDT' ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime ASC SEPARATOR '|'),'|',1) AS 'NextAptNum' FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptDateTime > CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 1 GROUP BY a.PatNum ) aptCore LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl1 ON pl1.AptNum = aptCore.NextAptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl1.CodeNum GROUP BY aptCore.PatNum ) nv ON nv.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE fv.dateFirstVisit BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY fv.dateFirstVisit, p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE WHERE IF(@ExcludeNoProd = 1,core.Lifetime > 0.005,TRUE) GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',core.PatNum),dup.Num) ORDER BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'+', core.Date, '-', core.LName, '|', core.FName, '_', core.PatNum),dup.Num)

request: Work treatment planned in a date range, and status (is it complete or TP) and whether accepted (scheduled or complete) or just TP and not accepted (not scheduled).
query: SET @pos=0, @StartDate='2015-11-01' , @EndDate='2015-11-30'; SELECT IF(C.ItemOrder=1,@pos:=@pos+1,C.ToothNum) AS 'Count',C.PatName,C.Code,C.request,C.ToothNum, C.DateTP,C.Provider,IF(C.ItemOrder=3,' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder',A.PatName,A.Code,A.request,A.ToothNum,A.DateTP,A.Abbr AS 'Provider',A.Status,A.DateApt,A.ProcFee FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(pa.LName,", ",pa.FName) AS PatName,pc.ProcCode AS 'Code', abbrdesc AS 'request', ToothNum, DATE_FORMAT(pl.DateTP,'%m-%d-%Y') AS 'DateTP',pr.Abbr,ProcFee,COALESCE(ap.AptDateTime,'') AS DateApt, IF(pl.AptNum, IF(pl.ProcStatus=2, 'Complete', IF(pl.Procstatus=1, 'Scheduled', 'Other')), IF(pl.ProcStatus=2, 'Complete','TP')) AS 'Status' FROM patient pa INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pa.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum= pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum=pl.AptNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN(1,2) AND (DateTP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate) ORDER BY STATUS,pa.LName,pa.FName ) A UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS 'ItemOrder','','','','','','',B.Status,'Subtotal:',SUM(B.ProcFee) FROM ( SELECT '' AS PatName,'' AS 'Code','' AS request,'' AS ToothNum,'' AS DateTP, ProcFee,'', IF(pl.AptNum, IF(pl.ProcStatus=2, 'Complete', IF(pl.Procstatus=1, 'Scheduled', 'Other')), IF(pl.ProcStatus=2, 'Complete','TP')) AS 'Status' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN(1,2) AND (DateTP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate) ) B GROUP BY B.Status UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS 'ItemOrder',' FROM ( SELECT '' AS PatName,'' AS 'Code','' AS request,'' AS ToothNum,'' AS DateTP, ProcFee,'', IF(pl.AptNum, IF(pl.ProcStatus=2, 'Complete', IF(pl.Procstatus=1, 'Scheduled', 'Other')), IF(pl.ProcStatus=2, 'Complete','TP')) AS 'Status' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN(1,2) AND (DateTP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate) ) B GROUP BY B.Status ORDER BY STATUS,ItemOrder,PatName ) C

request: Patients gross production, net production, and collection in date range by zip code.
query: SET @StartDate='2018-01-01' , @EndDate='2018-01-31'; SET @Zips="97301|97302"; SET @Zips=(CASE WHEN @Zips="" THEN ".*" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Zips,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT p.Zip,p.PatNum,COALESCE(CONCAT(r.LName,IF(r.FName='','',','),r.FName),"") AS 'ReferralName', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(prod.PatFees,0),2),2) AS 'GrossProduction', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(prod.PatFees,0)+COALESCE(ad.PatAdjAmts,0)-COALESCE(cp.PatWriteOffs,0),2),2) AS 'NetProduction', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(ps.PatPay,0)+COALESCE(inspay.PatInsAmts,0),2),2) AS 'Collections', IF(YEAR(Birthdate)>1880,(YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)),'') AS 'Age',p.PatStatus FROM patient p LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.ItemOrder=(SELECT MIN(refa.ItemOrder) FROM refattach refa WHERE ra.PatNum=refa.PatNum AND refa.RefType = 1 ) LEFT JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT Z.PatNum,SUM(Z.Fee) AS PatFees FROM( SELECT pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cpcap.WriteOff),0) AS Fee,pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cpcap ON cpcap.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cpcap.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum )Z GROUP BY Z.PatNum ) prod ON prod.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(AdjAmt) AS PatAdjAmts,PatNum FROM adjustment WHERE AdjDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY PatNum )ad ON ad.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(WriteOff) AS PatWriteOffs,PatNum FROM claimproc WHERE STATUS IN (1,4,0) AND ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY PatNum )cp ON cp.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) AS PatPay,PatNum FROM paysplit WHERE DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY PatNum ) ps ON ps.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(InsPayAmt) AS PatInsAmts,PatNum FROM claimproc WHERE DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum!=0 GROUP BY PatNum ) inspay ON inspay.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE p.Zip REGEXP @Zips AND p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.Zip,p.LName, p.FName ) A UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT p.Zip,'' AS PatNum,'' AS Referral, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(prod.PatFees),0),2),2) AS 'GrossProduction', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(prod.PatFees),0)+COALESCE(ad.PatAdjAmts,0)-COALESCE(cp.PatWriteOffs,0),2),2) AS 'NetProduction', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(ps.PatPay,0)+COALESCE(inspay.PatInsAmts,0),2),2) AS 'Collections', '' AS Age,'' AS PatStatus FROM patient p LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.ItemOrder=(SELECT MIN(refa.ItemOrder) FROM refattach refa WHERE ra.PatNum=refa.PatNum AND refa.RefType = 1 ) LEFT JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT Z.PatNum,SUM(Z.Fee) AS PatFees FROM( SELECT pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cpcap.WriteOff),0) AS Fee,pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cpcap ON cpcap.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cpcap.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum )Z GROUP BY Z.PatNum ) prod ON prod.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(AdjAmt) AS PatAdjAmts,pt.Zip FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient pt ON pt.PatNum=adj.PatNum WHERE AdjDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pt.Zip )ad ON ad.Zip=p.Zip LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(WriteOff) AS PatWriteOffs,pt.Zip FROM claimproc cproc INNER JOIN patient pt ON pt.PatNum=cproc.PatNum WHERE STATUS IN (1,4,0) AND ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pt.Zip )cp ON cp.Zip=p.Zip LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) AS PatPay,pt.Zip FROM paysplit psp INNER JOIN patient pt ON pt.PatNum=psp.PatNum WHERE DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pt.Zip ) ps ON ps.Zip=p.Zip LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(InsPayAmt) AS PatInsAmts,pt.Zip FROM claimproc cproc INNER JOIN patient pt ON pt.PatNum=cproc.PatNum WHERE DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND cproc.ClaimPaymentNum!=0 GROUP BY pt.Zip ) inspay ON inspay.Zip=p.Zip WHERE p.Zip REGEXP @Zips AND p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY p.Zip ORDER BY p.Zip ) B

request: Patients with their referral source, appointment dates, net production, total TP procedures, total scheduled procedures, and total unscheduled procedures.
query: SET @StartDate='2018-01-01', @EndDate='2018-01-30'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ap.PatNum), COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)),0)+COALESCE(SUM(ad.Amt),0)-COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Net Prod', COALESCE(tpprocs.TPAmt,0) AS 'Total TP', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(futappt.FutAmt,0),2),2) AS 'Scheduled', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(tpprocs.TPAmt,0)-COALESCE(futappt.FutAmt,0),2),2) AS 'Unscheduled' INTO @PatCount,@NetProd,@TotalTP,@Scheduled,@Unscheduled FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(AdjAmt) AS Amt,ProcNum FROM adjustment WHERE ProcNum!=0 GROUP BY ProcNum )ad ON ad.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(WriteOff) AS WriteOff,ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE STATUS IN (1,4,0,7) GROUP BY ProcNum )cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ptp.ProcFee) AS TPAmt FROM procedurelog ptp WHERE ptp.PatNum IN (SELECT PatNum FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus IN (1,2,4) AND AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate) AND ptp.ProcStatus=1 ) tpprocs ON 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(plog.ProcFee) AS FutAmt FROM procedurelog plog INNER JOIN appointment appt ON appt.AptNum=plog.AptNum WHERE appt.AptDateTime>CURDATE() AND plog.ProcStatus=1 AND plog.PatNum IN (SELECT PatNum FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus IN (1,2,4) AND AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate) AND appt.AptStatus IN (1,4) ) futappt ON 1 WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate; SELECT SUM(prod.Fee)+SUM(prod.Adj)+SUM(prod.InsW) AS 'TotalNetProd' INTO @UnattachedApptNetProd FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 LEFT JOIN appointment appt ON appt.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND appt.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) AND appt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ISNULL(appt.AptNum) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS 'Fee', adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW' FROM adjustment adj LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=adj.ProcNum LEFT JOIN appointment appt ON appt.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND appt.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) AND appt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ISNULL(appt.AptNum) UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN appointment appt ON appt.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND appt.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) AND appt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4 OR cp.Status=0) AND cp.WriteOff>'.0001' AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ISNULL(appt.AptNum) GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum ) prod; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee),0) Fee INTO @ScheduledProd FROM appointment LEFT JOIN procedurelog ON appointment.AptNum = procedurelog.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=1 WHERE (appointment.AptStatus = 1 OR appointment.AptStatus = 4) AND DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate; SELECT A.PatientName,A.ApptDate,A.ReferralSource,A.NetProd,A.TotalTP,A.Scheduled,A.Unscheduled FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(ap.AptDateTime,"%m/%d/%Y") ORDER BY ap.AptDateTime),"") AS 'ApptDate', CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS 'PatientName', COALESCE(CONCAT(re.LName,IF(re.FName='','',','),re.FName),"") AS 'ReferralSource', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(plpat.ProcFee,0)+COALESCE(ad.Amt,0)-COALESCE(cp.WriteOff,0),2),2) AS 'NetProd', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(tpprocs.TPAmt,0),2),2) AS 'TotalTP', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(futappt.FutAmt,0),2),2) AS 'Scheduled', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(tpprocs.TPAmt,0)-COALESCE(futappt.FutAmt,0),2),2) AS 'Unscheduled' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.ItemOrder=(SELECT MIN(refa.ItemOrder) FROM refattach refa WHERE refa.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND refa.RefType = 1 ) LEFT JOIN referral re ON re.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS ProcFee,PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY PatNum ) plpat ON plpat.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(AdjAmt) AS Amt,PatNum FROM adjustment WHERE AdjDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY PatNum )ad ON ad.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(WriteOff) AS WriteOff,PatNum FROM claimproc WHERE STATUS IN (1,4,0,7) AND ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY PatNum )cp ON cp.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ProcFee) AS TPAmt,PatNum FROM procedurelog WHERE ProcStatus=1 GROUP BY PatNum ) tpprocs ON tpprocs.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(plog.ProcFee) AS FutAmt,appt.PatNum FROM procedurelog plog INNER JOIN appointment appt ON appt.AptNum=plog.AptNum AND appt.AptDateTime>CURDATE() AND appt.AptStatus IN (1,4) WHERE plog.ProcStatus=1 GROUP BY appt.PatNum ) futappt ON futappt.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE ROUND(COALESCE(plpat.ProcFee,0)+COALESCE(ad.Amt,0)-COALESCE(cp.WriteOff,0),2)!=0 GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName )A UNION ALL SELECT " UNION ALL SELECT 'Totals:','Production attached to appt:','',FORMAT(ROUND(@NetProd,2),2),'','','' UNION ALL SELECT '','Production not attached to appt:','',FORMAT(ROUND(@UnattachedApptNetProd,2),2),'','','' UNION ALL SELECT '','Scheduled Production:','',FORMAT(ROUND(@ScheduledProd,2),2),'','','' UNION ALL SELECT '',CONCAT('Avg TP value: ',FORMAT(ROUND(@TotalTP/@PatCount),2),2),'',FORMAT(ROUND(@UnattachedApptNetProd+@NetProd+@ScheduledProd,2),2),FORMAT(ROUND(@TotalTP,2),2),@Scheduled,@Unscheduled;

request: All open claims as of a chosen date, broken down and subtotaled by clinic.
query: SET @AsOfDate = '2015-12-16'; SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT A.Clinic, A.Patient, IF(pos=1,IF(A.DateService='0001-01-01','',DATE_FORMAT(A.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y')),A.DateService) AS ServiceDate, A.ClaimFee AS ClaimFees FROM ( SELECT '1' AS pos, clinic.request,clinic.request AS Clinic, CONCAT(patient.LName, ', ', patient.FName) AS Patient, claim.DateService AS DateService, FORMAT(ROUND(claim.ClaimFee,2),2) AS ClaimFee FROM claim INNER JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claim.ClinicNum INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claim.PatNum WHERE (YEAR(claim.DateSent) > 1880 AND claim.DateSent <= @AsOfDate) AND (YEAR(claim.DateReceived) < 1880 OR claim.DateReceived > @AsOfDate OR (claim.DateReceived <= claim.DateResent AND claim.DateResent <= @AsOfDate)) UNION ALL SELECT '2' AS pos, clinic.request, 'Subtotal:' AS Clinic, '','', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(claim.ClaimFee),2),2) FROM claim INNER JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claim.ClinicNum WHERE (YEAR(claim.DateSent ) > 1880 AND claim.DateSent <= @AsOfDate) AND (YEAR(claim.DateReceived) < 1880 OR claim.DateReceived > @AsOfDate OR (claim.DateReceived <= claim.DateResent AND claim.DateResent <= @AsOfDate)) GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum UNION ALL SELECT '3' AS pos, clinic.request, ' FROM claim INNER JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claim.ClinicNum WHERE (YEAR(claim.DateSent ) > 1880 AND claim.DateSent <= @AsOfDate) AND (YEAR(claim.DateReceived) < 1880 OR claim.DateReceived > @AsOfDate OR (claim.DateReceived <= claim.DateResent AND claim.DateResent <= @AsOfDate)) GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum )A ORDER BY A.request, pos, A.DateService )B UNION ALL SELECT 'Total All Claims', '', '', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(claim.ClaimFee),2),2) FROM claim INNER JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claim.ClinicNum INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claim.PatNum WHERE (YEAR(claim.DateSent ) > 1880 AND claim.DateSent <= @AsOfDate) AND (YEAR(claim.DateReceived) < 1880 OR claim.DateReceived > @AsOfDate OR (claim.DateReceived <= claim.DateResent AND claim.DateResent <= @AsOfDate))

request: Visit summary by day. Displays the patients' name, SSN, DOB, DOS, fee, payments, and provider info.
query: SET @StartDate='2015-12-31',@EndDate='2015-12-31'; SET @Carrier='%%'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count',A.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS 'Patient Name',p.SSN, p.Birthdate,pl.ProcDate AS DateService,SUM(pl.ProcFee) AS $Charges_, inspay.PayAmt AS InsPayAmt,COALESCE(inspay.CarrierName,'') AS Carrier, patpay.PayAmt AS $PatientPay_,adj.AdjAmt, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pr.NationalProvID ORDER BY pr.ProvNum SEPARATOR ', ') AS NPI, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(pr.FName,' ',pr.LName) ORDER BY pr.ProvNum SEPARATOR ', ') AS Provider FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS PayAmt,ca.CarrierName,cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType="P" INNER JOIN insplan inp ON inp.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=inp.CarrierNum WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.ClaimPaymentNum!=0 GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) inspay ON inspay.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND inspay.ProcDate=pl.ProcDate LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS PayAmt,ps.PatNum,ps.DatePay FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum,ps.DatePay ) patpay ON patpay.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND patpay.DatePay=pl.ProcDate LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ad.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt,ad.PatNum,ad.AdjDate FROM adjustment ad WHERE ad.AdjDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY ad.PatNum,ad.ProcDate ) adj ON adj.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND adj.AdjDate=pl.ProcDate WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate ORDER BY pl.ProcDate,p.LName,p.FName ) A WHERE A.Carrier LIKE @Carrier

request: Procedure notes and group notes containing specified text. Displays the text and the next five characters.
query: SET @StartDate='2022-12-01',@EndDate='2022-12-31'; SET @Clinic='%%'; SET @NoteText="%%"; SELECT allclinics.Clinic ,allclinics.DateService ,allclinics.Patient AS 'Patient Name' ,allclinics.BirthDate ,allclinics.Provider ,allclinics.Note FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(cl.request,'Unassigned') AS Clinic ,pl.ProcDate AS DateService ,CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,p.Birthdate ,pr.Abbr AS Provider ,SUBSTRING(pn.Note,POSITION(REPLACE(@NoteText,"%","") IN pn.Note), LENGTH(@NoteText) + 3) AS Note FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN procnote pn ON pn.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND pn.Note LIKE @NoteText AND pn.EntryDateTime=(SELECT MAX(pn2.EntryDateTime) FROM procnote pn2 WHERE pn.ProcNum=pn2.ProcNum) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum WHERE ( pl.ProcStatus=2 OR ( pl.ProcStatus=3 AND pc.ProcCode="~GRP~" ) ) AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate ORDER BY pl.ProcDate,p.LName,p.FName ) allclinics WHERE allclinics.Clinic LIKE @Clinic

request: Count of cloned patients (patients who have ALL CAPS FNames and LNames.)
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient WHERE patient.LName = BINARY UPPER(patient.LName) AND patient.FName = BINARY UPPER(patient.FName);

request: Count of active cloned patients (patients who have ALL CAPS FNames and LNames.)
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient WHERE patient.LName = BINARY UPPER(patient.LName) AND patient.FName = BINARY UPPER(patient.FName) AND patient.PatStatus = 0;

request: List of active cloned patients (patients who have ALL CAPS FNames and LNames.)
query: SET @pos = 0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS RowCount, A.* FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum AS 'Pat patient.Gender, patient.Email, patient.PriProv FROM patient WHERE patient.LName = BINARY UPPER(patient.LName) AND patient.FName = BINARY UPPER(patient.FName) AND patient.PatStatus = 0 ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName, patient.Gender, patient.Email, patient.PriProv, patient.PatNum ) A

request: Balance owed by cloned patients (patients who have ALL CAPS FNames and LNames.)
query: SELECT patient.PatNum AS 'Pat ,CONCAT(patient.LName, ', ', patient.FName) AS Patient ,patient.EstBalance - patient.InsEst AS EstBal ,patient.EstBalance AS Balance FROM patient WHERE BINARY patient.LName = UPPER(patient.LName) AND BINARY patient.FName = UPPER(patient.FName) AND patient.PatStatus = 0;

request: Case-sensitive patient searching by patient name. Shows all patient information for any matching patients.
query: SET @FName = _utf8 '%JOHN%', @LName = _utf8 '%SMITH%'; SELECT * FROM patient WHERE patient.FName LIKE @FName COLLATE utf8_bin AND patient.LName LIKE @LName COLLATE utf8_bin;

request: Pulls a list of all future appointments in a specified operatory. Can be useful when you want to hide an operatory.
query: SET @OpName = '%Op1%'; SELECT op.OpName AS Op, app.AptDateTime, p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'Patient' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment app ON app.PatNum = p.PatNum AND app.AptStatus IN (1,3,4,5,7,8) AND DATE(app.AptDateTime) > CURDATE() INNER JOIN operatory op ON op.OperatoryNum = app.Op AND op.OpName LIKE @OpName ORDER BY AptDateTime

request: Custom Day Sheet Summary Report for practices without clinics. Displays MTD Productions, Collections, Adjustments, A\R Impact, Total Walkouts, Estimated Insurance, Collection Ratio, Patients Seen, New Patient Count, Average Production Per Visit, and Average Collection Per Visit. Aging in this query does not consider payment plans.
query: SET @FromDate='2015-08-01',@ToDate='2015-08-31'; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(A.Services),0), COALESCE(SUM(A.ProcDiscount),0) INTO @Services,@ProcDiscount FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS Services,procDiscount.DiscountAmt AS ProcDiscount FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ProcNum,SUM(AdjAmt) AS DiscountAmt FROM adjustment WHERE AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ProcNum ) procDiscount ON procDiscount.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum )A; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN def.ItemName LIKE '%cash%' THEN ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS CashPay, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN def.ItemName LIKE '%check%' THEN ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS CheckPay, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN def.ItemName NOT LIKE '%check%' AND def.ItemName NOT LIKE '%cash%' THEN ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS PatOtherPay INTO @CashPay,@CheckPay,@PatOtherPay FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment py ON py.PayNum=ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=py.PayType WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) AS InsPay INTO @InsPay FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum AND cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5); SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ad.AdjAmt>0 THEN ad.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS PosAdj, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ad.AdjAmt<0 THEN ad.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END),0) AS NegAdj INTO @PosAdj,@NegAdj FROM adjustment ad WHERE ad.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ad.ProcNum=0; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(claimproc.WriteOff),0) INTO @WriteOff FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND claimproc.Status IN (1,4,5); SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranDate<@FromDate THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),0) AS BeginAR, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),0) AS ChangeAR INTO @BeginAR,@ChangeAR FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(cp.WriteOff,0) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate<=@ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay<=@ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND AdjDate<=@ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCP AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5) AND cp.DateCp<=@ToDate ) RawPatTrans; SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cl.InsPayEst),0) AS InsEst INTO @InsEst FROM claim cl WHERE cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cl.ClaimStatus='S'; SELECT COUNT(ap.PatNum) AS PatientsSeen, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN NOT ISNULL(FirstApt.DateFirstProc) THEN ap.PatNum END)) AS NewPatients INTO @PatientsSeen,@NewPatients FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.AptNum,A.DateFirstProc FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum,MIN(ProcDate) DateFirstProc FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') WHERE ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum HAVING dateFirstProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate )A INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=A.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate=A.DateFirstProc GROUP BY pl.AptNum ) FirstApt ON FirstApt.AptNum=ap.AptNum WHERE ap.AptStatus=2 AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY; SET @Collections=@CashPay+@CheckPay+@PatOtherPay+@InsPay; SELECT "Services" AS "Category ",(CASE WHEN @Services<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Services,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services,2),2) END) AS "Production", "" AS "Collections","" AS "Adjustments ","" AS " - - - - - - - ", (CASE WHEN @Services<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Services,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services,2),2) END) AS "A\\R Impact" UNION ALL SELECT "ProcDiscount",(CASE WHEN @ProcDiscount<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@ProcDiscount,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@ProcDiscount,2),2) END),"","","", (CASE WHEN @ProcDiscount<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@ProcDiscount,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@ProcDiscount,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "WriteOff",(CASE WHEN @WriteOff<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@WriteOff,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@WriteOff,2),2) END),"","","", (CASE WHEN @WriteOff<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@WriteOff,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@WriteOff,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "NegAdj","","",(CASE WHEN @NegAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@NegAdj,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@NegAdj,2),2) END),"", (CASE WHEN @NegAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@NegAdj,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@NegAdj,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "PosAdj","","",(CASE WHEN @PosAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@PosAdj,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PosAdj,2),2) END),"", (CASE WHEN @PosAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@PosAdj,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PosAdj,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "CashPay","",(CASE WHEN @CashPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@CashPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@CashPay,2),2) END),"","", (CASE WHEN @CashPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@CashPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@CashPay,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "CheckPay","",(CASE WHEN @CheckPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@CheckPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@CheckPay,2),2) END),"","", (CASE WHEN @CheckPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@CheckPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@CheckPay,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "OtherPay","",(CASE WHEN @PatOtherPay+@InsPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@PatOtherPay+@InsPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PatOtherPay+@InsPay,2),2) END),"","", (CASE WHEN @PatOtherPay+@InsPay<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@PatOtherPay+@InsPay,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PatOtherPay+@InsPay,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "Total",(CASE WHEN @Services+@ProcDiscount-@WriteOff<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-(@Services+@ProcDiscount-@WriteOff),2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services+@ProcDiscount-@WriteOff,2),2) END), (CASE WHEN @Collections<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections,2),2) END), (CASE WHEN @PosAdj+@NegAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-(@PosAdj+@NegAdj),2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@PosAdj+@NegAdj,2),2) END),"","" UNION ALL SELECT "","","","","Begin A\\R",(CASE WHEN @BeginAR<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@BeginAR,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@BeginAR,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "","","","","Change A\\R",(CASE WHEN @ChangeAR<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@ChangeAR,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@ChangeAR,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "","","","","Ending A\\R",(CASE WHEN @BeginAR+@ChangeAR<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-(@BeginAR+@ChangeAR),2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@BeginAR+@ChangeAR,2),2) END) UNION ALL SELECT "Total Payments",(CASE WHEN @Collections<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Total Production",(CASE WHEN @Services<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Services,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Total Walkout",(CASE WHEN @Services+@NegAdj<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-(@Services+@NegAdj),2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services+@NegAdj,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Less Est Ins",(CASE WHEN @InsEst<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@InsEst,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@InsEst,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Total Collections",(CASE WHEN @Collections<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections,2),2) END),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Collections Ratio",COALESCE((CASE WHEN @Collections/@Services<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections/@Services,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections/@Services,2),2) END),0.00),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "AvgProdPerVisit",COALESCE((CASE WHEN @Services/@PatientsSeen<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Services/@PatientsSeen,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Services/@PatientsSeen,2),2) END),0.00),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "AvgCollectionPerVisit",COALESCE((CASE WHEN @Collections/@PatientsSeen<0 THEN CONCAT("(",FORMAT(ROUND(-@Collections/@PatientsSeen,2),2),")") ELSE FORMAT(ROUND(@Collections/@PatientsSeen,2),2) END),0.00),"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "Patients Seen",@PatientsSeen,"","","","" UNION ALL SELECT "NewPatCount",@NewPatients,"","","","";

request: Treatment Finder report. Like internal.
query: SET @IncludePatsNoIns='NO'; SET @IncludePatsWithAppts='NO'; SET @AmountRemaining=''; SET @TPDateSince=''; SET @MonthStart=0; SET @Provs=''; SET @BillingTypes=''; SET @ClinicAbbr = '%%'; SET @CodeStart='', @CodeEnd=''; SET @RenewDate=(CASE WHEN @MonthStart=0 THEN CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()),'-01-01') WHEN @MonthStart<=MONTH(CURDATE()) THEN CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()),'-',LPAD(@MonthStart,2,'0'),'-01') ELSE CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE())-1,'-',LPAD(@MonthStart,2,'0'),'-01') END); SET @Provs=(CASE WHEN @Provs="" THEN "^" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Provs,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SET @BillingTypes=(CASE WHEN @BillingTypes="" THEN "^" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@BillingTypes,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SELECT patient.PatNum AS 'PatNum ', CONCAT(patient.LName,", ",patient.FName) AS 'Patient', IFNULL(cl.request, 'Unassigned') AS Clinic, (CASE patient.PreferRecallMethod WHEN 0 THEN 'None' WHEN 1 THEN 'DoNotCall' WHEN 2 THEN 'HmPhone' WHEN 3 THEN 'WkPhone' WHEN 4 THEN 'WirelessPh' WHEN 5 THEN 'Email' WHEN 6 THEN 'SeeNotes' WHEN 7 THEN 'Mail' WHEN 8 THEN 'TextMessage' END) AS 'PreferRecallMethod', patient.Email, patient.HmPhone, patient.WirelessPhone, patient.WkPhone, patient.Address, patient.Address2, patient.City, patient.State, patient.Zip, patient.PriProv, patient.BillingType, tblannualmax.AnnualMax "$AnnualMax", tblused.AmtUsed "$AmountUsed", tblpending.PendingAmt "$AmountPending", tblannualmax.AnnualMax-IFNULL(tblused.AmtUsed,0)-IFNULL(tblpending.PendingAmt,0) "$AmtRemaining", tblplanned.AmtPlanned "$TreatmentPlan", carrier.CarrierName FROM patient LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PatNum, SUM(ProcFee) AS AmtPlanned FROM procedurelog LEFT JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum WHERE ProcStatus=1 AND IF(@CodeStart='',TRUE,procedurecode.ProcCode>=@CodeStart) AND IF(@CodeEnd='',TRUE,procedurecode.ProcCode<=@CodeEnd) AND IF(@TPDateSince='',TRUE,procedurelog.ProcDate>@TPDateSince) GROUP BY PatNum ) tblplanned ON tblplanned.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan ON patient.PatNum=patplan.PatNum LEFT JOIN inssub ON patplan.InsSubNum=inssub.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON insplan.CarrierNum=carrier.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patplan.PatPlanNum, SUM(IFNULL(claimproc.InsPayAmt,0)) AS AmtUsed FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum=claimproc.PatNum AND patplan.InsSubNum=claimproc.InsSubNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,3,4) AND claimproc.ProcDate BETWEEN @RenewDate AND @RenewDate+INTERVAL 1 YEAR GROUP BY patplan.PatPlanNum ) tblused ON tblused.PatPlanNum=patplan.PatPlanNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patplan.PatPlanNum, SUM(IFNULL(claimproc.InsPayEst,0)) PendingAmt FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum=claimproc.PatNum AND patplan.InsSubNum=claimproc.InsSubNum WHERE claimproc.Status=0 AND claimproc.InsPayAmt=0 AND claimproc.ProcDate BETWEEN @RenewDate AND @RenewDate+INTERVAL 1 YEAR GROUP BY patplan.PatPlanNum )tblpending ON tblpending.PatPlanNum=patplan.PatPlanNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insplan.PlanNum, ( SELECT MAX(MonetaryAmt) FROM benefit LEFT JOIN covcat ON benefit.CovCatNum=covcat.CovCatNum WHERE benefit.PlanNum=insplan.PlanNum AND (covcat.EbenefitCat=1 OR ISNULL(covcat.EbenefitCat)) AND benefit.BenefitType=5 AND benefit.MonetaryAmt>0 AND benefit.QuantityQualifier=0 GROUP BY insplan.PlanNum ) AS AnnualMax FROM insplan ) tblannualmax ON tblannualmax.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum AND (tblannualmax.AnnualMax IS NOT NULL AND tblannualmax.AnnualMax>0) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=patient.PriProv AND pr.Abbr REGEXP @Provs INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=patient.BillingType AND def.ItemName REGEXP @BillingTypes LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = patient.ClinicNum AND cl.Abbr LIKE @ClinicAbbr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT appointment.PatNum FROM appointment WHERE appointment.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND DATE(appointment.AptDateTime)>=CURDATE() GROUP BY appointment.PatNum )apt ON apt.PatNum=patient.PatNum WHERE tblplanned.AmtPlanned>0 AND IF(@IncludePatsNoIns="YES",TRUE,patplan.Ordinal=1 AND insplan.MonthRenew=@MonthStart) AND IF(@IncludePatsWithAppts="YES",TRUE,apt.PatNum IS NULL) AND IF(@AmountRemaining>0,tblannualmax.AnnualMax IS NULL OR tblannualmax.AnnualMax-IFNULL(tblused.AmtUsed,0)>CAST(@AmountRemaining AS DECIMAL(10,2)),TRUE) AND patient.PatStatus=0 ORDER BY tblplanned.AmtPlanned DESC;

request: Patients that have active popups on their account and are not deleted (for versions 13.3 to 22.1).
query: SELECT popup.PatNum AS 'Pat FROM popup INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=popup.PatNum WHERE popup.IsDisabled=0 AND IsArchived=0 GROUP BY popup.PatNum ORDER BY LName,FName

request: Patient aging with a positive balance as of user defined date.
query: SET @AsOf='2012-01-31'; SELECT b.PatNum, b.LName, b.FName, B.FamBal AS $FamBal, LEAST((B.FamBal), B.0to30Trans) AS $0to30Bal, IF(B.FamBal-B.0to30Trans<=0,0,LEAST((B.FamBal-B.0to30Trans), B.30to60Trans)) AS $30to60Bal, IF(B.FamBal-B.0to30Trans-B.30to60Trans<=0,0,LEAST((B.FamBal-B.0to30Trans-B.30to60Trans), B.60to90Trans)) AS $60to90Bal, IF(B.FamBal-B.0to30Trans-B.30to60Trans-B.60to90Trans<=0,0,LEAST((B.FamBal-B.0to30Trans-B.30to60Trans-B.60to90Trans), B.Over90Trans)) AS $Over90Bal FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum, g.LName, g.FName, SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS FamBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 0to30Trans, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 30to60Trans, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 60to90Trans, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Over90Trans FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType, pl.PatNum PatNum,pl.ProcDate TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum PatNum,ps.ProcDate TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType, a.PatNum PatNum,a.AdjDate TranDate,a.AdjAmt TranAmount FROM adjustment a UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Capitat' AS TranType,cp.PatNum PatNum, cp.DateCp TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum PatNum, pp.PayPlanDate TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt TranAmount FROM payplan pp ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=RawPatTrans.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON patient.Guarantor = g.PatNum WHERE TranAmount<> 0 AND TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY g.PatNum )B WHERE B.FamBal>0.001 GROUP BY B.PatNum ORDER BY B.LName, B.FName ;

request: Gender and age breakdowns for patients seen who had the specified code(s) completed in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate = '2025-03-01', @ToDate = '2025-03-06'; SET @ProcCodes = ''; SELECT 'Male' AS 'Gender' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 0 AND 6 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '0-6 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 7 AND 11 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '7-11 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 12 AND 16 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '12-16 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 17 AND 24 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '17-24 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 25 AND 200 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '25+ yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN patient.Birthdate = '0001-01-01' THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS 'No Birthdate Specified' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(patient.PatNum)) AS 'Gender Totals' FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ProcCodes)) WHERE patient.Gender = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Female' AS 'Gender' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 0 AND 6 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '0-6 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 7 AND 11 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '7-11 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 12 AND 16 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '12-16 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 17 AND 24 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '17-24 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 25 AND 200 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '25+ yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN patient.Birthdate = '0001-01-01' THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS 'No Birthdate Specified' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(patient.PatNum)) AS 'Gender Totals' FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ProcCodes)) WHERE patient.Gender = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Unknown' AS 'Gender' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 0 AND 6 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '0-6 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 7 AND 11 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '7-11 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 12 AND 16 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '12-16 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 17 AND 24 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '17-24 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 25 AND 200 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '25+ yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN patient.Birthdate = '0001-01-01' THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS 'No Birthdate Specified' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(patient.PatNum)) AS 'Gender Totals' FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ProcCodes)) WHERE patient.Gender = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Other' AS 'Gender' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 0 AND 6 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '0-6 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 7 AND 11 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '7-11 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 12 AND 16 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '12-16 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 17 AND 24 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '17-24 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 25 AND 200 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '25+ yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN patient.Birthdate = '0001-01-01' THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS 'No Birthdate Specified' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(patient.PatNum)) AS 'Gender Totals' FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ProcCodes)) WHERE patient.Gender = 3 UNION ALL SELECT '', ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Age Totals' AS 'Gender' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 0 AND 6 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '0-6 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 7 AND 11 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '7-11 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 12 AND 16 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '12-16 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 17 AND 24 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '17-24 yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) BETWEEN 25 AND 200 THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS '25+ yrs' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN patient.Birthdate = '0001-01-01' THEN patient.PatNum END )) AS 'No Birthdate Specified' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(patient.PatNum)) FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ProcCodes)) WHERE patient.Gender IN(0,1,2,3)

request: Orthochart information for patients who have an appointment within a date range with a specific provider.
query: SET @StartDate = '2021-04-15', @EndDate = '2021-04-15'; SET @ProvAbbrs="Provider1|Provider2"; SET @groupConcatLengthOld=@@group_concat_max_len; SET group_concat_max_len = @@group_concat_max_len + 10000; SET @ProvAbbrs=(CASE WHEN @ProvAbbrs = "" THEN "^" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProvAbbrs,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SET @SQL = NULL; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT('GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN orthochart.FieldName LIKE \'', displayfield.request,'\' THEN orthochart.FieldValue END) AS \'', displayfield.request, '\'')) INTO @SQL FROM displayfield WHERE displayfield.Category = 8; SET @SQL = CONCAT( 'SELECT provider.Abbr, CONCAT(patient.LName,\', \', patient.FName) AS Patient, appointment.AptDateTime, ',@SQL,' FROM appointment INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = appointment.PatNum INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = appointment.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr REGEXP @ProvAbbrs LEFT JOIN orthochart ON orthochart.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND orthochart.DateService = DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) WHERE appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND appointment.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) GROUP BY appointment.PatNum ORDER BY appointment.AptDateTime' ); PREPARE stmt FROM @SQL; EXECUTE stmt; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt; SET group_concat_max_len = @groupConcatLengthOld;

request: Orthochart information for the patient specified at top
query: SET @PatNum='1194'; SET @groupConcatLengthOld=@@group_concat_max_len; SET group_concat_max_len = @@group_concat_max_len + 10000; SET @SQL = NULL; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT('GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN orthochart.FieldName LIKE \'', displayfield.request,'\' THEN orthochart.FieldValue END) AS \'', displayfield.request, '\'')) INTO @SQL FROM ( SELECT displayfield.request FROM displayfield WHERE displayfield.Category = 8 ORDER BY displayfield.ItemOrder )displayfield; SET @SQL = CONCAT( 'SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName,\', \', patient.FName) AS Patient,',@SQL,' FROM patient LEFT JOIN orthochart ON orthochart.PatNum = patient.PatNum WHERE patient.PatNum = @PatNum GROUP BY orthochart.DateService ORDER BY orthochart.DateService' ); PREPARE stmt FROM @SQL; EXECUTE stmt; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt; SET group_concat_max_len = @groupConcatLengthOld;

request: Completed appointments in a date range with total production, office fees, insurance carriers, insurance estimates, insurance payments, and amount patient paid on date of appointment
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SET @FeeSched='Office Fees'; SELECT a.PatNum ,DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'AppointmentDate' ,procs.Carriers AS 'ProcLevelCarriers' ,FORMAT(procs.Prod,2) AS 'ApptDateGrossProd' ,FORMAT(procs.OfficeFees,2) AS 'OfficeFees' ,FORMAT(procs.Wo,2) AS 'WriteoffOnProcs' ,FORMAT(procs.Est,2) AS 'EstInsOnProcs' ,FORMAT(procs.InsPay,2) AS 'InsPaidOnProcs' ,FORMAT(IFNULL(pays.Paid,0),2) AS 'ApptDatePatPaid' ,FORMAT(procs.InsPay + IFNULL(pays.Paid,0),2) AS 'ApptDateTotalIncome' ,FORMAT(procs.Prod + procs.Wo - procs.InsPay - procs.Est - IFNULL(pays.Paid,0),2) AS 'ApptDateExpectedRemaining' FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procCore.ProcDate ,procCore.PatNum ,SUM(procCore.ProcFee) AS 'Prod' ,SUM(IFNULL(procCore.UCR,0)) AS 'OfficeFees' ,SUM(IFNULL(procCore.Writeoff,0)) AS 'Wo' ,SUM(IFNULL(procCore.EstIns,0)) AS 'Est' ,SUM(IFNULL(procCore.InsPaid,0)) AS 'InsPay' ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ca.CarrierName ORDER BY ca.CarrierName SEPARATOR ', ') FROM carrier ca WHERE FIND_IN_SET(ca.CarrierNum,GROUP_CONCAT(procCore.Carriers)) ),'') AS 'Carriers' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcDate ,pl.PatNum ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'ProcFee' ,( SELECT fee.Amount FROM fee INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum = fee.FeeSched AND fs.request = @FeeSched WHERE fee.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND fee.ClinicNum = 0 AND fee.ProvNum = 0 ) AS 'UCR' ,SUM((CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (0,1,4) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END)) AS 'WriteOff' ,SUM(IF(cp.Status IN (0,6) ,cp.InsPayEst,0)) AS 'EstIns' ,SUM(IF(cp.Status IN (1,4) ,cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS 'InsPaid' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ip.CarrierNum) AS 'Carriers' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6) LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) procCore GROUP BY procCore.PatNum, procCore.ProcDate ) procs ON procs.PatNum = a.PatNum AND procs.ProcDate = DATE(a.AptDateTime) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pay.PatNum ,pay.PayDate ,SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS 'Paid' FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate ) pays ON pays.PatNum = a.PatNum AND pays.PayDate = DATE(a.AptDateTime) WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, a.PatNum

request: Completed procedures in date range, with fees and provider ordered by patient
query: SET @StartDate='2016-01-01' , @EndDate='2016-01-31'; SELECT IF(B.AptNum IS NULL,'No','Yes') AS 'New Patient', CONCAT(LName, ', ',FName, ' ', MiddleI) AS Patient, def.ItemName AS BillType, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcDate, pl.ProcFee, pl.ProvNum FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON patient.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum= pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition def ON patient.BillingType=def.DefNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT appt.AptNum FROM( SELECT PatNum,MIN(AptDateTime) AS FirstAppt FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum )A INNER JOIN appointment appt ON appt.PatNum=A.PatNum AND appt.AptDateTime=A.FirstAppt ) B ON B.AptNum=pl.AptNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2

request: Medical patients seen by a provider. Displays patients that have a patient field of 'Medical Patient' with a value of '1' that have been seen by a provider in the date range.
query: SET @StartDate='2016-01-01',@EndDate='2016-01-31'; SET @Provs="GB|MP"; SET @Provs=(CASE WHEN @Provs="" THEN "^" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Provs,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SET @count=0; SELECT @count:=@count+1 AS 'Count', A.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS 'Patient',pr.Abbr AS 'Provider',pl.ProcDate FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patfield pf ON pf.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND pf.FieldName='Medical Patient' AND pf.FieldValue='1' INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr REGEXP @Provs INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName ) A;

request: City of Roanoke Grant Demographics
query: SET @StartDate='2019-01-01',@EndDate='2019-12-31'; SET @Providers=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pr.ProvNum) FROM provider pr WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers) INTO @Providers; SET @TotalSeen=( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @Providers)) ); SELECT 'Zip Codes' AS '- - - - - - - - - -', 'No. Served' AS '- - - - - - - -', '' AS '- - - - - - - - ' UNION ALL SELECT b.* FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN a.Zip = '' THEN 'Unknown' ELSE a.Zip END) AS 'Zip', COUNT(*) AS 'No. Served', FORMAT(ROUND(100*COUNT(*)/@TotalSeen,2),2) AS '% of Total' FROM ( SELECT LEFT(p.Zip,5) AS Zip FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @Providers)) GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) a GROUP BY a.Zip ORDER BY a.Zip='',a.Zip ) b UNION ALL SELECT '- - - - - - - - - -','- - - - - - - -','- - - - - - - -' UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Age and Sex','No. Served', '% of Total' UNION ALL SELECT b.* FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN a.Age<=5 AND a.Gender=0 THEN 'Male 5 years and under' WHEN a.Age<=5 AND a.Gender=1 THEN 'Female 5 years and under' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 6 AND 18 AND a.Gender=0 THEN 'Male 6 through 18 years' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 6 AND 18 AND a.Gender=1 THEN 'Female 6 through 18 years' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 19 AND 54 AND a.Gender=0 THEN 'Male 19 through 54' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 19 AND 54 AND a.Gender=1 THEN 'Female 19 through 54' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 55 AND 135 AND a.Gender=0 THEN 'Male 55 years and older' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 55 AND 135 AND a.Gender=1 THEN 'Female 55 years and older' ELSE 'Unknown age or gender' END) AS AgeGender, COUNT(*) AS 'No. Served', FORMAT(ROUND(100*COUNT(*)/@TotalSeen,2),2) AS '% of Total' FROM ( SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,MIN(pl.ProcDate)) AS Age, p.Gender FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @Providers)) GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) a GROUP BY (CASE WHEN a.Age<=5 AND a.Gender=0 THEN 'Male 5 years and under' WHEN a.Age<=5 AND a.Gender=1 THEN 'Female 5 years and under' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 6 AND 18 AND a.Gender=0 THEN 'Male 6 through 18 years' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 6 AND 18 AND a.Gender=1 THEN 'Female 6 through 18 years' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 19 AND 54 AND a.Gender=0 THEN 'Male 19 through 54' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 19 AND 54 AND a.Gender=1 THEN 'Female 19 through 54' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 55 AND 135 AND a.Gender=0 THEN 'Male 55 years and older' WHEN a.Age BETWEEN 55 AND 135 AND a.Gender=1 THEN 'Female 55 years and older' ELSE 'Unknown age or gender' END) ORDER BY FIELD(AgeGender,'Male 5 years and under','Female 5 years and under','Male 6 through 18 years','Female 6 through 18 years','Male 19 through 54', 'Female 19 through 54','Male 55 years and older','Female 55 years and older','Unknown age or gender') ) b UNION ALL SELECT '- - - - - - - - - -','- - - - - - - -','- - - - - - - -' UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Ethnicity','No. Served', '% of Total' UNION ALL SELECT b.* FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(raceeth.Ethnicity, 'None Selected'), COUNT(*) AS 'No. Served', FORMAT(ROUND(100*COUNT(*)/@TotalSeen,2),2) AS '% of Total' FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @Providers)) ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pr.PatNum, GROUP_CONCAT( (CASE pr.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' WHEN -1 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdcrec) > 0 THEN (SELECT cdcrec.request FROM cdcrec WHERE cdcrec.CdcrecCode = pr.CdcrecCode AND cdcrec.HeirarchicalCode LIKE 'R%') ELSE (CASE pr.CdcrecCode WHEN '2054-5' THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN '1002-5' THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN '2028-9' THEN 'Asian' WHEN 'ASKU-RACE' THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN '2076-8' THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN '2131-1' THEN 'Other' WHEN '2106-3' THEN 'White' ELSE NULL END) END) ELSE NULL END) ORDER BY IF(FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11) = 0,pr.cdcreccode,FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)) SEPARATOR ";") AS 'Race', GROUP_CONCAT( (CASE pr.Race WHEN 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN 10 THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 11 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyEthnicity' WHEN -1 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdcrec) > 0 THEN (SELECT cdcrec.request FROM cdcrec WHERE cdcrec.CdcrecCode = pr.CdcrecCode AND cdcrec.HeirarchicalCode LIKE 'E%') ELSE (CASE pr.CdcrecCode WHEN '2135-2' THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN '2186-5' THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 'ASKU-ETHNICITY' THEN 'Declined To Specify' ELSE NULL END) END) ELSE NULL END) ORDER BY IF(FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)=0,pr.cdcreccode,FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)) SEPARATOR ';') AS 'Ethnicity' FROM patientrace pr GROUP BY pr.PatNum ) raceeth ON a.PatNum = raceeth.PatNum GROUP BY COALESCE(raceeth.Ethnicity, 'None Selected') ORDER BY COALESCE(raceeth.Ethnicity, 'None Selected') ) b UNION ALL SELECT '- - - - - - - - - -','- - - - - - - -','- - - - - - - -' UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Race','No. Served', '% of Total' UNION ALL SELECT b.* FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(raceeth.Race, 'None Selected'), COUNT(*) AS 'No. Served', FORMAT(ROUND(100*COUNT(*)/@TotalSeen,2),2) AS '% of Total' FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @Providers)) ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pr.PatNum, GROUP_CONCAT( (CASE pr.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' WHEN -1 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdcrec) > 0 THEN (SELECT cdcrec.request FROM cdcrec WHERE cdcrec.CdcrecCode = pr.CdcrecCode AND cdcrec.HeirarchicalCode LIKE 'R%') ELSE (CASE pr.CdcrecCode WHEN '2054-5' THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN '1002-5' THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN '2028-9' THEN 'Asian' WHEN 'ASKU-RACE' THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN '2076-8' THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN '2131-1' THEN 'Other' WHEN '2106-3' THEN 'White' ELSE NULL END) END) ELSE NULL END) ORDER BY IF(FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11) = 0,pr.cdcreccode,FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)) SEPARATOR ";") AS 'Race', GROUP_CONCAT( (CASE pr.Race WHEN 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN 10 THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 11 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyEthnicity' WHEN -1 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdcrec) > 0 THEN (SELECT cdcrec.request FROM cdcrec WHERE cdcrec.CdcrecCode = pr.CdcrecCode AND cdcrec.HeirarchicalCode LIKE 'E%') ELSE (CASE pr.CdcrecCode WHEN '2135-2' THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN '2186-5' THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 'ASKU-ETHNICITY' THEN 'Declined To Specify' ELSE NULL END) END) ELSE NULL END) ORDER BY IF(FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)=0,pr.cdcreccode,FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)) SEPARATOR ';') AS 'Ethnicity' FROM patientrace pr GROUP BY pr.PatNum ) raceeth ON a.PatNum = raceeth.PatNum GROUP BY COALESCE(raceeth.Race, 'None Selected') ORDER BY COALESCE(raceeth.Race, 'None Selected') ) b UNION ALL SELECT '- - - - - - - - - -','- - - - - - - -','- - - - - - - -' UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Income','No. Served', '% of Total' UNION ALL SELECT b.* FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(pf.FieldValue,'None specified') AS 'Income', COUNT(*) AS 'No. Served', FORMAT(ROUND(100*COUNT(*)/@TotalSeen,2),2) AS '% of Total' FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(ISNULL(@Providers), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @Providers)) ) a LEFT JOIN patfield pf ON pf.PatNum = a.PatNum AND pf.FieldName = 'Sliding' GROUP BY pf.FieldValue ORDER BY pf.FieldName IS NULL,pf.FieldValue ) b

request: All open claims as of a chosen date, broken down and subtotaled by clinic, with aging of the claim based on the date of service.
query: SET @AsOfDate = '2016-01-23'; SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT A.Clinic, A.Patient, IF(pos=1,IF(A.DateService='0001-01-01','',DATE_FORMAT(A.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y')),A.DateService) AS ServiceDate, A.ClaimFee AS ClaimFees, A.Fees0to30,A.Fees31to60,A.Fees61to90,A.FeesOver90 FROM ( SELECT '1' AS pos, clinic.request,clinic.request AS Clinic, CONCAT(patient.LName, ', ', patient.FName) AS Patient, claim.DateService AS DateService, FORMAT(ROUND(claim.ClaimFee,2),2) AS ClaimFee, FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate)<=30 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees0to30, FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees31to60, FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees61to90, FORMAT(ROUND((CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate)>90 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS FeesOver90 FROM claim INNER JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claim.ClinicNum INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claim.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPay, cp.ClaimNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP<=@AsOfDate AND cp.Status!=6 GROUP BY cp.ClaimNum )cppay ON cppay.ClaimNum=claim.ClaimNum WHERE claim.ClaimType!='PreAuth' AND (YEAR(claim.DateSent) > 1880 AND claim.DateSent <= @AsOfDate) AND (YEAR(claim.DateReceived) < 1880 OR claim.DateReceived > @AsOfDate OR (claim.DateReceived <= claim.DateResent AND claim.DateResent <= @AsOfDate)) UNION ALL SELECT '2' AS pos, clinic.request, 'Subtotal:' AS Clinic, '','', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(claim.ClaimFee),2),2), FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate)<=30 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate)>90 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees90Over FROM claim INNER JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claim.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPay, cp.ClaimNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP<=@AsOfDate AND cp.Status!=6 GROUP BY cp.ClaimNum )cppay ON cppay.ClaimNum=claim.ClaimNum WHERE claim.ClaimType!='PreAuth' AND (YEAR(claim.DateSent ) > 1880 AND claim.DateSent <= @AsOfDate) AND (YEAR(claim.DateReceived) < 1880 OR claim.DateReceived > @AsOfDate OR (claim.DateReceived <= claim.DateResent AND claim.DateResent <= @AsOfDate)) GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum UNION ALL SELECT '3' AS pos, clinic.request, ' ' FROM claim INNER JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claim.ClinicNum WHERE claim.ClaimType!='PreAuth' AND (YEAR(claim.DateSent ) > 1880 AND claim.DateSent <= @AsOfDate) AND (YEAR(claim.DateReceived) < 1880 OR claim.DateReceived > @AsOfDate OR (claim.DateReceived <= claim.DateResent AND claim.DateResent <= @AsOfDate)) GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum )A ORDER BY A.request, pos, A.DateService )B UNION ALL SELECT 'Total All Claims', '', '', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(claim.ClaimFee),2),2), FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate)<=30 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,@AsOfDate)>90 THEN claim.ClaimFee-COALESCE(cppay.InsPay,0) ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS Fees90Over FROM claim INNER JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claim.ClinicNum INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claim.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPay, cp.ClaimNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP<=@AsOfDate AND cp.Status!=6 GROUP BY cp.ClaimNum )cppay ON cppay.ClaimNum=claim.ClaimNum WHERE claim.ClaimType!='PreAuth' AND (YEAR(claim.DateSent ) > 1880 AND claim.DateSent <= @AsOfDate) AND (YEAR(claim.DateReceived) < 1880 OR claim.DateReceived > @AsOfDate OR (claim.DateReceived <= claim.DateResent AND claim.DateResent <= @AsOfDate))

request: UDS report for patient demographics and insurance
query: SET @StartDate= '2015-01-01'; SET @EndDate= '2015-12-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS 'Patient', (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) ELSE 'None' END) AS 'Age', (CASE p.Gender WHEN 0 THEN 'Male' WHEN 1 THEN 'Female' WHEN 2 THEN 'Unknown' END) AS 'Gender', p.Zip, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT((CASE pr.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' WHEN 10 THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 11 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyEthnicity' ELSE 'None' END) ORDER BY FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11) SEPARATOR ', ') FROM patientrace pr WHERE pr.PatNum=p.PatNum) AS 'RaceEth', (CASE WHEN pf.FieldValue IS NOT NULL THEN 'SLIDE' WHEN ca.CarrierName LIKE '%dentaquest%' THEN 'MEDICAID' WHEN ca.CarrierName IS NOT NULL THEN 'INS' ELSE 'NONE' END) AS 'Ins/Medicaid/Slide', IF(pf1.FieldValue IS NULL,'','X') AS 'Medical Patient' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patfield pf ON pf.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pf.FieldName='Sliding Scale' LEFT JOIN patfield pf1 ON pf1.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pf1.FieldName='Medical Patient' LEFT JOIN patientrace pr ON pr.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Upcoming appointments for a list of insurance carriers. Wireless phone shows guarantor's phone number.
query: SET @ShowAptsOnOrAfter=CURDATE(); SET @Carriers='Metlife Dental|Pacific Blue Cross'; SET @Carriers=(CASE WHEN @Carriers='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Carriers,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'DateApt',DATE_FORMAT(ap.AptDateTime,'%h:%i %p') AS 'TimeApt',CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS 'Patient', GROUP_CONCAT(ca.CarrierName SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'Carrier',g.WirelessPhone,COALESCE(cl.request,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub ins ON pp.InsSubNum=ins.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan inp ON ins.PlanNum=inp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON inp.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum AND ca.CarrierName REGEXP @Carriers LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ap.ClinicNum WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime)>=@ShowAptsOnOrAfter GROUP BY ap.AptNum ORDER BY cl.request,ap.AptDateTime,p.LName,p.FName

request: New patient production and collection. A patient is new if their first procedure is in the date range and if they have never had a completed procedure or appointment or if their last completed appointment or procedure was more than 5 years from the current date.
query: SET @StartDate='2018-01-01',@EndDate='2018-01-31'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', a.Date, a.FirstName, a.LastName, a.Age, a.Zip, a.Referral, a.$NetProd_, a.$Collections_ FROM ( SELECT MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date', p.FName AS 'FirstName', p.LName AS 'LastName', (CASE WHEN YEAR(p.Birthdate)<1880 THEN 'Unknown' ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) END) AS 'Age', p.Zip, COALESCE(CONCAT(ref.LName,IF(ref.FName='','',', '),ref.FName),'') 'Referral', SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))+COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt,0)-COALESCE(cproc.WriteOff,0) '$NetProd_', COALESCE(ptpay.PayAmt,0)+COALESCE(ipay.InsPay,0) AS '$Collections_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS LastVisit, pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') WHERE pl.ProcDate < @StartDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum HAVING MAX(pl.ProcDate) > (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 5 YEAR) ) lastproc ON lastproc.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(MAX(ap.AptDateTime)) AS LastVisit, ap.PatNum FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptDateTime < @StartDate AND ap.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY ap.PatNum HAVING MAX(ap.AptDateTime) > (CURDATE() - INTERVAL 5 YEAR) ) lastapt ON lastapt.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ad.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt, ad.PatNum FROM adjustment ad WHERE ad.AdjDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY ad.PatNum ) adj ON adj.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS WriteOff, cp.PatNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,7) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) cproc ON cproc.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS PayAmt, ps.PatNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum ) ptpay ON ptpay.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPay, cp.PatNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cpy.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) ipay ON ipay.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN refattach refa ON p.PatNum=refa.PatNum AND refa.RefType = 1 AND refa.ItemOrder=( SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.PatNum=refa.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 ) LEFT JOIN referral ref ON ref.ReferralNum=refa.ReferralNum WHERE lastproc.LastVisit IS NULL AND lastapt.LastVisit IS NULL GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY MIN(pl.ProcDate),p.LName,p.FName )a

request: Patients that have completed procedures in date range with any unsigned sheets.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-04-01', @ToDate='2022-04-30'; SET @SheetName='Referral Letter|Patient Letter'; SET @SheetName=(CASE WHEN @SheetName='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@SheetName,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT b.Patient, b.SheetName AS 'Sheet Name', b.SheetDate AS 'Sheet Date', b.Signed FROM ( SELECT 3 AS 'ItemOrder', CONCAT(a.LName,', ',a.FName) AS 'Patient', a.SheetName, a.SheetDate, a.Signed FROM ( SELECT p.LName, p.FName, s.request AS 'SheetName', DATE_FORMAT(s.DateTimeSheet,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'SheetDate', 'Unsigned' AS 'Signed' FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) compprocs INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = compprocs.PatNum INNER JOIN sheet s ON compprocs.PatNum = s.PatNum AND s.request REGEXP @SheetName AND s.DateTimeSheet BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND s.IsDeleted = 0 INNER JOIN sheetfield sf ON sf.SheetNum = s.SheetNum AND sf.FieldType = 9 AND sf.FieldValue = '' GROUP BY s.SheetNum ) a UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS 'ItemOrder', ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder', 'Procedure Date Range:' AS 'Patient', CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'SheetName', '' AS 'SheetDate', '' AS 'Signed' ) b ORDER BY b.ItemOrder, b.Patient, b.SheetDate

request: List of all upcoming Automated Appointment Reminders with patient name, reminder send date/time, appointment date/time, and whether the reminder is a Days reminder or an Hours reminder
query: SELECT p.PatNum AS 'ID', p.LName, p.FName, ac.DateTimeSend AS 'SendTime', a.AptDateTime AS 'Appointment Time', (CASE WHEN ac.ApptCommType = 0 THEN 'Days Reminder' WHEN ac.ApptCommType = 1 THEN 'Hours Reminder' END) AS 'Day Rem or Hour Rem' FROM ApptComm ac INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.AptNum = ac.ApptNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = a.PatNum ORDER BY ac.DateTimeSend ASC

request: Phone numbers that are not blank that do not match either ########## or (###)###-#### or  #(###)###-#### format.
query: SELECT PatNum,CONCAT(LName,", ",FName) AS 'Patient',WirelessPhone,HmPhone,WkPhone FROM patient WHERE PatStatus=0 AND ((WirelessPhone!='' AND WirelessPhone NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]?[\\(][0-9]{3}[\\)][0-9]{3}[-][0-9]{4}$') OR (HmPhone!='' AND HmPhone NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]?[\\(][0-9]{3}[\\)][0-9]{3}[-][0-9]{4}$') OR (WkPhone!='' AND WkPhone NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]?[\\(][0-9]{3}[\\)][0-9]{3}[-][0-9]{4}$'))

request: Email Message Search
query: SET @Message='%ENTER SEARCH HERE%'; SELECT em.PatNum ,em.ToAddress ,em.FromAddress ,em.Subject ,em.BodyText ,em.MsgDateTime FROM emailmessage em WHERE em.BodyText LIKE @Message ORDER BY em.MsgDateTime

request: Recall requests and due dates for patients with completed appointments in the specified date range
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ExcludedRecallTypes='4BW,Pano'; SELECT IF(s1.Seq = 1, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName), '') AS 'Patient Name' ,(CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN p.Email WHEN 2 THEN 'Recall Type' WHEN 3 THEN rt.request WHEN 4 THEN '' END) AS 'Email' ,(CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN p.WirelessPhone WHEN 2 THEN 'Recall Due Date' WHEN 3 THEN IFNULL(NULLIF(r.DateDue,'0001-01-01'),'No Due Date') WHEN 4 THEN '' END) AS 'Cell Phone' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN recall r ON r.PatNum = p.PatNum AND !r.IsDisabled INNER JOIN recalltype rt ON rt.RecallTypeNum = r.RecallTypeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludedRecallTypes) = 0, TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(rt.request , @ExcludedRecallTypes)) LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_4 s1 ON TRUE WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY (CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (1,2,4) THEN CONCAT(s1.Seq,'+',p.PatNum) WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN CONCAT(s1.Seq,'+',p.PatNum,'|',r.RecallNum) ELSE s1.Seq END) ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.PatNum,'+',s1.Seq), r.DateDue, r.RecallNum, s1.Seq

request: List of un-scheduled hours per operatory by date for given date range
query: SET @StartDate='2020-01-01', @EndDate='2020-01-31'; SET @OpName='%%'; SELECT s.SchedDate ,o.OpName ,FORMAT((SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(s.StopTime,s.StartTime)))/3600)-(COALESCE(a.AptTimeHrs,0.0)), 2) AS 'UnschedHrs' ,FORMAT(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(s.StopTime,s.StartTime)))/3600, 2) AS 'TotSchedHours' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(a.AptTimeHrs,0.0), 1) AS 'AptTimeHrs' FROM scheduleop so INNER JOIN SCHEDULE s ON s.ScheduleNum = so.ScheduleNum AND s.SchedType IN (0,1,3) INNER JOIN operatory o ON o.OperatoryNum = so.OperatoryNum AND o.OpName LIKE @OpName LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(a.AptDateTime)AS AptDate ,SUM(LENGTH(a.Pattern))/12 AS AptTimeHrs ,a.Op FROM appointment a WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND a.AptStatus IN(1,2,4) GROUP BY DATE(a.AptDateTime),a.Op ) a ON a.AptDate = s.SchedDate AND a.Op = o.OperatoryNum WHERE s.SchedDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY s.SchedDate,o.OperatoryNum ORDER BY s.SchedDate,o.OperatoryNum

request: Number of hours a specified provider is scheduled every day between the date range.
query: SET @ProvAbbr = 'LAV'; SET @StartDate = '2016-04-01', @EndDate = '2016-05-05'; SET @provNum= (SELECT provider.ProvNum FROM provider WHERE provider.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr); SET @startTime=TIME('00:00:00'),@stopTime=TIME('00:00:00'),@date=DATE('0001-01-01'); SELECT C.SchedDate, SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(C.StopTime)-TIME_TO_SEC(C.StartTime))) AS HrsWkd FROM ( SELECT B.SchedDate,B.StartTime,MAX(B.StopTime) AS StopTime FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN @date=A.SchedDate AND TIME(@stopTime)>TIME(A.StartTime) THEN @startTime ELSE @startTime:=A.StartTime END) AS StartTime, @stopTime:=A.StopTime AS StopTime,@date:=A.SchedDate AS SchedDate FROM ( SELECT * FROM SCHEDULE WHERE SchedType=1 AND ProvNum=@provNum ORDER BY SchedDate,StartTime,StopTime) A ) B GROUP BY B.SchedDate,B.StartTime )C WHERE C.SchedDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY SchedDate

request: Procedure Analysis by Provider. For the specified provider, gives the count of completed procedures, the procedure fee, and the percentage for the month and year per procedure code. The Units columns are the sum of Unit Quantity and Base Units. For the individual procedure codes, the Percentage columns are the fees from the procedure divided by the total fees for that category. For the category totals, the Percentage columns are the fees from the category divided by the total fees for the provider.
query: SET @Month=4, @Year=2024; SET @Provider = 'Doc'; SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) AS 'YearProvFee' ,SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(pl.ProcDate) = @Month THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) END) AS 'MonthProvFee' INTO @YearProvFee ,@MonthProvFee FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr = @Provider WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND YEAR(pl.ProcDate) = @Year; SELECT display.Provider ,(CASE WHEN display.ItemOrder = 3 THEN '' ELSE display.Category END) AS 'Category' ,display.ProcCode ,LEFT(display.Descript,20) AS 'Descript' ,display.MthCount ,display.MthUnits ,display.MthFees ,display.MonthPercent AS 'Month%' ,display.YrCount ,display.YrUnits ,display.YrFees ,display.YearPercent AS 'Year%' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder' ,COALESCE(main.Provider,@Provider) AS 'Provider' ,main.ProcCode ,main.Descript ,main.Category ,main.MthCount ,main.MthUnits ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(main.MonthFee/percat.MonthCatFee*100,0),2),2) AS 'MonthPercent' ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(main.MonthFee,0),2),2) AS 'MthFees' ,main.YrCount ,main.YrUnits ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(main.YearFee/percat.YearCatFee*100,0),2),2) AS 'YearPercent' ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(main.YearFee,0),2),2) AS 'YrFees' FROM ( SELECT percode.Provider ,pc.ProcCode ,df.ItemName AS 'Category' ,(CASE WHEN pc.LaymanTerm = '' THEN pc.AbbrDesc ELSE pc.LaymanTerm END) AS 'Descript' ,SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(percode.ProcDate) = @Month THEN percode.ProcFee * percode.Units ELSE 0 END) AS 'MonthFee' ,SUM(percode.ProcFee * percode.Units) AS 'YearFee' ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(percode.ProcDate) = @Month THEN percode.Units END) ,0) AS 'MthUnits' ,COALESCE(SUM(percode.Units),0) AS 'YrUnits' ,COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(percode.ProcDate) = @Month THEN percode.ProcNum END) AS 'MthCount' ,COUNT(percode.ProcNum) AS 'YrCount' FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee ,procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits AS 'Units' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,procedurelog.CodeNum ,procedurelog.ProcNum ,procedurelog.ProcDate FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr = @Provider WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate) = @Year ) percode INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = percode.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition df ON df.DefNum = pc.ProcCat GROUP BY pc.ProcCode ) main LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) AS 'YearCatFee' ,SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(pl.ProcDate) = @Month THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) END) AS 'MonthCatFee' ,df.ItemName AS 'Category' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition df ON df.DefNum = pc.ProcCat INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr = @Provider WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND YEAR(pl.ProcDate) = @Year GROUP BY df.DefNum ) percat ON percat.Category = main.Category GROUP BY main.ProcCode UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS 'ItemOrder' ,COALESCE(main.Provider,@Provider) AS 'Provider' ,'' ,'Total:' ,main.Category ,SUM(main.MthCount) ,SUM(main.MthUnits) ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(main.MonthFee) / @MonthProvFee*100,0),2),2) AS 'MonthPercent' ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(main.MonthFee),0),2),2) AS 'MthFees' ,SUM(main.YrCount) ,SUM(main.YrUnits) ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(main.YearFee)/@YearProvFee*100,0),2),2) AS 'YearPercent' ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(main.YearFee),0),2),2) AS 'YrFees' FROM ( SELECT percode.Provider ,pc.ProcCode ,df.ItemName AS 'Category' ,(CASE WHEN LENGTH(pc.LaymanTerm) = 0 THEN pc.AbbrDesc ELSE pc.LaymanTerm END) AS 'Descript' ,SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(percode.ProcDate) = @Month THEN percode.ProcFee * percode.Units ELSE 0 END) AS 'MonthFee' ,SUM(percode.ProcFee * percode.Units) AS 'YearFee' ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(percode.ProcDate) = @Month THEN percode.Units END) ,0) AS 'MthUnits' ,COALESCE(SUM(percode.Units),0) AS 'YrUnits' ,COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(percode.ProcDate) = @Month THEN percode.ProcNum END) AS 'MthCount' ,COUNT(percode.ProcNum) AS 'YrCount' FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee ,procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits AS 'Units' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider'
