,procedurelog.CodeNum ,procedurelog.ProcNum ,procedurelog.ProcDate FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr = @Provider WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate) = @Year ) percode INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = percode.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition df ON df.DefNum = pc.ProcCat GROUP BY pc.ProcCode ) main GROUP BY main.Category UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder ,'','','' ,df.ItemName ,'','','','','','','','' FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee ,procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits AS 'Units' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,procedurelog.CodeNum ,procedurelog.ProcNum ,procedurelog.ProcDate FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr = @Provider WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate) = @Year ) percode INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = percode.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition df ON df.DefNum = pc.ProcCat GROUP BY pc.ProcCat ) display ORDER BY display.Category, display.ItemOrder, display.ProcCode;

request: Procedure Analysis for Practice. For each provider and each category, gives the count of completed procedures, the procedure fee, and the percentage for the month and year per procedure code. The Units columns are the sum of Unit Quantity and Base Units. For the provider section, the Percentage columns are the fees completed by the provider divided by the total fees for the practice. For the categories, the Percentage columns are the fees from the category divided by the total fees for the practice.
query: SET @Month=2, @Year=2018; SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS YearPracFee, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(pl.ProcDate)=@Month THEN pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) END) AS MonthPracFee INTO @YearPracFee,@MonthPracFee FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND YEAR(pl.ProcDate)=@Year; SELECT C.Provider,C.MthCount,C.MthUnits,C.MthFees,C.MonthPercent AS 'Month%', C.YrCount,C.YrUnits,C.YrFees,C.YearPercent AS 'Year%' FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,A.Provider, A.MthCount,A.MthUnits, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.MonthFee/@MonthPracFee*100,0),2),2) AS MonthPercent, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.MonthFee,0),2),2) AS 'MthFees', A.YrCount,A.YrUnits, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.YearFee/@YearPracFee*100,0),2),2) AS YearPercent, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.YearFee,0),2),2) AS 'YrFees' FROM ( SELECT pr.ProvNum,CONCAT(pr.Abbr,' - ',pr.FName,' ',pr.LName,IF(pr.Suffix='','',', '),pr.Suffix) AS 'Provider', SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.ProcFee*B.Units ELSE 0 END) AS MonthFee, SUM(B.ProcFee*B.Units) AS YearFee, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.Units END),0) AS MthUnits, COALESCE(SUM(B.Units),0) AS YrUnits, COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.ProcNum END) AS MthCount, COUNT(B.ProcNum) AS YrCount FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee,procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits AS Units,procedurelog.ProvNum, procedurelog.CodeNum,procedurelog.ProcNum,procedurelog.ProcDate FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate)=@Year ) B ON B.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum GROUP BY pr.ProvNum ORDER BY pr.IsSecondary ASC,pr.Abbr ) A UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,A.Provider, A.MthCount,A.MthUnits, '100.00' AS MonthPercent, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.MonthFee,0),2),2) AS 'MthFees', A.YrCount,A.YrUnits, '100.00' AS YearPercent, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.YearFee,0),2),2) AS 'YrFees' FROM ( SELECT 'Grand Total' AS 'Provider', SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.ProcFee*B.Units ELSE 0 END) AS MonthFee, SUM(B.ProcFee*B.Units) AS YearFee, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.Units END),0) AS MthUnits, COALESCE(SUM(B.Units),0) AS YrUnits, COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.ProcNum END) AS MthCount, COUNT(B.ProcNum) AS YrCount FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee,procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits AS Units,procedurelog.ProvNum, procedurelog.CodeNum,procedurelog.ProcNum,procedurelog.ProcDate FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate)=@Year ) B ) A UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder,'','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder,A.Category, A.MthCount,A.MthUnits, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.MonthFee/@MonthPracFee*100,0),2),2) AS MonthPercent, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.MonthFee,0),2),2) AS 'MthFees', A.YrCount,A.YrUnits, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.YearFee/@YearPracFee*100,0),2),2) AS YearPercent, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.YearFee,0),2),2) AS 'YrFees' FROM ( SELECT df.ItemName AS Category, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.ProcFee*B.Units ELSE 0 END) AS MonthFee, SUM(B.ProcFee*B.Units) AS YearFee, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.Units END),0) AS MthUnits, COALESCE(SUM(B.Units),0) AS YrUnits, COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.ProcNum END) AS MthCount, COUNT(B.ProcNum) AS YrCount FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee,procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits AS Units, procedurelog.CodeNum,procedurelog.ProcNum,procedurelog.ProcDate FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate)=@Year ) B LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=B.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition df ON df.DefNum=pc.ProcCat GROUP BY pc.ProcCat ORDER BY Category ) A UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder,A.Provider, A.MthCount,A.MthUnits, '100.00' AS MonthPercent, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.MonthFee,0),2),2) AS 'MthFees', A.YrCount,A.YrUnits, '100.00' AS YearPercent, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.YearFee,0),2),2) AS 'YrFees' FROM ( SELECT 'Grand Total' AS 'Provider', SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.ProcFee*B.Units ELSE 0 END) AS MonthFee, SUM(B.ProcFee*B.Units) AS YearFee, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.Units END),0) AS MthUnits, COALESCE(SUM(B.Units),0) AS YrUnits, COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(B.ProcDate)=@Month THEN B.ProcNum END) AS MthCount, COUNT(B.ProcNum) AS YrCount FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee,procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits AS Units,procedurelog.ProvNum, procedurelog.CodeNum,procedurelog.ProcNum,procedurelog.ProcDate FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND YEAR(procedurelog.ProcDate)=@Year ) B ) A ) C

request: Number of visits for patients in a date range who have the specified carrier as their primary insurance. A visit is defined as one or more completed procedures on a date.
query: SET @CarrierName = 'DentaQuest, LLC-VA'; SET @StartDate = '2016-01-01', @EndDate = '2016-03-31'; SET @pos = 0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS ' FROM( SELECT ca.CarrierName,CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS 'Patient Name',COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcDate) AS 'Visits' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 INNER JOIN inssub ins ON pp.InsSubNum=ins.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan inp ON ins.PlanNum=inp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON inp.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum AND ca.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.Lname,p.FName,Visits )D UNION ALL SELECT '____','____________','____________','____' UNION ALL SELECT '',ca.CarrierName,'Total',COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum,pl.ProcDate) FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 INNER JOIN inssub ins ON pp.InsSubNum=ins.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan inp ON ins.PlanNum=inp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON inp.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum AND ca.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName

request: Patient detail report. For patients seen in the date range, displays address, whether they are a new patient, their payment type, P&I, and whether they had any specified procedures done. An patient is considered Medicaid if the insurance carrier has a fee schedule with the word 'Medicaid' in it.
query: SET @StartDate='2016-01-01',@EndDate='2016-01-31'; SET @ProcList1='D0120|D0150'; SET @ProcList2='D0330'; SET @ProcList3='D8040|D8090'; SET @ProcList4='D1351|D1353'; SET @ProcList5='D2140|D2150'; SET @ProcList6='D2331|D2332'; SET @ProcList7='D2740|D2750'; SET @ProcList8='D2610|D2620'; SET @ProcList1=CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcList1,'|','$|^'),'$'); SET @ProcList2=CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcList2,'|','$|^'),'$'); SET @ProcList3=CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcList3,'|','$|^'),'$'); SET @ProcList4=CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcList4,'|','$|^'),'$'); SET @ProcList5=CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcList5,'|','$|^'),'$'); SET @ProcList6=CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcList6,'|','$|^'),'$'); SET @ProcList7=CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcList7,'|','$|^'),'$'); SET @ProcList8=CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcList8,'|','$|^'),'$'); SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient',CONCAT(p.Address,' ',p.Address2) AS Address,p.City,p.State,p.Zip, (CASE WHEN newpat.FirstVisit BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) AS 'NewPat', (CASE WHEN fs.request LIKE '%medicaid%' THEN 'Medicaid' ELSE COALESCE(ca.CarrierName,'Cash') END) AS 'Payment Type', SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))+COALESCE(adj.AdjustAmt,0)-COALESCE(cproc.Writeoff,0) AS '$NetProd_', COALESCE(ppay.PaymentAmt,0)+COALESCE(ipay.InsPay,0) AS '$Income_', (CASE WHEN famappts.Guarantor IS NULL THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END) AS 'FamHasAppts', (CASE WHEN YEAR(p.Birthdate)<1880 THEN 'Unknown' ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) END) AS 'Age', (CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS 'ProcList1', (CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS 'ProcList2', (CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS 'ProcList3', (CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS 'ProcList4', (CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS 'ProcList5', (CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS 'ProcList6', (CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS 'ProcList7', (CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE '' END) AS 'ProcList8' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pl.PatNum=pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ins ON pp.InsSubNum=ins.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan inp ON ins.PlanNum=inp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON inp.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum=inp.FeeSched INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS FirstVisit,pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) newpat ON newpat.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Writeoff,cp.PatNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,7) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) cproc ON cproc.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ad.AdjAmt) AS AdjustAmt,ad.PatNum FROM adjustment ad WHERE ad.AdjDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY ad.PatNum ) adj ON adj.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS PaymentAmt,ps.PatNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum ) ppay ON ppay.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPay,cp.PatNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) ipay ON ipay.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT fam.Guarantor FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ap.PatNum INNER JOIN patient fam ON fam.Guarantor=p.Guarantor WHERE ap.PatNum!=fam.PatNum AND ap.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY fam.Guarantor ) famappts ON famappts.Guarantor=p.Guarantor WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum

request: Aging of patient portion balance. Includes aging of credits.
query: SET @AsOf='2016-04-01'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR, E.PatNum AS 'Pat E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS',E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS',E.Over90 AS '>90 DAYS',E.Total AS TOTAL FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, D.PatNum, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60 THEN -D.FamCredits0to30 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCredits0to30<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCredits31to60-D.FamCredits0to30+D.FamCharges END) END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90 THEN -D.FamCredits31to60 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCharges END) END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver90 THEN -D.FamCredits61to90 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCharges END) END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges>=D.FamCreditsOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCharges-D.FamCreditsOver90 END) END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-D.FamInsEst,2),2) AS Total FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(B.Credits0to30) AS FamCredits0to30,SUM(B.Credits31to60) AS FamCredits31to60, SUM(B.Credits61to90) AS FamCredits61to90,SUM(B.CreditsOver90) AS FamCreditsOver90,SUM(B.Charges) AS FamCharges, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstTotal,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits0to30, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits31to60, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits61to90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS CreditsOver90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90, SUM(insests.InsEst) AS InsEstTotal FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor, '' AS '', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60 THEN -D.FamCredits0to30 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCredits0to30<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCredits31to60-D.FamCredits0to30+D.FamCharges END) END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90 THEN -D.FamCredits31to60 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCharges END) END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver90 THEN -D.FamCredits61to90 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver90+D.FamCredits61to90<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE -D.FamCreditsOver90-D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCharges END) END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamBal>0 THEN (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ELSE (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges>=D.FamCreditsOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCharges-D.FamCreditsOver90 END) END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-D.FamInsEst),2),2) AS Total FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(B.Credits0to30) AS FamCredits0to30,SUM(B.Credits31to60) AS FamCredits31to60, SUM(B.Credits61to90) AS FamCredits61to90,SUM(B.CreditsOver90) AS FamCreditsOver90,SUM(B.Charges) AS FamCharges, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstTotal,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits0to30, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits31to60, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits61to90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS CreditsOver90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90, SUM(insests.InsEst) AS InsEstTotal FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: List of patient problems definitions.
query: SELECT DiseaseName AS ProblemName FROM diseasedef ORDER BY DiseaseName

request: List of medication definitions.
query: SELECT MedName, Notes FROM medication ORDER BY MedName

request: List of prescription definitions.
query: SELECT Drug, Sig, Disp, Refills, Notes, (CASE WHEN IsControlled = 0 THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END) AS 'IsControlled?' FROM rxdef ORDER BY Drug

request: Special aging report-Patient aging by category(0-30,31-60...) including aging of insurance estimates.
query: SET @AsOf='2016-05-06'; SET @HasIns = ''; SELECT * FROM ( SELECT D.Patient AS Patient, D.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS', D.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', D.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS', D.Over90 AS '>90 Days', D.Total AS 'TOTAL' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(C.LName,', ',C.FName) AS Patient, C.PatNum AS ins_type, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN C.Credits<C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60 THEN C.Charges0to30 WHEN C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60+C.Charges0to30<=C.Credits THEN 0 ELSE C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60+C.Charges0to30-C.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN C.Credits<C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90 THEN C.Charges31to60 WHEN C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60<=C.Credits THEN 0 ELSE C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60-C.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN C.Credits<=C.ChargesOver90 THEN C.Charges61to90 WHEN C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90<=C.Credits THEN 0 ELSE C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90-C.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN C.Credits>=C.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE C.ChargesOver90-C.Credits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(C.PatBal,2),2) AS Total FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, p.LName, p.FName, (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR TranType = 'InsEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR TranType = 'InsEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR TranType = 'InsEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR TranType = 'InsEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsEst' AS TranType,cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate AS TranDate,IF(cp.InsEstTotalOverride=-1,-(cp.InsEstTotal+cp.Writeoff),-cp.InsEstTotalOverride) AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=RawPatTrans.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN @HasIns = 'YES' THEN p.HasIns = 'I' WHEN @HasIns = 'NO' THEN p.HasIns = '' ELSE TRUE END) WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) C WHERE C.PatBal>0.005 ) D ORDER BY D.Patient )E UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'TOTALS' AS Patient, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.0to30),2),2) AS '0-30 DAYS', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.31to60),2),2) AS '31-60 DAYS', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.61to90),2),2) AS '61-90 DAYS', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.Over90),2),2) AS '>90 Days', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.Total),2),2) AS 'TOTAL' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(C.LName,', ',C.FName) AS Patient, C.PatNum AS ins_type, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN C.Credits<C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60 THEN C.Charges0to30 WHEN C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60+C.Charges0to30<=C.Credits THEN 0 ELSE C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60+C.Charges0to30-C.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN C.Credits<C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90 THEN C.Charges31to60 WHEN C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60<=C.Credits THEN 0 ELSE C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90+C.Charges31to60-C.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN C.Credits<=C.ChargesOver90 THEN C.Charges61to90 WHEN C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90<=C.Credits THEN 0 ELSE C.ChargesOver90+C.Charges61to90-C.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN C.Credits>=C.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE C.ChargesOver90-C.Credits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(C.PatBal,2),2) AS Total FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, p.LName, p.FName, (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR TranType = 'InsEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR TranType = 'InsEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR TranType = 'InsEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR TranType = 'InsEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsEst' AS TranType,cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate AS TranDate,IF(cp.InsEstTotalOverride=-1,-(cp.InsEstTotal+cp.Writeoff),-cp.InsEstTotalOverride) AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=RawPatTrans.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN @HasIns = 'YES' THEN p.HasIns = 'I' WHEN @HasIns = 'NO' THEN p.HasIns = '' ELSE TRUE END) WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) C WHERE C.PatBal>0.005 )D

request:
Provider breakdown of patients seen, billable visits, days worked, and the average of the billable visits per day.
Seen is defined as a patient that has a completed appointment in the date range.
Billable visits is defined as a patient that has a specified billing type and has no insurance.
One day worked is a provider having at least one completed appointment on a particular day.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-04-20', @ToDate='2016-04-22'; SET @BillableBillingTypes='Standard Account|Bad Debt - Precollections'; SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Dentist', COUNT(DISTINCT a.PatNum, DATE(a.AptDateTime)) AS ' COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN def.ItemName REGEXP @BillableBillingTypes AND ISNULL(cp.PatNum) THEN a.AptNum END)) AS ' COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(a.AptDateTime)) AS 'Days Worked', FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN def.ItemName REGEXP @BillableBillingTypes AND ISNULL(cp.PatNum) THEN a.AptNum END)/COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(a.AptDateTime)),2),2) AS 'Avg. Billable Visits/Day' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus=2 INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=a.ProvNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=p.BillingType AND def.Category=4 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, procedurelog.AptNum FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN claimproc ON claimproc.ProcNum=procedurelog.ProcNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY procedurelog.AptNum )cp ON cp.AptNum=a.AptNum GROUP BY a.ProvNum

request:
Shows number of patients of or under 5 years of age and over 5 years of age as of their last completed procedure, with percent.
Only patients that have had a procedure completed within two years of the specified date are considered.
Percent is number of active patients under 5 years/total number of active patients.
query: SET @RunDate='2016-05-23'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,pl.ProcDate) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN pl.PatNum END)) AS 'Active Pats Under Age 5', COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,pl.ProcDate) BETWEEN 6 AND 160 THEN pl.PatNum END)) AS 'Active Pats Over Age 5', COUNT(pl.PatNum) AS 'Total Active Pats', FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,pl.ProcDate) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN pl.PatNum END))/ COUNT(pl.PatNum)*100,2),2) AS 'Percentage of Pats Under 5' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(procedurelog.ProcDate) AS ProcDate, procedurelog.PatNum FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @RunDate - INTERVAL 2 YEAR AND @RunDate GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum )pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum;

request:
List of patients with completed appointments in the seen date range, and has the specified hygienist on the appointment. 
Gives a procedure fee total from the completed appointments. 
Also totals treatment planned RESTORATIVE procedures, treatment planned in the TP date range, breaking them into TP'd procs on and not on a scheduled appointment.
query: SET @SeenFromDate='2016-04-20', @SeenToDate='2016-05-31'; SET @TPFromDate='2016-01-01', @TPToDate='2016-12-31'; SET @Hyg='%%'; SELECT A.AptDate AS 'DateSeen', A.Abbr AS AptHygProv, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', SUM(A.ProcFee) AS '$CompAptsProcs_', SUM(IFNULL(A.ProcFeeTot, 0)) AS '$TotalTxPlan_', SUM(IFNULL(A.ProcFeeAppt, 0)) AS '$TxScheduled_', SUM(IFNULL(A.ProcFeeNoAppt, 0)) AS '$TxNotScheduled_' FROM ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT(DATE(apt.AptDateTime))) AS AptDate, apt.PatNum, apt.AptNum, SUM(proc.GrossProd) AS ProcFee, prov.Abbr,0 AS ProcFeeTot,0 AS ProcFeeNoAppt,0 AS ProcFeeAppt,prov.ProvNum FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=apt.ProvHyg AND prov.Abbr LIKE @Hyg INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcNum,pl.AptNum,pl.CodeNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS GrossProd FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) proc ON proc.AptNum=apt.AptNum WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @SeenFromDate AND @SeenToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.IsHygiene=1 AND apt.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY apt.PatNum, prov.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT Seen.AptDate AS AptDate,pl.PatNum, pl.AptNum,0 AS ProcFee,Seen.Abbr AS ProvNum, (CASE WHEN pl.DateTP BETWEEN @TPFromDate AND @TPToDate THEN pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) ELSE 0 END) AS ProcFeeTot, (CASE WHEN pl.AptNum=0 AND pl.DateTP BETWEEN @TPFromDate AND @TPToDate THEN pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) ELSE 0 END) AS ProcFeeNoAppt, (CASE WHEN ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @TPFromDate AND @TPToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) ELSE 0 END) AS ProcFeeAppt,Seen.ProvNum FROM ( SELECT appointment.PatNum, provider.Abbr, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT(DATE(appointment.AptDateTime))) AS AptDate,provider.ProvNum FROM appointment INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=appointment.ProvHyg AND provider.Abbr LIKE @Hyg INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum=appointment.AptNum WHERE appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @SeenFromDate AND @SeenToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND appointment.IsHygiene=1 AND appointment.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY appointment.PatNum, appointment.AptNum )Seen INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=Seen.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND (procedurecode.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D2000' AND 'D4000' OR procedurecode.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D5000' AND 'D7900') LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum=pl.AptNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=1 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum, Seen.Abbr, pl.AptNum )A INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=A.PatNum GROUP BY A.PatNum, A.ProvNum ORDER BY AptHygProv, Patient;

request:
List of patients that have been seen in the date range with the specified referral source, and being younger than the specified age. 
Seen means that they have a completed appointment in the date range.
Shows patnum, patient name, patient's age, referral from source, and primary insurance carrier for patients.
query: SET @StartDate='2014-01-01', @EndDate='2018-03-31'; SET @Referral='%%', @Age='25'; SELECT patient.PatNum AS 'Pat ID', CONCAT(patient.LName, ', ', patient.FName) AS 'Patient', (CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) ELSE 0 END) AS 'Age', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT(CONCAT(referral.FName, ' ', referral.LName))) AS 'Referral Source', carrier.CarrierName FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum=patient.PatNum AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND appointment.AptStatus=2 INNER JOIN refattach ON refattach.PatNum=patient.PatNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum=refattach.ReferralNum AND CONCAT(referral.FName, ' ', referral.LName) LIKE @Referral LEFT JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ON insplan.plannum = inssub.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum WHERE YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) < @Age GROUP BY patient.PatNum ORDER BY Patient;

request: List of patients with completed appointments in the seen date range with a RESTORATIVE procedure(D2000-D2999) attached, and has the specified hygienist on the appointment. Gives a total from the completed appointments RESTORATIVE procedure codes. Also totals treatment planned RESTORATIVE procedures, treatment planned in the TP date range, breaking them into TP'd procedures on and not on a scheduled appointment.
query: SET @SeenFromDate='2016-04-20', @SeenToDate='2016-05-31'; SET @TPFromDate='2015-03-01', @TPToDate='2017-05-31'; SET @Hyg='%%'; SELECT A.AptDate AS 'Apt Date(s)', A.Abbr AS 'Provider', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', SUM(A.ProcFee) AS '$Apts Procs_', SUM(IFNULL(A.ProcFeeTot, 0)) AS '$Total Tx Plan_', SUM(IFNULL(A.ProcFeeAppt, 0)) AS '$Tx on Appt_', SUM(IFNULL(A.ProcFeeNoAppt, 0)) AS '$Tx not on Appt_' FROM ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT(DATE(apt.AptDateTime))) AS AptDate, apt.PatNum, apt.AptNum, SUM(proc.GrossProd) AS ProcFee, prov.Abbr,0 AS ProcFeeTot,0 AS ProcFeeNoAppt,0 AS ProcFeeAppt,prov.ProvNum FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=apt.ProvHyg AND prov.Abbr LIKE @Hyg INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcNum,pl.AptNum,pl.CodeNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS GrossProd FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) proc ON proc.AptNum=apt.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=proc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D2000' AND 'D2999' WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @SeenFromDate AND @SeenToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY apt.PatNum, prov.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT Seen.AptDate AS AptDate,pl.PatNum, pl.AptNum,0 AS ProcFee,Seen.Abbr AS ProvNum, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS ProcFeeTot, (CASE WHEN pl.AptNum=0 AND pl.DateTP BETWEEN @TPFromDate AND @TPToDate THEN SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) ELSE 0 END) AS ProcFeeNoAppt, (CASE WHEN ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @TPFromDate AND @TPToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) ELSE 0 END) AS ProcFeeAppt,Seen.ProvNum FROM ( SELECT appointment.PatNum, provider.Abbr, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT(DATE(appointment.AptDateTime))) AS AptDate,provider.ProvNum FROM appointment INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=appointment.ProvHyg AND provider.Abbr LIKE @Hyg INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum=appointment.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=procedurelog.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D2000' AND 'D2999' WHERE DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @SeenFromDate AND @SeenToDate AND appointment.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY appointment.PatNum )Seen INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=Seen.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D2000' AND 'D2999' LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum=pl.AptNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=1 GROUP BY pl.PatNum, Seen.Abbr, pl.AptNum )A INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=A.PatNum GROUP BY A.PatNum, A.ProvNum ORDER BY Provider, Patient;

request: List of patients that have a completed D0150 that is attached to a completed appointment in the date range and that has either an insurance payment or patient payment. Leave clinic blank to see all procedures, including thoes not assigned to any clinic.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-05-13', @ToDate='2016-05-16'; SET @Prov='%%', @Clinic='%%'; SELECT Z.PayDate AS 'Pay Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Pat Name', Z.AptDate AS 'Apt Date', Z.ProcCode AS 'Code', prov.Abbr AS 'Prov', Z.InsPaid AS 'Ins Paid', Z.WO AS 'WO', Z.PatPay AS 'PatPay' FROM( SELECT cpay.CheckDate AS PayDate, DATE(A.AptDateTime) AS AptDate, A.ProcCode AS ProcCode, A.ProvNum, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPaid, SUM(cp.WriteOff )AS WO, 0 AS PatPay,a.PatNum AS PatNum FROM( SELECT a.AptDateTime, pl.ProcNum, pl.ProvNum, a.PatNum, pc.ProcCode,clinic.request AS Clinic FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) A INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=A.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE COALESCE(A.Clinic,'Unassigned') LIKE @Clinic GROUP BY A.ProcNum,cpay.CheckDate UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS PayDate, DATE(A.AptDateTime) AS AptDate, A.ProcCode AS ProcCode, ps.ProvNum,0 AS InsPaid,0 AS WO, SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS PatPay, A.PatNum AS PatNum FROM( SELECT a.AptDateTime,pl.ProcNum,prov.ProvNum,a.PatNum,pc.ProcCode,clinic.request AS Clinic FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) A INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.ProcNum=A.ProcNum AND ps.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHERE COALESCE(A.Clinic,'Unassigned') LIKE @Clinic GROUP BY A.ProcNum,ps.DatePay )Z INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=Z.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=Z.ProvNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT a.PatNum FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum=a.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=procedurelog.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode='D0150' )NP ON NP.PatNum=Z.PatNum ORDER BY Z.PayDate, prov.Abbr;

request: Aging for families also showing dates of the last visit, insurance payment, and statement. Also groups accounts that are above and below a $50.00 balance with subtotals and practice totals.
query: SET @AsOf='2016-05-04'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR, E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS',E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS',E.Over90 AS '>90 DAYS',E.Total AS TOTAL, IFNULL(E.LastVisit, 'None') AS 'Last Visit', IFNULL(E.LastInsPayment, 'None') AS 'Last Ins Payment', IFNULL(E.LastStatement, 'None') AS 'Last Statement' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,'Balances above $50' AS Guarantor, ' 'Report As Of:' AS LastInsPayment, @AsOf AS LastStatement UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,'', '','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst, D.LastVisit, D.LastInsPayment, D.LastStatement FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst, F.LastVisit, H.LastInsPayment, J.LastStatement FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum UNION ALL SELECT 'InsEst' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayEst AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,6) ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, patient.Guarantor, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ProcDate),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'LastVisit' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=procedurelog.PatNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY patient.Guarantor ) F ON F.Guarantor=g.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ClaimProc.Patnum, patient.Guarantor, MAX(DateCP) AS 'LastInsPayment' FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=claimproc.PatNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4) AND claimproc.InsPayAmt>0 GROUP BY patient.Guarantor ) H ON H.Guarantor=g.Patnum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT statement.PatNum, patient.Guarantor, MAX(DateSent) AS 'LastStatement' FROM statement INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=statement.PatNum WHERE statement.IsSent=1 GROUP BY patient.Guarantor )J ON J.Guarantor=g.Patnum GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>50 UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst,'N/A','N/A','N/A' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>50 UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder,'','','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder,'Balances below $50' AS Guarantor, ' UNION ALL SELECT 7 AS ItemOrder,'','','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 8 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst, D.LastVisit, D.LastInsPayment, D.LastStatement FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst, F.LastVisit, H.LastInsPayment, J.LastStatement FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum UNION ALL SELECT 'InsEst' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayEst AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,6) ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, patient.Guarantor, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ProcDate),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'LastVisit' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=procedurelog.PatNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY patient.Guarantor ) F ON F.Guarantor=g.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ClaimProc.Patnum, patient.Guarantor, MAX(DateCP) AS 'LastInsPayment' FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=claimproc.PatNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4) AND claimproc.InsPayAmt>0 GROUP BY patient.Guarantor ) H ON H.Guarantor=g.Patnum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT statement.PatNum, patient.Guarantor, MAX(DateSent) AS 'LastStatement' FROM statement INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=statement.PatNum WHERE statement.IsSent=1 GROUP BY patient.Guarantor )J ON J.Guarantor=g.Patnum GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal<50 AND ABS(D.FamBal)>0.00 UNION ALL SELECT 9 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst,'N/A','N/A','N/A' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal<50.00 AND ABS(D.FamBal)>0.00 UNION ALL SELECT 11 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 12 AS ItemOrder,'PRACTICE TOTALS:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst,'N/A','N/A','N/A' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,-cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate,-pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.00 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: List of carriers and the claim form that they use. Can be used for change verification, when making bulk changes to the claim forms that are attached to insurance plans.
query: SELECT carrier.CarrierName, claimform.request FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.CarrierNum=carrier.CarrierNum INNER JOIN claimform ON insplan.ClaimFormNum=claimform.ClaimFormNum WHERE claimform.request='ADA 2006';

request: List of patients that have an appointment in the date range, showing insurance information. PH stands for Plan Holder(Subscriber).
query: SET @StartDate='2020-07-01', @EndDate='2020-07-30'; SET @CarrierNames='Metlife,BCBS'; SET @CarrierNames=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@CarrierNames)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@CarrierNames,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ca.CarrierName AS 'Insurance', ib.SubscriberID AS 'ID', psub.SSN AS 'SSN', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS "PT's Name", p.BirthDate AS "PT's DOB", appointment.AptDateTime, ip.GroupNum AS 'Group '' AS 'Verif. Type' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum AND ca.CarrierName REGEXP @CarrierNames INNER JOIN patient psub ON psub.PatNum=ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum=p.PatNum AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY ca.CarrierName;

request: New patients that had their first completed appointment in the date range, having procedures that are completed and attached to the appointment.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-03-16', @ToDate='2016-04-30'; SELECT appointment.AptDateTime,patient.FName, patient.LName, patient.Email, patient.HmPhone AS 'Home (CASE WHEN patient.Gender=0 THEN 'Male' WHEN patient.Gender=1 THEN 'Female' WHEN patient.Gender=2 THEN 'Unknown' END) AS 'Gender', GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.ProcCode) AS 'Codes on appt' FROM patient INNER JOIN( SELECT MIN(appointment.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDateTime', appointment.PatNum FROM appointment WHERE appointment.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY appointment.PatNum )firstapt ON firstapt.PatNum=patient.PatNum INNER JOIN appointment ON firstapt.patnum =appointment.patnum AND appointment.AptDateTime = firstapt.AptDateTime AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate+ INTERVAL 1 DAY INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum=appointment.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=procedurelog.CodeNum GROUP BY patient.PatNum ORDER BY patient.FName;

request: Pulls a list of Allergies, with the ability to enter in the request for no known allergies.
query: SET @ExcAllergy='%None%'; SELECT A.Allergies FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT('As Of: ', CURDATE()) AS 'Allergies' UNION SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, ' UNION SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, request AS 'Allergies' FROM allergydef WHERE request NOT LIKE @ExcAllergy )A ORDER BY ItemOrder, Allergies;

request: List of patients with primary and secondary carrier names and group names for active and inactive patients that have been seen in the specified date range. Also includes patients with no insurance. Seen counts as a completed procedure in the date range.
query: SET @StartDate='2023-01-01', @EndDate='2023-01-20'; SELECT p.PatNum ,IFNULL(ca1.CarrierName,'No Ins') AS 'Prim Ins' ,IFNULL(ip1.GroupName,'No Ins') AS 'Prim Ins Group Name' ,IFNULL(ca2.CarrierName,'No Ins') AS 'Sec Ins' ,IFNULL(ip2.GroupName,'No Ins') AS 'Sec Ins Group Name' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN patplan pp1 ON p.PatNum=pp1.PatNum AND pp1.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib1 ON ib1.InsSubNum = pp1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum = ib1.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca1 ON ip1.CarrierNum = ca1.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp2 ON p.PatNum = pp2.PatNum AND pp2.Ordinal = 2 LEFT JOIN inssub ib2 ON ib2.InsSubNum = pp2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip2 ON ip2.PlanNum = ib2.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca2 ON ip2.CarrierNum = ca2.CarrierNum WHERE p.PatStatus IN (0,2) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY ISNULL(ca1.CarrierName),ISNULL(ca2.CarrierName),ca1.CarrierName, ca2.CarrierName;

request: Gross production per procedure category, including procedure counts for all and for new patients (based on appointment)
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Providers=''; SELECT (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' to') WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,4) THEN ' WHEN s1.Seq = 3 THEN ( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.DefNum = pc.ProcCat ) WHEN s1.Seq = 5 THEN 'Procedure Total' WHEN s1.Seq = 6 THEN 'New Patient Procedures' END) AS 'item' ,(CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y') WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,4) THEN ' ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT core.ProcNum) END) AS 'Quantity' ,(CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN '' WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,4) THEN '' ELSE FORMAT(SUM(IFNULL(core.ProcFeeCalc,0)),2) END) AS 'Total' ,(CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN CONCAT('For: ',IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,'Practice',@Providers)) WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,4) THEN '' ELSE FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(core.ProcFeeCalc,0)) / COUNT(DISTINCT core.ProcNum),0),2) END) AS 'Average' ,(CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (1,2) THEN '' WHEN s1.Seq = 4 THEN ' ELSE CAST(IFNULL( (SUM(IFNULL(core.ProcFeeCalc,0)) / ( SELECT SUM(pltot.ProcFee * (pltot.UnitQty + pltot.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog pltot INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pltot.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr,@Providers)) WHERE pltot.ProcStatus = 2 AND pltot.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) ) * 100 ,0) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) END) AS 'Percent' FROM procedurecode pc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcNum ,pl.PatNum ,pl.ProcDate ,pl.CodeNum ,pl.ProvNum ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,a.AptNum ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'ProcFeeCalc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Providers)) LEFT JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND a.IsNewPatient AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) core ON core.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_6 s1 ON TRUE WHERE (CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (4,5) THEN !ISNULL(core.CodeNum) WHEN s1.Seq = 6 THEN !ISNULL(core.CodeNum) AND !ISNULL(core.AptNum) ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY IF(s1.Seq = 3,CONCAT(s1.Seq,'+',pc.ProcCat),s1.Seq) ORDER BY s1.Seq, `Item`

request: List of guarantors with active family members.  Shows address information.
query: SELECT CONCAT("The ",g.LName," Family") AS FamilyName, g.Address, g.Address2, g.City, g.State, g.Zip FROM patient p LEFT JOIN patient g ON p.Guarantor=g.PatNum WHERE p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY p.Guarantor

request: List of active patients with PatNum, Date of First Visit, clinic, and address.
query: SELECT (CASE WHEN A.ItemOrder=2 THEN ' A.PatNum AS 'Pat A.Patient, A.DateFirstVisit, A.Address, A.Address2, A.City, A.State, A.Zip FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, ClinicNum, PatNum, CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName) AS Patient, DateFirstVisit, Address, Address2, City, State, Zip FROM patient WHERE PatStatus=0 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder,'Clinic','ActiveCount','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, patient. ClinicNum, COUNT(patient.PatNum) AS PatCount, '','','','','','','' FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY patient.ClinicNum )A LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=A.ClinicNum ORDER BY A.ItemOrder,cl.request,A.Patient

request: Appointment List report
query: SET @FromDate='2012-12-03' , @ToDate='2016-12-03'; SET @CarrierName='CSC Medicaid'; SET @OperatoryName='%%'; SELECT A.DateApt,CONCAT(A.LName,', ',A.FName) AS Patient,A.Age,A.TimeApt,A.Length,A.ProcDescript,A.Phone AS 'Phone Hm-Wk-Cell',A.OpName,A.CarrierName FROM ( SELECT DATE(a.AptDateTime)AS 'DateApt', p.LName,p.FName, (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) AS 'Age', DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%l:%i %p') AS 'TimeApt', FORMAT(LENGTH(a.Pattern)*5,0) AS 'Length', a.ProcDescript ,CONCAT(" ", LEFT(HmPhone,13), "- ", LEFT(WkPhone,13), "- ",LEFT(WirelessPhone,13)) AS 'Phone', o.OpName, c.CarrierName FROM appointment a INNER JOIN operatory o ON a.Op = o.OperatoryNum AND o.OpName LIKE @OperatoryName INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus NOT IN (3,6) INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub inss ON pp.InsSubNum = inss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan insp ON inss.PlanNum = insp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON insp.CarrierNum = c.CarrierNum AND c.CarrierName=@CarrierName WHERE (DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) GROUP BY a.AptNum )A ORDER BY DateApt,A.LName,A.FName;

request: List of scheduled appointments in date range, with patient and insurance information.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-12-03' , @ToDate='2023-12-03'; SELECT DATE(a.AptDateTime) AS ApptDate ,p.PatNum AS 'Pat ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName)AS Patient ,COALESCE(car1.CarrierName,"N/A") AS 'Primary Ins',COALESCE(ib1.SubscriberID,"N/A") AS 'Primary ID' ,COALESCE(car2.CarrierName,"N/A") AS 'Secondary Ins',COALESCE(ib2.SubscriberID,"N/A") AS 'Secondary ID' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp1 ON pp1.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp1.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib1 ON ib1.InsSubNum=pp1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip1 ON ib1.PlanNum=ip1.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car1 ON car1.CarrierNum=ip1.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp2 ON pp2.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp2.Ordinal=2 LEFT JOIN inssub ib2 ON ib2.InsSubNum=pp2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip2 ON ib2.PlanNum=ip2.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car2 ON car2.CarrierNum=ip2.CarrierNum WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 1 ORDER BY ApptDate,p.LName,p.FName,car1.CarrierName,car2.CarrierName,ib1.SubscriberID,ib2.SubscriberID

request: Count of appointments in date range.  Includes count of visits from patients with insurance, visits from patients with custom patient field, and visits from patients with Medicaid insurance
query: SET @FromDate='2015-05-01', @ToDate='2015-05-31'; SET @PatField='%Sliding Scale%'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.PatNum) AS 'Patients' , COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ISNULL(c.CarrierNum) THEN NULL ELSE a.PatNum END)) AS 'Insured', COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pf.FieldName) THEN NULL ELSE a.PatNum END)) AS 'Slide', COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN c.CarrierName LIKE '%Medicaid%' THEN a.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'Medicaid' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON p.PatNum = a.PatNum AND a.AptStatus=2 LEFT JOIN patfield pf ON pf.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pf.FieldName LIKE @PatField LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN inssub ins ON ins.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ins.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Visits','Insured','Slide','Medicaid' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.AptNum) AS Visits, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ISNULL(c.CarrierNum) THEN NULL ELSE a.AptNum END)) AS Insured, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pf.FieldName) THEN NULL ELSE a.AptNum END)) AS Slide, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN c.CarrierName LIKE '%Medicaid%' THEN a.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS Medicaid FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON p.PatNum=a.PatNum AND a.AptStatus=2 LEFT JOIN patfield pf ON pf.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pf.FieldName LIKE @PatField LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN inssub ins ON ins.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ins.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate

request: Daily payments report filtered by provider and carrier.  Will only show production for patients with insurance at the time of the procedure.
query: SET @FromDate='2015-02-01' , @ToDate='2015-06-30'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @CarrierName='%%'; SELECT trans.TransDate AS 'Date' , CONCAT(p.LName,',',p.FName) AS 'Patient' , trans.request , pv.Abbr AS 'Provider' , (CASE WHEN trans.TranType='Prod' THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Production' , (CASE WHEN trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS 'Writeoff' , (CASE WHEN trans.TranType IN('InsPay') THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsIncome' FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType , pl.ProcDate AS 'TransDate' , pl.ProvNum , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS Writeoff , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcNum AS 'ProcNum' , pc.Descript AS 'request' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN
