procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 INNER JOIN claimproc cp2 ON cp2.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp2.Status IN (0, 1, 4) INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp2.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType' , cp.DateCP AS 'TransDate' , cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS Writeoff , cp.PatNum , 0 AS ProcNum ,'Claim Payment' AS 'request' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum = cpm.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.InsPayAmt > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS 'TranType' , cp.ProcDate AS 'TransDate' , cp.ProvNum , 0 AS 'TranAmount' , -cp.WriteOff AS 'Writeoff' , cp.PatNum , 0 AS ProcNum , '' AS 'request' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (1, 4, 0) AND cp.WriteOff > 0 ) trans INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum = trans.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = trans.PatNum ORDER BY trans.TransDate, Patient;

request: Receivable Breakdown report but takes into account payment plans
query: SET @StartDate='2023-12-01', @EndDate='2023-12-31'; SET @WriteoffByDateOfService='NO'; SET @runningRcv = 0; SELECT c.Day , FORMAT(ROUND(c.Production,2),2) AS 'Production' , FORMAT(ROUND(c.Adjustment,2),2) AS 'Adjustment' , FORMAT(ROUND(c.Writeoff,2),2) AS 'Writeoff' , FORMAT(ROUND(c.Payment,2),2) AS 'Payment' , FORMAT(ROUND(c.InsPayment,2),2) AS 'InsPayment' , FORMAT(ROUND(c.PlanAmount,2),2) AS 'PayPlanAmount' , FORMAT(ROUND(c.DailyAR,2),2) AS 'Daily A/R' , FORMAT(ROUND(c.FinalAR,2),2) AS 'Final A/R' FROM ( SELECT b.Day , b.Production , b.Adjustment , b.Writeoff , b.Payment , b.InsPayment , b.PlanAmount , b.DailyAR , @runningRcv:= @runningRcv+B.DailyAR AS 'FinalAR' FROM ( SELECT a.ProcDate AS 'Day' , SUM(a.Production) AS 'Production' , SUM(a.AdjAmt) AS 'Adjustment' , SUM(a.woff) AS 'Writeoff' , SUM(a.splitamt) AS 'Payment' , SUM(a.InsPayamt) AS 'InsPayment' , SUM(a.PlanAmount) AS 'PlanAmount' , (SUM(a.Production) + SUM(a.adjamt) - SUM(a.woff)) - (SUM(a.splitamt) + SUM(a.InsPayamt) + SUM(a.PlanAmount)) AS 'DailyAR' FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcDate , procedurelog.ProcNum , COALESCE(SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee*(CASE procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits END)),0) AS 'Production' , 0 AS 'AdjAmt' , 0 AS 'woff' , 0 AS 'splitamt' , 0 AS 'InsPayamt' , 0 AS 'PlanAmount' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate <= @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcDate UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.AdjDate AS 'ProcDate' , adjustment.ProcNum , 0 AS 'Production' , COALESCE(SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt),0) AS 'adjamt' , 0 AS 'woff' , 0 AS 'splitamt' , 0 AS 'InsPayamt' , 0 AS 'PlanAmount' FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.AdjDate <= @EndDate GROUP BY adjustment.AdjDate UNION ALL SELECT (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN cp.ProcDate ELSE cp.DateCP END) AS 'ProcDate' , cp.ProcNum , 0 AS 'Production' , 0 AS 'adjamt' , SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'woff' , 0 AS 'splitamt' , 0 AS 'InsPayamt' , 0 AS 'PlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN (cp.ProcDate<=@EndDate) ELSE (cp.DateCP<=@EndDate) END) AND (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN (cp.Status IN(1,4,0)) ELSE (cp.Status IN(1,4)) END) GROUP BY cp.ProcDate UNION ALL SELECT paysplit.DatePay AS 'ProcDate' , paysplit.ProcNum , 0 AS 'Production' , 0 AS 'adjamt' , 0 AS 'woff' , COALESCE(SUM(paysplit.splitamt),0) AS 'splitamt' , 0 AS 'InsPayamt' , 0 AS 'PlanAmount' FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 AND paysplit.DatePay <= @EndDate GROUP BY paysplit.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT claimproc.DateCP AS 'ProcDate' , claimproc.ProcNum , 0 AS 'Production' , 0 AS 'adjamt' , 0 AS 'woff' , 0 AS 'splitamt' , COALESCE(SUM(claimproc.InsPayamt),0) AS 'InsPayamt' , 0 AS 'PlanAmount' FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND claimproc.DateCP <= @EndDate AND claimproc.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY claimproc.DateCP UNION ALL SELECT pp.PayPlanDate AS 'ProcDate' , 0 AS 'ProcNum' , 0 AS 'Production' , 0 AS 'adjamt' , 0 AS 'woff' , 0 AS 'splitamt' , 0 AS 'InsPayamt' , pp.CompletedAmt AS 'PlanAmount' FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= @EndDate )a GROUP BY a.ProcDate ORDER BY a.ProcDate )b GROUP BY b.Day )c WHERE c.Day BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate

request: Special referral report.  Shows breakdown of patients seen, number of appointments, as well as specific procedure range breakdowns for patients with referrals entered in date range.
query: SET @StartDate='2018-01-01', @EndDate='2018-01-31'; SET @RefLName="%%"; SET @RefFName="%%"; SELECT SUM(A.TotalFrom) AS 'NumRefFromPats', SUM(A.TotalTo) AS 'NumRefToPats', SUM(A.PatCompDrAppt) AS 'NumPatsDrAppt', SUM(A.TotCompDrAppt) AS 'NumDrAppt', SUM(A.PatHygAppt) AS 'NumPatsHygAppt', SUM(A.TotHygAppt) AS 'NumHygAppt', SUM(A.TotPrevAppt) AS 'NumPrevProcs', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND ((SUM(A.TotPrevAppt)/SUM(A.TotProc))*100,2),2),'%') AS '%PrevProcs', SUM(A.TotRestApt) AS 'NumRestPocs', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND ((SUM(A.TotRestApt))/SUM(A.TotProc)*100,2),2),'%') AS '%RestProcs', SUM(A.TotProsApt) AS 'NumProsthProcs', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND ((SUM(A.TotProsApt))/SUM(A.TotProc)*100,2),2),'%') AS '%ProsthProcs' FROM( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN A.RefType = 1 THEN A.PatNum END)) AS TotalFrom, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN A.RefType != 1 THEN A.PatNum END)) AS TotalTo, 0 AS PatCompDrAppt, 0 AS TotCompDrAppt, 0 AS PatHygAppt, 0 AS TotHygAppt, 0 AS TotPrevAppt, 0 AS TotRestApt, 0 AS TotProsApt, 0 AS TotProc FROM refattach A INNER JOIN referral B ON A.referralnum = B.referralnum AND (B.FName LIKE @RefFName AND B.LName LIKE @RefLName) WHERE A.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS TotalFrom, 0 AS TotalTo, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pc.IsHygiene=0 THEN a.PatNum END)) AS PatCompDrAppt, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pc.IsHygiene=0 THEN a.AptNum END)) AS TotCompDrAppt, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pc.IsHygiene=1 THEN a.PatNum END)) AS PatHygAppt, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pc.IsHygiene=1 THEN a.AptNum END)) AS TotHygAppt, 0 AS TotPrevAppt, 0 AS TotRestApt, 0 AS TotProsApt, 0 AS TotProc FROM appointment a INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = a.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN referral rf ON ra.referralnum = rf.referralnum AND (rf.FName LIKE @RefFName OR rf.LName LIKE @RefLName) INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @StatDate AND @EndDate UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS TotalFrom, 0 AS TotalTo, 0 AS PatCompAppt, 0 AS TotCompAppt, 0 AS PatHygAppt, 0 AS TotHygAppt, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D0000' AND 'D1999' THEN procs.ProcNum END)) AS TotPrevAppt, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN (procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D2000' AND 'D2699') OR (procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D2800' AND 'D2999') OR (procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D3000' AND 'D4999') OR (procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D7000' AND 'D7999') THEN procs.ProcNum END)) AS TotRestApt, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN (procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D2700' AND 'D2799') OR (procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D5000' AND 'D5899') OR (procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D5900' AND 'D5999') OR (procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D6200' AND 'D6899') OR (procs.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D8000' AND 'D8999') THEN procs.ProcNum END)) AS TotProsApt, COUNT(DISTINCT procs.ProcNum) AS TotProc FROM( SELECT pl.ProcNum,pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN referral rf ON ra.referralnum = rf.referralnum AND (rf.FName LIKE @RefFName OR rf.LName LIKE @RefLName) WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum )procs )A

request: Aging report with custom aged columns.  Sorted by highest balance.
query: SET @AsOf='2015-06-11'; SET @MinimumBal=-9999; SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR, E.0to30 AS '0-30 DAYS',E.31to60 AS '31-60 DAYS', E.61to90 AS '61-90 DAYS',E.90to1y AS '91-1 year', E.1yto2y AS '1-2 YEARS',E.2yto3y AS '2-3 YEARS', E.Over3y AS 'Over 3 Years', E.Total AS TOTAL, E.InsEst AS '-INS EST',E.PatEst AS '=PATIENT' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y THEN D.FamCharges90to1Y WHEN D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y+D.FamCharges90to1Y-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 90to1y, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y THEN D.FamCharges1yto2y WHEN D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y+D.FamCharges1yto2y-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 1yto2y, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver3y THEN D.FamCharges2yto3y WHEN D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver3y+D.FamCharges2yto3y-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS 2yto3y, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver3y THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver3y-D.FamCredits END) ,2),2) AS Over3y, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.Charges90to1y) AS FamCharges90to1Y,SUM(B.Charges1yto2y) AS FamCharges1yto2y, SUM(B.Charges2yto3y) AS FamCharges2yto3y,SUM(B.Over3y) AS FamChargesOver3y,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges90to1y, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 1 YEAR) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 2 YEAR)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges1yto2y, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 2 YEAR) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 3 YEAR)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges2yto3y, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 3 YEAR)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Over3y, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>@MinimumBal ORDER BY D.FamBal DESC ) E

request: Daily production and income report with totals by provider and month to date
query: SET @FromDate='2014-05-15' , @ToDate='2014-05-15'; SET @BillingType='%%'; SELECT B.Date AS 'Date', (CASE WHEN B.OrderSpace='1' THEN '' ELSE B.Patient END) AS 'Patient', B.`Pat B.ProcCode, B.request, B.ToothNum, B.Surf, B.Prov, B.$Prod_ AS 'Prod', B.BillingType AS 'Billing Type', B.$Adjust_ AS 'Adjust', B.$TotProd_ AS 'TotProd', B.$TotIncome_ AS 'TotIncome' FROM( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, A.Date, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'Patient', p.PatNum AS 'Pat A.ProcCode, A.request, A.ToothNum, A.Surf, pr.Abbr AS 'Prov', d.ItemName AS BillingType, FORMAT(A.$Prod_,2) AS '$Prod_', FORMAT(A.$Adjust_,2) AS '$Adjust_', FORMAT(A.$TotProd_,2) AS '$TotProd_', FORMAT(A.$TotIncome_,2) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, '' AS DATE, 'Provider Total:' AS 'Patient', '' AS PatNum, '' AS ProcCode, '' AS request, '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, pr.Abbr AS 'Prov', FORMAT(SUM(A.$Prod_),2) AS '$Prod_', d.ItemName AS BillingType, FORMAT(SUM(A.$Adjust_),2) AS '$Adjust_', FORMAT(SUM(A.$TotProd_),2) AS '$TotProd_', FORMAT(SUM(A.$TotIncome_),2) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType GROUP BY pr.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder, 0 AS OrderSpace, '' AS DATE, 'MonthToDate Total:' AS 'Patient', '' AS PatNum, '' AS ProcCode, '' AS request, '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS 'Prov', '' AS BillingType, '' AS $Prod_, '' AS $Adjust_, FORMAT(SUM(A.$TotProd_),2) AS '$TotProd_', FORMAT(SUM(A.$TotIncome_),2) AS '$TotIncome_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate <= @ToDate AND MONTH(pl.ProcDate)=MONTH(@FromDate) AND YEAR(pl.ProcDate)=YEAR(@FromDate) UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate <= @ToDate AND MONTH(a.AdjDate)=MONTH(@FromDate) AND YEAR(a.AdjDate)=YEAR(@FromDate) AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay <= @ToDate AND MONTH(ps.DatePay)=MONTH(@FromDate) AND YEAR(ps.DatePay)=YEAR(@FromDate) UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP <= @ToDate AND MONTH(cp.DateCP)=MONTH(@FromDate) AND YEAR(cp.DateCP)=YEAR(@FromDate) GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, 1 AS OrderSpace, '' AS DATE, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'Patient', '' AS PatNum, '' AS ProcCode, '' AS request, '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS 'Prov', '', '', '', '', '' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request', pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', 0 AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', ps.PatNum, d.ItemName AS 'request', ps.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', 0 AS '$TotProd_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome_', 0 AS '$InsIncome_', ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum=pa.PayNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType=d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName AS 'request', cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff_', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS '$PatIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome_', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome_', '' AS ToothNum, '' AS Surf, '' AS ProcCode FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.PatNum ) A ON A.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=p.BillingType AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType GROUP BY A.PatNum )B ORDER BY B.ItemOrder,B.Patient,B.OrderSpace,B.Date,B.ProcCode,B.request,B.ToothNum,B.Surf

request: Specific referral demographics breakdown.  Also shows an average amount of care per patient
query: SET @StartDate='2018-01-01', @EndDate='2018-01-31'; SET @RefLName="%%"; SET @RefFName="%%"; SET @TotalRefCount=(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ra.PatNum) FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral rf ON ra.referralnum = rf.referralnum AND (rf.FName LIKE @RefFName OR rf.LName LIKE @RefLName)WHERE ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ra.RefType = 1 ); SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT 'Age:' AS 'Category','Age%:' AS 'CategoryPercent' UNION ALL SELECT (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) AS Age, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum)/@TotalRefCount*100,2),2),'%') AS '%Age' FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ra.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral rf ON ra.referralnum = rf.referralnum AND (rf.FName LIKE @RefFName OR rf.LName LIKE @RefLName) GROUP BY Age UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT '','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Gender:','Gender%:' UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN p.Gender=0 THEN 'Male' WHEN p.Gender=1 THEN 'Female' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS Gender, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum)/@TotalRefCount*100,2),2),'%') AS '%Gender' FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ra.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral rf ON ra.referralnum = rf.referralnum AND (rf.FName LIKE @RefFName OR rf.LName LIKE @RefLName) GROUP BY Gender UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT '','' UNION ALL SELECT 'RaceEth:','RaceEth%:' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT((CASE pr.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' WHEN 10 THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 11 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyEthnicity' ELSE 'None' END)) AS 'RaceEth', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum)/@TotalRefCount*100,2),2),'%') AS '%RaceEth' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN patientrace pr ON pr.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ra.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral rf ON ra.referralnum = rf.referralnum AND (rf.FName LIKE @RefFName OR rf.LName LIKE @RefLName) GROUP BY pr.Race UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT '','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Lang:','Lang%:' UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN p.Language='' THEN 'None' ELSE p.Language END, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum)/@TotalRefCount*100,2),2),'%') AS '%Lang' FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ra.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral rf ON ra.referralnum = rf.referralnum AND (rf.FName LIKE @RefFName OR rf.LName LIKE @RefLName) GROUP BY p.Language UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT '','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Care/Pat:', CONCAT("$",FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(pl.ProcFee)/@TotalRefCount,2),2))"$Gross Prod_" FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND ra.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral rf ON ra.referralnum = rf.referralnum AND (rf.FName LIKE @RefFName OR rf.LName LIKE @RefLName) GROUP BY p.PatNum )pats INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=pats.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 )A

request: Daily procedures report in date range for a specific provider and clinic with procedure level financial info.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ProviderAbbrs=''; SET @ProcCodes='D0120,D0150,D0140'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @ShowProcsWithZeroPatRemaining ='Yes'; SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT IF(@EasyNoClinics, '', COALESCE(procdata.Clinic,'Unassigned')) AS 'Clinic' ,procdata.Provider ,procdata.PatNum ,procdata.Date ,TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,procdata.Date,CURDATE()) AS 'ProcAgeDays' ,procdata.ProcCode ,FORMAT(procdata.ProcFee,2) AS '$ProcFee_' ,FORMAT(procdata.Adjust,2) AS '$AdjAmt_' ,FORMAT(procdata.WriteOff,2) AS '$WriteOff_' ,FORMAT(procdata.InsPayAmt,2) AS '$InsPaid_' ,FORMAT(procdata.PatPay,2) AS '$PatPaid_' ,FORMAT(procdata.ProcFee + procdata.Adjust - procdata.InsPayAmt - procdata.WriteOff - procdata.PatPay,2) AS '$CurrentBal_' ,FORMAT(procdata.InsPayEst,2) AS '$InsPayEst_' ,FORMAT(procdata.WriteOffEst,2) AS '$WriteOffEst_' ,FORMAT(procdata.ProcFee + procdata.Adjust - procdata.InsPayAmt - procdata.WriteOff - procdata.InsPayEst - procdata.WriteOffEst - procdata.PatPay,2) AS '$PatRemaining' FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(c.Abbr, 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,pl.ProcNum ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'Patient' ,p.PatNum ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,pc.ProcCode ,(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(SUM( (CASE WHEN cp.Status =7 THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) ),0) AS 'ProcFee' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'Adjust' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'PatPay' ,SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1, 4) THEN cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) ,0)) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1, 4, 7) THEN 0 ELSE cp.InsPayEst END) ,0)) AS 'InsPayEst' ,SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1, 4) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) ,0)) AS 'WriteOff' ,SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1, 4, 7) THEN 0 WHEN cp.Status IN(0) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END) ,0)) AS 'WriteOffEst' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProviderAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr, @ProviderAbbrs)) LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 6) LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 OR @EasyNoClinics, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(c.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics)) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) procdata GROUP BY procdata.ProcNum HAVING IF(@ShowProcsWithZeroPatRemaining = 'Yes', TRUE, `$PatRemaining` NOT IN('0.00', '-0.00')) ORDER BY procdata.Provider, procdata.Date, procdata.Patient, procdata.ProcCode

request: List of un-scheduled hours per operatory by date for given date range with totals at the bottom.
query: SET @StartDate='2023-08-01', @EndDate='2023-08-31'; SET @OpAbbrevs='Op-1,Op-2'; SELECT (CASE dupe.RowType WHEN 'Detail' THEN b.SchedDate WHEN 'OpTotal' THEN 'Op Total:' ELSE 'Total:' END) AS 'Date' , (CASE dupe.RowType WHEN 'Detail' THEN b.Abbrev WHEN 'OpTotal' THEN b.Abbrev ELSE 'Total:' END) AS 'Op' , SUM(b.UnschedHrs) AS 'UnschedHrs' , SUM(b.TotSchedHrs) AS 'TotSchedHrs' , SUM(b.AptTimeHrs) AS 'AptTimeHrs' FROM( SELECT s.SchedDate , o.Abbrev , FORMAT((SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(s.StopTime,s.StartTime)))/3600)-(COALESCE(a.AptTimeHrs,0.0)),2) AS 'UnschedHrs' , FORMAT(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(s.StopTime,s.StartTime)))/3600,2) AS 'TotSchedHrs' , FORMAT(COALESCE(a.AptTimeHrs,0.0),2) AS 'AptTimeHrs' FROM scheduleop so INNER JOIN SCHEDULE s ON s.ScheduleNum = so.ScheduleNum AND s.SchedType IN (0,1,3) INNER JOIN operatory o ON o.OperatoryNum = so.OperatoryNum AND IF(LENGTH(@OpAbbrevs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(o.Abbrev, @OpAbbrevs)) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(a.AptDateTime) AS AptDate , SUM(CHAR_LENGTH(a.Pattern))/12 AS AptTimeHrs , a.Op FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY a.Op, DATE(a.AptDateTime) ) a ON a.AptDate = s.SchedDate AND a.Op = o.OperatoryNum WHERE s.SchedDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY s.SchedDate, o.OperatoryNum ORDER BY s.SchedDate, o.Abbrev )b INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Detail' AS 'RowType' UNION ALL SELECT 'OpTotal' UNION ALL SELECT 'Total' ) dupe ON TRUE GROUP BY dupe.RowType, IF(dupe.RowType='Detail', b.SchedDate, NULL), IF(dupe.RowType IN('Detail','OpTotal'), b.Abbrev, NULL)

request: Procedures treatment planned in a date range by procedure code.  Shows amount and % that were completed, and how many TPed procedures are attached to an appointment.
query: SET @FromDate='2013-01-01', @ToDate='2015-12-20'; SET @ProcCode = '%D2140%'; SELECT A.ProcedureCode AS 'Procedure Code', A.request AS 'request', A.TotalTreatmentPlanned AS 'Total Treatment Planned', A.TotalCompleted AS 'Total Completed of TP', A.PercentCompleted AS '% Completed of TP', A.TotalCompletedInDateRange AS 'Total Completed', A.AptCount FROM ( SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, pc.ProcCode 'ProcedureCode', pc.AbbrDesc 'request', procsTP.CountPl AS 'TotalTreatmentPlanned', COALESCE(procsC.CountPl,0) AS 'TotalCompleted', ROUND((COALESCE(procsC.CountPl,0) / procsTP.CountPl)*100,2) AS 'PercentCompleted', COALESCE(totalprocsC.CountPl,0) AS 'TotalCompletedInDateRange', procsTP.AptCount FROM procedurecode pc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.CodeNum, COUNT(*) AS CountPl,SUM((CASE WHEN pl.AptNum IS NOT NULL AND a.AptStatus IN (1,4,6) AND pl.ProcStatus=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS AptCount FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN appointment a ON a.AptNum = pl.AptNum WHERE pl.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY pl.CodeNum ) procsTP ON procsTP.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.CodeNum, COUNT(*) AS CountPl FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus IN (2) GROUP BY pl.CodeNum ) procsC ON procsC.CodeNum=procsTP.CodeNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.CodeNum, COUNT(*) AS CountPl FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus IN (2) GROUP BY pl.CodeNum ) totalprocsC ON totalprocsC.CodeNum=procsTP.CodeNum WHERE pc.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'D0%' AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE 'D1%' AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE '15009' UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, ' ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder, 'Date Range:' AS 'ProviderAbbr', DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ProcedureCode', 'To' AS 'request', DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'TotalTreatmentPlanned', '' AS 'TotalCompleted', '' AS 'PercentCompleted', '' AS 'TotalCompletedInDateRange' ) A ORDER BY A.ItemOrder,A.ProcedureCode

request: Count of patients seen in date range with specific completed or treatment planned procedures.
query: SET @FromDate=CURDATE()-INTERVAL 12 MONTH, @ToDate=CURDATE(); SELECT 'Total Patients' AS Title, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN procInfo.HasCompleted=1 OR procInfo.HasTPd=1 THEN appt.PatNum END)) AS CountPats FROM appointment appt INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate<=@ToDate THEN pl.PatNum END)) AS HasCompleted,COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=1 THEN pl.PatNum END)) AS HasTPd FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pl.ProcDate>=@FromDate AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND (pc.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D0100' AND 'D2999' OR pc.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D9110' AND 'D9931' OR pc.ProcCode IN ('D4341','D4342','D4910')) GROUP BY pl.PatNum )procInfo ON procInfo.PatNum=appt.PatNum WHERE appt.AptStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'No TP Patients' AS Title, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN procInfo.HasCompleted=1 AND procInfo.HasTPd=0 THEN appt.PatNum END)) AS CountPats FROM appointment appt INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate<=@ToDate THEN pl.PatNum END)) AS HasCompleted,COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=1 THEN pl.PatNum END)) AS HasTPd FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pl.ProcDate>=@FromDate AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND (pc.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D0100' AND 'D2999' OR pc.ProcCode BETWEEN 'D9110' AND 'D9931' OR pc.ProcCode IN ('D4341','D4342','D4910')) GROUP BY pl.PatNum )procInfo ON procInfo.PatNum=appt.PatNum WHERE appt.AptStatus=2

request: Daily payment report, like internal but can exclude codes if desired. Shows procedure information if applicable, shows patient payments per payment split, and Insurance payments per procedure (or claim for as total payments). As total payments do not filter on excluded codes.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-01-01', @ToDate='2023-01-31'; SET @Abbr='%%'; SET @ExcludedCodes=''; SELECT pays.PayDate AS 'PaymentDate', pays.Patient, pays.Provider, pays.CarrierName, pays.DOS AS 'D.O.S.', pays.ProcAbbr AS 'Procedure', pays.ToothNum AS 'Tooth pays.ProcFee AS '$Proc Fee', pays.WriteOff AS '$WriteOff', pays.CheckNum, pays.Amt AS '$Amt', pays.PaymentType FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, a.PayDate, a.CarrierName, a.Patient, a.Provider, a.DOS, a.ProcAbbr, a.ToothNum, a.ProcFee, a.WriteOff, a.CheckNum, a.Amt, a.PaymentType FROM( SELECT CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%c/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) PayDate, car.CarrierName, MAX(CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI)) Patient, prov.Abbr AS Provider, cp.ProcDate AS DOS, pc.AbbrDesc AS ProcAbbr, pl.ToothNum AS ToothNum, FORMAT(ROUND(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits+pl.UnitQty),2),2) AS ProcFee, FORMAT(ROUND(cp.WriteOff,2),2) AS WriteOff, cpay.CheckNum, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),2),2) AS Amt, paytype.ItemName AS PaymentType FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludedCodes) = 0, TRUE, NOT FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ExcludedCodes)) INNER JOIN claim c ON c.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr LIKE @Abbr LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpay.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON cpay.PayType=paytype.DefNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%c/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) PayDate, car.CarrierName, MAX(CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI)) Patient, prov.Abbr AS Provider, cp.ProcDate AS DOS, '' AS ProcAbbr, '' AS ToothNum, '' AS ProcFee, FORMAT(ROUND(cp.WriteOff,2),2) AS WriteOff, cpay.CheckNum, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),2),2) AS Amt, paytype.ItemName AS PaymentType FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim c ON c.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr LIKE @Abbr LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpay.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON cpay.PayType=paytype.DefNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.ProcNum=0 GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.ClaimNum )a UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS PayDate, '' AS CarrierName, '' AS Patient, '' AS Provider, '' AS DOS, '' AS ProcAbbr, '' AS ToothNum, '' AS ProcFee, '' AS WriteOff, '' AS CheckNum, '' AS Amt, '' AS PaymentType UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, ' 'Patient Payments:' AS CarrierName, ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(pay.PayDate,'%c/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS PayDate, '' AS CarrierName, MAX(CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI)) AS Patient, COALESCE(prov.Abbr, 'Unallocated') AS Provider, COALESCE(pl.ProcDate,'') AS DOS, COALESCE(pc.AbbrDesc,'') AS ProcAbbr, COALESCE(pl.ToothNum,'') AS ToothNum, COALESCE(FORMAT(ROUND(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits+pl.UnitQty),2),2),'') AS ProcFee, COALESCE(FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(cp.WriteOff),2),2),'') AS WriteOff, pay.CheckNum, FORMAT(ROUND(ps.SplitAmt,2),2) AS Amt, COALESCE(paytype.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS PaymentType FROM payment pay LEFT JOIN paysplit ps ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient p ON ps.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON ps.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType=paytype.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludedCodes) = 0, TRUE, NOT FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ExcludedCodes)) AND COALESCE(prov.Abbr, 'Unallocated') LIKE @Abbr GROUP BY ps.SplitNum ) pays ORDER BY pays.ItemOrder,pays.PaymentType,pays.PayDate,pays.Patient,pays.Amt

request: Count of patients less than or equal to a specified age who were seen in date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2015-07-0', @ToDate='2015-07-09'; SET @ProcCode='D1310'; SET @AgeMax='5'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.PatNum) AS 'CountPatsSeen', CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN A.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode THEN A.PatNum END))/COUNT(DISTINCT A.PatNum)*100,2),2),'%') AS '%WithProcCodeComp' FROM( SELECT p.PatNum, pc.ProcCode, (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) AS Age FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5))<=@AgeMax ) A

request: Count of patients with specific problem seen in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2015-07-01', @ToDate='2015-07-09'; SET @Problem = 'Tobacco User'; SET @ProcCode = 'D1320'; SELECT A.PatCount, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.ProcPatCount/A.Patcount,0),2),2)*100,'%') AS Pct FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS PatCount, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode THEN p.PatNum END)) AS ProcPatCount FROM patient p INNER JOIN disease d ON d.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN diseasedef dd ON dd.DiseaseDefNum = d.DiseaseDefNum AND dd.DiseaseName LIKE @Problem INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus = 2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = a.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode LIKE @ProcCode )A

request: List of providers and their average hourly gross production, hourly net production, and hourly income in a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2021-01-01', @ToDate='2021-05-01'; SELECT translog.Prov ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(translog.GrossProd/hrs.Hours,0),2),2) AS 'Hourly Gross Production' ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE((translog.GrossProd-translog.InsW+translog.Adj)/hrs.Hours,0),2),2) AS 'Hourly Net Production' ,FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(translog.Collections/hrs.Hours,0),2),2) AS 'Hourly Income' FROM( SELECT result.Provider AS 'Prov' ,result.ProvNum ,SUM(result.Fee) AS 'GrossProd' ,SUM(result.PtInc+result.InsInc) AS 'Collections' ,SUM(result.InsW) AS 'InsW' ,SUM(result.Adj) AS 'Adj' FROM ( SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,prov.ProvNum ,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'InsW' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,prov.ProvNum ,0 AS 'Fee' ,adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'InsW' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = adj.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = adj.ProvNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,prov.ProvNum ,0 AS 'Fee' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum WHERE ( cp.Status = 1 OR cp.Status = 4 ) AND cp.WriteOff > '.0001' AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum UNION ALL SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,prov.ProvNum ,0 AS 'Fee' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'InsW' ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum,ps.ProvNum,ps.ClinicNum,PayType,ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,prov.ProvNum ,0 AS 'Fee' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'InsW' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE ( cp.Status = 1 OR cp.Status = 4 ) AND claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum,cp.PlanNum,cp.ClinicNum,claimpay.CheckDate ) result GROUP BY result.Provider )translog INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = translog.ProvNum INNER JOIN employee e ON e.FName = pr.FName AND e.LName = pr.LName INNER JOIN ( SELECT em.LName ,em.FName ,( SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF( (TIME_TO_SEC(TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND ce.ClockStatus IN(0,1)) , TIMEDIFF(TimeDisplayed2, TimeDisplayed1) ,0 )))+ SUM(( CASE WHEN ce.AdjustIsOverridden = 1 THEN TIME_TO_SEC(ce.Adjust) ELSE TIME_TO_SEC(ce.AdjustAuto) END )) )/3600 AS Hours FROM employee em INNER JOIN clockevent ce ON ce.EmployeeNum = em.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ce.TimeDisplayed1) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY em.EmployeeNum )hrs ON hrs.LName = pr.LName AND hrs.FName = pr.FName GROUP BY pr.ProvNum

request: List of patients who were referred from a specific source.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-01-01', @ToDate='2022-01-31'; SET @Ref=''; SET @Ref=(CASE WHEN @Ref="" THEN ".*" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Ref,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS RowCount ,Z.PatName ,Z.ReferralSource ,Z.LastAppt FROM( SELECT A.PatName, A.RefName AS ReferralSource, MAX(A.ApptDate) AS LastAppt FROM( SELECT p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.FName," ",p.LName) AS PatName, CONCAT(r.FName,r.LName) AS RefName, DATE(a.AptDateTime) AS ApptDate FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach rf ON rf.PatNum=p.PatNum AND rf.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=rf.ReferralNum AND r.LName REGEXP @Ref INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus=2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) A GROUP BY A.PatNum,A.RefName ORDER BY PatName,ReferralSource ) Z

request: All patients who have had an NP procedure completed showing information about procedures completed not on the same day as the NP procedure.
query: SET @ProcCode='D0120.R'; SET @ProvAbbr='AbbottEHR'; SET @Clinic='sunnyside'; SET @FromDate='2015-07-01', @ToDate='2015-07-28'; SELECT (CASE WHEN @ProvAbbr='%%' THEN 'All Provs' ELSE REPLACE(@ProvAbbr,'%','') END) AS ProvAbbr, B.request, CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName) AS 'Patient', DATE_FORMAT(B.NPProc,'%m-%d-%Y') AS 'NP DoS', COALESCE(CONCAT(referral.LName,', ',referral.FName),'None') AS 'Referral', B.D0120R AS ' B.D1110 AS ' B.D1120 AS ' B.D4910 AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Restorative' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Endo' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Perio' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Oral Surgery' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Crowns' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Prosth' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Maxillofacial Prosth' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Ortho' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' FROM( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProcCode='D0120.R' AND Q.ProcDate!=A.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'D0120R', SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProcCode='D1110' AND Q.ProcDate!=A.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'D1110', SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProcCode='D1120' AND Q.ProcDate!=A.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'D1120', SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProcCode='D4910' AND Q.ProcDate!=A.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'D4910', A.PatNum AS 'PatNum', A.NPProc AS 'NPProc', A.request FROM ( SELECT MIN(procedurelog.ProcDate) AS 'NPProc', procedurelog.PatNum AS 'PatNum', clinic.request FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.Codenum=procedurecode.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCode INNER JOIN provider ON procedurelog.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr REGEXP @ProvAbbr INNER JOIN clinic ON procedurelog.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum AND clinic.request REGEXP @Clinic WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum AS 'PatNum',procedurecode.ProcCode AS 'ProcCode', procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'ProcDate' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum=procedurecode.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode IN ('D0120.R','D1110','D1120','D4910') WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 ) Q ON A.PatNum=Q.PatNum GROUP BY A.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum AS 'PatNum', procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'ProcDate', covcat.request AS 'Category' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum=procedurecode.CodeNum INNER JOIN covspan ON procedurecode.ProcCode BETWEEN covspan.FromCode AND covspan.ToCode INNER JOIN covcat ON covspan.CovCatNum=covcat.CovCatNum AND covcat.IsHidden=0 WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 ) D ON D.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient ON B.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN refattach ON refattach.PatNum=B.PatNum LEFT JOIN referral ON refattach.ReferralNum=referral.ReferralNum GROUP BY B.PatNum ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName;

request: List of treatment planned procedures with no scheduled appointment. Patients must have last visit in date range.  Filters by specified carrier and clinic
query: SET @Carrier='%%'; SET @Clinic='%Hoth%'; SET @FromDate='2010-11-01', @ToDate='2015-11-29'; SELECT CONCAT(LName, ', ',FName, ' ', MiddleI) AS Patient, pc.ProcCode AS 'Code', abbrdesc AS 'request', ToothNum, DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate,'%m-%d-%Y') AS 'ProcDate', c.CarrierName, ProcFee, cl.request, tmp2.LastAptDate AS 'DateLastAppt' FROM carrier c INNER JOIN insplan ip ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient p ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum AND cl.request LIKE @Clinic INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum= pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT PatNum, DATE(MAX(AptDateTime)) AS LastAptDate FROM appointment WHERE AptStatus=2 GROUP BY PatNum ) tmp2 ON p.PatNum=tmp2.PatNum AND tmp2.LastAptDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHERE (ISNULL(ap.aptnum) OR AptStatus=6 OR AptStatus=3) AND ProcStatus=1 AND c.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, pl.ProcDate

request: List of patients with appointments for the current date with primary insurance carrier listed.
query: SET @FromDate=CURDATE() , @ToDate=CURDATE(); SELECT prov.Abbr, p.PatNum, p.Birthdate, a.AptDateTime, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(carrier.CarrierName) THEN '*No Insurance' ELSE (carrier.CarrierName) END) AS 'PriCarrier', (CASE WHEN ip.PlanType='' THEN 'Category Percentage' WHEN ip.PlanType='p' THEN 'PPO' WHEN ip.PlanType='f' THEN 'FlatCopay' WHEN ip.PlanType='c' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS PlanType FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=a.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcDate=DATE(a.AptDateTime) AND pl.PatNum=a.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ORDINAL=1 LEFT JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE (DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) AND a.AptStatus IN (1,3,4) GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime;

request: All patients who have had an NP procedure completed showing information about procedures completed not on the same day as the NP procedure.
query: SET @ProcCode=''; SET @ProvAbbr=''; SET @Clinic=''; SET @FromDate='2018-01-01', @ToDate='2018-01-31'; SET @ProcCode=(CASE WHEN @ProcCode="" THEN ".*" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcCode,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SET @ProvAbbr=(CASE WHEN @ProvAbbr="" THEN ".*" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProvAbbr,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SET @Clinic=(CASE WHEN @Clinic="" THEN ".*" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinic,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SELECT B.Abbr, B.ProcCode, B.request, B.ProcCode, CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName) AS 'Patient', DATE_FORMAT(B.NPProc,'%m-%d-%Y') AS 'NP DoS', COALESCE(CONCAT(referral.LName,', ',referral.FName),'None') AS 'Referral', B.D0120R AS ' B.D1110 AS ' B.D1120 AS ' B.D4910 AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Restorative' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Endo' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Perio' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Oral Surgery' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Crowns' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Prosth' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Maxillofacial Prosth' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' SUM(CASE WHEN D.Category='Ortho' AND D.ProcDate!=B.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ' FROM( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProcCode='D0120.R' AND Q.ProcDate!=A.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'D0120R', SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProcCode='D1110' AND Q.ProcDate!=A.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'D1110', SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProcCode='D1120' AND Q.ProcDate!=A.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'D1120', SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProcCode='D4910' AND Q.ProcDate!=A.NPProc THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'D4910', A.PatNum AS 'PatNum', A.NPProc AS 'NPProc', A.request, A.Abbr, A.ProcCode FROM ( SELECT MIN(procedurelog.ProcDate) AS 'NPProc', procedurelog.PatNum AS 'PatNum', clinic.request, procedurecode.ProcCode, provider.Abbr FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.Codenum=procedurecode.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCode INNER JOIN provider ON procedurelog.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr REGEXP @ProvAbbr INNER JOIN clinic ON procedurelog.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum AND clinic.request REGEXP @Clinic WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum AS 'PatNum',procedurecode.ProcCode AS 'ProcCode', procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'ProcDate' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum=procedurecode.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode IN ('D0120.R','D1110','D1120','D4910') WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate>=@FromDate ) Q ON A.PatNum=Q.PatNum GROUP BY A.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum AS 'PatNum', procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'ProcDate', covcat.request AS 'Category',prov.ProvNum,prov.Abbr,procedurelog.CodeNum,procedurelog.ProcNum FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum=procedurecode.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum INNER JOIN covspan ON procedurecode.ProcCode BETWEEN covspan.FromCode AND covspan.ToCode INNER JOIN covcat ON covspan.CovCatNum=covcat.CovCatNum AND covcat.IsHidden=0 WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate>=@FromDate ) D ON D.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient ON B.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN refattach ON refattach.PatNum=B.PatNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 AND refattach.ItemOrder = 1 LEFT JOIN referral ON refattach.ReferralNum=referral.ReferralNum GROUP BY patient.PatNum ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(B.NPProc,'%m-%d-%Y')

request: Insurance payments received in one date range for procedures completed in a different date range, with both ranges specified by user.
query: SET @Provider='%AbbottEHR%'; SET @ServiceFromDate='2015-01-01' , @ServiceToDate='2015-09-30'; SET @ReceivedFromDate='2015-01-01' , @ReceivedToDate='2015-09-30'; SELECT a.PatNum , a.BillingProv , a.TreatingProv , a.DateService , a.DateReceived , FORMAT(ROUND(a.InsPayAmt,2),2) AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM ( SELECT PatNum , provBill.Abbr AS 'BillingProv' , prov.Abbr AS 'TreatingProv' , claim.DateService , claim.DateReceived , claim.InsPayAmt FROM claim INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = claim.ProvTreat INNER JOIN provider provBill ON provBill.ProvNum = claim.ProvBill WHERE DateService BETWEEN @ServiceFromDate AND @ServiceToDate AND DateReceived BETWEEN @ReceivedFromDate AND @ReceivedToDate AND prov.Abbr LIKE @Provider ) A UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Total:' ,'' ,'' ,'' ,'' ,FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(b.InsPayAmt),2),2) AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM ( SELECT claim.InsPayAmt FROM claim INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = claim.ProvTreat WHERE DateService BETWEEN @ServiceFromDate AND @ServiceToDate AND DateReceived BETWEEN @ReceivedFromDate AND @ReceivedToDate AND prov.Abbr LIKE @Provider ) b

request: List of Carriers and count of procedures they have paid on
query: SET @StartDate='2015-01-01', @EndDate='2015-12-31'; SELECT car.CarrierName, pc.ProcCode, COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcNum) AS CodeCount FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim c ON c.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = c.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND c.InsPayAmt>0 GROUP BY car.CarrierNum,pc.ProcCode ORDER BY car.CarrierName,pc.ProcCode

request: Patient, total fees, and claim information from completed Appointments within a specified date range with claims from a specified carrier.
query: SET @CarrierName = '%%'; SET @FromDate = '2015-01-01', @ToDate = '2015-12-31'; SET @pos = 0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS ' FROM( SELECT F.Patient,F.Appointment,F.AptFees AS '$AptFees_',F.PatInsCarrier,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$ClaimPayAmt_',cpay.Note FROM( SELECT CONCAT(C.LName, ', ', C.FName) AS 'Patient', DATE_FORMAT(C.Appointment, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS Appointment, SUM(C.ProcFee) AS 'AptFees', C.PatInsCarrier, C.AptNum FROM( SELECT B.LName, B.Fname, B.AptDateTime AS 'Appointment', B.ProcFee, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT carrier.CarrierName ORDER BY (CASE WHEN claim.ClaimType = 'P' THEN 1 WHEN claim.ClaimType = 'S' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'PatInsCarrier', B.AptNum, B.PatNum FROM( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee*(CASE procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits END)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS ProcFee, appointment.AptDateTime, patient.LName, patient.FName, procedurelog.ProcNum, appointment.AptNum, patient.PatNum FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON procedurelog.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcNum )B INNER JOIN claimproc ON claimproc.ProcNum = B.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0,1,4,5) INNER JOIN claim ON claimproc.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType != 'PreAuth' INNER JOIN insplan ON claim.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum AND carrier.CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName GROUP BY B.ProcNum )C GROUP BY C.AptNum ORDER BY C.Appointment, C.LName, C.FName )F INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=F.AptNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4,5) LEFT JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum GROUP BY F.AptNum,cpay.ClaimPaymentNum )D

request: Count of procedures by provider and proc code in date range. Also shows gross production for those procedures
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-01-01', @ToDate ='2024-03-04'; SET @ProvAbbr ='%%'; SELECT display.Provider ,display.ProcCode ,display.Count ,display.Production FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,pc.ProcCode ,COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcNum) AS 'Count' ,CONCAT ('$',FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cpc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cpc WHERE cpc.Status IN(7, 8) AND cpc.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) ),2),2)) AS 'Production' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY prov.ProvNum,pc.CodeNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS 'ItemOrder' ,' ,' ,' ,' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder ,'Total:' AS 'Provider' ,'' AS 'ProcCode' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.ProcNum) AS 'Count' ,CONCAT('$',FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(core.ProcFee),2),2)) AS 'Production' FROM ( SELECT prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'Name' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,pc.ProcCode ,(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cpc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cpc WHERE cpc.Status IN(7, 8) AND cpc.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'ProcFee' ,pl.ProcNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY pl.ProcNum )core ) display ORDER BY display.ItemOrder, display.Provider, display.ProcCode

request: List of patients over 18 and patients who are younger then 18 that reside at the same address.
query: SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,' ', p.FName) AS Parent, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(fam.LName,', ',fam.FName) SEPARATOR ' | ') AS Child, p.Address, p.City, p.State, p.Zip FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient fam ON fam.Guarantor = p.Guarantor AND (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(fam.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(fam.Birthdate,5)) < 18 AND CONCAT(fam.Address,', ',fam.City,', ',fam.State,', ',fam.Zip) = CONCAT(p.Address,', ',p.City,', ',p.State,', ',p.Zip) WHERE (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(p.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(p.Birthdate,5)) >= 18 GROUP BY CONCAT(p.Address,', ',p.City,', ',p.State,', ',p.Zip) ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName,fam.Address

request: Mailing list of patients with a particular insurance carrier and groupnum.
query: SET @Carrier='%%',@GroupNum='%%'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ', p.FName) AS Patient, p.HmPhone, p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.zip, ca.CarrierName AS PrimName, ip.GroupNum AS PrimNum, COALESCE(ca2.CarrierName,"N/a") AS SecName, COALESCE(ip2.GroupNum,"N/a") AS SecNum FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp2 ON pp2.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pp2.Ordinal=2 LEFT JOIN inssub ib2 ON ib2.InsSubNum = pp2.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip2 ON ip2.PlanNum = ib2.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca2 ON ca2.CarrierNum = ip2.CarrierNum WHERE ca.CarrierName LIKE(@Carrier) AND ip.GroupNum LIKE(@GroupNum) ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName,ca.CarrierName

request: List of patient procedures showing CoPay, subscriberid(s) and other various procedure information
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01', @ToDate='2015-12-31'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(is1.SubscriberID) AS 'SubcriberID(s)', p.FName, p.LName, p.Birthdate, GROUP_CONCAT((CASE WHEN p.PatNum = is1.Subscriber THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END)) AS 'IsSubcriber(s)', p.Zip, pc.ProcCode, pl.ToothNum, pl.Surf, pl.ProcDate, CONCAT('$',FORMAT(ROUND( pl.ProcFee - SUM(cp.WriteOff) - (CASE WHEN c.ClaimStatus = 'R' THEN SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) ELSE SUM(cp.InsPayEst) END),2),2)) AS 'CoPay' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4) INNER JOIN claim c ON c.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN inssub is1 ON is1.InsSubNum = c.InsSubNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum

request: Payments excluding specific  provider or payment types
query: SET @FromDate='2015-01-01', @ToDate='2015-12-30'; SET @AgingAsOf='2015-11-03'; SET @ExcludeProv='None|Provider2|Provider3'; SET @ExcludePaymentTypes='Patient Refund|Type2'; SELECT (CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE definition.ItemName END) AS 'PaymentType', CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(payment.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'PayDate', MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', payment.CheckNum, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt),2),2) AS 'Amount', FORMAT(ROUND(B.PatBal,2),2) AS 'PatBal' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum=paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType=definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON payment.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AgingAsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum HAVING PatBal<-0.005 )B ON B.PatNum=patient.PatNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND provider.Abbr NOT REGEXP @ExcludeProv AND definition.ItemName NOT REGEXP @ExcludePaymentTypes GROUP BY paysplit.SplitNum ORDER BY PaymentType,PayDate,PatientName

request: List of dates with appointments by Provider showing how many appointments they had on that day
query: SET @FromDate='2015-12-01', @ToDate='2015-12-31'; SET @MinProcCount=3; SELECT DATE(appt.AptDateTime) AS ApptDate, p.Abbr, COUNT(DISTINCT appt.AptNum) AS ApptCount, SUM(CASE WHEN countProcs.Count>=@MinProcCount THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NumApptsWithMinProcs FROM appointment appt INNER JOIN provider p ON p.ProvNum = (CASE WHEN appt.IsHygiene THEN appt.ProvHyg ELSE appt.ProvNum END) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.AptNum,COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcNum) AS 'Count' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY a.AptNum ) countProcs ON countProcs.AptNum=appt.AptNum WHERE DATE(appt.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND appt.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY p.ProvNum, DATE(appt.AptDateTime) ORDER BY DATE(appt.AptDateTime),p.Abbr

request: Daily production and income report showing payments, adjustments, and patient income. Ordered by procedures in a specific order.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT core.Date ,CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'Patient' ,core.request ,pr.Abbr AS 'Prov' ,pr2.Abbr AS 'PriProv' ,CAST(core.$Prod AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS '$Prod' ,CAST(core.$Adjust AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS '$Adjust' ,CAST(core.$Writeoff AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS '$Writeoff' ,CAST(core.$TotProd AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS '$TotProd' ,CAST(core.$PatIncome AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS '$PatIncome' ,CAST(core.$InsIncome AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS '$InsIncome' ,CAST(core.$TotIncome AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS '$TotIncome' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,pl.PatNum ,pc.AbbrDesc AS 'request' ,pc.ProcCode ,pl.ProvNum ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) - IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS '$Prod' ,0 AS '$Adjust' ,0 AS '$Writeoff' ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) - IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS '$TotProd' ,0 AS '$PatIncome' ,0 AS '$InsIncome' ,0 AS '$TotIncome' ,0 AS 'TypeOrder' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date' ,a.PatNum ,d.ItemName AS 'request' ,'' AS ProcCode ,a.ProvNum ,0 AS '$Prod' ,a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust' ,0 AS '$Writeoff' ,a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd' ,0 AS '$PatIncome' ,0 AS '$InsIncome' ,0 AS '$TotIncome' ,4 AS 'TypeOrder' FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType = d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND a.AdjAmt != 0 UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date' ,ps.PatNum ,d.ItemName AS 'request' ,'' AS ProcCode ,ps.ProvNum ,0 AS '$Prod' ,0 AS '$Adjust' ,0 AS '$WritOff' ,0 AS '$TotProd' ,ps.SplitAmt AS '$PatIncome' ,0 AS '$InsIncome' ,ps.SplitAmt AS '$TotIncome' ,2 AS 'TypeOrder' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum = pa.PayNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pa.PayType = d.DefNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date' ,cp.PatNum ,carrier.CarrierName AS 'request' ,'' AS ProcCode ,cp.ProvNum ,0 AS '$Prod' ,0 AS '$Adjust' ,-SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$WritOff' ,-SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS '$TotProd' ,0 AS '$PatIncome' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$InsIncome' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS '$TotIncome' ,3 AS 'TypeOrder' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE (cp.Status = 1 OR cp.Status = 4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum, cp.PatNum ) core ON core.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = core.ProvNum INNER JOIN provider pr2 ON pr2.ProvNum = p.PriProv ORDER BY core.Date, p.LName, p.FName, core.TypeOrder ASC,(CASE core.ProcCode WHEN 'D1110' THEN 1 WHEN 'D1120' THEN 2 WHEN 'D1201' THEN 3 WHEN 'D1203' THEN 4 WHEN 'D1204' THEN 5 WHEN 'D1205' THEN 6 WHEN 'D1206' THEN 7 WHEN 'D1208' THEN 8 WHEN 'D0120' THEN 9 WHEN 'D0140' THEN 11 WHEN 'D0150' THEN 12 WHEN 'D0270' THEN 13 WHEN 'D0272' THEN 14 WHEN 'D0273' THEN 15 WHEN 'D0274' THEN 16 WHEN 'D0220' THEN 17 WHEN 'D0230' THEN 18 ELSE 19 END), core.ProcCode, core.request

request: Appointment and claim information. Showing 1 row per patient appointment in a user defined date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-06-01' , @ToDate='2016-06-02'; SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.Name AS PatName, A.ChartNumber AS 'Chart DATE_FORMAT(A.AptDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ApptDate', A.ProvNum, A.ProvHyg, LEFT(A.ProcDescript,20) AS Procs, A.Op, RPAD(FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.GrossProduction,0),2),2),7,' ') AS Gross___, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.InsPayEst,0),2),2) AS InsPayEst___, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.InsPayAmt,0),2),2) AS InsPayAmt___, (CASE WHEN A.ItemOrder=1 THEN FORMAT(ROUND((COALESCE(A.GrossProduction,0)-COALESCE(A.InsPayEst,0)-COALESCE(A.WriteOff,0)),2),2) ELSE '' END) AS PatPayEst_, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(A.PatPaidOnApptDate,0),2),2) AS Paid___, A.ClaimStatus AS ClaimStatus FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Name', p.ChartNumber, a.AptDateTime AS AptDate, a.ProvNum, a.ProvHyg, a.ProcDescript, a.Op, SUM((pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))) AS 'GrossProduction', Info.TotalPayAmt AS 'PatPaidOnApptDate', COALESCE(claimInfo.InsPayEst,0) AS 'InsPayEst', NULL AS 'InsPayAmt', NULL AS ClaimNum, a.AptNum, p.LName, p.FName, COALESCE(claimInfo.WriteOff,0) AS writeoff, (CASE WHEN claiminfo.ProcNum IS NULL THEN 'No Claim' ELSE '' END) AS ClaimStatus FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate, SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS TotalPayAmt FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pay.PayAmt > 0 GROUP BY pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate ) Info ON Info.PatNum = a.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=A.AptNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum, c.ClaimStatus, SUM(c.InsPayEst) AS InsPayEst, SUM(c.WriteOff) AS WriteOff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim c ON cp.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum WHERE cp.Status != 2 GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )claimInfo ON claimInfo.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY a.AptNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Name', NULL AS ChartNumber, NULL AS AptDate, NULL AS ProvNum, Info.ProvHyg AS ProvHyg, NULL AS ProcDescript, NULL AS Op, NULL AS '$GrossProduction_', NULL AS '$PatPaidOnApptDate_', Info.InsPayEst AS '$InsEstimate_', Info.ClaimPay AS '$InsPayAmt_', Info.ClaimNum, Info.AptNum, p.LName, p.FName, info.WriteOff, (CASE WHEN Info.ClaimStatus='R' THEN 'Received' ELSE Info.ClaimStatus END) AS ClaimStatus FROM ( SELECT ap.AptDateTime, ap.AptNum, ap.AptStatus, SUM(cp.InspayAmt) AS ClaimPay, cp.PatNum, cp.ClaimNum, c.InsPayEst, c.InsPayAmt, ap.ProvHyg, c.ClaimStatus, c.WriteOff FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status != 2 INNER JOIN claim c ON cp.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY ap.AptNum, c.ClaimNum ) Info INNER JOIN patient p ON info.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE DATE(info.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY Info.ClaimNum, Info.AptNum )A GROUP BY A.AptNum, A.ClaimNum ORDER BY A.ProvHyg, A.Name, A.ItemOrder )B UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Hygienist Total: ' AS PatName, '' AS 'Chart '' AS 'ApptDate', '', A.ProvHyg, '' AS Procs, '' AS Op, RPAD(FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN A.ItemOrder=1 THEN A.GrossProduction ELSE 0 END)),0),2),2),7,' ') AS Gross___, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(A.InsPayEst),0),2),2) AS InsPayEst___, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(A.InsPayAmt),0),2),2) AS InsPayAmt___, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN A.ItemOrder=1 THEN A.GrossProduction ELSE 0 END)),0)-COALESCE(SUM(A.InsPayEst),0)-COALESCE(SUM(A.WriteOff),0),2),2) AS PatPayEst_, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(A.PatPaidOnApptDate),0),2),2) AS Paid___, '' AS ClaimStatus FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Name', p.ChartNumber, a.AptDateTime AS AptDate, a.ProvNum, a.ProvHyg, a.ProcDescript, a.Op, SUM((pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))) AS 'GrossProduction', Info.TotalPayAmt AS 'PatPaidOnApptDate', NULL AS 'InsPayEst', NULL AS 'InsPayAmt', NULL AS ClaimNum, a.AptNum, p.LName, p.FName, 0 AS WriteOff, NULL AS ClaimStatus FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate, SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS TotalPayAmt FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pay.PayAmt > 0 GROUP BY pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate ) Info ON Info.PatNum = a.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=A.AptNum INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY a.AptNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Name', NULL AS ChartNumber, NULL AS AptDate, NULL AS ProvNum, Info.ProvHyg AS ProvHyg, NULL AS ProcDescript, NULL AS Op, NULL AS '$GrossProduction_', NULL AS '$PatPaidOnApptDate_', Info.InsPayEst AS '$InsEstimate_', Info.ClaimPay AS '$InsPayAmt_', Info.ClaimNum, Info.AptNum, p.LName, p.FName, info.WriteOff, Info.ClaimStatus FROM ( SELECT ap.AptDateTime, ap.AptNum, ap.AptStatus, SUM(cp.InspayAmt) AS ClaimPay, cp.PatNum, cp.ClaimNum, c.InsPayEst, c.InsPayAmt, ap.ProvHyg, c.ClaimStatus,c.WriteOff FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status != 2 INNER JOIN claim c ON cp.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY ap.AptNum, c.ClaimNum ) Info INNER JOIN patient p ON info.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE DATE(info.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY Info.ClaimNum, Info.AptNum )A GROUP BY A.ProvHyg UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Clinic Total: ' AS PatName, '' AS 'Chart '' AS 'ApptDate', '', '' AS ProvHyg, '' AS Procs, CONCAT('Clinic: ', SUBSTRING(op.OpName,1, 1)) AS OpFirstLetter, RPAD(FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN A.ItemOrder=1 THEN A.GrossProduction ELSE 0 END)),0),2),2),7,' ') AS Gross___, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(A.InsPayEst),0),2),2) AS InsPayEst___, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(A.InsPayAmt),0),2),2) AS InsPayAmt___, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN A.ItemOrder=1 THEN A.GrossProduction ELSE 0 END)),0)-COALESCE(SUM(A.InsPayEst),0)-COALESCE(SUM(A.WriteOff),0),2),2) AS PatPayEst_, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(A.PatPaidOnApptDate),0),2),2) AS Paid___, '' AS ClaimStatus FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Name', p.ChartNumber, a.AptDateTime AS AptDate, a.ProvNum, a.ProvHyg, a.ProcDescript, a.Op, SUM((pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))) AS 'GrossProduction', Info.TotalPayAmt AS 'PatPaidOnApptDate', NULL AS 'InsPayEst', NULL AS 'InsPayAmt', NULL AS ClaimNum, a.AptNum, p.LName, p.FName, 0 AS WriteOff, NULL AS ClaimStatus FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate, SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS TotalPayAmt FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pay.PayAmt > 0 GROUP BY pay.PatNum, pay.PayDate ) Info ON Info.PatNum = a.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=A.AptNum INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY a.AptNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Name', NULL AS ChartNumber, NULL AS AptDate, NULL AS ProvNum, Info.ProvHyg AS ProvHyg, NULL AS ProcDescript, info.Op AS Op, NULL AS '$GrossProduction_', NULL AS '$PatPaidOnApptDate_', Info.InsPayEst AS '$InsEstimate_', Info.ClaimPay AS '$InsPayAmt_', Info.ClaimNum, Info.AptNum, p.LName, p.FName, info.WriteOff, Info.ClaimStatus FROM ( SELECT ap.AptDateTime, ap.AptNum, ap.AptStatus, ap.Op, SUM(cp.InspayAmt) AS ClaimPay, cp.PatNum, cp.ClaimNum, c.InsPayEst, c.InsPayAmt, ap.ProvHyg, c.ClaimStatus, c.WriteOff FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=ap.AptNum AND
