pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status != 2 INNER JOIN claim c ON cp.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY ap.AptNum, c.ClaimNum ) Info INNER JOIN patient p ON info.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE DATE(info.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY Info.ClaimNum, Info.AptNum )A INNER JOIN operatory op ON op.OperatoryNum = A.Op GROUP BY OpFirstLetter

request: Aging for families with any balance
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT E.Guarantor, FORMAT(E.0to30,2) AS '0-30 DAYS',FORMAT(E.31to60,2) AS '31-60 DAYS', FORMAT(E.61to90,2) AS '61-90 DAYS',FORMAT(E.Over90,2) AS '>90 DAYS',FORMAT(E.Total,2) AS TOTAL, FORMAT(E.InsPayEst,2) AS '-InsPayEst',FORMAT(E.WriteOffEst,2) AS 'WriteOffEst',FORMAT(E.PatEst,2) AS '=PATIENT', FORMAT(ExpectedPay,2) AS 'Expected Pay' FROM ( SELECT D.PatNum, CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2) AS 0to30, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2) AS 31to60, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2) AS 61to90, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ,2) AS Over90, ROUND((D.FamBal),2) AS Total, ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsPayEst,0),2) AS InsPayEst, ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamWriteOffEst,0),2) AS WriteOffEst, ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsPayEst,0)-COALESCE(D.FamWriteOffEst,0),2) AS PatEst, ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamWriteOffEst,0),2) AS ExpectedPay FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(C.InsEst) AS FamInsPayEst, SUM(C.Writeoff) AS FamWriteOffEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pplan.PatNum END) AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS InsEst, SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 GROUP BY D.PatNum ORDER BY D.LName )E UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Totals:' AS GUARANTOR, FORMAT(SUM(E.0to30),2) AS '0-30 DAYS',FORMAT(SUM(E.31to60),2) AS '31-60 DAYS', FORMAT(SUM(E.61to90),2) AS '61-90 DAYS',FORMAT(SUM(E.Over90),2) AS '>90 DAYS',FORMAT(SUM(E.Total),2) AS TOTAL, FORMAT(SUM(E.InsPayEst),2) AS '-InsPayEst',FORMAT(SUM(E.WriteOffEst),2) AS 'WriteOffEst',FORMAT(SUM(E.PatEst),2) AS '=PATIENT', FORMAT(SUM(ExpectedPay),2) AS 'Expected Pay' FROM ( SELECT D.PatNum AS Guarantor, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) ,2) AS 0to30, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) ,2) AS 31to60, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) ,2) AS 61to90, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) ,2) AS Over90, ROUND((D.FamBal),2) AS Total, ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsPayEst,0),2) AS InsPayEst, ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamWriteOffEst,0),2) AS WriteOffEst, ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsPayEst,0)-COALESCE(D.FamWriteOffEst,0),2) AS PatEst, ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamWriteOffEst,0),2) AS ExpectedPay FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(C.InsEst) AS FamInsPayEst, SUM(C.Writeoff) AS FamWriteOffEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pplan.PatNum END) AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS InsEst, SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 GROUP BY D.PatNum )E

request: List of referral sources that are listed as patients and patients referred by them who had production in a date range, with the amount of that production
query: SET @FromDate='2024-06-01', @ToDate='2024-06-30'; SELECT (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Total' THEN '' WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ' ELSE core.LName END) AS 'LName' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Total' THEN 'Total' WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ' ELSE core.FName END) AS 'FName' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.RefLastAppt ELSE ' ' END) AS 'RefLastAppt' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.RefNextAppt ELSE ' ' END) AS 'RefNextAppt' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.patNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ' ELSE CONCAT('PatCount: ', COUNT(core.PatNum)) END) AS 'PatNum' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.PatFirstAppt ELSE ' ' END) AS 'PatFirstAppt' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.PatNextAppt ELSE ' ' END) AS 'PatNextAppt' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN '' ELSE SUM(core.HowMuch) END) AS 'HowMuch' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.RefAddress ELSE ' ' END) AS 'RefAddress' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.RefAddress2 ELSE ' ' END) AS 'RefAddress2' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.RefCity ELSE '' END) AS 'RefCity' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.RefState ELSE ' ' END) AS 'RefState' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Patient' THEN core.RefZip ELSE ' ' END) AS 'RefZIP' FROM ( SELECT referral.LName , referral.FName , referral.ReferralNum , IFNULL(( SELECT MAX(appointment.AptDateTime) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.PatNum = referral.PatNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 ), '') AS 'RefLastAppt' , IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(nextappt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment nextappt WHERE nextappt.PatNum = referral.PatNum AND nextappt.AptStatus = 1 AND nextappt.AptDateTime > CURDATE() ), '') AS 'RefNextAppt' , referral.Address AS 'RefAddress' , referral.Address2 AS 'RefAddress2' , referral.City AS 'RefCity' , referral.ST AS 'RefState' , referral.Zip AS 'RefZip' , refattach.PatNum , patient.LName AS 'PatLName' , patient.FName AS 'PatFName' , IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(appointment.AptDateTime) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.PatNum = refattach.PatNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 ), '') AS 'PatFirstAppt' , IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(nextappt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment nextappt WHERE nextappt.PatNum = refattach.PatNum AND nextappt.AptStatus = 1 AND nextappt.AptDateTime > CURDATE() ), '') AS 'PatNextAppt' , CAST(SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'HowMuch' FROM referral INNER JOIN refattach ON refattach.ReferralNum = referral.ReferralNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 AND refattach.ItemOrder = (SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.patNum = refattach.PatNum) INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum = refattach.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = refattach.PatNum WHERE referral.PatNum > 0 GROUP BY referral.LName, referral.FName, referral.ReferralNum, refattach.PatNum ) core INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Patient' AS 'Type', 1 AS 'Order' UNION ALL SELECT 'Spacer' AS 'Type', 2 AS 'Order' UNION ALL SELECT 'Referral' AS 'Type', 3 AS 'Order' UNION ALL SELECT 'Total' AS 'Type', 4 AS 'Order' ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY dup.Type, IF(dup.Type = 'Patient', core.PatNum, 0), IF(dup.Type = 'Referral', CONCAT(core.LName, ' ', core.FName), 0) ORDER BY dup.Order, core.LName, core.FName, core.ReferralNum, core.PatLName, core.PatFName, core.PatNum;

request: For Version 16.4 and earlier. Summary of Claim Fees, Proc Fees, Adjustments, Writeoffs, TP'd Fees, Insurance Payments, Pat Payments, and unpaid production (as of the specified date, current date is used if left blank) for patients with their first completed appointment in the date range and at least one referred from entry. Uses referral listed first in program interface.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-01-01', @ToDate='2023-02-01'; SET @Referror='%%'; SET @Carrier='%%'; SET @AsOf=''; SELECT IF(LENGTH(@AsOf) = 0, CURDATE(), @AsOf) INTO @AsOf; SELECT a.PatNum ,COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ca.CarrierName), 'None') AS 'Carrier' ,a.Referror ,visits.FirstVisit AS 'First Visit' ,visits.LastVisit AS 'Last Visit' ,a.TPFees AS '$TPFees_' ,a.ClaimFees AS '$ClaimFees_' ,a.Fees AS '$Fees_' ,a.Adjust AS '$Adjustments_' ,a.WriteOffs AS '$WriteOffs_' ,(a.Fees + a.Adjust - a.Writeoffs) AS '$NetProduction_' ,a.InsPayAmt AS '$InsPay_' ,a.PatPayAmt AS '$PatPay_' ,a.Unpaid AS '$Unpaid_' FROM( SELECT p.PatNum ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PatientName' ,CONCAT(r.LName,', ',r.FName) AS 'Referror' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsPay' THEN RawPatTrans.FeeBilled ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFees' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'Fee' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Fees' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'TPFee' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TPFees' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'Adj' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Adjust' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsPay' THEN -RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'WriteOffs' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsPay' THEN -RawPatTrans.Tran2 ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN -RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'PatPayAmt' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranDate <= @AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranType != 'TPFee' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount + RawPatTrans.Tran2 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Unpaid' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus = 2 THEN 'Fee' WHEN pl.ProcStatus = 1 THEN 'TPFee' END) AS TranType ,pl.PatNum AS PatNum ,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount ,0 AS Tran2 ,0 AS FeeBilled FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN(1,2) UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType ,a.PatNum AS PatNum ,a.AdjDate AS TranDate ,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount ,0 AS Tran2 ,0 AS FeeBilled FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType ,ps.PatNum AS PatNum ,ps.DatePay AS TranDate ,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount ,0 AS Tran2 ,0 AS FeeBilled FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType ,cp.PatNum AS PatNum ,cp.DateCp AS TranDate ,-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount ,-cp.InsPayAmt AS Tran2 ,cp.FeeBilled FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1, 4, 5, 7) AND ( cp.InsPayAmt != 0 OR cp.Writeoff != 0 OR cp.FeeBilled != 0) ) AS RawPatTrans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = RawPatTrans.PatNum INNER JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum = ra.PatNum AND ra.IsFrom = 1 AND ra.ItemOrder = ( SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.IsFrom = 1 AND ra.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum) INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum AND r.LName LIKE @Referror GROUP BY p.PatNum ) a INNER JOIN ( SELECT DATE(MAX(apt.AptDateTime)) AS 'LastVisit' ,DATE(MIN(apt.AptDateTime)) AS 'FirstVisit' ,apt.PatNum FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY apt.PatNum )visits ON visits.PatNum = a.PatNum AND visits.FirstVisit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = a.PatNum LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = ib.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE COALESCE(ca.CarrierName, 'None') LIKE @Carrier GROUP BY a.PatNum ORDER BY Visits.FirstVisit

request: Summary of Claim Fees, Proc Fees, Adjustments, Writeoffs, TP'd Fees, Insurance Payments, Pat Payments, and unpaid production (as of the specified date, current date is used if left blank) for patients with their first completed appointment in the date range and at least one referred from entry. Uses referral listed first in program interface. For Version 17.1 and later.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-01-01', @ToDate='2023-02-01'; SET @Referror='%%'; SET @Carrier='%%'; SET @AsOf=''; SELECT IF(LENGTH(@AsOf) = 0, CURDATE(), @AsOf) INTO @AsOf; SELECT a.PatNum ,COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ca.CarrierName), 'None') AS 'Carrier' ,a.Referror ,visits.FirstVisit AS 'First Visit' ,visits.LastVisit AS 'Last Visit' ,a.TPFees AS '$TPFees_' ,a.ClaimFees AS '$ClaimFees_' ,a.Fees AS '$Fees_' ,a.Adjust AS '$Adjustments_' ,a.WriteOffs AS '$WriteOffs_' ,(a.Fees + a.Adjust - a.Writeoffs) AS '$NetProduction_' ,a.InsPayAmt AS '$InsPay_' ,a.PatPayAmt AS '$PatPay_' ,a.Unpaid AS '$Unpaid_' FROM( SELECT p.PatNum ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PatientName' ,CONCAT(r.LName,', ',r.FName) AS 'Referror' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsPay' THEN RawPatTrans.FeeBilled ELSE 0 END) AS 'ClaimFees' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'Fee' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Fees' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'TPFee' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TPFees' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'Adj' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Adjust' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsPay' THEN -RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'WriteOffs' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsPay' THEN -RawPatTrans.Tran2 ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN -RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'PatPayAmt' ,SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranDate <= @AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranType != 'TPFee' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount + RawPatTrans.Tran2 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Unpaid' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus = 2 THEN 'Fee' WHEN pl.ProcStatus = 1 THEN 'TPFee' END) AS TranType ,pl.PatNum AS PatNum ,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount ,0 AS Tran2 ,0 AS FeeBilled FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN(1,2) UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType ,a.PatNum AS PatNum ,a.AdjDate AS TranDate ,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount ,0 AS Tran2 ,0 AS FeeBilled FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType ,ps.PatNum AS PatNum ,ps.DatePay AS TranDate ,-ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount ,0 AS Tran2 ,0 AS FeeBilled FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType ,cp.PatNum AS PatNum ,cp.DateCp AS TranDate ,-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount ,-cp.InsPayAmt AS Tran2 ,cp.FeeBilled FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1, 4, 5, 7) AND ( cp.InsPayAmt != 0 OR cp.Writeoff != 0 OR cp.FeeBilled != 0) ) AS RawPatTrans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = RawPatTrans.PatNum INNER JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum = ra.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.ItemOrder = ( SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum) INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum AND r.LName LIKE @Referror GROUP BY p.PatNum ) a INNER JOIN ( SELECT DATE(MAX(apt.AptDateTime)) AS 'LastVisit' ,DATE(MIN(apt.AptDateTime)) AS 'FirstVisit' ,apt.PatNum FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY apt.PatNum )visits ON visits.PatNum = a.PatNum AND visits.FirstVisit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = a.PatNum LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = ib.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE COALESCE(ca.CarrierName, 'None') LIKE @Carrier GROUP BY a.PatNum ORDER BY Visits.FirstVisit

request: Claims received in date range with no payment. Excludes pre-authorizations.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-01-01', @ToDate='2022-01-31'; SELECT carrier.CarrierName ,c.PatNum ,DATE_FORMAT(c.DateService,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Service Date' ,c.ClaimFee ,c.InsPayEst ,c.InsPayAmt ,c.WriteOff ,(c.ClaimFee-c.InsPayAmt-c.Writeoff) AS $Rem ,c.DateReceived ,c.DedApplied FROM claim c LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=c.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.DateReceived BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND c.ClaimStatus='R' AND c.inspayamt = 0 AND c.claimType <> 'Preauth' ORDER BY CarrierName;

request: List of patients and their preferred contact methods.
query: SELECT (patient.PatNum) AS "Num",patient.LName,patient.FName,patient.WirelessPhone,patient.Email, (CASE WHEN PreferConfirmMethod = 1 THEN 'DoNotCall' WHEN PreferConfirmMethod = 2 THEN 'HmPhone' WHEN PreferConfirmMethod = 3 THEN 'WkPhone' WHEN PreferConfirmMethod = 4 THEN 'WirelessPh' WHEN PreferConfirmMethod = 5 THEN 'Email' WHEN PreferConfirmMethod = 6 THEN 'SeeNotes' WHEN PreferConfirmMethod = 7 THEN 'Mail' WHEN PreferConfirmMethod = 8 THEN 'TextMessage' ELSE 'None' END) AS PreferConfirmMethod, (CASE WHEN PreferContactMethod = 1 THEN 'DoNotCall' WHEN PreferContactMethod = 2 THEN 'HmPhone' WHEN PreferContactMethod = 3 THEN 'WkPhone' WHEN PreferContactMethod = 4 THEN 'WirelessPh' WHEN PreferContactMethod = 5 THEN 'Email' WHEN PreferContactMethod = 6 THEN 'SeeNotes' WHEN PreferContactMethod = 7 THEN 'Mail' WHEN PreferContactMethod = 8 THEN 'TextMessage' ELSE 'None' END) AS PreferContactMethod, (CASE WHEN PreferRecallMethod = 1 THEN 'DoNotCall' WHEN PreferRecallMethod = 2 THEN 'HmPhone' WHEN PreferRecallMethod = 3 THEN 'WkPhone' WHEN PreferRecallMethod = 4 THEN 'WirelessPh' WHEN PreferRecallMethod = 5 THEN 'Email' WHEN PreferRecallMethod = 6 THEN 'SeeNotes' WHEN PreferRecallMethod = 7 THEN 'Mail' WHEN PreferRecallMethod = 8 THEN 'TextMessage' ELSE 'None' END) AS PreferRecallMethod, (CASE WHEN TxtMsgOk= 1 THEN 'Yes' WHEN TxtMsgOk= 2 THEN 'No' ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS TxtMsgOk FROM patient WHERE PatStatus IN (0,1) ORDER BY LName, FName

request: List of patients with the specified active problem seen by the specified provider in the date range.
query: SET @ProblemName = '%%'; SET @ProvAbbr = '%%'; SET @StartDate = '2020-03-01', @EndDate = '2020-03-31'; SET @pos = 0; SELECT @pos := @pos + 1 AS 'Count', core.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', GROUP_CONCAT(ddef.DiseaseName) AS Problems, proc.Prov AS ProvsSeen FROM disease dis INNER JOIN diseasedef ddef ON ddef.DiseaseDefNum = dis.DiseaseDefNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = dis.PatNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT provider.Abbr) AS Prov, procedurelog.PatNum FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum ) proc ON proc.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE dis.ProbStatus = 0 AND ddef.DiseaseName LIKE @ProblemName GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ) core

request: Patients with a current insurance plan marked as pending.
query: SELECT DISTINCTROW p.PatNum AS 'Pat p.LName, p.FName, ca.CarrierName, ca.Address, ca.Address2, ca.City, ca.State, ca.Zip FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.IsPending = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum ORDER BY ca.CarrierName, p.LName;

request: 2017 EHR - Objective 9 Query: Secure Messaging
query: SET @FromDate='2016-01-01', @ToDate='2016-10-07'; SET @ProvNPIs=''; SET @ProvNPIs=(CASE WHEN @ProvNPIs="" THEN ".*" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProvNPIs,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SELECT prov.Abbr AS Provider, COALESCE(PatCounts.TotPatsEmailed,0) AS TotPatsEmailed, COALESCE(PatCounts.TotPatsSeen,0) AS TotPatsSeen, CONCAT(FORMAT(ROUND((COALESCE(TotPatsEmailed/TotPatsSeen,0))*100,2),2),"%") AS Percent FROM provider prov INNER JOIN ehrprovkey ON ehrprovkey.FName=prov.FName AND ehrprovkey.LName=prov.LName LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum, COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS TotPatsSeen, COUNT(DISTINCT Emails.PatNumSubj) AS TotPatsEmailed FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT email.ProvNumWebMail, email.PatNumSubj FROM emailmessage email WHERE email.SentOrReceived IN (6,7) AND email.MsgDateTime BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate ,'%Y-01-01') AND (DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate ,'%Y-12-31')+INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY email.ProvNumWebMail,email.PatNumSubj )Emails ON Emails.ProvNumWebMail = pl.ProvNum AND pl.PatNum=Emails.PatNumSubj WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProvNum )PatCounts ON PatCounts.ProvNum=prov.ProvNum WHERE prov.NationalProvID REGEXP @ProvNPIs GROUP BY prov.ProvNum

request: New and Lost patients as of the specified date range. Includes total counts and net new
query: SET @FromDate='2025-07-01', @ToDate='2025-07-31'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @Broken FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D9986','D9987'); SELECT (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN 'New Patients' WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,5) THEN CONCAT( p.LName ,',' ,IF(LENGTH(p.Preferred)>0,CONCAT(' \'',p.Preferred,'\''),'') ,' ' ,p.FName ,IF(LENGTH(p.MiddleI)>0,CONCAT(' ',p.MiddleI),'') ) WHEN s1.Seq = 4 THEN 'Lost Patients' WHEN s1.Seq = 7 THEN 'Total New' WHEN s1.Seq = 8 THEN COUNT(DISTINCT IF(procs.First BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate),p.PatNum,NULL)) ELSE '' END) AS 'Patient Name' ,(CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (1,4) THEN 'Patient Status' WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,5) THEN ELT(p.PatStatus + 1,'Patient','NonPatient','Inactive','Archived','Deleted','Deceased','Prospective') WHEN s1.Seq = 7 THEN 'Total Lost' WHEN s1.Seq = 8 THEN COUNT(DISTINCT IF(procs.Last BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR AND DATE(@ToDate) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR,p.PatNum,NULL)) ELSE '' END) AS 'Status' ,(CASE s1.Seq WHEN 1 THEN 'First Procedure' WHEN 2 THEN procs.First WHEN 4 THEN 'Last Procedure' WHEN 5 THEN procs.Last WHEN 7 THEN 'Net New' WHEN 8 THEN COUNT(DISTINCT IF(procs.First BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate),p.PatNum,NULL)) - COUNT(DISTINCT IF(procs.Last BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR AND DATE(@ToDate) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR,p.PatNum,NULL)) ELSE '' END) AS 'Procedure Date' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl1.PatNum ,MIN(pl1.ProcDate) AS 'First' ,MAX(pl1.ProcDate) AS 'Last' FROM procedurelog pl1 WHERE pl1.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl1.CodeNum,@Broken) GROUP BY pl1.PatNum ) procs ON procs.PatNum = p.PatNum AND (procs.First BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) OR procs.Last BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR AND DATE(@ToDate) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR) LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_8 s1 ON TRUE WHERE (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 2 THEN procs.First BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) WHEN s1.Seq = 4 THEN procs.Last BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR AND DATE(@ToDate) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,4) THEN CONCAT(s1.Seq,'+',p.PatNum) ELSE s1.Seq END) ORDER BY s1.Seq, p.PatNum

request: Count of patients seen in the date range by the specified provider, showing unique new patients, total unique patients, and total patient visits. Unique New Patients Seen counts a patient that has their first completed procedure in the date range. Total Unique Patients Seen counts a patient that has a completed procedure in the date range. Total Patient Visits counts a patient that had a completed procedure attached to a completed appiontment on a unique date.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ProvAbbr='MP'; SET @BrokenCodes='D9986,D9987'; SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN display.CountType = 'NP' THEN display.PatNum END) AS 'Unique New Patients Seen', COUNT(CASE WHEN display.CountType = 'TP' THEN display.PatNum END) AS 'Total Unique Patients Seen', COUNT(CASE WHEN display.CountType = 'TVP' THEN display.PatNum END) AS 'Total Patient Visits' FROM ( SELECT 'NP' AS 'CountType' ,MIN(plnp.ProcDate) AS 'ProcDate' ,plnp.PatNum ,plnp.ProvNum FROM procedurelog plnp INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = plnp.CodeNum AND !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @BrokenCodes) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = plnp.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr = @ProvAbbr WHERE plnp.ProcStatus = 2 AND plnp.ProcDate <= DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY plnp.PatNum HAVING MIN(plnp.ProcDate) BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) UNION ALL SELECT 'TP' AS 'CountType' ,pltp.ProcDate ,pltp.PatNum ,pltp.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pltp INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pltp.CodeNum AND !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @BrokenCodes) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pltp.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr = @ProvAbbr WHERE pltp.ProcStatus = 2 AND pltp.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pltp.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT 'TVP' AS 'CountType' ,pltv.ProcDate ,pltv.PatNum ,apt.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pltv INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pltv.CodeNum AND !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @BrokenCodes) INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.AptNum = pltv.AptNum AND apt.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr = @ProvAbbr WHERE pltv.ProcStatus = 2 AND pltv.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pltv.ProcDate, pltv.PatNum ) display

request: Procedure report for specific insurance plans. Displays patients whose primary insurance carrier is the specified carrier. The Copay column is the fee for the insurance plan fee schedule. The Pt Adj column is the adjustments for the specified procedures.
query: SET @StartDate='2016-05-01',@EndDate='2016-05-31'; SET @Carrier='%Metlife%'; SET @UCRFeeSched='Standard'; SET @AdjProcCodes='D2392|D1110|D0150'; SET @AdjProcCodes=(CASE WHEN @AdjProcCodes='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@AdjProcCodes,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(ps.LName,', ',ps.FName) AS 'Subscriber', ins.SubscriberID, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', p.Birthdate AS 'Date of birth', pl.ProcDate AS 'Date of Service', pr.Abbr AS Prov, pc.ProcCode, (CASE WHEN pc.LaymanTerm='' THEN LEFT(pc.Descript,20) ELSE pc.LaymanTerm END) AS Descript, pl.ToothNum AS Tth, pl.Surf, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(f.Amount,0),2),2) AS 'UCR Fee', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(fc.Amount,0),2),2) AS 'Copay', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(adj.AdjSum,0),2),2) AS 'Pt Adj' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 INNER JOIN inssub ins ON pp.InsSubNum=ins.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan inp ON ins.PlanNum=inp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON inp.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum AND ca.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier INNER JOIN patient ps ON ps.PatNum=ins.Subscriber LEFT JOIN feesched fs ON fs.request=@UCRFeeSched LEFT JOIN fee f ON f.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND f.FeeSched=fs.FeeSchedNum LEFT JOIN fee fc ON fc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND fc.FeeSched=inp.FeeSched LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ad.AdjAmt) AS AdjSum,ad.ProcNum FROM adjustment ad GROUP BY ad.ProcNum ) adj ON adj.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @AdjProcCodes WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate ORDER BY pl.ProcDate,p.LName,p.FName ) A UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','','','','','','Totals', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(f.Amount),0),2),2) AS '$UCR Fee_', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(fc.Amount),0),2),2) AS '$Copay_', FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(adj.AdjSum),0),2),2) AS '$Pt Adj_' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pl.PatNum=pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 INNER JOIN inssub ins ON pp.InsSubNum=ins.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan inp ON ins.PlanNum=inp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON inp.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum AND ca.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier LEFT JOIN feesched fs ON fs.request=@UCRFeeSched LEFT JOIN fee f ON f.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND f.FeeSched=fs.FeeSchedNum LEFT JOIN fee fc ON fc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND fc.FeeSched=inp.FeeSched LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(ad.AdjAmt) AS AdjSum,ad.ProcNum FROM adjustment ad GROUP BY ad.ProcNum ) adj ON adj.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @AdjProcCodes WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate

request: Number of hours scheduled for a specific provider per operatory not including blockout times in a date range.
query: SET @StartDate = '2016-05-26', @EndDate='2016-05-26'; SET @ProvAbbr = '%%'; SELECT B.Abbr AS Provider, COALESCE(B.OperatoryNum,'Not Specified') AS Operatory, FORMAT(ROUND(IFNULL(B.Hours,0),2),2) AS Hours FROM ( SELECT SUM(A.ScheduledMinutes)/60 - SUM(A.BlockoutMinutes)/60 AS Hours, provider.Abbr, A.OperatoryNum FROM ( SELECT schedule.StartTime, schedule.StopTime, schedule.ProvNum, schedule.SchedDate, TIME_TO_SEC(schedule.StopTime)/60 - TIME_TO_SEC(schedule.StartTime)/60 AS ScheduledMinutes, scheduleop.OperatoryNum, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sb.StartTime IS NULL OR sb.StopTime<schedule.StartTime OR sb.StartTime>schedule.StopTime THEN 0 ELSE TIME_TO_SEC(CASE WHEN sb.StopTime<schedule.StopTime THEN sb.StopTime ELSE schedule.StopTime END)/60 - TIME_TO_SEC(CASE WHEN sb.StartTime>schedule.StartTime THEN sb.StartTime ELSE schedule.StartTime END)/60 END),0) BlockoutMinutes FROM schedule LEFT JOIN scheduleop ON scheduleop.ScheduleNum = schedule.ScheduleNum LEFT JOIN scheduleop sob ON sob.OperatoryNum=scheduleop.OperatoryNum LEFT JOIN schedule sb ON sb.ScheduleNum=sob.ScheduleNum AND sb.SchedDate=schedule.SchedDate AND sb.SchedType=2 WHERE schedule.SchedDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY schedule.ScheduleNum,scheduleop.OperatoryNum )A INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=A.ProvNum AND provider.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY A.ProvNum, A.OperatoryNum )B ORDER BY Abbr, OperatoryNum

request: Patients who have a procedure that have a secondary or other claim but do not have a primary claim. Shows one row per patient per date of service.
query: SET @StartDate='2016-06-01',@EndDate='2016-06-30'; SELECT cp1.PatNum AS 'PatNum ',CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', cp1.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp1 INNER JOIN claim c1 ON c1.ClaimNum=cp1.ClaimNum AND c1.ClaimType IN ('S','Other') LEFT JOIN claimproc cp2 ON cp2.ProcNum=cp1.ProcNum LEFT JOIN claim c2 ON c2.ClaimNum=cp2.ClaimNum AND c2.ClaimType='P' INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp1.PatNum WHERE c2.ClaimNum IS NULL AND cp1.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND cp1.ClaimProcNum!=cp2.ClaimProcNum GROUP BY cp1.PatNum,cp1.ProcDate ORDER BY cp1.ProcDate,p.LName,p.FName;

request:
Production and patients seen by provider by clinic by date.
Net production calculates writeoffs by insurance payment date. The FutAptsWithDoc column displays the number of patients seen that day that also have a future appointment with a provider on the appointment. The FutAptsWithHyg column displays the number of patients seen that day that also have a future appointment with a hygienist on the appointment.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-07-01' , @ToDate='2016-07-31'; SELECT A.Date, pr.Abbr AS 'Prov', COALESCE(df.ItemName,'') AS 'Specialty', COALESCE(cl.request,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic', SUM(A.$Prod_) AS '$GrossProd_', SUM(A.$TotProd_) AS '$NetProd_', COALESCE(pats.PatsSeen,0) AS PatsSeen, COALESCE(pats.AptsDoc,0) AS FutAptsWithDoc, COALESCE(pats.AptsHyg,0) AS FutAptsWithHyg, COALESCE(pats.NoApts,0) AS NoFutApts FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS 'TypeOrder', pl.ClinicNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 4 AS 'TypeOrder', a.ClinicNum FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -cp.WriteOff AS '$WritOff_', -cp.WriteOff AS '$TotProd_', 3 AS 'TypeOrder', cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) A INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition df ON df.DefNum=pr.Specialty LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=A.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ap1.PatNum) AS PatsSeen, ap1.ProvNum,ap1.ClinicNum, DATE(ap1.AptDateTime) AS AptDate, COUNT(DISTINCT ap2.PatNum) AS AptsDoc, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ap2.ProvHyg!=0 THEN ap1.PatNum END)) AS AptsHyg, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ap2.AptNum IS NULL THEN ap1.PatNum END)) AS NoApts FROM appointment ap1 LEFT JOIN appointment ap2 ON ap2.PatNum=ap1.PatNum AND DATE(ap2.AptDateTime)>DATE(ap1.AptDateTime) WHERE ap1.AptStatus=2 AND ap1.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY ap1.ProvNum,ap1.ClinicNum,DATE(ap1.AptDateTime) ) pats ON pats.ProvNum=A.ProvNum AND pats.ClinicNum=A.ClinicNum AND pats.AptDate=A.Date GROUP BY A.ProvNum,A.ClinicNum,A.Date HAVING ABS($NetProd_)>0.005 ORDER BY COALESCE(cl.request,'ZZZZZZZZZ'),A.Date,pr.Abbr

request:
Average production per procedure code.
 Average production is calculated as the sum of the proc fees minus the sum of the writeoffs divided by the count of procedures.
 Writeoffs are calculated by proc date.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-07-01', @ToDate='2023-07-05'; SELECT df.ItemName AS 'Category' , pc.ProcCode , CAST((pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cpc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cpc WHERE cpc.Status IN(0, 1, 4, 7) AND cpc.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) / COUNT(pl.ProcNum) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'AvgProd' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition df ON df.DefNum = pc.ProcCat WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.CodeNum ORDER BY df.ItemName, pc.ProcCode, pc.CodeNum

request: Troubleshooting: Procedures with claimprocs that are not attached to a claim and are for a plan the patient no longer has
query: SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name',p.PatNum AS 'PatNum ',pl.ProcDate,pl.ProcFee FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT pp.PatNum,iss.PlanNum FROM patplan pp INNER JOIN inssub iss ON iss.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum ) plan ON plan.PatNum=cp.PatNum AND plan.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNUm=cp.PatNum WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,2,4,5,6) AND plan.PatNum IS NULL AND cl.ClaimNum IS NULL ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName,pl.ProcDate

request: Weekly hours worked for all Employees. First day of the week is Sunday.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-01-01' , @ToDate='2016-07-31'; SELECT CONCAT(e.LName,', ',e.FName) AS 'Employee', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(IF((TIME_TO_SEC(TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND c.ClockStatus IN(0,1)), TIMEDIFF(TimeDisplayed2, TimeDisplayed1),0)))/3600,2),2) AS 'HoursWorked', CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(GREATEST(DATE_SUB(dates.SelectedDate,INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(dates.SelectedDate)-1 DAY),@FromDate),'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ', DATE_FORMAT(LEAST(DATE_SUB(dates.SelectedDate,INTERVAL DAYOFWEEK(dates.SelectedDate)-1 DAY)+INTERVAL 6 DAY,@ToDate),'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'Week' FROM ( SELECT SelectedDate FROM (SELECT ADDDATE('1970-01-01',t4.i*10000 + t3.i*1000 + t2.i*100 + t1.i*10 + t0.i) SelectedDate FROM (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t0, (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t1, (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t2, (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t3, (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t4) v WHERE SelectedDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) dates INNER JOIN employee e ON TRUE LEFT JOIN clockevent c ON DATE(c.TimeDisplayed1)=dates.SelectedDate AND c.EmployeeNum=e.EmployeeNum GROUP BY YEARWEEK(dates.SelectedDate), e.EmployeeNum ORDER BY YEARWEEK(dates.SelectedDate),LName, FName;

request: Counts the total number of patients with a completed procedure in the date range and of those patients, the number who currently do or do not have insurance.
query: SET @StartDate='2015-08-01',@EndDate='2016-08-31'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS 'Total Pats Seen', COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pp.PatNum IS NOT NULL THEN pl.PatNum END)) AS 'Has Ins', COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pp.PatNum IS NULL THEN pl.PatNum END)) AS 'No Ins' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2

request: Payment plans with Payments, balance due, and completed treatment
query: SET @BillingType=''; SET @BillingType=(CASE WHEN @BillingType='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@BillingType,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT c.Guarantor, c.BillingType, C.Ins, c.Principal, c.Paid, c.DueNow, c.DueInTen AS 'Due in 10 days', c.Bal FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder', a.Guarantor, a.BillingType, a.Ins, FORMAT(a.Principal,2) AS 'Principal', FORMAT(a.Paid,2) AS 'Paid', FORMAT(a.Due-a.Paid,2) AS 'DueNow', FORMAT(a.Principal-a.Paid,2) AS 'Bal', FORMAT(a.DueInTen-a.Paid,2) AS 'DueInTen' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder', CONCAT(g.LName,', ',(CASE WHEN g.Preferred!='' THEN CONCAT('\'',g.Preferred,'\' ') ELSE '' END),g.FName,' ',g.MiddleI) AS 'Guarantor', def.ItemName AS 'BillingType', (CASE WHEN pp.PlanNum=0 THEN '' ELSE 'X' END) AS 'Ins', SUM((CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Principal END)) AS 'Principal', (COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum ),0) + COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ),0) ) AS 'Paid', SUM((CASE WHEN (ppc.ChargeType = 0) AND (ppc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE()) THEN (ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest) ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Due', SUM((CASE WHEN (ppc.ChargeType = 0) AND (ppc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE() + INTERVAL (SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName='PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays') DAY) THEN (ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest) ELSE 0 END)) AS 'DueInTen' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN patient g ON pp.Guarantor = g.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON g.BillingType = def.DefNum AND def.ItemName REGEXP @BillingType GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum )a UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS 'ItemOrder','',' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS 'ItemOrder', '', 'Totals:', '', FORMAT(SUM(b.Principal),2), FORMAT(SUM(b.Paid),2), FORMAT(SUM(b.Due)-SUM(b.Paid),2), FORMAT(SUM(b.Principal)-SUM(b.Paid),2), FORMAT(SUM(b.DueInTen)-SUM(b.Paid),2) FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder', CONCAT(g.LName,', ',(CASE WHEN g.Preferred!='' THEN CONCAT('\'',g.Preferred,'\' ') ELSE '' END),g.FName,' ',g.MiddleI) AS 'Guarantor', def.ItemName AS 'BillingType', (CASE WHEN pp.PlanNum=0 THEN '' ELSE 'X' END) AS 'Ins', SUM((CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Principal END)) AS 'Principal', (COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum ),0) + COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ),0) ) AS 'Paid', SUM((CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND ppc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE() THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Due', SUM((CASE WHEN (ppc.ChargeType = 0) AND (ppc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE() + INTERVAL (SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName='PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays') DAY) THEN (ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest) ELSE 0 END)) AS 'DueInTen' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN patient g ON pp.Guarantor = g.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON g.BillingType = def.DefNum AND def.ItemName REGEXP @BillingType GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum )b )c ORDER BY c.ItemOrder, c.Guarantor, c.Principal, c.Paid

request:
Production and patients seen by provider by clinic by date.
Net production calculates writeoffs by procedure date. 
The FutAptsWithDoc column displays the number of patients seen that day that also have a future appointment with a provider on the appointment. 
The FutAptsWithHyg column displays the number of patients seen that day that also have a future appointment with a hygienist on the appointment.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-01-01' , @ToDate='2016-08-30'; SELECT A.Date, pr.Abbr AS 'Prov', COALESCE(df.ItemName,'') AS 'Specialty', COALESCE(cl.request,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic', FORMAT(SUM(A.$Prod_),2) AS '$GrossProd_', FORMAT(SUM(A.$TotProd_),2) AS '$NetProd_', FORMAT(COALESCE(pats.PatsSeen,0),0) AS PatsSeen, FORMAT(COALESCE(pats.AptsDoc,0),0) AS FutAptsWithDoc, FORMAT(COALESCE(pats.AptsHyg,0),0) AS FutAptsWithHyg, FORMAT(COALESCE(pats.NoApts,0),0) AS NoFutApts FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date', pl.PatNum, pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS '$TotProd_', 0 AS 'TypeOrder', pl.ClinicNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status=7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT a.AdjDate AS 'Date', a.PatNum, a.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', a.AdjAmt AS '$Adjust_', 0 AS '$WritOff_', a.AdjAmt AS '$TotProd_', 4 AS 'TypeOrder', a.ClinicNum FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition d ON a.AdjType=d.DefNum WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT cp.ProcDate AS 'Date', cp.PatNum, cp.ProvNum, 0 AS '$Prod_', 0 AS '$Adjust_', -cp.WriteOff AS '$WritOff_', -cp.WriteOff AS '$TotProd_', 3 AS 'TypeOrder', cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) A INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=A.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition df ON df.DefNum=pr.Specialty LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=A.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ap1.PatNum) AS PatsSeen, ap1.ProvNum,ap1.ClinicNum, DATE(ap1.AptDateTime) AS AptDate, COUNT(DISTINCT ap2.PatNum) AS AptsDoc, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ap2.ProvHyg!=0 THEN ap1.PatNum END)) AS AptsHyg, COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN ap2.AptNum IS NULL THEN ap1.PatNum END)) AS NoApts FROM appointment ap1 LEFT JOIN appointment ap2 ON ap2.PatNum=ap1.PatNum AND DATE(ap2.AptDateTime)>DATE(ap1.AptDateTime) WHERE ap1.AptStatus=2 AND ap1.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY ap1.ProvNum,ap1.ClinicNum,DATE(ap1.AptDateTime) ) pats ON pats.ProvNum=A.ProvNum AND pats.ClinicNum=A.ClinicNum AND pats.AptDate=A.Date GROUP BY A.ProvNum,A.ClinicNum,A.Date HAVING ABS($NetProd_)>0.005 ORDER BY COALESCE(cl.request,'ZZZZZZZZZ'),A.Date,pr.Abbr

request: Automated Reminders That Have Been Sent. All automated appointment reminders that have been sent. Only shows reminders for future scheduled appointments. Only for Open Dental versions 16.3 through 22.1
query: SELECT p.PatNum AS 'ID', p.PatNum, a.AptDateTime AS 'Appointment DateTime', ars.DateTimeSent AS 'Reminder Sent DateTime', (CASE WHEN ars.IsSMSSent = 1 THEN 'Yes' WHEN ars.IsSMSSent = 0 THEN 'No' END) AS 'SMS Sent', (CASE WHEN ars.IsEmailSent = 1 THEN 'Yes' WHEN ars.IsEmailSent = 0 THEN 'No' END) AS 'Email Sent', p.Email, p.WirelessPhone FROM apptremindersent ars INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.AptNum = ars.ApptNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = a.PatNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, a.AptNum, p.LName, p.FName, p.Guarantor, p.PatNum

request: New patient list by treating provider for date range
query: SET @FromDate='2016-08-01', @ToDate='2016-08-31'; SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SELECT B.Abbr, B.PatNum, B.DateFirstVisit FROM ( SELECT A.PatNum, pr.Abbr, A.DateFirstVisit FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum, DATE(MIN(pl.ProcDate)) AS DateFirstVisit FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE pl.procstatus=2 GROUP BY p.PatNum HAVING DateFirstVisit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ) A INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=A.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate=A.DateFirstVisit INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY A.PatNum, pr.Abbr ) B GROUP BY B.Abbr, B.PatNum;

request: Troubleshooting slowness: Displays indexes with a cardinality of 0 or 1 where the column actually has a different value.
query: SET @DatabaseName='opendental'; SET @GroupConcatPrev=(SELECT @@group_concat_max_len); SET group_concat_max_len = 1024 * 1024 * 10; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT("SELECT '",TABLE_NAME,"' AS 'Table','",COLUMN_NAME,"' AS 'Column',",CARDINALITY," AS 'Cardinality',COUNT(DISTINCT ",COLUMN_NAME,") AS 'Actual Count' FROM ", TABLE_NAME," HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ",COLUMN_NAME,")!=",CARDINALITY) SEPARATOR " UNION ALL ") INTO @cmd FROM information_schema.statistics WHERE table_schema=@DatabaseName AND cardinality<2; PREPARE stmt FROM @cmd; EXECUTE stmt; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt; SET @@group_concat_max_len=@GroupConcatPrev;

request: Count of patient appointments for new and existing patients per date created in date range. Counts only Scheduled and Completed appointments.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-09-01', @ToDate='2025-09-30'; SELECT DATE(a.SecDateTEntry) AS 'Date Created' ,COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.IsNewPatient=1 THEN a.AptNum ELSE NULL END) AS 'NewPatientCount' ,COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.IsNewPatient=0 THEN a.AptNum ELSE NULL END) AS 'CurrentPatientCount' FROM appointment a WHERE a.SecDateTEntry BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY DATE(a.SecDateTEntry)

request: List and count of a specified procedure completed in a date range with name of patient
query: SET @FromDate='2015-06-01', @ToDate='2016-06-13'; SET @ProcCodes='NPS'; SET @ProcCodes=(CASE WHEN @ProcCodes='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcCodes,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT procedurecode.ProcCode, CONCAT(patient.FName,' ', patient.LName) AS Patient FROM procedurecode LEFT JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.CodeNum=procedurecode.CodeNum LEFT JOIN patient ON procedurelog.PatNum=patient.PatNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurecode.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes AND procedurelog.procstatus = 2 UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Total:' AS ProcCode, COUNT(procedurecode.ProcCode) FROM procedurecode LEFT JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.CodeNum=procedurecode.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurecode.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes AND procedurelog.procstatus = 2

THEN 'Albanian' WHEN 'gsw' THEN 'Alsatian' WHEN 'amh' THEN 'Amharic' WHEN 'ara' THEN 'Arabic' WHEN 'hye' THEN 'Armenian' WHEN 'asm' THEN 'Assamese' WHEN 'ast' THEN 'Asturian' WHEN 'asa' THEN 'Asu' WHEN 'aze' THEN 'Azerbaijani' WHEN 'aze' THEN 'Azerbaijani (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'aze' THEN 'Azerbaijani (Latin)' WHEN 'ksf' THEN 'Bafia' WHEN 'bam' THEN 'Bambara' WHEN 'bam' THEN 'Bambara (Latin)' WHEN 'brx' THEN 'Bodo' WHEN 'bos' THEN 'Bosnian' WHEN 'bos' THEN 'Bosnian (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'bos' THEN 'Bosnian (Latin)' WHEN 'bre' THEN 'Breton' WHEN 'bul' THEN 'Bulgarian' WHEN 'mya' THEN 'Burmese' WHEN 'Kiswahili' WHEN 'kok' THEN 'Konkani' WHEN 'kor' THEN 'Korean' WHEN 'khq' THEN 'Koyra Chiini' WHEN 'ses' THEN 'Koyraboro Senni' WHEN 'nmg' THEN 'Kwasio' WHEN 'kir' THEN 'Kyrgyz' WHEN 'lkt' THEN 'Lakota' WHEN 'lag' THEN 'Langi' WHEN 'lao' THEN 'Lao' WHEN 'lat' THEN 'Latin' WHEN 'lav' THEN 'Latvian' WHEN 'lin' THEN 'Lingala' WHEN 'lit' THEN 'Lithuanian' WHEN 'dsb' THEN 'Lower Sorbian' WHEN 'lub' THEN 'Luba-Katanga' WHEN 'luo' THEN 'Luo' WHEN 'ltz' THEN 'Luxembourgish' WHEN 'luy' THEN 'Luyia' WHEN 'mkd' THEN 'Macedonian (FYROM)' WHEN 'jmc' THEN 'Machame' WHEN 'mgh' THEN 'Makhuwa-Meetto' WHEN 'kde' THEN 'Makonde' WHEN 'mlg' THEN 'Malagasy' WHEN 'msa' THEN 'Malay' WHEN 'mal' THEN 'Malayalam' WHEN 'mlt' THEN 'Maltese' WHEN 'mni' THEN 'Manipuri' WHEN 'glv' THEN 'Manx' WHEN 'mri' THEN 'Maori' WHEN 'arn' THEN 'Mapudungun' WHEN 'mar' THEN 'Marathi' WHEN 'mas' THEN 'Masai' WHEN 'mzn' THEN 'Mazanderani' WHEN 'mer' THEN 'Meru' WHEN 'mgo' THEN 'Meta\'' WHEN 'moh' THEN 'Mohawk' WHEN 'mon' 'Nepali' WHEN 'nnh' THEN 'Ngiemboon' WHEN 'jgo' THEN 'Ngomba' WHEN 'nqo' THEN 'N\'ko' WHEN 'nde' THEN 'North Ndebele' WHEN 'lrc' THEN 'Northern Luri' WHEN 'nob' THEN 'Norwegian' WHEN 'nob' THEN 'Norwegian (Bokmal)' WHEN 'nno' THEN 'Norwegian (Nynorsk)' WHEN 'nus' THEN 'Nuer' WHEN 'nyn' THEN 'Nyankole' WHEN 'oci' THEN 'Occitan' WHEN 'ori' THEN 'Odia' WHEN 'orm' THEN 'Oromo' WHEN 'oss' THEN 'Ossetic' WHEN 'pap' THEN 'Papiamento' WHEN 'pus' THEN 'Pashto' WHEN 'fas' THEN 'Persian' WHEN 'pol' THEN 'Polish' WHEN 'por' THEN 'Portuguese' WHEN 'prg' THEN 'Prussian' WHEN 'pan' THEN 'Punjabi' WHEN 'pan' THEN 'Punjabi (Arabic)' WHEN 'qub' THEN 'Quechua' WHEN 'ron' THEN 'Romanian' WHEN 'roh' THEN 'Romansh' WHEN 'rof' THEN 'Rombo' WHEN 'run' THEN 'Rundi' WHEN 'rus' THEN 'Russian' WHEN 'rwk' (Skolt)' WHEN 'sma' THEN 'Sami (Southern)' WHEN 'sag' THEN 'Sango' WHEN 'sbp' THEN 'Sangu' WHEN 'san' THEN 'Sanskrit' WHEN 'gla' THEN 'Scottish Gaelic' WHEN 'seh' THEN 'Sena' WHEN 'srp' THEN 'Serbian' WHEN 'srp' THEN 'Serbian (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'srp' THEN 'Serbian (Latin)' WHEN 'nso' THEN 'Sesotho sa Leboa' WHEN 'tsn' THEN 'Setswana' WHEN 'ksb' THEN 'Shambala' WHEN 'sna' THEN 'Shona' WHEN 'sna' THEN 'Shona (Latin)' WHEN 'sin' THEN 'Sindhi' WHEN 'sin' THEN 'Sindhi (Arabic)' WHEN 'sin' THEN 'Sindhi (Devanagari)' WHEN 'sin' THEN 'Sinhala' WHEN 'slk' THEN 'Slovak' WHEN 'slv' THEN 'Slovenian' WHEN 'xog' THEN 'Soga' WHEN 'som' THEN 'Somali' WHEN 'nbl' THEN 'South Ndebele' WHEN 'sot' THEN 'Southern Sotho' WHEN 'spa' THEN 'Spanish' WHEN 'zgh' THEN 'Standard Moroccan Tamazight' WHEN 'zgh' THEN 'Standard Moroccan Tamazight (Tifinagh)' WHEN 'ssw' THEN 'Swati' WHEN 'swe' THEN 'Swedish' WHEN 'syr' THEN 'Syriac' WHEN 'shi' THEN 'Tachelhit' WHEN 'shi' THEN 'Tachelhit (Latin)' WHEN 'shi' THEN 'Tachelhit (Tifinagh)' WHEN 'dav' THEN 'Taita' WHEN 'tgk' THEN 'Tajik' WHEN 'tgk' THEN 'Tajik (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'tzm' THEN 'Tamazight' WHEN 'tzm' THEN 'Tamazight (Latin)' WHEN 'tzm' THEN 'Tamazight (Tifinagh)' WHEN 'tam' THEN 'Tamil' WHEN 'twq' THEN 'Tasawaq' WHEN 'tat' THEN 'Tatar' WHEN 'tel' THEN 'Telugu' WHEN 'teo' THEN 'Teso' WHEN 'tha' THEN 'Thai' WHEN 'bod' THEN 'Tibetan' WHEN 'tig' THEN p.Language END) AS Language FROM patient p WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Treatment Finder report. Like internal.
query: SET @IncludePatsNoIns='NO'; SET @IncludePatsWithAppts='NO'; SET @AmountRemaining=''; SET @TPDateSince='2019-12-31'; SET @MonthStart=0; SET @Provs=''; SET @BillingTypes=''; SET @CodeStart='', @CodeEnd=''; SET @RenewDate = (CASE WHEN @MonthStart = 0 THEN CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01-01') WHEN @MonthStart <= MONTH(CURDATE()) THEN CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-', LPAD(@MonthStart, 2, '0'), '-01') ELSE CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1, '-', LPAD(@MonthStart, 2, '0'), '-01') END); SET @Provs = (CASE WHEN @Provs = "" THEN "^" ELSE CONCAT('^', REPLACE(@Provs, "|", "$|^"), "$") END); SET @BillingTypes = (CASE WHEN @BillingTypes = "" THEN "^" ELSE CONCAT('^', REPLACE(@BillingTypes, "|", "$|^"), "$") END); SELECT pat.PatNum ,(CASE pat.PreferRecallMethod WHEN 0 THEN 'None' WHEN 1 THEN 'DoNotCall' WHEN 2 THEN 'HmPhone' WHEN 3 THEN 'WkPhone' WHEN 4 THEN 'WirelessPh' WHEN 5 THEN 'Email' WHEN 6 THEN 'SeeNotes' WHEN 7 THEN 'Mail' WHEN 8 THEN 'TextMessage' END) AS 'PreferRecallMethod' ,pat.FName ,pat.LName ,pat.BirthDate ,pat.Email ,pat.HmPhone ,pat.WirelessPhone ,pat.WkPhone ,pat.Address ,pat.Address2 ,pat.City ,pat.State ,pat.Zip ,pat.PriProv ,pat.BillingType ,FORMAT(ROUND(MAX( CASE PlanInfo.Ordinal WHEN 1 THEN IFNULL(PlanInfo.AnnualMax, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 2), 2) "$PriAnnualMax" ,FORMAT(ROUND(MAX( CASE PlanInfo.Ordinal WHEN 1 THEN IFNULL(PlanInfo.AmtUsed, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 2), 2) "$PriAmtUsed" ,FORMAT(ROUND(MAX( CASE PlanInfo.Ordinal WHEN 1 THEN IFNULL(PlanInfo.PendingAmt, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 2), 2) "$PriAmtPending" ,FORMAT(ROUND(MAX( CASE PlanInfo.Ordinal WHEN 1 THEN IFNULL(PlanInfo.AnnualMax - PlanInfo.AmtUsed - PlanInfo.PendingAmt, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 2), 2) "$PriAmtRemaining" ,FORMAT(ROUND(MAX( CASE PlanInfo.Ordinal WHEN 2 THEN IFNULL(PlanInfo.AnnualMax, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 2), 2) "$SecAnnualMax" ,FORMAT(ROUND(MAX( CASE PlanInfo.Ordinal WHEN 2 THEN IFNULL(PlanInfo.AmtUsed, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 2), 2) "$SecAmtUsed" ,FORMAT(ROUND(MAX( CASE PlanInfo.Ordinal WHEN 2 THEN IFNULL(PlanInfo.PendingAmt, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 2), 2) "$SecAmtPending" ,FORMAT(ROUND(MAX( CASE PlanInfo.Ordinal WHEN 2 THEN IFNULL(PlanInfo.AnnualMax - PlanInfo.AmtUsed - PlanInfo.PendingAmt, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 2), 2) "$SecAmtRemaining" ,FORMAT(ROUND(tblplanned.AmtPlanned, 2), 2) "$TreatmentPlan" ,COALESCE(apt.AptDates, '') AS 'Appt Date' ,COALESCE(apt.AptProvs, '') AS 'Appt Provs' ,COALESCE(apt.AptProcs, '') AS 'Appt Procs' FROM patient pat INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pat.PriProv AND pr.Abbr REGEXP @Provs INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = pat.BillingType AND def.ItemName REGEXP @BillingTypes LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pplan.PatNum ,IFNULL(tblannualmax.AnnualMax, 0) AS 'AnnualMax' ,IFNULL(tblUsedPending.AmtUsed, 0) AS 'AmtUsed' ,IFNULL(tblUsedPending.PendingAmt, 0) AS 'PendingAmt' ,pplan.Ordinal FROM patplan pplan LEFT JOIN inssub isub ON isub.InsSubNum = pplan.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.PlanNum ,MAX(b.MonetaryAmt) AS 'AnnualMax' FROM benefit b WHERE b.BenefitType = 5 AND b.CoverageLevel = 1 AND b.CovCatNum = 0 AND b.CodeNum = 0 AND b.MonetaryAmt > 0 AND b.PlanNum != 0 GROUP BY b.PlanNum ) tblannualmax ON tblannualmax.PlanNum = isub.PlanNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patplan.PatPlanNum ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1,3,4) THEN cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'AmtUsed' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status = 0 AND cp.InsPayAmt = 0 THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'PendingAmt' ,ProcCheck.patNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = cp.PatNum AND patplan.InsSubNum = cp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pp.PatNum ,pp.PatPlanNum ,cp.FromCode ,cp.ToCode FROM patplan pp INNER JOIN inssub isub ON isub.InsSubNum = pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN benefit b ON b.PlanNum = isub.PlanNum AND b.BenefitType IN (5) INNER JOIN covcat cc ON cc.CovCatNum = b.CovCatNum AND cc.EbenefitCat NOT IN (0,1) INNER JOIN covspan cp ON cp.CovCatNum = cc.CovCatNum ) ProcCheck ON ProcCheck.PatNum = cp.PatNum AND ProcCheck.PatPlanNum = patplan.PatPlanNum AND pc.ProcCode BETWEEN ProcCheck.FromCode AND ProcCheck.ToCode WHERE cp.Status IN (1,3,4,0) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @RenewDate AND @RenewDate + INTERVAL 1 YEAR - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND (CASE WHEN ProcCheck.PatNum IS NOT NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END) AND IF(@IncludePatsNoIns = "YES", TRUE, ip.MonthRenew = @MonthStart) GROUP BY patplan.PatPlanNum ) tblUsedPending ON tblUsedPending.PatPlanNum = pplan.PatPlanNum GROUP BY pplan.PatPlanNum )PlanInfo ON PlanInfo.PatNum = pat.PatNum AND (PlanInfo.AnnualMax IS NOT NULL AND PlanInfo.AnnualMax > 0) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT appointment.PatNum ,GROUP_CONCAT(DATE(appointment.AptDateTime)) AS 'AptDates' ,GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode) AS 'AptProcs' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT prov.Abbr) AS 'AptProvs' FROM appointment INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = appointment.ProvNum OR prov.ProvNum = appointment.ProvHyg LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = appointment.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE appointment.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) >= CURDATE() GROUP BY appointment.PatNum )apt ON apt.PatNum = pat.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum ,SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)) AS 'AmtPlanned' ,MIN(procedurelog.DateTP) AS 'MinTPDate' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 1 AND IF(@CodeStart = '', TRUE, procedurecode.ProcCode >= @CodeStart) AND IF(@CodeEnd = '', TRUE, procedurecode.ProcCode <= @CodeEnd) AND IF(@TPDateSince = '', TRUE, procedurelog.DateTP >= @TPDateSince) GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum ) tblplanned ON tblplanned.PatNum = pat.PatNum WHERE tblplanned.AmtPlanned > 0 AND pat.PatStatus = 0 AND IF(@IncludePatsNoIns = "YES", TRUE, PlanInfo.Ordinal BETWEEN 1 AND 2) AND IF(@IncludePatsWithAppts = "YES", TRUE, apt.PatNum IS NULL) AND IF(@AmountRemaining > 0, PlanInfo.AnnualMax IS NULL OR PlanInfo.AnnualMax - PlanInfo.AmtUsed > CAST(@AmountRemaining AS DECIMAL(10,2)), TRUE) AND IF(@TPDateSince = '', TRUE, tblplanned.MinTPDate >= @TPDateSince) GROUP BY pat.PatNum;

request: Income Tax Receipt by family
query: SET @FromDate = '2019-01-01' , @ToDate='2019-12-31'; SET @GuarantorPatNum = 99; SET @ExcludePaymentTypes='Ins Cheque|NSF|Patient Refund'; SELECT (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ExcludePaymentTypes) = 0 THEN 'excludeFoo' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ExcludePaymentTypes,'|','$|^'),'$') END) INTO @ExcludePaymentTypes; SELECT '' AS ' UNION ALL SELECT '',YEAR(@ToDate) AS 'Income Tax Receipt','','' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(g.FName,' ',g.LName),'','','' FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum = @GuarantorPatNum UNION ALL SELECT g.Address,'','','' FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum = @GuarantorPatNum UNION ALL SELECT g.Address2,'','','' FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum = @GuarantorPatNum UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(g.city,', ',g.State,' ', g.zip) ,'','','' FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum = @GuarantorPatNum UNION ALL SELECT '','','','' UNION ALL SELECT a.PaymentDate AS 'Payment Date', a.Payee, a.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type_', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(ROUND(a.Amount, 2), 2)) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay.PayDate,'%d/%m/%Y') AS 'PaymentDate', CONCAT(pat.LName,', ',pat.FName) AS 'Payee', def.ItemName AS 'PaymentType', pay.PayAmt AS 'Amount' FROM patient pat INNER JOIN payment pay ON pat.PatNum = pay.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON pay.PayType = def.DefNum AND def.ItemName NOT REGEXP @ExcludePaymentTypes INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = pat.Guarantor AND pat.Guarantor = @GuarantorPatNum AND pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY pat.FName, pay.PayDate, pay.PayAmt ) a UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'Payment Date', 'Total:' AS '', '' AS 'Payment Type_', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(b.Amount), 2), 2)) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay.PayDate,'%d/%m/%Y') AS 'PaymentDate', CONCAT(pat.LName,', ',pat.FName) AS 'Payee', def.ItemName AS 'PaymentType', pay.PayAmt AS 'Amount' FROM patient pat INNER JOIN payment pay ON pat.PatNum = pay.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON pay.PayType = def.DefNum AND def.ItemName NOT REGEXP @ExcludePaymentTypes INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = pat.Guarantor AND pat.Guarantor = @GuarantorPatNum AND pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY pat.FName, pay.PayDate, pay.PayAmt ) b;

request: Procedure codes with a default provider assigned
query: SELECT p.Abbr, pc.ProcCode, pc.Descript FROM procedurecode pc INNER JOIN provider p ON p.ProvNum=pc.ProvNumDefault WHERE pc.ProvNumDefault<>0 ORDER BY pc.ProcCode

request: Production and Income report for a set date range like internal monthly Production and Income showing estimated net production in Sched column
query: SET @FromDate='2017-02-01' , @ToDate='2017-02-28'; SET @WriteoffByDateOfService=(CASE WHEN (SELECT ValueString FROM preference pref WHERE pref.PrefName = 'ReportsPPOwriteoffDefaultToProcDate')=1 THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END); SELECT Trans.TransDate AS 'Date', DATE_FORMAT(Trans.TransDate,"%W") AS 'WeekDay', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $Prod_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'Sched' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $Sched_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $Adj_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN ('Writeoff') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $Writeoff_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN ('Prod','Adj','Sched') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(Trans.Writeoff),2),2) AS $NetProd_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $PatIncome_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN ('InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $InsIncome_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN ('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $TotalIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType, pl.ProcDate AS TransDate, pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) - IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Sched' AS TranType, DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS TransDate, ap.ProvNum, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits),0)) - SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff, 0)) AS TranAmount, 0 AS 'Writeoff' FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON ap.AptNum = pl.AptNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride = -1 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEst = -1 THEN 0 ELSE cp.WriteOffEst END) ELSE cp.WriteOffEstOverride END),0)) AS 'WriteOff', cp.ProcNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 WHERE cp.Status IN (5,6,8) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND (@ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY ap.AptNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType, a.AdjDate AS TransDate, a.ProvNum, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType, ps.DatePay AS TransDate, ps.ProvNum, ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount = 0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType, cp.DateCP AS TransDate, cp.ProvNum, cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType, (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN cp.ProcDate ELSE cp.DateCP END) AS TransDate, cp.ProvNum, 0 AS TranAmount, cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN cp.ProcDate ELSE cp.DateCP END) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4) ) Trans GROUP BY Trans.TransDate ORDER BY Trans.TransDate;

request: Task List extraction - For printing or exporting a task list, by Task list name and status, for tasks created in date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-01-01' , @ToDate=CURDATE()+INTERVAL 1 DAY; SET @TaskListName='%%'; SET @Status='0,1,2'; SET @Status=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Status) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Status,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT t.TaskNum ,(CASE WHEN t.UserNum THEN ( SELECT u.UserName FROM userod u WHERE u.UserNum = t.UserNum ) END) AS 'CreatedBy' ,DATE_FORMAT(t.DateTimeEntry,'%m-%d-%Y') AS 'DateCreated' ,t.Descript ,(CASE WHEN t.ObjectType=0 THEN 'None' WHEN t.ObjectType=1 THEN 'Patient' WHEN t.ObjectType=2 THEN 'Appointment' END) AS 'ObjectType' ,(CASE WHEN t.KeyNum = 0 THEN 'N/A' WHEN t.ObjectType = 1 THEN ( SELECT CONCAT(LName, ', ', FName) FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum=t.KeyNum ) WHEN t.ObjectType = 2 THEN ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum WHERE ap.AptNum=t.KeyNum ) ELSE '' END) AS 'AttachedPatient' FROM task t INNER JOIN tasklist tl ON t.TaskListNum = tl.TaskListNum AND tl.Descript LIKE @TaskListName INNER JOIN userod u ON t.UserNum = u.UserNum WHERE t.TaskStatus REGEXP @Status AND t.DateTimeEntry BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY t.TaskNum

request: End of month aging per clinic. Shows the balance of accounts receivable at the end of the month for each month in the date range. Requires the CommandQuery permission. Must be on version 16.2 or higher.
query: SET @StartDate='2016-12-01', @EndDate='2017-01-31'; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SET group_concat_max_len = 1024 * 1024 * 1024; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tempagingovertime; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT( " SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType!='InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<='",MonthEndDate, "' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS PatBal_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),", SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType!='InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<='",MonthEndDate,"' AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=('",MonthEndDate,"'-INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Charges0to30_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),", SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType!='InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<('",MonthEndDate,"'-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=('",MonthEndDate, "'-INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Charges31to60_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),", SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType!='InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<('",MonthEndDate,"'-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=('",MonthEndDate, "'-INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Charges61to90_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),", SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType!='InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<('",MonthEndDate,"'-INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ChargesOver90_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),", -SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType!='InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<='",MonthEndDate,"' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS Credits_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),", SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<='",MonthEndDate,"' THEN (CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.CpStatus=0 OR (RawPatTrans.CpStatus=1 AND RawPatTrans.DateCP>'",MonthEndDate,"') THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END) AS InsEst_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2) ) SEPARATOR ", ") AS Cmd INTO @SumRawPatTrans FROM ( SELECT LEAST(MonthEndDate,@EndDate) AS MonthEndDate FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(@EndDate),"-",MONTH(@EndDate),"-01")-INTERVAL (t3.i*1000+t2.i*100+t1.i*10+t0.i)-1 MONTH-INTERVAL 1 DAY MonthEndDate FROM (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t0, (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t1, (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t2, (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t3 ) monthend WHERE MonthEndDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND (CONCAT(YEAR(@EndDate),"-",MONTH(@EndDate),"-01")+INTERVAL 1 MONTH-INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY MonthEndDate DESC ) A; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT( " SUM(B.PatBal_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),") AS FamBal_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),",SUM(B.Charges0to30_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),") AS FamCharges0to30_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),",SUM(B.Charges31to60_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),") AS FamCharges31to60_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),", SUM(B.Charges61to90_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),") AS FamCharges61to90_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),",SUM(B.ChargesOver90_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),") AS FamChargesOver90_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),",SUM(B.Credits_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),") AS FamCredits_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),", SUM(B.InsEst_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),") AS procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,ps.ClinicNum,0 AS DateCP,0 AS CpStatus FROM paysplit ps AS CpStatus FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(Patient_",LPAD(MONTH(MonthEndDate),2,"0"),RIGHT(YEAR(MonthEndDate),2),"),0),2) FROM tempagingovertime WHERE Clinic=",c.ClinicNum," OR ",c.ClinicNum,"=-1) AS Patient" ) SEPARATOR " (t3.i*1000+t2.i*100+t1.i*10+t0.i)-1 MONTH-INTERVAL 1 DAY MonthEndDate FROM (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t0, (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t1, (SELECT 0 i UNION 1 MONTH-INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY MonthEndDate DESC ) A INNER JOIN ( SELECT ClinicNum,REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(request,"'",""),'"',''),";","") AS request FROM clinic UNION ALL SELECT 0,'Unassigned' UNION ALL SELECT -1,'Totals' ) c; PREPARE str FROM @cmd; EXECUTE str; DEALLOCATE PREPARE str; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tempagingovertime;

request: List of patients with the same SSN entered.
query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(LName, ', ',FName)SEPARATOR ' | ' ) AS Patients, SSN FROM patient WHERE PatStatus = 0 AND SSN != '' GROUP BY SSN HAVING COUNT(PatNum) > 1

request: Daily payments report like internal report grouped by check, but doesn't break down checks by the provider splits.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-04-01', @ToDate='2014-04-02'; SELECT Pay.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type', Pay.Date, Pay.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', Pay.PatientName AS 'Patient Name (one of)', Pay.Provider, Pay.Clinic, Pay.CheckNum AS 'Check Pay.Amt AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, 'Insurance Payment' AS 'PaymentType', CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date', carrier.CarrierName, MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', claimpayment.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),2) AS 'Amt' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=claimproc.ClinicNum WHERE (claimproc.Status=1 OR claimproc.Status=4) AND claimpayment.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%c/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)), claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum, claimproc.ClinicNum,carrier.CarrierName, clinic.request,claimpayment.CheckNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Clinic', '' AS CheckNum, '' AS 'Amt' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE definition.ItemName END) AS 'PaymentType', CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(payment.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date', NULL AS 'Carrier', MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', payment.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum=paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType=definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON payment.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY payment.PayNum,payment.PayDate,payment.ClinicNum,clinic.request,payment.CheckNum,definition.ItemName ) Pay ORDER BY Pay.ItemOrder,Pay.PaymentType,Pay.Date,Pay.PatientName

request: List of carriers with specified fee schedule attached.
query: SET @FeeSched = '%%'; SELECT carrier.CarrierName,carrier.Address, carrier.Address2, carrier.City, carrier.State, carrier.Zip, feesched.request AS 'Fee Sched' FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.CarrierNum=carrier.CarrierNum INNER JOIN feesched ON feesched.FeeSchedNum = insplan.FeeSched AND feesched.request LIKE @FeeSched

request: List of non-hidden employees
query: SELECT LName, FName, MiddleI FROM employee WHERE IsHidden = 0 ORDER BY LName, FName

request: Daily payments report like internal report without provider split.
