query: SET @FromDate='2017-09-09', @ToDate='2017-09-09'; SELECT Pay.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type', Pay.Date, Pay.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', Pay.PatientName AS 'Patient Name (one of)', Pay.CheckNum AS 'Check Pay.Amt AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, def.ItemName AS 'PaymentType', CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date', carrier.CarrierName, MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', claimpayment.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),2) AS 'Amt' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = claimpayment.PayType LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=claimproc.ClinicNum WHERE (claimproc.Status=1 OR claimproc.Status=4) AND claimpayment.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Clinic', '' AS CheckNum, '' AS 'Amt' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE definition.ItemName END) AS 'PaymentType', CONVERT(DATE_FORMAT(payment.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),CHAR(25)) AS 'Date', NULL AS 'Carrier', MAX(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI)) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', payment.CheckNum, FORMAT(SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum=paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType=definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON payment.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY payment.PayNum ) Pay ORDER BY Pay.ItemOrder,Pay.PaymentType,Pay.Date,Pay.PatientName

request: List of procedure codes with provider or clinic specific fees. For fee schedules that were/are unchecked for "Use Global Fees".
query: SELECT IFNULL(provider.Abbr,clinic.request) AS 'Clinic\\Prov', feesched.request AS 'Fee Schedule', procedurecode.ProcCode, fee.Amount AS $Amount_ FROM fee INNER JOIN feesched ON fee.FeeSched = feesched.FeeSchedNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = fee.CodeNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = fee.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON fee.ClinicNum = clinic.ClinicNum WHERE (fee.ProvNum > 0 OR fee.ClinicNum > 0) ORDER BY provider.ProvNum, clinic.ClinicNum

request: Insurance Plans Report
query: SET @Carrier='%%'; SELECT carrier.CarrierName, CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS SubscriberName, carrier.Phone, insplan.Groupname FROM insplan INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.PlanNum=insplan.PlanNum INNER JOIN patient ON inssub.Subscriber=patient.PatNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=insplan.CarrierNum AND carrier.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM patplan WHERE patplan.InsSubNum=inssub.InsSubNum) ORDER BY carrier.CarrierName,patient.LName

request: List of possible duplicate patient entries.
query: SELECT PatNum AS PatID, LName, FName, COUNT(*) FROM patient WHERE PatStatus < 4 GROUP BY LName, FName HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY LName, FName;

request: Insurance payments in date range grouped by carrier, payment type, and pay date.
query: SET @StartDate='2017-04-01', @EndDate='2017-04-30'; SET @PaymentType = '%EFT%'; SET @RunningTot = 0; SELECT A.PayDate AS 'Pay Date', A.CarrierName, A.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type', FORMAT(A.PaymentAmt,2) AS 'Payment Amt', (CASE WHEN A.ItemOrder = 2 THEN FORMAT(@RunningTot := (@RunningTot +A.PaymentAmt), 2) WHEN A.ItemOrder = 1 THEN ' ELSE NULL END) AS RunningTot FROM( SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y')AS PayDate, c.CarrierName, d.ItemName AS PaymentType, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'PaymentAmt' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpy ON cpy.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=cpy.PayType AND d.ItemName LIKE @PaymentType WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate AND (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) GROUP BY cp.DateCP, c.CarrierName UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,'Date Range:' AS PayDate,'' AS CarrierName, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@StartDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT(@EndDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS PaymentType,NULL AS '$PaymentAmt_' ) A ORDER BY A.ItemOrder,A.PayDate,A.CarrierName,A.PaymentType

request: List of patients on the new discount plans feature. Version 16.4 - 20.4
query: SELECT p.LName ,p.FName ,dp.request AS 'Discount Plan' FROM patient p INNER JOIN discountplan dp ON p.DiscountPlanNum = dp.DiscountPlanNum WHERE p.PatStatus != 4 ORDER BY LName, FName

request: New Patients count for a given date range.  Active patients only.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-12-31'; SELECT COUNT(newpat.FirstVisit) AS 'NewPatCount' , COUNT(newpatsched.PatNum) AS 'NewSchedPat' , COUNT(newpat.FirstVisit)+COUNT(newpatsched.PatNum) AS 'Total' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT fv.PatNum , fv.FirstVisit FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum , MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS 'FirstVisit' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND p.PatStatus = 0 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) fv WHERE fv.FirstVisit BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY fv.PatNum ) newpat ON newpat.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT apt.PatNum FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = apt.PatNum AND p.PatStatus = 0 LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON apt.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE ISNULL(pl.ProcNum) AND apt.AptStatus IN (1, 4) AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY apt.PatNum ) newpatsched ON newpatsched.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0

request: Payment Plan Aging report. Shows all aged columns based on payplancharge date of overdue amount.
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SELECT B.PatNum, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN B.Payments<B.ChargesOver90+B.Charges61to90+B.Charges31to60 THEN B.Charges0to30 WHEN B.ChargesOver90+B.Charges61to90+B.Charges31to60+B.Charges0to30<=B.Payments THEN 0 ELSE B.ChargesOver90+B.Charges61to90+B.Charges31to60+B.Charges0to30-B.Payments END) ,2),2) AS 0to30_, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN B.Payments<B.ChargesOver90+B.Charges61to90 THEN B.Charges31to60 WHEN B.ChargesOver90+B.Charges61to90+B.Charges31to60<=B.Payments THEN 0 ELSE B.ChargesOver90+B.Charges61to90+B.Charges31to60-B.Payments END) ,2),2) AS 31to60_, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN B.Payments<=B.ChargesOver90 THEN B.Charges61to90 WHEN B.ChargesOver90+B.Charges61to90<=B.Payments THEN 0 ELSE B.ChargesOver90+B.Charges61to90-B.Payments END) ,2),2) AS 61to90_, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN B.Payments>=B.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE B.ChargesOver90-B.Payments END) ,2),2) AS Over90_, FORMAT(SUM(B.OutstandingBal),2) AS OutstandingBal_, FORMAT(SUM(B.PayPlanPrincCharges),2) AS TotPrincipal_, B.LastPaymentOfType FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.PayPlanNum, SUM((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS OutstandingBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Payments, SUM((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType='PayPlanPrincCharge' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS PayPlanPrincCharges, MAX(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PayPlanPayments' THEN RawPatTrans.TranSubType ELSE '0001-01-01' END) AS LastPaymentOfType FROM ( SELECT 'PayPlanPrincCharge' AS TranType,PatNum AS PatNum,ppc.PayPlanNum AS PayPlanNum,ppc.ChargeDate AS TranDate,ppc.Principal AS TranAmount,'' AS TranSubType,ppc.ChargeType FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ChargeType = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanIntCharge' AS TranType,PatNum AS PatNum,ppc.PayPlanNum AS PayPlanNum,ppc.ChargeDate AS TranDate,ppc.Interest AS TranAmount,'' AS TranSubType,ppc.ChargeType FROM payplancharge ppc UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanPayments' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.PayPlanNum AS PayPlanNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,def.ItemName AS TranSubType,'' AS ChargeType FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=pay.PayType WHERE ps.PayPlanNum!=0 ) RawPatTrans GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PayPlanNum ) B GROUP BY B.PayPlanNum

request: List of patients who were created in Open Dental in user specified date range showing current primary carrier, first appointment date and first referral from source, if any
query: SET @FromDate="2017-10-01", @ToDate="2023-10-31"; SET @PatStatuses="Patient"; SET @Clinics=""; SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT result.Patient, result.Age, result.Zip, IFNULL(result.refname, 'NONE') AS 'Referral', IFNULL(result.CarrierName, 'NONE') AS 'Primary Ins', result.DateAdded, result.FirstAptDate FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum, CONCAT(patient.LName, ', ', patient.FName) AS 'Patient', patient.SecDateEntry AS 'DateAdded', IFNULL(firstapt.DateFirstApt,'No Appointment') AS 'FirstAptDate', IFNULL(CONCAT(referral.LName,IF(referral.FName='','',','),referral.FName),'NONE') AS 'RefName', IFNULL(car1.CarrierName,'NONE') AS 'CarrierName', IF(patient.Birthdate = '0001-01-01','UNKNOWN',(YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5))) AS 'Age', IF(patient.Zip = '','UNKNOWN',patient.Zip) AS 'Zip' FROM patient LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ap.PatNum, MIN(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'DateFirstApt' FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY ap.PatNum ) firstapt ON firstapt.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp1 ON pp1.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND pp1.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN inssub iss1 ON pp1.InsSubNum = iss1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum = iss1.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car1 ON car1.CarrierNum = ip1.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN refattach ON patient.PatNum = refattach.PatNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 AND refattach.ItemOrder = ( SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.PatNum = refattach.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1) LEFT JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum = refattach.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = patient.ClinicNum WHERE IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, "None"), @Clinics)) AND patient.SecDateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND patient.PatStatus != 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(ELT(patient.PatStatus + 1, 'Patient', 'NonPatient', 'Inactive', 'Archived', 'Deleted', 'Deceased', 'Prospective'), @PatStatuses) GROUP BY patient.PatNum ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName ) result UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Total: ', COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum) AS 'Patient', '','','','','' FROM patient LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ap.PatNum, MIN(ap.AptDateTime) DateFirstApt FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY ap.PatNum HAVING dateFirstApt BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) firstapt ON firstapt.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp1 ON pp1.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND pp1.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN inssub iss1 ON pp1.InsSubNum = iss1.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum = iss1.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car1 ON car1.CarrierNum = ip1.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN refattach ON patient.PatNum = refattach.PatNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 AND refattach.ItemOrder = ( SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.PatNum = refattach.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1) LEFT JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum = refattach.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = patient.ClinicNum WHERE IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, "None"), @Clinics)) AND patient.SecDateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND patient.PatStatus != 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(ELT(patient.PatStatus + 1, 'Patient', 'NonPatient', 'Inactive', 'Archived', 'Deleted', 'Deceased', 'Prospective'), @PatStatuses)

request: Scheduled Ops and their open times.
query: SET @StartDate = '2023-12-11', @EndDate = '2023-12-15'; SET @PeriodLength=60; SET @pos=-1; SELECT o.OpName ,DATE_FORMAT(schedule.SchedDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ScheduleDate' ,times.Time ,(CASE WHEN (appointment.AptNum) IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS HasAppt FROM ( SELECT TIME('0001-01-01 00:00:00' + INTERVAL (@PeriodLength * (@pos := @pos + 1)) MINUTE) TIME FROM preference WHERE @pos < ((24*60/@PeriodLength)-1) )times INNER JOIN SCHEDULE ON schedule.StartTime <= times.Time AND schedule.StopTime > times.Time AND schedule.SchedDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate INNER JOIN scheduleop so ON schedule.ScheduleNum = so.ScheduleNum INNER JOIN operatory o ON so.OperatoryNum = o.OperatoryNum LEFT JOIN appointment ON ((TIME(appointment.AptDateTime) <= times.Time AND TIME(appointment.AptDateTime + INTERVAL (LENGTH(appointment.Pattern) * 5) MINUTE) > times.Time) OR (TIME(appointment.AptDateTime) > times.Time AND TIME(appointment.AptDateTime) < TIME(times.Time + INTERVAL @PeriodLength MINUTE))) AND DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) = schedule.SchedDate AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND o.OperatoryNum = appointment.Op GROUP BY so.OperatoryNum, schedule.SchedDate, times.Time ORDER BY OpName,SchedDate, TIME;

request: List of patients with a positive balance who were referred from a user specified source by last or first name of the referral.
query: SET @FromDate='', @ToDate=''; SET @RefLName = '%%'; SET @RefFName = '%%'; SET @RefNote = '%%'; SET @AsOf = CURDATE(); SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT p.LName, p.FName, refinfo.Referral, FORMAT(SUM(TranAmount),2) AS $PatBalCur_ FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT refa.PatNum, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(ref.LName, ', ', ref.FName) ORDER BY ref.LName SEPARATOR ' | ') AS Referral FROM refattach refa INNER JOIN referral ref ON refa.ReferralNum = ref.ReferralNum AND (ref.LName LIKE @RefLName AND ref.FName LIKE @RefFName) WHERE refa.Note LIKE @RefNote AND refa.RefType = 1 AND (CASE WHEN @FromDate != '' THEN refa.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY refa.PatNum ) refinfo ON p.PatNum = refinfo.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 1 THEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 ELSE TRUE END) AND ps.DatePay <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND a.AdjDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion=1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= @AsOf GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanCharge' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion=2 AND ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf ) aging ON aging.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY aging.PatNum HAVING $PatBalCur_ > 0.005 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, refinfo.Referral

request: Confirmation list of patient appointments and insurance benefit info, if any
query: SET @FromDate='2017-03-29' , @ToDate='2017-03-31'; SET @GeneralCoverageCategoryName='General'; SELECT a.PatNum, (SELECT HmPhone FROM patient WHERE PatNum=a.PatNum) HmPhone, (SELECT IF(Birthdate='0001-01-01','',(YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate))) FROM patient WHERE PatNum=a.PatNum) AS 'Age', IF(iplan.DateLastVerified='0001-01-01','',IFNULL((DATE_FORMAT(iplan.DateLastVerified,'%m/%d/%Y')),'*No Insurance*')) AS PlanEligibilityLastVerified, IF(iben.DateLastVerified='0001-01-01','',IFNULL((DATE_FORMAT(iben.DateLastVerified,'%m/%d/%Y')),'*No Insurance*')) AS BenefitsLastVerified, IFNULL(inssub.SubscriberID,'*No Insurance*') AS SubscriberID, DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y')AS 'DateApt', DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%h:%i %p') AS 'AptTime', IFNULL(ca.CarrierName, '*No Insurance*') AS 'Carrier', IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT((CASE WHEN b.TimePeriod=1 AND ip.MonthRenew<=MONTH(CURDATE()) AND IFNULL(ip.MonthRenew,0)>0 THEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-',ip.MonthRenew,'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') WHEN b.TimePeriod=1 AND ip.MonthRenew>MONTH(CURDATE()) AND IFNULL(ip.MonthRenew,13)<13 THEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE())-1, '-',ip.MonthRenew,'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') WHEN b.TimePeriod=2 THEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') WHEN NOT ISNULL(ca.CarrierName) THEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') END ),'%m/%d/%Y'),'*No Insurance*') AS 'Renew', IFNULL(IF(inssub.SubscriberID IS NULL,NULL,IFNULL(FORMAT(MIN(b.MonetaryAmt),2),'')),'*No Insurance*') AS 'AnnualMax_', IF(pp.PatNum IS NULL,'*No Insurance*',FORMAT((SELECT IFNULL(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),0) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1, 3, 4) AND claimproc.PatNum=a.PatNum AND claimproc.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum AND claimproc.ProcDate BETWEEN CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01-01') AND CURDATE() ),2)) AS 'AmtUsed_', IF(pp.PatNum IS NULL,'*No Insurance*',FORMAT(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(IFNULL(claimproc.InsPayEst,0)) AS AmtPending FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patplan ON claimproc.PatNum = patplan.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 WHERE claimproc.Status IN (0) AND YEAR(claimproc.ProcDate)=YEAR(CURDATE()) AND claimproc.PatNum = a.PatNum AND ip.PlanNum = claimproc.PlanNum GROUP BY patplan.PatNum ),0),2)) AS 'InsPending_', IF(ISNULL(pp.PatNum),'*No Insurance',IF(b.MonetaryAmt IS NULL,'',FORMAT(IF(b.MonetaryAmt IS NULL,'',IFNULL((CASE WHEN MIN(b.MonetaryAmt) IS NULL AND inssub.SubscriberID IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE IFNULL(((MIN(b.MonetaryAmt)-IFNULL((SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1, 3, 4) AND claimproc.PatNum=a.PatNum AND claimproc.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum AND claimproc.ProcDate BETWEEN CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01-01') AND CURDATE() ),0))),'')END),'*No Insurance*')- IF(pp.PatNum IS NULL,'*No Insurance*',(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(IFNULL(claimproc.InsPayEst,0)) AS AmtPending FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patplan ON claimproc.PatNum = patplan.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 WHERE claimproc.Status IN (0) AND YEAR(claimproc.ProcDate)=YEAR(CURDATE()) AND claimproc.PatNum = a.PatNum AND ip.PlanNum = claimproc.PlanNum GROUP BY patplan.PatNum ),0)))),2))) AS 'InsBenRemaining_', FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(pl.ProcFee),0),2) AS 'ApptFee_', IF(pp.PatNum IS NULL,'*No Insurance*',FORMAT(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum),0),2)) AS 'TotalApptInsEst_', IF(ISNULL(pp.PatNum),'*No Insurance*',IF(b.MonetaryAmt IS NULL,'',FORMAT(IF(b.MonetaryAmt IS NULL,'',IF(b.MonetaryAmt IS NULL,'',IFNULL((CASE WHEN MIN(b.MonetaryAmt) IS NULL AND inssub.SubscriberID IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE IFNULL(((MIN(b.MonetaryAmt)-IFNULL((SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1, 3, 4) AND claimproc.PatNum=a.PatNum AND claimproc.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum AND claimproc.ProcDate BETWEEN CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01-01') AND CURDATE() ),0))),'')END),'*No Insurance*')- IF(pp.PatNum IS NULL,'*No Insurance*',(IFNULL((SELECT SUM(IFNULL(claimproc.InsPayEst,0)) AS AmtPending FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patplan ON claimproc.PatNum = patplan.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 WHERE claimproc.Status IN (0) AND YEAR(claimproc.ProcDate)=YEAR(CURDATE()) AND claimproc.PatNum = a.PatNum AND ip.PlanNum = claimproc.PlanNum GROUP BY patplan.PatNum ),0)))) - IFNULL((SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum),0)),2))) AS 'EstInsBenRemain_' FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON a.PatNum=pp.PatNum LEFT JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum LEFT JOIN benefit b ON b.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum AND b.BenefitType=5 AND b.TimePeriod IN(1,2) AND (b.CovCatNum=0 OR b.CovCatNum=(SELECT CovCatNum FROM covcat WHERE covcat.request=@GeneralCoverageCategoryName AND covcat.EbenefitCat=1)) AND b.Percent=-1 AND b.QuantityQualifier=0 AND b.Quantity=0 AND b.CodeNum=0 AND b.PatPlanNum=0 LEFT JOIN insverify iben ON iben.FKey = ip.PlanNum AND iben.VerifyType = 1 LEFT JOIN insverify iplan ON iplan.FKey = pp.PatPlanNum AND iplan.VerifyType = 2 LEFT JOIN covcat c ON b.CovCatNum=c.CovCatNum AND c.EbenefitCat=1 WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus=1 GROUP BY a.AptNum, inssub.PlanNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, a.PatNum, pp.Ordinal;

request: Payment Plan report for patients with open payment plans. Shows info from the pay plan including payments and amounts due.
query: SELECT B.Patient, B.Ins, B.Principal AS OriginalBalance, B.Paid, B.Bal AS OutstandingBalance, B.DueThisMonth AS AmtDueThisMonth, B.PaidLastMonth, B.AllPreCharges AS PastDueBalance FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, CONCAT(A.LName,', ',(CASE WHEN A.Preferred!='' THEN CONCAT('\'',A.Preferred,'\' ') ELSE '' END),A.FName,' ',A.MiddleI) AS Patient, (CASE WHEN A.PlanNum=0 THEN '' ELSE 'X' END) AS Ins, FORMAT(A.Principal,2) AS Principal, FORMAT(A.PatPaid+A.InsPaid,2) AS Paid, FORMAT(A.Principal-(A.PatPaid+A.InsPaid),2) Bal, FORMAT(COALESCE(A.AllPreCharges-(A.PatPaid+A.InsPaid),0),2) AS AllPreCharges, FORMAT(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Principal) FROM payplancharge WHERE A.PayPlanNum = payplancharge.PayPlanNum AND ChargeType = 0 AND YEAR(ChargeDate) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(ChargeDate) = MONTH(CURDATE())),0),2) AS DueThisMonth, FORMAT(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE A.PayPlanNum = paysplit.PayPlanNum AND YEAR(paysplit.DatePay) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(paysplit.DatePay) = MONTH(CURDATE()) - 1),0)+COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PayPlanNum = A.PayPlanNum AND YEAR(cp.DateCP) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(cp.DateCP) = MONTH(CURDATE())-1 GROUP BY cp.PayPlanNum),0),2) AS PaidLastMonth FROM( SELECT FName, LName, MiddleI, PlanNum, Preferred, payplan.PayPlanNum, payplan.PatNum, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum=payplan.PayPlanNum ),0) PatPaid, pastdue.ToTPrincipal Principal, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum GROUP BY cp.PayPlanNum),0) AS InsPaid, pastdue.AllPreCharges AllPreCharges FROM payplan INNER JOIN ( SELECT ppc.PayPlanNum, SUM(Principal) AS ToTPrincipal, SUM(IF(ChargeDate <= CURDATE(),Principal,0)) AS AllPreCharges FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeType = 0 GROUP BY ppc.PayPlanNum )pastdue ON pastdue.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=payplan.PatNum WHERE payplan.IsClosed != 1 GROUP BY payplan.PayPlanNum ) A UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, 'Totals:' AS Patient, '' AS Ins, FORMAT(SUM(A.Principal),2) AS Principal, FORMAT(SUM(A.PatPaid)+SUM(A.InsPaid),2) AS Paid, FORMAT(SUM(A.Principal)-(SUM(A.PatPaid)+SUM(A.InsPaid)),2) Bal, FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(A.AllPreCharges)-(SUM(A.PatPaid)+SUM(A.InsPaid)),0),2) AS AllPreCharges, FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM((SELECT SUM(Principal) FROM payplancharge WHERE A.PayPlanNum = payplancharge.PayPlanNum AND ChargeType = 0 AND YEAR(ChargeDate) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(ChargeDate) = MONTH(CURDATE()))),0),2) AS DueThisMonth, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE A.PayPlanNum = paysplit.PayPlanNum AND YEAR(paysplit.DatePay) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(paysplit.DatePay) = MONTH(CURDATE()) - 1),0))+SUM(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PayPlanNum = A.PayPlanNum AND YEAR(cp.DateCP) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(cp.DateCP) = MONTH(CURDATE())-1 GROUP BY cp.PayPlanNum),0)),2) AS PaidLastMonth FROM( SELECT FName, LName, MiddleI, PlanNum, Preferred, payplan.PayPlanNum, payplan.PatNum, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum=payplan.PayPlanNum ),0) PatPaid, pastdue.ToTPrincipal Principal, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum GROUP BY cp.PayPlanNum),0) AS InsPaid, pastdue.AllPreCharges AllPreCharges FROM payplan INNER JOIN ( SELECT ppc.PayPlanNum, SUM(Principal) AS ToTPrincipal, SUM(IF(ChargeDate <= CURDATE(),Principal,0)) AS AllPreCharges FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeType = 0 GROUP BY ppc.PayPlanNum )pastdue ON pastdue.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=payplan.PatNum WHERE payplan.IsClosed != 1 GROUP BY payplan.PayPlanNum ) A GROUP BY ItemOrder ) B ORDER BY ItemOrder,Patient;

request: Completed appointment information including average collections for medicaid and non-medicaid appointments in date range by provider.
query: SET @FromDate='2017-04-01', @ToDate='2017-04-30'; SET @Carriers = ""; SET @Carriers=(CASE WHEN @Carriers="" THEN ".*" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Carriers,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SELECT ap.ProvNum, IF(car.CarrierName REGEXP @Carriers,'Medicaid','Non-Medicaid') AS ApptType, COUNT(ap.AptNum) AS ApptCount, FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(inspay.InsPayAmt),0),2)AS InsPayAmt, FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(patpay.PatPayAmt),0),2) AS PatPayAmt, FORMAT((IFNULL(SUM(inspay.InsPayAmt),0)+IFNULL(SUM(patpay.PatPayAmt),0)) / COUNT(ap.AptNum),2) AvgCollections FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ap.InsPlan1 = ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON ip.CarrierNum = car.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName REGEXP @Carriers LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.AptNum, pl.PatNum, IFNULL(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) AS InsPayAmt FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY pl.AptNum )inspay ON ap.AptNum = inspay.AptNum AND ap.PatNum = inspay.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.PatNum, ps.DatePay, SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS PatPayAmt FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay >= @FromDate GROUP BY ps.PayNum )patpay ON ap.PatNum = patpay.PatNum AND patpay.DatePay = DATE(ap.AptDateTime) WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ap.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY ap.ProvNum, ApptType

request: Referral Source counts of new patient appointments by referrer.
query: SET @FromDate='2017-05-01', @ToDate='2017-05-30'; SELECT CONCAT(A.RefLName, ', ', RefFName) AS ReferralSource, COUNT(A.Appts) AS NewPtRefApt FROM ( SELECT r.LName AS RefLName, r.FName AS RefFName, r.ReferralNum, ap.AptNum AS Appts, ap.AptStatus FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN appointment ap ON ap.PatNum = ra.PatNum AND ap.IsNewPatient = TRUE AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ap.AptStatus = 2 INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum WHERE ra.RefType = TRUE )A GROUP BY A.ReferralNum UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT '*NewPtSched = ' AS ReferralSource, COUNT(ap.AptNum) FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN securitylog ON securitylog.FKey = ap.AptNum AND securitylog.LogDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND securitylog.PermType = 25 WHERE ap.IsNewPatient = TRUE AND ap.AptStatus IN (1, 4) UNION ALL SELECT '*NewApptComp = ' AS ReferralSource, COUNT(ap.AptNum) FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.IsNewPatient = TRUE AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ap.AptStatus = 2

request: List of patients who broke their very first appointment before having any procedures completed.
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01', @ToDate='2018-01-31'; SELECT CONCAT(patient.FName,' ',patient.LName) AS Patient, Seclog.LogText FROM Patient INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(securitylog.LogDateTime) BrokenAppt, securitylog.PatNum, securitylog.LogText FROM securitylog WHERE securitylog.PermType = 27 AND securitylog.LogText LIKE '%Broken%' GROUP BY securitylog.PatNum ) Seclog ON Seclog.patnum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MIN(procedurelog.ProcDate) FirstVisit, procedurelog.PatNum FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum ) Visit ON Visit.PatNum = Patient.PatNum WHERE (Seclog.BrokenAppt < Visit.FirstVisit OR Visit.FirstVisit IS NULL) AND Seclog.BrokenAppt BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate

request: Gross Production and active patient visit count by Group Number in a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2016-01-01', @ToDate='2016-12-31'; SELECT insplan.GroupNum,insplan.GroupName, carrier.CarrierName, ROUND(SUM(prod.ProcFee),2) $GrossProd__, COALESCE(Active.PatCount,0) PatCount FROM insplan INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum INNER JOIN claimproc ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcFee, procedurelog.ProcNum FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) Prod ON Prod.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT procedurelog.PatNum,procedurelog.ProcDate) PatCount, insplan.groupnum,insplan.CarrierNum FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.patnum = procedurelog.patnum INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.inssubnum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN CURDATE() - INTERVAL 18 MONTH AND CURDATE() GROUP BY insplan.GroupNum,insplan.CarrierNum ) active ON active.groupnum = insplan.groupnum AND active.CarrierNum=carrier.CarrierNum WHERE prod.ProcFee > 0.00 GROUP BY insplan.groupnum, carrier.CarrierNum ORDER BY PatCount DESC

request: Gross and Net Production by Insurance Type for patient seen in date range and in age range in specified clinic
query: SET @FromDate = '2017-05-05', @ToDate = '2023-05-05'; SET @ClinicAbbr = ''; SET @StartAge = -1, @EndAge = 999; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(c.ClinicNum) INTO @Clinic FROM clinic c WHERE c.Abbr = @ClinicAbbr; SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%y'),' to ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%y')) AS T, '' AS Carrier, LEFT(request,15) AS C, '' AS GrossProd, '' AS NetProd FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.ClinicNum,@Clinic) UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('Age ',@StartAge,' to ',@EndAge) AS T, '' AS Carrier, '' AS C, '' AS GrossProd, '' AS NetProd UNION ALL SELECT 'Patient Count' AS T, '' AS Carrier, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN prod.PatNum !='' THEN prod.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS C, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)),2) AS GrossProd, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(prod.AdjAmt,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(prod.WriteOff,0)),2) AS NetProd FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty),0)) AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY pl.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, adjustment.AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeof FROM adjustment INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=adjustment.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END ) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge WHERE adjustment.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(adjustment.ClinicNum,''),IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY adjustment.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) AND claimproc.DateCp BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(claimproc.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY claimproc.PatNum ) prod UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Public Programs' AS T, '' AS Carrier, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN prod.PatNum !='' THEN prod.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS C, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)),2) AS GrossProd, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(prod.AdjAmt,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(prod.WriteOff,0)),2) AS NetProd FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty),0)) AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType = "f" WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY pl.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, adjustment.AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeof FROM adjustment INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = adjustment.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = adjustment.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType = "f" WHERE adjustment.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(adjustment.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY adjustment.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType = "f" WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) AND claimproc.DateCp BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(claimproc.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY claimproc.PatNum ) prod UNION ALL SELECT '' AS T, prod.Carrier AS Carrier, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN prod.PatNum !='' THEN prod.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS C, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)),2) AS GrossProd, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(prod.AdjAmt,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(prod.WriteOff,0)),2) AS NetProd FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty),0)) AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeoff, CONCAT(carrier.CarrierName,'-',feesched.request) AS Carrier FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType = "f" INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN feesched ON feesched.FeeSchedNum = insplan.FeeSched WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY pl.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName, feesched.request UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, adjustment.AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeof, CONCAT(carrier.CarrierName,'-',feesched.request) AS Carrier FROM adjustment INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = adjustment.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = adjustment.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType = "f" INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN feesched ON feesched.FeeSchedNum = insplan.FeeSched WHERE adjustment.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(adjustment.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY adjustment.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName,feesched.request UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) AS Writeoff, CONCAT(carrier.CarrierName,'-',feesched.request) AS Carrier FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType = "f" INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN feesched ON feesched.FeeSchedNum = insplan.FeeSched WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) AND claimproc.DateCp BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(claimproc.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY claimproc.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName,feesched.request ) prod GROUP BY prod.Carrier UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Commercial Ins' AS T, '' AS Carrier, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN prod.PatNum !='' THEN prod.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS C, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)),2) AS GrossProd, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(prod.AdjAmt,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(prod.WriteOff,0)),2) AS NetProd FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty),0)) AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType != "f" WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY pl.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, adjustment.AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeof FROM adjustment INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = adjustment.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = adjustment.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType != "f" WHERE adjustment.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(adjustment.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY adjustment.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType != "f" WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) AND claimproc.DateCp BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(claimproc.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY claimproc.PatNum ) prod UNION ALL SELECT '' AS T, prod.Carrier AS Carrier, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN prod.PatNum !='' THEN prod.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS C, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)),2) AS GrossProd, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(prod.AdjAmt,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(prod.WriteOff,0)),2) AS NetProd FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty),0)) AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeoff, carrier.CarrierName AS Carrier FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType != "f" INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY pl.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, adjustment.AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeof, carrier.CarrierName AS Carrier FROM adjustment INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = adjustment.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = adjustment.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType != "f" INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum WHERE adjustment.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(adjustment.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY adjustment.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) AS Writeoff, carrier.CarrierName AS Carrier FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType != "f" INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) AND claimproc.DateCp BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(claimproc.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) GROUP BY claimproc.PatNum, carrier.CarrierName ) prod GROUP BY prod.Carrier UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Uninsured' AS T, '' AS Carrier, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN prod.PatNum !='' THEN prod.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) AS C, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)),2) AS GrossProd, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(prod.ProcFee,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(prod.AdjAmt,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(prod.WriteOff,0)),2) AS NetProd FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty),0)) AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND (CASE WHEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(@FromDate)-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(@FromDate,5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) ELSE -1 END) BETWEEN @StartAge AND @EndAge LEFT JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) AND patplan.PatNum IS NULL GROUP BY pl.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, adjustment.AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt, 0 AS Writeof FROM adjustment LEFT JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = adjustment.PatNum WHERE adjustment.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(adjustment.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) AND patplan.PatNum IS NULL GROUP BY adjustment.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT '' AS PatNum, '' AS AdjNum, 0 AS ProcFee, 0 AS AdjAmt, SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) AND claimproc.DateCp BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(claimproc.ClinicNum,IFNULL(@Clinic,0)) AND patplan.PatNum IS NULL GROUP BY claimproc.PatNum ) prod

request:
Production and income by procedure date with provider payment calculated as a specified percentage of collections.
Useful for paying providers on a percentage of collections.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Prov=''; SET @PayPercent=0.35; SET @Prov=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Prov)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@Prov, ',', '$|^'), ',', '$|^'), '$') END); SELECT IF(result.Date='ZZZZZ','',DATE_FORMAT(result.Date,'%m/%d/%y')) AS 'TranDate' ,result.Patient ,FORMAT(result.Prod,2) AS 'Prod' ,FORMAT(result.Adjustment,2) AS 'Adjustment' ,FORMAT(result.WriteOff,2) AS 'WriteOff' ,IFNULL(result.CarrierName,'') AS 'Carrier' ,FORMAT(result.InsPay,2) AS 'InsPay' ,FORMAT(result.PatPay,2) AS 'PatPay' ,FORMAT(result.TotalPay,2) AS 'TotalPay' ,FORMAT(result.Balance,2) AS 'Balance' ,result.PayPerc AS 'ProvPay' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee *(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) AS 'Prod' ,COALESCE(SUM(adj.Adjustment),0) AS 'Adjustment' ,COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'WriteOff' ,cp.CarrierName ,COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) AS 'InsPay' ,COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0) AS 'PatPay' ,(COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) + COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0)) AS 'TotalPay' ,( ( SUM(pl.ProcFee *(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) + COALESCE(SUM(adj.Adjustment),0) - COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) ) - ( (COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) + COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0)) ) ) AS 'Balance' ,'' AS 'PayPerc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr REGEXP @Prov LEFT JOIN( SELECT cp.ProcNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT claimpayment.CarrierName) AS 'CarrierName' ,SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'WriteOff' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT ps.ProcNum ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PatPay' FROM paysplit ps GROUP BY ps.ProcNum ) ps ON ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT SUM(ad.AdjAmt) AS 'Adjustment' ,ad.ProcNum FROM adjustment ad GROUP BY ad.ProcNum ) adj ON adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.ProcDate, pl.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,' DayTotal:' AS 'Patient' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee *(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) AS 'Prod' ,COALESCE(SUM(adj.Adjustment),0) AS 'Adjustment' ,COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'WriteOff' ,'' AS 'CarrierName' ,COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) AS 'InsPay' ,COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0) AS 'PatPay' ,(COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) + COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0)) AS 'TotalPay' ,( ( SUM(pl.ProcFee *(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) + COALESCE(SUM(adj.Adjustment),0) - COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) ) - ( (COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) + COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0)) ) ) AS 'Balance' ,FORMAT((COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) + COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0)) * @PayPercent,2) AS 'PayPerc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr REGEXP @Prov LEFT JOIN( SELECT cp.ProcNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT claimpayment.CarrierName) AS 'CarrierName' ,SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'WriteOff' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT ps.ProcNum ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PatPay' FROM paysplit ps GROUP BY ps.ProcNum ) ps ON ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT SUM(ad.AdjAmt) AS 'Adjustment' ,ad.ProcNum FROM adjustment ad GROUP BY ad.ProcNum ) adj ON adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.ProcDate UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder ,'ZZZZZ' AS 'Date' ,'Grand Total:' AS 'Patient' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee *(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) AS 'Prod' ,COALESCE(SUM(adj.Adjustment),0) AS 'Adjustment' ,COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'WriteOff' ,'' AS 'CarrierName' ,COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) AS 'InsPay' ,COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0) AS 'PatPay' ,(COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) + COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0)) AS 'TotalPay' ,( ( SUM(pl.ProcFee *(pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) + COALESCE(SUM(adj.Adjustment),0) - COALESCE(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) ) - ( (COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) + COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0)) ) ) AS 'Balance' ,FORMAT((COALESCE(SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0) + COALESCE(SUM(ps.PatPay),0)) * @PayPercent,2) AS 'PayPerc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr REGEXP @Prov LEFT JOIN( SELECT cp.ProcNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT claimpayment.CarrierName) AS 'CarrierName' ,SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'WriteOff' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT ps.ProcNum ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PatPay' FROM paysplit ps GROUP BY ps.ProcNum ) ps ON ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT SUM(ad.AdjAmt) AS 'Adjustment' ,ad.ProcNum FROM adjustment ad GROUP BY ad.ProcNum ) adj ON adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 ) result ORDER BY result.Date, result.ItemOrder

request: New patients in date range including referral source, doctor and hygienist seen on first visit, and cumulative gross production and current Scheduled and Unscheduled treatment planned value.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-05-01', @ToDate='2022-05-31'; SET @Clinic=''; SET @Clinic=(CASE WHEN @Clinic='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinic,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT p.PatNum ,ra.RefSource ,DATE_FORMAT(fv.FirstVisit, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'FirstVisit' ,( SELECT DISTINCT provider.Abbr FROM provider INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE provider.IsSecondary = 0 AND procedurelog.ProcDate = fv.FirstVisit AND procedurelog.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcDate ) AS 'Dr' ,( SELECT DISTINCT provider.Abbr FROM provider INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE provider.IsSecondary = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcDate = fv.FirstVisit AND procedurelog.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcDate ) AS 'Hyg' ,FORMAT(procs.Comp,2) AS 'CompValue' ,FORMAT(procs.Sched,2) AS 'SchedValue' ,FORMAT(procs.Unsched,2) AS 'UnschedValue' ,DATE_FORMAT(( SELECT MIN(appointment.AptDateTime) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.AptDateTime >= CURDATE() AND appointment.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND appointment.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY appointment.PatNum ),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'NextVisit' ,COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'None') AS 'Clinic' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ra.PatNum ,MIN(r.ReferralNum) ,(CASE WHEN r.FName = '' THEN r.LName WHEN r.Title = '' THEN CONCAT(r.LName, ', ', r.FName) ELSE CONCAT(r.LName, ' ' ,r.Title, ', ', r.FName) END) AS 'RefSource' FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum WHERE ra.RefType = 1 GROUP BY ra.PatNum ) ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS FirstVisit FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate <= @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum HAVING FirstVisit BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) fv ON fv.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,SUM(CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus = 2 THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) ELSE 0 END) AS 'Comp' ,SUM(CASE WHEN ap.AptNum IS NOT NULL AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) ELSE 0 END) AS 'Sched' ,SUM(CASE WHEN ap.AptNum IS NULL AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) ELSE 0 END) AS 'Unsched' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND ap.AptDateTime >= CURDATE() WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND pl.ProcDate >= @FromDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) procs ON procs.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinic) = 0, TRUE, COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'None') REGEXP @Clinic)

request: Annual production and income report with writeoffs by insurance payment date.  Like internal.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-08-02', @ToDate='2017-08-02'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(result.Date,'%b %Y') AS 'Date', FORMAT(SUM(result.Fee),2) AS '$Production_', FORMAT(SUM(result.Adj),2) AS '$Adjust_', FORMAT(SUM(result.InsW),2) AS '$Writeoff_', FORMAT(SUM(result.Fee+result.Adj+result.InsW),2) AS '$Total Prod_', FORMAT(SUM(result.PtInc),2) AS '$Pt Income_', FORMAT(SUM(result.InsInc),2) AS '$Ins Income_', FORMAT(SUM(result.PtInc+result.InsInc),2) AS '$Total Income_' FROM ( SELECT DATE(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date', CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', pc.Descript AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status='7' LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date', CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', adjtype.ItemName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', 0 AS 'Fee', adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum=adj.AdjType INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=adj.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date', CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(p.LName,', '),p.FName),' '),p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', CONCAT(CONCAT(pc.AbbrDesc,' '),car.CarrierName) AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', -SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND cp.WriteOff > '.0001' AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', paytype.ItemName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc', 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum=ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType=paytype.DefNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=ps.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=ps.ClinicNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.PatNum,ps.ProvNum,ps.ClinicNum,PayType,ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', car.CarrierName AS 'request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', 0 AS 'Fee', 0 AS 'Adj', 0 AS 'InsW', 0 AS 'PtInc', SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum=cp.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum WHERE (cp.Status=1 OR cp.Status=4) AND claimpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum,cp.PlanNum,cp.ClinicNum,claimpay.CheckDate ) result GROUP BY MONTH(result.Date) ORDER BY result.Date

request: Mailing information from guarantors of active patients seen in the date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-01-01', @ToDate='2023-12-31'; SELECT g.LName , g.FName , g.Address , g.Address2 , g.City , g.State , g.Zip FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND LENGTH(g.Zip) > 4 GROUP BY g.PatNum ORDER BY g.LName, g.FName

request: List of carriers with no fee schedule attached.
query: SELECT carrier.CarrierName,carrier.Address, carrier.Address2, carrier.City, carrier.State, carrier.Zip FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.CarrierNum=carrier.CarrierNum WHERE insplan.FeeSched = 0

request: Active patient report like internal with added fields.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-01-01' , @ToDate='2017-09-30'; SELECT patient.PatNum,patient.LName,patient.FName,patient.MiddleI,patient.Preferred, carrier.CarrierName,patient.BillingType, IFNULL(clinic.Abbr, 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic', patient.PriProv,patient.SecProv, patient.Email, patient.HmPhone,patient.WkPhone,patient.WirelessPhone, patient.Address,patient.Address2,patient.City,patient.State,patient.Zip FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=procedurelog.PatNum AND PatStatus=0 LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = patient.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum=patient.PatNum AND patplan.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum=patplan.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=patient.PriProv WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY patient.PatNum ORDER BY patient.ClinicNum,provider.Abbr,patient.LName,patient.FName

request: List of patients currently using Discount Plan feature. v16.4+
query: SET @RowPos =0; SELECT @RowPos:=@RowPos +1 AS 'Row tabledata.* FROM ( SELECT dp.request AS DiscountPlan, CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS Patient, p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.State, p.Zip, p.Email, p.HmPhone, p.WkPhone, p.WirelessPhone FROM patient p INNER JOIN discountplan dp ON p.DiscountPlanNum = dp.DiscountPlanNum WHERE p.DiscountPlanNum > 0 ORDER BY dp.request, p.LName, p.FName ) tabledata

request: List of Patients in alphabetical with an appointment on the specified date.
query: SET @Date='2017-10-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient, apt.AptDateTime FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = apt.PatNum WHERE DATE(apt.AptDateTime) = @Date AND apt.AptStatus IN (1,4) ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Payment plan charges for a single day with totals by provider and a grand total
query: SET @ChargeDay = '2017-06-07'; SELECT IF(patient.PatNum IS NULL,CONCAT(provider.Abbr,' Totals:'),provider.Abbr) AS Provider, IFNULL(CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName),'') PatName, pc.ChargeDate, FORMAT(ROUND(pc.principal,2),2) Principal FROM ( SELECT ppc.PatNum,ppc.ProvNum, ppc.ChargeDate,ppc.Principal FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ChargeDate = @ChargeDay UNION ALL SELECT 'Totals',pc.ProvNum,'',SUM(pc.principal) FROM payplancharge pc WHERE ChargeDate=@ChargeDay GROUP BY pc.ProvNum ORDER BY ProvNum, Principal, (PatNum = "Prov Total") )AS pc LEFT JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = pc.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = pc.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Grand Total:','','',FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(p.Principal),2),2) FROM payplancharge p WHERE ChargeDate = @ChargeDay

request: Patients seen between two dates, that do not have an appointment (Scheduled or complete) after a specific date
query: SET @SeenFrom='2021-02-01', @SeenTo='2021-02-28'; SET @NoApptAfter='2021-02-28'; SET @Pos = 0; SELECT @Pos := @Pos +1 AS 'Count', a.LName, a.Fname, a.DateLastVisit, a.Address, a.Address2, a.City, a.State, a.Zip, a.HmPhone, a.WkPhone, a.WirelessPhone, a.HasIns, a.$TpAmt_ FROM ( SELECT p.LName, p.FName, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(lastseen.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'DateLastVisit', p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.State, p.Zip, p.HmPhone, p.WkPhone, p.WirelessPhone, (CASE WHEN p.HasIns = 'I' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) AS 'HasIns', t1.TpAmt AS '$TpAmt_', ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ap.PatNum) FROM appointment ap WHERE DATE(ap.AptDateTime) >= @NoApptAfter AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,2) AND ap.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS AptAfter FROM appointment appt INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = appt.PatNum INNER JOIN appointment lastseen ON lastseen.PatNum = p.PatNum AND lastseen.AptStatus = 2 AND DATE(lastseen.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @SeenFrom AND CURDATE() LEFT JOIN( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS 'TpAmt', pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE ProcStatus = 1 GROUP BY PatNum )t1 ON t1.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE DATE(appt.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @SeenFrom AND @SeenTo AND appt.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY p.PatNum HAVING ISNULL(AptAfter) ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName )a;

request: Insurance and patient estimates within date range for procedures done on future appointments
query: SET @FromDate='2009-03-29', @ToDate='2009-05-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.FName,' ', p.LName) Patient, a.AptDateTime, c.CarrierName, COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode),'None') ProcCode, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM((CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE cp.InsEstTotal END)),2),2) InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - SUM((CASE WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE cp.InsEstTotal END)) - SUM((CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride ELSE (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN cp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END) END)),2),2) PatientEst FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus = 1 LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN inssub i ON pp.InsSubNum = i.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=i.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum WHERE DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime ASC;

request: Scheduled patients with an insurance overpayment
query: SET @FromDate='2023-05-01', @ToDate='2023-05-31'; SELECT overpaid.Patient , overpaid.Apt 'Appointment' , overpaid.DateService , FORMAT(ROUND(overpaid.Amount,2),2) Amount FROM ( SELECT patApt.Patient , patApt.Apt , c.DateService , (pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) - SUM(cp.InsPayAmt+cp.WriteOff) AS Amount FROM( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ', p.FName)Patient , p.PatNum , MIN(a.AptDateTime)Apt FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY patient )patApt INNER JOIN claim c ON c.PatNum=patApt.PatNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum=c.ClaimNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum GROUP BY pl.ProcNum HAVING Amount < 0 )overpaid;

request:
Net Production (with PPO writeoffs removed by procedure date, other adjustments not considered) and Income by referral source for date range, KEY POINT: only includes referrals received and income 
collected during that period,whereas some other reports may report residual income form referrals before defined date range, also returns TP fee total, note: duplicates for multiple 'from' referrals in period
query: SET @FromDate = '2018-01-01', @ToDate = '2018-01-31'; SELECT ref.Source, ref.PatNum, COALESCE((prd.Prod),0) AS "$Prod (Gross-Writeoffs)", COALESCE((ins.Payment),0) AS "$Insurance Collected", COALESCE((pay.PayAmt),0) AS "$Cash, CC, Checks, Financing", COALESCE((pln.PlannedFee),0) AS "$Treatment Planned" FROM (SELECT ra.PatNum, CASE WHEN NotPerson=1 THEN re.LName ELSE CONCAT(re.FName, ' ', re.LName) END AS Source FROM referral re, refattach ra WHERE re.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ra.RefType = 1 ) ref LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT cp.PatNum, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS Payment FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.PatNum) ins ON ref.PatNum = ins.PatNum LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT pay.PatNum , SUM(pay.PayAmt) AS PayAmt FROM payment pay WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pay.PatNum) pay ON ref.PatNum = pay.PatNum LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT pl.PatNum, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) PlannedFee FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=1 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum) pln ON ref.PatNum = pln.PatNum LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT pl.PatNum, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) - (IFNULL((SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum),0)) AS Prod FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum) prd ON ref.PatNum = prd.PatNum ORDER BY ref.Source, ref.PatNum;

request: List of scheduled or ASAP appointments in a specified date range for the specified patient.
query: SET @Patient = 1; SET @FromDate='2017-09-01', @ToDate='2017-09-30'; SELECT p.PatNum, o.OpName AS Op, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT av.request) AS AptView, a.AptDateTime AS AptDateTime FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY LEFT JOIN operatory o ON a.Op = o.OperatoryNum INNER JOIN apptviewitem avi ON avi.OpNum = a.Op INNER JOIN apptview av ON av.ApptViewNum = avi.ApptViewNum WHERE p.PatNum = @Patient GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime

request: Patients seen in a date range, gross production by patient for a specific primary provider
query: SET @FromDate = '2017-03-30', @ToDate = '2017-07-18'; SET @Provider = '%%'; SET @ProdOver = 100; SELECT tx.PatientName, tx.PrimaryProv, tx.ProcDate AS 'Date of Visit', FORMAT(tx.GrossProduction,2) GrossProduction FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) PatientName, pr.Abbr PrimaryProv, pl.ProcDate, ROUND(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)),2) GrossProduction FROM patient p INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = p.PriProv AND pr.Abbr LIKE @Provider INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY p.PatNum, pl.ProcDate )tx WHERE tx.GrossProduction >= @ProdOver ORDER BY tx.PatientName, tx.ProcDate ASC;

request: Summary claim information summed by date and clinic, with sums of claim fees, insurance estimates, insurance payments,  counts of claims and patients, fees for outstaning claims, and writeoffs
query: SET @FromDate='2023-01-01' , @ToDate='2023-01-01', @Clinic='%%', @Provider='%%'; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp1,tmp2,tmp3; CREATE TABLE tmp3 SELECT PatNum , MIN(ProcDate) AS FirstProc FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=procedurelog.CodeNum WHERE ProcStatus=2 AND ProcCode IN ('D0150','D0120','D0140') GROUP BY PatNum HAVING MIN(ProcDate) >= @FromDate; CREATE TABLE tmp1 SELECT cl.DateService ,SUBSTRING(DATE_FORMAT(cl.DateService,'%W'),1,3) AS WEEKDAY ,clinic.request AS 'Clinic' ,COUNT(DISTINCT cl.PatNum) AS Pt ,COUNT(DISTINCT tmp3.PatNum) AS `New` ,SUM(cl.ClaimFee) AS ClaimFees ,SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) AS InsurancePaid__ ,a.Xrays + a.Pan AS PaidXrays ,LPAD(a.Sealant, 11, ' ') AS Sealant ,LPAD(a.Fillings, 10, ' ') AS Fillings ,LPAD(a.RCT, 6, ' ') AS RCT ,LPAD(a.Dent, 7, ' ') AS Dent ,LPAD(a.Crown, 9, ' ') AS Crown ,LPAD(a.Prophy, 8, ' ') AS Prophy ,LPAD(a.Flor, 6 , ' ') AS Flor ,LPAD(a.Exam, 6, ' ') AS Exam ,LPAD(a.Extraction, 10, ' ') AS Extraction ,LPAD(a.Scaling, 9, ' ') AS Scaling ,LPAD(a.Implant, 9, ' ') AS Implant ,(CASE WHEN (SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) - a.Xrays - a.Pan) <= 2000 THEN ((SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) - a.Xrays - a.Pan) * .5) WHEN (SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) - a.Xrays - a.Pan) BETWEEN 2000 AND 4000 THEN ((SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) - a.Xrays - a.Pan) * .5) WHEN (SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) - a.Xrays - a.Pan) BETWEEN 4000 AND 5000 THEN ((SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) - a.Xrays - a.Pan) * .5) WHEN (SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) - a.Xrays - a.Pan) >= 5000 THEN ((SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) - a.Xrays - a.Pan) * .5) ELSE 0 END) AS Pay__ FROM claim cl LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=cl.ClinicNum INNER JOIN provider pv ON cl.ProvTreat=pv.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr LIKE @Provider LEFT JOIN tmp3 ON tmp3.PatNum=cl.PatNum AND tmp3.FirstProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cl.DateService ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D0220','D0230','D0272','D0274','D0270','D0271','D0350','D0340') THEN cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) AS Xrays ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D0330','D0210') THEN cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) AS Pan ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D1351') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Sealant ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D2140', 'D2150', 'D2160', 'D2161', 'D2330', 'D2331', 'D2332', 'D2335', 'D2391', 'D2392', 'D2393', 'D2394') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Fillings ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D3310', 'D3320', 'D3330') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS RCT ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D5110', 'D5120', 'D5213', 'D5214', 'D5001') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Dent ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D2751', 'D2750') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Crown ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D1110', 'D1120') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Prophy ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D1203', 'D1204') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Flor ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D0150', 'D0140', 'D0120') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Exam ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D7140', 'D7210') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Extraction ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D4341') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Scaling ,SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D6010') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Implant FROM claim cl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=cl.ClinicNum INNER JOIN provider pv ON cl.ProvTreat=pv.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr LIKE @Provider LEFT JOIN tmp3 ON tmp3.PatNum=cl.PatNum AND tmp3.FirstProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHERE cl.ClaimType<>'PreAuth' AND cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND clinic.request LIKE @Clinic GROUP BY cl.DateService, pv.ProvNum )a ON a.DateService=cl.DateService WHERE cl.ClaimType<>'PreAuth' AND cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND clinic.request LIKE @Clinic GROUP BY cl.DateService, pv.ProvNum ORDER BY cl.DateService; CREATE TABLE tmp2 SELECT '' AS DateService ,COUNT(DISTINCT(DateService)) AS WEEKDAY ,'' AS 'Clinic' ,SUM(Pt),SUM(NEW) ,SUM(ClaimFees) ,SUM(InsurancePaid__) ,SUM(PaidXrays) ,LPAD(SUM(Sealant), 11, ' ') AS Sealant ,LPAD(SUM(Fillings), 10, ' ') AS Fillings ,LPAD(SUM(RCT), 6, ' ') AS RCT ,LPAD(SUM(Dent), 7, ' ') AS Dent ,LPAD(SUM(Crown), 9, ' ') AS Crown ,LPAD(SUM(Prophy), 8, ' ') AS Prophy ,LPAD(SUM(Flor), 6, ' ') AS Flor ,LPAD(SUM(Exam), 6, ' ') AS Exam ,LPAD(SUM(Extraction), 10, ' ') AS Extraction ,LPAD(SUM(Scaling), 9, ' ') AS Scaling ,LPAD(SUM(Implant), 9, ' ') AS Implant ,SUM(Pay__) FROM tmp1; SELECT * FROM tmp1 UNION SELECT * FROM tmp2; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp1,tmp2,tmp3;

request: Summary claim info by date and clinic, with sums of claim fees, counts of claims and patients, fees for outstanding claims, and writeoffs.     AvClimFeeDay - Average Claim Fees per Day Open;   AvPtDay - Average Patients per Day Open;    AvClmFeePt -Average Claim Fees per Patient
query: SET @FromDate='2017-08-01' , @ToDate='2017-08-31'; SET @Clinics=''; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp1,tmp2,tmp3,tmp4; CREATE TABLE tmp3 SELECT PatNum,MIN(ProcDate) AS FirstProc FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=procedurelog.CodeNum WHERE ProcStatus=2 AND ProcCode IN ('D0150','D0120','D0140') GROUP BY PatNum HAVING MIN(ProcDate)>=@FromDate; CREATE TABLE tmp1 SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(cl.DateService)) AS Days,clinic.request AS Clinic, COUNT(DISTINCT cl.PatNum) AS Pt,COUNT(DISTINCT tmp3.PatNum) AS 'New', SUM(cl.ClaimFee) AS $ClaimFees_,SUM(cl.InsPayAmt) AS $InsurancePaid_, SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS $Writeoff_, COUNT(DISTINCT cl.ProvTreat,cl.DateService) AS Prov FROM claim cl LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=cl.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN tmp3 ON tmp3.PatNum=cl.PatNum AND tmp3.FirstProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) WriteOff, claimproc.ClaimNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY claimproc.ClaimNum )cp ON cp.ClaimNum=cl.ClaimNum WHERE cl.ClaimType<>'PreAuth' AND cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum ORDER BY clinic.request; CREATE TABLE tmp4 SELECT clinic.request AS Clinic, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D0220','D0230','D0272','D0274', 'D0270', 'D0271','D0350','D0340') THEN cp.FeeBilled ELSE 0 END) AS Xrays, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D0330', 'D0210') THEN cp.FeeBilled ELSE 0 END) AS Pan, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D1351') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Seal, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D2140', 'D2150', 'D2160', 'D2161', 'D2330', 'D2331', 'D2332', 'D2335', 'D2391', 'D2392', 'D2393', 'D2394') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Fill, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D3310', 'D3320', 'D3330') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS RCT, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D5110', 'D5120', 'D5213', 'D5214', 'D5212', 'D5211') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Dent, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D2751', 'D2750') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Crown, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D6010') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Impl, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D1110', 'D1120') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Prophy, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D0150', 'D0140', 'D0120') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Exam, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D7140', 'D7210') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Extr, SUM(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN('D4341') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Scal, COUNT(DISTINCT tmp3.PatNum) AS NewExam FROM claim cl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cl.ClaimNum=cp.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=cl.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN tmp3 ON tmp3.PatNum=cl.PatNum AND tmp3.FirstProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHERE cl.ClaimType<>'PreAuth' AND cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum ORDER BY clinic.request; CREATE TABLE tmp2 SELECT 'TOTAL' AS Clinic, SUM(Days) AS Days, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cl.ProvTreat,cl.DateService,cl.ClinicNum) FROM claim cl LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=cl.ClinicNum WHERE cl.ClaimType<>'PreAuth' AND cl.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND c.request REGEXP @Clinics ) AS Prov, SUM(Pt) AS Pt,SUM(NewExam) AS 'New', FORMAT(SUM($ClaimFees_),2) AS ClaimFees, FORMAT(SUM($InsurancePaid_),2) AS InsurancePaid, FORMAT(SUM($Writeoff_),2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT(SUM($ClaimFees_)/SUM(Days),2) AS AvClm_Day, FORMAT(SUM(Pt)/SUM(Days),2) AS AvPtDay, FORMAT(SUM($ClaimFees_)/SUM(Pt),2) AS AvClm_Pt, LPAD(SUM(Exam), 8, ' ') AS Exam, LPAD(SUM(Prophy), 10, ' ') AS Prophy, LPAD(SUM(Seal), 6, ' ') AS Seal, LPAD(SUM(Fill), 5, ' ') AS '. Fill', LPAD(SUM(RCT), 6, ' ') AS RCT, LPAD(SUM(Dent), 7, ' ') AS Dent, LPAD(SUM(Crown), 11, ' ') AS Crown, LPAD(SUM(Impl), 5, ' ') AS Impl, LPAD(SUM(Extr), 5, ' ') AS Extr, LPAD(SUM(Scal), 7, ' ') AS Scal, FORMAT(SUM(Xrays),2) AS Xrays_B, FORMAT(SUM(Pan),2) AS Pan_B FROM tmp1 LEFT JOIN tmp4 ON tmp1.Clinic=tmp4.Clinic WHERE tmp1.Clinic REGEXP @Clinics; SELECT tmp1.Clinic, tmp1.Days, tmp1.Prov, tmp1.Pt,tmp4.NewExam AS 'New', FORMAT(tmp1.$ClaimFees_,2) AS ClaimFees, FORMAT(tmp1.$InsurancePaid_,2) AS InsurancePaid, FORMAT(tmp1.$Writeoff_,2) AS Writeoff, FORMAT(tmp1.$ClaimFees_/tmp1.Days,2) AS AvClm_Day, FORMAT(tmp1.Pt/tmp1.Days,2) AS AvPtDay, FORMAT(tmp1.$ClaimFees_/tmp1.Pt,2) AS AvClm_Pt, LPAD(tmp4.Exam, 8, ' ') AS Exam, LPAD(tmp4.Prophy, 10, ' ') AS Prophy, LPAD(tmp4.Seal, 6, ' ') AS Seal, LPAD(tmp4.Fill, 5, ' ') AS '.
