Fill', LPAD(tmp4.RCT, 6, ' ') AS RCT, LPAD(tmp4.Dent, 7, ' ') AS Dent, LPAD(tmp4.Crown, 11, ' ') AS Crown, LPAD(tmp4.Impl, 5, ' ') AS Impl, LPAD(tmp4.Extr, 5, ' ') AS Extr, LPAD(tmp4.Scal, 7, ' ') AS Scal, FORMAT(tmp4.Xrays,2) AS Xrays_B, FORMAT(tmp4.Pan,2) AS Pan_B FROM tmp1 LEFT JOIN tmp4 ON tmp1.Clinic=tmp4.Clinic WHERE tmp1.Clinic REGEXP @Clinics UNION SELECT * FROM tmp2; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp1,tmp2,tmp3, tmp4;

request: Aging of A/R by month going back 1 year (12 months) with insurance carrier names
query: SET @AsOfDate=CURDATE(); SET @toMonth2=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 1 MONTH)); SET @toMonth3=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 2 MONTH)); SET @toMonth4=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 3 MONTH)); SET @toMonth5=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 4 MONTH)); SET @toMonth6=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 5 MONTH)); SET @toMonth7=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 6 MONTH)); SET @toMonth8=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 7 MONTH)); SET @toMonth9=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 8 MONTH)); SET @toMonth10=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 9 MONTH)); SET @toMonth11=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 10 MONTH)); SET @toMonth12=(DATE_SUB(@AsOfDate,INTERVAL 11 MONTH)); SELECT * FROM (SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) PatName, IFNULL(guarAging.InsName, '') AS Carrier, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth1-guarAging.Ins1,2) AS pat1, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins1,2) AS Ins1, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth2-guarAging.Ins2,2) AS pat2, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins2,2) AS Ins2, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth3-guarAging.Ins3,2) AS pat3, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins3,2) AS Ins3, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth4-guarAging.Ins4,2) AS pat4, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins4,2) AS Ins4, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth5-guarAging.Ins5,2) AS pat5, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins5,2) AS Ins5, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth6-guarAging.Ins6,2) AS pat6, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins6,2) AS Ins6, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth7-guarAging.Ins7,2) AS pat7, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins7,2) AS Ins7, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth8-guarAging.Ins8,2) AS pat8, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins8,2) AS Ins8, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth9-guarAging.Ins9,2) AS pat9, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins9,2) AS Ins9, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth10-guarAging.Ins10,2) AS pat10, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins10,2) AS Ins10, FORMAT(guarAging.BalMonth11-guarAging.Ins11,2) AS pat11, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins11,2) AS Ins11, FORMAT(guarAging.BalOverMonth12-guarAging.Ins12,2) AS pat12, FORMAT(guarAging.Ins12,2) AS Ins12, FORMAT(guarAging.BalTotal - guarAging.InsEstTotal - guarAging.InsWoEst,2) AS TotalPatBal, FORMAT(guarAging.InsEstTotal,2) TotalInsBal, FORMAT(guarAging.BalTotal,2) TotalBal FROM( SELECT tSums.PatNum,tSums.InsName, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.Month12 THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalOverMonth12, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits <= tSums.Month12 THEN tSums.Month11 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth11, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 THEN tSums.Month10 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth10, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 THEN tSums.Month9 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth9, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 THEN tSums.Month8 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth8, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 THEN tSums.Month7 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth7, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 THEN tSums.Month6 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth6, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 THEN tSums.Month5 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth5, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + Month5 THEN tSums.Month4 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth4, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 THEN tSums.Month3 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3- tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth3, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3 THEN tSums.Month2 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3 + tSums.Month2 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3 + tSums.Month2 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth2, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3 + tSums.Month2 THEN tSums.Month1 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3 + tSums.Month2 + tSums.Month1 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3 + tSums.Month2 +tSums.Month1 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth1, ROUND(tSums.BalTotal, 3) BalTotal, ROUND(tSums.InsWoEst, 3) InsWoEst, ROUND(tSums.InsBalTotal, 3) InsEstTotal, ROUND(tSums.Ins1,3) Ins1, ROUND(tSums.Ins2,3) Ins2, ROUND(tSums.Ins3,3) Ins3, ROUND(tSums.Ins4,3) Ins4, ROUND(tSums.Ins5,3) Ins5, ROUND(tSums.Ins6,3) Ins6, ROUND(tSums.Ins7,3) Ins7, ROUND(tSums.Ins8,3) Ins8, ROUND(tSums.Ins9,3) Ins9, ROUND(tSums.Ins10,3) Ins10, ROUND(tSums.Ins11,3) Ins11, ROUND(tSums.Ins12,3) Ins12 FROM( SELECT p.Guarantor PatNum,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT trans.InsName)InsName, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth12 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month12, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth11 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth12 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month11, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth10 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth11 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month10, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth9 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth10 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month9, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth8 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth9 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month8, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth7 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth8 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month7, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth6 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth7 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month6, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth5 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth6 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month5, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth4 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth5 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month4, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth3 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth4 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month3, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth2 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth3 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month2, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate <= @AsOfDate AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth2 THEN IFNULL(trans.TranAmount,0) ELSE 0 END) Month1, -SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount < 0 AND trans.TranDate <= @AsOfDate THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) TotalCredits, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) BalTotal, SUM(trans.InsWoEst) InsWoEst, SUM(trans.InsPayEst) InsPayEst, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.InsPayEst > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth12 THEN trans.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) Ins12, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.InsPayEst > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth11 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth12 THEN IFNULL(trans.InsPayEst,0) + IFNULL(trans.InsWoEst,0) ELSE 0 END) Ins11, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.InsPayEst> 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth10 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth11 THEN IFNULL(trans.InsPayEst,0) + IFNULL(trans.InsWoEst,0) ELSE 0 END) Ins10, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.InsPayEst > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth9 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth10 THEN IFNULL(trans.InsPayEst,0) + IFNULL(trans.InsWoEst,0) ELSE 0 END) Ins9, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.InsPayEst> 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth8 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth9 THEN IFNULL(trans.InsPayEst,0) + IFNULL(trans.InsWoEst,0) ELSE 0 END) Ins8, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.InsPayEst > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth7 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth8 THEN IFNULL(trans.InsPayEst,0) + IFNULL(trans.InsWoEst,0) ELSE 0 END) Ins7, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.InsPayEst > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth6 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth7 THEN IFNULL(trans.InsPayEst,0) + IFNULL(trans.InsWoEst,0) ELSE 0 END) Ins6, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.InsPayEst> 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth5 AND trans.TranDate >= @toMonth6 THEN IFNULL(trans.InsPayEst,0) + IFNULL(trans.InsWoEst,0) ELSE 0 END) Ins5, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.InsPayEst > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @toMonth4 pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount, 0 AS InsPayEst, 0 AS InsWoEst, NULL AS InsName FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS InsPayEst, 0 AS InsWoEst, NULL AS InsName FROM paysplit ps WHERE (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 1 THEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 ELSE TRUE END) tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3 + tSums.Month2 - tSums.TotalCredits END,3) BalMonth2, ROUND(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + tSums.Month10 + tSums.Month9 + tSums.Month8 + tSums.Month7 + tSums.Month6 + tSums.Month5 + tSums.Month4 + tSums.Month3 + tSums.Month2 THEN tSums.Month1 WHEN tSums.Month12 + tSums.Month11 + Month10 + tSums.Month9 + THEN trans.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) InsBalTotal FROM( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount, 0 AS InsPayEst, 0 AS InsWoEst FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS InsPayEst, 0 AS InsWoEst FROM paysplit ps WHERE (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 1 THEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 ELSE TRUE END) UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS InsPayEst, 0 AS InsWoEst FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.payplannum = 0 THEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount, 0 AS InsPayEst, 0 AS InsWoEst FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON request: Query Written/Modified 9/7/2017. A/R treatment done prior to date where patient balance existed before date and received payment after date.
query: SET @AsOf='2016-12-31'; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) patName, t2.DatePaid, FORMAT(ROUND(t2.Amount,2),2) AmtPaid, t2.Prov, FORMAT(ROUND(t1.TranAmount,2),2) PatBal FROM( SELECT trans.PatNum, SUM(trans.TranAmount) TranAmount FROM( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 1 THEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 ELSE TRUE END) UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion=1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanCharge' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion=2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf )trans GROUP BY trans.PatNum )t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'PatPay' TranType, ps.SplitAmt Amount, ps.DatePay DatePaid, pr.Abbr Prov,ps.PatNum FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=ps.ProvNum INNER JOIN payment pm ON pm.PayNum=ps.PayNum WHERE ps.DatePay > @AsOf AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 1 THEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 ELSE TRUE END) AND pm.PayType != 0 AND ps.SplitAmt > 0 GROUP BY ps.SplitNum UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' TranType,cp.InsPayAmt Amount,cp.DateCP DatePaid,pr.Abbr Prov,cp.PatNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.PayPlanNum = 0 AND cp.DateCP > @AsOf AND cp.InsPayAmt > 0 )t2 ON t2.PatNum = t1.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=t2.PatNum WHERE t1.TranAmount > .005

request: Provider Net Production and Income tracker ina date range, with a column for a subtotal of payments entered after a specific date.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-12-01' , @ToDate='2023-12-31'; SET @AfterDate='2023-12-08'; SET @BillingType='%%'; SET @ProviderAbbr=''; SET @ProviderAbbr=(CASE WHEN @ProviderAbbr='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProviderAbbr,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @DateRan=CURDATE(); SELECT a.ProvNum ,a.date AS ServiceDate ,a.$Prod_ ,a.$Adjust_ ,a.$Writeoff_ ,a.$TotProd_ ,a.$PatIncome_ ,a.$InsIncome_ ,a.$TotIncome_ ,a.$NewIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 8 AS ItemOrder ,trans.ProvNum ,DATE_FORMAT(trans.TDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date' ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'Prod' THEN trans.TranAmount WHEN trans.TranType='Cap' THEN trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS '$Prod_' ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'Prod' THEN trans.AdjAmt ELSE 0 END) AS '$Adjust_' ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'Writeoff' THEN trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS '$Writeoff_' ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType IN('Prod') THEN trans.TranAmount + trans.AdjAmt WHEN trans.TranType IN('Writeoff','Cap') THEN trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS '$TotProd_' ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'PatPay' AND (TDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate)THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS '$PatIncome_' ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType IN('InsPay') AND (TDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate)THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS '$InsIncome_' ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') AND (TDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS '$TotIncome_' ,trans.EntryDate AS 'EntryDate' ,SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranType IN('PatPay','InsPay') AND EntryDate > @AfterDate THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS '$NewIncome_' FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS 'TranType' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'TDate' ,pl.ProvNum ,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' ,0 AS 'Writeoff' ,0 AS 'EntryDate' ,IFNULL(SUM(a.AdjAmt),0) AS 'adjAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum = p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON pl.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum LEFT JOIN adjustment a ON a.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND prov.Abbr REGEXP @ProviderAbbr AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' ,procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'TDate' ,ps.ProvNum ,ps.SplitAmt AS 'TranAmount' ,0 AS Writeoff ,ps.DateEntry AS 'EntryDate' ,0 AS 'adjAmt' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum = ps.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum = p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON ps.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum WHERE ps.IsDiscount = 0 AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND prov.Abbr REGEXP @ProviderAbbr UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType' ,cp.ProcDate AS 'TDate' ,cp.ProvNum ,cp.InsPayAmt AS 'TranAmount' ,0 AS WriteOff ,cp.DateEntry AS 'EntryDate' ,0 AS adjAmt FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum = p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON cp.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND prov.Abbr REGEXP @ProviderAbbr AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS 'TranType' ,cp.ProcDate AS 'TDate' ,cp.ProvNum ,0 AS 'TranAmount' ,(CASE WHEN cp.Status IN(1,4) THEN -cp.WriteOff ELSE (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN -cp.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN cp.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN -cp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'Writeoff' ,0 AS 'EntryDate' ,0 AS 'adjAmt' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.Patnum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum = p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON cp.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND prov.Abbr REGEXP @ProviderAbbr AND cp.Status IN(0,1,4,6) UNION ALL SELECT 'Cap' AS 'TranType' ,cp.ProcDate AS 'TDate' ,cp.ProvNum ,cp.InsPayAmt AS 'TranAmount' ,-cp.Writeoff AS 'Writeoff' ,0 AS EntryDate ,0 AS adjAmt FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum = p.BillingType INNER JOIN provider prov ON cp.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum WHERE cp.Status=7 AND d.ItemName LIKE @BillingType AND prov.Abbr REGEXP @ProviderAbbr AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) trans GROUP BY trans.ProvNum, trans.TDate HAVING `$Prod_` > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 7 AS 'ItemOrder' ,'' AS ProvNum ,' UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS 'ItemOrder' ,'' AS ProvNum ,CONCAT('ProviderAbbr: ',REPLACE(@ProviderAbbr,'%','')) AS DATE,'','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS 'ItemOrder' ,'' AS ProvNum ,CONCAT('BillingType: ',REPLACE(@BillingType,'%','')) AS DATE,'','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS 'ItemOrder' ,'' AS ProvNum ,CONCAT('AfterDate: ',DATE_FORMAT(@AfterDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS DATE,'','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS 'ItemOrder' ,'' AS ProvNum ,CONCAT('ToDate: ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS DATE,'','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS 'ItemOrder' ,'' AS ProvNum ,CONCAT('FromDate: ',DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS DATE,'','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder' ,'' AS ProvNum ,CONCAT('Date Ran: ',DATE_FORMAT(@DateRan,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS DATE,'','','','','','','','','' ) a ORDER BY a.ItemOrder, a.ProvNum, a.Date;

request: Query written/modified 9/18/2017. MODIFIED 871 Patient's with and without referrals entered in date range, with date first appointment,next appt, net production, scheduled production, and total tp
query: SET @FromDate='2016-08-20' , @ToDate='2018-10-12', @AptOutToDate='2018-09-25'; SELECT CONCAT(rf.LName,', ', rf.FName) AS Referrer, DATE_FORMAT(ra.RefDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS RefDate, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', p.AddrNote, DATE_FORMAT(MIN(DATE(firstap.AptDateTime)),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'FirstAppt', DATE_FORMAT(MIN(DATE(nextap.AptDateTime)),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'NextAppt', FORMAT(ProdInfo.NetProd,2)AS NetProd, FORMAT(ProdInfo.SchedProd,2)AS SchedProd, FORMAT(ProdInfo.TotalTp,2)AS TotalTP FROM patient p LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate LEFT JOIN referral rf ON ra.ReferralNum=rf.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN appointment firstap ON firstap.PatNum=p.PatNum AND firstap.AptStatus IN (1,2,5) LEFT JOIN appointment nextap ON nextap.PatNum=p.PatNum AND DATE(nextap.AptDateTime)>=CURDATE() AND nextap.AptStatus IN (1,4) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 THEN (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) ELSE 0 END)) + SUM(IFNULL(Adj.AdjAmt,0)) - SUM(IFNULL(claimp.WriteOff,0)) NetProd, IFNULL(Apt.ProcFee,0) AS SchedProd, SUM((CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=1 THEN (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) ELSE 0 END))TotalTP, p.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS WriteOff, cp.ProcNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )claimp ON claimp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt)AdjAmt, adjustment.ProcNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum )Adj ON Adj.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) - SUM(cp.WriteOffEst) ProcFee,pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN CURDATE() AND @AptOutToDate LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN cp.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN cp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END) AS WriteOffEst,cp.ProcNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status = 6 GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum GROUP BY pl.PatNum )Apt ON Apt.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum )ProdInfo ON ProdInfo.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY ra.RefAttachNum ORDER BY rf.LName, rf.FName, ra.RefDate, p.LName, p.FName;

request: New patients first appointment,referral source,net production,and upcoming appointments with TP priority and type
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01', @ToDate='2018-01-31'; SET @TP1='1',@TP2='2',@TP3='3',@TP4='4',@TPperio1='5',@TPperio2='6'; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmpprod; CREATE TABLE tmpprod ( PatName VARCHAR(255), PatNum BIGINT, FirstApt DATETIME, ReferredBy VARCHAR(255), NetProd DOUBLE, AptDates VARCHAR(255), INDEX(PatNum) ); INSERT INTO tmpprod SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,',',p.FName)PatName, p.PatNum, DATE(t1.FirstApt)FirstApt, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(referral.FName,' ',referral.LName)) FROM refattach INNER JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum = refattach.ReferralNum WHERE refattach.PatNum = p.PatNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 )ReferredBy, FORMAT(ROUND(prod.NetProd,2),2) NetProd, futureApt.AptDates FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT ap.PatNum, MIN(ap.AptDateTime) AS FirstApt FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY ap.PatNum HAVING FirstApt BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate )t1 ON t1.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))- IFNULL((SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN cp.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN cp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status = 6 AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum),0) AS NetProd, pl.DateTP FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND pl.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum,pl.DateTP )prod ON prod.PatNum = t1.PatNum AND prod.DateTP = DATE(t1.FirstApt) INNER JOIN( SELECT apt.PatNum,GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(DATE(apt.AptDateTime)),':',((CASE WHEN apt.IsHygiene=1 THEN 'Hygiene' ELSE 'Restorative' END)) SEPARATOR ', ')AptDates FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus=1 AND apt.AptDateTime >=@ToDate GROUP BY apt.PatNum )futureApt ON futureApt.PatNum=p.PatNum; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmppriorities; CREATE TABLE tmppriorities SELECT tp.PatNum, MAX(CASE WHEN tp.Priority = @TP1 THEN (CASE WHEN tp.Rating = 1 THEN 'Sched' WHEN tp.Rating = 2 THEN 'Complete' ELSE 'Needs Attention' END) END) TP1, MAX(CASE WHEN tp.Priority = @TP2 THEN (CASE WHEN tp.Rating = 1 THEN 'Sched' WHEN tp.Rating = 2 THEN 'Complete' ELSE 'Needs Attention' END) END) TP2, MAX(CASE WHEN tp.Priority = @TP3 THEN (CASE WHEN tp.Rating = 1 THEN 'Sched' WHEN tp.Rating = 2 THEN 'Complete' ELSE 'Needs Attention' END) END) TP3, MAX(CASE WHEN tp.Priority = @TP4 THEN (CASE WHEN tp.Rating = 1 THEN 'Sched' WHEN tp.Rating = 2 THEN 'Complete' ELSE 'Needs Attention' END) END) TP4, MAX(CASE WHEN tp.Priority = @TPperio1 THEN (CASE WHEN tp.Rating = 1 THEN 'Sched' WHEN tp.Rating = 2 THEN 'Complete' ELSE 'Needs Attention' END) END) TPPerio1, MAX(CASE WHEN tp.Priority = @TPperio2 THEN (CASE WHEN tp.Rating = 1 THEN 'Sched' WHEN tp.Rating = 2 THEN 'Complete' ELSE 'Needs Attention' END) END) TPPerio2 FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum, pl.ProcNum, d.ItemName Priority, BIT_OR(CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 THEN 2 WHEN ap.AptStatus=1 THEN 1 ELSE 3 END)Rating FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=pl.Priority AND (d.ItemName LIKE @TP1 OR d.ItemName LIKE @TP2 OR d.ItemName LIKE @TP3 OR d.ItemName LIKE @TP4 OR d.ItemName LIKE @TPperio1 OR d.ItemName LIKE @TPperio2) LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tmpprod WHERE tmpprod.PatNum=pl.PatNum) GROUP BY pl.PatNum, d.ItemName )tp GROUP BY tp.PatNum; SELECT tmpprod.*,tmppriorities.* FROM tmpprod LEFT JOIN tmppriorities ON tmppriorities.PatNum=tmpprod.PatNum ORDER BY tmpprod.PatName;

request: Collection by Referral Source. Will duplicate income for patients with multiple referral from sources. Ideal for offices that have only one referral from added per patient.
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-12-01', @ToDate ='2024-12-31'; SET @Clinics =''; SELECT IFNULL(CONCAT(ref.FName,' ',ref.LName),'No Referral') AS 'ReferredBy' ,IFNULL(clinic.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,FORMAT(SUM(pay.Amt),2) AS 'Collections' FROM ( SELECT SUM(Amt) AS 'Amt' ,PatNum ,ClinicNum FROM ( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Amt' ,ps.PatNum ,ps.ClinicNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY ps.PatNum, ps.ClinicNum UNION ALL SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsAmt' ,cp.PatNum ,cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY cp.PatNum, cp.ClinicNum ) t GROUP BY PatNum, ClinicNum ) pay LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = pay.PatNum LEFT JOIN referral ref ON ref.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = pay.ClinicNum WHERE (ra.RefType = 1 OR ISNULL(ra.RefAttachNum) ) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(clinic.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinics)) GROUP BY ref.ReferralNum, pay.ClinicNum ORDER BY ref.ReferralNum, clinic.ClinicNum;

request: Query written/modified 10/9/17. Daily Sheet per provider to track income,new patients, and ortho procedures.
query: SET @FromDate='2017-10-06' , @ToDate='2017-10-06'; SELECT provDate.ProcDate AS 'Date', provDate.Abbr, COALESCE(TransO.DailyAdjProd_,0)DailyAdjProd, COALESCE(TransO.PatPayNoPlan_,0)PatPayNoPlan, COALESCE(TransO.PatPayPlan_,0)PayPayPlan, COALESCE(TransO.InsPay_,0)InsPay, COALESCE(NewPayPlan.TotalAmt,0)NewPayPlans, COALESCE(Ortho.Contracts,0)OrthoContracts, COALESCE(PatInfo.CountFirstProc,0)NewPatients, COALESCE(Ortho.Bonds,0)Bonds, COALESCE(PatInfo.CountSameDay,0)SameDayStart FROM ( SELECT ProcDate, provider.ProvNum, provider.Abbr FROM procedurelog JOIN provider WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND provider.IsHidden=0 GROUP BY ProcDate, provider.ProvNum )provDate LEFT JOIN ( SELECT Trans.ProvNum,Trans.TransDate, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN('Prod','Adj') THEN Trans.TranAmount - (CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='Writeoff' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)ELSE 0 END) AS DailyAdjProd_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='PatPayPlan' AND Trans.IsPayPlan=0 THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS PatPayNoPlan_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='PatPayPlan' AND Trans.IsPayPlan=1 THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS PatPayPlan_, SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType='InsPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS InsPay_ FROM( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType,pl.ProcDate AS TransDate,pl.ProvNum,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount, 0 AS IsPayPlan FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status='7' WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.AdjDate AS TransDate,a.ProvNum,a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS IsPayPlan FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPayPlan' AS TranType,ps.DatePay AS TransDate,ps.ProvNum,ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount,(CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)AS IsPayPlan FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.DateCP AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount,0 AS IsPayPlan FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType,cp.ProcDate AS TransDate,cp.ProvNum,-cp.WriteOff AS TranAmount, 0 AS IsPayPlan FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN(1,4) )Trans GROUP BY Trans.ProvNum, Trans.TransDate )TransO ON TransO.ProvNum=provDate.ProvNum AND TransO.TransDate = provDate.ProcDate LEFT JOIN( SELECT ppc.ProvNum,SUM(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest)TotalAmt,pp.PayPlanDate FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.PayPlanDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ppc.ChargeType=0 GROUP BY ppc.ProvNum, pp.PayPlanDate )NewPayPlan ON NewPayPlan.ProvNum=provDate.ProvNum AND NewPayPlan.PayPlanDate = provDate.ProcDate LEFT JOIN( SELECT pl.ProvNum,COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN ('D8080C','D8090C') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)Contracts, COUNT(CASE WHEN pc.ProcCode IN ('D8080', 'D8090') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)Bonds, pl.ProcDate FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcDate )Ortho ON Ortho.ProvNum=provDate.ProvNum AND Ortho.ProcDate = provDate.ProcDate LEFT JOIN( SELECT newPats.DateFirstProc, COUNT(*)CountfirstProc, newPats.ProvNum, COUNT(CASE WHEN newPats.DateFirstProc=newPats.firstPay THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)CountSameDay FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum,pl.ProcNum, MIN(pl.ProcDate)DateFirstProc, pl.ProvNum, MIN(ps.DatePay)firstPay FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.PatNum=pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') GROUP BY pl.PatNum HAVING MIN(pl.ProcDate) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate )newPats GROUP BY newPats.ProvNum, newPats.DateFirstProc )PatInfo ON PatInfo.ProvNum=provDate.ProvNum AND PatInfo.DateFirstProc = provDate.ProcDate GROUP BY provDate.ProcDate, provDate.ProvNum ORDER BY DATE, provDate.ProvNum;

request: Estimated Daily Portion and Patient Payment Amount Collected
query: SET @FromDate='2025-04-28', @ToDate='2025-05-02'; SELECT a.PatNum , DATE(a.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDate' , IFNULL(SUM(proc.ProcFee), 0) AS '$AptTotal' , IFNULL(SUM(ins.InsPayEst), 0) AS '$InsPayEst' , IFNULL(SUM(ins.WriteoffEst), 0) AS '$WriteoffEst' , IFNULL(SUM(proc.ProcFee), 0) -IFNULL(SUM(ins.InsPayEst), 0) -IFNULL(SUM(ins.WriteoffEst), 0) AS '$PatPortion' , IFNULL(SUM(patpay.PatPay), 0) AS '$PatPay' , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT patpay.EnteredBy ORDER BY patpay.ProcNum), '') AS 'EnteredBy' , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT patpay.PatPayDate ORDER BY patpay.ProcNum), '') AS 'PatPayDate' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = a.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT pl.ProcDate , (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS 'ProcFee' , pl.ProcNum , pl.AptNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) )proc ON proc.AptNum = a.AptNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ps.DatePay) AS 'PatPayDate' ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PatPay' ,ps.ProcNum ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT us.UserName) AS 'EnteredBy' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN userod us ON us.UserNum = ps.SecUserNumEntry GROUP BY ps.ProcNum )patpay ON patpay.ProcNum = proc.ProcNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT cp.DateCP , SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' , cp.ProcNum , SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status=0 THEN cp.WriteOff WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN (cp.WriteOffEstOverride) WHEN cp.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN cp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'WriteoffEst' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND cp.Status IN(0,6) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )ins ON ins.ProcNum = proc.ProcNum WHERE a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, a.PatNum;

request: Patients within given age range. Written 10/11/2017
query: SET @ageFrom='37'; SET @ageTo='54'; SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName,',',patient.FName)PatientName,(YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) AS 'Age' FROM patient WHERE (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(patient.Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(patient.Birthdate,5)) BETWEEN @ageFrom AND @ageTo ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName ASC;

request: Display QUALIFIED DTI patients and check to see if they were given a follow up appointment and assigned the correct DTI code.
query: SET @AppointmentDate='2017-10-13'; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @CarrierNames=''; SET @Form='CRAForm'; SET @CarrierNames=(CASE WHEN @CarrierNames='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@CarrierNames,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ProcCodes=(CASE WHEN @ProcCodes='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcCodes,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT A.PatName AS 'Patient Name', A.Age, COALESCE(B.Risk,'None') AS 'Risk Level', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE(D.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%Y') ORDER BY D.AptDateTime SEPARATOR ', '),'None') AS 'Next Scheduled Recall Appointment', (CASE WHEN B.Risk='Low Risk' THEN DATE_ADD(@AppointmentDate, INTERVAL 183 DAY) WHEN B.Risk='Medium Risk' THEN DATE_ADD(@AppointmentDate, INTERVAL 122 DAY) WHEN B.Risk='High Risk' THEN DATE_ADD(@AppointmentDate, INTERVAL 91 DAY)ELSE 'CRA NOT DONE' END) AS IdealNextRecallAppt, (CASE WHEN E.sheet IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) AS CRAform FROM (SELECT pat.PatNum, CONCAT(pat.LName, ', ', pat.FName) AS PatName, CONCAT( YEAR(FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),pat.Birthdate))),'y, ', MONTH(FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),pat.Birthdate))),'m, ', DAY(FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),pat.Birthdate))),'d') AS Age, GROUP_CONCAT(c.CarrierName) AS Carrier FROM patient pat INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum=pat.PatNum AND DATE(a.AptDateTime)=@AppointmentDate AND a.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pat.PatNum=pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 INNER JOIN inssub sub ON pp.InsSubNum=sub.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan plan ON sub.PlanNum=plan.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON plan.CarrierNum=c.CarrierNum AND c.CarrierName REGEXP @CarrierNames WHERE DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),pat.Birthdate)<2556 GROUP BY pat.PatNum )A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, CASE WHEN GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode) LIKE '%D0603%' THEN 'High Risk' WHEN GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode) LIKE '%D0602%' THEN 'Medium Risk' WHEN GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode) LIKE '%D0601%' THEN 'Low Risk' ELSE 'None' END AS 'Risk' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9987') WHERE pl.ProcDate=@AppointmentDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum )B ON A.PatNum=B.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT apt.AptDateTime, apt.PatNum FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON apt.AptNum=pl.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes AND DATE(apt.AptDateTime)>@AppointmentDate AND apt.AptStatus IN (1,4) GROUP BY apt.AptNum )D ON A.PatNum=D.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sheet.PatNum,sheet.SheetNum AS sheet FROM sheet WHERE sheet.SheetType=9 AND sheet.IsDeleted=0 AND sheet.request=@Form )E ON E.PatNum=A.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcNum, pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE ((pc.ProcCode='D0603' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_SUB(@AppointmentDate,INTERVAL 91 DAY) AND @AppointmentDate) OR (pc.ProcCode='D0602' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_SUB(@AppointmentDate, INTERVAL 122 DAY) AND @AppointmentDate) OR (pc.ProcCode='D0601' AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_SUB(@AppointmentDate,INTERVAL 183 DAY) AND @AppointmentDate)) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum )F ON F.PatNum=E.PatNum WHERE F.PatNum IS NULL GROUP BY A.PatNum;

request: Display QUALIFIED DTI patients and check to see if they were given a follow up appointment and assigned the correct DTI code. Date of Prior Risk Level and RecareEligibility
query: SET @AppointmentDate='2017-10-13'; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @CarrierNames=''; SET @CarrierNames = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@CarrierNames) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@CarrierNames,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ProcCodes = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcCodes,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT core.PatName AS 'Patient Name' ,core.Age ,(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),core.Birthdate) >= 2556 THEN 'ALERT - INELIGIBLE' ELSE 'CRA ELIGIBLE' END) AS 'Eligibility' ,(CASE WHEN FIND_IN_SET('D0603',E.mostRecent) THEN 'High' WHEN FIND_IN_SET('D0602',E.mostRecent) THEN 'Medium' WHEN FIND_IN_SET('D0601',E.mostRecent) THEN 'Low' ELSE 'None' END) AS 'PriorRiskLevel' ,IFNULL(E.dateProc,'None') AS 'DateOfPriorRiskLevel' ,(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),core.Birthdate) >= 2556 AND !ISNULL(E.dateProc) THEN 'CHECK' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),core.Birthdate) >= 2556 AND E.dateProc <= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 183 DAY) THEN 'NO' WHEN FIND_IN_SET('D0602',E.mostRecent) AND DATE_ADD(E.dateProc,INTERVAL 122 DAY) >= CURDATE() THEN 'YES' WHEN FIND_IN_SET('D0603',E.mostRecent) AND DATE_ADD(E.dateProc,INTERVAL 91 DAY) >= CURDATE() THEN 'YES' WHEN (ISNULL(E.dateProc) OR FIND_IN_SET('D0601',E.mostRecent)) AND DATE_ADD(E.dateProc,INTERVAL 181 DAY) >= CURDATE() THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS 'RecareEligibility' ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT appts.AptDateTime ORDER BY appts.AptDateTime, appts.AptNum) FROM appointment appts INNER JOIN procedurelog procs ON appts.AptNum = procs.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode codes ON procs.CodeNum = codes.CodeNum AND codes.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes WHERE appts.AptDateTime > DATE(@AppointmentDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND appts.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND appts.PatNum = core.PatNum ),'No Appt') AS 'Follow-Up Appt' FROM ( SELECT pat.PatNum ,pat.Birthdate ,CONCAT(pat.LName, ', ', pat.FName) AS 'PatName' ,CONCAT( YEAR(FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),pat.Birthdate))),'y, ', MONTH(FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),pat.Birthdate))),'m, ', DAY(FROM_DAYS(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),pat.Birthdate))),'d' ) AS 'Age' ,GROUP_CONCAT(c.CarrierName ORDER BY c.CarrierName, c.CarrierNum) AS 'Carrier' FROM patient pat INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum = pat.PatNum AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@AppointmentDate) AND DATE(@AppointmentDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus IN (1,2,4) INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pat.PatNum = pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub sub ON pp.InsSubNum = sub.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan plan ON sub.PlanNum = plan.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON plan.CarrierNum = c.CarrierNum AND c.CarrierName REGEXP @CarrierNames WHERE DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),pat.Birthdate) <= 2556 GROUP BY pat.PatNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pc.CodeNum) AS 'mostRecent' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'dateProc' FROM ( SELECT MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS 'ProcDate' ,pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D0603','D0602','D0601') AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@AppointmentDate) AND DATE(@AppointmentDate) + INTERVAL 183 DAY AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) maxProc INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = maxProc.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate = maxProc.ProcDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode IN ('D0603','D0602','D0601') GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) E ON E.PatNum = core.PatNum GROUP BY core.PatNum;

request: Query Written 10/19/2017. Patients with completed D0150 or D0180 in date range with Tx and amounts.
query: SET @FromDate='2017-10-01'; SET @ToDate='2017-10-31'; SET @pos = 0; SELECT (@pos:=@pos+1) AS RowCount, CONCAT(p.LName,',',p.FName) Patient, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(rf.LName,',',rf.FName)),'')ReferredFrom, Tx.TpProcs AS TxRecommended, FORMAT(Tx.TpFee,2) AS AmtRecommended, Tx.CompProcs AS TxCompleted, FORMAT(Tx.CompFee,2) AS AmtCompleted, NextApt.NextAptDate, NextApt.Codes FROM patient p LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ra.RefType=1 LEFT JOIN referral rf ON ra.ReferralNum=rf.ReferralNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=1 THEN SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits+pl.UnitQty)) ELSE 0 END AS TpFee, CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 THEN SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits+pl.UnitQty)) ELSE 0 END AS CompFee, CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=1 THEN GROUP_CONCAT(pc.AbbrDesc) ELSE 0 END AS TpProcs, CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus=2 THEN GROUP_CONCAT(pc.AbbrDesc) ELSE 0 END AS CompProcs FROM( SELECT pl.PatNum, pl.ProcFee,pl.BaseUnits,pl.UnitQty,pl.ProcStatus,pc.AbbrDesc,pl.DateTP FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D0150','D0180') AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum )Comp5080 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON Comp5080.PatNum=pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum )Tx ON Tx.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.AptNum, a.AptDateTime AS NextAptDate, GROUP_CONCAT(prc.AbbrDesc) AS Codes,a.PatNum FROM( SELECT MIN(a.AptDateTime) minAptDayTime, a.PatNum FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus=1 AND a.AptDateTime >= CURDATE() GROUP BY a.PatNum )minApt INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum=minApt.PatNum AND a.AptDateTime=minApt.minAptDayTime INNER JOIN procedurelog prl ON prl.AptNum=a.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode prc ON prc.CodeNum=prl.CodeNum GROUP BY a.PatNum )NextApt ON NextApt.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum;

request: Patients with a Fee Schedule(rarely used) set in the Patient Edit window of the Family module
query: SELECT PatNum AS PatID, LName, FName, FeeSched, patStatus FROM patient WHERE FeeSched != 0 ORDER BY LName, FName

request: Patient level aging for patients by treating provider/provider on the payments/provider on the adjustments.
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT E.Patient AS Patient, E.PatNum AS 'Pat E.ProvAbbr AS 'Provider', E.0to30 AS '0-30 Days', E.31to60 AS '31-60 Days', E.61to90 AS '61-90 Days', E.Over90 AS '>90 Days', E.Total AS 'Total', E.InsEst AS 'Ins Est', E.PatEst AS 'Patient Est' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Patient, D.PatNum, prov.Abbr AS ProvAbbr, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60 THEN D.Charges0to30 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90 THEN D.Charges31to60 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<=D.ChargesOver90 THEN D.Charges61to90 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits>=D.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90-D.Credits END) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.Bal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.InsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.Bal-COALESCE(D.InsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,B.ProvNum,SUM(B.PatBal) AS Bal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS Charges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS Charges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS Charges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS ChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS Credits, COALESCE(C.InsEst,0) AS InsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount, pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount, ps.ProvNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount, a.ProvNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount, cp.ProvNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS ProvNum FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount, ppc.ProvNum FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount, ppc.ProvNum FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) + SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst, cp.ProvNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum AND C.ProvNum=B.ProvNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum,B.ProvNum ) D INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=D.ProvNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND ABS(D.Bal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'TOTALS:' AS Guarantor,'' AS PatNum,'' AS ProvAbbr, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60 THEN D.Charges0to30 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS 0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90 THEN D.Charges31to60 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS 31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<=D.ChargesOver90 THEN D.Charges61to90 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS 61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( (CASE WHEN D.Credits>=D.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90-D.Credits END)) ,2),2) AS Over90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.Bal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(D.InsEst,0)),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.Bal-COALESCE(D.InsEst,0)),2),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,B.ProvNum,SUM(B.PatBal) AS Bal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS Charges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS Charges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS Charges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS ChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS Credits, COALESCE(C.InsEst,0) AS InsEst FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount, pl.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount, ps.ProvNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount, a.ProvNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount, cp.ProvNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS ProvNum FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount, ppc.ProvNum FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount, ppc.ProvNum FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) + SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst, cp.ProvNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProvNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum AND C.ProvNum = B.ProvNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum,B.ProvNum ) D INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=D.ProvNum WHERE prov.Abbr LIKE @ProvAbbr AND ABS(D.Bal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Patient,E.ProvAbbr;

request: Claim procedures provider not matching procedures provider for writeoffs or payments
query: SET @Clinics=''; SET @CutOffDate='2021-07-01'; SELECT CONCAT('PatNum:', pl.PatNum) AS 'PatLink', pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProvNum AS 'ProcProv', cp.ProvNum AS 'ClaimProv', cp.InsPayAmt, cp.WriteOff FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN(1,4,7) AND cp.ProvNum != pl.ProvNum AND (cp.InsPayAmt != 0 OR cp.WriteOff != 0) LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON pl.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @CutOffDate AND CURDATE() AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics))

request: List of guarantors with provider income imbalances.
query: SET @ProvAbbr='%%'; SET @IncomeTransferOnly = 'No'; SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SET @cnt=0; SELECT @cnt := @cnt + 1 AS 'RowNum', display.Pat AS 'Pat Num', display.Guarantor, display.Providers FROM ( SELECT datatable.PatNum AS 'Pat', CONCAT(datatable.LName, ', ', datatable.FName) AS Guarantor, datatable.Providers FROM ( SELECT E.Patient AS Patient, E.PatNum, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT E.ProvAbbr) AS 'Providers', SUM(Total)AS Total, SUM((CASE WHEN TypeOfRow = 'Negative' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS Negative, SUM((CASE WHEN TypeOfRow = 'Positive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS Positive, E.Guarantor, g.LName, g.FName FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Patient, D.PatNum AS PatNum, D.Guarantor, prov.ProvNum AS Provider, prov.Abbr AS ProvAbbr, D.Bal AS Total, IF(D.Bal < 0.005,'Negative','Positive') AS TypeOfRow FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,p.Guarantor, B.ProvNum,SUM(B.PatBal) AS Bal FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate,pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate,ps.ProvNum, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 AND ps.ProvNum != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate,a.ProvNum, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate,cp.ProvNum, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount, p.PriProv FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ProvNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount, ppc.ProvNum FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum,RawPatTrans.ProvNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProvNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=cp.ProvNum WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum AND C.ProvNum=B.ProvNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum,B.ProvNum ) D INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=D.ProvNum AND ABS(D.Bal)>0.005 GROUP BY Provider, Patient ) E INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = E.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum )datatable WHERE (Negative > 0 AND Positive > 0) AND IF(@IncomeTransferOnly = 'Yes', ABS(Total) >= -0.005 AND ABS(Total) <= 0.005, TRUE) AND datatable.Providers LIKE @ProvAbbr ORDER BY datatable.Guarantor ) display

request: Claims received in a date range with 0 payment.
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01', @ToDate='2018-01-30'; SELECT cl.PatNum, (SELECT clinic.request FROM clinic WHERE clinic.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum ) AS 'Clinic', cl.DateSent, (CASE WHEN cl.DateResent = '0001-01-01' THEN '' ELSE cl.DateResent END) AS 'Date Resent', cl.InsPayAmt FROM claim cl WHERE cl.DateReceived BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cl.InsPayAmt = 0

request: Adjustments in the date range with totals by adjustment type.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-06-05', @ToDate='2018-06-05'; SELECT A.Date AS 'Adj Date', A.PatientName AS 'Patient Name', A.Prov AS 'Prov', A.Clinic AS 'Clinic', (CASE WHEN A.ItemOrder=3 THEN '' ELSE A.AdjustmentType END) AS 'Adjustment Type', A.Note, A.Amount AS 'Adj Amount' FROM( SELECT 1 ItemOrder, DATE_FORMAT(adj.AdjDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PatientName', prov.Abbr AS 'Prov', cli.request AS 'Clinic', def.ItemName AS 'AdjustmentType', adj.AdjNote AS 'Note', FORMAT(adj.AdjAmt,2) AS 'Amount' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON adj.AdjType=def.DefNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=adj.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic cli ON cli.ClinicNum=adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'Date', '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Prov', '' AS 'Clinic', def.ItemName AS 'AdjustmentType', '' AS 'Note', FORMAT(SUM(adj.AdjAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON adj.AdjType=def.DefNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=adj.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic cli ON cli.ClinicNum=adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY def.ItemName UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'Date', '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Prov', '' AS 'Clinic', def.ItemName AS 'AdjustmentType', '' AS 'Note', '' AS 'Amount' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON adj.AdjType=def.DefNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=adj.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic cli ON cli.ClinicNum=adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY def.ItemName UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'Date', 'Grand Total' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Prov', '' AS 'Clinic', '' AS 'AdjustmentType', '' AS 'Note', FORMAT(SUM(adj.AdjAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON adj.AdjType=def.DefNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=adj.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic cli ON cli.ClinicNum=adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) A ORDER BY (CASE A.ItemOrder WHEN 5 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END), A.AdjustmentType, A.ItemOrder, A.Date, A.PatientName

request: List of deleted procedures with each iteration of procedure notes.
query: SET @FromDate = '2018-01-01'; SET @ToDate = '2018-01-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS Patient, pl.PatNum AS 'Pat pl.ProcNum, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcDate, pn.EntryDateTime, pn.Note FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procnote pn ON pl.ProcNum = pn.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON pn.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 6 ORDER BY pl.ProcDate, Patient, pl.ProcNum, pn.EntryDateTime

request: Count of documents in specified image categories, per patient. Also shows group concat of dates on the images.
query: SET @ImageCats='Statements|Patient Pictures'; SET @ImageCats=(CASE WHEN @ImageCats='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ImageCats,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT doc.PatNum, def.ItemName AS 'Category', COUNT(doc.PatNum) AS ' GROUP_CONCAT(DATE(DateCreated)) AS 'Document Dates' FROM document doc INNER JOIN definition def ON doc.DocCategory = def.DefNum WHERE def.ItemName REGEXP @ImageCats GROUP BY def.DefNum, doc.PatNum ORDER BY def.DefNum, doc.PatNum

request: Current and historical list of user specified non-deleted patient Medications.
query: SET @Medication='%%'; SELECT mp.PatNum, m.MedName AS MedicationName, IF(mp.DateStart='0001-01-01','Not Entered',DATE_FORMAT(mp.DateStart,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS "DateStart", IF(mp.DateStop='0001-01-01','Not Entered',DATE_FORMAT(mp.DateStop,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS "DateStop", m.Notes AS "MedicationNotes", mp.PatNote AS "PatientNote" FROM medicationpat mp INNER JOIN medication m ON m.MedicationNum=mp.MedicationNum AND m.MedName LIKE @Medication INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=mp.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, m.MedName

request: Current and historical list of user specified non-deleted patient Allergies.
query: SET @Allergy='%%'; SELECT a.PatNum, ad.request AS AllergyName, IF(a.DateAdverseReaction='0001-01-01','Not Entered',DATE_FORMAT(a.DateAdverseReaction,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS DateAdverseReaction, IF(a.StatusIsActive = 1, 'True','False') AS StatusIsActive, a.Reaction FROM allergy a INNER JOIN allergydef ad ON ad.AllergyDefNum=a.AllergyDefNum AND ad.request LIKE @Allergy INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=a.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, ad.request

request: Current and historical list of user specified non-deleted patient problems.
query: SET @Problem='%%'; SELECT di.PatNum, dd.DiseaseName, (CASE WHEN di.ProbStatus = 0 THEN 'Active' WHEN di.ProbStatus = 1 THEN 'Resolved' WHEN di.ProbStatus = 2 THEN 'Inactive' END) AS ProblemStatus, IF(di.DateStart = '0001-01-01','',DATE_FORMAT(di.DateStart,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS DateStart, IF(di.DateStop = '0001-01-01','',DATE_FORMAT(di.DateStop,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS DateStop, PatNote AS PatientNote FROM disease di INNER JOIN diseasedef dd ON dd.DiseaseDefNum=di.DiseaseDefNum AND dd.DiseaseName LIKE @Problem INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=di.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, dd.DiseaseName

request: Patient balances @AsOf date for patients that have not been seen since user specified @CreditSince date variable.
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(), @CreditSince='2018-01-01'; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT E.Guarantor AS GUARANTOR,E.Total AS TOTAL, E.InsEst AS '-INS EST',E.PatEst AS '=PATIENT', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(E.FamLastSeen,"%m/%d/%Y")='01/01/0001' THEN 'NeverSeen' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(E.FamLastSeen,"%m/%d/%Y") END) AS FamLastSeen FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS InsEst, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsEst,0),2),2) AS PatEst, DATE(FamLastSeen) AS FamLastSeen FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst,0)) AS FamInsEst,MAX(COALESCE(DateLastSeen.PatLastSeen,'0001-01-01')) AS FamLastSeen FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS InsEst, SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum,MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS PatLastSeen FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN('D9986','D9987') WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) DateLastSeen ON DateLastSeen.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal<-0.005 ) E WHERE @CreditSince > E.FamLastSeen ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: WebSched Recall reminders sent in a date range with msg text.
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01', @ToDate='2018-01-31'; SELECT wsr.PatNum, (CASE WHEN wsr.SmsSendStatus=3 THEN DATE_FORMAT(wsr.DateTimeReminderSent,'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') ELSE '' END) AS SmsSent, (CASE WHEN wsr.SmsSendStatus = 0 THEN 'Undefined' WHEN wsr.SmsSendStatus = 1 THEN 'DoNotSend' WHEN wsr.SmsSendStatus = 2 THEN 'SendNotAttempted' WHEN wsr.SmsSendStatus = 3 THEN 'SendSuccessful' WHEN wsr.SmsSendStatus = 4 THEN 'SendFailed' END ) AS SmsSendStatus, CASE WHEN wsr.EmailSendStatus=3 THEN DATE_FORMAT(wsr.DateTimeReminderSent,'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') ELSE '' END AS EmailSent, wsr.EmailText, wsr.MsgTextToMobile FROM webschedrecall wsr WHERE (wsr.SmsSendStatus IN (3) OR wsr.EmailSendStatus IN (3)) AND wsr.DateTimeReminderSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY wsr.DateTimeReminderSent;

request: New Patients Report including information from first visit and more
query: SET @FromDate='2021-01-01', @ToDate='2021-12-31'; SET @Prov=''; SET @ExcludeNoProd='NO'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.CodeNum) INTO @Broken FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D9986','D9987'); SELECT p.PatNum ,newpat.FirstVis ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ( SELECT pc1.ProcCode FROM procedurecode pc1 WHERE pc1.CodeNum = pl1.CodeNum ) ORDER BY pl1.ProcNum SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'Procs' ,SUM(pl1.ProcFee * (pl1.UnitQty + pl1.BaseUnits)) AS 'Vis1Gross' ,SUM(pl1.ProcFee * (pl1.UnitQty + pl1.BaseUnits)) + SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = pl1.ProcNum AND adj.PatNum = pl1.PatNum ),0)) - SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (0,1,4) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END)) AS 'WriteOff' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6) AND cp.ProcNum = pl1.ProcNum AND cp.PatNum = pl1.PatNum ),0)) AS 'Vis1Net' ,( SELECT SUM(tot.ProcFee * (tot.UnitQty + tot.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog tot WHERE tot.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(tot.CodeNum,@Broken) AND tot.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'TotGross' ,( SELECT SUM(net.ProcFee * (net.UnitQty + net.BaseUnits)) + SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(adj1.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj1 WHERE adj1.ProcNum = net.ProcNum AND adj1.PatNum = net.PatNum ),0)) - SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN cp1.Status IN (0,1,4) THEN cp1.WriteOff ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(cp1.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp1.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END)) AS 'WriteOff' FROM claimproc cp1 WHERE cp1.Status IN (0,1,4,6) AND cp1.ProcNum = net.ProcNum AND cp1.PatNum = net.PatNum ),0)) FROM procedurelog net WHERE net.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(net.CodeNum,@Broken) AND net.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'TotNet' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ( SELECT prov.Abbr FROM provider prov WHERE prov.ProvNum = pl1.ProvNum ) ORDER BY pl1.ProvNum) AS 'Provs' ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ca.CarrierName ORDER BY ca.CarrierNum SEPARATOR ', ') FROM patplan pp INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE pp.PatNum = p.PatNum ),'') AS 'Carrs' ,p.HmPhone ,p.WirelessPhone ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(r.LName,', ',r.FName ORDER BY ra.RefAttachNum) FROM referral r INNER JOIN refattach ra ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum AND ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.ItemOrder = ( SELECT MIN(refa.ItemOrder) FROM refattach refa WHERE refa.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND refa.RefType = 1 ) WHERE ra.PatNum = p.PatNum ),'') AS 'Referral' ,IFNULL(( SELECT DATE(MIN(a.AptDateTime)) FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus = 1 AND a.AptDateTime > CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.PatNum = p.PatNum ),'None') AS 'NextAppt' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS 'FirstVis' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum,@Broken) GROUP BY pl.PatNum HAVING `FirstVis` BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) newpat ON newpat.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl1 ON pl1.ProcDate = newpat.FirstVis AND pl1.PatNum = newpat.PatNum AND pl1.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl1.CodeNum,@Broken) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = p.PriProv AND IF(LENGTH(@Prov)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Prov)) GROUP BY p.PatNum HAVING IF(@ExcludeNoProd='Yes',`TotGross`>0,TRUE)

request: Popups older than date specified that are not disabled or archived.
query: SET @Date = '2018-11-10'; SELECT pp.PatNum, pp.request, pp.DateTimeEntry FROM popup pp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum WHERE pp.IsDisabled = 0 AND pp.IsArchived = 0 AND pp.DateTimeEntry <= @Date ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName;

request: Production and Income report for a set date range including future scheduled net production
query: SET @FromDate='2017-02-01' , @ToDate='2017-02-28'; SET @WriteoffByDateOfService=(CASE WHEN (SELECT ValueString FROM preference pref WHERE pref.PrefName = 'ReportsPPOwriteoffDefaultToProcDate')=1 THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END); SELECT Trans.TransDate AS 'Date', DATE_FORMAT(Trans.TransDate,"%W") AS 'WeekDay', FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'Prod' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $Prod_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'Sched' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $Sched_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'Adj' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $Adj_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN ('Writeoff','Sched') THEN Trans.Writeoff ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $Writeoff_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN ('Prod','Adj','Sched') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(Trans.Writeoff),2),2) AS $NetProd_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $PatIncome_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN ('InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $InsIncome_, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Trans.TranType IN ('PatPay','InsPay') THEN Trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),2),2) AS $TotalIncome_ FROM ( SELECT 'Prod' AS TranType, pl.ProcDate AS TransDate, pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) - IFNULL(SUM(cp.WriteOff),0) AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Sched' AS TranType, DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS TransDate, ap.ProvNum, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits),0)) AS TranAmount, SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff, 0)) AS 'Writeoff' FROM appointment ap LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON ap.AptNum = pl.AptNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride = -1 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.WriteOffEst = -1 THEN 0 ELSE cp.WriteOffEst END) ELSE cp.WriteOffEstOverride END),0)) AS 'WriteOff', cp.ProcNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 WHERE cp.Status IN (5,6,8) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE ap.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND (@ToDate+INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY ap.AptNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType, a.AdjDate AS TransDate, a.ProvNum, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType, ps.DatePay AS TransDate, ps.ProvNum, ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.IsDiscount = 0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType, cp.DateCP AS TransDate, cp.ProvNum, cp.InsPayAmt AS TranAmount, 0 AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpm ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpm.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON cp.PlanNum=ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (1,4) UNION ALL SELECT 'Writeoff' AS TranType, (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN cp.ProcDate ELSE cp.DateCP END) AS TransDate, cp.ProvNum, 0 AS TranAmount, cp.WriteOff AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE (CASE WHEN @WriteoffByDateOfService='YES' THEN cp.ProcDate ELSE cp.DateCP END) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4) ) Trans GROUP BY Trans.TransDate ORDER BY Trans.TransDate;

request: Guarantors with installment plans, shows current family balance and expected remaining monthly payments.
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT g.PatNum AS 'Pat ip.DateAgreement, ip.DateFirstPayment, ip.APR, FORMAT(ip.MonthlyPayment,2) AS 'MonthlyPayment', FORMAT(fambal.FamBal,2) AS 'FamilyBalance', FORMAT(CEIL(fambal.FamBal/ip.MonthlyPayment),2) 'MonthsRemain', ip.Note FROM patient g INNER JOIN installmentplan ip ON g.PatNum = ip.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(pattrans.PatBal) AS FamBal, g.PatNum FROM ( SELECT rawpattrans.PatNum,SUM(rawpattrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) rawpattrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY rawpattrans.PatNum ) pattrans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pattrans.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) fambal ON fambal.PatNum = g.PatNum GROUP BY g.PatNum

request: Patients who had a recall trigger procedure completed but don't have a corresponding recall type
query: SET @RecallTriggers='D4910|D4341|D4342'; SET @RecallType='Perio'; SET @RecallTriggers=(CASE WHEN @RecallTriggers='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@RecallTriggers,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT rt.RecallTypeNum FROM recalltype rt WHERE rt.request LIKE @RecallType INTO @RTNum; SET @pos=0; SELECT DISTINCT @pos:=@pos+1 AS COUNT, a.PatNum, a.Number FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum, p.PatNum AS 'Number', (SELECT r.PatNum FROM recall r WHERE r.PatNum = p.PatNum AND r.RecallTypeNum = @RTNum GROUP BY r.PatNum) AS 'RecallExists' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @RecallTriggers WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY p.PatNum HAVING ISNULL(RecallExists) )a;
