request: Overpaid procedures showing adjustments, writeoffs, insurance payments, and patient payments
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-01-31'; SELECT a.PatNum AS 'Pat CONCAT(a.LName,', ',a.FName) AS 'Patient Name', a.ProcCode, a.ProcDate, FORMAT(COALESCE((a.Fee),0)-COALESCE((a.CapWriteOff),0),2) AS 'Fees', FORMAT(COALESCE((a.AdjAmt),0),2) AS 'AdjAmt', FORMAT(COALESCE((a.WriteOffEst),0),2) AS 'WriteOffEst', FORMAT(COALESCE((a.WriteOff),0),2) AS 'WriteOffs', FORMAT(COALESCE((a.InsPayEst),0),2) AS 'InsPayEsts', FORMAT(COALESCE((a.InsPayAmt),0),2) AS 'InsPayAmt', FORMAT(COALESCE((a.Fee),0)-COALESCE((a.CapWriteOff),0)-COALESCE((a.WriteOffEst),0)-COALESCE((a.WriteOff),0)-COALESCE((a.InsPayEst),0)-COALESCE((a.InsPayAmt),0),2) AS 'Patient Portion', FORMAT(COALESCE((a.PatPayAmt),0),2) AS 'PatPayAmt', FORMAT(COALESCE((a.Fee),0)-COALESCE((a.CapWriteOff),0)-COALESCE((a.WriteOffEst),0)-COALESCE((a.WriteOff),0)-COALESCE((a.InsPayEst),0)-COALESCE((a.InsPayAmt),0)-COALESCE((a.PatPayAmt),0)+COALESCE((a.AdjAmt),0),2) AS 'EstTotal', FORMAT(COALESCE((a.Fee),0)-COALESCE((a.CapWriteOff),0)-COALESCE((a.WriteOff),0)-COALESCE((a.InsPayAmt),0)-COALESCE((a.PatPayAmt),0)+COALESCE((a.AdjAmt),0),2) AS 'Total' FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum, p.LName, p.FName, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'Fee', ( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 ) AS 'CapWriteoff', ( SELECT SUM(IF(cp.Status = 0, cp.WriteOff, COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0))) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,6) ) AS 'WriteOffEst', ( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ) AS 'WriteOff', ( SELECT SUM(IF(cp.Status = 0, cp.InsPayEst, COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.InsEstTotalOverride, -1), cp.InsEstTotal))) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,6) ) AS 'InsPayEst', ( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ) AS 'InsPayAmt', ( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum ) AS 'PatPayAmt', ( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum ) AS 'AdjAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) a WHERE CAST((COALESCE((a.Fee),0)-COALESCE((a.CapWriteOff),0)-COALESCE((a.WriteOffEst),0)-COALESCE((a.WriteOff),0)-COALESCE((a.InsPayEst),0)-COALESCE((a.InsPayAmt),0)-COALESCE((a.PatPayAmt),0)+COALESCE((a.AdjAmt),0)) AS DECIMAL(40,2)) < 0 ORDER BY a.ProcDate

request: Aging Report for TSI Aging Manager
query: SET @TSIBillingType='TSI'; SET @DisplaySet=2; SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SET @0to30=0, @31to60=0, @61to90=0, @Over90=0, @Total=0, @InsEst=0, @PatEst=0; SELECT f.Guarantor, f.030DAYS AS '0-30 DAYS', f.3160DAYS AS '31-60 DAYS', f.6190DAYS AS '61-90 DAYS', f.90DAYS AS '>90 DAYS', f.TOTAL, f.InsEst, f.PATIENT AS '=PATIENT' FROM ( SELECT e.Guarantor, FORMAT(e.0to30,2) AS '030DAYS', @0to30 := @0to30 + e.0to30, FORMAT(e.31to60,2) AS '3160DAYS', @31to60 := @31to60 + e.31to60, FORMAT(e.61to90,2) AS '6190DAYS', @61to90 := @61to90 + e.61to90, FORMAT(e.Over90,2) AS '90DAYS', @Over90 := @Over90 + e.Over90, FORMAT(e.Total,2) AS 'TOTAL', @Total := @Total + e.Total, FORMAT(e.InsPayEst+e.WriteOffEst,2) AS 'InsEst', @InsEst := @InsEst + (e.InsPayEst+e.WriteOffEst), FORMAT(e.PatEst,2) AS 'PATIENT', @PatEst := @PatEst + e.PatEst FROM ( SELECT d.PatNum, CONCAT(d.PatNum,'-',d.LName,', ',d.FName) AS 'Guarantor', ROUND( (CASE WHEN d.FamCredits<d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60 THEN d.FamCharges0to30 WHEN d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60+d.FamCharges0to30<=d.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60+d.FamCharges0to30-d.FamCredits END) ,2) AS '0to30', ROUND( (CASE WHEN d.FamCredits<d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90 THEN d.FamCharges31to60 WHEN d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60<=d.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60-d.FamCredits END) ,2) AS '31to60', ROUND( (CASE WHEN d.FamCredits<=d.FamChargesOver90 THEN d.FamCharges61to90 WHEN d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90<=d.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90-d.FamCredits END) ,2) AS '61to90', ROUND( (CASE WHEN d.FamCredits>=d.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE d.FamChargesOver90-d.FamCredits END) ,2) AS 'Over90', ROUND((d.FamBal),2) AS 'Total', ROUND(COALESCE(d.FamInsPayEst,0),2) AS 'InsPayEst', ROUND(COALESCE(d.FamWriteOffEst,0),2) AS 'WriteOffEst', ROUND(d.FamBal-COALESCE(d.FamInsPayEst,0)-COALESCE(d.FamWriteOffEst,0),2) AS 'PatEst' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(b.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(b.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(b.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(b.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(b.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(b.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(c.InsEst) AS FamInsPayEst, SUM(c.Writeoff) AS FamWriteOffEst FROM ( SELECT rawpattrans.PatNum,SUM(rawpattrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (rawpattrans.TranAmount>0 AND rawpattrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND rawpattrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN rawpattrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (rawpattrans.TranAmount>0 AND rawpattrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND rawpattrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN rawpattrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (rawpattrans.TranAmount>0 AND rawpattrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND rawpattrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN rawpattrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (rawpattrans.TranAmount>0 AND rawpattrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN rawpattrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (rawpattrans.TranAmount<0 AND rawpattrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN rawpattrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) rawpattrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY rawpattrans.PatNum ) b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS InsEst, SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) c ON c.PatNum=b.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=b.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor AND g.PatStatus NOT IN(4) INNER JOIN definition def ON g.BillingType = def.DefNum AND IF(@DisplaySet = 1, def.ItemName = @TSIBillingType, def.ItemName != @TSIBillingType) GROUP BY g.PatNum ) d WHERE ABS(d.FamBal)>0.005 GROUP BY d.PatNum ORDER BY d.LName )e WHERE IF(@DisplaySet = 2, e.PatEst < -0.005, e.PatEst > -0.005) UNION ALL SELECT ' ' ' ' ' ' ' ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Totals:', FORMAT(@0to30,2),'', FORMAT(@31to60,2),'', FORMAT(@61to90,2),'', FORMAT(@Over90,2),'', FORMAT(@Total,2),'', FORMAT(@InsEst,2),'', FORMAT(@PatEst,2),'' )f

request: Insurance aging report. Outstanding insurance estimates aged by date of service 0 to 30, 30 to 60, 60 to 90 etc. Summed by carrier and patient
query: SELECT A.CarrierName, PatNum, SUM(Ins0to30) AS $Ins0to30_ , SUM(Ins30to60) AS $Ins30to60_, SUM(Ins60to90) AS $Ins60to90_, SUM(InsOver90) AS $InsOver90_, SUM(InsPayEst) AS $SumInsPayEst_ FROM ( SELECT ClaimNum, PatNum, InsPayEst, DateService, ip.CarrierNum, carrier.CarrierName, IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))> 90,InsPayEst,0) AS 'InsOver90', IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))> 60,IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))<= 90, InsPayEst,0),0) AS 'Ins60to90', IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))> 30,IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))<= 60, InsPayEst,0),0) AS 'Ins30to60', IF((TO_DAYS(CURDATE())-TO_DAYS(DateService))<= 30,InsPayEst,0) AS 'Ins0to30' FROM claim INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=claim.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE ClaimStatus='S' AND ClaimType!="PreAuth" ) A GROUP BY A.CarrierNum, A.PatNum ORDER BY A.CarrierName;

request: List of deleted procedures and each instance of the procedures note for the specified patient.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01', @ToDate='2018-01-31'; SET @PatientNumber = 0; SELECT a.PatNum, a.PatNum AS 'Account a.ProcDate, a.ProcCode, a.ProcNum, a.EntryDateTime, a.Note FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcNum, pl.PatNum, pn.ProcNoteNum, pn.EntryDateTime, pn.Note FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procnote pn ON pl.ProcNum = pn.ProcNum AND pn.Note != '' INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 6 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @PatientNumber = 0 THEN TRUE ELSE pl.PatNum = @PatientNumber END) ORDER BY pl.ProcDate, pl.PatNum, ProcNoteNum ) a

request: Printable form of Internal Carrier List
query: SET @Hidden=''; SET @CDANetOnly=''; SELECT carrier.CarrierName , carrier.Phone , carrier.Address , carrier.Address2 , carrier.City , carrier.State , carrier.Zip , carrier.ElectID , IF(carrier.IsHidden = 0, '','X') AS 'Hidden' , COUNT(insplan.PlanNum) AS Plans FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.CarrierNum = carrier.CarrierNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Hidden) = 0, NOT (carrier.IsHidden), TRUE) AND IF(LENGTH(@CDANetOnly) = 0, TRUE, carrier.IsCDA) GROUP BY carrier.CarrierNum ORDER BY carrier.CarrierName

request: Patient Status Changes
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @FromStatus='Patient,NonPatient'; SET @ToStatus='Inactive,Archived,Deceased'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @Clins = IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, '^', CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$')); SELECT pref.ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference pref WHERE pref.PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SET @FromStatus=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@FromStatus)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@FromStatus,',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ToStatus=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ToStatus)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ToStatus,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT DATE_FORMAT(seclog.LogDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ChangeDate' ,seclog.PatientName ,seclog.Clinic ,seclog.PatientStatus ,seclog.FromStatus ,seclog.ToStatus ,seclog.UserName ,IFNULL(( SELECT MAX(pl.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.PatNum = seclog.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 ), '') AS 'LastCompletedProc' FROM ( SELECT sl.PatNum ,sl.LogDateTime ,uo.UserName ,CONCAT( TRIM(p.LName) ,',' ,(CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(p.Preferred)) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', TRIM(p.Preferred),'\'') ELSE '' END) ,' ' ,TRIM(p.FName) ,(CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(p.MiddleI)) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', TRIM(p.MiddleI)) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName' ,(CASE p.PatStatus WHEN 0 THEN 'Patient' WHEN 1 THEN 'NonPatient' WHEN 2 THEN 'Inactive' WHEN 3 THEN 'Archived' WHEN 4 THEN 'Deleted' WHEN 5 THEN 'Deceased' WHEN 6 THEN 'Prospective' END) AS 'PatientStatus' ,(CASE sl.PermType WHEN 24 THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,'Patient status changed from ', -1),' to ', 1) AS CHAR(250)) WHEN 108 THEN IF(sl.LogText LIKE '%through ChangePatStatus automation.%' ,CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,'Patient status changed from ',-1),' to ',1),'-p','P') AS CHAR(250)) ,CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,'Patient status changed from \'',-1),'\'',1),'-p','P') AS CHAR(250)) ) ELSE '' END) AS 'FromStatus' ,(CASE sl.PermType WHEN 24 THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,' to ', -1),' by the Patient Status Setter tool.', 1) AS CHAR(250)) WHEN 108 THEN IF(sl.LogText LIKE '%through ChangePatStatus automation.%' ,CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,' to ', -1),' through ChangePatStatus automation.', 1),'-p','P') AS CHAR(250)) ,CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,CONCAT('Patient status changed from \'',CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,'Patient status changed from \'',-1),'\'',1) AS CHAR(250)),'\' to \''),-1),'\'',1),'-p','P') AS CHAR(250)) ) ELSE '' END) AS 'ToStatus' , IF(@EasyNoClinics = 0, IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned'), '') AS 'Clinic' FROM securitylog sl INNER JOIN patient p ON sl.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN userod uo ON sl.UserNum = uo.UserNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum WHERE sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND sl.PermType IN (24,108) AND sl.LogText LIKE '%Patient status changed from %' AND IF(@EasyNoClinics = 0, IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clins, TRUE) ) seclog WHERE seclog.FromStatus REGEXP @FromStatus AND seclog.ToStatus REGEXP @ToStatus

request: Find stored cards by the last 4 digits to see which patient they are attached to.
query: SET @CardEnd = '%'; SELECT cc.PatNum, RIGHT(cc.CCNumberMasked, 4) FROM creditcard cc WHERE cc.CCNumberMasked LIKE @CardEnd

request: List of blockouts from date specified going forward. Defaults to date report is ran.
query: SET @SchedDate=CURDATE(); SET @BlockoutType=''; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(sched.SchedDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'SchedOn', sched.StartTime AS 'StartAt', sched.StopTime AS 'StopAt', ( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.DefNum = sched.BlockoutType ) AS 'BlockoutType', sched.Note FROM SCHEDULE sched WHERE sched.SchedType = 2 AND sched.SchedDate >= @SchedDate HAVING IF(LENGTH(@BlockoutType) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(BlockoutType, @BlockoutType)) ORDER BY sched.SchedDate

request: Production in a date range summed by procedure category. With number completed, total gross and net production, average gross and net production per procedure, and Percent of gross production in a date range. Claims need to be created for Writeoffs to be included.
query: SET @FromDate='2019-03-01',@ToDate='2019-03-28'; SET @RowPos = 0; SELECT IF(RowPos = 1,CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),' - ',DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%Y')),'') AS ReportRange, A.ItemName, A.Quantity AS Qty_, FORMAT(A.GrossProd,2) AS GrossProdTotal_, FORMAT(A.Average,2) AS GrossAvg_, FORMAT(A.Writeoff,2) AS Writeoff__, FORMAT(A.Adjustment,2) AS Adjustment_, FORMAT(A.Total,2) AS NetProdTotal_, FORMAT(COALESCE(A.Total/A.Quantity, 0), 2) AS NetAvg_, FORMAT(A.Percent,2) AS Percent_ FROM ( SELECT @RowPos := @RowPos + 1 AS RowPos, 2 AS ItemOrder, cat.ItemName AS 'ItemName', COUNT(pl.CodeNum) AS 'Quantity', SUM(IFNULL(pl.Writeoff,0)) 'Writeoff', SUM(IFNULL(pl.Adjustment,0)) 'Adjustment', COALESCE( ((SUM(IFNULL(pl.GrossProcFee,0)) + SUM(IFNULL(pl.Adjustment,0))) - SUM(IFNULL(pl.Writeoff,0))) ,0) AS 'Total', SUM(IFNULL(pl.GrossProcFee,0)) AS 'GrossProd', COALESCE( (COALESCE(SUM(IFNULL(pl.GrossProcFee,0)),0) / COUNT(pl.CodeNum)) ,0) AS 'Average', ROUND( IFNULL( COALESCE(SUM(IFNULL(pl.GrossProcFee,0)),0) / (SELECT SUM(IFNULL(pl.ProcFee,0)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0)*100,2) AS 'Percent' FROM procedurecode pc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS GrossProcFee, IFNULL(cp.Writeoff,0) AS Writeoff, IFNULL(adj.AdjAmt,0) AS Adjustment, pl.CodeNum FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum, SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate >= @FromDate AND cp.Writeoff != 0 AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4,7) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT adj.ProcNum, SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum != 0 GROUP BY adj.ProcNum )adj ON adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) pl ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition cat ON cat.DefNum=pc.ProcCat GROUP BY pc.ProcCat ORDER BY RowPos, ItemOrder, ItemName ) A UNION ALL SELECT '' AS ReportRange, '' AS ItemName, A.Quantity AS Qty_, CONCAT('$',FORMAT(A.GrossProd,2)) AS GrossProdTotal_, '' AS GrossAvg_, CONCAT('$',FORMAT(A.Writeoff,2)) AS Writeoff__, CONCAT('$',FORMAT(A.Adjustment,2)) AS Adjustment_, CONCAT('$',FORMAT(A.Total,2)) AS NetProdTotal_, '' AS NetAvg_, '' AS Percent_ FROM ( SELECT @RowPos := @RowPos + 1 AS RowPos, 2 AS ItemOrder, cat.ItemName AS 'ItemName', COUNT(pl.CodeNum) AS 'Quantity', SUM(IFNULL(pl.Writeoff,0)) 'Writeoff', SUM(IFNULL(pl.Adjustment,0)) 'Adjustment', COALESCE( ((SUM(IFNULL(pl.GrossProcFee,0)) + SUM(IFNULL(pl.Adjustment,0))) - SUM(IFNULL(pl.Writeoff,0))) ,0) AS 'Total', SUM(IFNULL(pl.GrossProcFee,0)) AS 'GrossProd', COALESCE( (COALESCE(SUM(IFNULL(pl.GrossProcFee,0)),0) / COUNT(pl.CodeNum)) ,0) AS 'Average', ROUND( IFNULL( COALESCE(SUM(IFNULL(pl.GrossProcFee,0)),0) / (SELECT SUM(IFNULL(pl.ProcFee,0)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate),0)*100,2) AS 'Percent' FROM procedurecode pc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS GrossProcFee, IFNULL(cp.Writeoff,0) AS Writeoff, IFNULL(adj.AdjAmt,0) AS Adjustment, pl.CodeNum FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum, SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate >= @FromDate AND cp.Writeoff != 0 AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4,7) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT adj.ProcNum, SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum != 0 GROUP BY adj.ProcNum )adj ON adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) pl ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition cat ON cat.DefNum=pc.ProcCat ORDER BY RowPos, ItemOrder, ItemName ) A

request: Practice Daysheet
query: SET @FromDate='2019-01-10', @ToDate='2019-01-10'; SET @Providers = ""; SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @Providers=(CASE WHEN @Providers="" THEN ".*" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Providers,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT B.Title, B.Provider, B.Patient, B.ProcCode, B.ToothNum, B.Fee AS 'Cash Fee', B.PriCarrier, B.PriFee, B.PriInsPay, B.SecCarrier, B.SecFee, B.SecInsPay, B.PriDeduct, B.SecDeduct, B.PatPay, B.NoInsUnpaid, B.PriUnpaid, B.SecUnpaid FROM ( SELECT A.Title, A.Provider, A.Patient, IF(ItemOrder = 12,FORMAT(A.ProcCode,2),A.ProcCode) AS ProcCode, IF(ItemOrder = 12,FORMAT(A.ToothNum,2),IF(ItemOrder = 3,NULL,A.ToothNum)) AS ToothNum, IF(ItemOrder = 0, 'Cash Fee',IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3,12),FORMAT(A.Fee,2),A.Fee)) AS Fee, IF(ItemOrder = 12,FORMAT(A.PriCarrier,2),A.PriCarrier) AS PriCarrier, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3,12),FORMAT(A.PriFee,2),A.PriFee) AS PriFee, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3,6,9,12), FORMAT(A.PriInsPay,2),A.PriInsPay) AS PriInsPay, IF(ItemOrder = 12,FORMAT(A.SecCarrier,2),A.SecCarrier) AS SecCarrier, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3),FORMAT(A.SecFee,2),A.SecFee) AS SecFee, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3,6,9,12), FORMAT(A.SecInsPay,2),A.SecInsPay) AS SecInsPay, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3),FORMAT(A.PriDeduct,2),A.PriDeduct) AS PriDeduct, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3),FORMAT(A.SecDeduct,2),A.SecDeduct) AS SecDeduct, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3,6,9,12), FORMAT(A.PatPay,2),A.PatPay) AS PatPay, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3),FORMAT(A.NoInsUnpaid,2),A.NoInsUnpaid) AS NoInsUnpaid, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3),FORMAT(A.PriUnpaid,2),A.PriUnpaid) AS PriUnpaid, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3),FORMAT(A.SecUnpaid,2),A.SecUnpaid) AS SecUnpaid, IF(ItemOrder IN (1,3,6,9,12), FORMAT(A.Balance,2),A.Balance) AS Balance FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,'Provider Productivity: ' AS Title,'Provider','Patient', 'ProcCode','ToothNum','Fee','PriCarrier','PriFee','PriInsPay','SecCarrier','SecFee','SecInsPay','PriDeduct','SecDeduct', 'PatPay','NoInsUnpaid','PriUnpaid','SecUnpaid','Balance' UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, NULL AS '', pv.Abbr AS Provider, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient, pc.ProcCode, pl.ToothNum, IF(p.HasIns = 'I', NULL, pl.ProcFee) AS ProcFee, MAX(ins.PriCarrier) AS PriCarrier, MAX(ins.PriFeeBilled) AS PriFee, MAX(IFNULL(ins.PriInsPay,NULL)) AS PriInsPay, MAX(ins.SecCarrier) AS SecCarrier, MAX(IFNULL(ins.SecFeeBilled,NULL)) AS SecFee, MAX(IFNULL(ins.SecInsPay,NULL)) AS SecInsPay, MAX(ins.PriDeduct)AS PriDeductible, MAX(ins.SecDeduct)AS SecDeductible, IFNULL(patpay.Payments,0) PatPay, IF(p.HasIns = 'I', NULL, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) - IFNULL(patpay.Payments,0)) AS NoInsUnPaid, MAX(ins.PriFeeBilled) - (IFNULL(patpay.Payments,0) + MAX(IFNULL(ins.PriInsPay,0))) AS PriUnPaid, MAX(ins.SecFeeBilled) - (IFNULL(patpay.Payments,0) + MAX(IFNULL(ins.SecInsPay,0))) AS SecUnPaid, NULL AS Balance FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pv ON pl.ProvNum = pv.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr REGEXP @Providers INNER JOIN patient p ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum, cp.ProcNum, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 1,cp.DedApplied,0)) AS PriDeduct, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 2,cp.DedApplied,0)) AS SecDeduct, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 1,(SELECT CarrierName FROM carrier WHERE CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum),NULL)) AS PriCarrier, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 2,(SELECT CarrierName FROM carrier WHERE CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum),NULL)) AS SecCarrier, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 1 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum, cp.FeeBilled, 0)) AS PriFeeBilled, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 2 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum, cp.FeeBilled, 0)) AS SecFeeBilled, SUM(IF(pp.Ordinal = 1 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum,cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS PriInsPay, SUM(IF(pp.Ordinal = 2 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum,cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS SecInsPay FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum GROUP BY cp.PlanNum, cp.ProcNum )ins ON ins.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.ProcNum, SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS Payments FROM paysplit ps GROUP BY ps.ProcNum )patpay ON patpay.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'Prov Totals: ',' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, NULL AS '', pv.Abbr AS Provider, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient, NULL AS ProcCode, pl.ToothNum, IF(p.HasIns = 'I', NULL, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))) AS ProcFee, MAX(ins.PriCarrier) AS PriCarrier, SUM(ins.PriFeeBilled) AS PriFee, SUM(IFNULL(ins.PriInsPay,0)) AS PriInsPay, MAX(ins.SecCarrier) AS SecCarrier, SUM(ins.SecFeeBilled) AS SecFee, SUM(IFNULL(ins.SecInsPay,0)) AS SecInsPay, SUM(ins.PriDeduct) AS PriDeduct, SUM(ins.SecDeduct) AS SecDeduct, IFNULL(patpay.Payments,0) PatPay, IF(p.HasIns = 'I', NULL, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) - (IFNULL(patpay.Payments,0)) ) AS NoInsUnPaid, SUM(ins.PriFeeBilled) - ((IFNULL(patpay.Payments,0)) + MAX(IFNULL(ins.PriInsPay,0))) AS PriUnPaid, SUM(ins.SecFeeBilled) - ((IFNULL(patpay.Payments,0)) + MAX(IFNULL(ins.SecInsPay,0))) AS SecUnPaid, NULL AS Balance FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pv ON pl.ProvNum = pv.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr REGEXP @Providers INNER JOIN patient p ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum, cp.ProcNum, cp.PlanNum, cp.DedApplied, pp.Ordinal, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 1,(SELECT CarrierName FROM carrier WHERE CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum),NULL)) AS PriCarrier, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 2,(SELECT CarrierName FROM carrier WHERE CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum),NULL)) AS SecCarrier, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 1 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum, cp.FeeBilled, 0)) AS PriFeeBilled, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 2 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum, cp.FeeBilled, 0)) AS SecFeeBilled, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 1 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum,cp.DedApplied,0)) AS PriDeduct, MAX(IF(pp.Ordinal = 2 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum,cp.DedApplied,0)) AS SecDeduct, SUM(IF(pp.Ordinal = 1 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum,cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS PriInsPay, SUM(IF(pp.Ordinal = 2 AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum,cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS SecInsPay FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum GROUP BY cp.PlanNum, cp.ProcNum, pp.Ordinal )ins ON ins.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND ins.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.ProcNum, ps.ProvNum, ps.PatNum, SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS Payments FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum > 0 AND ps. ProcNum IN ( SELECT ProcNum FROM procedurelog WHERE ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ProcStatus = 2 ) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum, ps.PatNum )patpay ON patpay.Provnum = pl.ProvNum AND pl.PatNum = patpay.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProvNum, pl.PatNum UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder,'','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder,'Credit Balances: ' AS Title,NULL,'Patient',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder, NULL AS Title, NULL AS Provider, CONCAT(E.Patient,' | Bal: $', FORMAT(E.PatEst,2)) AS Patient, NULL AS ProcCode, NULL AS ToothNum, NULL AS ProcFee, NULL AS PriCarrier, NULL AS PriFee, NULL AS PriInsPay, NULL AS SecCarrier, NULL AS SecFee, NULL AS SecInsPay, NULL AS PriDeduct, NULL AS SecDeduct, NULL PatPay, NULL AS NoInsUnpaid, NULL AS PriUnpaid, NULL AS SecUnpaid, NULL AS 'Balance' FROM ( SELECT D.PatNum, CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Patient, ROUND(D.PatBal-COALESCE(D.PatInsPayEst,0)-COALESCE(D.PatWriteOffEst,0),2) AS PatEst FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS PatBal, SUM(C.InsEst) AS PatInsPayEst, SUM(C.Writeoff) AS PatWriteOffEst, SUBSTRING_INDEX(B.PatNum,',',-1) AS ProvWhoDidProc FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, MAX(IF(TranType = 'Fee' AND TranDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate,1,0)) AS ProcInRange, IF(TranType = 'Fee' AND TranDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate,SUBSTRING_INDEX(RawPatTrans.PatNum,',',-1),RawPatTrans.PatNum) AS ProvWhoDidProc FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,CONCAT(pl.PatNum,',',pl.ProvNum ) AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(RawPatTrans.PatNum,',',1) ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS InsEst, SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = SUBSTRING_INDEX(B.PatNum,',',1) WHERE ProcInRange = 1 GROUP BY p.PatNum ) D INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum = D.ProvWhoDidProc AND pv.Abbr REGEXP @Providers WHERE ABS(D.PatBal)>0.005 GROUP BY D.PatNum ORDER BY D.LName )E WHERE E.PatEst < 0 UNION ALL SELECT 7 AS ItemOrder,'','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 8 AS ItemOrder,'Deleted Procedures: ' AS Title,'Provider','Patient','ProcCode',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL UNION ALL SELECT 9 AS ItemOrder, NULL AS Title, pv.Abbr AS Provider, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient, CONCAT(pc.ProcCode, ' | ', DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS ProcCode, NULL AS ToothNum, NULL AS ProcFee, NULL AS PriCarrier, NULL AS PriFee, NULL AS PriInsPay, NULL AS SecCarrier, NULL AS SecFee, NULL AS SecInsPay, NULL AS PriDeduct, NULL AS SecDeduct, NULL PatPay, NULL AS NoInsUnpaid, NULL AS PriUnpaid, NULL AS SecUnpaid, NULL AS 'Balance' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pv ON pl.ProvNum = pv.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr REGEXP @Providers INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 6 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS ItemOrder,'','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 11 AS ItemOrder,'Overall DaySheet: ' AS Title,'Provider','New Pats','GrossProd','Writeoff','Adjustment','NetProd','Collections',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL UNION ALL SELECT 12 AS ItemOrder, NULL AS Title, pv.Abbr AS Provider, COUNT(DISTINCT IF(firstvisit.FvDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate,pl.PatNum,NULL)) AS NewPat, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) + IFNULL(cpcap.WriteOff,0) AS GrossProd, IFNULL(cp.Writeoff,0) Writeoff, IFNULL(adj.AdjAmt,0) Adjustment, ( SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) + IFNULL(adj.AdjAmt,0) + IFNULL(cpcap.WriteOff,0) + (IFNULL(cp.Writeoff,0)) ) AS Balance, IFNULL(ps.SplitTot,0) + IFNULL(cp.InsPayAmt,0) AS Collections, NULL AS PriFee, NULL AS SecFee, NULL AS PriDeduct, NULL AS SecDeduct, NULL AS PriInsPay, NULL AS SecCarrier, NULL AS SecInsPay, NULL PatPay, NULL AS NoInsUnpaid, NULL AS PriUnpaid, NULL AS SecUnpaid FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pv ON pl.ProvNum = pv.ProvNum AND pv.Abbr REGEXP @Providers LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProvNum, cp.ProcNum, -SUM(IF(cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate,cp.Writeoff,0)) Writeoff, SUM(IF(cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ,cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS InsPayAmt FROM claimproc cp WHERE (cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate OR cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate) AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4) AND cp.ProvNum != 0 GROUP BY cp.ProvNum ) cp ON cp.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProvNum, cp.ProcNum, -SUM(cp.Writeoff) Writeoff, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPayAmt FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status = 7 AND cp.ProvNum != 0 GROUP BY cp.ProvNum ) cpcap ON cp.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.ProvNum, SUM(a.AdjAmt) AdjAmt FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY a.ProvNum ) adj ON adj.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.ProvNum, SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS SplitTot FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ps.ProvNum != 0 GROUP BY ps.ProvNum ) ps ON ps.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS FvDate FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) firstvisit ON firstvisit.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProvNum )A ORDER BY ItemOrder, Provider, Patient, ProcCode )B

request: Provider totals for Patient, and Insurance Income, deducting Lab Fees from Total column.
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01'; SET @ToDate='2018-01-31'; SELECT (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pv.Abbr) THEN 'Totals:' ELSE pv.Abbr END) AS Provider, CONCAT('$',FORMAT(SUM(IFNULL(totals.PatientIncome,0)),2)) 'Patient Income', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(SUM(IFNULL(totals.InsuranceIncome,0)),2)) 'Insurance Income', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(SUM(IFNULL(totals.LabFees,0)),2)) 'Lab Fees', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(SUM(IFNULL(totals.Totals,0)),2)) 'Total' FROM provider pv LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pv.Abbr, SUM(IF(TranType = 'PatPay',transtable.TransAmt,0)) AS PatientIncome, SUM(IF(TranType = 'InsPay',transtable.TransAmt,0)) AS InsuranceIncome, SUM(IF(TranType = 'LabFee',transtable.TransAmt,0)) AS LabFees, (SUM(IF(TranType = 'PatPay',transtable.TransAmt,0))+SUM(IF(TranType = 'InsPay',transtable.TransAmt,0))-SUM(IF(TranType = 'LabFee',transtable.TransAmt,0))) AS Totals FROM ( SELECT 'LabFee' AS TranType, pl.ProvNum, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits))AS TransAmt FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode IN ('99111','99112') WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS TranType, ps.ProvNum, SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS TransAmt FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProvNum != 0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType, cp.ProvNum, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS TransAmt FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ProvNum ) transtable INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum = transtable.ProvNum GROUP BY pv.Abbr )totals ON totals.Abbr = pv.Abbr WHERE pv.IsHiddenReport != TRUE GROUP BY pv.Abbr WITH ROLLUP

request: List of specified appointments types, moved from the unscheduled list, in a user specified date range, for the list of specified users, by clinic.
query: SET @FromDate='2018-02-08', @ToDate='2018-02-08'; SET @AptTypes = ''; SET @Users = ''; SET @Clinics = ''; SET @AptTypes=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@AptTypes)=0 THEN '.*' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@AptTypes,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @Users=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Users)=0 THEN '.*' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Users,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @Clinics=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics' INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT apts.PatientName, apts.DateOfBirth AS ' Birthdate', apts.AppointmentType, apts.AptDateTime, DATE_FORMAT(apts.MoveFromUnsched,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Moved From Unsched', apts.SecurityLogUser AS 'User Moved rom Unsched', apts.AptStatus, apts.Clinic FROM ( SELECT uap.FKey, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'PatientName', IF(p.Birthdate='0001-01-01','Not Entered',DATE_FORMAT(p.Birthdate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'DateOfBirth', apt.AppointmentTypeName AS 'AppointmentType', uap.LogDateTime AS 'MoveFromUnsched', ap.AptDateTime, ap.AptStatus, uap.UserName AS 'SecurityLogUser', (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.request,'Unassigned') ELSE '' END) AS 'Clinic' FROM ( SELECT MIN(sl2.LogDateTime) LogDateTime, sl2.Fkey, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(uo.UserName, ', ', sl2.LogDateTime ORDER BY sl2.LogDateTime), ', ', 1) AS UserName FROM ( SELECT MAX(sl.LogDateTime) LogDateTime, sl.FKey FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.PermType = 26 AND LogText LIKE '%unscheduled%' AND sl.FKey > 0 GROUP BY sl.FKey )sl INNER JOIN securitylog sl2 ON sl2.FKey = sl.FKey AND sl2.PermType = 26 AND sl2.LogDateTime > sl.LogDateTime INNER JOIN userod uo ON sl2.UserNum = uo.UserNum AND uo.UserName REGEXP @Users GROUP BY sl2.FKey )uap INNER JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum = uap.FKey INNER JOIN appointmenttype apt ON ap.AppointmentTypeNum = apt.AppointmentTypeNum AND apt.AppointmentTypeName REGEXP @AptTypes INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = ap.ClinicNum WHERE uap.LogDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.request,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) ) apts

request: List of patients with a disabled until date entered in their recall or Always Disabled box checked.
query: SET @FromDate = '2016-04-19', @ToDate = '2016-04-21'; SET @IncAlwaysDisabled = 'No'; SELECT recall.PatNum, IF(recall.DisableUntilDate = '0001-01-01','',recall.DisableUntilDate) AS 'Disabled until', IF(recall.IsDisabled = 1,'checked','unchecked') AS 'Disabled checkbox' FROM recall WHERE (recall.DisableUntilDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate OR IF(@IncAlwaysDisabled = 'Yes', recall.IsDisabled,FALSE))

request: List of patients that have multiple completed procedres in the date range in multiple clinics
query: SET @FromDate='2019-05-06', @ToDate='2019-05-06'; SELECT pl.PatNum, pl.ProcDate, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pl.ClinicNum) AS Clinics FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum, pl.ProcDate HAVING LOCATE(',',Clinics)

request: List of patient insurance plans with Option Patient ID entered
query: SELECT pp.PatNum, (CASE pp.Ordinal WHEN 1 THEN "Primary" WHEN 2 THEN "Secondary" ELSE "Tertiary" END) AS "Ordinal", ( SELECT ca.CarrierName FROM inssub INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE inssub.InsSubNum = pp.InsSubNum ) AS "Carrier" FROM patplan pp WHERE PatID != ""

request: List of patients with duplicate recalls.
query: SELECT r1.PatNum AS PatID, r1.PatNum, r1.DateDue, r1.DatePrevious, r2.DateDue, r2.DatePrevious FROM recall r1 INNER JOIN recall r2 ON r2.RecallTypeNum = r1.RecallTypeNum AND r1.RecallNum != r2.RecallNum AND r1.PatNum = r2.PatNum GROUP BY r1.PatNum

request: List of subscribers with multiple inssub rows for the specified subscriber, with a list of patnums for patients with the plan
query: SET @SubPatNum = 68; SELECT inssub.InsSubNum, inssub.PlanNum, inssub.Subscriber, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pp.PatNum) AS PATSONPLAN FROM inssub INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.InsSubNum = inssub.InsSubNum WHERE inssub.Subscriber = @SubPatNum GROUP BY ip.PlanNum

request: Specified blockout types in a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @BlockoutTypes=''; SET @FromDate = IF(LENGTH(@FromDate) = 0, CURDATE(), @FromDate); SELECT s.SchedDate ,s.StartTime ,s.StopTime ,def.ItemName AS 'BlockoutType' ,s.Note FROM schedule s INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = s.BlockoutType AND def.Category = 25 AND IF(LENGTH(@BlockoutTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemName, @BlockoutTypes)) WHERE s.SchedType = 2 AND s.SchedDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ORDER BY s.SchedDate

request: Insurance Plans Grid List - Like Internal
query: SET @Carrier = '%%'; SET @Employer='%%'; SET @GroupName='%%'; SET @GroupNum='%%'; SET @PlanNum='%%'; SET @TrojanID='%%'; SELECT (CASE WHEN ISNULL(e.EmpName) THEN '' ELSE e.EmpName END) AS 'Employer', c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', (CASE WHEN insplan.PlanType='c' THEN 'Capitation' WHEN insplan.PlanType='p' THEN 'PPO Percentage' WHEN insplan.PlanType='' THEN 'Category Percentage' WHEN insplan.PlanType='f' THEN 'Medicaid/Flat Copay' ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS PlanType, c.Phone, c.Address, c.City, c.State, c.Zip, insplan.GroupNum AS 'Group insplan.GroupName AS 'Group Name', c.NoSendElect AS 'noE', c.ElectID, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Subscriber) FROM inssub WHERE insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum) AS 'Subs', insplan.IsHidden FROM insplan LEFT JOIN employer e ON e.EmployerNum = insplan.EmployerNum AND e.EmpName LIKE @Employer LEFT JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum AND CarrierName LIKE @Carrier WHERE insplan.IsHidden = 0 AND insplan.GroupName LIKE @GroupName AND insplan.GroupNum LIKE @GroupNum AND insplan.PlanNum LIKE @PlanNum AND insplan.TrojanID LIKE @TrojanID ORDER BY e.EmpName IS NULL ASC, e.EmpName, c.CarrierName;

request: Charted procedures with a base unit or unit quantity greater than 0 or 1 respectively
query: SELECT PatNum, ProcNum, ProcDate, ProcStatus, ProcCode FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum WHERE (procedurelog.BaseUnits > 0 OR procedurelog.UnitQty > 1)

request: Procedure Codes with Base Units Greater than 0
query: SELECT ProcCode FROM procedurecode WHERE BaseUnits > 0

request: Insurance checks received in the date range with total
query: SET @FromDate='2019-07-01' , @ToDate='2019-07-31'; SELECT result.PatNum, result.CheckNum, result.DateCP, FORMAT(result.CheckAmt_,2) CheckAmt_ FROM ( (SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, cp.PatNum, cpay.CheckNum, cp.DateCP, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) 'CheckAmt_', cpay.ClaimPaymentNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpay.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=cpay.PayType AND d.ItemName='Check' WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cpay.ClaimPaymentNum, cp.PatNum ) UNION ALL (SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, 'Total:' AS PatNum, '' CheckNum, '' DateCP, SUM(claimpayment.CheckAmt) 'CheckAmt_', claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum FROM ( SELECT cpay.ClaimPaymentNum, cpay.CheckAmt FROM claimpayment cpay INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimPaymentNum=cpay.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum=cpay.PayType AND d.ItemName='Check' WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cpay.ClaimPaymentNum ) claimpayment ) ORDER BY ItemOrder, DateCP, ClaimPaymentNum, PatNum )result

request: List of patients with their first ever 'Completed' appointment by date range
query: SET @FromDate='2019-07-01', @ToDate='2019-07-31'; SELECT IFNULL(emp.EmpName,'None') AS Employer, IFNULL(c.request,'None') AS Clinic, a.FirstAppt AS 'Date of first appointment', p.FName AS 'Patient FName', p.LName AS 'Patient LName', p.PatNum AS "Pat Num", p.Birthdate, p.Email, p.HmPhone, p.WkPhone, p.WirelessPhone, p.SSN AS 'Social Security Number', p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.State, p.Zip, IFNULL(pn.Treatment, '') AS Comments FROM patient p LEFT JOIN employer emp ON emp.EmployerNum=p.EmployerNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=p.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN patientnote pn ON pn.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(a.AptDateTime) AS FirstAppt, a.PatNum, a.AptStatus FROM appointment a GROUP BY a.PatNum HAVING FirstAppt BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 2 )a ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum

request: Daily patient payments where Entry Date does not equal Payment Date
query: SET @FromDate='2019-07-01', @ToDate='2019-07-31'; SELECT pay.PatNum, userod.UserName, FORMAT(pay.PayAmt,2) AS 'Amount$', DATE(pay.DateEntry) AS 'Date Created', DATE(pay.PayDate) AS 'Date of Payment' FROM payment pay INNER JOIN userod ON pay.SecUserNumEntry=userod.UserNum WHERE DATE(pay.PayDate) != DATE(pay.DateEntry) AND pay.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate

request: List of patients seen in a date range with age, race, carrier, number of visits and other information, for FQHC grant. Use if EHR was not enabled during data entry. See 1651 if EHR was enabled during data entry.
query: SET @StartDate= '2019-07-01'; SET @EndDate= '2019-07-31'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS Num ,a.patnum AS PatientID ,a.FName ,a.LName ,a.Age ,a.Address ,a.Address2 ,a.City ,a.State ,a.Zip ,a.Birthdate ,a.Language ,a.Visits ,a.CarrierName ,a.GenderIdentity ,a.Homeless ,a.Veteran ,a.AgriculturalWorker AS 'Agricultural Worker' ,a.RaceEth FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,p.FName ,p.LName ,( CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) ELSE 'NONE' END ) AS 'Age' ,p.Address , p.Address2 , p.City , p.State , p.Zip , p.Birthdate , p.Language ,COUNT(DISTINCT(pl.ProcDate)) AS Visits ,ca.CarrierName ,( CASE ehr.genderidentity WHEN '446141000124107' THEN 'F' WHEN '446151000124109' THEN 'M' WHEN '407377005' THEN 'Female-to-Male (FTM)/Transgender Male/Trans Man' WHEN '407376001' THEN 'Male-to-Female (MTF)/Transgender Female/Trans Woman' WHEN '446131000124102' THEN 'Genderqueer' ELSE 'null' END ) AS GenderIdentity ,( SELECT MAX(FieldValue) FROM patfield WHERE patfield.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FieldName='Homeless Status' ) AS 'Homeless', ( SELECT MAX(FieldValue) FROM patfield WHERE patfield.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FieldName='Veteran Status' ) AS 'Veteran' ,( SELECT MAX(FieldValue) FROM patfield WHERE patfield.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FieldName='Agricultural Worker Status' ) AS 'AgriculturalWorker' ,( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( (CASE pr.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' WHEN 10 THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 11 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyEthnicity' ELSE 'None' END) ORDER BY FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11) SEPARATOR ', ' ) FROM patientrace pr WHERE pr.PatNum=p.PatNum ) AS 'RaceEth' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN ehrpatient EHR ON EHR.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ) a;

request: Adjustments in a date range with patient, provider, and procedure information
query: SET @FromDate='2019-07-01', @ToDate='2019-07-31'; SELECT a.AdjDate ,CONCAT(p.FName,' ', p.LName) AS 'Patient Name' ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,COALESCE(plc.Abbr, 'Unassigned') AS 'Proc Clinic' ,(CASE a.ProcNum WHEN 0 THEN '' ELSE pl.ProcDate END) AS 'ProcDate' ,(CASE a.ProcNum WHEN 0 THEN '' ELSE pc.ProcCode END) AS 'ProcCode' ,FORMAT((CASE a.ProcNum WHEN 0 THEN '' ELSE (pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) END),2) AS 'ProcFee' ,FORMAT(a.AdjAmt,2) AS AdjAmt ,def.ItemName AS 'AdjType' FROM adjustment a LEFT JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON a.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic plc ON plc.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN provider pr ON a.ProvNum=pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition def ON a.AdjType=def.DefNum AND def.Category = 1 WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, a.AdjDate

request: Daily payments report for the specified clinic
query: SET @FromDate='2019-08-01', @ToDate='2019-08-01'; SET @Clinic='%%'; SELECT Pay.PaymentType AS 'Payment Type', Pay.Date, Pay.CarrierName AS 'Carrier', Pay.PatientName AS 'Patient Name', IFNULL(Pay.Clinic,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic', Pay.CheckNum AS 'Check Pay.AmtPaid AS 'Amount Paid', Pay.TotalPayment AS 'Total Payment Amt' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Clinic', ' '' AS 'AmtPaid', '' AS 'TotalPayment' UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, def.ItemName AS 'PaymentType', DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', carrier.CarrierName, CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', claimpayment.CheckNum, CONCAT('$',FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),2)) AS 'AmtPaid', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(claimpayment.CheckAmt,2)) AS 'TotalPayment' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = claimpayment.PayType LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=claimproc.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN clinic cpclin ON cpclin.ClinicNum = claimpayment.ClinicNum WHERE (claimproc.Status=1 OR claimproc.Status=4) AND claimpayment.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @Clinic='%%' THEN TRUE ELSE cpclin.request LIKE @Clinic END) GROUP BY claimproc.ClinicNum, claimpayment.CheckNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Clinic', ' '' AS 'AmtPaid', '' AS 'TotalPayment' UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS ItemOrder, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE definition.ItemName END) AS 'PaymentType', DATE_FORMAT(payment.PayDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date', NULL AS 'Carrier', CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName,' ',patient.MiddleI) AS 'PatientName', provider.Abbr 'Provider', clinic.request AS 'Clinic', payment.CheckNum, CONCAT('$',FORMAT(paysplit.SplitAmt,2)) AS 'AmtPaid', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(payment.PayAmt,2)) AS 'TotalPayment' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum=paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType=definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON paysplit.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @Clinic='%%' THEN TRUE ELSE clinic.request LIKE @Clinic END) GROUP BY paysplit.SplitNum UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Clinic', ' '' AS 'AmtPaid', '' AS 'TotalPayment' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ItemOrder, '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', clintot.Clinic AS 'Clinic', clintot.CheckNum AS CheckNum, CONCAT('$',FORMAT(clintot.Amt,2)) AS 'AmtPaid', '' AS 'TotalPayment' FROM ( SELECT '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' AS CarrierName, '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', IFNULL(SUBSTRING_INDEX(clinic.request,' - ', -1),'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic', CONCAT(CONCAT('Insurance ',def.ItemName,' Total:')) AS CheckNum, SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) AS 'Amt' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN insplan ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum LEFT JOIN patient ON claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum=claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment ON claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum = claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = claimpayment.PayType LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum=claimproc.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN clinic cpclin ON cpclin.ClinicNum = claimpayment.ClinicNum WHERE (claimproc.Status=1 OR claimproc.Status=4) AND claimpayment.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @Clinic='%%' THEN TRUE ELSE cpclin.request LIKE @Clinic END) GROUP BY def.ItemName, clinic.request UNION ALL SELECT '' AS 'PaymentType', '' AS 'Date', '' 'Carrier', '' AS 'PatientName', '' AS 'Provider', IFNULL(SUBSTRING_INDEX(clinic.request,' - ', -1),'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic', CONCAT((CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE CONCAT('Patient ',definition.ItemName) END),' Total:') AS CheckNum, SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) AS 'Amt' FROM payment LEFT JOIN paysplit ON payment.PayNum=paysplit.PayNum LEFT JOIN patient ON payment.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN provider ON paysplit.ProvNum=provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition ON payment.PayType=definition.DefNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON payment.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @Clinic='%%' THEN TRUE ELSE clinic.request LIKE @Clinic END) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN ISNULL(definition.ItemName) THEN 'Transfer' ELSE definition.ItemName END), clinic.request ORDER BY CheckNum )clintot ) Pay ORDER BY Pay.ItemOrder,Pay.Date,Pay.PatientName

request: For a specific year, carrier, and clinic, the referral sources that referred patients and the number of patients referred, totals and monthly subtotals
query: SET @Year=2018, @Clinic='%%', @Carriers=""; SET @Carriers=(CASE WHEN @Carriers="" THEN ".*" ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Carriers,"|","$|^"),"$") END); SELECT (CASE WHEN AllCounts.ItemOrder=1 THEN CONCAT(AllCounts.FName,' ',AllCounts.LName) ELSE 'Totals:' END) AS RefSource, AllCounts.Total AS Total, AllCounts.Jan, AllCounts.Feb, AllCounts.Mar, AllCounts.Apr, AllCounts.May, AllCounts.June, AllCounts.July, AllCounts.Aug, AllCounts.Sept, AllCounts.Oct, AllCounts.Nov, AllCounts.Dec FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder, Totals.FName, Totals.LName, Totals.Tot AS Total, MonthTotals.JanTot AS Jan, MonthTotals.FebTot AS Feb, MonthTotals.MarTot AS Mar, MonthTotals.AprTot AS Apr, MonthTotals.MayTot AS May, MonthTotals.JunTot AS June, MonthTotals.JulTot AS July, MonthTotals.AugTot AS Aug, MonthTotals.SepTot AS Sept, MonthTotals.OctTot AS OCT, MonthTotals.NovTot AS Nov, MonthTotals.DecTot AS 'Dec' FROM ( SELECT r.ReferralNum, r.FName, r.LName, COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS Tot FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ra.RefType=1 INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum INNER JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=p.ClinicNum AND c.request LIKE @Clinic INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.patnum=pp.patnum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE ca.carriername REGEXP @Carriers AND YEAR(ra.RefDate)=@Year GROUP BY r.ReferralNum ) Totals INNER JOIN ( SELECT dataset.ReferralNum, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS JanTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FebTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MarTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS AprTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MayTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS JunTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS JulTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS AugTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SepTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OctTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=11 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NovTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DecTot FROM ( SELECT r.ReferralNum, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient, p.DateFirstVisit, MAX(CASE WHEN pp.Ordinal=1 THEN ca.CarrierName END) AS PrimIns, MAX(CASE WHEN pp.Ordinal=2 THEN ca.CarrierName END) AS SecIns FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ra.RefType=1 INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum INNER JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=p.ClinicNum AND c.request LIKE @Clinic INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.patnum=pp.patnum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE ca.carriername REGEXP @Carriers AND YEAR(ra.RefDate)=@Year GROUP BY r.ReferralNum, p.PatNum ) dataset GROUP BY dataset.ReferralNum ) MonthTotals ON Totals.ReferralNum=MonthTotals.ReferralNum UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder, Totals.FName, Totals.LName, SUM(Totals.Tot) AS Total, SUM(MonthTotals.JanTot) AS Jan, SUM(MonthTotals.FebTot) AS Feb, SUM(MonthTotals.MarTot) AS Mar, SUM(MonthTotals.AprTot) AS Apr, SUM(MonthTotals.MayTot) AS May, SUM(MonthTotals.JunTot) AS June, SUM(MonthTotals.JulTot) AS July, SUM(MonthTotals.AugTot) AS Aug, SUM(MonthTotals.SepTot) AS Sept, SUM(MonthTotals.OctTot) AS OCT, SUM(MonthTotals.NovTot) AS Nov, SUM(MonthTotals.DecTot) AS 'Dec' FROM ( SELECT r.ReferralNum, r.FName, r.LName, COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS Tot FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ra.RefType=1 INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum INNER JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=p.ClinicNum AND c.request LIKE @Clinic INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.patnum=pp.patnum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE ca.carriername REGEXP @Carriers AND YEAR(ra.RefDate)=@Year GROUP BY r.ReferralNum ) Totals INNER JOIN ( SELECT dataset.ReferralNum, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS JanTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FebTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MarTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS AprTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MayTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS JunTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS JulTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS AugTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SepTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OctTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=11 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NovTot, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(dataset.DateFirstVisit)=12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DecTot FROM ( SELECT r.ReferralNum, CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient, p.DateFirstVisit, MAX(CASE WHEN pp.Ordinal=1 THEN ca.CarrierName END) AS PrimIns, MAX(CASE WHEN pp.Ordinal=2 THEN ca.CarrierName END) AS SecIns FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ra.RefType=1 INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum INNER JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=p.ClinicNum AND c.request LIKE @Clinic INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.patnum=pp.patnum INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum=iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE ca.carriername REGEXP @Carriers AND YEAR(ra.RefDate)=@Year GROUP BY r.ReferralNum, p.PatNum ) dataset GROUP BY dataset.ReferralNum ) MonthTotals ON Totals.ReferralNum=MonthTotals.ReferralNum ) AllCounts ORDER BY AllCounts.ItemOrder,AllCounts.LName,AllCounts.FName;

request: List of referrers, showing count of patients, completed production, and treatment planned production for patient referrals
query: SET @FromDate='2019-07-01', @ToDate='2019-07-31'; SELECT IF(r.FName = '',r.LName,CONCAT(r.FName,' ',r.LName)) AS 'Referrer Name', COUNT(DISTINCT pl.PatNum) AS ' CONCAT('$',FORMAT(SUM(IF(pl.ProcStatus=2,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)+IFNULL(adj.AdjAmt,0)-IFNULL(cp.Writeoff,0),0)),2)) AS 'Completed Production', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(SUM(IF(pl.ProcStatus=1,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits),0)),2)) AS 'Planned Production', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(SUM(IF(pl.ProcStatus=1 AND (pl.AptNum > 0 OR pl.PlannedAptNum > 0),pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits),0)),2)) AS 'Scheduled Production' FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = ra.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum, SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Writeoff FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,7) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum )cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT adj.ProcNum, SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt FROM adjustment adj GROUP BY adj.ProcNum )adj ON adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE ra.RefType=1 AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY r.ReferralNum ORDER BY SUM(IF(pl.ProcStatus=2,pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)+IFNULL(adj.AdjAmt,0)-IFNULL(cp.Writeoff,0),0)) DESC

request: Broken Appointment Analysis
query: SET @FromDate='2019-07-01', @ToDate='2019-07-31'; SELECT apt.PatNum AS 'Pat CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS PatientName, p.PatStatus, apt.AptNum, (SELECT SUBSTRING(sl.LogText,1,10) FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.FKey = apt.AptNum AND sl.PermType = 25 GROUP BY sl.FKey ) OrigSchedDate, Apt.ProvNum, pc.ProcCode, pc.Descript, pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) AS Fees FROM securitylog sl INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.AptNum = sl.FKey INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = apt.AptNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=apt.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE sl.PermType = 26 AND LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%unscheduled%' AND sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY pl.ProcNum

request: Appointment Statistics by clinic for the specified date
query: SET @AsOf='2019-08-22'; SET @ProcedureCode='D1110|D1120|D1000|D1010|D1020|D4910|D4911|D4341|D4342|D0170'; SET @ProcedureCode=(CASE WHEN @ProcedureCode='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcedureCode,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @AsOf=IF(@AsOf='', CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, @AsOf); SELECT apptmoved.Clinic, COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN !ISNULL(apptmoved.CodeNum) AND DATE(apptmoved.LogDateTime) <= @AsOf AND apptmoved.ApptDate = @AsOf THEN apptmoved.AptNum WHEN !ISNULL(apptmoved.CodeNum) AND DATE(apptmoved.LogDateTime) = @AsOf AND apptmoved.PriorApptDate = @AsOf THEN apptmoved.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) 'Scheduled', COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN apptmoved.realAptDate BETWEEN @AsOf AND @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apptmoved.AptStatus = 2 AND !ISNULL(apptmoved.CodeNum) THEN apptmoved.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'Completed', COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN apptmoved.BrokeDate = apptmoved.ApptDate THEN apptmoved.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'Canceled', COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN ISNULL(apptmoved.CodeNum) AND apptmoved.realAptDate BETWEEN @AsOf AND @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apptmoved.AptStatus = 2 THEN apptmoved.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'NonHyg', COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN ISNULL(apptmoved.CodeNum) AND apptmoved.realAptDate BETWEEN @AsOf AND @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND !ISNULL( (SELECT MIN(appt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment appt INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = appt.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcedureCode WHERE appt.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND appt.AptDateTime > NOW() AND appt.PatNum = apptmoved.PatNum GROUP BY appt.PatNum)) AND apptmoved.AptStatus = 2 THEN apptmoved.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'NonHygSched', COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN apptmoved.realAptDate BETWEEN @AsOf AND @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apptmoved.AptStatus = 2 AND ( SELECT MIN(proclog.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog proclog INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = proclog.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9887') WHERE proclog.ProcStatus = 2 AND proclog.PatNum = apptmoved.PatNum GROUP BY proclog.PatNum) = DATE(apptmoved.RealAptDate) THEN apptmoved.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'New Pats', COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN apptmoved.realAptDate BETWEEN @AsOf AND @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apptmoved.AptStatus = 2 AND ( SELECT MIN(proclog.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog proclog INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = proclog.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986','D9887') WHERE proclog.ProcStatus = 2 AND proclog.PatNum = apptmoved.PatNum GROUP BY proclog.PatNum) = DATE(apptmoved.RealAptDate) AND !ISNULL( (SELECT MIN(appt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment appt INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = appt.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcedureCode WHERE appt.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND appt.AptDateTime > NOW() AND appt.PatNum = apptmoved.PatNum GROUP BY appt.PatNum)) THEN apptmoved.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'New Pats Sched', COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN apptmoved.realAptDate BETWEEN @AsOf AND @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apptmoved.AptStatus = 2 AND !ISNULL(apptmoved.CodeNum) AND !ISNULL( (SELECT MIN(appt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment appt INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = appt.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcedureCode WHERE appt.AptStatus IN (1,4) AND appt.AptDateTime > NOW() AND appt.PatNum = apptmoved.PatNum GROUP BY appt.PatNum)) THEN apptmoved.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'PreAppointment Recare' FROM ( SELECT STR_TO_DATE((CASE sl.PermType WHEN 25 THEN SUBSTRING(sl.LogText,1,10) WHEN 26 THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,' ',-3),' ',1) ELSE '' END),'%c/%e/%Y') AS ApptDate, STR_TO_DATE((CASE sl.PermType WHEN 26 THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,' ',-7),' ',1) ELSE '' END),'%c/%e/%Y') AS PriorApptDate, Sl.PermType, sl.LogDateTime AS LogDateTime, sl.FKey AS AptNum, sl.PatNum, cl.Abbr AS Clinic, ap.AptDateTime AS realAptDate, ap.AptStatus, MAX(pc.CodeNum) AS 'CodeNum', broken.BrokeDate FROM securitylog sl INNER JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum = sl.FKey INNER JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = ap.ClinicNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sl.LogDateTime,'|',sl.SecurityLogNum ORDER BY sl.LogDateTime SEPARATOR '|'),'|',-1) AS 'SecurityLogNum' FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.PermType IN(25,26) AND sl.FKey != 0 AND sl.LogText NOT LIKE '%unscheduled%' AND sl.LogDateTime < @AsOf + INTERVAL 0 DAY GROUP BY sl.FKey UNION ALL SELECT sl.SecurityLogNum FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.PermType IN(25,26) AND sl.FKey != 0 AND sl.LogText NOT LIKE '%unscheduled%' AND sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN @AsOf AND @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND (STR_TO_DATE((CASE sl.PermType WHEN 25 THEN SUBSTRING(sl.LogText,1,10) WHEN 26 THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,' ',-3),' ',1) ELSE '' END),'%c/%e/%Y') = @AsOf OR IF(sl.PermType = 26,STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,' ',-7),' ',1),'%c/%e/%Y') = @AsOf,FALSE)) ) mostrecentslentry ON sl.SecurityLogNum = mostrecentslentry.SecurityLogNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = ap.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcedureCode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(sl.LogDateTime) AS BrokeDate, sl.FKey AS 'AptNum' FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN @AsOf AND @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND sl.FKey != 0 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%Broken%' AND sl.PermType = 27 GROUP BY sl.FKey, DATE(sl.LogDateTime) ) broken ON broken.AptNum = sl.FKey WHERE sl.PermType IN (25,26) AND sl.FKey != 0 AND sl.LogText NOT LIKE '%unscheduled%' GROUP BY sl.SecurityLogNum ) apptmoved GROUP BY apptmoved.Clinic

request: Appointment time, patient information, and whether the appointment was completed or not, for appointments that were originally scheduled in specified date range
query: SET @StartDate='2019-07-01', @EndDate='2019-07-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', seclogapts.AptTime AS 'Scheduled', p.Birthdate, ca.CarrierName, aptprocs.Procedures AS 'Procedures', aptprocs.Fee, p.Email, p.HmPhone, p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.Zip, (SELECT MIN(a.AptDateTime) FROM appointment a WHERE a.PatNum = p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus = 1 AND a.AptDateTime >= NOW() ) AS 'NextSchedApt', (CASE WHEN apt.AptStatus=2 AND STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(seclogapts.AptTime,' ',1)), '%m/%d/%Y') = DATE(apt.AptDateTime) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) AS 'Completed', apt.AptNum FROM ( SELECT sl.FKey AS 'AptNum', sl.PatNum, (CASE WHEN sl.PermType=25 THEN TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,',',1)) ELSE TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,' to ',-1)) END) AS 'AptTime' FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.PermType IN (25,26) AND sl.LogText NOT LIKE '%Unscheduled%' AND sl.FKey != 0 ) seclogapts INNER JOIN appointment apt ON seclogapts.AptNum=apt.AptNum INNER JOIN patient p ON apt.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON apt.PatNum=pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ins ON pp.InsSubNum=ins.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan inp ON ins.PlanNum=inp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON inp.CarrierNum=ca.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.AptNum, GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode) AS 'Procedures', SUM(pl.ProcFee) AS 'Fee' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum GROUP BY pl.AptNum ) aptprocs ON aptprocs.AptNum=apt.AptNum WHERE STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(seclogapts.AptTime,' ',1)), '%m/%d/%Y') BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY apt.AptNum, seclogapts.AptTime ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, seclogapts.AptTime

request: List of patients who had an appointment, in specified date range, that was moved or deleted within 48 hours of the scheduled date and time of the appointment. Also shows the user that performed the move/delete. For versions 19.3 and earlier. For versions 19.4+ see 1605.
query: SET @FromDate='2019-07-01', @ToDate='2019-07-10'; SET @PatNum = 0, @OrderVal=0, @OrderDate = '0001-01-01 00:00:00'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'PatName' ,DATE_FORMAT((sl.OldAptDate),'%c/%e/%Y %r') AS 'OldAptDate' ,IFNULL((CASE WHEN sl.MovedTo = 'Broken' THEN sl.MovedTo ELSE DATE_FORMAT(sl.MovedTo,'%c/%e/%Y %r') END),'Deleted') AS 'NewAptDate' ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sl.SecurityLogNum,' ', u.UserName ORDER BY sl.SecurityLogNum), ' ', -1) AS 'UserName' ,DATE_FORMAT((sl.LogDateTime),'%c/%e/%Y %r') AS 'ModDate' FROM ( SELECT layer.SecurityLogNum , layer.AptNum , layer.PatNum , layer.LogDateTime , layer.UserNum , layer.PermType AS PermType , layer.OldAptDate , layer.MovedTo ,(CASE WHEN @PatNum=layer.PatNum AND layer.OldAptDate = @OrderDate AND layer.MovedTo IS NOT NULL THEN @OrderVal ELSE @orderVal := @OrderVal + 1 END) AS GROUPING ,(CASE WHEN @PatNum!=layer.PatNum THEN @PatNum := layer.PatNum END) AS PatGrouping ,(CASE WHEN @PatNum = layer.PatNum AND @OrderDate != layer.MovedTo THEN @OrderDate := layer.MovedTo END) AS DateGrouping ,layer.LogText FROM ( SELECT sl.SecurityLogNum ,sl.FKey AS 'AptNum' ,sl.PatNum ,sl.LogDateTime ,sl.UserNum ,sl.PermType ,STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(CASE WHEN sl.PermType = 27 AND LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%delete%' THEN SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText, ', Deleted', 1), -22) WHEN sl.PermType = 27 AND LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%broken%' THEN SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText, ', Broken', 1), -22) WHEN sl.PermType = 26 THEN REPLACE(SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText, 'from', -1),1, 23), ',','') END),'%c/%e/%Y %r') AS OldAptDate ,(CASE WHEN sl.PermType = 27 AND LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%broken%' THEN 'Broken' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(CASE WHEN sl.PermType = 26 THEN SUBSTRING(sl.LogText, -22) END),'%c/%e/%Y %r') END) AS MovedTo , sl.LogText FROM securitylog sl WHERE (CASE WHEN sl.PermType = 27 THEN (LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%broken%') WHEN sl.PermType = 26 THEN LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%from%to%' ELSE FALSE END) GROUP BY sl.SecurityLogNum ORDER BY sl.PatNum )layer )sl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = sl.PatNum INNER JOIN userod u ON u.UserNum = sl.UserNum LEFT JOIN appointment apt ON apt.AptNum = sl.AptNum WHERE (CASE WHEN ISNULL(sl.MovedTo) THEN TRUE WHEN apt.SecDateTEntry BETWEEN (LogDateTime - INTERVAL 48 HOUR) AND LogDateTime THEN FALSE ELSE LogDateTime BETWEEN (OldAptDate - INTERVAL 48 HOUR) AND OldAptDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY END) AND sl.OldAptDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY (CASE WHEN sl.AptNum=0 THEN sl.Grouping ELSE sl.AptNum END), sl.PatNum HAVING (CASE WHEN NewAptDate = 'Deleted' THEN TRUE ELSE SUBSTRING_INDEX(OldAptDate,' ',1) != SUBSTRING_INDEX(NewAptDate,' ',1) END);

request: List of all printed claims that were sent in the date range
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-03-01', @ToDate ='2024-03-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.FName, ', ', p.LName) AS 'PatientName' ,c.DateService ,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.ProcCode ORDER BY procedurecode.ProcCode, procedurelog.ProcNum) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.codeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate <= @ToDate WHERE claimproc.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0,1,5,6,7,8) AND claimproc.ProcDate <= @ToDate ) AS 'Procedures' ,carrier.CarrierName FROM claim c INNER JOIN etrans ON etrans.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum AND etrans.Etype = 1 INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = c.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = c.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE c.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND c.ClaimType != 'PreAuth' GROUP BY c.ClaimNum ORDER BY c.DateService, c.ClaimNum

request: Patients with procedure codes like D80xx completed in the date range. Shows Days Since Last Visit
query: SET @FromDate='2021-01-01' , @ToDate='2021-01-31'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', DATE_FORMAT(MAX(pl.ProcDate),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Last D80 in Date Range', pr.Abbr AS 'Provider', DATEDIFF(CURDATE(),lastap.AptDate) AS 'Days Since Last Appointment' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode LIKE 'D80%' INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = p.PriProv INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(DATE(ap.AptDateTime)) AS 'AptDate', ap.PatNum FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY ap.PatNum ) lastap ON lastap.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName,p.FName,'Last D80 in Date Range',pr.Abbr

request: List of procedures that were referred out in the date range for patients with the specified clinic
query: SET @FromDate='2019-07-01', @ToDate='2019-07-31'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @Clinics=(CASE WHEN @Clinics='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @Pos=0; SELECT @Pos:=@Pos+1 AS 'Count', a.* FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum AS ' PatID', CONCAT(p.FName,', ',p.LName) AS 'PatientName(FL)', COALESCE(c.request, 'None') AS Clinic, prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', (CASE WHEN refattach.RefToStatus = 0 THEN 'None' WHEN refattach.RefToStatus = 1 THEN 'Declined' WHEN refattach.RefToStatus = 2 THEN 'Scheduled' WHEN refattach.RefToStatus = 3 THEN 'Consulted' WHEN refattach.RefToStatus = 4 THEN 'In Treatment' WHEN refattach.RefToStatus = 5 THEN 'Completed' END) AS 'Status', pc.ProcCode, FORMAT(pl.ProcFee, 2) AS Fee, CONCAT(ref.FName, ref.LName) AS 'Referral Source FL', refattach.Note AS Note FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=p.ClinicNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN refattach ON refattach.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND refattach.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN referral ref ON ref.ReferralNum=refattach.ReferralNum WHERE (CASE WHEN @Clinics = '^' THEN TRUE ELSE c.request REGEXP @Clinics END) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY p.PatNum ) a

request: List of patients with completed Broken Appointment procedures (using code D9986) in a user defined date range, including a count of Broken Appointment procedures in the date range
query: SET @FromDate='2019-07-01'; SET @ToDate='2019-07-31'; SET @brokenApt='D9986'; SELECT CONCAT(patient.FName,' ',patient.LName) AS 'Patient', patient.Birthdate AS 'DOB', (CASE WHEN carrier.CarrierName IS NULL THEN 'Uninsured' ELSE carrier.CarrierName END) AS 'Insurance Carrier (Pri)', procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'Date Broken Apt', (CASE WHEN procedurelog.ClinicNum=0 THEN 'Unassigned' ELSE clinic.request END) AS 'Clinic', ( SELECT COUNT(pc.ProcCode) FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum WHERE pc.ProcCode = @brokenApt AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.PatNum=patient.PatNum GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) AS 'Code Count' FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum=patient.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=procedurelog.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON procedurelog.ClinicNum=clinic.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum=patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum=patplan.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum=inssub.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=insplan.CarrierNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurecode.ProcCode LIKE @brokenApt AND patplan.Ordinal=1 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY procedurelog.ProcNum ORDER BY patient.LName, patient.FName

request: Time Card Summary With Clinics
query: SET @FromDate='2023-07-01', @ToDate='2023-07-31'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @HolidayPtoType='Holiday'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ptotypes.DefNum) INTO @HolidayPtoDefNums FROM definition ptotypes WHERE ptotypes.Category = 50 AND FIND_IN_SET(ptotypes.itemName, @HolidayPtoType); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @Clinics); SELECT IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @Clinics), CONCAT('0,', COALESCE(@ClinicNums, '')),@ClinicNums) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT (CASE duperow.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN (COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, 'None')) WHEN 'Total' THEN '-Total-' ELSE 'None' END ) AS 'Clinic' , employee.FName AS 'First Name' , employee.LName AS 'Last Name' , COALESCE(FORMAT(SUM(main.RegHours), 2), '') AS 'Reg Hours' , COALESCE(FORMAT(SUM(main.OTimeHours), 2), '') AS 'OT Hours' , COALESCE(FORMAT(SUM(main.PtoHours), 2), '') AS 'PTO hours' , COALESCE(FORMAT(SUM(main.HolHours), 2), '') AS 'HOL Hours' FROM employee LEFT JOIN ( SELECT timeadjust.ClinicNum , timeadjust.EmployeeNum , DATE(timeadjust.TimeEntry) AS 'Date' , TIME_TO_SEC(timeadjust.RegHours) / 3600 AS 'RegHours' , TIME_TO_SEC(timeadjust.OTimeHours) / 3600 AS 'OTimeHours' , TIME_TO_SEC(IF(NOT FIND_IN_SET(timeadjust.PtoDefNum, @HolidayPtoDefNums),timeadjust.PtoHours, '00:00:00')) / 3600 AS 'PtoHours' , TIME_TO_SEC(IF(FIND_IN_SET(timeadjust.PtoDefNum, @HolidayPtoDefNums),timeadjust.PtoHours, '00:00:00')) / 3600 AS 'HolHours' FROM timeadjust WHERE timeadjust.TimeEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY - INTERVAL 1 SECOND AND TIME(timeadjust.TimeEntry) != '00:00:00' AND NOT timeadjust.IsUnpaidProtectedLeave AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(timeadjust.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) UNION ALL SELECT rawclock.ClinicNum , rawclock.EmployeeNum , rawclock.Date , rawclock.RawHours - rawclock.OTHours + rawclock.AdjHours AS 'RegHours' , rawclock.OTHours , 0 AS 'PtoHours' , 0 AS 'HolHours' FROM ( SELECT clockevent.ClinicNum , clockevent.EmployeeNum , DATE(clockevent.TimeDisplayed1) AS 'Date' , TIME_TO_SEC(IF(TIME_TO_SEC(clockevent.TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND clockevent.ClockStatus IN(0,1), TIMEDIFF(clockevent.TimeDisplayed2, clockevent.TimeDisplayed1),0)) / 3600 AS 'RawHours' , TIME_TO_SEC(IF(clockevent.OTimeHours = '-01:00:00', clockevent.OTimeAuto, clockevent.OTimeHours)) / 3600 AS 'OTHours' , TIME_TO_SEC(IF(clockevent.ClockStatus IN(0,1), IF(clockevent.AdjustIsOverridden, clockevent.Adjust, clockevent.AdjustAuto), '00:00:00')) / 3600 AS 'AdjHours' , TIME_TO_SEC(IF(TIME_TO_SEC(clockevent.TimeDisplayed2)>0 AND clockevent.ClockStatus IN(2), TIMEDIFF(clockevent.TimeDisplayed2, clockevent.TimeDisplayed1),0)) / 3600 AS 'BreakHours' , TIME_TO_SEC(IF(clockevent.Rate2Hours = '-01:00:00', clockevent.Rate2Auto, clockevent.Rate2Hours)) / 3600 AS 'Rate2Hours' , TIME_TO_SEC(IF(clockevent.Rate3Hours = '-01:00:00', clockevent.Rate3Auto, clockevent.Rate3Hours)) / 3600 AS 'Rate3Hours' FROM clockevent WHERE clockevent.TimeDisplayed1 BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY -
