INTERVAL 1 SECOND AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(clockevent.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) ) rawclock ) main ON main.EmployeeNum = employee.EmployeeNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = main.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Total' ) duperow ON NOT ISNULL(main.EmployeeNum) WHERE ((ISNULL(main.ClinicNum) AND NOT employee.IsHidden) OR (!ISNULL(main.ClinicNum) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, 'None'),@Clinics))) ) GROUP BY duperow.Type, employee.EmployeeNum, IF(duperow.Type='Detail', main.ClinicNum, -1) HAVING NOT duperow.type <=> 'Total' OR COUNT(DISTINCT main.ClinicNum) > 1 ORDER BY employee.LName, employee.FName, employee.EmployeeNum, `Clinic` != '-Total-' DESC, clinic.Abbr, clinic.ClinicNum

request: Count of scheduled and completed appointments in the date range per day and Web Sched Type that were originally scheduled via Web Sched.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-04-01', @ToDate='2023-04-30'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date' ,DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime, '%W') AS 'WeekDay' ,(CASE WHEN sl.LogSource = 7 THEN "New Pat Appts" WHEN sl.LogSource = 1 THEN 'Recall Appts' WHEN sl.LogSource = 12 THEN 'ASAP Appts' WHEN sl.LogSource = 19 THEN 'Existing Pat Appts' ELSE 'Other' END) AS 'Web Sched Type' ,COUNT(IF(a.AptStatus IN (1, 4), a.AptNum, NULL)) AS 'Scheduled' ,COUNT(IF(a.AptStatus = 2, a.AptNum, NULL)) AS 'Completed' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.PermType = 25 AND sl.FKey = a.AptNum AND sl.LogSource IN (1, 7, 12, 19) WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus IN (1, 4, 2) GROUP BY DATE(a.AptDateTime), sl.LogSource, a.AptStatus = 2

request: Daily Adjustments Report, same rows as internal plus CDT Code and Insurance Carrier info
query: SET @FromDate='2019-09-01', @ToDate='2019-09-07'; SELECT ad.AdjDate AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.FName,' ',p.LName) AS 'Patient', ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = ad.ProvNum GROUP BY provider.ProvNum ) AS 'Provider', COALESCE(( SELECT clinic.Abbr FROM clinic WHERE clinic.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum GROUP BY clinic.ClinicNum ),'HeadQuarters') AS 'Clinic', ( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.DefNum = ad.AdjType AND def.Category = 1 GROUP BY def.DefNum ) AS 'Adj Type', ad.AdjNote AS 'Note', COALESCE(pc.ProcCode,'') AS 'CDT Code', COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(carrier.CarrierName) FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.carrierNum = carrier.CarrierNum INNER JOIN claimproc ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum WHERE claimproc.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum ),'') AS 'Carriers', FORMAT(ad.AdjAmt,2) AS 'Amount' FROM adjustment ad INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ad.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ad.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE ad.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate

request: Shows the count of the patients seen by a provider within a date range by age, race, insurance, and sliding scale
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Providers=''; SET @Provs = IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,'^',REPLACE(@Providers,',','|')); SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT core.NoBDay) AS 'NoBDay' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.age0to17) AS '0-17' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.age18to25) AS '18-25' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.age26to46) AS '26-46' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.age47to64) AS '47-64' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.ageOver64) AS '65+' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum) AS 'AgeTotal' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Race = 'ASIAN',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'Asian' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Race = 'BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'Black' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Race = 'HISPANIC OR LATINO',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'Hisp' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Race = 'White',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'White' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(ISNULL(core.Race) OR (IFNULL(core.Race,11) NOT IN ('ASIAN','BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN','HISPANIC OR LATINO','White') AND INSTR(core.Race,',') = 0),core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'Other' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(INSTR(core.Race,',') > 0,core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'Multiracial' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum) AS 'RaceTotal' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(ISNULL(core.Ins),core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'Unins' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Ins NOT LIKE '%DentaQuest, LLC-VA Claims%' AND (ISNULL(core.Fed) OR core.Fed != 'FAMIS'),core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'Ins(Priv)' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Fed = 'FAMIS' OR core.Slide = 'FAMIS',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'FAMIS' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Ins LIKE '%DentaQuest, LLC-VA Claims%' AND (ISNULL(core.Fed) OR core.Fed != 'FAMIS'),core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'Medicaid' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Slide = 'A',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'A' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Slide = 'B',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'B' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Slide = 'C',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'C' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Slide = 'D',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'D' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(ISNULL(core.Ins),core.PatNum,NULL)) + COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Ins NOT LIKE '%DentaQuest, LLC-VA Claims%' AND (ISNULL(core.Fed) OR core.Fed != 'FAMIS'),core.PatNum,NULL)) + COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Fed = 'FAMIS' OR core.Slide = 'FAMIS',core.PatNum,NULL)) + COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Ins LIKE '%DentaQuest, LLC-VA Claims%' AND (ISNULL(core.Fed) OR core.Fed != 'FAMIS'),core.PatNum,NULL)) + COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Slide = 'A',core.PatNum,NULL)) + COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Slide = 'B',core.PatNum,NULL)) + COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Slide = 'C',core.PatNum,NULL)) + COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Slide = 'D',core.PatNum,NULL)) AS 'InsTotal' FROM ( SELECT a.PatNum ,IF(p.Birthdate = '0001-01-01',p.PatNum,NULL) AS 'NoBDay' ,IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) < 18,p.PatNum,NULL) AS 'age0to17' ,IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 25,p.PatNum,NULL) AS 'age18to25' ,IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) BETWEEN 26 AND 46,p.PatNum,NULL) AS 'age26to46' ,IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) BETWEEN 47 AND 64,p.PatNum,NULL) AS 'age47to64' ,IF(p.Birthdate != '0001-01-01' AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) > 64,p.PatNum,NULL) AS 'ageOver64' ,( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT codes.request SEPARATOR ',') FROM patientrace ptr LEFT JOIN cdcrec codes ON ptr.CdcRecCode = codes.CdcRecCode AND codes.HeirarchicalCode NOT LIKE 'E%' WHERE ptr.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'Race' ,( SELECT ca.CarrierName FROM carrier ca INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 WHERE pp.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'Ins' ,( SELECT pf.FieldValue FROM patfield pf WHERE pf.FieldName='Sliding Scale' AND pf.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'Slide' ,( SELECT pf.FieldValue FROM patfield pf WHERE pf.FieldName='Federal, State and Outside programs' AND pf.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'Fed' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = a.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr REGEXP @Provs GROUP BY a.PatNum ) core

request: Gross and Net Production for specified procedure(s) completed in the date range
query: SET @FromDate = '2019-08-01', @ToDate = '2019-08-31'; SET @ProcCodes = 'D1110'; SET @ProcCodes = (CASE WHEN @ProcCodes = '' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@ProcCodes,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT pc.ProcCode AS 'Code', COUNT(pl.ProcNum) AS 'Count', FORMAT(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits+pl.UnitQty)),2) AS 'Gross Production', FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(writeoffs.WriteOffs,0)),2) AS Writeoffs, FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(adj.Adjustments,0)),2) AS Adjustments, FORMAT( SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits+pl.UnitQty)) + SUM(COALESCE(adj.Adjustments,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(writeoffs.WriteOffs,0)) ,2) AS 'Net Production' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcCodes LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS WriteOffs, cp.ProcNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.WriteOff != 0 GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) writeoffs ON writeoffs.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS Adjustments, adjustment.ProcNum FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND adjustment.AdjAmt != 0 AND adjustment.ProcNum != 0 GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum ) adj ON adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pc.CodeNum

request: Clinic, Patient Name, Initial Appointment, count of appts completed in date range for patients who had an appointment completed in the date range
query: SET @StartDate='2019-08-01', @EndDate='2019-08-31'; SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName='PracticeTitle' INTO @PracticeTitle; SELECT IFNULL(cl.request,@PracticeTitle) AS 'OfficeName', CONCAT(p.FName, ' ', p.LName) AS 'PatientName', ( SELECT MIN(AptDateTime) FROM appointment a WHERE a.PatNum=p.PatNum AND a.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY a.PatNum ) AS 'InitialVisit', COUNT(apt.AptNum) AS 'TotalAppts' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON p.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum GROUP BY apt.PatNum ORDER BY OfficeName, PatientName

request: Referrals sources and patients list with date and patient fields for referrals made in date range
query: SET @FromDate='2019-08-01' , @ToDate='2019-08-31'; SET @Clinic = ''; SET @Clinic=(CASE WHEN @Clinic='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinic,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT MAX(ra.RefDate) AS 'Date', SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(ra.RefDate,'| ', IF(r.FName = '', r.LName, CONCAT(r.LName, ', ', r.FName)) ORDER BY ra.RefDate SEPARATOR ' - '), '| ', -1) AS 'Source', ( SELECT MAX(FieldValue) FROM patfield WHERE patfield.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FieldName='Referral Medium' ) AS 'Medium', CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', MiddleI) AS 'Patient', COALESCE(( SELECT c.Abbr FROM clinic c WHERE c.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum ), 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic', ( SELECT MAX(FieldValue) FROM patfield WHERE patfield.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FieldName='Phone Outcome' ) AS 'Phone Outcome', IFNULL(CASE fappt.AptStatus WHEN 1 THEN 'Scheduled' WHEN 2 THEN 'Complete' WHEN 3 THEN 'Unscheduled List' WHEN 4 THEN 'ASAP' WHEN 5 THEN 'Broken' END, 'Not Schedueld Yet') AS AptStatus, IFNULL(fappt.UnschedStatus, 'None') AS UnschedStatus, IFNULL(fappt.Provider, 'Not Schedueld Yet') AS Provider, IFNULL(fappt.AptType, 'None') AS AptType FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum = ra.PatNum INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT appt.PatNum, MAX(appt.AptDateTime) AS AptDate, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(appt.AptStatus,', ', appt.AptDateTime ORDER BY appt.AptDateTime DESC SEPARATOR '|'), ', ', 1) AS AptStatus, ( SELECT ItemName FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 13 AND definition.DefNum = SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(appt.UnschedStatus,', ', appt.AptDateTime ORDER BY appt.AptDateTime DESC SEPARATOR '|'), ', ', 1) ) AS UnschedStatus, ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(appt.ProvNum,', ', appt.AptDateTime ORDER BY appt.AptDateTime DESC SEPARATOR '|'), ', ', 1) ) AS Provider, ( SELECT AppointmentTypeName FROM appointmenttype WHERE appointmenttype.AppointmentTypeNum = SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(appt.AppointmentTypeNum,', ', appt.AptDateTime ORDER BY appt.AptDateTime DESC SEPARATOR '|'), ', ', 1) ) AS AptType FROM appointment appt WHERE appt.AptDateTime < NOW() GROUP BY appt.PatNum )fappt ON fappt.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE ra.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND p.patstatus = 0 AND p.ClinicNum REGEXP @Clinic GROUP BY p.PatNum;

request: Appointments in the specified date range. Shows date, time, length of the appointment and operatory the appointment is scheduled in
query: SET @FromDate='2019-08-01', @ToDate='2019-08-31'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m-%d-%y') AS 'Date', a.PatNum AS 'PatID', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient, TIME_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%h:%i %p') AS 'Time', FORMAT(CHAR_LENGTH(a.Pattern)*5,0) AS 'Length', op.Abbrev AS 'Operatory', COALESCE(( SELECT(CASE sl.LogSource WHEN 1 THEN 'WebSched Recall' WHEN 7 THEN 'WebSched New Patient' WHEN 0 THEN 'In Open Dental' END) FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.FKey = a.AptNum AND sl.PermType = 25 AND sl.LogSource IN (1,7,0) GROUP BY sl.FKey ),'Outside Open Dental') AS 'Creation Source' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN operatory op ON op.OperatoryNum = a.Op WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY

request: Percentage of total patients seen in the specified date range by insurance carrier, including not insured
query: SET @FromDate='2019-08-01'; SET @ToDate='2019-08-31'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pat.patNum) AS 'Count' FROM patient pat INNER JOIN procedurelog procl ON pat.PatNum = procl.PatNum AND procl.ProcStatus = 2 AND procl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurecode procc ON procc.CodeNum = procl.CodeNum AND procc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') INTO @TotalPats; SELECT CASE WHEN ISNULL(c.CarrierNum) THEN 'Not Insured' ELSE c.CarrierName END AS 'Carrier', FORMAT(COUNT(DISTINCT p.patNum)/@TotalPats*100,2) AS 'Patient %' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ib.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier c ON ip.CarrierNum = c.CarrierNum GROUP BY c.CarrierNum ORDER BY c.CarrierName;

request: Age, carrier, insurance type, and group name for insured with active patient status
query: SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS Patient, (CASE WHEN p.Birthdate = '0001-01-01' THEN 'Unknown' ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) END) AS 'Age', ca.CarrierName, (CASE WHEN patplan.Ordinal = 1 THEN 'Primary' WHEN patplan.Ordinal = 2 THEN 'Secondary' WHEN patplan.Ordinal = 3 THEN 'Tertiary' END) AS 'Type', insplan.GroupName FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY p.PatNum, patplan.Ordinal ORDER BY ca.CarrierName, p.LName, p.FName, patplan.Ordinal

request: Cross Settlement - Paysplits where receiving Provider is not the patient's Primary Provider
query: SET @FromDate = '2019-09-01', @ToDate = '2019-09-30'; SET @PriProvs = ''; SET @PriProvs=(CASE WHEN @PriProvs='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@PriProvs,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date', CONCAT(p.LName, ',', p.FName) AS 'PatientName(FL)', prp.Abbr AS 'PrimProv', prps.Abbr AS 'PayProv', ps.SplitAmt AS 'PayAmount' FROM patient p INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON p.PatNum=ps.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prps ON prps.ProvNum=ps.ProvNum INNER JOIN provider prp ON prp.ProvNum=p.PriProv WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND prp.Abbr REGEXP @PriProvs AND prps.ProvNum != prp.ProvNum GROUP BY ps.SplitNum ORDER BY ps.DatePay

request: Saved treatment plans with the amount treatment planned, the amount in a scheduled or ASAP appointment, and the amount that's been completed
query: SET @FromDate='2025-04-01', @ToDate='2025-04-30'; SET @Provider ='%%'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tp.SecDateEntry,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'DateEntry' , p.PatNum , IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pr.Abbr) FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN provider pr ON procedurelog.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT LIKE '%GRP%' WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = proctp.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate = tp.SecDateEntry GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum ),'') AS 'Provider' , userod.UserName AS 'Presenter' , FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(proctp.FeeAmt,0)),2) AS 'Amount TP' , FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(( SELECT pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND apt.AptStatus IN (1,4) WHERE pl.ProcNum = proctp.ProcNumOrig AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 )),0),2) AS 'Amount Scheduled' , FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(( SELECT pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcNum = proctp.ProcNumOrig AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 )),0),2) AS 'Amount Completed' FROM treatplan tp INNER JOIN patient p ON tp.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN userod ON tp.UserNumPresenter = userod.UserNum INNER JOIN proctp ON proctp.TreatPlanNum = tp.TreatPlanNum WHERE tp.TPStatus = 0 AND tp.SecDateEntry BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY tp.TreatPlanNum HAVING Provider LIKE @Provider ORDER BY tp.SecDateEntry

request: Patient portion aging for families with any positive balance, by Patient. Total row at the bottom
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT E.Patient, E.Guarantor AS Guarantor, E.Pat0to30 AS 'Pat 0-30 Days', E.Pat31to60 AS 'Pat 31-60 Days', E.Pat61to90 AS 'Pat 61-90 Days', E.PatOver90 AS 'Pat >90 Days', E.Total AS 'Total Balance' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Patient,CONCAT(D.GLName,', ',D.GFName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0)) ,2),2) AS PatOver90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal - (COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0) + COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0) + COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0) + COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0)) ,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0),2),2) AS InsEst0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0),2),2) AS InsEst31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0),2),2) AS InsEst61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0),2),2) AS InsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum AS GPatNum,g.LName AS GLName,g.FName AS GFName,p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90 FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY p.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,COUNT(D.patnum),'' AS Patient, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0))) ,2),2) AS PatOver90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal) - (COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0) + COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0) + COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0) + COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0)),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst0to30),0),2),2) AS InsEst0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst31to60),0),2),2) AS InsEst31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst61to90),0),2),2) AS InsEst61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEstOver90),0),2),2) AS InsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum AS GPatNum,g.LName AS GLName,g.FName AS GFName,p.PatNum,p.LName,p.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' TranType, ppc.PatNum AS PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate TranDate, -ppc.Principal TranAmount FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90 FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY p.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Patient;

request: Patient portion aging for families with any positive balance, by Guarantor. Total row at the bottom.
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SELECT E.Guarantor AS Guarantor, E.Pat0to30 AS 'Pat 0-30 Days', E.Pat31to60 AS 'Pat 31-60 Days', E.Pat61to90 AS 'Pat 61-90 Days', E.PatOver90 AS 'Pat >90 Days', E.Total AS 'Total Balance' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0)) ,2),2) AS PatOver90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0),2),2) AS InsEst0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0),2),2) AS InsEst31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0),2),2) AS InsEst61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0),2),2) AS InsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90 FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'Totals:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0))) ,2),2) AS PatOver90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst0to30),0),2),2) AS InsEst0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst31to60),0),2),2) AS InsEst31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst61to90),0),2),2) AS InsEst61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEstOver90),0),2),2) AS InsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum,g.LName,g.FName,SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal,SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30,SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90,SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90,SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90,SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90 FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: List of new patients, or reactivated patients, with patient and procedure information.
query: SET @FromDate='2019-10-01', @ToDate='2019-10-31'; SET @ExcludedCodes = 'D9986|D9987|D0102|D9988'; SET @ExamCodes = 'D0150|D0140|D8001|D9310|D0145|D9430'; SELECT b.PatNum AS _PatNum, b.PatientName AS 'Patient', firstVisitData.DateFirstVisit, COALESCE(b.ExamDate, '') AS 'Exam Date', firstVisitData.FirstVisitProcs AS 'Procedures', firstVisitData.FirstVisitProduction '$Fee_', firstVisitData.FirstVisitProvs AS 'Provider', b.Email, b.HmPhone AS 'Home Phone', b.WirelessPhone AS 'Wireless Phone', b.WkPhone AS 'Work Phone', b.Address, b.Address2, b.City, b.State, b.Zip, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(r.LName,' ',r.FName) ORDER BY CONCAT(r.LName,' ',r.FName) SEPARATOR ', ') AS RefFrom FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum AND ra.RefType ='1' WHERE ra.PatNum = b.PatNum GROUP BY ra.PatNum ),'None') AS 'Referrals', COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT( ( SELECT MIN(DATE(ap.AptDateTime)) AS ApptDate FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptStatus = 1 AND ap.AptDateTime >= NOW() AND ap.PatNum = b.PatNum ) ,'%m/%d/%Y'),'None') AS 'Next Scheduled Appt', b.TreatmentAmt AS 'Treatment Amt', b.TreatmentCompleted AS 'Treatment Completed' FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum, CONCAT(p.LName,', ', p.FName) AS 'PatientName', a.ProcDate, a.AptDateTime, a.ExamDate, a.D0150, p.Email, p.HmPhone, p.WirelessPhone, p.WkPhone, p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.State, p.Zip, SUM( CASE WHEN pl.DateTP = a.ExamDate THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) ELSE 0 END) AS 'TreatmentAmt', SUM( CASE WHEN pl.DateTP = a.ExamDate AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN a.ExamDate AND (a.ExamDate + INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) ELSE 0 END) AS 'TreatmentCompleted' FROM( SELECT newpat.PatNum, newpat.AptDateTime, newpat.ReactDate AS ProcDate, MIN(exams.ProcDate) AS 'ExamDate', MAX(CASE WHEN exams.ProcCode = 'D0150' AND exams.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate THEN exams.ProcDate ELSE NULL END) AS 'D0150' FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum, MIN(apt.AptDateTime) AS AptDateTime, MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS NewPat, MAX(CASE WHEN pl.ProcDate < @FromDate THEN pl.ProcDate END) AS OldPat, MIN(CASE WHEN pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate THEN pl.ProcDate END) AS ReactDate FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode plc ON plc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND plc.ProcCode NOT REGEXP @ExcludedCodes LEFT JOIN appointment apt ON pl.AptNum = apt.AptNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate <= @ToDate GROUP BY pl.PatNum HAVING (CASE WHEN ISNULL(OldPat) THEN NewPat BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ELSE DATE_FORMAT(OldPat, '%Y-%m') <= DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate - INTERVAL 2 YEAR, '%Y-%m') AND ReactDate IS NOT NULL END) ORDER BY NULL )newpat LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ExamCodes WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate < @ToDate )exams ON exams.PatNum=newPat.PatNum AND (ISNULL(newPat.OldPat) OR exams.ProcDate > newPat.OldPat) GROUP BY newPat.PatNum )a INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = a.PatNum AND p.DateFirstVisit BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND p.PatStatus = 0 LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = a.PatNum AND pl.DateTP = a.ExamDate AND pl.ProcStatus IN ('1','2') GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY a.ExamDate ) b INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, p.DateFirstVisit, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode) AS FirstVisitProcs, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT prov.Abbr) AS FirstVisitProvs, SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits+pl.UnitQty)) AS FirstVisitProduction FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND p.PatStatus = 0 INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcDate = p.DateFirstVisit AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) firstVisitData ON firstVisitData.PatNum = b.PatNum GROUP BY b.PatNum

request: Patients referred by specified referrers, with specified codes treatment planned or completed.
query: SET @Codes='D4910'; SET @Referrer='Last, First'; SET @Codes=(CASE WHEN @Codes='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Codes,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @Referrer=(CASE WHEN @Referrer='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Referrer,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT p.FName, p.LName, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ref.LName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(ref.FName) > 0 THEN CONCAT(', ', ref.FName) ELSE '' END) SEPARATOR '|') AS 'ReferredFrom' FROM patient p INNER JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum = ra.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 INNER JOIN referral ref ON ra.ReferralNum = ref.ReferralNum AND CONCAT(ref.LName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(ref.FName) > 0 THEN CONCAT(', ', ref.FName) ELSE '' END)) REGEXP @Referrer INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @Codes GROUP BY p.PatNum

request: Production and income report by day, for all income linked to Procedures completed in the date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.ProcDate, '') AS 'Date' , IF(s1.Seq = 1, DATE_FORMAT(core.ProcDate, '%W'), '') AS 'Weekday' , FORMAT(CAST(IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.Pdt, SUM(core.Pdt)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)),2) AS 'Production' , FORMAT(CAST(IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.Pdt, SUM(core.Pdt) / COUNT(DISTINCT core.ProcDate)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)),2) AS 'AvgDailyProduction' , FORMAT(CAST(IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.Adj, SUM(core.Adj)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)),2) AS 'Adjustments' , FORMAT(CAST(IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.Wo, SUM(core.Wo)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)),2) AS 'Writeoffs' , FORMAT(CAST(IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.Pdt + core.Adj - core.Wo, SUM(core.Pdt) + SUM(core.Adj) - SUM(core.Wo)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)),2) AS 'NetProduction' , FORMAT(CAST(IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.PtPay, SUM(core.PtPay)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)),2) AS 'PatIncome' , FORMAT(CAST(IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.InsPay, SUM(core.InsPay)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)),2) AS 'InsIncome' , FORMAT(CAST(IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.PtPay + core.InsPay, SUM(core.PtPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)),2) AS 'TotalIncome' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcDate , SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cap.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cap WHERE cap.Status = 7 ),0)) AS 'Pdt' , SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0)) AS 'Wo' , SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0)) AS 'Adj' , SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0)) AS 'PtPay' , SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp2.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp2 INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp2.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE cp2.Status IN (1,4) AND cp2.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0)) AS 'InsPay' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcDate ) core LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_2 s1 ON TRUE GROUP BY s1.Seq, IF(s1.Seq = 1, core.ProcDate, TRUE)

request: Patients with missing teeth. Shows their last visit date and, if insured, their remaining insurance coverage.
query: SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat ID', p.LName AS 'Last Name', p.FName AS 'First Name', MAX(DATE_FORMAT(apt.AptDateTime,'%Y-%m-%d')) AS 'LastSeen', (CASE WHEN p.HasIns = 'I' THEN FORMAT(MAX(CASE a.Ordinal WHEN 1 THEN IFNULL(a.AnnualMax-a.AmtUsed-a.PendingAmt,0) ELSE 0 END),2) ELSE 'No Insurance' END) AS '$Pri Remaining Coverage_', (CASE WHEN p.HasIns = 'I' THEN FORMAT(MAX(CASE a.Ordinal WHEN 2 THEN IFNULL(a.AnnualMax-a.AmtUsed-a.PendingAmt,0) ELSE 0 END),2) ELSE 'No Insurance' END) AS '$Sec Remaining Coverage_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN toothinitial ti ON ti.PatNum = p.PatNum AND ti.ToothNum BETWEEN 2 AND 31 AND ti.ToothNum NOT IN (16,17) AND ti.InitialType = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patplan.PatNum, tblannualmax.AnnualMax AS AnnualMax, IFNULL(UsedPending.AmtUsed,0) AS AmtUsed, IFNULL(UsedPending.AmtPending,0) AS PendingAmt, patplan.Ordinal FROM patplan LEFT JOIN inssub isub ON isub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT amax.Maximum AS 'AnnualMax', amax.PlanNum, amax.PatPlanNum FROM ( SELECT MAX(b.MonetaryAmt) AS 'Maximum', b.PlanNum AS 'Plan', b.PlanNum AS 'PlanNum', '' AS 'PatPlanNum' FROM benefit b WHERE b.BenefitType = 5 AND b.CoverageLevel = 1 AND b.CovCatNum = 0 AND b.CodeNum = 0 AND b.MonetaryAmt > 0 AND b.PlanNum != 0 GROUP BY b.PlanNum UNION ALL SELECT MIN(b.MonetaryAmt) AS 'Maximum', b.PatPlanNum AS 'Plan', '' AS 'PlanNum', patplan.PatPlanNum AS 'PatPlanNum' FROM benefit b INNER JOIN patplan ON b.PatPlanNum = patplan.PatPlanNum WHERE b.BenefitType = 5 AND b.CoverageLevel = 1 AND b.CovCatNum = 0 AND b.CodeNum = 0 AND b.MonetaryAmt > 0 AND b.PatPlanNum != 0 GROUP BY b.PatPlanNum ) amax GROUP BY amax.Plan ) tblannualmax ON (tblannualmax.PatPlanNum = patplan.PatPlanNum OR tblannualmax.PlanNum = isub.PlanNum) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patplan.PatPlanNum, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1,3,4) THEN cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) AS AmtUsed, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.Status=0 AND cp.InsPayAmt=0 THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS AmtPending FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum=cp.PatNum AND patplan.InsSubNum=cp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,3,4,0) AND YEAR(cp.ProcDate) = YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY patplan.PatPlanNum ) UsedPending ON UsedPending.PatPlanNum=patplan.PatPlanNum GROUP BY patplan.PatPlanNum ) a ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN appointment apt ON apt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus = 2 WHERE p.PatStatus NOT IN (4,5) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.PatNum;

request: Mailing information and referral information for patients created in the date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2019-10-01', @ToDate='2019-10-31'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count', p.SecDateEntry AS 'Date Created', p.PatNum AS 'Patient Number', p.LName AS 'Last Name', p.FName AS 'First Name', p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.State, p.Zip, p.HmPhone AS 'Home Phone', p.WkPhone AS 'Work Phone', p.WirelessPhone AS 'Cell Phone', p.Email, GROUP_CONCAT(r.FName,' ',r.LName SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'Referral', IFNULL(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ap.AptDateTime),'%m-%d-%Y') FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.PatNum=p.PatNum AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime)<CURDATE() AND ap.AptStatus=2 ),'NONE') AS 'LastVisit', IFNULL(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ap.AptDateTime),'%m-%d-%Y') FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.PatNum=p.PatNum AND DATE(ap.AptDateTime)>CURDATE() ),'NONE') AS 'NextAppt' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 LEFT JOIN referral r ON ra.ReferralNum=r.ReferralNum WHERE p.SecDateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.PatNum;

request: Aging for families with any balance, with patient and insurance estimates separated. Total at the bottom row.
query: SET @AsOf = '2019-11-01'; SELECT E.Guarantor AS Guarantor, E.Total AS 'Total Balance', E.Pat0to30 AS 'Pat 0-30 Days', E.Pat31to60 AS 'Pat 31-60 Days', E.Pat61to90 AS 'Pat 61-90 Days', E.PatOver90 AS 'Pat >90 Days', E.InsEst0to30 AS 'Ins 0-30 Days', E.InsEst31to60 AS 'Ins 31-60 Days', E.InsEst61to90 AS 'Ins 61-90 Days', E.InsEstOver90 AS 'Ins >90 Days' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS ItemOrder,CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat0to30, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat31to60, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0)) ,2),2) AS Pat61to90, FORMAT(ROUND( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0)) ,2),2) AS PatOver90, FORMAT(ROUND(D.FamBal,2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0),2),2) AS InsEst0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0),2),2) AS InsEst31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0),2),2) AS InsEst61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0),2),2) AS InsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum, g.LName, g.FName, SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal, SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30, SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90, SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90 FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS ItemOrder,' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'Totals:' AS Guarantor, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst0to30,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst31to60,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEst61to90,0))) ,2),2) AS Pat61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM( ((CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END)-COALESCE(FamInsEstOver90,0))) ,2),2) AS PatOver90, FORMAT(ROUND(SUM(D.FamBal),2),2) AS Total, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst0to30),0),2),2) AS InsEst0to30, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst31to60),0),2),2) AS InsEst31to60, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEst61to90),0),2),2) AS InsEst61to90, FORMAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FamInsEstOver90),0),2),2) AS InsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum, g.LName, g.FName, SUM(B.PatBal) AS FamBal, SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS FamCharges0to30, SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS FamCharges31to60, SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS FamCharges61to90, SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS FamChargesOver90, SUM(B.Credits) AS FamCredits, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst0to30,0)) AS FamInsEst0to30, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst31to60,0)) AS FamInsEst31to60, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEst61to90,0)) AS FamInsEst61to90, SUM(COALESCE(C.InsEstOver90,0)) AS FamInsEstOver90 FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS PatBal, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Charges61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS ChargesOver90, -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS Credits FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS TranType,pl.PatNum AS PatNum,pl.ProcDate AS TranDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS TranAmount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS TranType,ps.PatNum AS PatNum,ps.DatePay AS TranDate, -ps.SplitAmt AS TranAmount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS TranType,a.PatNum AS PatNum,a.AdjDate AS TranDate, a.AdjAmt AS TranAmount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS TranType,cp.PatNum AS PatNum,cp.DateCp AS TranDate, -cp.InsPayAmt-cp.Writeoff AS TranAmount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan' AS TranType,pp.PatNum AS PatNum,pp.PayPlanDate AS TranDate, -pp.CompletedAmt AS TranAmount FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.CompletedAmt!=0 GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst0to30, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst31to60, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEst61to90, (SUM(CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS InsEstOver90 FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum,SUM(cp.InsPayEst+cp.Writeoff) AS InsEst,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum!=0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum,cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) C ON C.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 ) E ORDER BY E.ItemOrder,E.Guarantor;

request: Appointments in the date range filtered by provider and/or assistant
query: SET @FromDate='2019-10-01', @ToDate='2019-10-31'; SET @Provider = ''; SET @Assistant = ''; SET @Provider=(CASE WHEN @Provider='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Provider,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @Assistant=(CASE WHEN @Assistant='' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Assistant,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT DATE_FORMAT(apt.AptDateTime,'%m-%d-%Y') AS 'Appointment Date', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name', apt.ProcDescript AS 'Appointment request', prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', CONCAT(emp.FName,' ',emp.LName) AS 'Assistant' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN patient p ON apt.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum AND prov.Abbr REGEXP @Provider LEFT JOIN employee emp ON emp.EmployeeNum = apt.Assistant WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND IFNULL(emp.FName,' ') REGEXP @Assistant

request: Appointments scheduled in a date range as of a specific date and time
query: SET @CutoffDateTime = '2019-12-02 09:52:40'; SET @FromDate='2019-12-01', @ToDate='2019-12-31'; SELECT apt.PatNum, apt.AptDateTime, apt.Op, apt.ProvNum, apt.ProcDescript FROM ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(ha.HistApptNum ORDER BY ha.HistDateTStamp DESC, ha.HistApptNum DESC), ',', 1) AS 'Num', ha.AptNum, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(ha.HistApptAction ORDER BY ha.HistDateTStamp DESC, ha.HistApptNum DESC), ',', 1) AS 'ApptAction', ha.PatNum, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(ha.AptDateTime ORDER BY ha.HistDateTStamp DESC, ha.HistApptNum DESC), ',', 1) AS 'AptDateTime', SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(ha.AptStatus ORDER BY ha.HistDateTStamp DESC, ha.HistApptNum DESC), ',', 1) AS 'AptStatus', SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(ha.Op ORDER BY ha.HistDateTStamp DESC, ha.HistApptNum DESC), ',', 1) AS 'Op', SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(ha.ProvNum ORDER BY ha.HistDateTStamp DESC, ha.HistApptNum DESC), ',', 1) AS 'ProvNum', SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(ha.ProcDescript ORDER BY ha.HistDateTStamp DESC, ha.HistApptNum DESC), ',', 1) AS 'ProcDescript' FROM histappointment ha WHERE ha.HistDateTStamp <= @CutoffDateTime GROUP BY ha.AptNum ) apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 1 AND apt.ApptAction != 4 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY DATE(apt.AptDateTime), apt.Op, apt.AptDateTime, apt.ProvNum

request: New patients and returning patients from 2+ years with referral source and patient address
query: SET @StartDate='2019-12-02', @EndDate='2019-12-02'; SELECT t3.AptDateTime, t3.PatientName, t3.Status, t3.ReferralSource, t3.Scheduler, t3.Address, t3.Address2, t3.City, t3.State, t3.Zip FROM ( SELECT t2.PatNum, t2.MinApt AS 'AptDateTime', CASE WHEN t2.MaxApt IS NULL THEN 'New Patient' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, t2.MaxApt, t2.MinApt) >= 730 THEN 'Returning Patient' END AS 'Status', CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'PatientName', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ref.LName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(ref.FName) > 0 THEN CONCAT(', ', ref.FName) ELSE '' END) SEPARATOR ';') AS 'ReferralSource', uod.UserName AS 'Scheduler', p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.State, p.Zip FROM ( SELECT t1.PatNum, MAX(a.AptDateTime) AS 'MaxApt', t1.AptDateTime AS 'MinApt' FROM ( SELECT a.PatNum, MIN(a.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDateTime' FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY a.PatNum ) t1 LEFT JOIN appointment a ON t1.PatNum = a.PatNum AND a.AptDateTime <= @StartDate AND a.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY t1.PatNum ) t2 LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.PatNum = t2.PatNum AND ap.AptDateTime = t2.MinApt LEFT JOIN userod uod ON ap.SecUserNumEntry = uod.UserNum LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = t2.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 LEFT JOIN referral ref ON ra.ReferralNum = ref.ReferralNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = t2.PatNum GROUP BY t2.PatNum ) t3 WHERE t3.Status IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t3.AptDateTime

request: Active Patient List Excluding Clones
query: SET @FromDate='2018-01-01', @ToDate='2018-12-31'; SET @RowCount = 0; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN('D9986','D9987') INTO @BrokenCodes; SELECT @RowCount := @RowCount + 1 AS 'Count', repordered.PatNumber, repordered.PatientName, repordered.PatStatus, DATE_FORMAT(repordered.FirstProc, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'FirstProc', DATE_FORMAT(repordered.LastProc, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'LastProc', DATE_FORMAT(repordered.FirstApt,'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i:%s %p') AS 'FirstApt', DATE_FORMAT(repordered.LastApt,'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i:%s %p') AS 'LastApt', repordered.Age, repordered.Address, repordered.Address2, repordered.City, repordered.State, repordered.Zip, repordered.HmPhone, repordered.WirelessPhone, repordered.WkPhone FROM ( SELECT rep.PatNumber, rep.PatientName, rep.PatStatus, rep.FirstProc, rep.LastProc, rep.FirstApt, rep.LastApt, rep.Age, rep.Address, rep.Address2, rep.City, rep.State, rep.Zip, rep.HmPhone, rep.WirelessPhone, rep.WkPhone FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum AS 'PatNumber', ELT(p.PatStatus+1,'Patient','NonPatient','Inactive','Archived','Deleted','Deceased','Prospective') AS 'PatStatus', (SELECT MIN(pl.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @BrokenCodes)) AS 'FirstProc', (SELECT MAX(pl.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @BrokenCodes)) AS 'LastProc', (SELECT MIN(apt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus = 2) AS 'FirstApt', (SELECT MAX(apt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus = 2) AS 'LastApt', CONCAT( TRIM(p.LName), ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(p.Preferred)) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', TRIM(p.Preferred),'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', TRIM(p.FName), (CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(p.MiddleI)) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', TRIM(p.MiddleI)) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName', (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) > 120 THEN 'Not Entered' ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) END) AS 'Age', p.Address, p.Address2, p.City, p.State, p.Zip, p.HmPhone, p.WirelessPhone, p.WkPhone FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum NOT IN (SELECT li.PatNumTo FROM patientlink li WHERE li.LinkType = 2) AND (p.PatNum IN ( SELECT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @BrokenCodes) ) OR p.PatNum IN ( SELECT apt.PatNum FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY )) AND p.LName != BINARY UPPER(p.LName) AND p.FName != BINARY UPPER(p.FName) ) rep GROUP BY rep.PatNumber ORDER BY FirstProc ) repordered

request: Aging for families with any balance
query: SET @AsOf='2021-10-20'; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.PatNum WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'PatNum', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.Guarantor WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN 'TOTALS:' END) AS 'Guarantor', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.0to30,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.0to30),2) END) AS 'Fam_Bal_0_30', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.31to60,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.31to60),2) END) AS 'Fam_Bal_31_60', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.61to90,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.61to90),2) END) AS 'Fam_Bal_61_90', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.Over90,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.Over90),2) END) AS 'Fam_BalOver90', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.Total,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.Total),2) END) AS 'Fam_BalTotal', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.InsPayEst,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.InsPayEst),2) END) AS 'InsPayEst', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.WriteOffEst,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.WriteOffEst),2) END) AS 'InsWoEst', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.PatEst,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.PatEst),2) END) AS 'Pat', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.ExpectedPay,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.ExpectedPay),2) END) AS 'Expected', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.PayPlanDue,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.PayPlanDue),2) END) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT D.PatNum, CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS 'Guarantor', CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60 THEN D.FamCharges0to30 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60+D.FamCharges0to30-D.FamCredits END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '0to30', CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90 THEN D.FamCharges31to60 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90+D.FamCharges31to60-D.FamCredits END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '31to60', CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits<=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN D.FamCharges61to90 WHEN D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90<=D.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90+D.FamCharges61to90-D.FamCredits END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '61to90', CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCredits>=D.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamChargesOver90-D.FamCredits END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'Over90', CAST(D.FamBal AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'Total', CAST(COALESCE(D.FamInsPayEst,0) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'InsPayEst', CAST(COALESCE(D.FamWriteOffEst,0) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'WriteOffEst', CAST(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamInsPayEst,0)-COALESCE(D.FamWriteOffEst,0) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'PatEst', CAST(D.FamBal-COALESCE(D.FamWriteOffEst,0) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'ExpectedPay', CAST(D.PayPlanDue AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum, g.LName, g.FName, SUM(B.PatBal) AS 'FamBal', SUM(B.Charges0to30) AS 'FamCharges0to30', SUM(B.Charges31to60) AS 'FamCharges31to60', SUM(B.Charges61to90) AS 'FamCharges61to90', SUM(B.ChargesOver90) AS 'FamChargesOver90', SUM(B.Credits) AS 'FamCredits', SUM(B.InsEst) AS 'FamInsPayEst', SUM(B.Writeoff) AS 'FamWriteOffEst', SUM(B.PayPlanDue) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'PatBal', (SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges0to30', (SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges31to60', (SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges61to90', (SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'ChargesOver90', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits', SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),0)) AS 'InsEst', SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranWriteOff ELSE 0 END),0)) AS 'WriteOff', SUM(COALESCE(RawPatTrans.PayPlanAmount,0)) AS PayPlanDue FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS 'TranType', pl.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS 'TranType', ps.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ps.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType', a.PatNum AS 'PatNum', a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate', a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.DateCp AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (1, 4, 5) THEN - cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN(1,4,5) AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = cp.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType', ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest, 0) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType=0 AND COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS 'TranType', pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate', -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS 'TranType', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pplan.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' AS 'TranType', ppc.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsEst' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', cp.InsPayEst AS 'TranAmount', cp.WriteOff AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum != 0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' AS 'TranType', prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum', DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride = 0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, (procedurelog.ProcFee*(procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits) +COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt,0) +COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay,0) +COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff,0) +COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt,0) ) AS 'Fee', payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', procedurelog.ProcNum, procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AdjAmt, adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum ) procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum=procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(( CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride!=-1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END ),0)*-1) AS 'InsPay', SUM(COALESCE(( CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride!=-1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst!=-1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END ),0)*-1) AS 'WriteOff', claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum ) procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt,0) AS 'Fee', payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', 0 ProcNum, DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt,0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.FamBal)>0.005 GROUP BY D.PatNum ORDER BY D.LName, D.FName )E LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',E.PatNum) WHEN 2 THEN dup.num WHEN 3 THEN dup.num END) ORDER BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',E.PatNum) WHEN 2 THEN dup.num WHEN 3 THEN dup.num END)

request: List of patients with documents created in a specified date range that are in specified image categories
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ImageCategories='Statements,Treatment Plans'; SELECT doc.PatNum ,def.ItemName AS 'Category' ,MAX(doc.DateCreated) AS 'LastDocCreated' FROM document doc INNER JOIN definition def ON doc.DocCategory = def.DefNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ImageCategories) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemName, @ImageCategories)) WHERE doc.DateCreated BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY def.DefNum, doc.PatNum ORDER BY def.DefNum, doc.PatNum

request: How many days am I open in a date range? Displays per month/year in the date range.
query: SET @FromDate = '2020-11-01'; SET @ToDate = '2020-11-30'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(SchedDate, '%M %Y') SchedMonth, COUNT(DISTINCT SchedDate) AS DaysOpen, DATEDIFF(LAST_DAY(SchedDate), DATE_FORMAT(SchedDate, '%Y-%m-01'))+1 AS DaysinMonth FROM SCHEDULE WHERE SchedType=1 AND SchedDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY MONTH(SchedDate), YEAR(SchedDate);

request: Guarantors assigned to a specified clinic with a specific billing type or hidden billing types
query: SET @BillingTypes=''; SET @Clinics=''; SET @OnlyHidden=TRUE; SET @BillingTypes = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^', REPLACE(@BillingTypes, '|', '$|^'), '$') END); SELECT g.PatNum AS 'Guar PatNum' ,g.PatNum ,COALESCE(clin.Abbr, 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,COALESCE(def.ItemName, 'UNKNOWN') AS 'Billing Type' ,g.PatStatus ,GROUP_CONCAT(p.PatNum) AS 'FamPatNums' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = p.BillingType LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = g.ClinicNum WHERE COALESCE(def.ItemName, 'UNKNOWN') REGEXP @BillingTypes AND IF(@OnlyHidden, COALESCE(def.IsHidden, 1) = 1, TRUE) AND p.PatStatus != 4 AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clin.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics)) GROUP BY g.PatNum

request: Patients with recurring charges setup, excluding deleted patients
