query: SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS 'Count',A.* FROM ( SELECT cc.Patnum as PatID, cc.Patnum, cc.CreditCardNum, cc.DateStart, cc.DateStop, cc.ChargeAmt, cc.CCNumberMasked, cc.CCExpiration FROM creditcard cc INNER JOIN patient p on cc.patnum=p.patnum WHERE cc.DateStart !='0001-01-01' AND p.PatStatus !=4 ORDER BY cc.DateStop !='0001-01-01', cc.DateStop DESC, cc.DateStart) A;

request: Detailed Waiting Room Report with totals and averages, procedure and appointment information
query: SET @FromDate='2020-02-13' , @ToDate='2020-02-13'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @Clinics=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,'|','$|^'),'$') END); SET @WaitTimeSec=0,@WaitTimeCnt=0,@AptTimeSec=0,@AptTimeCnt=0,@ChairTimeSec=0,@ChairTimeCnt=0; SELECT apts.PatientName, apts.PatNum AS 'Pat Num', apts.AptDateTime, apts.ProvNum, apts.Assistant, apts.AppointmentTypeName, apts.Op, apts.Clinic, apts.TimeArrived, apts.TimeSeated, apts.TimeDismiss, apts.WaitTime, apts.ChairTime, apts.AptLength, apts.ProcDescript FROM ( SELECT CONCAT( TRIM(p.LName), ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(p.Preferred)) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', TRIM(p.Preferred),'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', TRIM(p.FName), (CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(p.MiddleI)) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', TRIM(p.MiddleI)) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName', LEFT(a.PatNum,15) AS 'PatNum', a.AptDateTime, a.ProvNum, a.Op, COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'None') AS 'Clinic', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%r') ELSE '' END) AS 'TimeArrived', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%r') ELSE '' END) AS 'TimeSeated', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%r') ELSE '' END) AS 'TimeDismiss', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeSeated)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeArrived)),'%H:%i') ELSE '' END) AS 'WaitTime', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN CONCAT( @WaitTimeSec := @WaitTimeSec + TIME_TO_SEC(TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeSeated)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeArrived)),'%H:%i')), @WaitTimeCnt := @WaitTimeCnt + 1 ) ELSE '' END) AS 'WaitTimeT', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeDismissed)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeSeated)),'%H:%i') ELSE '' END) AS 'ChairTime', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeSeated,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN CONCAT( @ChairTimeSec := @ChairTimeSec + TIME_TO_SEC(TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeDismissed)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeSeated)),'%H:%i')), @ChairTimeCnt := @ChairTimeCnt + 1 ) ELSE '' END) AS 'ChairTimeT', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeDismissed)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeArrived)),'%H:%i') ELSE '' END) AS 'AptLength', (CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeDismissed,'%T')<>'00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeArrived,'%T')<>'00:00:00' THEN CONCAT( @AptTimeSec := @AptTimeSec + TIME_TO_SEC(TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeDismissed)-TIME_TO_SEC(DateTimeArrived)),'%H:%i')), @AptTimeCnt := @AptTimeCnt + 1 ) ELSE '' END) AS 'AptLengthT', a.ProcDescript, aptt.AppointmentTypeName, CONCAT(emp.FName, ' ', emp.LName) AS 'Assistant' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON a.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN employee emp ON a.Assistant = emp.EmployeeNum LEFT JOIN appointmenttype aptt ON a.AppointmentTypeNum = aptt.AppointmentTypeNum WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 2 AND COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'None') REGEXP @Clinics ORDER BY a.AptDateTime ) apts UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Average','','','','','','','','','','',CONCAT(FORMAT(((@WaitTimeSec/@WaitTimeCnt)/60),1),' Minutes'),CONCAT(FORMAT(((@ChairTimeSec/@ChairTimeCnt)/60),1),' Minutes'),CONCAT(FORMAT(((@AptTimeSec/@AptTimeCnt)/60),1),' Minutes'),'' UNION ALL SELECT ' UNION ALL SELECT 'Totals','','','','','','','','','','',CONCAT(FORMAT((@WaitTimeSec/60),1),' Minutes'),CONCAT(FORMAT((@ChairTimeSec/60),1),' Minutes'),CONCAT(FORMAT((@AptTimeSec/60),1),' Minutes'),''

request: Payment plans with mismatched Principal and Credits
query: SET @StartDate='2017-01-01', @EndDate='2020-12-31'; SELECT a.PayPlanDate, a.PatNum, a.Guarantor, a.IsClosed, a.Type, a.Principal, a.Credits, a.AccountImbalance FROM ( SELECT pp.PayPlanDate, pp.PatNum, pp.Guarantor, IF(pp.IsClosed = 1, 'Closed', 'Open') AS 'IsClosed', (CASE WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN 'Patient' ELSE 'Insurance' END) AS 'Type', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Principal END)),0),2) AS 'Principal', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 1 THEN ppc.Principal END)),0),2) AS 'Credits', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Principal END)),0) - COALESCE(SUM((CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 1 THEN ppc.Principal END)),0), 2) AS 'AccountImbalance' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplancharge ppc ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.PayPlanDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum )a WHERE a.Principal != a.Credits

request: List of patients who have an appointment in the date range, with contact information.
query: SET @FromDate='2016-04-19', @ToDate='2016-04-21'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'PatID', p.FName, p.LName, p.HmPhone, p.WirelessPhone, p.Email FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment apt ON p.PatNum = apt.PatNum AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY

request: Phone and email for active patients who have their last completed procedure in the specified date range, and have the specified insurance carrier.
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-01-01', @ToDate ='2024-06-25'; SET @Carrier ='%%'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS 'Patient' ,p.HmPhone ,p.WirelessPhone ,p.Email ,DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ProcDate),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'LastVisit' ,c.CarrierName FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub i ON pp.InsSubNum = i.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON i.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON ip.CarrierNum = c.CarrierNum AND c.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier WHERE PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY p.PatNum HAVING MAX(pl.ProcDate) BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ORDER BY LastVisit DESC, p.PatNum

request: Appointments in the specified date range with a hidden provider or hygienist attached
query: SET @FromDate = '2020-03-01', @ToDate = '2020-03-31'; SELECT ap.PatNum AS 'PatID', ap.PatNum, ap.AptStatus, ( SELECT o.OpName FROM operatory o WHERE ap.Op = o.OperatoryNum ) AS 'Operatory', IF(ap.ProvNum = p.ProvNum AND p.IsHidden,p.Abbr,'') AS 'Prov', IF(ap.ProvHyg = p.ProvNum AND p.IsHidden,p.Abbr,'') AS 'Hyg', ap.ProcDescript FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN provider p ON (ap.ProvNum = p.ProvNum OR ap.ProvHyg = p.ProvNum) AND p.IsHidden WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY

request: Patients with PreMed checked
query: SELECT p.PatNum AS 'PatID', CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient', (CASE p.PatStatus WHEN 0 THEN 'Patient' WHEN 1 THEN 'NonPatient' WHEN 2 THEN 'Inactive' WHEN 3 THEN 'Archived' WHEN 6 THEN 'Prospective' END) AS 'PatStatus' FROM patient p WHERE p.Premed = 1 AND p.PatStatus NOT IN (4,5) ORDER BY LName, FName

request: Patients with Medical Urgent Note
query: SELECT p.PatNum AS 'PatID', CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient', (CASE p.PatStatus WHEN 0 THEN 'Patient' WHEN 1 THEN 'NonPatient' WHEN 2 THEN 'Inactive' WHEN 3 THEN 'Archived' WHEN 6 THEN 'Prospective' END) AS 'PatStatus', p.MedUrgNote FROM patient p WHERE p.MedUrgNote != '' AND p.PatStatus NOT IN (4,5) ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Error Checking for claim payments with a carrier specified on the claim payment that do not match the carriers listed on the bulk payment.
query: SET @FromDate = '2020-04-01', @ToDate = '2020-04-30'; SELECT cpay.CheckDate, cpay.CheckAmt, cpay.CarrierName AS CarrierOnPayment, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT car1.CarrierName) AS CarrierOnClaim FROM claimproc cproc INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cproc.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum = cproc.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car1 ON car1.CarrierNum = ip1.CarrierNum AND car1.CarrierName != cpay.CarrierName WHERE cpay.ClaimPaymentNum > 0 AND cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cpay.ClaimPaymentNum

request: List of guarantors with a credit balance and a family member with a payment in a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2020-05-01', @ToDate='2020-05-31'; SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT display.Guarantor, ( SELECT CONCAT(LName,', ',FName) FROM patient WHERE PatNum = SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.LastPayData,':',1) ) AS 'Patient', DATE_FORMAT(DATE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.LastPayData,'|',1),':',-1)),'%m/%d/%y') AS 'Payment Date', FORMAT(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.LastPayData,'|',-1) AS DECIMAL(40,2)),2) AS 'Payment Amount', FORMAT(display.FamBal,2) AS 'Family Balance' FROM( SELECT fam.Guarantor, (CASE SUBSTRING_INDEX(fam.FamLastPayID,':',1) WHEN 'Pay' THEN ( SELECT CONCAT(PatNum,':', PayDate,'|', PayAmt) FROM payment WHERE PayNum = SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(fam.FamLastPayID,',',1),':',-1) ) WHEN 'Inspay' THEN ( SELECT CONCAT(PatNum,':', DateReceived,'|',InsPayAmt) FROM claim WHERE ClaimNum = SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(fam.FamLastPayID,',',1),':',-1) ) END) AS 'LastPayData', fam.FamBal FROM( SELECT CONCAT(g.LName,', ',g.FName) AS 'Guarantor', SUM(pats.HasPay) AS 'HasPay', GROUP_CONCAT(pats.LastPayID) AS 'FamLastPayID', FORMAT(SUM(pats.PatBal),2) AS 'FamBal' FROM( SELECT rawpattrans.PatNum, SUM(COALESCE(rawpattrans.HasPay,0)) AS 'HasPay', SUM(rawpattrans.TranAmount + rawpattrans.TranWriteOff) AS 'PatBal', SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(IF(rawpattrans.TranType IN ('Pay','InsPay'), CONCAT(rawpattrans.TranType,':',rawpattrans.PaymentID),NULL) ORDER BY rawpattrans.TranDate DESC SEPARATOR '|'),'|',1) AS 'LastPayID' FROM( SELECT 'Fee' AS 'TranType', pl.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'PaymentID', 0 AS 'HasPay', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS 'TranType', ps.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate', ps.PayNum AS 'PaymentID', IF(ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate), 1, 0) AS 'HasPay', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ps.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType', a.PatNum AS 'PatNum', a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'PaymentID', 0 AS 'HasPay', a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.DateCp AS 'TranDate', cp.ClaimNum AS 'PaymentID', IF(cp.DateCp BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate), 1, 0) AS 'HasPay', (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', -cp.Writeoff AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (1, 4, 5) THEN - cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN(1,4,5) AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = cp.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType', ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'PaymentID', 0 AS 'HasPay', 0 AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest, 0) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType=0 AND COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS 'TranType', pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'PaymentID', 0 AS 'HasPay', -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS 'TranType', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pplan.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'PaymentID', 0 AS 'HasPay', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' AS 'TranType', ppc.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'PaymentID', 0 AS 'HasPay', -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' AS 'TranType', prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum', DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'PaymentID', 0 AS 'HasPay', (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride = 0 THEN - prodlink.Fee ELSE - ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) + SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt, 0)) AS 'Fee', ppl2.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', pl.ProcNum, pl.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink ppl2 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ppl2.FKey AND ppl2.LinkType = 2 LEFT JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.ProcNum = ppl2.FKey GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.PatNum, adj.AdjAmt AS 'Fee', ppl2.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', 0 AS 'ProcNum', DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink ppl2 INNER JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.AdjNum = ppl2.FKey AND adj.ProcNum = 0 WHERE ppl2.LinkType = 1 ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum ) rawpattrans GROUP BY rawpattrans.PatNum ) pats INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pats.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum HAVING HasPay AND FamBal < -0.005 ) fam ) display

request: Procedure codes marked as hygiene
query: SELECT pc.ProcCode, pc.Descript, pc.AbbrDesc, pc.ProcCat, pc.TreatArea FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.IsHygiene = 1

request: Claim Procedure Payment Audit
query: SET @FromDate='2020-05-01', @ToDate='2021-05-05'; SELECT display.CarrierName, display.Patient, DATE_FORMAT(display.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%y') AS 'DOS', display.ProcCode, FORMAT(display.FeeBilled,2) AS 'Claim Fee', FORMAT(display.InsPayEst,2) AS 'InsPayEst', FORMAT(display.InsPayAmt,2) AS 'InsPayAmt', FORMAT(display.WriteOff,2) AS 'WriteOff', FORMAT(display.Adj,2) AS 'Adj', FORMAT(display.PatPay,2) AS 'Pat Pay', FORMAT((display.ProcFee + display.Adj - display.WriteOff - display.InsPayAmt - display.PatPay),2) AS 'Remaining', DATE_FORMAT(display.DateRecv,'%m/%d/%y') AS 'Date Recvd', display.User FROM( SELECT ( SELECT CarrierName FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.CarrierNum = carrier.CarrierNum WHERE insplan.PlanNum = claim.PlanNum ) AS 'CarrierName', ( SELECT CONCAT( p.LName, ',', IF(LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0, CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\' '), ' '), p.FName, IF(LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0, CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI), '') ) FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = cp.PatNum ) AS 'Patient', pl.ProcDate, pl.ProcFee*(pl.BaseUnits+pl.UnitQty) AS 'ProcFee', pc.ProcCode, COALESCE(( SELECT MAX(claimproc.FeeBilled) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) AND claimproc.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND claimproc.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum ), 0) AS 'FeeBilled', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) AND claimproc.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND claimproc.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum ), 0) AS 'InsPayEst', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) AND claimproc.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND claimproc.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum ), 0) AS 'InsPayAmt', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) AND claimproc.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND claimproc.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum ), 0) AS 'Writeoff', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'Adj', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'PatPay', MAX(cp.DateCP) AS 'DateRecv', COALESCE(( SELECT userod.UserName FROM claimtracking INNER JOIN userod ON userod.UserNum = claimtracking.UserNum WHERE TrackingType = 'ClaimProcReceived' AND ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum LIMIT 1 ),'') AS 'User' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = 'P' INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND cp.Status IN (1, 4) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) display WHERE display.InsPayAmt != display.InsPayEst

request: List of Carriers with Claim payments in the date range. Includes patient payments for patients with and without insurance claims during the date range
query: SET @FromDate='2019-01-01', @ToDate='2019-12-31'; SET @TotalIncome = ( SELECT SUM(InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claimpayment ON claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum = claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum WHERE DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ); SET @TotalIncome = @TotalIncome + ( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ); SELECT carrier.CarrierName, FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt),2) AS 'Revenue', FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) / @TotalIncome * 100,2) AS '% Rev' FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claimpayment ON claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum = claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = claimproc.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum WHERE claimproc.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) GROUP BY carrier.CarrierNum UNION ALL SELECT patpay.CarrierName, FORMAT(SUM(patpay.Revenue),2) AS 'Revenue', FORMAT(SUM(patpay.Revenue) / @TotalIncome * 100,2) AS '% Rev' FROM( SELECT IF(( SELECT 1 FROM claim WHERE claim.PatNum = paysplit.PatNum AND claim.DateService BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) LIMIT 1 ) = 1, 'Insured Pat Pay', 'Uninsured Pat Pay') AS 'CarrierName', SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) AS 'Revenue' FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payment ON payment.PayNum = paysplit.PayNum AND payment.PayType != 0 WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY paysplit.PatNum ) patpay GROUP BY patpay.CarrierName UNION ALL SELECT 'Total' AS 'CarrierName', FORMAT(@TotalIncome,2) AS 'Revenue', '' AS ' % Rev'

request: List of carriers with claim payments in the date range. Cares Act Query V2. See notes below
query: SET @FromDate='2023-01-01', @ToDate='2023-01-31'; SET @tot = 0.00; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1, display.Carrier, '') AS 'CarrierName' ,FORMAT(SUM(display.Revenue), 2) AS 'Revenue' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT((SUM(display.Revenue) / @tot) * 100, 2) WHEN 2 THEN '' END) AS '% Revenue' FROM ( SELECT var.Carrier ,var.InsPay ,var.PtPay ,var.Revenue ,@tot := @tot + var.Revenue AS 'RunTot' FROM ( SELECT core.Carrier ,SUM(core.InsPay) AS 'InsPay' ,SUM(core.PtPay) AS 'PtPay' ,IF(core.Carrier = 'Self-Pay', SUM(core.PtPay), SUM(core.InsPay)) AS 'Revenue' FROM ( SELECT 'Ins' AS 'Type' ,cp.PatNum ,cp.DateCP AS 'PaidOn' ,ca.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' ,ca.CarrierNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPay' ,0 AS 'PtPay' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN claim c ON c.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND cp.Status IN (1,4,7) GROUP BY ca.CarrierNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Pat' AS 'Type' ,ps.ProcNum ,ps.DatePay AS 'PaidOn' ,IFNULL(ins.CarrierName, 'Self-Pay') AS 'Carrier' ,IFNULL(ins.CarrierNum, 0) AS 'CarrierNum' ,SUM(IF(!ISNULL(ins.ProcNum), ps.SplitAmt, 0)) AS 'InsPay' ,SUM(IF(ISNULL(ins.ProcNum), ps.SplitAmt, 0)) AS 'PtPay' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN ( SELECT paysplit.ProcNum ,ca1.CarrierName ,ca1.CarrierNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN claimproc cp1 ON cp1.ProcNum = paysplit.ProcNum AND cp1.Status IN (0,1,5,7) INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp1.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN claim c1 ON c1.ClaimNum = cp1.ClaimNum AND c1.ClaimType = 'P' INNER JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum = cp1.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca1 ON ca1.CarrierNum = ip1.CarrierNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum ) ins ON ins.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY ins.CarrierNum ) core GROUP BY core.Carrier ) var ) display LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1, CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', display.Carrier), dup.Num)

request: Completed procedures with one of the specified insurance carriers.
query: SET @FromDate='2014-01-01',@ToDate='2020-02-01'; SET @Carriers='BCBS'; SET @Carriers=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Carriers)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@Carriers,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT display.Pat AS 'Pat display.Patient, display.ProcDate, display.Provider, display.Carriers FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', pl.ProcDate, prov.Abbr AS 'Provider', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT car.CarrierName ORDER BY car.CarrierName SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'Carriers', IF(car.CarrierName REGEXP @Carriers,'x','') AS 'RowShows' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum HAVING RowShows = 'x' ORDER BY pl.ProcDate,p.LName,p.FName ) display;

request: List of non-hidden Insurance Carriers. Groups by Carrier Group Name if present. Displays like Lists > Insurance Carriers
query: SET @CarrierName = '%%'; SELECT carrier.CarrierName ,carrier.Phone ,carrier.Address ,carrier.Address2 ,carrier.City ,carrier.State ,carrier.Zip ,carrier.ElectID ,COUNT(insplan.PlanNum) Plans FROM carrier LEFT JOIN canadiannetwork ON canadiannetwork.CanadianNetworkNum=carrier.CanadianNetworkNum LEFT JOIN insplan ON insplan.CarrierNum=carrier.CarrierNum WHERE CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName AND carrier.IsHidden=0 GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(carrier.CarrierGroupName, 0),carrier.CarrierNum) ORDER BY carrier.CarrierName

request: Payments in the specified date range and clinic(s) attached to procedures and adjustments prior to the cutoff date
query: SET @FromDate='2024-08-02', @ToDate='2024-12-31'; SET @CutOffDate='2024-08-02'; SET @Clinics = ''; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN @Clinics = '' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT core.Date AS 'PaidDate' ,core.DateOfService AS 'ServiceDate' ,core.CarrierName ,core.PatientName AS 'Patient Name' ,core.Provider ,core.CheckNum AS 'CheckNumber' ,core.PaymentType ,core.Amount AS 'Amt' FROM( SELECT 1 AS 'ItemOrder' ,' ,' ,'Insurance Payments' AS 'CarrierName' ,' ,' ,' ,' ,' ,'' AS 'RowID' UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS 'ItemOrder' ,DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date' ,DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'DateOfService' ,ca.CarrierName AS 'CarrierName' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName' ,pv.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,IFNULL(cpa.CheckNum,'') AS 'CheckNum' ,IFNULL(d.ItemName,'') AS 'PaymentType' ,FORMAT(cp.InsPayAmt,2) AS 'Amount' ,CONCAT('cp',cp.ClaimProcNum) AS 'RowID' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim c ON c.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = c.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate < @CutOffDate LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = cp.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN claimpayment cpa ON cpa.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum = cpa.PayType WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (1,4) AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(clin.Abbr ,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS 'ItemOrder','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS 'ItemOrder' ,' ,' ,'Patient Payments' AS 'CarrierName' ,' ,' ,' ,' ,' ,'' AS 'RowID' UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS 'ItemOrder' ,DATE_FORMAT(ps.DatePay,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date' ,DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(( SELECT pl.ProcDate FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum ),( SELECT a.AdjDate FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjNum = ps.AdjNum )),'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'DateOfService' ,'' AS 'CarrierName' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName' ,IFNULL(pv.Abbr,'') AS 'Provider' ,pa.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' ,IFNULL(d.ItemName,'Income Transfer') AS 'PaymentType' ,FORMAT(ps.SplitAmt,2) AS 'Amount' ,CONCAT('ps',ps.SplitNum) AS 'RowID' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ps.PatNum INNER JOIN payment pa ON pa.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = ps.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN provider pv ON pv.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition d ON d.DefNum = pa.PayType WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(clin.Abbr ,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT pl.ProcNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate < @CutOffDate AND pl.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT a.AdjNum FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate < @CutOffDate AND a.AdjNum = ps.AdjNum )) ) core ORDER BY core.ItemOrder,core.Date,core.RowID

request: Find all repeating charges added today.
query: SELECT pl.PatNum AS 'Pat ,pl.PatNum ,pl.ProcDate ,pc.ProcCode FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.RepeatChargeNum > 0 AND pl.SecDateEntry BETWEEN CURDATE() AND CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY - INTERVAL 1 SECOND

request: Count of patients seen in a date range by carrier, including uninsured / cash
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-09-23'; SELECT COALESCE(ca.CarrierName, 'Uninsured/Cash') AS 'Carrier', COUNT(DISTINCT IF(COALESCE(pp.Ordinal, 1) = 1, p.PatNum, NULL)) AS 'PriPats', COUNT(DISTINCT IF(COALESCE(pp.Ordinal, 1) = 2, p.PatNum, NULL)) AS 'SecPats', COUNT(DISTINCT IF(COALESCE(pp.Ordinal, 1) NOT IN (1,2), p.PatNum, NULL)) AS 'OtherPats' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum LEFT JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum = iss.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON iss.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum WHERE p.PatNum IN (SELECT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2) AND p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY COALESCE(ca.CarrierName, 'Uninsured/Cash') ORDER BY COALESCE(ca.CarrierName, -1)

request:
As Total Insurance Payments, Patient Payment Splits not attached to
	a procedure, Adjustments not attached to a procedure
query: SET @FromDate='2019-01-01', @ToDate='2019-01-01'; SELECT 'As Total Claim Payment' AS 'EntryType', cp.PatNum, cp.ProcDate AS 'Claim DOS', DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Payment Date', cp.DateEntry, cp.InsPayAmt AS 'Amount', cp.WriteOff AS 'WriteOff', '' AS 'Unearned', '' AS 'Income Transfer' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = 0 AND cp.Status != 3 AND cp.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Patient Payment Split' AS 'EntryType', ps.PatNum, '' AS 'Claim DOS', DATE_FORMAT(ps.DatePay,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Payment Date', ps.DateEntry, ps.SplitAmt AS 'Amount', '' AS 'WriteOff', IF(ps.ProvNum = 0 AND ps.UnearnedType > 0 ,'Unearned' ,IF(ps.ProvNum = 0 AND ps.UnearnedType = 0 ,'Unearned' ,'') ) AS 'Unearned', ( SELECT IF(payment.PayType = 0,'Income Transfer','') FROM payment WHERE payment.PayNum = ps.PayNum ) AS 'Income Transfer' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = 0 AND ps.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Adjustment' AS 'EntryType', adj.PatNum, '' AS 'Claim DOS', DATE_FORMAT(adj.AdjDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Payment Date', adj.DateEntry, adj.AdjAmt AS 'Amount', '' AS 'WriteOff', '' AS 'Unearned', '' AS 'Income Transfer' FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = 0 AND adj.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY EntryType, DateEntry, PatNum

request: List of employers
query: SELECT emp.EmpName AS 'Employer' FROM employer emp

request: Patient payments with a payment date in the specified date range and with the specified check number, by patient, with amount split to each patient
query: SET @FromDate='2022-08-01', @ToDate='2022-08-31'; SET @CheckNum=''; SELECT ps.PatNum AS 'PatID' ,ps.PatNum ,pay.CheckNum ,DATE_FORMAT(ps.DatePay, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Payment Date' ,DATE_FORMAT(pay.DateEntry, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Entry Date' ,FORMAT(SUM(ps.SplitAmt), 2) AS 'Paid' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@CheckNum) = 0, TRUE, pay.CheckNum = @CheckNum) AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY ps.PatNum

request: Patients with 'In Process' procedures
query: SELECT pl.PatNum, CONCAT('PatNum:', pl.PatNum) AS 'PatLink', GROUP_CONCAT(IF(pl.ProcStatus != 2, pc.ProcCode, NULL)) AS 'Incomplete', GROUP_CONCAT(IF(pl.ProcStatus = 2, pc.ProcCode, NULL)) AS 'Complete', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT IF(pl.ProcStatus = 2, DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate, '%m/%d/%Y'), NULL) ORDER BY pl.ProcDate) AS 'CompleteDates' FROM procmultivisit pmv INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pmv.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum GROUP BY pmv.GroupProcMultiVisitNum HAVING !ISNULL(Incomplete) AND !ISNULL(Complete)

request: Printable pharmacy list
query: SELECT ph.StoreName ,ph.Phone ,ph.Fax ,CONCAT(ph.Address,' ',ph.Address2) AS 'Address' ,ph.City ,COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(( SELECT c.Abbr FROM clinic c WHERE c.ClinicNum = phc.ClinicNum )),'No Clinic') AS 'Clinics' ,ph.Note AS 'Note' FROM pharmacy ph LEFT JOIN pharmclinic phc ON ph.PharmacyNum = phc.PharmacyNum GROUP BY ph.PharmacyNum

request: List of appointments completed in the date range. Shows duration between confirmation/appointment status changes. See Specifications for more details.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-07-01', @ToDate='2024-07-14'; SELECT display.FName , display.LName , display.Provider , display.Hygienist , COALESCE(display.Procedures, '') AS 'Procedures' , COALESCE(display.Arrived, '') AS 'Arrived' , COALESCE( TIME_FORMAT( SEC_TO_TIME( TIMESTAMPDIFF( SECOND, SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.Arrived, '|', 1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.Ready, '|', 1) ) ) ,'%T') , '') AS 'Arrived Duration' , COALESCE(display.Ready, '') AS 'Ready' , COALESCE( TIME_FORMAT( SEC_TO_TIME( TIMESTAMPDIFF( SECOND, SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.Ready, '|', 1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.InRoom, '|', 1) ) ) ,'%T') , '') AS 'Ready Duration' , COALESCE(display.InRoom, '') AS 'In Room' , COALESCE( TIME_FORMAT( SEC_TO_TIME( TIMESTAMPDIFF( SECOND, SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.InRoom, '|', 1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.Completed, '|', 1) ) ) ,'%T') , '') AS 'In Room Duration' , COALESCE(display.Completed, '') AS 'Completed' , COALESCE(display.ExpectedDuration, '') AS 'Expected Duration' , COALESCE( TIME_FORMAT( SEC_TO_TIME( TIMESTAMPDIFF( SECOND, SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.Arrived, '|', 1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(display.Completed, '|', 1) ) ) ,'%T') , '') AS 'Actual Duration' FROM ( SELECT p.FName , p.LName , ( SELECT prov.Abbr FROM provider prov WHERE prov.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum ) AS Provider , COALESCE(( SELECT hyg.Abbr FROM provider hyg WHERE hyg.ProvNum = apt.ProvHyg ), '') AS Hygienist , COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ', ') FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.AptNum = apt.AptNum ), 'No procs') AS 'Procedures' , ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(aha.HistDateTStamp, '|', hu.UserName ORDER BY aha.HistDateTStamp ASC), ',', 1) FROM histappointment aha INNER JOIN definition conf ON conf.DefNum = aha.Confirmed AND conf.ItemValue = 'Arrived' INNER JOIN userod hu ON hu.UserNum = aha.HistUserNum WHERE aha.AptNum = apt.AptNum AND aha.HistApptAction = 1 AND aha.AptStatus = 1 ) AS 'Arrived' , ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(rha.HistDateTStamp, '|', hu.UserName ORDER BY rha.HistDateTStamp ASC), ',', 1) FROM histappointment rha INNER JOIN definition conf ON conf.DefNum = rha.Confirmed AND conf.ItemValue = 'Ready' INNER JOIN userod hu ON hu.UserNum = rha.HistUserNum WHERE rha.AptNum = apt.AptNum AND rha.HistApptAction = 1 AND rha.AptStatus = 1 ) AS 'Ready' , ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(irha.HistDateTStamp, '|', hu.UserName ORDER BY irha.HistDateTStamp ASC), ',', 1) FROM histappointment irha INNER JOIN definition conf ON conf.DefNum = irha.Confirmed AND conf.ItemValue = 'In Room' INNER JOIN userod hu ON hu.UserNum = irha.HistUserNum WHERE irha.AptNum = apt.AptNum AND irha.HistApptAction = 1 AND irha.AptStatus = 1 ) AS 'InRoom' , ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(cha.HistDateTStamp, '|', hu.UserName ORDER BY cha.HistDateTStamp ASC), ',', 1) FROM histappointment cha INNER JOIN userod hu ON hu.UserNum = cha.HistUserNum WHERE cha.AptNum = apt.AptNum AND cha.HistApptAction = 1 AND cha.AptStatus = 2 ) AS 'Completed' , TIME_FORMAT(SEC_TO_TIME(CHAR_LENGTH(apt.Pattern)*5*60),'%T') AS 'ExpectedDuration' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = apt.PatNum WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) display

request: Patient count by zip code and patient's primary provider; considering patients with a patient status of Patient, with at least 1 completed procedure (excludes broken/missed codes). Only counts patient once under provider set as the patient's primary provider. Can be added together to get total patients.
query: SET @Provs=''; SET @ProvList=REPLACE(@Provs,', ',','); SELECT prov.Abbr ,LEFT(Zip,5) AS ZipCode ,COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS 'Patients' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN ('D9986', 'D9987') INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = p.PriProv AND IF(@ProvList = '', TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr, @Provlist)) WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND p.PatStatus=0 GROUP BY ZipCode, prov.ProvNum

request:
Payments in the date range allocated to a specified Procedure code,
	provider and clinic. Shows one row per payment, so the same procedure may
	be listed more than once. 'Remaining' column considers all payments and
	adjustments allocated to the procedure, not just that row's payment.
query: SET @FromDate="2021-06-01", @ToDate="2022-06-30"; SET @ProvList=""; SET @ClinicList=""; SET @ProcCodes=""; SET @ProvList = ( CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProvList) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT( '^', REPLACE( REPLACE(@ProvList, ', ', '$|^'), ',', '$|^' ), '$' ) END ); SET @ClinicList = ( CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ClinicList) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT( '^', REPLACE( REPLACE(@ClinicList, ', ', '$|^'), ',', '$|^' ), '$' ) END ); SELECT display.ProcDate ,display.Patient ,display.ProcCode ,display.AbbrDesc ,display.ProcProv ,display.ProcFee ,display.Adj ,display.PayClin ,display.DatePay ,display.Abbr ,display.PayType ,display.Carrier ,display.FeeSched ,IF( display.Carrier = '' ,IF( display.PayType = 'Transfer' ,0 ,display.PayAmt ) ,0 ) AS '$PatInc' ,IF( display.Carrier = '' ,IF( display.PayType = 'Transfer' ,display.PayAmt ,0 ) ,0 ) AS '$Inc Trans' ,IF( display.Carrier = '' ,0 ,display.PayAmt ) AS '$InsInc' ,display.WriteOff AS '$WriteOff' ,FORMAT(( display.ProcFee + display.Adj - display.PayAmt - display.WriteOff - display.RemIns - display.RemPat ), 2) AS 'Remaining' FROM ( SELECT pspl.ProcDate ,( SELECT CONCAT( p.LName ,',' ,IF(LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 ,CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\' ') ,' ' ) ,p.FName ,IF(LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 ,CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) , '' ) ) AS 'Patient Name' FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = ps.PatNum ) AS 'Patient' ,pspc.ProcCode ,pspc.AbbrDesc ,( SELECT procp.Abbr FROM provider procp WHERE procp.ProvNum = pspl.ProvNum ) AS 'ProcProv' ,(pspl.ProcFee * (pspl.BaseUnits + pspl.UnitQty)) AS 'ProcFee' ,COALESCE( ( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = pspl.ProcNum ) ,0.00 ) AS 'Adj' ,COALESCE(( SELECT payclin.Abbr FROM clinic payclin WHERE payclin.ClinicNum = ps.ClinicNum ), "None") AS 'PayClin' ,ps.DatePay ,psprov.Abbr ,COALESCE( ( SELECT ppaytype.ItemName FROM payment patpay INNER JOIN definition ppaytype ON ppaytype.DefNum = patpay.PayType AND ppaytype.Category = 10 WHERE patpay.PayNum = ps.PayNum ) ,'Transfer' ) AS 'PayType' ,'' AS 'Carrier' ,COALESCE( ( SELECT 'Co-Pay' FROM claimproc patpaycp WHERE patpaycp.ProcNum = pspl.ProcNum AND patpaycp.Status IN (0,1,4,5) LIMIT 1 ) ,'Private Pay' ) AS 'FeeSched' ,ps.SplitAmt AS 'PayAmt' ,0 AS 'Writeoff' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(remcp.WriteOff + remcp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc remcp WHERE remcp.ProcNum = pspl.ProcNum AND remcp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) ),0) AS 'RemIns' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(remsplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit remsplit WHERE remsplit.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum AND remsplit.SplitNum != ps.SplitNum ), 0) AS 'RemPat' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN procedurelog pspl ON pspl.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum AND pspl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pspc ON pspc.CodeNum = pspl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pspc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN provider psprov ON psprov.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum AND psprov.Abbr REGEXP @ProvList WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.SplitNum UNION ALL SELECT cppl.ProcDate ,( SELECT CONCAT( p.LName ,',' ,IF(LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 ,CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\' ') ,' ' ) ,p.FName ,IF(LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 ,CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) , '' ) ) AS 'Patient Name' FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = cp.PatNum ) AS 'Patient' ,cppc.ProcCode ,cppc.AbbrDesc ,( SELECT procp.Abbr FROM provider procp WHERE procp.ProvNum = cppl.ProvNum ) AS 'ProcProv' ,(cppl.ProcFee * (cppl.BaseUnits + cppl.UnitQty)) AS 'ProcFee' ,COALESCE( ( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = cppl.ProcNum ) ,0.00 ) AS 'Adj' ,COALESCE(( SELECT ipclin.Abbr FROM claimpayment cpaycl INNER JOIN clinic ipclin ON ipclin.ClinicNum = cpaycl.ClinicNum WHERE cpaycl.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum ), 'None') AS 'PayClin' ,cp.DateCP AS 'DatePay' ,cpprov.Abbr ,COALESCE( ( SELECT ppaytype.ItemName FROM claimpayment cpay INNER JOIN definition ppaytype ON ppaytype.DefNum = cpay.PayType AND ppaytype.Category = 32 WHERE cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum ) ,'' ) AS 'PayType' ,( SELECT car.CarrierName FROM insplan carip INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = carip.CarrierNum WHERE carip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum ) AS 'Carrier' ,( SELECT fs.request FROM insplan fip INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum = fip.FeeSched WHERE fip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum ) AS 'FeeSched' ,cp.InsPayAmt AS 'PayAmt' ,cp.WriteOff AS 'Writeoff' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(remcp.WriteOff + remcp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc remcp WHERE remcp.ProcNum = cppl.ProcNum AND remcp.ClaimProcNum != cp.ClaimProcNum AND remcp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) ),0) AS 'RemIns' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(remsplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit remsplit WHERE remsplit.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'RemPat' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog cppl ON cppl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cppl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode cppc ON cppc.CodeNum = cppl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cppc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN provider cpprov ON cpprov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum AND cpprov.Abbr REGEXP @ProvList WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum ) display HAVING PayClin REGEXP @ClinicList

request:
List of patients with prophy frequency limitation of 2 times per year for
	either primary or secondary insurance. Shows how many they have completed
	and the date of their last specified cleaning code.
query: SET @CleaningCodes = 'D1110,D1120,D4910,D4341,D4342'; SELECT pref.ValueString INTO @Codes FROM preference pref WHERE pref.PrefName = 'InsBenProphyCodes'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @CodeNums FROM procedurecode pc WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Codes); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @CleanCodeNums FROM procedurecode pc WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@CleaningCodes); SELECT core.Patient ,core.Phone ,core.Email ,core.Age ,MAX(core.Primary) AS 'Primary' ,MAX(core.Secondary) AS 'Secondary' ,core.Guar AS 'Guarantor' ,core.GuarPhn AS 'Guarantor Phone' ,core.GuarEmail AS 'Guarantor Email' ,COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.PatNum = core.PatNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @CodeNums) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN (CURDATE() - INTERVAL MONTH(CURDATE()) - 1 MONTH - INTERVAL DAY(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY) AND CURDATE()) , 0) AS 'CompletedProphies' ,COALESCE(( SELECT MAX(plclean.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog plclean WHERE plclean.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(plclean.CodeNum,@CleanCodeNums) AND plclean.PatNum = core.PatNum ),'') AS 'Last Cleaning' FROM ( SELECT p.PatStatus, p.PatNum ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' ,p.WirelessPhone AS 'Phone' ,p.Email ,(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) < 120 THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS 'Age' ,IF(pp.Ordinal = 1,ca.CarrierName,'') AS 'Primary' ,IF(pp.Ordinal = 2,ca.CarrierName,'') AS 'Secondary' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(g.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', g.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', g.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(g.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', g.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Guar' ,g.WirelessPhone AS 'GuarPhn' ,g.Email AS 'GuarEmail' ,( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT 'Yes') FROM benefit ben WHERE ben.TimePeriod = 2 AND ben.QuantityQualifier = 1 AND ben.Quantity = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(ben.CodeNum, @CodeNums) AND ben.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum ) AS 'Limit' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient g ON p.Guarantor = g.PatNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ib.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum GROUP BY p.PatNum, pp.PatPlanNum ) core WHERE core.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY core.PatNum HAVING FIND_IN_SET('Yes',GROUP_CONCAT(core.Limit)) ORDER BY CompletedProphies, core.Guar

request:
List of appointments created in the date range by the specified
user, with a specified procedure code attached.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-01-15'; SET @UserList=''; SET @CodeList=''; SET @CodeList=( CASE WHEN LENGTH(@CodeList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT( '^' ,REPLACE(REPLACE(@CodeList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^') ,'$' ) END ) ,@UserList=( CASE WHEN LENGTH(@UserList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT( '^' ,REPLACE(REPLACE(@UserList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^') ,'$' ) END ); SELECT display.UserName , display.PatientName AS 'Patient Name' , SUBSTRING_INDEX( display.FeenProcs , ' - ' , -1 ) AS 'Procedures' , FORMAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX( display.FeenProcs , ' - ' , 1 ) , 2 ) AS 'Fee' , display.AptDate AS 'Apt Date' FROM ( SELECT aptu.UserName , CONCAT( aptpat.LName ,',' ,IF( LENGTH(aptpat.Preferred) > 0 , CONCAT( " '" , aptpat.Preferred ,"' " ) , ' ' ) ,aptpat.FName ,IF( LENGTH(aptpat.MiddleI) > 0 , CONCAT(' ', aptpat.MiddleI) , '' ) ) AS 'PatientName' , ( SELECT CONCAT( SUM( allaptpl.ProcFee * ( allaptpl.BaseUnits + allaptpl.UnitQty ) ) , ' - ' , GROUP_CONCAT( allaptpc.ProcCode , IF( allaptpl.ToothNum='' ,'' ,CONCAT(':', allaptpl.ToothNum) ) , ( CASE WHEN allaptpl.Surf!='' AND allaptpl.ToothNum='' THEN CONCAT(':', allaptpl.Surf) WHEN allaptpl.Surf!='' AND allaptpl.ToothNum!='' THEN CONCAT('-', allaptpl.Surf) ELSE '' END ) SEPARATOR ', ' ) ) FROM procedurelog allaptpl INNER JOIN procedurecode allaptpc ON allaptpc.CodeNum = allaptpl.CodeNum WHERE allaptpl.AptNum = apt.AptNum ) 'FeenProcs' , DATE(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDate' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN userod aptu ON aptu.UserNum = apt.SecUserNumEntry AND aptu.UserName REGEXP @UserList INNER JOIN procedurelog aptproc ON aptproc.AptNum = apt.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode aptcode ON aptcode.CodeNum = aptproc.CodeNum AND aptcode.ProcCode REGEXP @CodeList INNER JOIN patient aptpat ON aptpat.PatNum = apt.PatNum WHERE ( apt.SecDateTEntry BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) GROUP BY apt.AptNum ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime ) display

request:
List of appointments created in the date range by the specified
user, with a specified procedure code attached.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-01-15'; SET @UserList=''; SET @CodeList=''; SET @CodeList=( CASE WHEN LENGTH(@CodeList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT( '^' ,REPLACE(REPLACE(@CodeList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^') ,'$' ) END ) ,@UserList=( CASE WHEN LENGTH(@UserList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT( '^' ,REPLACE(REPLACE(@UserList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^') ,'$' ) END ); SELECT display.UserName , display.PatientName AS 'Patient Name' , SUBSTRING_INDEX( display.FeenProcs , ' - ' , -1 ) AS 'Procedures' , FORMAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX( display.FeenProcs , ' - ' , 1 ) , 2 ) AS 'Fee' , display.AptDate AS 'Apt Date' FROM ( SELECT aptu.UserName , CONCAT( aptpat.LName ,',' ,IF( LENGTH(aptpat.Preferred) > 0 , CONCAT( " '" , aptpat.Preferred ,"' " ) , ' ' ) ,aptpat.FName ,IF( LENGTH(aptpat.MiddleI) > 0 , CONCAT(' ', aptpat.MiddleI) , '' ) ) AS 'PatientName' , ( SELECT CONCAT( SUM( allaptpl.ProcFee * ( allaptpl.BaseUnits + allaptpl.UnitQty ) ) , ' - ' , GROUP_CONCAT( allaptpc.ProcCode , IF( allaptpl.ToothNum='' ,'' ,CONCAT(':', allaptpl.ToothNum) ) , ( CASE WHEN allaptpl.Surf!='' AND allaptpl.ToothNum='' THEN CONCAT(':', allaptpl.Surf) WHEN allaptpl.Surf!='' AND allaptpl.ToothNum!='' THEN CONCAT('-', allaptpl.Surf) ELSE '' END ) SEPARATOR ', ' ) ) FROM procedurelog allaptpl INNER JOIN procedurecode allaptpc ON allaptpc.CodeNum = allaptpl.CodeNum WHERE allaptpl.AptNum = apt.AptNum ) 'FeenProcs' , DATE(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDate' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN userod aptu ON aptu.UserNum = apt.SecUserNumEntry AND aptu.UserName REGEXP @UserList INNER JOIN procedurelog aptproc ON aptproc.AptNum = apt.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode aptcode ON aptcode.CodeNum = aptproc.CodeNum AND aptcode.ProcCode REGEXP @CodeList INNER JOIN patient aptpat ON aptpat.PatNum = apt.PatNum WHERE ( apt.SecDateEntry BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) GROUP BY apt.AptNum ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime ) display

request: Count of appointments by appointment type clinic and date, that have a date in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-08', @ToDate='2020-01-08'; SET @AptTypes = ''; SET @Clinics = ''; SET @AptTypes=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@AptTypes)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@AptTypes,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END), @Clinics=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@Clinics,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics' INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT apts.AppointmentType ,DATE(apts.AptDateTime) AS 'Date' ,apts.AptStatus ,apts.Clinic ,COUNT(DISTINCT apts.AptNum) AS 'Count' FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(apt.AppointmentTypeName,'None') AS 'AppointmentType' ,ap.AptNum ,ap.AptDateTime ,ap.AptStatus ,(CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.request,'Unassigned') ELSE '' END) AS 'Clinic' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum LEFT JOIN appointmenttype apt ON ap.AppointmentTypeNum = apt.AppointmentTypeNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = ap.ClinicNum WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.request,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) AND IF(@AptTypes = '^', TRUE, COALESCE(apt.AppointmentTypeName,'None') REGEXP @AptTypes) ) apts GROUP BY DATE(apts.AptDateTime), apts.Clinic, apts.AptStatus, apts.AppointmentType ORDER BY apts.Clinic, apts.AptStatus, DATE(apts.AptDateTime), apts.AppointmentType

request: Audit trail entries in date range for patient's primary provider changes.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-12-31'; SET @FromProvAbbr='%', @ToProvAbbr=''; SET @pos = 0; SELECT @pos := @pos + 1 AS 'Count' ,display.LogRecorded AS 'Log Recorded' ,display.Patient ,display.LogText ,display.CompName AS 'Computer Deleted From' ,display.UserName AS 'User that Deleted' FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(sl.LogDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'LogRecorded', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient', sl.LogText, sl.CompName, userod.UserName FROM securitylog sl INNER JOIN userod ON userod.UserNum=sl.UserNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=sl.PatNum WHERE sl.PermType=129 AND ( IF(LENGTH(@FromProvAbbr)=0, FALSE, sl.LogText LIKE CONCAT('%from \'', @FromProvAbbr, '%')) OR IF(LENGTH(@ToProvAbbr)=0, FALSE, sl.LogText LIKE CONCAT('%to \'', @ToProvAbbr, '%')) ) AND DATE(sl.LogDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY sl.LogDateTime )display;

request: Refund report - Guarantors with credit balances
query: SET @SortBy = 'Seen'; SET @AsOf = CURDATE(); SET @PayPlanVersion = IFNULL(( SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion' ),1); SELECT results.LName AS 'Last Name', results.FName AS 'First Name', results.Address, results.Address2, results.City, results.State, results.Zip, results.WirelessPhone AS 'Phone', DATE_FORMAT(results.FamLastSeen,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Last Seen', DATE_FORMAT(results.FamLastPay,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Last Payment', CAST(results.FamBal AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'Balance' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum, g.LName, g.FName, g.Address, g.Address2, g.City, g.State, g.Zip, g.WirelessPhone, SUM(core.PatBal) AS 'FamBal', SUM(core.InsEst) AS 'FamInsPayEst', SUM(core.Writeoff) AS 'FamWriteOffEst', MAX(core.LastPay) AS 'FamLastPay', MAX(core.LastSeen) AS 'FamLastSeen' FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'PatBal', SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ,0)) AS 'InsEst', SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranWriteOff ELSE 0 END) ,0)) AS 'WriteOff', MAX(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType IN ('Pay','InsPay') THEN RawPatTrans.TranDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END) AS 'LastPay', ( SELECT MAX(apt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.PatNum = RawPatTrans.PatNum ) AS 'LastSeen' FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS 'TranType', pl.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS 'TranType', ps.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(( SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ps.PayPlanNum) ,0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 GROUP BY ps.SplitNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType', a.PatNum AS 'PatNum', a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate', a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.DateCp AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.Writeoff AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (1,4,5) THEN - cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (1,4,5) AND COALESCE(( SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = cp.PayPlanNum) ,0) = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType', ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3,4) THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest ,0) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE(( SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum) ,0) = 0 THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest ,0) ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND COALESCE(ppc.Principal +ppc.Interest ,0) != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS 'TranType', pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate', -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS 'TranType', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pplan.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' AS 'TranType', ppc.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsEst' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', cp.InsPayEst AS 'TranAmount', cp.WriteOff AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum != 0 AND ((cp.Status = 0 AND cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf) OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > @AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' AS 'TranType', prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum', DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride = 0 THEN - prodlink.Fee ELSE - ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, (pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) + SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt,0)) AS 'Fee', ppl2.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', pl.ProcNum, pl.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink ppl2 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ppl2.FKey AND ppl2.LinkType = 2 LEFT JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.ProcNum = ppl2.FKey GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.PatNum, adj.AdjAmt AS 'Fee', ppl2.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', 0 AS 'ProcNum', DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink ppl2 INNER JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.AdjNum = ppl2.FKey AND adj.ProcNum = 0 WHERE ppl2.LinkType = 1 ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate <= @AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) core INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = core.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) results WHERE results.FamBal < -0.005 AND results.FamInsPayEst = 0 AND results.FamWriteOffEst = 0 GROUP BY results.PatNum ORDER BY (CASE @SortBy WHEN 'Payment' THEN results.FamLastPay WHEN 'Seen' THEN results.FamLastSeen ELSE CONCAT(results.LName,', ',results.FName) END)

request: Patients with discount plans. For versions 20.5+
query: SET @DiscountPlan= ''; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'PatID' ,p.PatNum ,dp.request AS 'Discount Plan' ,dps.DateEffective ,dps.DateTerm ,IFNULL(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(nextappt.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%Y %r') FROM appointment nextappt WHERE nextappt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND nextappt.AptStatus = 1 AND nextappt.AptDateTime > CURDATE() ), '') AS 'NextScheduledAppt' ,p.WirelessPhone ,p.HmPhone ,p.WkPhone ,p.Email FROM patient p INNER JOIN discountplansub dps ON p.PatNum = dps.PatNum INNER JOIN discountplan dp ON dps.DiscountPlanNum = dp.DiscountPlanNum AND IF(LENGTH(@DiscountPlan)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(dp.request,@DiscountPlan)) WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY p.PatNum;

request: Payment report like internal, but includes the patient's ID to better identify the specific patient.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-09-10', @ToDate='2020-09-10'; SET @ProvList=''; SET @PracticeName='Default'; SET @ProvList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProvList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProvList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ProvNums = ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provs.ProvNum) FROM provider provs WHERE provs.Abbr REGEXP @ProvList AND !provs.IsHidden ); SET @PracticeTitle = IF(@PracticeName='Default', (SELECT pracname.ValueString FROM preference pracname WHERE pracname.PrefNum = 5), @PracticeTitle := @PracticeName); SELECT display.Date AS ' ' , display.PatientNumber AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Patient, 35) AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Carrier, 35) AS ' ' , display.Provider AS ' ' , display.CheckNum AS ' ' , display.Amount AS ' ' FROM ( SELECT 'A' AS 'ItemType' , 1 AS 'GroupPayType' , dup1.Num , '0001-01-01' AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date' END ) AS 'Date' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Pat END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Name' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN 'Daily Payments Report' WHEN 2 THEN @PracticeTitle WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT( 'Date Range:' , DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate, '%m/%d/%Y') , '-' , DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate, '%m/%d/%Y') ) WHEN 4 THEN 'Carrier' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Prov' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Check END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Amount' END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 ) dup1 UNION ALL SELECT ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.ItemType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 3 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 4 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) END ) AS 'ItemType' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 3 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 4 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) END ) AS 'GroupPayType' , dup2.Num , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 2 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 3 THEN pays.Date WHEN 4 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.Date) END ) AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 2 THEN pays.PayType WHEN 3 THEN DATE_FORMAT(pays.Date, '%m/%d/%Y') WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.PatNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT CONCAT( UPPER(p.LName) ,', ' ,UPPER(p.FName) ) FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = pays.PatNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.Carrier WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.PayType) WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 6 THEN 'Total All Payments' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = pays.ProvNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.CheckNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 'Insurance Payment' AS 'ItemType' , cpayt.ItemName AS 'PayType' , cpay.ClaimPaymentNum AS 'PayNum' , cpay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , cp.DateCP AS 'Date' , cp.PatNum , c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' , cp.ProvNum , cpay.CheckNum , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'Amount' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN DEFINITION cpayt ON cpayt.DefNum = cpay.PayType AND cpayt.Category = 32 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums) GROUP BY cp.ProvNum, cpay.ClaimPaymentNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Patient Payment' AS 'ItemType' , COALESCE(paytype.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS 'PayType' , pay.PayNum , pay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , ps.DatePay AS 'Date' , pay.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , '' AS 'Carrier' , ps.ProvNum AS 'ProvNum' , pay.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' , SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Amount' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN DEFINITION paytype ON paytype.DefNum = pay.PayType AND paytype.Category = 10 WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(pS.ProvNum, @ProvNums) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum, pay.PayNum ) pays INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 ) dup2 ON TRUE GROUP BY ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, ', ', dup2.Num) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(pays.ProvNum, ', ', pays.PayNum) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 5 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 6 THEN dup2.Num END ) ORDER BY ItemType, GroupPayType, Num, OrDate ) display

request: Count of active patients, by age, in the specified age range, with completed procedures in user defined list that have a date of service in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-01-31'; SET @FromAge='14', @ToAge='17'; SET @ProcList='D1110'; SET @ProcList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProcList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProcList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT pc.ProcCode ,TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) AS 'Age' ,COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS 'Patients' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum WHERE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) BETWEEN @FromAge AND @ToAge AND p.PatStatus=0 AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY Age, pc.ProcCode;

request: Count of active patients, by age, in the specified age range, with completed procedures in user defined list that have a date of service in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2020-01-31'; SET @FromAge='14', @ToAge='17'; SET @ProcList='D1110'; SET @ProcList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProcList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProcList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT pc.ProcCode ,TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,pl.ProcDate) AS 'Age' ,COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS 'Patients' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum=pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum WHERE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,pl.ProcDate) BETWEEN @FromAge AND @ToAge AND p.PatStatus=0 AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pc.ProcCode REGEXP @ProcList AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY Age, pc.ProcCode;

request:
Monthly production and income by provider with writeoff est by initial claim date
	and writeoff adj by insurance payment date
query: SET @FromDate = '2020-09-01', @ToDate = '2020-09-30'; SET @Clinics = ''; SET @Providers = ''; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN @Clinics = '' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SET @Provs = REPLACE(@Providers,', ',','); SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,DATE_FORMAT(core.Date,'%m/%d/%Y'),'') AS 'Date' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,DAYNAME(core.Date),'') AS 'Day' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 ,COALESCE(( SELECT pr.Abbr FROM provider pr WHERE pr.ProvNum = core.Prov ),'None') ,'Total') AS 'Provider' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod),2) AS 'Production' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Sched),2) AS 'Scheduled' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Adj),2) AS 'Adjustments' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.WoEst),2) AS 'Writeoff Est' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.WoAdj),2) AS 'Writeoff Adj' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod) + SUM(core.Adj) + SUM(core.WoEst) + SUM(core.WoAdj) ,2) AS 'Tot Prod' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PtInc),2) AS 'Pt Income' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Unearned),2) AS 'Unearned Pt Income' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.InsInc),2) AS 'Ins Income' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PtInc) + SUM(core.Unearned) + SUM(core.InsInc) ,2) AS 'Tot Income' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON pl.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcDate UNION ALL SELECT IF(pc.IsHygiene,apt.ProvHyg,apt.ProvNum) AS 'Prov' ,DATE(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,SUM(tp.ProcFee * (tp.UnitQty + tp.BaseUnits)) - SUM(( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1) ,NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1) ,0)) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = tp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 6 )) AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog tp INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON tp.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN appointment apt ON tp.AptNum = apt.AptNum AND apt.AptStatus = 1 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY LEFT JOIN clinic cl1 ON cl1.ClinicNum = apt.ClinicNum WHERE tp.ProcStatus = 1 AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl1.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY IF(pc.IsHygiene,apt.ProvHyg,apt.ProvNum),DATE(apt.AptDateTime) UNION ALL SELECT adj.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj LEFT JOIN clinic cl2 ON cl2.ClinicNum = adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl2.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY adj.ProvNum, adj.AdjDate UNION ALL SELECT cp1.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,DATE(cs.DateTEntry) AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,-SUM(cs.Writeoff) AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimsnapshot cs INNER JOIN claimproc cp1 ON cs.ClaimProcNum = cp1.ClaimProcNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl3 ON cp1.ClinicNum = cl3.ClinicNum WHERE cs.DateTEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl3.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY cp1.ProvNum, DATE(cs.DateTEntry) UNION ALL SELECT cp2.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,cp2.DateCP AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,-(SUM(cp2.Writeoff) - SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cs1.Writeoff) FROM claimsnapshot cs1 WHERE cp2.ClaimProcNum = cs1.ClaimProcNum ) ,0) )) AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp2 LEFT JOIN clinic cl4 ON cp2.ClinicNum = cl4.ClinicNum WHERE cp2.Status IN (1,4) AND cp2.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp2.ProvNum, cp2.DateCP UNION ALL SELECT ps.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,ps.DatePay AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,SUM(IF(ps.UnearnedType = 0,ps.SplitAmt,0)) AS 'PtInc' ,SUM(IF(ps.UnearnedType != 0,ps.SplitAmt,0)) AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN clinic cl5 ON ps.ClinicNum = cl5.ClinicNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl5.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum, ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT cp3.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,cp3.DateCP AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,SUM(cp3.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp3 LEFT JOIN clinic cl6 ON cp3.ClinicNum = cl6.ClinicNum WHERE cp3.Status IN (1,4) AND cp3.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl6.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY cp3.ProvNum, cp3.DateCP ) core LEFT JOIN provider pr ON core.Prov = pr.ProvNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Provs) = 0 , ISNULL(pr.ProvNum) OR NOT pr.IsHiddenReport , FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Provs)) GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'-',core.Date,'+',core.Prov),dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Date, core.Prov

request: Aging for families
query: SET @AsOf='2021-02-08'; SET @BalOver=60; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN e.PatNum WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'PatNum', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN e.Guarantor WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN 'TOTALS:' END) AS 'Guarantor', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN e.WirelessPhone WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Cell (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN e.HmPhone WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Home (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN e.WkPhone WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Work (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN e.Ins WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Ins Pri/Sec', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN e.LastStmt WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Last Stmt Sent', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN e.LastPay WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Last Pat Pay', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.0to30,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.0to30),2) END) AS 'Fam_Bal_0_30', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.31to60,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.31to60),2) END) AS 'Fam_Bal_31_60', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.61to90,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.61to90),2) END) AS 'Fam_Bal_61_90', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.Over90,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.Over90),2) END) AS 'Fam_BalOver90', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.Total,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.Total),2) END) AS 'Fam_BalTotal', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.InsPayEst,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.InsPayEst),2) END) AS 'InsPayEst', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.WriteOffEst,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.WriteOffEst),2) END) AS 'InsWoEst', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.PatEst,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.PatEst),2) END) AS 'Pat', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.ExpectedPay,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.ExpectedPay),2) END) AS 'Expected', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(e.PayPlanDue,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(e.PayPlanDue),2) END) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT d.PatNum, CONCAT(d.LName,', ',d.FName) AS 'Guarantor', d.WirelessPhone, d.HmPhone, d.WkPhone, d.Ins, d.LastPay, MAX(d.LastStmt) AS 'LastStmt', CAST( (CASE WHEN d.FamCredits<d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60 THEN d.FamCharges0to30 WHEN d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60+d.FamCharges0to30<=d.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60+d.FamCharges0to30-d.FamCredits END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '0to30', CAST( (CASE WHEN d.FamCredits<d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90 THEN d.FamCharges31to60 WHEN d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60<=d.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90+d.FamCharges31to60-d.FamCredits END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '31to60', CAST( (CASE WHEN d.FamCredits<=d.FamChargesOver90 THEN d.FamCharges61to90 WHEN d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90<=d.FamCredits THEN 0 ELSE d.FamChargesOver90+d.FamCharges61to90-d.FamCredits END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '61to90', CAST( (CASE WHEN d.FamCredits>=d.FamChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE d.FamChargesOver90-d.FamCredits END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'Over90', CAST(d.FamBal AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'Total', CAST(COALESCE(d.FamInsPayEst,0) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'InsPayEst', CAST(COALESCE(d.FamWriteOffEst,0) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'WriteOffEst', CAST(d.FamBal-COALESCE(d.FamInsPayEst,0)-COALESCE(d.FamWriteOffEst,0) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'PatEst', CAST(d.FamBal-COALESCE(d.FamWriteOffEst,0) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'ExpectedPay', CAST(d.PayPlanDue AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum, g.LName, g.FName, g.WirelessPhone, g.HmPhone, g.WkPhone, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( (CASE pp.Ordinal WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT('Pri: ', ca.CarrierName) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(' Sec: ', ca.CarrierName) END) ORDER BY pp.Ordinal ) Ins FROM patplan pp INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE pp.PatNum=g.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal IN (1,2) ) AS 'Ins', MAX(b.LastStmt) AS 'LastStmt', b.LastPay, SUM(b.PatBal) AS 'FamBal', SUM(b.Charges0to30) AS 'FamCharges0to30', SUM(b.Charges31to60) AS 'FamCharges31to60', SUM(b.Charges61to90) AS 'FamCharges61to90', SUM(b.ChargesOver90) AS 'FamChargesOver90', SUM(b.Credits) AS 'FamCredits', SUM(b.InsEst) AS 'FamInsPayEst', SUM(b.Writeoff) AS 'FamWriteOffEst', SUM(b.PayPlanDue) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, ( SELECT MAX(stmt.DateSent) FROM statement stmt WHERE stmt.PatNum = rawpattrans.PatNum AND stmt.IsSent ) AS LastStmt, MAX((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'Pay' THEN RawPatTrans.TranDate ELSE NULL END)) AS 'LastPay', SUM((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'PatBal', (SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges0to30', (SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges31to60', (SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges61to90', (SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'ChargesOver90', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits', SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),0)) AS 'InsEst', SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranWriteOff ELSE 0 END),0)) AS 'WriteOff', SUM(COALESCE(RawPatTrans.PayPlanAmount,0)) AS PayPlanDue FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS 'TranType', pl.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS 'TranType', ps.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ps.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType', a.PatNum AS 'PatNum', a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate', a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.DateCp AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (1, 4, 5) THEN - cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN(1,4,5) AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = cp.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType', ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest, 0) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType=0 AND COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS 'TranType', pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate', -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS 'TranType', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pplan.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' AS 'TranType', ppc.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', -ppc.Principal AS
