'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsEst' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', cp.InsPayEst AS 'TranAmount', cp.WriteOff AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum != 0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' AS 'TranType', prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum', DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride = 0 THEN - prodlink.Fee ELSE - ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) + SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt, 0)) AS 'Fee', ppl2.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', pl.ProcNum, pl.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink ppl2 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ppl2.FKey AND ppl2.LinkType = 2 LEFT JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.ProcNum = ppl2.FKey GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.PatNum, adj.AdjAmt AS 'Fee', ppl2.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', 0 AS 'ProcNum', DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink ppl2 INNER JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.AdjNum = ppl2.FKey AND adj.ProcNum = 0 WHERE ppl2.LinkType = 1 ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) b INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=b.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum ) d WHERE ABS(d.FamBal)>0.005 GROUP BY d.PatNum HAVING ( CASE @BalOver WHEN 30 THEN `31to60` + `61to90` + `Over90` > 0 WHEN 60 THEN `61to90` + `Over90` > 0 WHEN 90 THEN `Over90` > 0 ELSE TRUE END ) ORDER BY d.LName, d.FName )e LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',e.PatNum) WHEN 2 THEN dup.num WHEN 3 THEN dup.num END) ORDER BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',e.PatNum) WHEN 2 THEN dup.num WHEN 3 THEN dup.num END)

request: Insurance Payment Aging
query: SET @FromDate='2016-01-01', @ToDate='2017-05-05'; SELECT FORMAT(SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,DATE(@ToDate)) BETWEEN 0 AND 30, claim.InsPayEst, 0)),2) AS '0-30 Est', FORMAT(SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,DATE(@ToDate)) BETWEEN 0 AND 30 AND claim.ClaimStatus = 'R' , claim.InsPayAmt, 0)),2) AS '0-30 Pay', FORMAT(SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,DATE(@ToDate)) BETWEEN 31 AND 60, claim.InsPayEst, 0)),2) AS '31-60 Est', FORMAT(SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,DATE(@ToDate)) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 AND claim.ClaimStatus = 'R' , claim.InsPayAmt, 0)),2) AS '31-60 Pay', FORMAT(SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,DATE(@ToDate)) BETWEEN 61 AND 90, claim.InsPayEst, 0)),2) AS '61-90 Est', FORMAT(SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,DATE(@ToDate)) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 AND claim.ClaimStatus = 'R' , claim.InsPayAmt, 0)),2) AS '61-90 Pay', FORMAT(SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,DATE(@ToDate)) > 90, claim.InsPayEst, 0)),2) AS 'Over 90 Est', FORMAT(SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,claim.DateService,DATE(@ToDate)) > 90 AND claim.ClaimStatus = 'R' , claim.InsPayAmt, 0)),2) AS 'Over 90 Pay' FROM claim WHERE claim.ClaimType != 'PreAuth' AND IF(claim.ClaimStatus = 'R' , claim.DateReceived BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate),TRUE)

request: Same Day Collection Tracking
query: SET @FromDate='2020-07-01', @ToDate='2020-07-15'; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,core.ProcDate,'') AS 'Date', IF(dup.Num = 1,core.PatName,'Totals:') AS 'Patient Name', IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Procs,'') AS 'Procedures', FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Fee,SUM(core.Fee)),2) AS 'Fee', FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Fee - core.EstIns,SUM(core.Fee - core.EstIns)),2) AS 'Patient', FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Adj,SUM(core.Adj)),2) AS 'Adjustments', FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.PatPay,SUM(core.PatPay)),2) AS 'Patient Paid', FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,(core.Fee - core.EstIns) + core.Adj - core.patPay,SUM((core.Fee - core.EstIns) + core.Adj - core.patPay)),2) AS 'Uncollected', IF(dup.Num = 1,'',CONCAT(FORMAT((SUM((core.Fee - core.EstIns) + core.Adj - core.patPay)) / (SUM(core.Fee - core.EstIns) + SUM(core.Adj)) * 100,2),'%')) AS '% Uncollected' FROM( SELECT pl.ProcDate, pl.PatNum, ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = pl.PatNum ) AS 'PatName', GROUP_CONCAT(pc.AbbrDesc) AS 'Procs', SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) AS 'Fee', SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(css.InsPayEst + css.Writeoff) FROM claimsnapshot css WHERE css.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0)) AS 'EstIns', SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND adj.PatNum = pl.PatNum ),0)) AS 'Adj', SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND ps.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND ps.DatePay = pl.ProcDate ),0)) AS 'PatPay' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.Procstatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum, pl.ProcDate ) core JOIN( SELECT 1 AS num UNION SELECT 2 ) dup GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(core.PatNum, core.ProcDate),dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num,core.ProcDate,core.PatNum

request: Aging for families with a credit balance which have no open payment plans
query: SET @AsOf='2020-07-23'; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.PatNum WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'PatNum', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.Guarantor WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN 'TOTALS:' END) AS 'Guarantor', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.Address WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Address', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.City WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'City', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.State WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'State', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.Zip WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Zip', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.LastApptDate WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'LastApptDate', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.NextSchedAppt WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'NextSchedAppt', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.0to30,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.0to30),2) END) AS 'Bal_0_30', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.31to60,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.31to60),2) END) AS 'Bal_31_60', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.61to90,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.61to90),2) END) AS 'Bal_61_90', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.91to120,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.91to120),2) END) AS 'Bal_91_120', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.121to365,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.121to365),2) END) AS 'Bal_121_365', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.366to730,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.366to730),2) END) AS 'Bal_366_730', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.731to1095,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.731to1095),2) END) AS 'Bal_731_1095', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.1096to1460,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.1096to1460),2) END) AS 'Bal_1096_1460', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.1461to1825,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.1461to1825),2) END) AS 'Bal_1461_1825', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.Over1825,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.Over1825),2) END) AS 'BalOver1825', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.Total,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.Total),2) END) AS 'BalTotal' FROM ( SELECT D.PatNum, CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS 'Guarantor', D.Address, D.City, D.State, D.Zip, D.LastApptDate, D.NextSchedAppt, -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60 THEN D.FamCredits0to30 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCredits0to30<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCredits0to30-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '0to30', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90 THEN D.FamCredits31to60 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '31to60', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120 THEN D.FamCredits61to90 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '61to90', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365 THEN D.FamCredits91to120 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120 <=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '91to120', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730 THEN D.FamCredits121to365 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365 <=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '121to365', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095 THEN D.FamCredits366to730 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730 <=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '366to730', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460 THEN D.FamCredits731to1095 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '731to1095', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825 THEN D.FamCredits1096to1460 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '1096to1460', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825 THEN D.FamCredits1461to1825 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '1461to1825', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges>=D.FamCreditsOver1825 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'Over1825', CAST(D.FamBal AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'Total' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum, g.LName, g.FName, g.Address, g.City, g.State, g.Zip, SUM(B.PatBal) AS 'FamBal', SUM(B.Credits0to30) AS 'FamCredits0to30', SUM(B.Credits31to60) AS 'FamCredits31to60', SUM(B.Credits61to90) AS 'FamCredits61to90', SUM(B.Credits91to120) AS 'FamCredits91to120', SUM(B.Credits121to365) AS 'FamCredits121to365', SUM(B.Credits366to730) AS 'FamCredits366to730', SUM(B.Credits731to1095) AS 'FamCredits731to1095', SUM(B.Credits1096to1460) AS 'FamCredits1096to1460', SUM(B.Credits1461to1825) AS 'FamCredits1461to1825', SUM(B.CreditsOver1825) AS 'FamCreditsOver1825', SUM(B.Charges) AS 'FamCharges', COALESCE(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ap.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%y') FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum WHERE ap.AptStatus = 2 AND p.Guarantor = g.Patnum ),'') AS 'LastApptDate', COALESCE(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ap.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%y') FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum WHERE ap.AptStatus = 1 AND p.Guarantor = g.Patnum ),'') AS 'NextSchedAppt' FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'PatBal', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits0to30', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits31to60', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits61to90', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits91to120', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 120 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 365 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits121to365', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 365 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 730 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits366to730', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 730 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 1095 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits731to1095', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 1095 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 1460 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits1096to1460', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 1460 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 1825 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits1461to1825', -(SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount<0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 1825 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Creditsover1825', (SUM(CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND (RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges', SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END),0)) AS 'InsEst', SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranWriteOff ELSE 0 END),0)) AS 'WriteOff', SUM(COALESCE(RawPatTrans.PayPlanAmount,0)) AS PayPlanDue FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS 'TranType', pl.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS 'TranType', ps.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ps.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType', a.PatNum AS 'PatNum', a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate', a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.DateCp AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (1, 4, 5) THEN - cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN(1,4,5) AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = cp.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType', ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest, 0) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType=0 AND COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS 'TranType', pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate', -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS 'TranType', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pplan.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' AS 'TranType', ppc.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsEst' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', cp.InsPayEst AS 'TranAmount', cp.WriteOff AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum != 0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' AS 'TranType', prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum', DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride = 0 THEN - prodlink.Fee ELSE - ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum, (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) + SUM(COALESCE(adj.AdjAmt, 0)) AS 'Fee', ppl2.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', pl.ProcNum, pl.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink ppl2 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ppl2.FKey AND ppl2.LinkType = 2 LEFT JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.ProcNum = ppl2.FKey GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.PatNum, adj.AdjAmt AS 'Fee', ppl2.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', 0 AS 'ProcNum', DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink ppl2 INNER JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.AdjNum = ppl2.FKey AND adj.ProcNum = 0 WHERE ppl2.LinkType = 1 ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum=p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patplanpat.PatNum, patplanpat.Guarantor FROM patient patplanpat INNER JOIN payplan ON payplan.PatNum = patplanpat.PatNum AND !payplan.IsClosed GROUP BY patplanpat.Guarantor ) AS fampatplans ON fampatplans.Guarantor = g.PatNum WHERE ISNULL(fampatplans.Guarantor) GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal < -0.005 GROUP BY D.PatNum ORDER BY D.LName, D.FName )E LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',E.PatNum) WHEN 2 THEN dup.num WHEN 3 THEN dup.num END) ORDER BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',E.Guarantor) WHEN 2 THEN dup.num WHEN 3 THEN dup.num END)

request: Production and Income per specified procedure code by Primary Carriers
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-03-31'; SET @Carrier=''; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @Carrier = IF(LENGTH(@Carrier) = 0, '^', REPLACE(REPLACE(@Carrier, ', ', ','), ',', '|')); SELECT (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.CarrierName WHEN 2 THEN core.CarrierName WHEN 3 THEN 'Totals:' END) AS 'Carrier' , (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.ProcCode WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT('PatCount: ', COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum)) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT('Total Pat: ', COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum)) END) AS 'ADA Code' , COUNT(DISTINCT core.ProcNum) AS 'Proc Count' , FORMAT(SUM(core.ProcFee), 2) AS 'Production' , FORMAT(SUM(core.Adj), 2) AS 'Adjustments' , FORMAT(SUM(core.WriteOff), 2) AS 'WriteOff' , FORMAT(SUM(core.ProcFee) + SUM(core.Adj) - SUM(core.WriteOff), 2) AS 'NetProd' , FORMAT(SUM(core.InsColl), 2) AS 'Ins Collection' , FORMAT(SUM(core.PatColl), 2) AS 'Pat Collections' , FORMAT(SUM(core.PatColl) + SUM(core.InsColl), 2) AS 'Total Collection' FROM( SELECT ca.CarrierName , ca.CarrierNum , pc.ProcCode , pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) AS 'ProcFee' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND adjustment.PatNum = pl.PatNum ), 0) AS 'Adj' , SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff, 0)) AS 'WriteOff' , SUM(COALESCE(cp.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS 'InsColl' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND paysplit.PatNum = pl.PatNum ), 0) AS 'PatColl' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType = 'P' AND cl.ClaimStatus IN ('S', 'R') INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Carrier) = 0, TRUE, ca.CarrierName REGEXP @Carrier) WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum, ca.CarrierNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(core.CarrierNum, ';', core.ProcCode, ';', dup.Num) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(core.CarrierNum, ';', dup.Num) WHEN 3 THEN dup.Num END) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.CarrierName, core.CarrierNum, core.ProcCode

request: Carrier Statistics
query: SET @FromDate='2021-01-01', @ToDate='2021-05-05'; SELECT core.CarrierName ,COUNT(core.PatPri) AS 'Pat Pri' ,COUNT(IF(ISNULL(core.PatPri),core.SecPri,NULL)) AS 'Sec Pat' ,ROUND(SUM(core.InsPayAmt),2) AS 'Revenue' ,ROUND(SUM(core.WriteOff),2) AS 'Writeoffs' FROM( SELECT ca.CarrierName ,ca.CarrierNum ,MAX(IF(claim.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND claim.ClaimType = 'P' ,claim.PatNum ,NULL )) AS 'PatPri' ,MAX(IF(claim.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND claim.ClaimType = 'S' ,claim.PatNum ,NULL )) AS 'SecPri' ,SUM(IF(claim.DateReceived BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ,claim.InsPayAmt ,0)) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,SUM(IF(claim.DateReceived BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ,claim.WriteOff ,0)) AS 'WriteOff' FROM claim INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = claim.PlanNum AND ip.PlanType = 'p' INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE claim.ClaimType IN ('P','S') AND EXISTS (SELECT PlanNum FROM inssub WHERE PlanNum = ip.PlanNum) GROUP BY ca.CarrierNum, claim.PatNum ) core GROUP BY core.CarrierNum

request: New patient referral statistics
query: SET @FromDate='2020-10-01', @ToDate='2020-10-31'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CodeNum) INTO @BrokenCodes FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D9986','D9987'); SELECT core.RefSource ,MONTHNAME(core.ProcDate) AS 'Month' ,COUNT(core.PatNum) AS 'Patients' ,ROUND(SUM(core.Collections),2) AS 'Collections' FROM( SELECT COALESCE(refsrc.RefName, 'No Referral') AS 'RefSource' ,firstvisit.ProcDate ,p.PatNum ,(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PatNum = p.PatNum ),0) +COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ),0) ) AS 'Collections' FROM patient p INNER JOIN( SELECT pl.PatNum ,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS 'ProcDate' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @BrokenCodes) GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) firstvisit ON firstvisit.PatNum = p.PatNum AND firstvisit.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) LEFT JOIN( SELECT refattach.PatNum ,SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT( ref.FName, ' ', ref.LName ORDER BY refattach.ItemOrder SEPARATOR '|') ,'|' ,1) AS 'RefName' FROM referral ref INNER JOIN refattach ON refattach.ReferralNum = ref.ReferralNum AND refattach.RefType = 1 GROUP BY refattach.PatNum ) refsrc ON refsrc.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER By firstvisit.ProcDate ) core GROUP BY core.RefSource, MONTH(core.ProcDate)

request: Annual Production and Income including Scheduled (Gross) Production.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-12-31'; SET @Provs=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(Abbr,@Provs); SELECT IF(dup.num=1,summed.Month,'Total:') AS 'Month' , FORMAT(SUM(summed.Production),2) AS 'Production' , FORMAT(SUM(summed.Scheduled),2) AS 'Scheduled' , FORMAT(SUM(summed.Adjustments),2) AS 'Adjustments' , FORMAT(SUM(summed.Writeoffs),2) AS 'Writeoffs' , FORMAT(SUM(summed.Tot_Prod),2) AS 'Tot Prod' , FORMAT(SUM(summed.Pt_Income),2) AS 'Pt Income' , FORMAT(SUM(summed.Unearned_Pt_Income),2) AS 'Unearned Pt Income' , FORMAT(SUM(summed.Ins_Income),2) AS 'Ins Income' , FORMAT(SUM(summed.Total_Income),2) AS 'Total Income' FROM( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(core.Date,'%b %Y') AS 'Month' , MONTH(core.Date) AS 'OrdMonth' , YEAR(core.Date) AS 'OrdYear' , SUM(core.Prod) AS 'Production' , SUM(core.Sched) AS 'Scheduled' , SUM(core.Adj) AS 'Adjustments' , SUM(core.Writeoff) AS 'Writeoffs' , SUM(core.Prod)+SUM(core.Sched)+SUM(core.Adj)+SUM(core.Writeoff) AS 'Tot_Prod' , SUM(core.PtInc) AS 'Pt_Income' , SUM(core.Unearned) AS 'Unearned_Pt_Income' , SUM(core.InsInc) AS 'Ins_Income' , SUM(core.PtInc)+SUM(core.Unearned)+SUM(core.InsInc) AS 'Total_Income' FROM( SELECT pl.ProvNum AS 'Prov' , pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(cp.Writeoff),0) AS 'Prod' , 0 AS 'Sched' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'Writeoff' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'Unearned' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums),TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT IF(pc.IsHygiene,apt.ProvHyg,apt.ProvNum) AS 'Prov' , DATE(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Date' , 0 AS 'Prod' , tp.ProcFee*(tp.UnitQty+tp.BaseUnits)-COALESCE(SUM(cp.Writeoff),0) AS 'Sched' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'Writeoff' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'Unearned' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog tp INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = tp.CodeNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = tp.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 8 INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.AptNum = tp.AptNum AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus = 1 WHERE tp.ProcStatus = 1 AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums),TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IF(pc.IsHygiene,apt.ProvHyg,apt.ProvNum),@ProvNums)) UNION ALL SELECT adj.ProvNum AS 'Prov' , adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' , 0 AS 'Prod' , 0 AS 'Sched' , adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'Writeoff' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'Unearned' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums),TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(adj.ProvNum,@ProvNums)) UNION ALL SELECT cp2.ProvNum AS 'Prov' , cp2.ProcDate AS 'Date' , 0 AS 'Prod' , 0 AS 'Sched' , 0 AS 'Adj' , -cp2.Writeoff , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'Unearned' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp2 WHERE cp2.Status IN (0,1,4) AND cp2.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums),TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(cp2.ProvNum,@ProvNums)) UNION ALL SELECT ps.ProvNum AS 'Prov' , ps.DatePay AS 'Date' , 0 AS 'Prod' , 0 AS 'Sched' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'Writeoff' , IF(ps.UnearnedType=0,ps.SplitAmt,0) AS 'PtInc' , IF(ps.UnearnedType!=0,ps.SplitAmt,0) AS 'Unearned' , 0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums),TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum,@ProvNums)) UNION ALL SELECT cp3.ProvNum AS 'Prov' , cp3.DateCP AS 'Date' , 0 AS 'Prod' , 0 AS 'Sched' , 0 AS 'Adj' , 0 AS 'Writeoff' , 0 AS 'PtInc' , 0 AS 'Unearned' , cp3.InsPayAmt AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp3 WHERE cp3.Status IN (1,4) AND cp3.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums),TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(cp3.ProvNum,@ProvNums)) ) core GROUP BY MONTH(core.Date),YEAR(core.Date) ORDER BY YEAR(core.Date),MONTH(core.Date) ) summed LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.num=1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',summed.Month),dup.num) ORDER BY dup.num,summed.OrdYear,summed.OrdMonth

request: List of procedures with specified codes for specified date range and carrier (fee schedule)
query: SET @FromDate='2025-04-01', @ToDate='2025-04-15'; SET @Codes = ''; SET @FeeScheduleName='Delta'; SELECT REPLACE(@Codes,', ',',') INTO @Codes; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(feesched.FeeSchedNum) FROM feesched WHERE feesched.request = @FeeScheduleName INTO @FeeSchedNum; SELECT p.PatNum, pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, CarrierName AS 'PriInsName', FORMAT(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits), 2) AS '$ProcFee', FORMAT(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4) ), 0), 2) AS '$InsPayEst', FORMAT(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (1, 4) ), 0), 2) AS '$InsPaidAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @Codes)) INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum = iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = iss.PlanNum AND FIND_IN_SET(ip.FeeSched, @FeeSchedNum) INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY pl.ProcDate, p.LName, p.FName

request: Blue Book History
query: SET @Date="2020-10-01"; SET @PlanNum=""; SET @Carrier="%%"; SELECT IF(LENGTH(@PlanNum) > 0, '%', @Carrier) INTO @Carrier; SELECT pl.PatNum, pc.ProcCode, ib.CarrierNum AS 'Carrier carrier.CarrierName, ib.PlanNum AS 'Plan ib.PlanNum, ib.GroupNum, ib.InsPayAmt, IF(ib.AllowedOverride = -1, "", ib.AllowedOverride) AS 'Allowed Override', ib.DateTEntry, ib.ProcDate FROM insbluebook ib INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ib.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON ib.ProcCodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = ib.CarrierNum WHERE ib.ProcDate >= DATE(@Date) AND IF(LENGTH(@PlanNum)=0, TRUE, ib.PlanNum = @PlanNum) AND IF(LENGTH(@PlanNum)=0, carrier.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier, TRUE) UNION SELECT CONCAT("PlanNum ", insplan.PlanNum, " is not a Category % plan type."), '','','','','','','','','','' FROM insplan WHERE insplan.PlanNum = @PlanNum AND insplan.PlanType != ''

request: List of patients who had an appointment, in specified date range, that was moved or deleted within 48 hours of the scheduled date and time of the appointment. Also shows the user that performed the move/delete. For versions 19.4+. See 1423 for 19.3 and earlier.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SET @PatNum = 0, @OrderVal=0, @OrderDate = '0001-01-01 00:00:00'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'PatName' ,DATE_FORMAT((SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sl.OldAptDate ORDER BY sl.SecurityLogNum DESC),',',1)),'%c/%e/%Y %r') AS 'OldAptDate' ,CAST( IFNULL( (CASE WHEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sl.MovedTo ORDER BY sl.SecurityLogNum DESC),',',1) = "Broken" THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sl.MovedTo ORDER BY sl.SecurityLogNum DESC),',',1) ELSE DATE_FORMAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sl.MovedTo ORDER BY sl.SecurityLogNum DESC),',',1),'%c/%e/%Y %r') END) , "Deleted") AS CHAR(255)) AS 'NewAptDate' ,CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sl.SecurityLogNum,' ', u.UserName ORDER BY sl.SecurityLogNum), ' ', -1) AS CHAR(255)) AS 'UserName' ,DATE_FORMAT((MAX(sl.LogDateTime)),'%c/%e/%Y %r') AS 'ModDate' FROM ( SELECT layer.SecurityLogNum , layer.AptNum , layer.PatNum , layer.LogDateTime , layer.UserNum , layer.PermType AS PermType , layer.OldAptDate , layer.MovedTo ,(CASE WHEN @PatNum=layer.PatNum AND layer.OldAptDate = @OrderDate AND layer.MovedTo IS NOT NULL THEN @OrderVal ELSE @orderVal := @OrderVal + 1 END) AS GROUPING ,(CASE WHEN @PatNum!=layer.PatNum THEN @PatNum := layer.PatNum END) AS PatGrouping ,(CASE WHEN @PatNum = layer.PatNum AND @OrderDate != layer.MovedTo THEN @OrderDate := layer.MovedTo END) AS DateGrouping ,layer.LogText FROM ( SELECT sl.SecurityLogNum ,sl.FKey AS 'AptNum' ,sl.PatNum ,sl.LogDateTime ,sl.UserNum ,sl.PermType ,STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(CASE WHEN sl.PermType = 27 AND LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%delete%' THEN SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText, ', Deleted', 1), -22) WHEN sl.PermType = 27 AND LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%broken%' THEN SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText, ', Broken', 1), -22) WHEN sl.PermType = 26 THEN REPLACE(SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText, 'from', -1),1, 23), ',','') END),'%c/%e/%Y %r') AS OldAptDate ,(CASE WHEN sl.PermType = 27 AND LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%broken%' THEN 'Broken' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(CASE WHEN sl.PermType = 26 THEN SUBSTRING(sl.LogText, -22) END),'%c/%e/%Y %r') END) AS MovedTo , sl.LogText FROM securitylog sl WHERE (CASE WHEN sl.PermType = 27 THEN (LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%broken%') WHEN sl.PermType = 26 THEN LOWER(sl.LogText) LIKE '%from%to%' ELSE FALSE END) GROUP BY sl.SecurityLogNum ORDER BY sl.PatNum, sl.SecurityLogNum )layer )sl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = sl.PatNum INNER JOIN userod u ON u.UserNum = sl.UserNum LEFT JOIN appointment apt ON apt.AptNum = sl.AptNum WHERE (CASE WHEN ISNULL(sl.MovedTo) THEN TRUE WHEN apt.SecDateTEntry BETWEEN (LogDateTime - INTERVAL 48 HOUR) AND LogDateTime THEN FALSE ELSE LogDateTime BETWEEN (OldAptDate - INTERVAL 48 HOUR) AND OldAptDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY END) AND sl.OldAptDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY (CASE WHEN sl.AptNum=0 THEN CONCAT('S',sl.Grouping) ELSE CONCAT('A',sl.AptNum) END), sl.PatNum HAVING (CASE WHEN NewAptDate = 'Deleted' THEN TRUE ELSE SUBSTRING_INDEX(OldAptDate,' ',1) != SUBSTRING_INDEX(NewAptDate,' ',1) END) ORDER BY PatName, OldAptDate, NewAptDate, UserName, ModDate, (CASE WHEN sl.AptNum=0 THEN CONCAT('S',sl.Grouping) ELSE CONCAT('A',sl.AptNum) END), sl.PatNum;

request: Hygienist Total and Average Production
query: SET @FromDate="2021-02-01", @ToDate="2021-02-28"; SELECT prod.Provider AS 'Hyg', FORMAT(SUM(prod.Production), 2) AS 'Total Production', FORMAT(SUM(prod.Production) / COUNT(DISTINCT prod.ProcDate), 2) AS 'Avg Prod' FROM ( SELECT provider.Abbr AS 'Provider', (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cpc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cpc WHERE cpc.Status IN(7, 8) AND cpc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum ),0) AS 'Production', procedurelog.ProcDate FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND provider.IsSecondary = TRUE WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 ) prod GROUP BY prod.Provider

request: Provider Leaderboard
query: SET @Date='2021-06-24'; SET @Provs='DOC1,DOC2'; SET @Date = IF(LENGTH(@Date) = 0, CURDATE(), @Date); SET @PrevType='', @Weight=0; SELECT CONCAT(provider.FName,' ',provider.LName) AS 'Provider' ,provsched.Hours ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum AND pl.ProcDate = DATE(@Date) ),0) +COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum AND adj.AdjDate = DATE(@Date) ),0) -COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(IF(cp.Status IN (6,8) ,COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteoffEstOverride,-1),NULLIF(cp.WriteoffEst,-1),cp.Writeoff) ,COALESCE(cp.WriteOff,0) )) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum AND cp.ProcDate = DATE(@Date) AND cp.ProcNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6,7,8) ),0) AS 'NetProd' FROM provider LEFT JOIN( SELECT hrs.ProvNum AS 'provNum', ( SELECT Abbr FROM provider WHERE ProvNum = hrs.ProvNum ) AS 'Abbr', COALESCE(CAST((SUM(IF(hrs.Type = 'Stop', hrs.mins, 0))-SUM(IF(hrs.Type = 'Start', hrs.mins, 0))) / 60 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)),0) AS 'Hours' FROM ( SELECT sched.SchedDate, sched.ProvNum, sched.mins, IF(@PrevType = sched.Type, IF(@PrevType = 'Start', SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(@PrevType := sched.Type,',',@Weight := @Weight + 1),',',1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(@PrevType := sched.Type,',',@Weight := @Weight - 1),',',1) ), @PrevType := sched.Type ) AS 'Type', @Weight AS 'Weight' FROM ( SELECT sch.SchedDate, sch.ProvNum, 'Start' AS 'Type', (TIME_TO_SEC(sch.StartTime)/60) AS 'Mins' FROM SCHEDULE sch INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = sch.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Provs)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Provs)) WHERE sch.SchedDate = DATE(@Date) AND sch.SchedType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT sch.SchedDate, sch.ProvNum, 'Stop' AS 'Type', (TIME_TO_SEC(sch.StopTime)/60) AS 'Mins' FROM SCHEDULE sch INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = sch.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Provs)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Provs)) WHERE sch.SchedDate = DATE(@Date) AND sch.SchedType = 1 ORDER BY SchedDate, ProvNum, Mins ) sched ) hrs WHERE hrs.Weight = 0 GROUP BY hrs.ProvNum ) provsched ON provsched.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Provs)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @Provs))

request: Consult Production Report
query: SET @ConsultCodes="D9310"; SET @ConsultFromDate="2020-01-01", @ConsultToDate="2020-12-31"; SET @ProductionFromDate="2021-01-01", @ProductionToDate="2021-3-31"; SELECT main.Provider, main.ConsultCode AS 'Consult Code', FORMAT(SUM(main.ProcFees + main.Adjusts), 2) AS 'Production' FROM ( SELECT patnum, ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider. ProvNum = consult.ProvNum ) AS 'Provider', procedurecode.ProcCode AS 'ConsultCode', (COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.PatNum = consult.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @ProductionFromDate AND @ProductionToDate ), 0)) AS 'ProcFees', (COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.PatNum = consult.PatNum AND adjustment.AdjDate BETWEEN @ProductionFromDate AND @ProductionToDate ), 0)) AS 'Adjusts' FROM procedurelog consult INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = consult.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ConsultCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(procedurecode.ProcCode, @ConsultCodes)) WHERE consult.ProcStatus = 2 AND consult.ProcDate BETWEEN @ConsultFromDate AND @ConsultToDate ) main GROUP BY main.Provider, main.ConsultCode

request: List of patients whose appointment scheduling is restricted
query: SELECT CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patrestriction pres ON p.PatNum = pres.PatNum AND pres.PatRestrictType = 1

request: Procedure level Production and Income, with estimates, by provider
query: SET @FromDate ='2025-06-16', @ToDate ='2025-06-20'; SET @Providers =''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) FROM provider WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr,@Providers)) INTO @ProvNums; SELECT IF(row.Type = "Detail", main.ProcDate , '') AS 'Date', IF(row.Type = "Detail", ( SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END)) FROM patient WHERE patient.PatNum = main.PatNum ) , 'Provider Total') AS 'PatientName', IF(row.Type = "Detail", ( SELECT procedurecode.Descript FROM procedurecode WHERE procedurecode.CodeNum = main.CodeNum ) , '') AS 'Proc request', ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = main.ProvNum ) AS 'Prov', IF(row.Type = "Detail", COALESCE(( SELECT carrier.CarrierName FROM carrier WHERE carrier.CarrierNum = main.PriCarrierNum ), '') , '') AS 'Pri Carrier', IF(row.Type = "Detail", COALESCE(( SELECT carrier.CarrierName FROM carrier WHERE carrier.CarrierNum = main.SecCarrierNum ), '') , '') AS 'Sec Carrier', FORMAT(SUM(main.Production), 2) AS 'Production', FORMAT(SUM(main.PriInsEst), 2) AS 'Pri Ins Est', FORMAT(SUM(main.SecInsEst), 2) AS 'Sec Ins Est', FORMAT(SUM( main.Production + main.Writeoff + main.Adjustments - main.PriInsEst - main.SecInsEst - main.OtherInsEst ), 2) AS 'Patient Est', FORMAT(SUM(main.Writeoff), 2) AS 'Writeoff', FORMAT(SUM(main.Adjustments), 2) AS 'Adjustments', FORMAT(SUM(main.PriInsPaid), 2) AS 'Pri Ins Paid', FORMAT(SUM(main.SecInsPaid), 2) AS 'Sec Ins Paid', FORMAT(SUM(main.PatPaid), 2) AS 'Pat Paid', FORMAT(SUM( main.PriInsPaid + main.SecInsPaid + main.OtherInsPaid + main.PatPaid ), 2) AS 'Total Paid', FORMAT(SUM(main.PriInsOut), 2) AS 'Pri Ins Rem', FORMAT(SUM(main.SecInsOut), 2) AS 'Sec Ins Rem', FORMAT(SUM( main.Production + main.Writeoff + main.Adjustments - main.PriInsPaid - main.SecInsPaid - main.OtherInsPaid - main.PriInsOut - main.SecInsOut - main.OtherInsOut - main.PatPaid ), 2) AS 'Pat Remaining', FORMAT(SUM( main.Production + main.Writeoff + main.Adjustments - main.PriInsPaid - main.SecInsPaid - main.OtherInsPaid - main.PatPaid ), 2) AS 'Remaining Unpaid' FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.ProcDate, procedurelog.ProcNum, procedurelog.PatNum, procedurelog.CodeNum, procedurelog.ProvNum, ( SELECT MAX(insplan.CarrierNum) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = "P" INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = claim.PlanNum WHERE claimproc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0, 1, 4) ) AS 'PriCarrierNum', ( SELECT MAX(insplan.CarrierNum) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = "S" INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = claim.PlanNum WHERE claimproc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0, 1, 4) ) AS 'SecCarrierNum', procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) AS 'Production', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = 'P' WHERE claimproc.procnum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0, 1) ), 0) AS 'PriInsEst', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = 'P' WHERE claimproc.procnum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status = 0 ), 0) AS 'PriInsOut', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = 'S' WHERE claimproc.procnum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0, 1) ), 0) AS 'SecInsEst', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = 'S' WHERE claimproc.procnum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status = 0 ), 0) AS 'SecInsOut', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType NOT IN ('P', 'S') WHERE claimproc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0, 1) ), 0) AS 'OtherInsEst', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType NOT IN ('P', 'S') WHERE claimproc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status = 0 ), 0) AS 'OtherInsOut', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(-claimproc.WriteOff) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0, 1, 4) ), 0) AS 'Writeoff', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'Adjustments', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = 'P' WHERE claimproc.procnum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) ), 0) AS 'PriInsPaid', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = 'S' WHERE claimproc.procnum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) ), 0) AS 'SecInsPaid', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType NOT IN ('P', 'S') WHERE claimproc.procnum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) ), 0) AS 'OtherInsPaid', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'PatPaid' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers), FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.ProvNum, @ProvNums), TRUE) ) main INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'ProvTotal' AS 'Type' ) `row` GROUP BY row.Type, (CASE row.Type WHEN 'ProvTotal' THEN main.ProvNum ELSE main.ProcNum END) ORDER BY row.Type, (CASE row.Type WHEN 'ProvTotal' THEN main.ProvNum ELSE main.ProcDate END)

request: Production and income by provider
query: SET @FromDate = '2021-05-01', @ToDate = '2021-05-31'; SET @Clinics = ''; SET @Providers = ''; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN @Clinics = '' THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SET @Provs = REPLACE(@Providers,', ',','); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @UnearnedNoShow FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 29 AND definition.ItemValue = 'X'; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,DATE_FORMAT(core.Date,'%m/%d/%Y'),'') AS 'Date' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,DAYNAME(core.Date),'') AS 'Day' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 ,COALESCE(( SELECT pr.Abbr FROM provider pr WHERE pr.ProvNum = core.Prov ),'None') ,'Total') AS 'Provider' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod),2) AS 'Production' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Sched),2) AS 'Scheduled' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Adj),2) AS 'Adjustments' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.WoEst),2) AS 'Writeoff Est' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.WoAdj),2) AS 'Writeoff Adj' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod) + SUM(core.Sched) + SUM(core.Adj) + SUM(core.WoEst) + SUM(core.WoAdj) ,2) AS 'Tot Prod' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PtInc),2) AS 'Pt Income' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Unearned),2) AS 'Unearned Pt Income' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.InsInc),2) AS 'Ins Income' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PtInc) + SUM(core.Unearned) + SUM(core.InsInc) ,2) AS 'Tot Income' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cap.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cap WHERE cap.Status = 7 AND cap.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum) ,0)) AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON pl.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcDate UNION ALL SELECT IF(pc.IsHygiene,apt.ProvHyg,apt.ProvNum) AS 'Prov' ,DATE(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,SUM(tp.ProcFee * (tp.UnitQty + tp.BaseUnits)) - SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(IF(WriteOffEstOverride != - 1,WriteOffEstOverride,WriteOffEst),0)) FROM claimproc sch WHERE sch.Status IN (6,8) AND sch.ProcNum = tp.ProcNum AND (sch.WriteOffEst != - 1 OR sch.WriteOffEstOverride != - 1) ),0)) AS 'Sched' ,-SUM(tp.Discount + tp.DiscountPlanAmt) AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog tp INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON tp.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN appointment apt ON tp.AptNum = apt.AptNum AND apt.AptStatus = 1 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY LEFT JOIN clinic cl1 ON cl1.ClinicNum = tp.ClinicNum WHERE tp.ProcStatus = 1 AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl1.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY IF(pc.IsHygiene,apt.ProvHyg,apt.ProvNum),DATE(apt.AptDateTime) UNION ALL SELECT adj.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj LEFT JOIN clinic cl2 ON cl2.ClinicNum = adj.ClinicNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl2.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY adj.ProvNum, adj.AdjDate UNION ALL SELECT cp1.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,DATE(cs.DateTEntry) AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,-SUM(cs.Writeoff) AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimsnapshot cs INNER JOIN claimproc cp1 ON cs.ClaimProcNum = cp1.ClaimProcNum AND cp1.Status IN (0,1,4) LEFT JOIN clinic cl3 ON cp1.ClinicNum = cl3.ClinicNum WHERE cs.DateTEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl3.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY cp1.ProvNum, DATE(cs.DateTEntry) UNION ALL SELECT woadj.Prov ,woadj.Date ,woadj.Prod ,woadj.Sched ,woadj.Adj ,0 AS "WoEst" ,- (woadj.WoEst + woadj.WoAdj) AS "WoAdj" ,woadj.PtInc ,woadj.Unearned ,woadj.InsInc FROM ( SELECT cp2.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,cp2.DateCP AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,-SUM(COALESCE(cs2.Writeoff,0)) AS "WoEst" ,SUM(cp2.Writeoff) AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp2 LEFT JOIN claimsnapshot cs2 ON cp2.ClaimprocNum = cs2.ClaimprocNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl4 ON cp2.ClinicNum = cl4.ClinicNum WHERE cp2.Status IN (1,4) AND cp2.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl4.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY cp2.ProvNum, cp2.DateCP ) woadj UNION ALL SELECT ps.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,ps.DatePay AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,SUM(IF(ps.UnearnedType = 0,ps.SplitAmt,0)) AS 'PtInc' ,SUM(IF(ps.UnearnedType != 0,ps.SplitAmt,0)) AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN clinic cl5 ON ps.ClinicNum = cl5.ClinicNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND ps.IsDiscount = 0 AND IF(ISNULL(@UnearnedNoShow),TRUE,NOT FIND_IN_SET(ps.UnearnedType,@UnearnedNoShow)) AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl5.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum, ps.DatePay UNION ALL SELECT cp3.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,cpay.CheckDate AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoEst' ,0 AS 'WoAdj' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,SUM(cp3.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp3 INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cp3.ClaimPaymentNum = cpay.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl6 ON cp3.ClinicNum = cl6.ClinicNum WHERE cp3.Status IN (1,4) AND cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl6.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY cp3.ProvNum, cpay.CheckDate ) core LEFT JOIN provider pr ON core.Prov = pr.ProvNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Provs) = 0 , ISNULL(pr.ProvNum) OR NOT pr.IsHiddenReport , FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Provs)) GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'-',core.Date,'+',core.Prov),dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Date, core.Prov

request: Insurance and Patient Estimate Aging for specific providers and clinics on each transaction
query: SET @Clinics=""; SET @Providers=""; SET @AsOf=""; SELECT IF(LENGTH(@AsOf) = 0, CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT CONCAT( (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('Unassigned', @Clinics) THEN '0,' ELSE '' END), COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum), '') ) FROM clinic WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @Clinics)) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT CONCAT( (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Providers) = 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('Unassigned', @Providers) THEN '0,' ELSE '' END), COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum), '') ) FROM provider WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @Providers)) INTO @ProvNums; SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion' ), 1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT CONCAT( patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient', patient.PatNum AS 'Pat Num', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_0_30, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est 0-30', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_31_60, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est 31-60', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_61_90, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est 61-90', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_90, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est > 90', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_Total, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est Total', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_0_30, 0) - COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_0_30, 0) , 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal 0-30', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_31_60, 0) - COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_31_60, 0) , 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal 31-60', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_61_90, 0) - COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_61_90, 0) , 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal 61-90', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_Over90, 0) - COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_90, 0) , 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal > 90', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_Total, 0) - COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_Total, 0) , 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal Total', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_Total, 0) , 2) AS 'Total Bal' FROM patient INNER JOIN patient guarantor ON guarantor.PatNum = patient.Guarantor LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate >= @AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst_0_30', SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 31 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) InsPayEst_31_60, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 61 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) InsPayEst_61_90, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate < @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst_90', SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst_Total' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1) AND cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > @AsOf)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY cp.PatNum HAVING ABS(InsPayEst_Total) >= 0.005 ) insaging ON insaging.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT D.PatNum, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60 THEN D.Charges0to30 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60+D.Charges0to30-D.Credits END) ,2) AS Pat_0_30, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90 THEN D.Charges31to60 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90+D.Charges31to60-D.Credits END) ,2) AS Pat_31_60, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits<=D.ChargesOver90 THEN D.Charges61to90 WHEN D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90<=D.Credits THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90+D.Charges61to90-D.Credits END) ,2) AS Pat_61_90, ROUND( (CASE WHEN D.Credits>=D.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE D.ChargesOver90-D.Credits END) ,2) AS Pat_Over90, ROUND(D.PatBal,2) AS Pat_Total FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS 'PatBal', (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR rawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsWOEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges0to30', (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR rawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsWOEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges31to60', (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR rawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsWOEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate>=(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges61to90', (SUM(CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranAmount>0 OR rawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsWOEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<(@AsOf-INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'ChargesOver90', -(SUM(CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount <0 AND NOT(RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsWOEst') AND RawPatTrans.TranDate<=@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits' FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS 'TranType', pl.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pl.ProvNum, pl.ClinicNum, pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'InsWOEst' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.ProvNum, cp.ClinicNum, cp.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', -cp.Writeoff AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum != 0 AND ((cp.Status=0 AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf) OR (cp.Status=1 AND cp.DateCP>@AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate<=@AsOf AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS 'TranType', ps.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ps.ProvNum, ps.ClinicNum, ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ps.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM DEFINITION def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType', a.PatNum AS 'PatNum', a.ProvNum, a.ClinicNum, a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate', a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 AND FIND_IN_SET(a.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(a.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.ProvNum, cp.ClinicNum, cp.DateCp AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (1, 4, 5) THEN - cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN(1,4,5) AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = cp.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType', ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum', ppc.ProvNum, ppc.ClinicNum, ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest, 0) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType=0 AND COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) != 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS 'TranType', pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ppc.ProvNum AS 'ProvNum', ppc.ClinicNum AS 'ClinicNum', pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate', -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplan pp LEFT JOIN payplancharge ppc ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS 'TranType', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pplan.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum', ppc.ProvNum, ppc.ClinicNum, ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' AS 'TranType', ppc.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ppc.ProvNum, ppc.ClinicNum, ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' AS 'TranType', prodlink.PatNum, prodlink.ProvNum, prodlink.ClinicNum, DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride = 0 THEN - prodlink.Fee ELSE - ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, procedurelog.ProvNum, procedurelog.ClinicNum, (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) +COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) +COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) +COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) +COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) Fee, payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum LinkNum, procedurelog.ProcNum, procedurelog.ProcDate AgeDate FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AdjAmt, adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum ,adjustment.PatNum ,adjustment.ProvNum ,adjustment.ClinicNum ) procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1, 4, 7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) InsPay, SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1, 4, 7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) WriteOff, claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum ) procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 SplitAmt, paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum ) procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum, adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee, payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum LinkNum, 0 ProcNum, DATE('0001-01-01') AgeDate FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 SplitAmt, paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum ) adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE FIND_IN_SET(prodlink.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(prodlink.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) D WHERE ABS(D.PatBal)>0.005 ) pataging ON pataging.PatNum = patient.PatNum WHERE ABS(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_Total, 0)) >= 0.005 ORDER BY guarantor.LName, guarantor.FName, guarantor.MiddleI, Patient

request: Statement in date range with Current Balance and amount paid since the statement
query: SET @FromDate="2021-05-01", @ToDate="2021-05-31"; SET @Mode="InPerson,Mail"; SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT main.PatientName, DATE_FORMAT(main.StatementDate, "%m/%d/%Y") AS 'StatementDate', FORMAT(main.CurrentBalance, 2) AS 'CurrentBalance', FORMAT(main.PatPaid + main.InsPaid, 2) AS 'PaidSinceStatement' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT( patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName', statement.DateSent AS 'StatementDate', (CASE statement.Mode_ WHEN 0 THEN 'Mail' WHEN 1 THEN 'InPerson' WHEN 2 THEN 'Email' WHEN 3 THEN 'Electronic' ELSE '' END ) AS 'Mode', bal.FamBal AS 'CurrentBalance', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN paysplit.PayPlanNum=0 THEN paysplit.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE paysplit.SplitAmt END)) FROM paysplit INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = paysplit.PatNum WHERE paysplit.DatePay > statement.DateSent AND paysplit.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') AND (CASE WHEN statement.SinglePatient = TRUE THEN p.PatNum = statement.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor = patient.Guarantor END) ), 0) AS 'PatPaid', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN claimproc.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = claimproc.PatNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4) AND claimproc.DateCP > statement.DateSent AND (CASE WHEN statement.SinglePatient = TRUE THEN p.PatNum = statement.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor = patient.Guarantor END) ), 0) AS 'InsPaid' FROM statement INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = statement.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.Guarantor, SUM(B.PatBal) AS 'FamBal' FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum, SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS 'PatBal' FROM ( SELECT 'Fee' AS 'TranType', pl.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Pay' AS 'TranType', ps.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN (1,3) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) ELSE -ps.SplitAmt END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ps.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.SplitAmt!=0 AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType', a.PatNum AS 'PatNum', a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate', a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'TranType', cp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', cp.DateCp AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN cp.payplannum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END)-cp.Writeoff AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (1, 4, 5) THEN - cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN(1,4,5) AND COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = cp.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType', ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'TranWriteOff', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1,3,4) THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest, 0) WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT pp.IsClosed FROM payplan pp WHERE pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum),0)=0 THEN COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) ELSE 0 END) END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType=0 AND COALESCE(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest,0) != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan1' AS 'TranType', pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum', pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate', -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 1 AND pp.CompletedAmt!=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan2' AS 'TranType', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pplan.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pplan.PlanNum=0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum=ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlan3' AS 'TranType', ppc.PatNum AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND @PayPlanVersion = 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' AS 'TranType', prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum', DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride = 0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount', NULL AS 'TranWriteOff', NULL AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, (procedurelog.ProcFee*(procedurelog.UnitQty+procedurelog.BaseUnits) +COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt,0) +COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay,0) +COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff,0) +COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt,0) ) AS 'Fee', payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', procedurelog.ProcNum, procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AdjAmt, adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum ) procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum=procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(( CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride!=-1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END ),0)*-1) AS 'InsPay', SUM(COALESCE(( CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride!=-1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst!=-1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END ),0)*-1) AS 'WriteOff', claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum ) procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt,0) AS 'Fee', payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', 0 ProcNum, DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt,0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate<=@AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum=B.PatNum GROUP BY p.Guarantor ) bal ON bal.Guarantor = patient.Guarantor WHERE statement.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) main WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Mode)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(main.Mode, @Mode))

request: Appointments by carrier
query: SET @FromDate="2021-03-01", @ToDate="2021-03-31"; SET @Carriers="Cigna,Metlife,United Healthcare"; SELECT CONCAT("^",REPLACE(@Carriers, ",", "$|^"), "$") INTO @CarriersRegExp; SELECT appts.CarrierName AS 'Ins Company', appts.Patient AS 'Patient', DATE_FORMAT(appts.Appointment, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i') AS 'Appointment', appts.Procedures AS 'Procedures', TIME_FORMAT(TIMEDIFF(appts.Dismissed, appts.Seated), '%H:%i') AS 'Chair Time', FORMAT(appts.Production, 2) AS 'Production', FORMAT(appts.Writeoff, 2) AS 'Writeoff', FORMAT(appts.InsPay + appts.PatPay, 2) AS 'Collection' FROM ( SELECT appointment.AptNum, carrier.CarrierName, (SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END)) FROM patient WHERE patient.PatNum = appointment.PatNum ) AS 'Patient', appointment.AptDateTime AS 'Appointment', COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.ProcCode) FROM procedurecode INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ), '') AS 'Procedures', appointment.DateTimeSeated AS 'Seated', appointment.DateTimeDismissed AS 'Dismissed', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM((procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cpc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cpc WHERE cpc.Status IN(7, 8) AND cpc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum ),0)) AS 'ProcFee' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ), 0) AS 'Production', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(claimproc.WriteOff, 0)) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN(1,4) AND procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ), 0) AS 'Writeoff', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(claimproc.InsPayAmt, 0)) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN(1,4) AND procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ), 0) AS 'InsPay', COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) FROM paysplit INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = paysplit.ProcNum WHERE procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ), 0) AS 'PatPay' FROM appointment INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = appointment.InsPlan1 INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Carriers) = 0, TRUE, carrier.CarrierName REGEXP @CarriersRegExp) WHERE appointment.AptStatus = 2 AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY appointment.AptNum ) appts

request: Patients with appointments scheduled for the specified date range
query: SET @FromDate = '2021-06-01', @ToDate = '2021-06-30'; SELECT CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS "Patient" ,p.Birthdate AS "DOB" ,DATE(apt.AptDateTime) AS "AppDate" ,COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ddef.DiseaseName) FROM diseasedef ddef INNER JOIN disease d ON d.DiseaseDefNum = ddef.DiseaseDefNum AND d.ProbStatus = 0 WHERE d.PatNum = p.PatNum ),'') AS "Problems" ,COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT IF(mp.MedicationNum = 0,mp.MedDescript,m.MedName)) FROM medicationpat mp LEFT JOIN medication m ON mp.MedicationNum = m.MedicationNum WHERE mp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND (mp.DateStop = "0001-01-01" OR mp.DateStop > CURDATE()) ),'') AS "Medications" ,COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT adef.request) FROM allergy a INNER JOIN allergydef adef ON a.AllergyDefNum = adef.AllergyDefNum WHERE a.PatNum = p.PatNum AND a.StatusIsActive ),'') AS "Allergies" ,COALESCE(( SELECT DATE(MIN(apt1.AptDateTime)) FROM appointment apt1 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON apt1.AptNum = pl.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode IN ("D1110","D1120","D4346","D4355","D4341","D4342","D4910") WHERE apt1.AptStatus = 1 AND apt1.AptDateTime > apt.AptDateTime AND apt1.PatNum = p.PatNum AND apt1.AptNum != apt.AptNum ),'') AS "NextHyg" FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN patient p ON apt.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE apt.AptStatus = 1 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY apt.AptNum ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime

request: Production and Income by procedure code, for procedures completed in the date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @Providers=''; SET @Clinics=''; SET @ProcCategory=''; SELECT (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Category WHEN 2 THEN rep.Category WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN 'Total' END) AS 'Category' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.ProcCode WHEN 2 THEN 'SubTotal' WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN '' END) AS 'ProcCode' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Descript WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN '' END) AS 'Descript' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Count WHEN 2 THEN SUM(rep.Count) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN SUM(rep.Count) END) AS 'Count' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.GrossProd,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd),2) END) AS 'GrossProd' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1
