THEN FORMAT(rep.AdjAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.AdjAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.AdjAmt),2) END) AS 'AdjAmt' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.WriteOff,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.WriteOff),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.WriteOff),2) END) AS 'WriteOff' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.GrossProd + rep.AdjAmt - rep.WriteOff,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd + rep.AdjAmt - rep.WriteOff),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd + rep.AdjAmt - rep.WriteOff),2) END) AS 'NetProd' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.PatPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt),2) END) AS 'PatPayAmt' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.InsPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.InsPayAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.InsPayAmt),2) END) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.PatPayAmt + rep.InsPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt + rep.InsPayAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt + rep.InsPayAmt),2) END) AS 'TotalPaid' FROM( SELECT def.ItemName AS 'Category' ,pc.ProcCode ,pc.Descript ,COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcNum) AS 'Count' ,SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits),0)) AS 'GrossProd' ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'AdjAmt' ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'WriteOff' ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'PatPayAmt' ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN definition def ON pc.ProcCat = def.DefNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCategory) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemName, @ProcCategory)) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON pl.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics)) GROUP BY pc.ProcCode ) rep INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',rep.ProcCode) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',rep.Category) WHEN 3 THEN dup.num WHEN 4 THEN dup.num END) ORDER BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(rep.Category,'-',dup.num,'-',rep.ProcCode) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(rep.Category,'-',dup.num) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT('zzzzzzzzzzzz',dup.num) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT('zzzzzzzzzzzz',dup.num) END)

request: List of active ortho patients. Shows patients with a status of Patient and have all capital letters for their first and last name.
query: SET @OrthoPlace = 'D8090,D8060,D8040,D8010'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(placecode.CodeNum) FROM procedurecode placecode WHERE FIND_IN_SET(placecode.ProcCode, @OrthoPlace) INTO @OrthoPlacements; SELECT NULLIF(pref.valuestring,'') FROM preference pref WHERE pref.PrefName = 'OrthoDefaultMonthsTreat' INTO @OrthoMonthsTreatDefault; SELECT processinglyr.PatientName AS 'Patient' ,DATE_FORMAT(processinglyr.MinPlace, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'TreatStart' ,processinglyr.TxMonthsTotal ,MAX(processinglyr.MonthsInTx) AS 'MonthsInTx' ,IF(MIN(processinglyr.MonthsRem) < 0, 0, MIN(processinglyr.MonthsRem)) AS 'MonthsRemain' ,processinglyr.BillingType ,processinglyr.PriProv FROM ( SELECT dispat.PatNum ,base.ProcNum ,CONCAT( dispat.LName ,', ' ,dispat.FName ) AS 'PatientName' ,base.TxMonthsTotal ,( TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,base.MinPlace, CURDATE())*12 + TIMESTAMPDIFF( MONTH ,( base.MinPlace + INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,base.MinPlace, CURDATE()) YEAR ) ,CURDATE() ) + IF( TIMESTAMPDIFF( DAY ,( base.MinPlace + INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,base.MinPlace, CURDATE()) YEAR + INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH,(base.MinPlace + INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,base.MinPlace, CURDATE()) YEAR), CURDATE()) MONTH ) , CURDATE() ) > 15 ,1 ,0 ) ) AS MonthsInTx ,( base.TxMonthsTotal - ( TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,base.MinPlace, CURDATE())*12 + TIMESTAMPDIFF( MONTH ,( base.MinPlace + INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,base.MinPlace, CURDATE()) YEAR ) ,CURDATE() ) + IF( TIMESTAMPDIFF( DAY ,( base.MinPlace + INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,base.MinPlace, CURDATE()) YEAR + INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH,(base.MinPlace + INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,base.MinPlace, CURDATE()) YEAR), CURDATE()) MONTH ) , CURDATE() ) > 15 ,1 ,0 ) ) ) AS 'MonthsRem' ,base.MinPlace ,patbt.ItemName AS 'BillingType' ,priprov.Abbr AS 'PriProv' FROM patient dispat LEFT JOIN definition patbt ON patbt.DefNum = dispat.BillingType AND patbt.Category = 4 LEFT JOIN provider priprov ON priprov.ProvNum = dispat.PriProv LEFT JOIN ( SELECT plplace.PatNum ,plplace.ProcNum ,NULLIF(plpn.DateOrthoPlacementOverride, '0001-01-01') AS 'MinPlaceOver' ,COALESCE(NULLIF(plpn.DateOrthoPlacementOverride, '0001-01-01'),plplace.ProcDate) AS 'MinPlace' ,COALESCE(NULLIF(plpn.OrthoMonthsTreatOverride, -1), @OrthoMonthsTreatDefault) AS 'TxMonthsTotal' FROM procedurelog plplace INNER JOIN patient plpat ON plpat.PatNum = plplace.PatNum AND plpat.LName = BINARY UPPER(plpat.LName) AND plpat.FName = BINARY UPPER(plpat.FName) AND plpat.PatStatus = 0 INNER JOIN patientnote plpn ON plpn.PatNum = plplace.PatNum WHERE plplace.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(plplace.CodeNum, @OrthoPlacements) GROUP BY plplace.ProcNum ORDER BY plplace.PatNum, plplace.ProcDate ) base ON base.PatNum = dispat.PatNum WHERE dispat.LName = BINARY UPPER(dispat.LName) AND dispat.FName = BINARY UPPER(dispat.FName) AND dispat.PatStatus = 0 AND dispat.LName !='' AND dispat.FName !='' GROUP BY dispat.PatNum, base.ProcNum ) processinglyr GROUP BY processinglyr.PatNum ORDER BY processinglyr.PatientName

request: List of procedures that are more than half covered by insurance, on patients that have insurance and no schedule appointments
query: SELECT display.PatientName ,display.Procedure ,FORMAT(display.Fee,2) AS 'Fee' ,FORMAT(display.EstIns,2) AS 'EstIns' ,FORMAT(display.Writeoff,2) AS 'Writeoff' ,FORMAT(display.PatPortion,2) AS 'PatPortion' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT( p.LName ,',' ,IF( LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 , CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\' ') , ' ' ) ,p.FName ,IF( LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 , CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) , '' ) ) AS 'PatientName' , pc.Descript AS 'Procedure' , (pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) AS 'Fee' , estins.InsPayEst AS 'EstIns' , estins.WriteoffEst AS 'Writeoff' , ( (pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) - estins.InsPayEst - estins.WriteoffEst ) AS 'PatPortion' , estins.InsPayEst + estins.WriteoffEst AS 'Discounts' , (pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty))/2 AS 'HalfProd' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum , SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.InsEstTotalOverride, -1), cp.InsEstTotal)) AS 'InsPayEst' , SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst,-1), 0)) AS 'WriteoffEst' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status <> 2 GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) estins ON estins.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN appointment apt ON apt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus = 1 WHERE ISNULL(apt.AptNum) )display WHERE display.Discounts >= display.HalfProd

request: Hygiene reappointment statistics per provider on appointments completed in the date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2021-02-09', @ToDate='2021-02-10'; SET @HygCodeList='D1110,D1120'; SET @HygCodeList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@HygCodeList)=0 THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@HygCodeList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END) ,@FromDate = DATE(@FromDate) ,@ToDate = DATE(@ToDate); SELECT display.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,FORMAT((display.NumPats/display.DenomPats)*100, 2) AS 'Percentage' FROM ( SELECT aprov.Abbr ,COUNT(DISTINCT apt.PatNum) AS 'DenomPats' ,COUNT(DISTINCT ( SELECT fapt.PatNum FROM appointment fapt INNER JOIN procedurelog fpl ON fpl.AptNum = fapt.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode fpc ON fpc.CodeNum = fpl.CodeNum AND fpc.ProcCode REGEXP @HygCodeList WHERE fapt.PatNum = apt.PatNum AND fapt.AptDateTime > apt.AptDateTime AND fapt.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY fapt.PatNum ) ) AS 'NumPats' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN procedurelog apl ON apl.AptNum = apt.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode apc ON apc.CodeNum = apl.CodeNum AND apc.ProcCode REGEXP @HygCodeList INNER JOIN provider aprov ON aprov.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY aprov.ProvNum ) display;

request: List of text messages sent in a user specified date range
query: SET @FromDate='2021-01-01', @ToDate='2021-01-31'; SELECT CONCAT('PatNum:',txtms.PatNum) AS 'Pat ,( SELECT request FROM clinic WHERE clinic.ClinicNum = txtms.ClinicNum ) AS Clinic ,txtms.DateTimeSent AS 'TextSentDateTime' ,txtms.MobilePhoneNumber ,(CASE txtms.MsgType WHEN 0 THEN 'Undefined' WHEN 1 THEN 'DirectSms' WHEN 2 THEN 'Recall' WHEN 3 THEN 'Reminder' WHEN 4 THEN 'TestNoCharge' WHEN 5 THEN 'Confirmation' WHEN 6 THEN 'ConfirmationRequest' WHEN 7 THEN 'RecallAuto' WHEN 8 THEN 'AsapManual' WHEN 9 THEN 'WebSchedASAP' WHEN 10 THEN 'Verify' WHEN 11 THEN 'Statements' WHEN 12 THEN 'VerifyWSNP' WHEN 13 THEN 'Headmaster' WHEN 14 THEN 'NoReply' WHEN 15 THEN 'ODMobile' WHEN 16 THEN 'ApptThankYou' WHEN 17 THEN 'ConfirmationAutoReply' WHEN 18 THEN 'OptInPrompt' WHEN 19 THEN 'StopReply' WHEN 20 THEN 'HelpReply' WHEN 21 THEN 'OptInReply' WHEN 22 THEN 'Arrival' WHEN 23 THEN 'ByodToken' WHEN 24 THEN 'GeneralMessage' ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS MsgType ,(CASE txtms.SmsStatus WHEN 0 THEN 'None' WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending' WHEN 2 THEN 'DeliveryConf' WHEN 3 THEN 'DeliveryUnconf' WHEN 4 THEN 'FailWithCharge' WHEN 5 THEN 'FailNoCharge' ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS SmsStatus ,txtms.MsgParts ,txtms.MsgDiscountUSD AS $MsgDiscountUSD__ ,txtms.MsgText FROM smstomobile txtms WHERE txtms.DateTimeSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY txtms.DateTimeSent, txtms.MsgType

request: Each referral's gross production and income in a date range per provider. The income is reported by payment date, and may not be associated with the period's production. May optionally filter by clinic on the procedure or payment.
query: SET @FromDate="2021-06-01", @ToDate="2021-06-30"; SET @Providers=""; SET @Clinics=""; SET @ReferralLast="Smith"; SET @ReferralFirst=""; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @Providers) INTO @ProvNums; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @Clinics) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics' INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT referral.LName AS 'Last Name', referral.FName AS 'First Name', ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = trans.ProvNum ) AS 'Provider', COUNT(DISTINCT trans.patnum) AS 'Count', FORMAT(SUM(trans.Production), 2) AS 'Production', FORMAT(SUM(trans.Income), 2) AS 'Income' FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT refattach.PatNum, refattach.ReferralNum FROM refattach WHERE refattach.RefType = 1 ) refattach INNER JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum = refattach.ReferralNum AND referral.LName = @ReferralLast AND IF(LENGTH(@ReferralFirst) = 0, TRUE, referral.FName = @ReferralFirst) INNER JOIN ( SELECT transraw.PatNum, transraw.ProvNum, SUM(transraw.ProcFee) AS 'Production', SUM(transraw.Payment) AS 'Income' FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, procedurelog.ProvNum, procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) AS 'ProcFee', 0 AS 'Payment' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 OR @EasyNoClinics, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND procedurelog.ProcFee != 0 UNION ALL SELECT paysplit.PatNum, paysplit.ProvNum, 0 AS ProcFee, paysplit.SplitAmt AS 'Payment' FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(paysplit.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 OR @EasyNoClinics, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(paysplit.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND paysplit.SplitAmt != 0 UNION ALL SELECT claimproc.PatNum, claimproc.ProvNum, 0 AS 'ProcFee', claimproc.InsPayAmt AS 'Payment' FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND claimproc.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(claimproc.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 OR @EasyNoClinics, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(claimproc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND claimproc.InsPayAmt != 0 ) transraw GROUP BY transraw.PatNum, transraw.ProvNum )trans ON trans.PatNum = refattach.PatNum GROUP BY refattach.ReferralNum, trans.ProvNum

request: Patient Analysis
query: SELECT COUNT(*) INTO @ActivePatCount FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0; SELECT COUNT(*) INTO @AllPatCount FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus IN (0,2,3,5); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(preference.ValueString) INTO @SpecialRecallTypes FROM preference WHERE preference.PrefName = "RecallTypeSpecialProphy" OR preference.PrefName = "RecallTypeSpecialChildProphy" OR preference.PrefName = "RecallTypeSpecialPerio"; SELECT (CASE patient.Gender WHEN 0 THEN 'Male' WHEN 1 THEN 'Female' WHEN 2 THEN 'Unknown' ELSE '' END ) AS 'Item', COUNT(*) AS ' ROUND(COUNT(*) / @ActivePatCount * 100, 1) AS '% of Active' FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY patient.Gender UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT cats.Cat AS 'Category', SUM(IF((TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,patient.Birthdate,CURDATE()) DIV 10) BETWEEN cats.MinAge AND cats.MaxAge, 1, 0)) AS ' ROUND(SUM(IF((TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,patient.Birthdate,CURDATE()) DIV 10) BETWEEN cats.MinAge AND cats.MaxAge, 1, 0)) / @ActivePatCount *100, 1) AS '% of Active' FROM patient INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'ages 0-9' AS Cat, 0 AS MinAge, 0 AS MaxAge UNION SELECT 'ages 10-19' AS Cat, 1 AS MinAge, 1 AS MaxAge UNION SELECT 'ages 20-29' AS Cat, 2 AS MinAge, 2 AS MaxAge UNION SELECT 'ages 30-39' AS Cat, 3 AS MinAge, 3 AS MaxAge UNION SELECT 'ages 40-49' AS Cat, 4 AS MinAge, 4 AS MaxAge UNION SELECT 'ages 50-59' AS Cat, 5 AS MinAge, 5 AS MaxAge UNION SELECT 'ages 60-69' AS Cat, 6 AS MinAge, 6 AS MaxAge UNION SELECT 'ages 70+' AS Cat, 7 AS MinAge, 14 AS MaxAge UNION SELECT 'unknown' AS Cat, 15 AS MinAge, 1000 AS MaxAge ) cats ON TRUE WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY cats.Cat UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT (CASE patplan.PatPlanNum IS NOT NULL WHEN TRUE THEN 'Insured' ELSE 'Uninsured' END) AS 'Category', COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum) AS ' ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT patient.PatNum) / @ActivePatCount * 100, 1) AS '% of Active' FROM patient LEFT JOIN patplan ON patplan.PatNum = patient.PatNum WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY Category UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT cats.Cat AS 'Category' ,COUNT(DISTINCT pats.PatNum) AS ' ,ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT pats.PatNum)/ @ActivePatCount * 100, 1)AS '% of Active' FROM ( SELECT "Patients - 12 mo" AS Cat, 0 AS MinTime, 12 AS MaxTime UNION SELECT "Patients - 24 mo" AS Cat, 12 AS MinTime, 24 AS MaxTime UNION SELECT "Patients - 36 mo" AS Cat, 24 AS MinTime, 36 AS MaxTime UNION SELECT "Patients - >36 mo" AS Cat, 36 AS MinTime, 1200 AS MaxTime UNION SELECT "Patients no visit" AS Cat, -1 AS MinTime, 0 AS MaxTime ) cats LEFT JOIN( SELECT patient.PatNum, COALESCE(( SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH,MAX(appointment.AptDateTime),CURDATE()) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.AptStatus = 2 AND appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum ), -1) AS 'LastAptMo' FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 ) pats ON pats.LastAptMo >= cats.MinTime AND pats.LastAptMo < cats.MaxTime GROUP BY cats.Cat UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT cats.Cat AS 'Category', COUNT(pats.PatNum) AS ' ROUND(COUNT(pats.PatNum)/ @ActivePatCount *100, 1) AS '% of Active' FROM ( SELECT "New Pats This Month" AS Cat, 1 AS VALUE UNION SELECT "New Pats This Year", 2 UNION SELECT "Pats with no first visit", 3 ) cats LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patient.PatNum, CONCAT( ( SELECT IF(DATE_FORMAT(MIN(appointment.AptDateTime),"%Y-%m-01") = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),"%Y-%m-01"), 1, 0) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.AptStatus = 2 AND appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum ),",", ( SELECT IF(DATE_FORMAT(MIN(appointment.AptDateTime),"%Y-01-01") = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),"%Y-01-01"), 2, 0) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.AptStatus = 2 AND appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum ), ",", COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(0) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.AptStatus = 2 AND appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum ), 3) ) AS "MoYrNo" FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 ) pats ON FIND_IN_SET(cats.Value, pats.MoYrNo) GROUP BY cats.Cat UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT recalls.Cat, recalls.NumActive AS ' ROUND(recalls.PercentActive, 1) AS '% of Active' FROM ( SELECT cats.Cat, SUM(IF((CASE WHEN recall.DateScheduled > CURDATE() AND recall.IsDisabled = FALSE AND recall.DisableUntilDate < CURDATE() THEN 1 WHEN recall.DateScheduled = '0001-01-01' AND recall.DateDue <= CURDATE() AND recall.IsDisabled = FALSE AND recall.DisableUntilDate < CURDATE() THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) = cats.Value, 1, 0)) AS 'NumActive', SUM(IF((CASE WHEN recall.DateScheduled > CURDATE() AND recall.IsDisabled = FALSE AND recall.DisableUntilDate < CURDATE() THEN 1 WHEN recall.DateScheduled = '0001-01-01' AND recall.DateDue <= CURDATE() AND recall.IsDisabled = FALSE AND recall.DisableUntilDate < CURDATE() THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) = cats.Value, 1, 0))/@ActivePatCount * 100 AS 'percentActive' FROM patient INNER JOIN( SELECT "Future Recalls Scheduled" AS Cat, 1 AS VALUE UNION SELECT "Past Due Recall", 2 UNION SELECT "No Recall", 3 ) cats ON TRUE LEFT JOIN recall ON recall.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND FIND_IN_SET(recall.RecallTypeNum, @SpecialRecallTypes) WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY cats.Cat ORDER BY cats.Value )recalls UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT booked.Cat AS 'Category', booked.NumActive AS ' ROUND(booked.PercentActive, 1) AS '% of Active' FROM ( SELECT cats.Cat AS 'Cat', COUNT(DISTINCT IF(cats.Value = COALESCE(appointment.AptStatus, -1), patient.PatNum, NULL)) AS 'NumActive', COUNT(DISTINCT IF(cats.Value = COALESCE(appointment.AptStatus, -1), patient.PatNum, NULL)) / @ActivePatCount * 100 AS 'PercentActive' FROM patient INNER JOIN( SELECT "Future Appts Booked" AS Cat, 1 AS VALUE UNION SELECT "Past Due Appts (not recall)", 3 UNION SELECT "No Sched Appts", -1 ) cats ON TRUE LEFT JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND (appointment.AptStatus = 3 OR (appointment.AptStatus = 1 AND appointment.AptDateTime > CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY)) WHERE patient.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY cats.Cat ORDER BY FIELD(cats.Value, 1, 3, -1) ) booked UNION ALL SELECT '','','' UNION ALL SELECT (CASE patient.PatStatus WHEN 0 THEN 'Patient' WHEN 1 THEN 'NonPatient' WHEN 2 THEN 'Inactive' WHEN 3 THEN 'Archived' WHEN 4 THEN 'Deleted' WHEN 5 THEN 'Deceased' WHEN 6 THEN 'Prospective' ELSE '' END ) AS 'Category', COUNT(*) AS ' ROUND(COUNT(*)/@AllPatCount * 100, 1) AS '% of Active' FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus IN (0,2,3,5) GROUP BY patient.PatStatus UNION ALL SELECT "Total Patients" AS 'Category', COUNT(*) AS ' ROUND(100, 1) AS '% of Active' FROM patient WHERE patient.PatStatus IN (0,2,3,5)

request: New and Lost patient report.
query: SET @FromDate="2021-11-01", @ToDate="2021-11-30"; SET @Clinics=""; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.CodeNum) FROM procedurecode WHERE FIND_IN_SET(procedurecode.ProcCode, 'D9986,D9987') INTO @BrokenCodes; SELECT SUM(IF(dates.FirstProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate, 1, 0)) AS 'New Pats', SUM(IF(dates.LastProc BETWEEN @FromDate - INTERVAL 1 YEAR AND @ToDate - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, 1, 0)) AS 'Pats Lost', '','' FROM ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, MIN(procedurelog.ProcDate) AS 'FirstProc', MAX(procedurelog.ProcDate) AS 'LastProc', COALESCE(( SELECT clinic.Abbr FROM patient INNER JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = patient.ClinicNum WHERE patient.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum ), 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND NOT FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.CodeNum, @BrokenCodes) GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum HAVING IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(Clinic), @Clinics)) ) dates WHERE dates.FirstProc BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate OR dates.LastProc BETWEEN @FromDate - INTERVAL 1 YEAR AND @ToDate - INTERVAL 1 YEAR UNION ALL SELECT '','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 'Patient', 'Email', 'Phone', 'Code' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT( patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient', patient.Email AS 'Email', patient.WirelessPhone AS 'Phone', ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ProcCode) FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND NOT FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.CodeNum, @BrokenCodes) AND procedurelog.ProcDate = dates.LastProc ) AS 'Code' FROM patient INNER JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, MAX(procedurelog.ProcDate) AS 'LastProc' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND NOT FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.CodeNum, @BrokenCodes) GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum HAVING LastProc BETWEEN @FromDate - INTERVAL 1 YEAR AND @ToDate - INTERVAL 1 YEAR ) dates ON dates.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = patient.ClinicNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics)) AND patient.PatStatus = 0

request: Count of active patients (status of Patient) per assigned clinic and insurance carrier (including Self Pay). Patients can be counted more than once if they have multiple insurance plans with different carriers.
query: SET @Clinics=''; SET @Carriers=''; SELECT IF(LENGTH(@Carriers) = 0,'^',REPLACE(@Carriers,',','|')) INTO @Carriers; SELECT core.Carrier , core.Clinic , COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum) AS 'Patients' FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum , COALESCE(clin.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' , COALESCE(insinfo.Carrier,'Self Pay') AS 'Carrier' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pp.PatNum , ca.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' , pp.Ordinal FROM carrier ca INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ip.PlanNum = ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient pat ON pat.PatNum = pp.PatNum AND pat.PatStatus = 0 ORDER BY pp.PatNum, pp.Ordinal ) insinfo ON insinfo.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clin.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinics)) AND COALESCE(insinfo.Carrier,'Self Pay') REGEXP @Carriers ) core GROUP BY core.Carrier, core.Clinic ORDER BY core.Carrier, core.Clinic

request: List of patients seen in a date range with age, race, carrier, number of visits and other information, for FQHC grant. Use if EHR is enabled during data entry. See 1407 if EHR was not enabled during data entry.
query: SET @StartDate= '2019-07-01'; SET @EndDate= '2019-07-31'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos:=@pos+1 AS Num ,a.patnum AS PatientID ,a.FName ,a.LName ,a.Age ,a.Address ,a.Address2 ,a.City ,a.State ,a.Zip ,a.Birthdate ,a.Language ,a.Visits ,a.CarrierName ,a.GenderIdentity ,a.Homeless ,a.Veteran ,a.AgriculturalWorker AS 'Agricultural Worker' ,a.RaceEth FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,p.FName ,p.LName ,( CASE WHEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5))<120 THEN (YEAR(CURDATE())-YEAR(Birthdate)) - (RIGHT(CURDATE(),5)<RIGHT(Birthdate,5)) ELSE 'NONE' END ) AS 'Age' ,p.Address , p.Address2 , p.City , p.State , p.Zip , p.Birthdate , p.Language ,COUNT(DISTINCT(pl.ProcDate)) AS Visits ,ca.CarrierName ,( CASE ehr.genderidentity WHEN '446141000124107' THEN 'F' WHEN '446151000124109' THEN 'M' WHEN '407377005' THEN 'Female-to-Male (FTM)/Transgender Male/Trans Man' WHEN '407376001' THEN 'Male-to-Female (MTF)/Transgender Female/Trans Woman' WHEN '446131000124102' THEN 'Genderqueer' ELSE 'null' END ) AS GenderIdentity ,( SELECT MAX(FieldValue) FROM patfield WHERE patfield.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FieldName='Homeless Status' ) AS 'Homeless', ( SELECT MAX(FieldValue) FROM patfield WHERE patfield.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FieldName='Veteran Status' ) AS 'Veteran' ,( SELECT MAX(FieldValue) FROM patfield WHERE patfield.PatNum=p.PatNum AND FieldName='Agricultural Worker Status' ) AS 'AgriculturalWorker' ,( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(cdcrec.request SEPARATOR ', ') FROM patientrace pr INNER JOIN cdcrec ON cdcrec.CdcrecCode = pr.CdcrecCode WHERE pr.PatNum=p.PatNum ) AS 'RaceEth' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=ib.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN ehrpatient EHR ON EHR.PatNum=p.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND ProcDate BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ) a;

request: Payment report like internal, but includes the patient's ID to better identify the specific patient.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-09-10', @ToDate='2022-09-10'; SET @ProvList=''; SET @PracticeName='Default'; SET @ProvList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProvList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProvList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ProvNums = ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provs.ProvNum) FROM provider provs WHERE provs.Abbr REGEXP @ProvList AND !provs.IsHidden ); SET @PracticeTitle = IF(@PracticeName='Default', (SELECT pracname.ValueString FROM preference pracname WHERE pracname.PrefNum = 5), @PracticeTitle := @PracticeName); SELECT display.Date AS ' ' , display.DateIssued AS ' ' , display.PatientNumber AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Patient, 35) AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Carrier, 35) AS ' ' , display.Provider AS ' ' , display.CheckNum AS ' ' , display.Amount AS ' ' FROM ( SELECT 'A' AS 'ItemType' , 1 AS 'GroupPayType' , dup1.Num , '0001-01-01' AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date' END ) AS 'Date' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date Issued' END ) AS 'DateIssued' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Pat END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Name' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN 'Daily Payments Report' WHEN 2 THEN @PracticeTitle WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT( 'Date Range:' , DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate, '%m/%d/%Y') , '-' , DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate, '%m/%d/%Y') ) WHEN 4 THEN 'Carrier' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Prov' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Check END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Amount' END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 ) dup1 UNION ALL SELECT ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.ItemType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 3 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 4 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) END ) AS 'ItemType' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 3 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 4 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) END ) AS 'GroupPayType' , dup2.Num , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 2 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 3 THEN pays.Date WHEN 4 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.Date) END ) AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 2 THEN pays.PayType WHEN 3 THEN DATE_FORMAT(pays.Date, '%m/%d/%Y') WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN IF(pays.DateIssued = '0001-01-01', '', DATE_FORMAT(pays.DateIssued, '%m/%d/%Y')) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisIssDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.PatNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT CONCAT( UPPER(p.LName) ,', ' ,UPPER(p.FName) ) FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = pays.PatNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.Carrier WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.PayType) WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 6 THEN 'Total All Payments' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = pays.ProvNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.CheckNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 'Insurance Payment' AS 'ItemType' , cpayt.ItemName AS 'PayType' , cpay.ClaimPaymentNum AS 'PayNum' , cpay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , cp.DateCP AS 'Date' , cpay.DateIssued , cp.PatNum , c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' , cp.ProvNum , cpay.CheckNum , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'Amount' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition cpayt ON cpayt.DefNum = cpay.PayType AND cpayt.Category = 32 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums) GROUP BY cp.ProvNum, cpay.ClaimPaymentNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Patient Payment' AS 'ItemType' , COALESCE(paytype.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS 'PayType' , pay.PayNum , pay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , ps.DatePay AS 'Date' , '' AS DateIssued , pay.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , '' AS 'Carrier' , ps.ProvNum AS 'ProvNum' , pay.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' , SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Amount' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON paytype.DefNum = pay.PayType AND paytype.Category = 10 WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum, pay.PayNum ) pays INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 ) dup2 ON TRUE GROUP BY ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, ', ', dup2.Num) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(pays.ProvNum, ', ', pays.PayNum, ', ', pays.ItemType) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType, ', ', pays.ItemType) WHEN 5 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 6 THEN dup2.Num END ) ORDER BY ItemType, GroupPayType, Num, OrDate ) display

request: Aging for families or patients with any balance, similar to standard Aging of A/R
query: SET @AsOf =''; SET @AgingLevel ='Family'; SET @AgeOfAccount =''; SET @IncludeNegativeBalances='Yes'; SET @ProvAbbrs =''; SET @ClinicAbbrs =''; SET @BillingTypes =''; SET @ExcludeInactive='No'; SET @ExcludeArchived='No'; SET @ExcludePendingIns='No'; SET @ShowDateHeader='No'; SET @MinBal=''; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays'),0) INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'),1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlanItemDateShowProc'), 0) INTO @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @ProvAbbrs); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @ClinicAbbrs); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @ClinicAbbrs),'0,',''),IFNULL(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @BillTypeNums FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(definition.ItemName, @BillingTypes); SELECT CAST(CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', 2) , LPAD(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', -2),'.',''),4,'0') ) AS DECIMAL(6,4)) INTO @ProgramVersion FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'ProgramVersion'; SELECT (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'Pat , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN CONCAT('As of: ', DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf, '%m/%d/%Y')) WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'PatNum' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_0_30 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_0_30) END) AS 'Bal_0_30' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_31_60 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_31_60) END) AS 'Bal_31_60' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_61_90 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_61_90) END) AS 'Bal_61_90' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.BalOver90 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.BalOver90) END) AS 'BalOver90' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.BalTotal WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.BalTotal) END) AS 'BalTotal' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsWoEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsWoEst) END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsPayEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsPayEst) END) AS 'InsPayEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.PatEst) END) AS 'PatEst' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum , CONCAT( patient.LName , ',' , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred, '''') ELSE '' END) , ' ' , patient.FName , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' , guarAging.Bal_0_30 , guarAging.Bal_31_60 , guarAging.Bal_61_90 , guarAging.BalOver90 , guarAging.BalTotal , guarAging.InsWoEst , guarAging.InsPayEst , guarAging.BalTotal - guarAging.InsPayEst - guarAging.InsWoEst AS 'PatEst' , guarAging.PayPlanDue , guarAging.DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT tSums.PatNum , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'BalOver90' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits <= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN tSums.Charges_61_90 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_61_90' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 THEN tSums.Charges_31_60 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_31_60' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 THEN tSums.Charges_0_30 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_0_30' , CAST(tSums.BalTotal AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'BalTotal' , CAST(tSums.InsWoEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsWoEst' , CAST(tSums.InsPayEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsPayEst' , CAST(tSums.PayPlanDue AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'PayPlanDue' , DATE(tSums.DateLastPay) AS 'DateLastPay' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) AS 'PatNum' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesOver90' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_61_90' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE) ) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig') ) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_31_60' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE) ) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig') ) AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_0_30' , -SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount < 0 AND NOT(trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig'))) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND trans.TranType = 'PatPay') THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TotalCredits' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotal' , SUM(trans.InsWoEst) AS 'InsWoEst' , SUM(trans.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' , SUM(trans.PayPlanAmount) AS 'PayPlanDue' , MAX( CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN trans.TranDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END ) DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.PatNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= DATE(@AsOf) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog p ON cp.ProcNum = p.ProcNum AND @ProgramVersion >= 22.2055 WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 22.2055 THEN TRUE ELSE (cp.ProcNum = 0 OR p.ProcStatus = 2) END) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , a.PatNum , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey' , ps.PatNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmount' , ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum , pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate' , -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.PatNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Discount' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , p.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , p.Discount + p.DiscountPlanAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplanlink ppl ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog p ON ppl.FKey = p.ProcNum AND ppl.LinkType = 2 AND p.ProcStatus = 1 AND p.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 23.2023 AND 24.1999 AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 AND pp.DynamicPayPlanTPOption = 2 AND (p.Discount != 0 OR p.DiscountPlanAmt != 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType , ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey' , prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate ELSE DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) END) AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum , procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 24.2001 THEN !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) ELSE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 END) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjustment.ProcNum , adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = adjustment.ProcNum GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay' , SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff' , claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.ProcNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , 0 ProcNum , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2024 THEN adjustment.AdjDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END) AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 1 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.AdjNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) ELSE ppl.SecDateTEntry < DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL 1 DAY END) ) trans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = trans.PatNum GROUP BY (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) ) tSums ) guarAging INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=guarAging.PatNum WHERE (IF(@IncludeNegativeBalances IN ('Yes','Only'), guarAging.BalTotal <= -0.005, FALSE) OR IF(@IncludeNegativeBalances ='Only', FALSE, (guarAging.BalOver90 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_61_90 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_31_60 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_0_30 >= 0.005) ) ) AND (CASE CAST(@AgeOfAccount AS DECIMAL(2,0)) WHEN 90 THEN guarAging.BalOver90 >= 0.005 WHEN 60 THEN guarAging.Bal_61_90 + guarAging.BalOver90 >= 0.005 WHEN 30 THEN guarAging.Bal_31_60 + guarAging.Bal_61_90 + guarAging.BalOver90 >= 0.005 ELSE TRUE END ) AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@ClinicAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(@ExcludePendingIns != 'Yes', TRUE, ABS(guarAging.InsPayEst + guarAging.InsWoEst) < 0.005) AND IF(LENGTH(@ProvAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.PriProv, @ProvNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.BillingType, @BillTypeNums)) AND IF(@ExcludeInactive !='Yes', TRUE, patient.PatStatus != 2) AND IF(@ExcludeArchived !='Yes', TRUE, patient.PatStatus != 3) AND IF(LENGTH(@MinBal) = 0, TRUE, ABS(guarAging.BalTotal - guarAging.InsPayEst - guarAging.InsWoEst) >= @MinBal) ) aging INNER JOIN ( SELECT IF(@ShowDateHeader='Yes', 'AHeader', NULL) AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Spacer' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Total' AS 'Type' ) dup ON dup.Type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dup.Type, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', aging.PatNum, NULL) ORDER BY dup.Type, aging.PatName, aging.PatNum

request: Appointments scheduled in the specified date range that are in the specified op for patients with specified carrier(s).
query: SET @FromDate='2021-10-01', @ToDate='2021-10-31'; SET @Operatory="%OpName%"; SET @Carrier="%MN Select%"; SELECT p.PatNum ,a.AptDateTime ,op.OpName ,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(carrier.CarrierName) THEN '*No Insurance' ELSE (carrier.CarrierName) END) AS 'PriCarrier' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) AS '$Fees' ,(CASE ip.PlanType WHEN '' THEN 'Category Percentage' WHEN 'p' THEN IF( ip.CopayFeeSched > 0, IF( (SELECT fs.FeeSchedType FROM feesched fs WHERE fs.FeeSchedNum = ip.CopayFeeSched) = 3, 'PPO Fixed Benefit', 'PPO Percentage' ), 'PPO Percentage' ) WHEN 'f' THEN 'FlatCopay' WHEN 'c' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS PlanType FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = a.PatNum INNER JOIN operatory op ON op.OperatoryNum = a.Op AND op.Abbrev LIKE @Operatory LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON a.AptNum = pl.AptNum LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum = iss.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = iss.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE COALESCE(carrier.CarrierName, "None") LIKE @Carrier AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 1 GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime;

request: List of active patients (by patient status) with invalid codes attached to their account.
query: SELECT pl.ProcFee ,pc.ProcCode ,p.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode = '~Bad~' INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND p.PatStatus = 0 ORDER BY ProcFee DESC;

request: Payment report like internal, but includes the patient's ID to better identify the specific patient, also filters on and shows the user that entered the payment.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-01-10', @ToDate='2023-01-10'; SET @ProvList=''; SET @PracticeName='Default'; SET @EntryUser=''; SET @ProvList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProvList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProvList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ProvNums = ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provs.ProvNum) FROM provider provs WHERE provs.Abbr REGEXP @ProvList AND !provs.IsHidden ); SET @PracticeTitle = IF(@PracticeName='Default', (SELECT pracname.ValueString FROM preference pracname WHERE pracname.PrefNum = 5), @PracticeTitle := @PracticeName); SELECT display.Date AS ' ' ,display.DateIssued AS ' ' ,display.PatientNumber AS ' ' ,LEFT(display.Patient, 35) AS ' ' ,LEFT(display.Carrier, 35) AS ' ' ,display.Provider AS ' ' ,display.EntryUser AS ' ' ,display.CheckNum AS ' ' ,display.Amount AS ' ' FROM ( SELECT 'A' AS 'ItemType' ,1 AS 'GroupPayType' ,dup1.Num ,'0001-01-01' AS 'OrDate' ,( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date' END ) AS 'Date' ,( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date Issued' END ) AS 'DateIssued' ,( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Pat END ) AS 'PatientNumber' ,( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Name' END ) AS 'Patient' ,( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN 'Daily Payments Report' WHEN 2 THEN @PracticeTitle WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT( 'Date Range:' , DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate, '%m/%d/%Y') , '-' , DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate, '%m/%d/%Y') ) WHEN 4 THEN 'Carrier' END ) AS 'Carrier' ,( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Prov' END ) AS 'Provider' ,( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Entry User' END ) AS 'EntryUser' ,( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Check END ) AS 'CheckNum' ,( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Amount' END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 ) dup1 UNION ALL SELECT ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.ItemType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 3 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 4 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) END ) AS 'ItemType' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 3 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 4 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) END ) AS 'GroupPayType' ,dup2.Num ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 2 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 3 THEN pays.Date WHEN 4 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.Date) END ) AS 'OrDate' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 2 THEN pays.PayType WHEN 3 THEN DATE_FORMAT(pays.Date, '%m/%d/%Y') WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisDate' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN IF(pays.DateIssued = '0001-01-01' OR pays.DateIssued = '', '', DATE_FORMAT(pays.DateIssued, '%m/%d/%Y')) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisIssDate' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.PatNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'PatientNumber' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT CONCAT( UPPER(p.LName) ,', ' ,UPPER(p.FName) ) FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = pays.PatNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Patient' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.Carrier WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.PayType) WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 6 THEN 'Total All Payments' END ) AS 'Carrier' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = pays.ProvNum ), '') WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Provider' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.EntryUser WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'EntryUser' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.CheckNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'CheckNum' ,( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 'Insurance Payment' AS 'ItemType' ,cpayt.ItemName AS 'PayType' ,cpay.ClaimPaymentNum AS 'PayNum' ,cpay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' ,cp.DateCP AS 'Date' ,cpay.DateIssued ,cp.PatNum ,c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' ,cp.ProvNum ,( SELECT u.UserName FROM userod u WHERE u.UserNum = cpay.SecUserNumEntry ) AS 'EntryUser' ,cpay.CheckNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'Amount' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition cpayt ON cpayt.DefNum = cpay.PayType AND cpayt.Category = 32 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(@ProvList = '^', TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY cp.ProvNum, cpay.ClaimPaymentNum HAVING IF(@EntryUser = '', TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(EntryUser,@EntryUser)) UNION ALL SELECT 'Patient Payment' AS 'ItemType' ,COALESCE(paytype.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS 'PayType' ,pay.PayNum ,pay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' ,ps.DatePay AS 'Date' ,'' AS DateIssued ,pay.PatNum AS 'PatNum' ,'' AS 'Carrier' ,ps.ProvNum AS 'ProvNum' ,( SELECT u.UserName FROM userod u WHERE u.UserNum = pay.SecUserNumEntry ) AS 'EntryUser' ,pay.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Amount' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON paytype.DefNum = pay.PayType AND paytype.Category = 10 WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(@ProvList = '^', TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pS.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum, pay.PayNum HAVING IF(@EntryUser = '', TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(EntryUser,@EntryUser)) ) pays INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 ) dup2 ON TRUE GROUP BY ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, ', ', dup2.Num) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(pays.ProvNum, ', ', pays.PayNum, ', ', pays.ItemType) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType, ', ', pays.ItemType) WHEN 5 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 6 THEN dup2.Num END ) ORDER BY ItemType, GroupPayType, Num, OrDate ) display

request: Patient Portal Payments in Date Range
query: SET @FromDate="2022-03-01" , @ToDate="2022-03-31"; SET @PatNum=""; SELECT (CASE WHEN p.ProcessStatus != 2 THEN 'X' ELSE '' END) AS 'Processed', p.PatNum, p.DateEntry AS 'Date Created', p.PayDate AS 'Date Posted', p.PayAmt AS 'Amount', p.PayNote AS 'Note' FROM payment p WHERE p.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@PatNum) = 0, TRUE, p.PatNum = @PatNum) AND p.ProcessStatus IN (1,2) ORDER BY p.DateEntry DESC

request: List of Procedure Code Time Patterns by Assistant and Provider in Minutes
query: SELECT preference.ValueString INTO @ApptInterval FROM preference WHERE preference.prefname = 'AppointmentTimeIncrement'; SELECT pc.ProcCode AS 'Procedure code', CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(pc.ProcTime,'X',''))*@ApptInterval AS 'Assistant Time', CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(pc.ProcTime,'/',''))*@ApptInterval AS 'Provider Time' FROM procedurecode pc

request: Credit balances with mismatched unearned. Requires running aging tool found in the main toolbar under Tools>Aging for balances to be accurate.
query: SELECT (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN "Grand Totals:" ELSE core.Clinic END) AS "Office Name" ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.PatNum,'') AS "Account Number" ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.GuarName,COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum)) AS "Patient Name" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Credit),2) AS "Amount of Credit" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Unearned),2) AS "Unearned" FROM ( SELECT g.ClinicNum ,COALESCE(( SELECT c.request FROM clinic c WHERE c.ClinicNum = g.ClinicNum ),"Unassigned") AS "Clinic" ,g.PatNum ,CONCAT(g.LName,', ',g.FName) AS "GuarName" ,g.BalTotal - g.InsEst AS "Credit" ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN patient p ON ps.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE p.Guarantor = g.PatNum AND ps.UnearnedType != 0 ),0) AS "Unearned" FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum = g.Guarantor AND g.BalTotal - g.InsEst < 0 ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS "Num" UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE WHERE ABS(ROUND(core.Unearned,2)) != ABS(ROUND(core.Credit,2)) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,"+",core.PatNum) WHEN dup.Num = 2 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,"+",core.ClinicNUm) ELSE dup.Num END) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.ClinicNum, core.Credit ASC

request: Appointments in the future with an arrived time; Waiting room troubleshooting
query: SELECT apt.PatNum, CONCAT('PatNum:', apt.PatNum) AS 'PatLink', COALESCE((SELECT cl.Abbr FROM clinic cl WHERE cl.ClinicNum = apt.ClinicNum), '') AS 'Clinic', apt.AptDateTime, (SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.DefNum = apt.Confirmed) AS 'ConfirmedStatus', DATE_FORMAT(apt.DateTimeArrived, '%h:%i:%s %p') AS 'Arrived', DATE_FORMAT(apt.DateTimeSeated, '%h:%i:%s %p') AS 'Seated', DATE_FORMAT(apt.DateTimeDismissed, '%h:%i:%s %p') AS 'Dismissed' FROM appointment apt WHERE TIME(apt.DateTimeArrived) AND apt.AptDateTime > NOW() + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE AND apt.AptStatus = 1

request: List of Patient, NonPatient, and Inactive patients and their Patient Portal Access status
query: SELECT CONCAT(LName,', ',FName) AS Patient ,PatStatus ,CASE WHEN userweb.FKey > 0 THEN 'Online' ELSE 'No Access' END AS 'Has Patient Portal Access' ,Username ,CASE WHEN DateTimeLastLogin = '0001-01-01 00:00:00' THEN 'Never logged in' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(DateTimeLastLogin, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i%p') END AS DateTimeLastLogin FROM patient LEFT JOIN userweb ON userweb.Fkey = patient.PatNum AND PASSWORD != 'None$$' WHERE PatStatus IN (0,1,2) ORDER BY LName, FName

request: Adjustments to Benefits and Procedure History entries done by automation
query: SET @FromDate='2022-01-01', @ToDate='2022-01-10'; SELECT a.Type, a.PatNum, a.ProcDate, a.Value, a.SecDateEntry FROM ( SELECT "Benefit Adjustment" AS 'Type', cp.PatNum, cp.ProcDate, FORMAT(cp.InsPayAmt, 2) AS 'Value', cp.SecDateEntry FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status = 3 AND cp.SecUserNumEntry = 0 AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT "Procedure History" AS 'Type', pl.PatNum, pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, pl.SecDateEntry FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 4 AND pl.SecUserNumEntry = 0 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate ) a;

request: Discount plan adjustments on procedures with specified procedure codes completed in a specified date range by a specific provider
query: SET @FromDate='2023-11-01', @ToDate='2023-11-30'; SET @Providers=''; SET @ProcCodes=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.abbr,@Providers); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT definition.DefNum) INTO @DiscountAdjTypes FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 1 AND definition.ItemValue = "dp"; SELECT pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProvNum , pc.ProcCode AS 'Code' , FORMAT(SUM(ad.AdjAmt), 2) AS 'Discount' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN adjustment ad ON ad.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND FIND_IN_SET(ad.AdjType, @DiscountAdjTypes) WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum,@ProvNums)) AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, pl.ProvNum, pl.PatNum, pl.ProcNum

request: List of Patients in Screening Groups in the Specified Date Range
query: SET @FromDate="2022-02-01", @ToDate="2022-02-08"; SELECT sg.SGDate AS 'Date', p.LName AS 'LName', p.FName AS 'FName', p.AddrNote AS 'Phone', p.Birthdate AS 'DOB', sg.request AS 'request', p.County AS 'County', sg.ProvName AS 'Screener', (CASE WHEN sg.PlaceService = 0 THEN 'Office' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 1 THEN 'PatientsHome' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 2 THEN 'InpatHospital' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 3 THEN 'OutpatHospital' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 4 THEN 'SkilledNursFac' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 5 THEN 'CustodialCareFacility' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 6 THEN 'OtherLocation' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 7 THEN 'MobileUnit' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 8 THEN 'School' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 9 THEN 'MilitaryTreatFac' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 10 THEN 'FederalHealthCenter' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 11 THEN 'PublicHealthClinic' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 12 THEN 'RuralHealthClinic' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 13 THEN 'EmergencyRoomHospital' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 14 THEN 'AmbulatorySurgicalCenter' WHEN sg.PlaceService = 15 THEN 'Telehealth' ELSE 'None' END) AS 'Location', site.request AS 'School', COALESCE(sheet.request,'') AS 'Sheet', COALESCE(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic', pr.Abbr AS 'PriProv', CONCAT(p.Address,' ',p.Address2) AS 'Address', p.City AS 'City', p.State AS 'State', p.Zip AS 'Zip' FROM patient p INNER JOIN provider pr ON p.PriProv = pr.ProvNum INNER JOIN screenpat sp ON p.PatNum = sp.PatNum INNER JOIN screengroup sg ON sp.ScreenGroupNum = sg.ScreenGroupNum AND sg.SGDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN site ON sg.GradeSchool = site.request LEFT JOIN screen ON sp.ScreenPatNum = screen.ScreenPatNum LEFT JOIN sheet ON screen.SheetNum = sheet.SheetNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON p.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum ORDER BY sg.SGDate, sg.PlaceService, p.LName, p.FName, p.Birthdate

request:
Year to Date Production summed for each provider not marked as hidden
	on reports. Only considers adjustments with specific adjustment types
query: SET @AsOf = '2021-12-31'; SET @AdjTypes = "credit adjustment,debit adjustment,professional courtesy"; SELECT pr.Abbr ,FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.Fee,0)),2) AS "YTD Production" ,FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.WO,0)),2) AS "YTD Writeoffs" ,FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.Adj,0)),2) AS "YTD Adjustments" ,FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.Fee,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(core.WO,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(core.Adj,0)),2) AS "YTD Total" FROM provider pr INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) AS "Fee" ,0 AS "WO" ,0 AS "Adj" FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,"%Y-01-01") AND DATE(@AsOf) GROUP BY pl.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT cp.ProvNum ,0 AS "Fee" ,SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS "WO" ,0 AS "Adj" FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,"%Y-01-01") AND DATE(@AsOf) AND cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY cp.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT a.ProvNum ,0 AS "Fee" ,0 AS "WO" ,SUM(a.AdjAmt) AS "Adj" FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN DEFINITION def ON a.AdjType = def.DefNum AND IF(LENGTH(@AdjTypes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemName,@AdjTypes)) WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,"%Y-01-01") AND DATE(@AsOf) GROUP BY a.ProvNum ) core ON core.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum WHERE !pr.IsHiddenReport AND ABS(core.Fee + core.Wo + core.Adj) > 0.005 GROUP BY pr.ProvNum ORDER BY pr.Abbr

request: Procedures completed on the specified date, with payments attached.
query: SET @ServDate='2022-02-04'; SET @Provider='%%'; SELECT IF(dup.Type = 'ProcRows', pl.ProcDate, '') AS 'Date of Service' ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,IF(dup.Type = 'ProcRows', pc.ProcCode, '') AS 'Procedure Code' ,IF(dup.Type = 'ProcRows', FORMAT(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits), 2), '') AS 'Production' ,IF(dup.Type = 'ProcRows', FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(insinc.InsPayAmt,0)), 2), '') AS 'Ins Income' ,IF(dup.Type = 'ProcRows', FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(patinc.SplitAmt,0)), 2), '') AS 'Other Income' ,FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(patinc.SplitAmt,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(insinc.InsPayAmt,0)), 2) AS 'Total Income' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate = @ServDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr LIKE @Provider LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPayAmt FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) insinc ON insinc.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.ProcNum ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS SplitAmt FROM paysplit ps GROUP BY ps.ProcNum ) patinc ON patinc.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'ProcRows' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Total' ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Type = 'ProcRows', pl.ProcNum, pl.ProvNum) ORDER BY dup.Type,pl.ProcDate,p.LName,p.FName, pr.Abbr;

request: Production and Income by procedure code, for procedures attached to an appointment and completed in the date range. Ability to filter by procedure code, treating provider, clinic, and primary carrier from the appointment. Requires procedures to be attached to appointments, adjustments and payments.
query: SET @FromDate = "2022-01-01", @ToDate = "2022-01-31"; SET @ProcCodes = ""; SET @Providers=""; SET @Clinics=""; SET @Carrier=""; SELECT (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Category WHEN 2 THEN rep.Category WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN 'Total' END) AS 'Category', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.ProcCode WHEN 2 THEN 'SubTotal' WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN '' END) AS 'ProcCode', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Descript WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN '' END) AS 'Descript', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Count WHEN 2 THEN SUM(rep.Count) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN SUM(rep.Count) END) AS 'Count', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.GrossProd,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd),2) END) AS 'GrossProd', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.AdjAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.AdjAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.AdjAmt),2) END) AS 'AdjAmt', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.WriteOff,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.WriteOff),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.WriteOff),2) END) AS 'WriteOff', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.NetProd,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.NetProd),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.NetProd),2) END) AS 'NetProd', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.PatPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt),2) END) AS 'PatPayAmt', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.InsPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.InsPayAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.InsPayAmt),2) END) AS 'InsPayAmt', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.TotalPaid,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.TotalPaid),2) WHEN 3 THEN ' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.TotalPaid),2) END) AS 'TotalPaid' FROM ( SELECT def.ItemName AS 'Category', pc.ProcCode, pc.Descript, COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcNum) AS 'Count', SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits),0)) AS GrossProd, SUM(COALESCE(adjust.AdjAmt,0)) AS AdjAmt, SUM(COALESCE(insinfo.Writeoff,0)) AS WriteOff, SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits),0)) + SUM(COALESCE(adjust.AdjAmt,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(insinfo.Writeoff,0)) AS NetProd, SUM(COALESCE(patpay.SplitAmt,0)) AS PatPayAmt, SUM(COALESCE(insinfo.InsPayAmt,0)) AS InsPayAmt, SUM(COALESCE(patpay.SplitAmt,0)) + SUM(COALESCE(insinfo.InsPayAmt,0)) AS TotalPaid FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN definition def ON pc.ProcCat = def.DefNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers)) INNER JOIN appointment apt ON pl.AptNum = apt.AptNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON apt.InsPlan1 = ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON pl.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum, SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS Writeoff, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS InsPayAmt FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) insinfo ON insinfo.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.ProcNum, SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS SplitAmt FROM paysplit ps GROUP BY ps.ProcNum ) patpay ON patpay.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT adjustment.ProcNum, SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum ) adjust ON adjust.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Carrier) = 0, TRUE, COALESCE(ca.CarrierName, "None") = @Carrier) GROUP BY pc.ProcCode ) rep LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',rep.ProcCode) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',rep.Category) WHEN 3 THEN dup.num WHEN 4 THEN dup.num END) ORDER BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(rep.Category,'-',dup.num,'-',rep.ProcCode) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(rep.Category,'-',dup.num) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT('zzzzzzzzzzzz',dup.num) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT('zzzzzzzzzzzz',dup.num) END)

request: Production and Income by Carriers, Group Name, Group Number, and Proc Code
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-01-01', @ToDate ='2024-12-31'; SET @Carrier=''; SET @GroupName=''; SET @GroupNum=''; SET @ADAcode=''; SELECT (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.CarrierName WHEN 2 THEN 'Totals:' END) AS 'Carrier' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.ProcCode WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT('Total Pat: ', COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum)) END) AS 'ADA Code' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.GroupName WHEN 2 THEN '' END) AS 'Group Name' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.GroupNum WHEN 2 THEN '' END) AS 'Group Number' ,ROUND(SUM(core.ProcFee),2) AS 'Production' ,ROUND(SUM(core.Adj),2) AS 'Adjustments' ,ROUND(SUM(core.WriteOff),2) AS 'WriteOff' ,ROUND(SUM(core.InsColl),2) AS 'Ins Collection' ,ROUND(SUM(core.PatColl),2) AS 'Pat Collections' ,ROUND(SUM(core.PatColl) + SUM(core.InsColl),2) AS 'Total Collection' FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName ,ca.CarrierNum ,pc.ProcCode AS 'ProcCode' ,ip.GroupName ,ip.GroupNum ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) AS 'ProcFee' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND adjustment.PatNum = pl.PatNum ),0) AS 'Adj' ,SUM(COALESCE(cp.WriteOff,0)) AS 'WriteOff' ,SUM(COALESCE(cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS 'InsColl' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND paysplit.PatNum = pl.PatNum ),0) AS 'PatColl' ,pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ADAcode) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ADAcode)) INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType = 'P' AND cl.ClaimStatus IN ('S', 'R') INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum AND IF(LENGTH(@GroupName) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ip.GroupName,@GroupName)) AND IF(LENGTH(@GroupNum) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ip.GroupNum,@GroupNum)) INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND IF (LENGTH(@Carrier) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ca.CarrierName,@Carrier)) WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(core.CarrierNum ,';',core.GroupName ,';',core.GroupNum ,';',core.ProcCode ,';',dup.Num) WHEN 2 THEN dup.Num END) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.CarrierName, core.GroupName, core.GroupNum, core.ProcCode

request: Total Count and Sum of Patient Credit Card Payments (or any specific payment type) by Day in a Date Range
query: SET @FromDate="2022-01-01", @ToDate="2022-01-31"; SET @PayType="Credit Card"; SELECT row.RowDate AS 'Date' ,COALESCE(payment.NumPayments,0) AS ' ,COALESCE(payment.Amount,0.00) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT @FromDate + INTERVAL nums.num DAY AS 'RowDate' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(n0.num,n1.num) + 0 AS 'num' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 ) AS n0 JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 ) AS n1 ORDER BY num )nums HAVING RowDate <= @ToDate ) `row` LEFT JOIN( SELECT p.PayDate AS 'Date', COUNT(p.PayNum) AS 'NumPayments', FORMAT(SUM(p.PayAmt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM payment p LEFT JOIN definition d ON p.PayType = d.DefNum WHERE p.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND d.ItemName = @PayType GROUP BY p.PayDate ) payment ON row.RowDate = payment.Date ORDER BY row.RowDate

request: Sum of Procedure Fees Completed in a Date Range by Provider, Clinic, and Billing Type, and a list patients with applicable production
query: SET @FromDate="2022-03-01", @ToDate="2022-03-31"; SET @Providers=""; SET @BillingTypes=""; SET @Clinics="None,Clinic 1"; SELECT IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, "All Clinics", @Clinics) AS 'Name', '' AS 'Production' UNION ALL SELECT IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, "All Providers", @Providers), '' UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m-%d-%Y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m-%d-%Y')), '' UNION ALL SELECT '', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)),0),2) FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers)) INNER JOIN definition d ON p.BillingType = d.DefNum AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(d.ItemName, @BillingTypes)) LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON p.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(cl.Abbr, "None"), @Clinics)) UNION ALL SELECT '','' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', p.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)),0),2) FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers)) INNER JOIN definition d ON p.BillingType = d.DefNum AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(d.ItemName, @BillingTypes)) LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON p.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(cl.Abbr, "None"), @Clinics)) GROUP BY p.PatNum

request: Patients with at least one of the specified @IncludeCodes completed in the specified date range who do not have any @ExcludeCodes completed in that date range
query: SET @FromDate = '2022-01-01', @ToDate = '2022-05-31'; SET @IncludeCodes = "D0150,D0120"; SET @ExcludeCodes = "D0140,D0170"; SELECT p.PatNum AS "PatID" ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS "Patient" ,MIN(incl.ProcDate) AS "FirstIncl" ,MAX(incl.ProcDate) AS "LastIncl" FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,pl.ProcDate ,pc.ProcCode ,pl.ToothNum ,pl.Surf FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@IncludeCodes) WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) incl ON incl.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl1.PatNum ,pl1.ProcDate ,pc1.ProcCode ,pl1.ToothNum ,pl1.Surf FROM procedurelog pl1 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc1 ON pl1.CodeNum = pc1.CodeNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pc1.ProcCode,@ExcludeCodes) WHERE pl1.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl1.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) excl ON excl.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE ISNULL(excl.PatNum) GROUP BY p.PatNum

request: Negative Production Report
query: SET @FromDate = '2022-01-01', @ToDate = '2022-12-31'; SELECT (CASE WHEN dup.Row = "head1" THEN "Unattached Adj" WHEN dup.Row = "head2" THEN "Neg Production" WHEN dup.Row IN ("tag","label") THEN "PatNum" WHEN dup.Row IN ("adj","prod") THEN results.PatNum ELSE " END) AS "PatNum" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Row IN ("head1", "head2", "tag", "adj") THEN "" WHEN dup.Row IN ("prod") THEN results.Date WHEN dup.Row = "label" THEN "ProcDate" ELSE " END) AS "Proc Date" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Row IN ("head1", "head2") THEN "" WHEN dup.Row = "tag" THEN "AdjDate" WHEN dup.Row IN ("adj","prod") THEN COALESCE(results.AdjDate, '') WHEN dup.Row = "label" THEN "AdjDates" ELSE " END) AS "Adj Dates" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Row IN ("head1", "head2", "tag") THEN "" WHEN dup.Row IN ("label") THEN "ProcCode" WHEN dup.Row IN ("adj","prod") THEN results.ProcCode ELSE " END) AS "ProcCode" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Row IN ("head1", "head2", "tag", "adj") THEN "" WHEN dup.Row = "prod" THEN FORMAT(results.Fee + results.WO,2) WHEN dup.Row = "label" THEN "Fee - WO" ELSE " END) AS "Fee - WO" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Row IN ("head1", "head2") THEN "" WHEN dup.Row = "tag" THEN "Adj Amount" WHEN dup.Row = "adj" THEN FORMAT(results.Adj,2) WHEN dup.Row = "prod" THEN FORMAT(results.Adj,2) WHEN dup.Row = "label" THEN "Adjustments" ELSE " END) AS "Adj Amt" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Row IN ("head1", "head2", "tag", "adj") THEN "" WHEN dup.Row = "prod" THEN FORMAT(results.Prod,2) WHEN dup.Row = "label" THEN "Total Prod" ELSE " END) AS "Tot Prod" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Row IN ("head1", "head2", "tag", "adj") THEN "" WHEN dup.Row = "prod" THEN FORMAT(results.Paid,2) WHEN dup.Row = "label" THEN "Amount Paid" ELSE " END) AS "Paid" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Row IN ("head1", "head2", "tag", "adj") THEN "" WHEN dup.Row = "prod" THEN FORMAT(results.Prod -
