results.Paid,2) WHEN dup.Row = "label" THEN "RemainingAmt" ELSE " END) AS "Rem Amt" FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT CONCAT("Adj:",adj.AdjNum) AS 'ID' ,adj.PatNum ,'' AS 'Date' ,adj.AdjDate AS 'AdjDate' ,'' AS 'ProcCode' ,0 AS 'Fee' ,adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WO' ,0 AS "Prod" ,0 AS "Paid" FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND adj.ProcNum = 0 AND adj.AdjAmt < 0 UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT("Prod:",core.ProcNum) AS "ID" ,core.PatNum ,core.ProcDate AS "Date" ,core.AdjDate ,core.ProcCode ,core.Fee AS 'Fee' ,core.Adj ,core.WO ,core.Fee + core.Adj + core.WO AS "Prod" ,core.PtPay + core.InsPay AS "Paid" FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcNum ,pl.PatNum ,pl.ProcDate ,pc.ProcCode ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.AdjDate) AS "AdjDate" ,(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cpc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cpc WHERE cpc.Status IN(7, 8) AND cpc.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'Fee' ,SUM(COALESCE(a.AdjAmt, 0)) AS "Adj" ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (0,1,4) THEN -cp.WriteOff ELSE -COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END)) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS "WO" ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS "PtPay" ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp1.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp1 WHERE cp1.Status IN (1,4) AND cp1.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS "InsPay" FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN adjustment a ON pl.ProcNum = a.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) core WHERE core.Fee + core.Adj + core.WO <= -0.005 AND core.Adj <= -0.005 AND (core.Fee + core.WO >= 0.005 OR core.Fee + core.Adj <= -0.005) ) results ON results.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "tag" AS "Row" UNION ALL SELECT "adj" UNION ALL SELECT "sep" UNION ALL SELECT "label" UNION ALL SELECT "prod" UNION ALL SELECT "head1" UNION ALL SELECT "head2" ) dup ON TRUE WHERE (CASE dup.Row WHEN "adj" THEN results.ID LIKE "adj%" WHEN "prod" THEN results.ID LIKE "prod%" ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Row IN ("tag","sep","label","head1","head2") THEN dup.Row ELSE CONCAT(dup.Row,"+",results.ID) END) ORDER BY FIELD(dup.Row,"head1","tag","adj","sep","head2","label","prod"),results.Date,results.Adj,results.Prod

request: Patients eligible for dental implants
query: SET @FromDate = '2022-07-01', @ToDate = '2022-07-18'; SET @Group1 = "D7210,D7140", @Group2 = "D5110,D5120,D5212,D5213,D5214,D5221,D5222,D5223,D5224,D5227,D5228"; SELECT pc.CodeNum INTO @Proc FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode = "D6010"; SELECT pat.Name ,pat.PatStatus ,pat.Address ,pat.Address2 ,pat.City ,pat.State ,pat.Zip ,pat.Email FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,", ",p.FName) AS "Name" ,p.PatNum ,p.PatStatus ,p.Address ,p.Address2 ,p.City ,p.State ,p.Zip ,p.Email FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment a ON p.PatNum = a.PatNum AND a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl1 ON pl1.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl1.CodeNum = @Proc AND pl1.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE p.PatStatus IN (0,2) AND ISNULL(pl1.PatNum) GROUP BY p.PatNum ) pat LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dataset.PatNum ,dataset.Teeth ,dataset.Count FROM ( SELECT ti.PatNum ,GROUP_CONCAT(ti.ToothNum) AS "Teeth" ,COUNT(ti.ToothNum) AS "Count" FROM toothinitial ti WHERE ti.InitialType = 0 AND ti.ToothNum != '' GROUP BY ti.PatNum ) dataset WHERE dataset.Count >= 5 ) missing ON missing.PatNum = pat.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Group1),pl.ToothNum,NULL)) AS "G1Count" ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Group2),pl.ProcNum,NULL)) AS "G2Count" FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND (FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Group1) OR FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Group2)) WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN (2,4) GROUP BY pl.PatNum HAVING `G1Count` >= 5 OR `G2Count` > 0 ) procs ON procs.PatNum = pat.PatNum WHERE (!ISNULL(missing.PatNum) OR !ISNULL(procs.PatNum)) GROUP BY pat.PatNum

request: Recall information for the specified patient
query: SET @PatNum = ''; SELECT core.LName ,core.FName ,core.Birthdate ,core.BillingType ,core.Email ,core.DateDue ,core.request AS "Recall Type" ,CONCAT(core.Years,'y ',core.Months,'m ',core.Weeks,'w ',core.Days,'d') AS "Interval" FROM ( SELECT p.LName, p.FName, p.BirthDate, p.BillingType, p.Email, r.DateDue, r.RecallInterval, rt.request, (r.RecallInterval & 0xFF000000) >> 24 AS 'Years', (r.RecallInterval & 0x00FF0000) >> 16 AS 'Months', (r.RecallInterval & 0x0000FF00) >> 8 AS 'Weeks', (r.RecallInterval & 0x000000FF) AS 'Days', d.ItemName AS 'RecallStatus' FROM patient p INNER JOIN recall r ON p.PatNum = r.PatNum INNER JOIN recalltype rt ON r.RecallTypeNum = rt.RecallTypeNum LEFT JOIN definition d ON r.RecallStatus = d.DefNum WHERE p.PatNum = @PatNum ) core

request:
List of insurance plans for the specified patient, where the plans have the specified carrier name. 
Carrier Names and group names are cutoff for space consideration
query: SET @CarrierName='%%'; SET @PatNum = '22'; SET @pos=0; SELECT @pos := @pos + 1 AS 'Count', a.CarrierName, a.GroupName, a.PlanType, a.PatNum AS 'Pat a.PatName, a.SubscriberID FROM ( SELECT LEFT(carrier.CarrierName, 15) AS 'CarrierName', LEFT(ip.GroupName, 15) AS 'GroupName', (CASE WHEN ip.PlanType='c' THEN 'Capitation' WHEN ip.PlanType='p' THEN 'PPO Percentage' WHEN ip.PlanType='' THEN 'Category Percentage' WHEN ip.PlanType='f' THEN 'Medicaid/Flat Copay' ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS PlanType, p.PatNum AS 'PatNum', CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,' ',p.MiddleI) AS 'PatName', ib.SubscriberId FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ip ON carrier.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient p ON pp.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND CarrierName LIKE @CarrierName AND p.PatNum = @PatNum GROUP BY pp.PatPlanNum ORDER BY ip.PlanType, CarrierName, GroupName, p.LName ) a;

request: Insurance plan breakdown for the specified patient
query: SET @Patient = "22"; SELECT ValueString INTO @BW FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenBWCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Cancer FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenCancerScreeningCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Crown FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenCrownCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Denture FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenDenturesCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Exam FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenExamCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Flo FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenFlourideCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @FullDebride FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenFullDebridementCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Imp FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenImplantCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Pano FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenPanoCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Perio FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenPerioMaintCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Prophy FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenProphyCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @Seal FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenSealantCodes"; SELECT ValueString INTO @SRP FROM preference WHERE PrefName = "InsBenSRPCodes"; SELECT (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.Carrier WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN "Pat" WHEN 4 THEN core.Pat WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS "Carrier" ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.Employer WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN "Level" WHEN 4 THEN core.CovLVL WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS "Employer" ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.FeeSched WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN "Type" WHEN 4 THEN core.BenefitType WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS "Fee Schedule" ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.GroupNum WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN "Category" WHEN 4 THEN core.Category WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS "Group Number" ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.GroupName WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN "Percentage" WHEN 4 THEN core.Percent WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS "Group Name" ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN "Amt" WHEN 4 THEN core.Amount WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS "_" ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN "Time Period" WHEN 4 THEN core.TimePeriod WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS "__" ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN "Quantity" WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT(core.Quantity,' ',core.Qualifier) WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS "___" FROM ( SELECT ip.PlanNum ,ca.CarrierName AS "Carrier" ,COALESCE(( SELECT e.EmpName FROM employer e WHERE e.EmployerNUm = ip.EmployerNum ),'') AS "Employer" ,COALESCE(( SELECT fs.request FROM feesched fs WHERE fs.FeeSchedNum = ip.FeeSched ),'') AS "FeeSched" ,ip.GroupNum ,ip.GroupName ,IF(b.CoverageLevel = 1,'X','') AS "Pat" ,(CASE b.CoverageLevel WHEN 0 THEN '' WHEN 1 THEN "Individual" WHEN 2 THEN "Family" END) AS "CovLVL" ,IF(b.Percent != -1,"%",ELT(b.BenefitType + 1,"ActiveCoverage","CoInsurance","Deductible","CoPayment","Exclusion","Limitation")) AS "BenefitType" ,COALESCE(( SELECT covcat.request FROM covcat WHERE covcat.CovCatNum = b.CovCatNum ),( SELECT (CASE WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@BW) THEN "Bitewings" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Cancer) THEN "Cancer Screenings" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Crown) THEN "Crowns" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Denture) THEN "Dentures" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Exam) THEN "Exams" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Flo) THEN "Fluoride" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@FullDebride) THEN "Full Debridement" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Imp) THEN "Implants" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Pano) THEN "Pano/FMX" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Perio) THEN "Perio Maint" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Prophy) THEN "Prophy" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Seal) THEN "Sealants" WHEN FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@SRP) THEN "SRP" ELSE CONCAT(pc.ProcCode,'-',pc.AbbrDesc) END) FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.CodeNum = b.CodeNum ),"") AS "Category" ,IF(b.Percent = -1,'',b.Percent) AS "Percent" ,IF(b.MonetaryAmt = -1,'',b.MonetaryAmt) AS "Amount" ,ELT(b.TimePeriod + 1,"","ServiceYear","CalendarYear","Lifetime","Years","NumberInLast12Months") AS "TimePeriod" ,IF(b.QuantityQualifier != 0,b.Quantity,'') AS "Quantity" ,ELT(b.QuantityQualifier + 1,"","NumberOfServices","AgeLimit","Visits","Years","Months") AS "Qualifier" ,b.BenefitNum FROM insplan ip INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan pp ON pp.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum AND pp.PatNum = @Patient INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN benefit b ON b.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum WHERE !ca.IsHidden ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS "Num" UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Num IN (1,2,3,5) THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,"+",core.PlanNum) ELSE CONCAT(dup.Num,"+",core.BenefitNum) END) ORDER BY core.PlanNum, dup.Num, IF(core.Quantity != '','

request: List of procedures that are marked "Do not usually bill to Ins". Looks at the Edit Procedure Code window under Lists>Procedure Codes.
query: SELECT pc.ProcCode ,pc.AbbrDesc ,pc.Descript FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.NoBillIns

request: Incomplete procedure notes for date range with provider. Like internal, but will also show procedures with no note. See also 302.
query: SET @FromDate= '2023-02-01', @ToDate='2023-02-14'; SELECT procedurelog.ProcDate ,procedurelog.ProvNum ,CONCAT(patient.LName,', ',patient.FName) AS 'PatientName' ,procedurecode.ProcCode ,procedurecode.AbbrDesc ,procedurelog.ToothNum ,COALESCE(LEFT(n1.Note, 30), '') AS 'First 30 characters of Note' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN patient ON procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum LEFT JOIN procnote n1 ON procedurelog.ProcNum = n1.ProcNum AND n1.EntryDateTime = ( SELECT MAX(n2.EntryDateTime) FROM procnote n2 WHERE n1.ProcNum = n2.ProcNum ) WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND (n1.Note LIKE '%""%' OR n1.Note LIKE '"%"' OR ISNULL(n1.Note)) ORDER BY procedurelog.ProvNum, procedurelog.ProcDate;

request: Patients in any status except Deceased with a birthday in a given month and day range
query: SELECT PatNum FROM patient WHERE PatStatus NOT IN (4, 5) AND SUBSTRING(Birthdate,6,5) >= "10-06" AND SUBSTRING(Birthdate,6,5) <= "10-13"

request: UTM tracking for Web Sched. See https://www.opendental.com/manual224/webschedadvanced.html "Other URL Options" section.
query: SET @FromDate = "2023-04-01", @ToDate = "2023-04-30"; SELECT COUNT(e.EServiceLogNum) AS 'Visits' ,u.CampaignName ,u.MediumInfo ,u.SourceInfo FROM eservicelog e INNER JOIN utm u ON e.FKey = u.UtmNum WHERE e.KeyType = 4 AND e.LogDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 86399 SECOND GROUP BY e.FKey;

request: Insurance and Patient Estimate Aging for specified treating providers and clinics
query: SET @AsOf=""; SET @BillingTypes=""; SET @Providers=""; SET @Clinics=""; SELECT IF(LENGTH(@AsOf) = 0, CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT CONCAT( (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('Unassigned', @Clinics) THEN '0,' ELSE '' END), COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum), '') ) FROM clinic WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @Clinics)) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT CONCAT( (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Providers) = 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('Unassigned', @Providers) THEN '0,' ELSE '' END), COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum), '') ) FROM provider WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @Providers)) INTO @ProvNums; SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion' ), 1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays' ),0) INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays; SELECT patient.PatNum, patient.PatNum AS 'Pat Num', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_0_30, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est 0-30', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_31_60, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est 31-60', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_61_90, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est 61-90', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_90, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est > 90', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_Total, 0), 2) AS 'Ins Pay Est Total', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_0_30, 0), 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal 0-30', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_31_60, 0), 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal 31-60', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_61_90, 0), 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal 61-90', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_Over90, 0), 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal > 90', FORMAT(COALESCE(pataging.Pat_Total, 0), 2) AS 'Pat Est Bal Total', FORMAT(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_Total, 0) + COALESCE(pataging.Pat_Total, 0), 2) AS 'Total Bal' FROM patient INNER JOIN patient guarantor ON guarantor.PatNum = patient.Guarantor LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate >= @AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst_0_30', SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 31 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) InsPayEst_31_60, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 61 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) InsPayEst_61_90, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate < @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst_90', SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst_Total' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1) AND cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > @AsOf)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY cp.PatNum HAVING ABS(InsPayEst_Total) >= 0.005 ) insaging ON insaging.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tSums.PatNum, CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Pat_Over90', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits <= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN tSums.Charges_61_90 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Pat_61_90', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 THEN tSums.Charges_31_60 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Pat_31_60', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 THEN tSums.Charges_0_30 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Pat_0_30', CAST(tSums.BalTotal AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Pat_Total' FROM ( SELECT trans.PatNum, SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesOver90', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_61_90', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < @AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= @AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_31_60', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate <= @AsOf AND trans.TranDate >= @AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_0_30', -SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount < 0 AND trans.TranDate <= @AsOf THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TotalCredits', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotal', SUM(trans.InsWoEst) AS 'InsWoEst', SUM(trans.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst', SUM(trans.PayPlanAmount) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType', pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey', pl.PatNum, pl.ClinicNum, pl.ProvNum, pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType', cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey', cp.PatNum, cp.ClinicNum, cp.ProvNum, (CASE WHEN cp.ProcNum = 0 THEN cp.DateCP ELSE cp.ProcDate END) AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= @AsOf THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE -cp.InsPayEst - cp.Writeoff END) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', (CASE WHEN cp.Status = 0 THEN -cp.Writeoff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst', (CASE WHEN cp.Status = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (CASE WHEN cp.ProcNum = 0 THEN cp.DateCP <= @AsOf ELSE cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf END) AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType', a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey', a.PatNum, a.ClinicNum, a.ProvNum, a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate', a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= @AsOf AND FIND_IN_SET(a.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(a.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType', ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey', ps.PatNum, ps.ClinicNum, ps.ProvNum, ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'nsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= @AsOf AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType', ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey', ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum', ppc.ClinicNum, ppc.ProvNum, ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'TranAmount', ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType', pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey', pp.PatNum, ppc.ClinicNum, ppc.ProvNum, pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate', -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp LEFT JOIN payplancharge ppc ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= @AsOf AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) GROUP BY pp.PayPlanNum UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType', ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum', ppc.ClinicNum, ppc.ProvNum, ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType', ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey', ppc.PatNum, ppc.ClinicNum, ppc.ProvNum, ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType, ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey', prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum', prodlink.ProvNum, prodlink.ClinicNum, DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, procedurelog.ProvNum, procedurelog.ClinicNum, (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee', payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', procedurelog.ProcNum, procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt', adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay', SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff', claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum, adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee, payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', 0 ProcNum, DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND ppl.SecDateTEntry < @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND FIND_IN_SET(prodlink.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(prodlink.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) ) trans GROUP BY trans.PatNum ORDER BY NULL ) tSums WHERE ABS(tSums.BalTotal) >= 0.005 ) pataging ON pataging.PatNum = patient.PatNum INNER JOIN definition billtype ON billtype.DefNum = patient.BillingType AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(billtype.ItemName, @BillingTypes)) WHERE ABS(COALESCE(insaging.InsPayEst_Total, 0) + COALESCE(pataging.Pat_Total, 0)) >= 0.005 ORDER BY guarantor.LName, guarantor.FName, guarantor.MiddleI, patient.Guarantor, patient.PatNum = patient.Guarantor DESC, patient.LName, patient.FName

request: - Medicaid Compliance Audit List. Procedures completed in a Date Range with Specified Provider for Active Patients including Claim ID
query: SET @FromDate="2023-03-01", @ToDate="2023-03-07"; SET @Provider="Doc 1"; SELECT COALESCE(CONCAT(c.ClaimNum, ' ', COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'Unassigned')),'') AS 'Unique Claim ID' ,p.PatNum AS 'Patient Number' ,CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'Patient Name' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Procedure Date' ,pc.ProcCode AS 'Procedure Code' ,pl.ToothNum AS 'Tooth' ,pc.Descript AS 'request' ,COALESCE(ca.CarrierName, GROUP_CONCAT( ( SELECT carrier.CarrierName FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 WHERE patplan.PatNum = p.PatNum ) SEPARATOR ', ') ,'') AS 'Carrier' ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider Name' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(MAX(IF(cp.Status = 4, NULL, cp.FeeBilled)), (pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits))),2) AS 'Total Amount Charged' ,FORMAT(IF(c.ClaimType = 'P',SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0),2) AS 'Total Amt Prim Ins Paid' ,FORMAT(IF(c.ClaimType = 'S',SUM(cp.InsPayAmt),0),2) AS 'Total Amt Sec Ins Paid' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND @Provider = pr.Abbr LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4) LEFT JOIN claim c ON cp.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON c.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON c.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum,c.ClaimNum

request: "Patient" status patients who are at least 18 years old who either have never had a perio chart completed or who had their last perio chart done at least the specified number of months ago
query: SET @MonthsOld = 6; SELECT mainData.Name, mainData.Birthdate FROM ( SELECT CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', p.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Name', p.Birthdate, IF(ISNULL(pe.ExamDate) OR DATE(MAX(pe.ExamDate)) < DATE(CURDATE() - INTERVAL @MonthsOld MONTH), 'Yes', 'No') AS 'Perio' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN perioexam pe ON pe.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) >= 18 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) < YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1 AND p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY p.PatNum ) mainData WHERE mainData.Perio = 'Yes'

request: Family Aging for all Open Dental versions, for all families that have a balance before insurance. Includes Estimated Family Balance.
query: SET @GuarantorClinics =""; SET @GuarantorBillingTypes =""; SET @GuarantorProviderAbbrs =""; SELECT IF(DATE(preference.ValueString) = CURDATE(), 1, 0) INTO @AgingIsCurrent FROM preference WHERE prefname = "DateLastAging"; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @GuarantorClinics); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET("Unassigned", @GuarantorClinics), "0,", ""),COALESCE(@ClinicNums, "")) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT (LENGTH(@GuarantorClinics) = 0 OR ValueString) INTO @ShowAllClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @BillingNums FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(definition.ItemName, @GuarantorBillingTypes); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @GuarantorProviderAbbrs); SELECT aging.PatNum AS "Guar Pat ,aging.PatNum AS "PatNum" ,SUM(aging.Bal_0_30) AS "$Bal_0_30" ,SUM(aging.Bal_31_60) AS "$Bal_31_60" ,SUM(aging.Bal_61_90) AS "$Bal_61_90" ,SUM(aging.BalOver90) AS "$BalOver90" ,SUM(aging.BalTotal) AS "$BalTotal" ,SUM(aging.InsWoEst) AS "$InsWoEst" ,SUM(aging.InsPayEst) AS "$InsPayEst" ,SUM(aging.FamEst) AS "$FamEst" FROM ( SELECT p.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' ,MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, CONCAT( p.LName , ',' , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', p.Preferred, '''') ELSE '' END) , ' ' , p.FName , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ), NULL)) AS 'PatName' ,MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.Bal_0_30, NULL)) AS 'Bal_0_30' ,MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.Bal_31_60, NULL)) AS 'Bal_31_60' ,MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.Bal_61_90, NULL)) AS 'Bal_61_90' ,MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.BalOver90, NULL)) AS 'BalOver90' ,MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.BalTotal, NULL)) AS 'BalTotal' ,CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cpest.InsWoEst), 0) AS DECIMAL (14, 2)) AS 'InsWoEst' ,CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cpest.InsPayEst), 0) AS DECIMAL (14, 2)) AS 'InsPayEst' ,ROUND(MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.BalTotal, NULL)) - CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cpest.InsPayEst), 0) AS DECIMAL (14, 2)) - CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cpest.InsWoEst), 0) AS DECIMAL (14, 2)), 2) AS 'FamEst' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum ,cp.WriteOff AS 'InsWoEst' ,cp.InsPayEst AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status = 0 AND cp.DateCP <= CURDATE() AND (WriteOff != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0) ) cpest ON p.PatNum = cpest.PatNum WHERE @AgingIsCurrent GROUP BY p.Guarantor HAVING (BalOver90 >= 0.005 OR Bal_61_90 >= 0.005 OR Bal_31_60 >= 0.005 OR Bal_0_30 >= 0.005 ) ORDER BY PatName ) aging INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = aging.PatNum AND (@ShowAllClinics OR FIND_IN_SET(g.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@GuarantorBillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(g.BillingType, @BillingNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@GuarantorProviderAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(g.PriProv, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY aging.PatNum UNION ALL ( SELECT "Aging needs to run. See", "https://www.opendental.com/manual/aging.html", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "" FROM DUAL WHERE NOT @AgingIsCurrent )

request: Payments in the date range separated into categories.
query: SET @FromDate = '2022-02-01', @ToDate = '2022-02-28'; SET @SecLogRecDate = (SELECT MIN(DATE(uh.DateTimeUpdated)) FROM updatehistory uh WHERE uh.ProgramVersion >= '16.4.1.0'); SELECT cats.Item AS 'Category' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(( CASE cats.Item WHEN 'Commercial Ins' THEN inspays.Amount WHEN 'Self-Pay' THEN selfpay.Amount WHEN 'OtherPatPay' THEN (COALESCE(otherpays.Amount, 0) - COALESCE(selfpay.Amount, 0)) END ), 0),2) AS Amount FROM ( SELECT 'Commercial Ins' AS Item UNION SELECT 'Self-Pay' UNION SELECT 'OtherPatPay' ) cats LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'Commercial Ins' AS Category ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS Amount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ) inspays ON inspays.Category = cats.Item LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'Self-Pay' AS 'Category' ,SUM(selfpaysraw.Amount) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT payraw.PatNum ,payraw.DatePay ,payraw.PayAmt AS 'Amount' ,(SUM((CASE WHEN adraw.Type = 'Add' THEN 1 WHEN adraw.Type = 'Drop' THEN -1 ELSE 0 END)) + COALESCE(insstartcount.PlanStartNum, 0)) AS 'Count' FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT plkc.PatNumFrom FROM patientlink plkc WHERE plkc.PatNumTo = ps.PatNum AND plkc.LinkType = 2 ),ps.PatNum) AS 'PatNum' ,ps.PayNum ,ps.DatePay ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PayAmt' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.PayNum, ps.PatNum ) payraw LEFT JOIN ( SELECT proc.PatNum ,proc.FirstAfter ,COUNT(DISTINCT cp.ClaimProcNum) AS 'PlanStartNum' FROM( SELECT plancount.PatNum ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(plancount.ProcNum ORDER BY plancount.ProcDate ASC), ',', 1) AS 'ProcNum' ,MIN(plancount.ProcDate) AS 'FirstAfter' FROM procedurelog plancount INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = plancount.PatNum AND p.SecDateEntry <= @SecLogRecDate INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = plancount.ProcNum AND cp.Status NOT IN (2,4,5) AND NOT cp.NoBillIns WHERE plancount.ProcDate >= @SecLogRecDate AND plancount.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY plancount.PatNum ) proc INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = proc.ProcNum AND cp.Status NOT IN (2,4,5) AND NOT cp.NoBillIns GROUP BY proc.PatNum ) insstartcount ON insstartcount.PatNum = payraw.PatNum LEFT JOIN( SELECT 'Add' AS 'Type' ,insa.PatNum ,insa.LogDateTime AS 'DateT' FROM securitylog insa WHERE insa.PermType IN (128) AND insa.LogText REGEXP 'Inserted new PatPlan for Patient' AND insa.LogDateTime BETWEEN @SecLogRecDate AND @ToDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Drop' AS 'Type' ,insd.PatNum ,insd.LogDateTime AS 'DateT' FROM securitylog insd WHERE insd.PermType IN (110) AND insd.LogText REGEXP 'was dropped' AND insd.LogDateTime BETWEEN @SecLogRecDate AND @ToDate ORDER BY PatNum, DateT ) adraw ON adraw.PatNum = payraw.PatNum AND adraw.DateT <= payraw.DatePay + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND IF(ISNULL(insstartcount.PatNum), TRUE, DATE(adraw.DateT) > insstartcount.FirstAfter) GROUP BY payraw.PatNum, payraw.PayNum HAVING `Count` <= 0 ) selfpaysraw ) selfpay ON cats.Item IN ('OtherPatPay','Self-Pay') LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'OtherPatPay' AS Category ,SUM(ppays.SplitAmt) AS Amount FROM paysplit ppays WHERE ppays.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) otherpays ON otherpays.Category = cats.Item ORDER BY FIELD(cats.Item, 'Commercial Ins','Self-Pay','OtherPatPay')

request: Appointment Average Wait Time by Assistant With Specified Hygienist, Provider, and Assistant Completed in Date Range
query: SET @Provider = ''; SET @Hygienist = ''; SET @Assistant = ''; SET @FromDate = '2022-03-01', @ToDate = '2022-03-31'; SET @Assistant = REPLACE(@Assistant,', ',','); SET @Provider = REPLACE(@Provider,', ',','); SET @Hygienist = REPLACE(@Hygienist,', ',','); SELECT CONCAT(emp.FName, ' ',LEFT(emp.LName, 1)) AS 'Assistant' ,ROUND(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(a.DateTimeSeated)-TIME_TO_SEC(a.DateTimeArrived))/COUNT(DISTINCT(a.AptNum))/60) AS 'AverageWaitTime' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN employee emp ON a.Assistant = emp.EmployeeNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT userod.EmployeeNum FROM userod WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Assistant) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(userod.UserName, @Assistant)) GROUP BY userod.EmployeeNum ) username ON username.EmployeeNum = emp.EmployeeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON a.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Provider)) LEFT JOIN provider hyg ON a.ProvHyg = hyg.ProvNum WHERE a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND IF(LENGTH(@Hygienist) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(hyg.Abbr, @Hygienist)) AND DATE_FORMAT(a.DateTimeArrived, '%T') <> '00:00:00' AND DATE_FORMAT(a.DateTimeSeated, '%T') <> '00:00:00' GROUP BY a.Assistant

request: List of patients with an appointment scheduled for the specified date, showing information about forms.
query: SET @Date ="2023-06-28"; SET @RegFormNames ="Registration Form"; SET @MedHxFormNames ="Medical History"; SET @HIPAAFormNames ="HIPAA"; SET @FinancialFormNames ="Financial Agreement"; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(apt.AptDateTime), '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Appt Date' ,TIME(MIN(apt.AptDateTime)) AS 'Appt Time' ,CONCAT( UPPER(SUBSTRING(p.FName, 1, 1)) ,SUBSTRING(p.FName, 2, LENGTH(p.FName)-1) ,' ' ,UPPER(SUBSTRING(p.LName, 1, 1)) ,SUBSTRING(p.LName, 2, LENGTH(p.LName)-1) ) AS 'Patient Name' ,COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(NULLIF(p.Birthdate, '0001-01-01'), '%m/%d/%Y'), '') AS 'DOB' ,COALESCE(forms.RegForm, 'N') AS 'Registration Form' ,COALESCE(forms.MedHForm, 'N') AS 'Medical History Form' ,COALESCE(forms.HIPAAForm, 'N') AS 'HIPAA Form' ,COALESCE(forms.FinAgrForm, 'N') AS 'Financial Form' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = apt.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT st.PatNum ,MAX(IF( st.DateTimeSheet BETWEEN @Date - INTERVAL 1 YEAR AND DATE(@Date) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND FIND_IN_SET(st.request, @RegFormNames) ,'Y' ,'N' )) AS 'RegForm' ,MAX(IF( st.DateTimeSheet BETWEEN @Date - INTERVAL 1 YEAR AND DATE(@Date) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND FIND_IN_SET(st.request, @MedHxFormNames) ,'Y' ,'N' )) AS 'MedHForm' ,MAX(IF( FIND_IN_SET(st.request, @HIPAAFormNames) ,'Y' ,'N' )) AS 'HIPAAForm' ,MAX(IF( FIND_IN_SET(st.request, @FinancialFormNames) ,'Y' ,'N' )) AS 'FinAgrForm' FROM sheet st WHERE NOT st.IsDeleted GROUP BY st.PatNum ) forms ON forms.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@Date) AND DATE(@Date) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus = 1 AND ( COALESCE(forms.RegForm, 'N') = 'N' OR COALESCE(forms.MedHForm, 'N') = 'N' ) GROUP BY apt.PatNum

request: Count of Active Patients with current insurance using specified insurance Fee Schedules, seen in the last 3 years
query: SET @FeeSchedules=""; SELECT fs.request AS 'Fee Schedule', COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(p.PatNum)) AS 'Count' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum=pp.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal=1 INNER JOIN inssub iss ON iss.InsSubNum=pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=iss.PlanNum INNER JOIN appointment a ON p.PatNum=a.PatNum AND a.AptStatus=2 AND a.AptDateTime > (CURDATE()-INTERVAL 3 YEAR) WHERE p.PatStatus=0 AND fs.FeeSchedNum=ip.FeeSched ),0) AS 'Patient Count' FROM feesched fs WHERE IF(LENGTH(@FeeSchedules)= 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(fs.request, @FeeSchedules)) GROUP BY fs.FeeSchedNum HAVING `Patient Count` > 0

request: Completed procedures within the specified date range with no procedure note
query: SET @FromDate = '2023-06-01', @ToDate = '2023-06-30'; SELECT p.PatNum ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' ,plog.ProcDate ,plog.ToothNum ,pc.ProcCode FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog plog ON plog.PatNum = p.PatNum AND plog.ProcStatus = 2 AND plog.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON plog.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcNum ,pl.PatNum ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pn.Note ORDER BY pn.EntryDateTime DESC SEPARATOR '|++|'),'|++|',1) AS 'LastNote' ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pn.EntryDateTime ORDER BY pn.EntryDateTime DESC SEPARATOR '|++|'),'|++|',1) AS 'LastEntry' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procnote pn ON pl.ProcNum = pn.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) procNotes ON procNotes.PatNum = plog.PatNum AND procNotes.ProcNum = plog.ProcNum WHERE (ISNULL(procNotes.ProcNum) OR procNotes.LastNote = '') GROUP BY plog.ProcNum ORDER BY plog.ProcDate, p.PatNum, plog.ProcNum

request: Production and income report for the specified date range and provider, with daily breakdown and overall totals
query: SET @FromDate="2024-09-01", @ToDate="2024-09-30"; SET @Provider="Doc1"; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,core.ProcDate,'') AS "Date" ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.Patient WHEN dup.Num = 2 THEN "Daily Total" WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN "Provider Total" END) AS "Patient" ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Descript,'') AS "Proc request" ,IF(dup.NUm = 1,core.Abbr,'') AS "Prov" ,IF(dup.Num = 1,COALESCE(core.PriCar,''), '') AS "Pri Carrier" ,IF(dup.Num = 1,COALESCE(core.SecCar,'') ,'') AS "Sec Carrier" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod),2) AS "Production" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PriEst),2) AS "Pri Ins Est" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.SecEst),2) AS "Sec Ins Est" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod) + SUM(core.Adj) - SUM(core.Wo) - SUM(core.PriEst) - SUM(core.SecEst),2) AS "Patient Est" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Wo),2) AS "Writeoff" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Adj),2) AS "Adjustments" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PriPay),2) AS "Pri Ins Paid" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.SecPay),2) AS "Sec Ins Paid" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PatPay),2) AS "Pat Paid" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PriPay) + SUM(core.SecPay) + SUM(core.PatPay),2) AS "Total Paid" ,FORMAT(SUM(IF(!core.PriRec,core.PriEst,0)),2) AS "Pri Ins Rem" ,FORMAT(SUM(IF(!core.SecRec,core.SecEst,0)),2) AS "Sec Ins Rem" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod) + SUM(core.Adj) - SUM(core.Wo) - (SUM(core.PriPay) + SUM(core.SecPay) + SUM(core.PatPay)) - SUM(IF(!core.PriRec,core.PriEst,0)) - SUM(IF(!core.SecRec,core.SecEst,0)),2) AS "Pat Remaining" ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod) + SUM(core.Adj) - SUM(core.Wo) - (SUM(core.PriPay) + SUM(core.SecPay) + SUM(core.PatPay)),2) AS "Remaining Unpaid" FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' ,pl.ProcDate ,pl.ProcNum ,pc.Descript ,pr.Abbr ,pl.ProvNum ,GROUP_CONCAT(IF(!ISNULL(c.ClaimNum) AND c.ClaimType = "P" ,( SELECT ca.CarrierName FROM carrier ca INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum WHERE ip.PlanNum = c.PlanNum ) ,NULL)) AS "PriCar" ,GROUP_CONCAT(IF(!ISNULL(c.ClaimNum) AND c.ClaimType = "S" ,( SELECT ca.CarrierName FROM carrier ca INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum WHERE ip.PlanNum = c.PlanNum ) ,NULL)) AS "SecCar" ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS "Prod" ,SUM(IF(!ISNULL(c.ClaimNum) AND c.ClaimType = "P" ,cp.InsPayEst,0)) AS "PriEst" ,SUM(IF(!ISNULL(c.ClaimNum) AND c.ClaimType = "S" ,cp.InsPayEst,0)) AS "SecEst" ,SUM(IF(!ISNULL(c.ClaimNum) ,(CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (0,1,4) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END) ,0)) AS "Wo" ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(a.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment a WHERE a.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS "Adj" ,SUM(IF(!ISNULL(c.ClaimNum) AND c.ClaimType = "P" ,cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS "PriPay" ,SUM(IF(!ISNULL(c.ClaimNum) AND c.ClaimType = "S" ,cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS "SecPay" ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS "PatPay" ,SUM(IF(c.ClaimType = "P" AND c.ClaimStatus = "R",1,0)) AS "PriRec" ,SUM(IF(c.ClaimType = "S" AND c.ClaimStatus = "R",1,0)) AS "SecRec" FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr = @Provider LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6) LEFT JOIN claim c ON cp.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS "Num" UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,'+', core.ProcNum) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',core.ProcDate) WHEN 3 THEN dup.Num END) ORDER BY IF(dup.Num = 3,1,0),core.ProcDate, dup.Num, core.Patient, core.patNum

request: Broken appointments with appointment date in date range showing user that broke the appointment
query: SET @FromDate='2025-10-01', @ToDate='2025-10-31'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'ApptDate' , DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%h:%i %p') AS 'ApptTime' , (CASE WHEN a.IsNewPatient=1 THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS 'NewPatient' , p.PatNum AS 'Pat , p.PatNum , (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) > 140 THEN '' ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, CURDATE()) END) AS 'Age' , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'Procedure' , a.Note , DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%b') AS 'Month' , DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%W') AS 'DayofWeek' , usr.UserName AS 'UserName' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.FKey = a.AptNum AND sl.PermType = 27 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%Broken%' INNER JOIN userod usr ON usr.UserNum = sl.UserNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = a.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY - INTERVAL 1 SECOND AND a.AptStatus = 5 GROUP BY a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, p.LName, p.FName

request:
Aging for patients with a positive balance before insurance. Has a row for all patient portions (Self-Pay) and for each carrier name associated with a patient in the Self-Pay row.
	- Only accurate for Open Dental versions 21.1 and above, if the Account Preference "Transactions Attached to a procedure offset each other before aging" is not checked.
	- Runs for "Any Balance".
	- Automatically considers the payment plan aging setting.
query: SET @AsOf =""; SET @AgingLevel = "Patient"; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays'),0) INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'),1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT display.Type AS "Carrier", FORMAT(SUM(display.Bal_0_30), 2) AS "Bal_0_30", FORMAT(SUM(display.Bal_31_60), 2) AS "Bal_31_60", FORMAT(SUM(display.Bal_61_90), 2) AS "Bal_61_90", FORMAT(SUM(display.BalOver90), 2) AS "BalOver90", FORMAT(SUM(display.BalTotal), 2) AS "BalTotal" FROM ( SELECT (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Self-Pay' THEN dup.Type WHEN 'Carrier' THEN carrAge.CarrierName WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'Type' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Self-Pay' THEN aging.Bal_0_30 - SUM(COALESCE(carrAge.Ins0to30,0)) WHEN 'Carrier' THEN carrAge.Ins0to30 WHEN 'Total' THEN aging.Bal_0_30 END) AS 'Bal_0_30' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Self-Pay' THEN aging.Bal_31_60 - SUM(COALESCE(carrAge.Ins31to60,0)) WHEN 'Carrier' THEN carrAge.Ins31to60 WHEN 'Total' THEN aging.Bal_31_60 END) AS 'Bal_31_60' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Self-Pay' THEN aging.Bal_61_90 - SUM(COALESCE(carrAge.Ins61to90,0)) WHEN 'Carrier' THEN carrAge.Ins61to90 WHEN 'Total' THEN aging.Bal_61_90 END) AS 'Bal_61_90' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Self-Pay' THEN aging.BalOver90 - SUM(COALESCE(carrAge.InsOver90,0)) WHEN 'Carrier' THEN carrAge.InsOver90 WHEN 'Total' THEN aging.BalOver90 END) AS 'BalOver90' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Self-Pay' THEN aging.BalTotal - SUM(COALESCE(carrAge.InsBalTotal,0)) WHEN 'Carrier' THEN carrAge.InsBalTotal WHEN 'Total' THEN aging.BalTotal END) AS 'BalTotal' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum ,guarAging.Bal_0_30 ,guarAging.Bal_31_60 ,guarAging.Bal_61_90 ,guarAging.BalOver90 ,guarAging.BalTotal FROM ( SELECT tSums.PatNum, CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'BalOver90', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits <= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN tSums.Charges_61_90 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_61_90', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 THEN tSums.Charges_31_60 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_31_60', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 THEN tSums.Charges_0_30 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_0_30', CAST(tSums.BalTotal AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'BalTotal' ,tSums.TotalCredits, CAST(tSums.BalTotalBI AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'BalTotalBI' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = "Patient" THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) AS 'PatNum', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate <= @AsOf - INTERVAL 91 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesOver90', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 61 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_61_90', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 31 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_31_60', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND @AsOf THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_0_30', -SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount < 0 AND trans.TranDate <= @AsOf THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TotalCredits', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 AND trans.TranDate <= @AsOf THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotal', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 AND trans.TranDate <= @AsOf THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotalBI' FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType', pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey', pl.PatNum, pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate', pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType', cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey', cp.PatNum, cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', (CASE WHEN cp.Status = 0 THEN -cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst', (CASE WHEN cp.Status = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType', a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey', a.PatNum, a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate', a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType', ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey', ps.PatNum, ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'nsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType', ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey', ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', 0 AS 'TranAmount', ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType', pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey', pp.PatNum, pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate', -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType', ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum', ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType', ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey', ppc.PatNum, ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate', -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType, ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey', prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum', DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate', (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount', 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount', 0 AS 'InsWoEst', 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee', payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', procedurelog.ProcNum, procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt', adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum ) procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay', SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff', claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum ) procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum ) procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee, payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', 0 ProcNum, DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) ) trans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = trans.PatNum GROUP BY (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = "Patient" THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) ORDER BY NULL ) tSums ) guarAging INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=guarAging.PatNum WHERE guarAging.BalTotalBI > 0.005 ) aging LEFT JOIN ( SELECT estins.PatNum, estins.CarrierName, SUM(Ins0to30) AS 'Ins0to30', SUM(Ins30to60) AS 'Ins31to60', SUM(Ins60to90) AS 'Ins61to90', SUM(InsOver90) AS 'InsOver90', SUM(InsPayEst + InsWoEst) AS 'InsBalTotal' FROM ( SELECT cp.ClaimNum ,cp.ProcDate ,ip.PlanNum ,ca.CarrierName ,cp.PatNum ,IF((TO_DAYS(@AsOf)-TO_DAYS(cp.ProcDate))> 90,(cp.InsPayEst + cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'InsOver90' ,IF((TO_DAYS(@AsOf)-TO_DAYS(cp.ProcDate))> 60,IF((TO_DAYS(@AsOf)-TO_DAYS(cp.ProcDate))<= 90, (cp.InsPayEst + cp.WriteOff),0),0) AS 'Ins60to90' ,IF((TO_DAYS(@AsOf)-TO_DAYS(cp.ProcDate))> 30,IF((TO_DAYS(@AsOf)-TO_DAYS(cp.ProcDate))<= 60, (cp.InsPayEst + cp.WriteOff),0),0) AS 'Ins30to60' ,IF((TO_DAYS(@AsOf)-TO_DAYS(cp.ProcDate))<= 30,(cp.InsPayEst + cp.WriteOff),0) AS 'Ins0to30' ,cp.WriteOff AS 'InsWoEst' ,cp.InsPayEst AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum=cp.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum=ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.Status = 0 AND cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf HAVING InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 ) estins GROUP BY estins.PatNum, estins.CarrierName ) carrAge ON carrAge.PatNum = aging.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'Self-Pay' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Carrier' UNION SELECT 'Total' ) dup ON (dup.Type IN('Self-Pay','Total') OR carrAge.PatNum = aging.PatNum) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Self-Pay' THEN CONCAT(aging.PatNum, ', ', dup.Type) WHEN dup.Type = 'Carrier' THEN CONCAT(aging.PatNum, ', ', dup.Type, ', ', carrAge.CarrierName) WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN CONCAT(aging.PatNum, ', ', dup.Type) END) ORDER BY dup.Type DESC, aging.patnum ) display GROUP BY display.Type ORDER BY FIELD(display.Type, 'Self-Pay', ''), display.Type;

request: Preauthorization Tracking, Preautorizations with a 'Date Sent' in the Specified Date Range and Attached to One of the Specified Clinics
query: SET @FromDate='2023-06-01', @ToDate='2023-09-30'; SET @Clinics='Clinic 1,Clinic 2'; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') ELSE '' END) AS 'Clinic' , p.PatNum , p.PatNum AS 'PatientNum' , DATE_FORMAT(cl.DateSent,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'DateSent' , (CASE WHEN cl.ClaimStatus='U' THEN 'Unsent' WHEN cl.ClaimStatus='H' THEN 'Hold until Pri Received' WHEN cl.ClaimStatus='W' THEN 'Waiting in Queue' WHEN cl.ClaimStatus='P' THEN 'Probably Sent' WHEN cl.ClaimStatus='S' THEN 'Sent' WHEN cl.ClaimStatus='R' THEN 'Received' ELSE '' END) AS 'Status' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN patient p ON cl.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE cl.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cl.ClaimType = 'PreAuth' AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY cl.ClaimNum ORDER BY c.ClinicNum, p.PatNum, cl.DateSent

request: Troubleshooting Query - Received and Supplemental insurance payments attached to procedures that are not in Complete status, (optionally) for patients with a specified guarantor.
query: SET @GuarantorPatNums = ''; SELECT cp.PatNum , pc.ProcCode , cp.DateCP AS 'PayDate' , claim.DateService AS 'ServiceDate' , pl.ProcStatus , (pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) AS 'ProcFee' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND NOT pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN claim ON cp.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum WHERE cp.Status IN(1, 4) AND IF(LENGTH(@GuarantorPatNums) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.Guarantor, @PatNums))

request: Provider Procedure Metrics
query: SET @FromDate='2023-09-01', @ToDate='2023-09-30'; SET @Providers=''; SET @ProcedureCodes=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.CodeNum) INTO @ProcCodeNums FROM procedurecode WHERE FIND_IN_SET(procedurecode.ProcCode, @ProcedureCodes); SELECT COUNT(procedurelog.ProcNum) INTO @TotalCount FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @Providers)) WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate; SELECT (CASE dup.RowType WHEN 'ProvCode' THEN procedurecode.ProcCode WHEN 'Spacer' THEN 'SubTotals' WHEN 'GrandTot' THEN 'Grand Total' ELSE '' END) AS 'Procedure Code' ,(CASE dup.RowType WHEN 'ProvCode' THEN provider.Abbr WHEN 'ProvSub' THEN provider.Abbr ELSE '' END) AS 'Provider' ,(CASE dup.RowType WHEN 'Spacer' THEN '' ELSE SUM(codeinfo.CountComp) END )AS 'Count Done' ,(CASE dup.RowType WHEN 'Spacer' THEN '' ELSE CAST(SUM(codeinfo.ProcFee) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) END) AS 'Gross Production' ,(CASE dup.RowType WHEN 'Spacer' THEN '' ELSE CAST(SUM(codeinfo.ProcFee + codeinfo.ProcAdj - codeinfo.ProcWO) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) END) AS 'Net Production' ,(CASE dup.RowType WHEN 'Spacer' THEN '' WHEN 'ProvCode' THEN CONCAT(FORMAT((SUM(codeinfo.CountComp)/allcomp.CountAllComp * 100), 1), '%') ELSE CONCAT(FORMAT((SUM(codeinfo.CountComp)/@TotalCount * 100), 1), '%') END) AS 'Percent of Total' FROM provider INNER JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.ProvNum ,procedurelog.CodeNum ,COUNT(procedurelog.ProcNum) AS 'CountComp' ,SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits)) AS 'ProcFee' ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum ), 0)) ProcAdj ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN(6, 8) THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(claimproc.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) WHEN claimproc.Status IN(0, 1, 4, 5, 7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff END)) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.status IN(0,1,4,5,6,7) ), 0)) ProcWO FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcedureCodes)= 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.CodeNum, @ProcCodeNums)) GROUP BY procedurelog.ProvNum, procedurelog.CodeNum ) codeinfo ON codeinfo.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = codeinfo.CodeNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.CodeNum , COUNT(pl.ProcNum) AS 'CountAllComp' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.CodeNum ) AS allcomp ON allcomp.CodeNum = codeinfo.CodeNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'ProvCode' AS RowType UNION SELECT 'ProvSub' UNION SELECT 'GrandTot' UNION SELECT 'Spacer' ) dup ON TRUE WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @Providers)) GROUP BY dup.RowType, IF(dup.RowType NOT IN ('GrandTot', 'Spacer'), provider.ProvNum, 0), IF(dup.RowType = 'ProvCode', codeinfo.CodeNum, NULL) ORDER BY FIELD(dup.RowType, 'ProvCode', 'Spacer', 'ProvSub','GrandTot'), procedurecode.ProcCode, provider.ProvNum

request: Payment plan overcharged procedures needing manual correction
query: SELECT p.PatNum, CONCAT(def.ItemName,' (', def.DefNum, ')') AS 'BillingType', GROUP_CONCAT(a.ProcDate) AS 'ProcDate', GROUP_CONCAT(a.ProcCode) AS 'ProcCode', ROUND(SUM(IF(!ISNULL(a.ProcDate), a.Amount, 0)),2) AS 'ProcFee', ROUND(SUM(a.Amount),2) AS 'AmountOver', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.Ins), 'No') AS 'ClaimRelated', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.IsClosed) AS 'Closed', COUNT(DISTINCT a.PayPlanNum) AS 'PlanQty' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcNum, pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, NULL AS 'Ins', pl.PatNum, pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'Amount', NULL AS 'Isclosed', NULL AS 'PayPlanNum' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum WHERE pl.ProcNum IN(SELECT ppc.ProcNum FROM payplancharge ppc) UNION ALL SELECT cp.ProcNum, NULL, NULL, 'Yes' AS 'Ins', cp.PatNum, -(cp.InsPayAmt+cp.Writeoff) AS 'Amount', NULL, NULL FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum IN(SELECT ppc.ProcNum FROM payplancharge ppc) AND cp.Status IN(1,4) UNION ALL SELECT ppc.ProcNum, NULL, NULL, NULL, ppc.PatNum, -(ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest) AS 'Amount', IF(pp.IsClosed,'Yes','No') AS 'IsClosed', pp.PayPlanNum FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum )a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN definition def ON p.BillingType = def.DefNum WHERE a.ProcNum > 0 GROUP BY a.ProcNum HAVING AmountOver < 0 ORDER BY p.BillingType, a.PatNum, a.ProcDate

request: Aging of Outstanding Insurance Claims
query: SET @AsOf = '2023-08-16'; SET @Clinics = ''; SET @Providers = ''; SET @BillingTypes = ''; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT IF(LENGTH(@AsOf) = 0,CURDATE(), @AsOf) INTO @AsOf; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Clinic,'') AS 'Clinic' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Patient,'') AS 'Patient' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.PatNum,'') AS 'Patient ID ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Birthdate,'') AS 'Date of Birth' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.DateService,'') AS 'Date of Service' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Provider,'') AS 'Treating Provider' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.NPI,'') AS 'Treating Provider NPI' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 ,( SELECT d.ItemName FROM definition d WHERE d.DefNum = core.Specialty ) ,'') AS 'Treating Provider Specialty' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.CarrierName,'') AS 'Carrier' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.SubscriberID,'') AS 'Subscriber ID' ,FORMAT((CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.est0to30 ELSE SUM(core.est0to30) END),2) AS 'Ins Pay Est 0-30' ,FORMAT((CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.est31to60 ELSE SUM(core.est31to60) END),2) AS 'Ins Pay Est 31-60' ,FORMAT((CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.est61to90 ELSE SUM(core.est61to90) END),2) AS 'Ins Pay Est 61-90' ,FORMAT((CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.estOver90 ELSE SUM(core.estOver90) END),2) AS 'Ins Pay Est >90' ,FORMAT((CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.estPay ELSE SUM(core.estPay) END),2) AS 'Ins Pay Est Total' FROM ( SELECT c.ClaimNum ,(CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') ELSE '' END) AS 'Clinic' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName,IF(LENGTH(p.MiddleI) = 0,'',CONCAT(', ',p.MiddleI))) AS 'Patient' ,c.PatNum ,p.Birthdate ,c.DateService ,CONCAT(pr.FName,' ',pr.LName) AS 'Provider' ,pr.NationalProvID AS 'NPI' ,pr.Specialty ,ca.CarrierName ,ib.SubscriberID ,SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,pl.ProcDate,@AsOf) BETWEEN 0 AND 30,cp.InsPayEst,0)) AS 'est0to30' ,SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,pl.ProcDate,@AsOf) BETWEEN 31 AND 60,cp.InsPayEst,0)) AS 'est31to60' ,SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,pl.ProcDate,@AsOf) BETWEEN 61 AND 90,cp.InsPayEst,0)) AS 'est61to90' ,SUM(IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,pl.ProcDate,@AsOf) > 90,cp.InsPayEst,0)) AS 'estOver90' ,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS 'estPay' FROM claim c INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON c.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1) AND IF(cp.Status = 1,cp.DateCP > @AsOf,TRUE) INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND pl.ProcDate <= @AsOf INNER JOIN inssub ib ON c.InsSubNum = ib.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patient p ON c.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON p.BillingType = def.DefNum AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemName,@BillingTypes)) INNER JOIN provider pr ON c.ProvTreat = pr.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum WHERE (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY c.ClaimNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'|',core.ClaimNum),dup.Num)

request: Daily P&I For Specific Users Filtering On Entry Date Or Transaction Date
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-18'; SET @EntryOrTrans = 'Entry'; SET @User = 'Admin,Regular'; SELECT (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN result.EntryDate WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'Entry Date' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN result.Date WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'Transaction Date' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN result.User WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'User' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN IF(result.ClaimNumCount > 1,CONCAT(result.PatName,'*'),result.PatName) WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'Patient Name' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN result.PatNum WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'Patient ID' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN result.TransType WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'TransactionType' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN result.request WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'request' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN IF(result.ProvNumCount > 1,'Multiple',result.Provider) WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'Provider' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN result.CheckNum WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(result.Type,':',-1) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN result.TransType END) AS 'Check ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(result.Amt,2) WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(result.Amt),0),2) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(result.Amt),0),2) END) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT DATE(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' ,CONCAT(pc.ProcCode,':',pc.AbbrDesc) AS 'request' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'Amt' ,'Procedure' AS 'TransType' ,pl.DateEntryC AS 'EntryDate' ,p.PatNum ,'' AS 'CheckNum' ,1 AS 'ProvNumCount' ,'' AS 'Type' ,pl.ProcNum AS 'RowNum' ,CONCAT(1,pl.ProcNum) AS 'TransOrder' ,IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown') AS 'User' ,NULL AS 'ClaimNumCount' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN userod uo ON pl.SecUserNumEntry = uo.UserNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = '2' AND (CASE @EntryOrTrans WHEN 'Trans' THEN pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHEN 'Entry' THEN pl.DateEntryC BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate END) AND IF(LENGTH(@User) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown'),@User)) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' ,adjtype.ItemName AS 'request' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj' ,'Adjustment' AS 'TransType' ,adj.DateEntry AS 'EntryDate' ,p.PatNum ,'' AS 'CheckNum' ,1 AS 'ProvNumCount' ,CONCAT('3A',':',adjtype.ItemName) AS 'Type' ,adj.AdjNum AS 'RowNum' ,CONCAT(2,adj.AdjNum) AS 'TransOrder' ,IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown') AS 'User' ,NULL AS 'ClaimNumCount' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = adj.PatNum INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum = adj.AdjType INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = adj.ProvNum LEFT JOIN userod uo ON adj.SecUserNumEntry = uo.UserNum WHERE (CASE @EntryOrTrans WHEN 'Trans' THEN adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHEN 'Entry' THEN adj.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate END) AND IF(LENGTH(@User) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown'),@User)) UNION ALL SELECT cp.DateCP AS 'Date' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' ,CONCAT(pc.ProcCode,':','Writeoff',':',car.CarrierName) AS 'request' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,-SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'InsW' ,'Writeoff' AS 'TransType' ,DATE(claimpay.SecDateEntry) AS 'EntryDate' ,p.PatNum ,'' AS 'CheckNum' ,COUNT(DISTINCT cp.ProvNum) AS 'ProvNumCount' ,'' AS 'Type' ,CONCAT('W',cp.ClaimPaymentNum) AS 'RowNum' ,CONCAT(5,cp.ClaimPaymentNum) AS 'TransOrder' ,IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown') AS 'User' ,COUNT(DISTINCT cp.ClaimNum) AS 'ClaimNumCount' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON cp.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum=cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum LEFT JOIN userod uo ON claimpay.SecUserNumEntry = uo.UserNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND (CASE @EntryOrTrans WHEN 'Trans' THEN cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHEN 'Entry' THEN claimpay.SecDateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate END) AND IF(LENGTH(@User) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown'),@User)) GROUP BY claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum UNION ALL SELECT ps.DatePay AS 'Date' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' ,paytype.ItemName AS 'request' ,IF(ps.ProvNum = 0, 'Unearned', prov.Abbr) AS 'Provider' ,-SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PtInc' ,'Patient Payment' AS 'TransType' ,ps.DateEntry AS 'EntryDate' ,p.PatNum ,pay.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' ,1 AS 'ProvNumCount' ,CONCAT('1P',':',paytype.ItemName,'(Pat)') AS 'Type' ,ps.SplitNum AS 'RowNum' ,CONCAT(3,ps.SplitNum) AS 'TransOrder' ,IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown') AS 'User' ,NULL AS 'ClaimNumCount' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ps.PatNum INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum INNER JOIN definition paytype ON pay.PayType = paytype.DefNum LEFT JOIN userod uo ON ps.SecUserNumEntry = uo.UserNum LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum WHERE (CASE @EntryOrTrans WHEN 'Trans' THEN pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHEN 'Entry' THEN ps.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate END) AND pay.PayType != 0 AND IF(LENGTH(@User) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown'),@User)) GROUP BY ps.SplitNum UNION ALL SELECT claimpay.CheckDate AS 'Date' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' ,CONCAT(d.ItemName,':',car.CarrierName) AS 'request' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,-SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' ,'Insurance Payment' AS 'TransType' ,DATE(claimpay.SecDateEntry) AS 'EntryDate' ,p.PatNum ,claimpay.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' ,COUNT(DISTINCT cp.ProvNum) AS 'ProvNumCount' ,CONCAT('2I',':',IF(d.Category != 32,'Invalid',d.ItemName),'(Ins)') AS 'Type' ,CONCAT('I',cp.ClaimPaymentNum) AS 'RowNum' ,CONCAT(4,cp.ClaimPaymentNum) AS 'TransOrder' ,IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown') AS 'User' ,COUNT(DISTINCT cp.ClaimNum) AS 'ClaimNumCount' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimpayment claimpay ON claimpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition d ON claimpay.PayType = d.DefNum LEFT JOIN userod uo ON claimpay.SecUserNumEntry = uo.UserNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND (CASE @EntryOrTrans WHEN 'Trans' THEN cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate WHEN 'Entry' THEN claimpay.SecDateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate END) AND IF(LENGTH(@User) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(uo.UserName,'Unknown'),@User)) GROUP BY cp.ClaimPaymentNum ) result INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 ) dup ON TRUE WHERE (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN TRUE WHEN 2 THEN TRUE WHEN 3 THEN result.TransType IN ('Adjustment','Insurance Payment','Patient Payment') WHEN 4 THEN TRUE WHEN 5 THEN TRUE END) GROUP BY (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN result.RowNum WHEN 2 THEN dup.Num WHEN 3 THEN result.Type WHEN 4 THEN dup.Num WHEN 5 THEN result.TransType END) ORDER BY dup.Num,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(IF(@EntryOrTrans = 'Entry',result.EntryDate,result.Date),result.PatName,result.request,result.Provider) WHEN 2 THEN dup.Num WHEN 3 THEN result.Type WHEN 4 THEN dup.Num WHEN 5 THEN result.TransOrder END)

request: Payments Entered by Users per claim, check, and clinic
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-30'; SET @Clinic=''; SET @User=''; SET @GroupByCheck=''; SET @ClinicUse=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinic)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@Clinic,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @UserUse=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@User)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@User,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @Unique=0; SELECT IF(@UserUse ='^','All',REPLACE(@User,'$','')) AS 'User' ,'' AS 'Account' ,DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate,'%m/%d/%y') AS 'Patient' ,DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate,'%m/%d/%y') AS 'PayType' ,'' AS 'DatePaid','' AS 'DateEntered','' AS 'Amt','' AS 'CheckNum','' AS 'CarrierName' ,IF(@ClinicUse='^','All',REPLACE(@Clinic,'$','')) AS 'Clinic' UNION ALL SELECT '','','','','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT result.User ,result.Account ,result.Patient ,result.PayType ,result.DatePaid ,result.DateEntered ,result.Amt ,result.CheckNum ,result.CarrierName ,result.Clinic FROM ( SELECT dup.Num AS 'ItemOrder' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN userpay.User WHEN 3 THEN userpay.User WHEN 5 THEN userpay.User WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN userpay.User WHEN 11 THEN '' END) AS 'User' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN userpay.Account WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' END) AS 'Account' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN userpay.Patient WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' END) AS 'Patient' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN userpay.PayType WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN userpay.PayType WHEN 11 THEN '' END) AS 'PayType' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN DATE_FORMAT(userpay.DatePaid,'%m/%d/%y') WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' END) AS 'DatePaid' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN DATE_FORMAT(userpay.DateEntered,'%m/%d/%y') WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' END) AS 'DateEntered' ,FORMAT((CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN userpay.Amt WHEN 3 THEN SUM(userpay.Amt) WHEN 5 THEN SUM(userpay.Amt) WHEN 7 THEN SUM(userpay.Amt) WHEN 9 THEN SUM(userpay.Amt) WHEN 11 THEN SUM(userpay.Amt) END),2) AS 'Amt' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN userpay.CheckNum WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN userpay.CheckNum WHEN 11 THEN '' END) AS 'CheckNum' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN userpay.CarrierName WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN userpay.CarrierName WHEN 11 THEN '' END) AS 'CarrierName' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN userpay.Clinic WHEN 3 THEN userpay.Clinic WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN userpay.Clinic WHEN 9 THEN userpay.Clinic WHEN 11 THEN '' END) AS 'Clinic' FROM ( SELECT userod.UserName AS 'User' ,p.PatNum AS 'Account' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,CONCAT('PatPay: ',def.ItemName) AS 'PayType'
