,ps.DatePay AS 'DatePaid' ,payment.DateEntry AS 'DateEntered' ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Amt' ,payment.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' ,'' AS CarrierName ,IFNULL(cl.request, 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN userod ON userod.UserNum = ps.SecUserNumEntry AND userod.UserName REGEXP @UserUse INNER JOIN payment ON payment.PayNum = ps.PayNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = payment.PayType AND def.Category = 10 INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ps.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON IF(@GroupByCheck = 'true', cl.ClinicNum = payment.ClinicNum, cl.ClinicNum = ps.ClinicNum) WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(@ClinicUse = '^',TRUE,COALESCE(cl.request, 'Unassigned') REGEXP @ClinicUse) GROUP BY IF(@GroupByCheck = 'true',payment.PayNum,ps.SplitNum), IF(@GroupByCheck = 'true',payment.ClinicNum,ps.ClinicNum) UNION ALL SELECT userod.UserName AS 'User' ,p.PatNum AS 'Account' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,CONCAT('InsPay: ',def.ItemName) AS 'PayType' ,cp.DateCP AS 'DatePaid' ,claimpayment.SecDateEntry 'DateEntered' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'Amt' ,claimpayment.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' ,claimpayment.CarrierName ,IFNULL(cl.request, 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment ON claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = claimpayment.PayType AND def.Category = 32 INNER JOIN userod ON userod.UserNum = claimpayment.SecUserNumEntry AND userod.UserName REGEXP @UserUse INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON IF(@GroupByCheck = 'true', cl.ClinicNum = claimpayment.ClinicNum, cl.ClinicNum = cp.ClinicNum) WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(@ClinicUse = '^',TRUE,COALESCE(cl.request, 'Unassigned') REGEXP @ClinicUse) GROUP BY IF(@GroupByCheck = 'true',claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.ClaimNum), IF(@GroupByCheck = 'true',claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum,cp.ClinicNum) ) userpay INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 11 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(@Unique := @Unique + 1, '-', dup.Num) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(userpay.user, '+', userpay.clinic) WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT(userpay.user, '++', dup.Num) WHEN 7 THEN CONCAT(userpay.clinic, '+++', dup.Num) WHEN 9 THEN CONCAT(userpay.CheckNum, '++++', dup.Num) WHEN 11 THEN CONCAT('+++++', dup.Num) END) UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ItemOrder,'' AS 'user','','Totals User/Clinic: ' AS Patient,'','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ItemOrder,'' AS 'user','','Totals User: ' AS Patient, '','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS ItemOrder,'' AS 'user','','Totals Clinic: ' AS Patient, '','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 8 AS ItemOrder,'' AS 'user','','Totals Check: ' AS Patient, '','','','','','','' UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS ItemOrder,'' AS 'user','','Grand Total: ' AS Patient, '','','','','','','' ORDER BY ItemOrder,PayType,Clinic,DateEntered ) result

request: Aging for patients with balances by treating provider and, optionally, clinic
query: SET @AsOf =''; SET @ProvAbbrs =''; SET @ClinicAbbrs =''; SET @ClinicBreakdown ='No'; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'), 1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays'),0) INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'),1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlanItemDateShowProc'), 0) INTO @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE IF(LENGTH(@ProvAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @ProvAbbrs)); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @ProvAbbrs) OR LENGTH(@ProvAbbrs) = 0,'0,',''),IFNULL(@ProvNums, '')) INTO @ProvNums; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@ClinicAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @ClinicAbbrs)); SELECT CONCAT(IF(@EasyNoClinics OR FIND_IN_SET('None', @ClinicAbbrs) OR LENGTH(@ClinicAbbrs) = 0,'0,',''),IFNULL(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT CAST(CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', 2) , LPAD(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', -2),'.',''),4,'0') ) AS DECIMAL(6,4)) INTO @ProgramVersion FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'ProgramVersion'; SELECT (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE CONCAT('Patient Count: ', COUNT(DISTINCT aging.PatNum)) END) AS 'PatNum' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE '' END) AS 'Pat , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' ELSE aging.Provider END) AS 'Provider' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' WHEN 'ProvTotal' THEN '' ELSE aging.Clinic END) AS 'Clinic' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE SUM(aging.Bal_0_30) END) AS 'Bal_0_30' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE SUM(aging.Bal_31_60) END) AS 'Bal_31_60' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE SUM(aging.Bal_61_90) END) AS 'Bal_61_90' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE SUM(aging.BalOver90) END) AS 'BalOver90' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE SUM(aging.BalTotal) END) AS 'BalTotal' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE SUM(aging.InsWoEst) END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE SUM(aging.InsPayEst) END) AS 'InsPayEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' ELSE SUM(aging.PatEst) END) AS 'PatEst' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum , COALESCE(provider.Abbr, 'none') AS 'Provider' , guaraging.ProvNum , (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 1 THEN '' WHEN @ClinicBreakdown = 'Yes' OR COUNT(DISTINCT guaraging.ClinicNum) = 1 THEN COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, 'None') ELSE 'Multiple' END ) AS 'Clinic' , CONCAT( patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' , SUM(guarAging.Bal_0_30) AS 'Bal_0_30' , SUM(guarAging.Bal_31_60) AS 'Bal_31_60' , SUM(guarAging.Bal_61_90) AS 'Bal_61_90' , SUM(guarAging.BalOver90) AS 'BalOver90' , SUM(guarAging.BalTotal) AS 'BalTotal' , SUM(guarAging.InsWoEst) AS 'InsWoEst' , SUM(guarAging.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' , SUM(guarAging.BalTotal-guarAging.InsPayEst-guarAging.InsWoEst) AS 'PatEst' , SUM(guarAging.PayPlanDue) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT tSums.PatNum , tSums.ProvNum , tSums.ClinicNum , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'BalOver90' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits <= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN tSums.Charges_61_90 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_61_90' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 THEN tSums.Charges_31_60 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_31_60' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 THEN tSums.Charges_0_30 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_0_30' , CAST(tSums.BalTotal AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'BalTotal' , CAST(tSums.InsWoEst AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'InsWoEst' , CAST(tSums.InsPayEst AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'InsPayEst' , CAST(tSums.PayPlanDue AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT trans.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , trans.ProvNum AS 'ProvNum' , trans.ClinicNum AS 'ClinicNum' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesOver90' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_61_90' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_31_60' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount > 0 AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_0_30' , -SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount < 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TotalCredits' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotal' , SUM(trans.InsWoEst) AS 'InsWoEst' , SUM(trans.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' , SUM(trans.PayPlanAmount) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProvNum , pl.ClinicNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.PatNum , cp.ProvNum , cp.ClinicNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= DATE(@AsOf) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog p ON cp.ProcNum=p.ProcNum WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 22.2055 THEN TRUE ELSE (cp.ProcNum = 0 OR p.ProcStatus = 2) END) AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , a.PatNum , a.ProvNum , a.ClinicNum , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND FIND_IN_SET(a.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(a.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey' , ps.PatNum , ps.ProvNum , ps.ClinicNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ProvNum , ppc.ClinicNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmount' , ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum , ( SELECT DISTINCT ppc.ProvNum FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum LIMIT 1 ) AS 'ProvNum' , ( SELECT DISTINCT ppc.ClinicNum FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum LIMIT 1 ) AS 'ClinicNum' , pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate' , -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp LEFT JOIN payplancharge ppc ON ppc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= DATE(@AsOf) HAVING FIND_IN_SET(( SELECT DISTINCT ppc.ProvNum FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum LIMIT 1 ), @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(( SELECT DISTINCT ppc.ClinicNum FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum LIMIT 1 ), @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ProvNum , ppc.ClinicNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.PatNum , ppc.ProvNum , ppc.ClinicNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'Discount' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , p.ProvNum , p.ClinicNum , p.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , p.Discount + p.DiscountPlanAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplanlink ppl ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog p ON p.ProcNum = ppl.FKey AND ppl.LinkType = 2 AND p.ProcStatus = 1 AND p.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND FIND_IN_SET(p.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(p.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 23.2023 AND 24.1999 AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 AND pp.DynamicPayPlanTPOption = 2 AND (p.Discount != 0 OR p.DiscountPlanAmt != 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType , ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey' , prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , prodlink.ProvNum , prodlink.ClinicNum , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate ELSE DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) END) AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum , procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' , procedurelog.ProvNum , procedurelog.ClinicNum FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 24.2001 THEN !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) ELSE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 END) AND FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjustment.ProcNum , adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay', SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff', claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , 0 ProcNum , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2024 THEN adjustment.AdjDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END) AS 'AgeDate' , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 AND FIND_IN_SET(adjustment.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(adjustment.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) ELSE ppl.SecDateTEntry < DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL 1 DAY END) )trans GROUP BY trans.PatNum, trans.ProvNum, trans.ClinicNum ) tSums ) guarAging INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=guarAging.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = guarAging.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = guarAging.ProvNum WHERE ABS(guarAging.BalTotal) >= 0.005 GROUP BY guaraging.PatNum, guaraging.ProvNum, IF(@ClinicBreakdown = 'Yes', guaraging.ClinicNum, NULL) ) aging INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type', 1 AS 'Order' UNION ALL SELECT 'Spacer', 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'ProvClinTotal', 3 FROM DUAL WHERE @EasyNoClinics = 0 AND @ClinicBreakdown = 'Yes' UNION ALL SELECT 'Spacer', 4 FROM DUAL WHERE @EasyNoClinics = 0 AND @ClinicBreakdown = 'Yes' UNION ALL SELECT 'ProvTotal', 5 UNION ALL SELECT 'Spacer', 6 UNION ALL SELECT 'Total', 7 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY dup.Order, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', aging.PatNum, NULL), IF(dup.Type IN('Detail', 'ProvTotal', 'ProvClinTotal'), aging.ProvNum, NULL), IF(dup.Type IN('Detail', 'ProvClinTotal') AND @ClinicBreakdown = 'Yes', aging.Clinic, NULL) ORDER BY dup.Order, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', aging.PatName, NULL), aging.Provider, aging.Clinic

request: List of guarantors with provider income imbalances.
query: SET @ProvAbbr ='%%'; SET @AsOf=''; SET @IncomeTransferOnly = 'No'; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'), 1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlanItemDateShowProc'), 0) INTO @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT CAST(CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', 2) , LPAD(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', -2),'.',''),4,'0') ) AS DECIMAL(6,4)) INTO @ProgramVersion FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'ProgramVersion'; SELECT datatable.Guarantor AS 'Guarantor Pat , datatable.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , datatable.Providers FROM ( SELECT E.Patient AS Patient , E.PatNum , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT E.ProvAbbr) AS 'Providers' , SUM(Total)AS Total , SUM((CASE WHEN TypeOfRow = 'Negative' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS Negative , SUM((CASE WHEN TypeOfRow = 'Positive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS Positive , E.Guarantor , g.LName , g.FName FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'ItemOrder' , CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS 'Patient' , D.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , D.Guarantor , prov.ProvNum AS 'Provider' , prov.Abbr AS 'ProvAbbr' , D.Bal AS 'Total' , IF(D.Bal < 0.005,'Negative','Positive') AS 'TypeOfRow' FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum , p.LName , p.FName , p.Guarantor , B.ProvNum , SUM(B.PatBal) AS 'Bal' FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum , RawPatTrans.ProvNum , SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS 'PatBal' FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProvNum , pl.ClinicNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.PatNum , cp.ProvNum , cp.ClinicNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= DATE(@AsOf) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE -cp.WriteOff - cp.InsPayEst END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog p ON cp.ProcNum=p.ProcNum WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 22.2055 THEN TRUE ELSE (cp.ProcNum = 0 OR p.ProcStatus = 2) END) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , a.PatNum , a.ProvNum , a.ClinicNum , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey' , ps.PatNum , ps.ProvNum , ps.ClinicNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN( SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X' ) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum , ( SELECT DISTINCT ppc.ProvNum FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.payplannum = pp.payplannum LIMIT 1 ) AS 'ProvNum' , ( SELECT DISTINCT ppc.ClinicNum FROM payplancharge ppc WHERE ppc.payplannum = pp.payplannum LIMIT 1 ) AS 'ClinicNum' , pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate' , -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ProvNum , ppc.ClinicNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.PatNum , ppc.ProvNum , ppc.ClinicNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Discount' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , p.ProvNum , p.ClinicNum , p.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , p.Discount + p.DiscountPlanAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplanlink ppl ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog p ON p.ProcNum = ppl.FKey AND ppl.LinkType = 2 AND p.ProcStatus = 1 AND p.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 23.2023 AND 24.1999 AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 AND pp.DynamicPayPlanTPOption = 2 AND (p.Discount != 0 OR p.DiscountPlanAmt != 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType , ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey' , prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , prodlink.ProvNum , prodlink.ClinicNum , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate ELSE DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) END) AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum , procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' , procedurelog.ProvNum , procedurelog.ClinicNum FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 24.2001 THEN !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) ELSE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 END) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjustment.ProcNum , adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay', SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff', claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , 0 ProcNum , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2024 THEN adjustment.AdjDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END) AS 'AgeDate' , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) ELSE ppl.SecDateTEntry < DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL 1 DAY - INTERVAL 1 SECOND END) ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate <= DATE(@AsOf) GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum, RawPatTrans.ProvNum ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = B.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum, B.ProvNum ) D INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = D.ProvNum AND ABS(D.Bal) > 0.005 GROUP BY prov.ProvNum, D.PatNum ) E INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = E.Guarantor GROUP BY g.PatNum )datatable WHERE (Negative > 0 AND Positive > 0) AND IF(@IncomeTransferOnly = 'Yes', ABS(Total) <= 0.005, TRUE) AND datatable.Providers LIKE @ProvAbbr ORDER BY datatable.LName, datatable.FName, datatable.Guarantor

request: Patients with completed procedures in the specified date range and a specified Referred From source
query: SET @FromDate='2022-06-01', @ToDate='2022-06-30'; SET @Referrals='Yelp,Google'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.CodeNum) INTO @BrokenApptCodes FROM procedurecode WHERE procedurecode.ProcCode IN ('D9986', 'D9987'); SELECT (CASE dupe.Type WHEN 'blank' THEN '' ELSE main.Referral END ) AS 'Referral', (CASE dupe.Type WHEN 'pat' THEN main.Patient WHEN'ref' THEN 'Total New Patients' ELSE '' END ) AS 'Patient', (CASE dupe.Type WHEN 'pat' THEN FORMAT(main.Production, 2) WHEN 'ref' THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(main.NewPat, main.Production, 0)), 2) ELSE '' END ) AS 'Production', (CASE dupe.Type WHEN 'pat' THEN '' WHEN 'ref' THEN SUM(main.NewPat) ELSE '' END ) AS 'Count' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(referral.FName, IF(LENGTH(referral.FName) = 0 OR LENGTH(referral.LName) = 0, '', ' '), referral.LName) AS 'Referral', referral.ReferralNum, COALESCE((SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END)) FROM patient WHERE patient.PatNum = refprod.PatNum ), '') AS 'Patient', refprod.PatNum AS 'PatNum', COALESCE(refprod.ProcFee, 0) AS 'Production', COALESCE(( SELECT MIN(procedurelog.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = refprod.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND NOT FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.CodeNum, @BrokenApptCodes) ), 0) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AS 'NewPat' FROM referral LEFT JOIN ( SELECT refattach.PatNum, procs.procFee AS 'ProcFee', SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(refattach.ReferralNum ORDER BY refattach.RefDate DESC), ',',1) AS 'ReferralNum' FROM refattach INNER JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum, SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits)) AS 'ProcFee' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND Procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum ) procs ON refattach.PatNum = procs.PatNum WHERE refattach.RefType = 1 GROUP BY procs.PatNum ) refprod ON refprod.ReferralNum = referral.ReferralNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Referrals) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(CONCAT(referral.FName, IF(LENGTH(referral.FName) = 0 OR LENGTH(referral.LName) = 0, '', ' '), referral.LName), @Referrals)) ) main INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Pat' AS 'Type' UNION ALL SELECT 'Ref' UNION ALL SELECT 'blank' ) dupe WHERE NOT (dupe.Type = 'pat' AND ISNULL(main.patNum)) GROUP BY dupe.Type, main.ReferralNum, IF(dupe.Type = 'pat', main.PatNum, 0) ORDER BY main.Referral, (CASE WHEN main.NewPat AND dupe.Type = 'Pat' THEN 1 WHEN dupe.Type = 'Ref' THEN 2 WHEN dupe.type = 'Pat' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END)

request: Gross production per patient within 90 days of the patient's first completed specified code
query: SET @FromDate='2022-04-01', @ToDate='2022-04-30'; SET @Codes='D0150'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(proc.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date' ,p.LName AS 'LastName' ,p.FName AS 'FirstName' ,p.Zip AS 'ZipCode' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)) AS '30' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN proc.ProcDate AND proc.ProcDate + INTERVAL 30 DAY AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurelog.PatNum=proc.PatNum ),0),2) AS '30DayProd' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)) AS '60' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN proc.ProcDate + INTERVAL 31 DAY AND proc.ProcDate + INTERVAL 60 DAY AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurelog.PatNum=proc.PatNum ),0),2) AS '60DayProd' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)) AS '90' FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN proc.ProcDate + INTERVAL 61 DAY AND proc.ProcDate + INTERVAL 90 DAY AND procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 AND procedurelog.PatNum=proc.PatNum ),0),2) AS '90DayProd' FROM patient p INNER JOIN( SELECT pl.PatNum ,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS 'ProcDate' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Codes)) WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) proc ON proc.PatNum=p.PatNum ORDER BY proc.ProcDate ASC;

request: Claim Error Analysis
query: SET @FromDate='2010-06-01', @ToDate='2022-06-30'; SET @Clinics=''; SELECT DATE(IF(LENGTH(@FromDate) = 0, '0001-01-02', @FromDate)) INTO @FromDate; SELECT DATE(IF(LENGTH(@ToDate) = 0, '9999-12-31', @ToDate)) INTO @ToDate; (SELECT COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, 'None') AS 'Clinic Name', err.ItemName AS 'Claim Error', FORMAT(COUNT(claims.ClaimNum), 0) AS 'Claim volume', FORMAT(SUM(claims.ClaimFee), 2) AS 'Total Amt', GROUP_CONCAT(claims.PatientName SEPARATOR '; ') AS 'Patients' FROM ( SELECT claim.ClinicNum, claimtracking.TrackingErrorDefNum AS 'ClaimErrorNum', claim.ClaimNum, claim.ClaimFee, (SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName, IF(LENGTH(patient.Preferred) + LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) + LENGTH(patient.FName) = 0, '', CONCAT( ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END)))) FROM patient WHERE patient.PatNum = claim.PatNum ) AS PatientName FROM claim INNER JOIN claimtracking ON claimtracking.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum AND claimtracking.TrackingType = 'StatusHistory' AND claimtracking.TrackingErrorDefNum > 0 WHERE claim.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY claim.ClaimNum, claimtracking.TrackingErrorDefNum ) claims INNER JOIN definition err ON err.DefNum = claims.ClaimErrorNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claims.ClinicNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, 'None'), @Clinics)) GROUP BY claims.ClinicNum, claims.ClaimErrorNum ORDER BY clinic.Abbr) UNION ALL (SELECT COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, 'None') AS 'Clinic Name', '' AS 'Claim Error', '%Paid' AS 'Claim Volume', FORMAT(( COUNT(IF(claim.ClaimStatus = 'R', claim.ClaimNum, NULL)) / COUNT(claim.ClaimNum) ) *100, 1) AS 'Total Amt', '' FROM claim LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = claim.ClinicNum WHERE claim.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY claim.ClinicNum ORDER BY clinic.Abbr)

request: The number of completed appointments for each month of a specified year.
query: SET @Year = '2021'; SET @FromDate = CONCAT(@Year, '-01-01'), @ToDate = CONCAT(@Year, '-12-31'); SELECT (CASE core.Months WHEN 1 THEN 'January' WHEN 2 THEN 'February' WHEN 3 THEN 'March' WHEN 4 THEN 'April' WHEN 5 THEN 'May' WHEN 6 THEN 'June' WHEN 7 THEN 'July' WHEN 8 THEN 'August' WHEN 9 THEN 'September' WHEN 10 THEN 'October' WHEN 11 THEN 'November' WHEN 12 THEN 'December' END) AS 'Month' , COALESCE(totpat.Count, 0) AS 'Appointments' FROM( SELECT MONTH(DATE(@FromDate + INTERVAL CONCAT(n0.num, n1.num, n2.num) MONTH)) AS 'Months' , YEAR(DATE(@FromDate + INTERVAL CONCAT(n0.num, n1.num, n2.num) MONTH)) AS 'Years' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 )n0 INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 )n1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 )n2 HAVING Years = @Year ORDER BY Years, Months ) core LEFT JOIN( SELECT MONTH(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Month' ,COUNT(apt.AptNum) AS 'Count' FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY MONTH(apt.AptDateTime) ) totpat ON totpat.Month = core.Months

request: Discount Plan Production and Adjustment Totals
query: SET @FromDate='2022-07-01', @ToDate='2022-07-31'; SET @AdjType='DiscountPlanAdjustmentTypeRequired'; SELECT FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(display.GrossProd),0),2) AS 'Gross Production' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(display.Adj),0),2) AS 'Adj' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(display.GrossProd+display.Adj),0),2) AS 'Net Production' FROM( SELECT pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'GrossProd' ,SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS 'Adj' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum=adj.AdjType AND def.Category=1 AND def.ItemName=@AdjType WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) display;

request: Insurance payments (not estimates) for procedures completed in the date range by specified provider(s)
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-01'; SET @Provider='Doc 1,Doc 2'; SELECT cp.PatNum ,cp.PatNum AS 'Pat ,ca.CarrierName AS 'Insurance Name' ,pc.ProcCode AS 'Procedure Code' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date of Service' ,cp.DateCP AS 'PayDate' ,FORMAT(cp.InsPayAmt, 2) AS 'Amount' ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Provider)) WHERE cp.Status IN (1, 4) ORDER BY cp.DateCP, cp.PatNum, pl.ProcDate

request: Insurance Payments with deposit info
query: SET @FromDate='2022-08-01', @ToDate='2023-02-28'; SET @ProvList=''; SET @Clinic = ''; SET @DepositDate = ''; SET @PaymentAmount = ''; SET @CheckNum = ''; SET @ProvList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProvList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProvList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ProvNums = ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provs.ProvNum) FROM provider provs WHERE provs.Abbr REGEXP @ProvList AND !provs.IsHidden ); SELECT ( CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.PayType WHEN 2 THEN core.Date ELSE '' END ) AS 'Date' ,IF(dup.Num = 2, IF(core.DateIssued = '0001-01-01', '', DATE_FORMAT(core.DateIssued, '%m/%d/%Y')),'') AS 'Date Issued' ,IF(dup.Num = 2, core.PatNum, '') AS 'Pat ,IF(dup.Num = 2, core.PatNum, ' ') AS 'PatNum' ,( CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN core.Carrier WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT('Total ', core.PayType) WHEN 4 THEN 'Total All Payments' END ) AS 'Carrier' ,IF(dup.Num = 2, ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = core.ProvNum ) ,'') AS 'Provider' ,IF(dup.Num = 2,core.EntryUser,'') AS 'Entry User' ,IF(dup.Num = 2,core.CheckNum,'') AS 'Check ,IF(dup.Num IN(2,3,4),FORMAT(SUM(core.Amount),2),'') AS 'Amount' ,IF(dup.Num = 2,IFNULL(core.request,'Unassigned'),'') AS 'Clinic' ,IF(dup.Num = 2,IFNULL(core.DateDeposit,''),'') AS 'Deposit Date' ,IF(dup.Num = 2,IFNULL(core.DepositNum,''),'') AS 'Deposit Number' FROM ( SELECT cpayt.ItemName AS 'PayType' ,cpay.ClaimPaymentNum AS 'PayNum' ,cpay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' ,cp.DateCP AS 'Date' ,cpay.DateIssued ,cl.PatNum ,c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' ,cl.ProvTreat AS 'ProvNum' ,( SELECT u.UserName FROM userod u WHERE u.UserNum = cpay.SecUserNumEntry ) AS 'EntryUser' ,cpay.CheckNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'Amount' ,cli.request ,d.DateDeposit ,d.Depositnum ,cl.ClaimNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum AND IF(LENGTH(@CheckNum) = 0,TRUE,cpay.CheckNum = @CheckNum) INNER JOIN definition cpayt ON cpayt.DefNum = cpay.PayType AND cpayt.Category = 32 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cp.ClaimNum = cl.ClaimNum LEFT JOIN deposit d ON d.DepositNum = cpay.DepositNum LEFT JOIN clinic cli ON cpay.ClinicNum = cli.ClinicNum WHERE cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(cl.ProvTreat, @ProvNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinic) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(cli.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinic)) AND IF(LENGTH(@DepositDate) = 0,TRUE,@DepositDate = d.DateDeposit) AND IF(LENGTH(@PaymentAmount) = 0,TRUE,@PaymentAmount = cpay.CheckAmt) GROUP BY cpay.ClaimPaymentNum, cl.ClaimNum ) core INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY ( CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, ', ', core.GroupPayType) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(core.PayNum, ', ', core.ClaimNum) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, ', ', core.GroupPayType) WHEN 4 THEN dup.Num END ) ORDER BY IF(dup.Num = 4,'zzzzzzzz',core.GroupPayType),dup.Num,core.Date

request: Email list: guarantors of active patients
query: SELECT g.PatNum AS 'Pat , g.LName , g.FName , g.Email , GROUP_CONCAT(p.FName) AS 'Active Family Members' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND g.Email LIKE "%_@_%._%" GROUP BY g.PatNum ORDER BY g.LName, g.FName;

request: First Ordinal From Referral Source that is a Doctor for Patients with the Specified Procedure Attached to a Scheduled Appointment in the Date Range
query: SET @FromDate='2022-09-01', @ToDate='2022-09-30'; SET @DentalCode='D7140'; SELECT CONCAT(IF(LENGTH(r.FName)=0,'',CONCAT(r.FName,' ')),r.LName) AS 'Referring Doctor' ,pc.ProcCode AS 'Procedure Code' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', p.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' ,apt.AptDateTime AS 'Date' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.PatNum=p.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus=1 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=apt.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode=@DentalCode INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum=p.PatNum AND ra.RefType=1 AND ra.ItemOrder=( SELECT MIN(ra.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum AND r.IsDoctor=1 WHERE ra.RefType=1 AND ra.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum) INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum=ra.ReferralNum AND r.IsDoctor=1 ORDER BY r.ReferralNum,p.LName,p.FName,apt.AptDateTime ASC

request: Provider level practice health
query: SET @AsOf = '2023-09-05'; SET @HygieneCodes = 'D1110,D1120,D4910,D4341,D4342,D4346,D4355,D1125,D1101'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.CodeNum) INTO @Hyg FROM procedurecode pc WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@HygieneCodes); SELECT pc1.CodeNum INTO @CmpEx FROM procedurecode pc1 WHERE pc1.ProcCode = 'D0150'; SELECT 'Run for:' AS 'Provider' ,DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'DailyNP' ,'' AS 'MTDNP','' AS 'DailyHP','' AS 'MTDHP','' AS 'DailyProd','' AS 'DailyAdj','' AS 'DailyWo','' AS 'DailyNetProd','' AS 'Production MTD','' AS 'Production YTD','' AS 'Daily Income','' AS 'MTD Income','' AS 'YTD Income' UNION ALL SELECT display.Provider ,display.DailyNP ,display.MTDNP ,display.DailyHP ,display.MTDHP ,display.DailyProd ,display.DailyAdj ,display.DailyWo ,display.DailyNetProd ,display.ProductionMTD ,display.ProductionYTD ,display.DailyDeposits ,display.MTDDeposits ,display.YTDDeposits FROM ( SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Provider,'Totals:') AS 'Provider' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.NewPats,SUM(core.NewPats)) AS 'DailyNP' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.mtdNewPats,SUM(core.mtdNewPats)) AS 'MTDNP' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.HygPats,SUM(core.HygPats)) AS 'DailyHP' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.MTDpats,SUM(core.MTDpats)) AS 'MTDHP' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Prod,SUM(core.Prod)),2) AS 'DailyProd' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Adj,SUM(core.Adj)),2) AS 'DailyAdj' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Wo,SUM(core.Wo)),2) AS 'DailyWo' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Prod + core.Adj - core.Wo,SUM(core.Prod) + SUM(core.Adj) - SUM(core.Wo)),2) AS 'DailyNetProd' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.MTDprod + core.MTDadj - core.MTDwo,SUM(core.MTDprod) + SUM(core.MTDadj) - SUM(core.MTDwo)),2) AS 'ProductionMTD' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.YTDprod + core.YTDadj - core.YTDwo,SUM(core.YTDprod) + SUM(core.YTDadj) - SUM(core.YTDwo)),2) AS 'ProductionYTD' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.PatPay + core.InsPay,SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)),2) AS 'DailyDeposits' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.MTDpatPay + core.MTDinsPay,SUM(core.MTDpatPay) + SUM(core.MTDinsPay)),2) AS 'MTDDeposits' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1,core.YTDpatPay + core.YTDinsPay,SUM(core.YTDpatPay + core.YTDinsPay)),2) AS 'YTDDeposits' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN pr.ProvNum = 2 THEN pr.Abbr WHEN pr.IsNotPerson THEN pr.Abbr WHEN pr.IsSecondary THEN pr.FName WHEN !pr.IsSecondary THEN pr.LName END) AS 'Provider' ,pr.ProvNum ,(CASE WHEN !pr.IsSecondary AND !pr.IsNotPerson THEN CONCAT(1,'|',pr.LName,', ',pr.FName) WHEN pr.IsSecondary AND !pr.IsNotPerson THEN CONCAT(2,'|',pr.LName,', ',pr.FName) WHEN pr.IsNotPerson THEN CONCAT(3,'|',pr.LName,', ',pr.FName) ELSE 'zzz' END) AS 'Ordering' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(!ISNULL(apts.D0150),apts.AptNum,NULL)) AS 'NewPats' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(!ISNULL(apts.mtdD0150),apts.AptNum,NULL)) AS 'mtdNewPats' ,IFNULL(proc.Hyg,0) AS 'HygPats' ,IFNULL(proc.mtdHyg,0) AS 'MTDpats' ,IFNULL(proc.Amt,0) AS 'Prod' ,IFNULL(adj.Amt,0) AS 'Adj' ,IFNULL(ins.Wo,0) AS 'Wo' ,IFNULL(proc.mtdAmt,0) AS 'MTDprod' ,IFNULL(adj.mtdAmt,0) AS 'MTDadj' ,IFNULL(ins.mtdWo,0) AS 'MTDwo' ,IFNULL(proc.ytdAmt,0) AS 'YTDprod' ,IFNULL(adj.ytdAmt,0) AS 'YTDadj' ,IFNULL(ins.ytdWo,0) AS 'YTDwo' ,IFNULL(patpay.Amt,0) AS 'PatPay' ,IFNULL(ins.InsPay,0) AS 'InsPay' ,IFNULL(patpay.mtdAmt,0) AS 'MTDpatPay' ,IFNULL(ins.mtdInsPay,0) AS 'MTDinsPay' ,IFNULL(patpay.ytdAmt,0) AS 'YTDpatPay' ,IFNULL(ins.ytdInsPay,0) AS 'YTDinsPay' FROM provider pr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.AptNum ,a.AptDateTime ,a.PatNum ,pla.ProvNum ,a.ProvHyg ,MAX((CASE WHEN !ISNULL(pla.AptNum) AND pla.CodeNum = @CmpEx AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) = DATE(@AsOf) THEN a.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'D0150' ,MAX((CASE WHEN !ISNULL(pla.AptNum) AND pla.CodeNum = @CmpEx THEN a.AptNum ELSE NULL END)) AS 'mtdD0150' FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN procedurelog pla ON pla.AptNum = a.AptNum WHERE a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY a.AptNum ) apts ON apts.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procdata.ProvNum ,SUM(procdata.Amt) AS 'Amt' ,SUM(procdata.mtdAmt) AS 'mtdAmt' ,SUM(procdata.ytdAmt) AS 'ytdAmt' ,COUNT(DISTINCT procdata.Hyg) AS 'Hyg' ,COUNT(DISTINCT procdata.mtdHyg) AS 'mtdHyg' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProvNum ,(CASE WHEN pl.ProcDate = DATE(@AsOf) THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) - SUM(COALESCE(cap.Writeoff,0)) ELSE 0 END) AS 'Amt' ,(CASE WHEN pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND DATE(@AsOf) THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) - SUM(COALESCE(cap.Writeoff,0)) ELSE 0 END) AS 'mtdAmt' ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) - SUM(COALESCE(cap.Writeoff,0)) AS 'ytdAmt' ,IF(pl.ProcDate = DATE(@AsOf) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum,@Hyg),pl.ProcNum,NULL) AS 'Hyg' ,IF(pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND DATE(@AsOf) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum,@Hyg),pl.ProcNum,NULL) AS 'mtdHyg' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cap ON cap.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cap.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-01-01') AND DATE(@AsOf) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) procdata GROUP BY procdata.ProvNum ) proc ON proc.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT adj.ProvNum ,SUM(IF(adj.AdjDate = @AsOf,adj.AdjAmt,0)) AS 'Amt' ,SUM(IF(adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND DATE(@AsOf),adj.AdjAmt,0)) AS 'mtdAmt' ,SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS 'ytdAmt' FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-01-01') AND DATE(@AsOf) GROUP BY adj.ProvNum ) adj ON adj.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum ,SUM(IF(cp.DateCP = @AsOf,cp.Writeoff,0)) AS 'Wo' ,SUM(IF(cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND DATE(@AsOf),cp.Writeoff,0)) AS 'mtdWo' ,SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS 'ytdWo' ,SUM(IF(cp.DateCP = @AsOf,cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS 'InsPay' ,SUM(IF(cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND DATE(@AsOf),cp.InsPayAmt,0)) AS 'mtdInsPay' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'ytdInsPay' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-01-01') AND DATE(@AsOf) AND ((cp.WriteOff > 0.0001 OR cp.WriteOff < -0.0001) OR ABS(cp.InsPayAmt) > 0.0001) GROUP BY pl.ProvNum ) ins ON ins.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.ProvNum ,SUM(IF(ps.DatePay = @AsOf,ps.SplitAmt,0)) AS 'Amt' ,SUM(IF(ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-%m-01') AND DATE(@AsOf),ps.SplitAmt,0)) AS 'mtdAmt' ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'ytdAmt' FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf,'%Y-01-01') AND DATE(@AsOf) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum ) patpay ON patpay.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum GROUP BY pr.ProvNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',core.ProvNum),dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Ordering ) display

request: Payments Report by Payment Entry Date.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SET @ProvList='Doc A,Doc B'; SET @PracticeName='Default'; SET @Clinics='Clinic 1,Clinic 2'; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SET @ProvList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProvList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProvList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ProvNums = ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provs.ProvNum) FROM provider provs WHERE provs.Abbr REGEXP @ProvList AND !provs.IsHidden ); SET @ProvNums = CONCAT(IF("None" REGEXP @ProvList, "0,", ""), COALESCE(@ProvNums, "")); SET @PracticeTitle = IF(@PracticeName='Default', (SELECT pracname.ValueString FROM preference pracname WHERE pracname.PrefNum = 5), @PracticeTitle := @PracticeName); SELECT display.Entry AS ' ' , display.Date AS ' ' , display.DateIssued AS ' ' , display.PatientNumber AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Patient, 35) AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Carrier, 35) AS ' ' , display.Provider AS ' ' , display.Clinic AS ' ' , display.Type AS ' ' , display.CheckNum AS ' ' , display.Amount AS ' ' FROM ( SELECT 'A' AS 'ItemType' , 1 AS 'GroupPayType' , dup1.Num , '0001-01-01' AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Entry Date' END ) AS 'Entry' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date' END ) AS 'Date' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date Issued' END ) AS 'DateIssued' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Pat END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Name' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN 'Daily Payments Report' WHEN 2 THEN @PracticeTitle WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT( 'Date Range:' , DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate, '%m/%d/%Y') , '-' , DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate, '%m/%d/%Y') ) WHEN 4 THEN 'Carrier' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Prov' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Clinic' END ) AS 'Clinic' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'PayType' END ) AS 'Type' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Check END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Amount' END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 ) dup1 UNION ALL SELECT ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.ItemType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 3 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 4 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) END ) AS 'ItemType' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 3 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 4 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) END ) AS 'GroupPayType' , dup2.Num , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 2 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 3 THEN pays.Date WHEN 4 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.Date) END ) AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 2 THEN pays.PayType WHEN 3 THEN DATE_FORMAT(pays.Entry, '%m/%d/%Y') WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Entry' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN DATE_FORMAT(pays.Date, '%m/%d/%Y') WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN IF(pays.DateIssued = '0001-01-01', '', DATE_FORMAT(pays.DateIssued, '%m/%d/%Y')) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisIssDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.PatNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT CONCAT( UPPER(p.LName) ,', ' ,UPPER(p.FName) ) FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = pays.PatNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.Carrier WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.PayType) WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 6 THEN 'Total All Payments' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = pays.ProvNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.Clinic WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Clinic' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.PayType WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Type' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.CheckNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 'Insurance Payment' AS 'ItemType' , cpayt.ItemName AS 'PayType' , cpay.ClaimPaymentNum AS 'PayNum' , cpay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , cpay.SecDateEntry AS 'Entry' , cp.DateCP AS 'Date' , cpay.DateIssued , cp.PatNum , c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' , cp.ProvNum , (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') ELSE '' END) AS 'Clinic' , cpay.CheckNum , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'Amount' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN DEFINITION cpayt ON cpayt.DefNum = cpay.PayType AND cpayt.Category = 32 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=cp.ClinicNum WHERE cpay.SecDateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY cp.ProvNum, cpay.ClaimPaymentNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Patient Payment' AS 'ItemType' , COALESCE(paytype.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS 'PayType' , pay.PayNum , pay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , ps.DateEntry AS 'Entry' , ps.DatePay AS 'Date' , '' AS DateIssued , pay.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , '' AS 'Carrier' , ps.ProvNum AS 'ProvNum' , (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') ELSE '' END) AS 'Clinic' , pay.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' , SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Amount' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN DEFINITION paytype ON paytype.DefNum = pay.PayType AND paytype.Category = 10 LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum=ps.ClinicNum WHERE ps.DateEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum, pay.PayNum ) pays INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 ) dup2 ON TRUE GROUP BY ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, ', ', dup2.Num) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(pays.ProvNum, ', ', pays.PayNum, ', ', pays.ItemType) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType, ', ', pays.ItemType) WHEN 5 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 6 THEN dup2.Num END ) ORDER BY ItemType, GroupPayType, Num, OrDate ) display

request: Completed Procedures in a Date Range with specified Clinic. Displays Billing Provider and Carrier on the Primary Claim for the procedure, if one exists.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-08-01', @ToDate='2022-08-31'; SET @Clinics = 'ClinicAbbr1,ClinicAbbr2'; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date of Service' ,(CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') ELSE '' END) AS 'Clinic' ,pr.Abbr AS 'Treating Provider' ,COALESCE(claiminfo.BillingProv,'Rendering Provider') AS 'Billing Provider' ,pc.ProcCode AS 'CDT Code Billed' ,COALESCE(claiminfo.Carrier,'') AS 'Insurance Carrier' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum=pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT provider.Abbr AS 'BillingProv' ,carrier.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' ,claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum=claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType='P' INNER JOIN provider ON claim.ProvBill=provider.ProvNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum=claim.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum=insplan.CarrierNum WHERE claimproc.ProcNum > 0 ) claiminfo ON claiminfo.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum WHERE (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END)

request: List of appointments in unscheduled or broken status with appointment date in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-09-15', @ToDate='2022-09-15'; SELECT apt.PatNum ,DATE(apt.SecDateTEntry) AS 'Date Created' ,DATE(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Appt Date' ,TIME(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Appt Time' ,COALESCE(( SELECT DATE(MAX(aptsl.LogDateTime)) FROM securitylog aptsl WHERE aptsl.FKey = apt.AptNum AND aptsl.PermType IN (26,27) AND ( aptsl.LogText LIKE '%Sent to Unscheduled%' OR aptsl.LogText LIKE '%Broken%' ) ), 'Not logged') AS 'Date Unsched' ,aptprov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,COALESCE(aptcl.Abbr, '') AS 'Clinic' ,COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(plpc.ProcCode), '') AS 'Proc(s)' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(aptpl.ProcFee * (aptpl.BaseUnits + aptpl.UnitQty)) - SUM(COALESCE(plcp.WriteOffEst, 0)), 0),2) AS 'Amount' ,(LENGTH(apt.Pattern) * 5) AS 'Length (Mins)' ,aptconf.ItemName AS 'Confirm Status' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN provider aptprov ON aptprov.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum INNER JOIN definition aptconf ON aptconf.DefNum = apt.Confirmed AND aptconf.Category = 2 LEFT JOIN clinic aptcl ON aptcl.ClinicNum = apt.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog aptpl ON aptpl.AptNum = apt.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode plpc ON plpc.CodeNum = aptpl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum ,SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1),cp.WriteOffEst)) AS 'WriteOffEst' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (6,8) GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) plcp ON plcp.ProcNum = aptpl.ProcNum WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus IN (3,5) GROUP BY apt.AptNum

request: Outstanding insurance claims sent in a date range, with custom tracking history
query: SET @FromDate = '2023-12-01', @ToDate = '2023-12-31'; SET @Clinic = ''; SET @Carrier = ''; SELECT core.Carrier ,core.Phone AS 'Phone' ,core.GroupNum AS 'GroupNumber' ,core.GroupName ,core.Type ,core.PatNum AS 'Pat ,core.PatNum ,core.Birthdate AS 'DOB' ,core.SubName AS 'Subscriber' ,core.SubDOB AS 'SubscriberDOB' ,core.SubscriberID ,core.Clinic ,core.DOS AS 'DateService' ,core.LastSent AS 'DateSent' ,core.OrigSent AS 'DateSentOrig' ,COALESCE(( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.DefNum = SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(core.Tracking,'+|+',-1),'||',1) ),'') AS 'TrackStat' ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(core.Tracking,'+|+',1) AS 'DateStat' ,COALESCE(( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.DefNum = SUBSTRING_INDEX(core.Tracking,'-|-',-1) ),'') AS 'Error' ,FORMAT(core.BilledFee,2) AS 'Billed Fee' ,FORMAT(core.InsFees,2) AS 'Agreed Fee' ,core.ProcCodes AS 'Proc Codes' FROM ( SELECT ca.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' ,ca.Phone AS 'Phone' ,(CASE cl.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Pri' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Sec' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Cap' ELSE 'Other' END) AS 'Type' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' ,DATE_FORMAT(p.Birthdate,'%Y-%m-%d') AS 'Birthdate' ,isb.SubscriberID ,DATE_FORMAT(ps.BirthDate,'%Y-%m-%d') AS 'SubDOB' ,DATE_FORMAT(cl.DateService,'%Y-%m-%d') AS 'DOS' ,DATE_FORMAT(cl.DateSentOrig,'%Y-%m-%d') AS 'OrigSent' ,DATE_FORMAT(cl.DateSent,'%Y-%m-%d') AS 'LastSent' ,cl.ClaimFee AS 'Amount' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT( DATE(ct.DateTimeEntry) ,'+|+' ,ct.TrackingDefNum ,'||' ,ct.Note ,'|+|' ,ct.UserNum ,'-|-' ,ct.TrackingErrorDefNum ORDER BY ct.DateTimeEntry DESC SEPARATOR '++') ,'++' ,1) FROM claimtracking ct WHERE ct.ClaimNum = cl.ClaimNum ),'') AS 'Tracking' ,i.GroupName ,i.GroupNum ,p.PatNum ,CONCAT( ps.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(ps.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', ps.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', ps.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(ps.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', ps.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'SubName' ,cproc.BilledFee ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(f.Amount) FROM fee f INNER JOIN feesched fs ON f.FeeSched = fs.FeeSchedNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON f.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1) WHERE fs.FeeSchedNum = i.FeeSched AND fs.FeeSchedType = 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(f.CodeNum,cproc.CodeNums) AND cp.ClaimNum = cl.ClaimNum ),0) AS 'InsFees' ,cproc.ProcCodes ,IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN ( SELECT SUM(cp.FeeBilled) AS 'BilledFee' ,GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode) AS 'ProcCodes' ,GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) AS 'CodeNums' ,cp.ClaimNum FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1) GROUP BY cp.ClaimNum ) cproc ON cproc.ClaimNum = cl.ClaimNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cl.PatNum INNER JOIN inssub isb ON cl.InsSubNum = isb.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan i ON i.PlanNum = isb.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = i.CarrierNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Carrier) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(ca.CarrierName,@Carrier)) INNER JOIN patient ps ON ps.PatNum = isb.Subscriber LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE cl.ClaimStatus = 'S' AND cl.DateSent BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND cl.ClaimType != 'PreAuth' AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinic) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinic)) GROUP BY cl.ClaimNum ORDER BY cl.DateService ) core

request: Patients with a specified Procedure Code completed in the Date Range.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-09-01', @ToDate='2022-09-30'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @Codes=''; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat Num' ,p.PatNum AS 'PatNum' ,p.WirelessPhone AS 'Cell' ,recentproc.Code AS 'Code' ,recentproc.Date AS 'Date' ,TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH,recentproc.Date,CURDATE()) AS 'Months' FROM patient p INNER JOIN( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.ProcCode ORDER BY procedurelog.ProcDate DESC SEPARATOR '|'),'|',1) AS 'Code' ,MAX(procedurelog.ProcDate) AS 'Date' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum=procedurelog.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(procedurecode.ProcCode,@Codes)) WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum ) recentproc ON recentproc.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Codes)) LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum=p.ClinicNum WHERE (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY p.PatNum

request: Claims Not Sent Report With Agreed Fee, Carrier Filter, and Patient Number
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-01-01', @ToDate ='2024-01-31'; SET @Clinic =''; SET @Carrier =''; SELECT IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,cl.DateService AS 'Date of Service' ,(CASE cl.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Pri' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Sec' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Cap' ELSE 'Other' END) AS 'Claim Type' ,p.PatNum AS 'Pat ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier Name' ,FORMAT(SUM(cp.FeeBilled),2) AS 'Billed Fee' ,FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(( SELECT f.Amount FROM fee f WHERE f.FeeSched = ip.FeeSched AND pc.CodeNum = f.CodeNum AND f.ProvNum = 0 AND f.ClinicNum = 0 )),0),2) AS 'Agreed Fee' ,GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode ORDER BY pc.ProcCode SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'Proc Codes' FROM claim cl INNER JOIN patient p ON cl.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Carrier) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(car.CarrierName,@Carrier)) INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = cl.InsSubNum INNER JOIN patient subp ON subp.PatNum = ib.Subscriber INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum = cl.ClaimNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON cl.ClinicNum = c.ClinicNum WHERE cl.ClaimStatus IN ('U','H','W') AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinic) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinic)) AND cl.DateService BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY cl.ClaimNum ORDER BY cl.DateService, car.CarrierName, p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, cl.ClaimNum;

request: Time card entries in a date range by time entered
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SET @EmpFirst='%%'; SET @EmpLast ='%%'; SELECT CONCAT(em.FName, ' ', em.LName) AS 'Employee' ,COALESCE(uo.UserName, '') AS 'UserName' ,ce.TimeEntered1 ,ce.TimeDisplayed1 ,ce.TimeEntered2 ,ce.TimeDisplayed2 ,IF(ce.TimeEntered1 != ce.TimeDisplayed1 OR ce.TimeEntered2 != ce.TimeDisplayed2, 'X', '') AS 'Difference?' FROM clockevent ce LEFT JOIN employee em ON ce.EmployeeNum = em.EmployeeNum LEFT JOIN userod uo ON em.EmployeeNum = uo.EmployeeNum WHERE (ce.TimeEntered1 BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY OR ce.TimeEntered2 BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND em.FName LIKE @EmpFirst AND em.LName LIKE @EmpLast

request: User Logon/Logoff for a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2020-10-01', @ToDate='2020-10-02'; SET @LogCounter=0; SELECT a.UserNum ,uo.UserName ,a.CompName ,MAX(IF(a.RowType = 0, a.LogDateTime, NULL)) AS 'LogOn' ,MAX(IF(a.RowType = 1, a.LogDateTime, NULL)) AS 'LogOff' FROM ( SELECT IF(sl.LogText LIKE '%logged on%', @LogCounter := @LogCounter + 1, @LogCounter) AS 'RowCount' ,IF(sl.LogText LIKE '%logged on%', 0, 1) AS 'RowType' ,sl.UserNum ,sl.LogDateTime ,sl.CompName FROM securitylog sl WHERE sl.PermType = 83 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%has logged%' AND sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY sl.UserNum, sl.LogDateTime ) a LEFT JOIN userod uo ON a.UserNum = uo.UserNum GROUP BY a.RowCount ORDER BY LogOn

request: Production and Income by procedure code and provider, for procedures completed in the date range. Ability to filter by procedure code, treating provider, and clinic. Requires procedures to be attached to adjustments and payments.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-05-01', @ToDate='2022-05-31'; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @Providers=''; SET @Clinics=''; SELECT IF(dup.Num IN (1,2),rep.Abbr,'Total:') AS 'Provider' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.ProcCode WHEN 2 THEN 'SubTotal' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'ProcCode' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Descript WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Descript' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Count WHEN 2 THEN SUM(rep.Count) WHEN 3 THEN SUM(rep.Count) END) AS 'Count' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.GrossProd,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd),2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd),2) END) AS 'GrossProd' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.AdjAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.AdjAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.AdjAmt),2) END) AS 'AdjAmt' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.WriteOff,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.WriteOff),2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.WriteOff),2) END) AS 'WriteOff' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.GrossProd + rep.AdjAmt - rep.WriteOff,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd + rep.AdjAmt - rep.WriteOff),2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd + rep.AdjAmt - rep.WriteOff),2) END) AS 'TotProd' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.PatPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt),2) END) AS 'PatPayAmt' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.InsPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.InsPayAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.InsPayAmt),2) END) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,(CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.PatPayAmt + rep.InsPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt + rep.InsPayAmt),2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt + rep.InsPayAmt),2) END) AS 'TotalPaid' FROM ( SELECT def.ItemName AS 'Category' ,pc.ProcCode ,pc.Descript ,COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcNum) AS 'Count' ,SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits),0)) AS 'GrossProd' ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'AdjAmt' ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'WriteOff' ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'PatPayAmt' ,SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,pl.ProvNum ,pr.Abbr FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN definition def ON pc.ProcCat = def.DefNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON pl.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics)) GROUP BY pc.ProcCode,pr.ProvNum ) rep LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,'-',rep.ProvNum,'-',rep.ProcCode) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,'-',rep.ProvNum) WHEN 3 THEN dup.num END) ORDER BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',rep.Abbr,'-',rep.ProcCode) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(rep.Abbr,dup.num) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT('zzzzzzzzzzzz',dup.num) END)

request: Patients With A First Completed Appointment Having Specified Procedure Codes And Have No Scheduled Or Completed Recall Since.
query: SET @ProcCodes='01101,01102,01103'; SELECT CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', p.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' ,p.WirelessPhone AS 'Wireless' ,DATE(firstApt.Date) AS 'FirstExam' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Date' ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT apt.AptNum ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime ASC),',',1) AS 'AptNum' ,apt.PatNum FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus=2 GROUP BY apt.PatNum ) firstApt ON firstApt.PatNum=p.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=firstApt.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ProcCodes) LEFT JOIN recall r ON r.PatNum=p.PatNum AND (r.DatePrevious > firstApt.Date OR r.DateScheduled > firstApt.Date) WHERE p.PatStatus=0 AND ISNULL(r.DateScheduled) AND ISNULL(r.DatePrevious) GROUP BY p.PatNum;

request: Procedures Marked as 'Do Not Bill to Insurance' Attached to an Appointment Between the Specified Date and the Current Date
query: SET @Date='2022-10-01'; SELECT p.PatNum ,apt.AptDateTime AS 'AptDateTime' ,pc.ProcCode AS 'ProcCode' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum=pl.ProcNum AND cp.NoBillIns INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @Date AND CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY INNER JOIN patient p ON apt.PatNum=p.PatNum GROUP BY pl.ProcNum;

request: Patients with their most recently completed appointment date before the specified date
query: SET @Date='2022-01-11'; SET @Clinics = ''; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT core.Clinic ,core.PatNum ,core.Birth AS 'Birth Month' ,core.Age ,core.First AS 'First Visit' ,core.Last AS 'Last Visit' ,core.LastHyg AS 'Last Visit Hyg' ,FORMAT(core.TotProd,2) AS 'TotalProduction' ,FORMAT(core.BalTotal,2) AS 'Outstanding Balance' ,core.Address ,core.City ,core.State ,core.Zip ,core.WirelessPhone ,core.Email ,core.RefFrom AS 'Referral Source' ,IF(core.Sched='','No','Yes') AS 'Scheduled Appt?' FROM( SELECT (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') ELSE '' END) AS 'Clinic' ,p.PatNum ,IF(p.Birthdate='0001-01-01','',MONTHNAME(p.Birthdate)) AS 'Birth' ,(CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) > 120 THEN 'Not Entered' ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,CURDATE()) END) AS 'Age' ,COALESCE(( SELECT MIN(procedurelog.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = p.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 ), '') AS 'First' ,COALESCE(( SELECT MAX(DATE(appointment.AptDateTime)) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.PatNum = p.PatNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 ), '') AS 'Last' ,COALESCE(( SELECT MAX(DATE(appointment.AptDateTime)) FROM appointment WHERE appointment.PatNum = p.PatNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 AND appointment.IsHygiene ), '') AS 'LastHyg' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.PatNum=p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus=2 ), 0) AS 'TotProd' ,COALESCE(( SELECT g.BalTotal FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum=p.Guarantor ),0) AS 'BalTotal' ,IF(p.Address2='',p.Address,CONCAT(p.Address,' ',p.Address2)) AS 'Address' ,p.City ,p.State ,p.Zip ,p.WirelessPhone ,p.Email ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(r.LName, IF(r.FName = '', '', ', '), r.FName) ORDER BY ra.RefDate, ra.ItemOrder ASC SEPARATOR '|'), '|', 1) AS 'Name' FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral r ON ra.ReferralNum = r.ReferralNum WHERE ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY ra.PatNum ), '') AS 'RefFrom' ,COALESCE(( SELECT MIN(nextappt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment nextappt WHERE nextappt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND nextappt.AptStatus = 1 AND nextappt.AptDateTime > CURDATE() ), '') AS 'Sched' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY IF(p.Birthdate='0001-01-01',13,MONTH(p.Birthdate)) ) core WHERE core.Last < @Date AND core.Last != '';

request: Referral Procedure Status
query: SET @FromDate='2022-10-01', @ToDate='2022-10-31'; SET @ReferralLastName=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(referral.LName, IF(LENGTH(referral.FName) >0, CONCAT(', ', referral.FName), '')) SEPARATOR ';') AS 'Referral', CONCAT(patient.FName, ' ', patient.LName) AS 'Patient', COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.AbbrDesc) FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.AptNum = procedurelog.AptNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 1 WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 1 ), '') AS 'ActiveTx', COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.AbbrDesc) FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 ), '') AS 'CompletedTx', COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.AbbrDesc) FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum LEFT JOIN appointment ON appointment.AptNum = procedurelog.AptNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 1 WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 1 AND ISNULL(appointment.AptNum) ), '') AS 'OutstandingTx' FROM refattach INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = refattach.PatNum INNER JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum = refattach.ReferralNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ReferralLastName) = 0, NOT referral.IsHidden, referral.LName = @ReferralLastName) WHERE refattach.RefType = 1 GROUP BY patient.PatNum ORDER BY `Patient`

request: Payments Per Operatory And Provider
