query: SET @FromDate = '2021-11-01', @ToDate = '2021-11-30'; SET @Operatory = ''; SELECT core.OpName AS 'Operatory' ,core.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PatPay),2) AS 'Pat Income' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.InsPay),2) AS 'Ins Income' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay),2) AS 'Tot Income' FROM( SELECT op.OpName ,op.OperatoryNum ,pv.ProvNum ,pv.Abbr ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'PatPay' ,0 AS 'InsPay' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN operatory op ON a.Op = op.OperatoryNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Operatory) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(op.Abbrev,@Operatory)) INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON a.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN provider pv ON pl.ProvNum = pv.ProvNum INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY op.OperatoryNum,pv.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT op.OpName ,op.OperatoryNum ,pv.ProvNum ,pv.Abbr ,0 AS 'PatPay' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsPay' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN operatory op ON a.Op = op.OperatoryNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Operatory) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(op.Abbrev,@Operatory)) INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON a.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN provider pv ON pl.ProvNum = pv.ProvNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) WHERE a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY op.OperatoryNum,pv.ProvNum ) core GROUP BY core.OperatoryNum,core.ProvNum

request: List of webforms sent in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate="2021-10-01", @ToDate="2022-10-31"; SELECT sheet.PatNum AS 'PatNum' ,DATE_FORMAT(sheet.DateTimeSheet, "%m/%d/%Y") AS 'WebForm Date' ,IFNULL(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(appointment.AptDateTime), "%m/%d/%Y") FROM appointment WHERE appointment.PatNum = sheet.PatNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 ), '') AS 'Date Last Appt' FROM sheet WHERE sheet.IsWebForm AND sheet.DateTimeSheet BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY

request: Summary statistics by provider. Similar to #649, but filters on appointment date and time in addition to using procedure date for the PatCount and $Production columns.
query: SET @FromDate='2022-11-01' , @ToDate='2022-11-30'; SET @FromTime='11:00 AM', @ToTime='06:00 PM'; SET @FromTime = (CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(@FromTime,-2)='PM' AND HOUR(TIME(@FromTime))='12' THEN SUBTIME(TIME(@FromTime),'12:00:00') WHEN SUBSTRING(@FromTime,-2)='PM' THEN ADDTIME(TIME(@FromTime),'12:00:00') ELSE TIME(@FromTime) END); SET @ToTime = (CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(@ToTime,-2)='PM' AND HOUR(TIME(@ToTime))='12' THEN SUBTIME(TIME(@ToTime),'12:00:00') WHEN SUBSTRING(@ToTime,-2)='PM' THEN ADDTIME(TIME(@ToTime),'12:00:00') ELSE TIME(@ToTime) END); SELECT pv.Abbr ,COALESCE(patcount.Count,0) AS PatCount ,COALESCE(newpat.Count,0) AS NewPat ,COALESCE(recalls.Count,0) AS Recalls ,FORMAT(COALESCE(diagnosed.Amount,0),2) AS $Diagnosed_ ,FORMAT(COALESCE(prod.Amount,0),2) AS $Production_ ,FORMAT(COALESCE(adjust.Amount,0),2) AS $Adjust_ ,FORMAT(COALESCE(writeoff.Amount,0),2) AS $Writeoff_ ,FORMAT(COALESCE(inspay.Amount,0),2) AS $InsPay_ ,FORMAT(COALESCE(patpay.Amount,0),2) AS $PatPay_ FROM provider pv LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum, COUNT(DISTINCT(a.AptNum)) AS 'Count' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum=a.AptNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND TIME(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromTime AND @ToTime GROUP BY pl.ProvNum ) patcount ON patcount.ProvNum=pv.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum, COUNT(DISTINCT(A.PatNum)) AS 'Count' FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum, MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS FirstVisit FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum ) A INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum=A.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate=A.FirstVisit AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProvNum ) newpat ON newpat.ProvNum=pv.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum, COUNT(*) AS 'Count' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum=pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode='D0120' WHERE pl.ProcStatus=2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY pl.ProvNum ) recalls ON recalls.ProvNum=pv.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS Amount FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.DateTP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus IN(1,2) GROUP BY pl.ProvNum ) diagnosed ON diagnosed.ProvNum=pv.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProvNum, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS Amount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.DateCp BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ProvNum ) inspay ON inspay.ProvNum=pv.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.ProvNum, SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS Amount FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.ProvNum ) patpay ON patpay.ProvNum=pv.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProvNum, SUM(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) AS Amount FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN appointment a ON a.AptNum=pl.AptNum AND a.AptStatus=2 AND DATE(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND TIME(a.AptDateTime) BETWEEN @FromTime AND @ToTime WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus=2 GROUP BY pl.ProvNum ) prod ON prod.ProvNum=pv.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProvNum, SUM(cp.Writeoff) AS Amount FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ProvNum ) writeoff ON writeoff.ProvNum=pv.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.ProvNum, SUM(a.AdjAmt) AS Amount FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY a.ProvNum ) adjust ON adjust.ProvNum=pv.ProvNum ORDER BY pv.Abbr;

request: Sum of PTO hours per employee in a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2023-01-01', @ToDate='2023-12-31'; SELECT CONCAT(emp.LName, ', ', emp.FName) AS 'Employee' ,ROUND(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC(ta.PTOHours)) / 3600, 2) AS 'PTO Hours' ,def.ItemName AS 'PTO Type' FROM timeadjust ta INNER JOIN employee emp ON ta.EmployeeNum = emp.EmployeeNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = ta.PtoDefNum WHERE ta.TimeEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ta.PTODefNum != 0 GROUP BY ta.EmployeeNum, ta.PtoDefNum ORDER BY emp.LName, emp.FName, def.ItemName

request: Insurance payments entered in a specific date range for a specified carrier. With payment, claim, carrier, and patient information
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Carrier='%%'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient' ,DATE_FORMAT(cp.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date Of Service' ,DATE_FORMAT(cp.DateCP,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Ins Payment Date' ,pc.ProcCode AS 'Procedure Code' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' ,FORMAT(cp.InsPayEst,2) AS '$Est Ins Payment' ,FORMAT(cp.InsPayAmt,2) AS '$Actual Ins Payment' ,COALESCE(def.ItemName,'') AS 'Payment Tracking Status' ,(CASE cl.ClaimStatus WHEN 'U' THEN 'Unsent' WHEN 'H' THEN 'Hold until pri received' WHEN 'W' THEN 'Waiting in queue' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Sent' WHEN 'R' THEN 'Received' WHEN 'I' THEN 'Hold for In Process' ELSE '' END) AS 'Claim Status' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND car.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = cp.ProvNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = cp.ClaimPaymentTracking AND def.Category = 36 WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY cp.ClaimProcNum ORDER BY cp.DateCP ASC, p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, pc.ProcCode, cp.ClaimProcNum;

request: New Patients by First Completed Appointment Date with Patient Address, From Referral Sources, Referral Patient Note, Recall Scheduled Date, and Procedure Fees for All Time
query: SET @FromDate="2024-01-01", @ToDate="2024-01-31"; SET @Provider=""; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(preference.ValueString) INTO @SpecialRecallTypes FROM preference WHERE preference.PrefName IN ("RecallTypeSpecialProphy", "RecallTypeSpecialChildProphy", "RecallTypeSpecialPerio"); SELECT DATE_FORMAT(firstApt.Date, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'FirstAptDate' ,p.LName AS 'Last Name' ,p.FName AS 'First Name' ,CONCAT(p.Address, IF(LENGTH(p.Address2) = 0, '', CONCAT(', ', p.Address2))) AS 'Address' ,p.City AS 'City' ,p.State AS 'State' ,p.Zip AS 'Zip' ,pr.Abbr AS 'PrimaryProvider' ,COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.ProcCode ORDER BY procedurecode.ProcCode, procedurelog.ProcNum) FROM procedurecode INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.CodeNum = procedurecode.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.AptNum = firstApt.AptNum ), '') AS 'FirstProcs' ,IF(rc.DateScheduled = '0001-01-01', '', DATE_FORMAT(rc.DateScheduled, '%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'Recall Sched Date' ,COALESCE(CONCAT(r.LName, IF(LENGTH(r.FName) = 0, '', CONCAT(', ', r.FName))), '') AS 'Referral' ,COALESCE(ra.Note, '') AS 'Patient Note' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 ), 0), 2) AS 'Production Fee' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Date' , SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(apt.AptNum ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime ASC), ',', 1) AS 'AptNum' , apt.PatNum FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY apt.PatNum ) AS firstApt ON firstApt.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = p.PriProv AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Provider)) LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = p.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 LEFT JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN recall rc ON rc.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN recalltype rt ON rt.RecallTypeNum = rc.RecallTypeNum AND FIND_IN_SET(rc.RecallTypeNum, @SpecialRecallTypes) WHERE firstApt.Date BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY p.PatNum, ra.RefAttachNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, ra.RefAttachNum

request: Patients' Primary Insurance Annual Max and Benefit Usage
query: SET @AmtRemaining='1000'; SELECT core.LName AS 'Last Name' ,core.FName AS 'First Name' ,core.Birthdate AS 'Birthdate' ,FORMAT(core.BenefitsUsed,2) AS 'Max Benefits Used' ,FORMAT(core.AnnualMax,2) AS 'Annual Max' ,FORMAT((core.AnnualMax-core.BenefitsUsed),2) AS 'Benefits Remaining' FROM( SELECT p.LName ,p.FName ,IF(p.Birthdate='0001-01-01','Not Entered',p.Birthdate) AS 'Birthdate' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType='P' WHERE claimproc.InsSubNum = ins.InsSubNum AND claimproc.PatNum = p.PatNum AND claimproc.ProcDate BETWEEN ins.DateRenew AND CURDATE() AND claimproc.Status IN (1,4) ),0) AS 'BenefitsUsed' ,ins.Max AS 'AnnualMax' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT benefit.MonetaryAmt AS 'Max' ,patplan.PatNum ,(CASE WHEN insplan.MonthRenew=0 THEN DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-01-01')) WHEN (insplan.MonthRenew BETWEEN 1 AND 12) AND insplan.MonthRenew <= MONTH(CURDATE()) THEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()),'-',insplan.MonthRenew,'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') WHEN (insplan.MonthRenew BETWEEN 1 AND 12) AND insplan.MonthRenew > MONTH(CURDATE()) THEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE())-1,'-',insplan.MonthRenew,'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') END) AS 'DateRenew' ,inssub.InsSubNum FROM patplan INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.InsSubNum = patplan.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = inssub.PlanNum LEFT JOIN benefit ON IF(benefit.PlanNum = 0, benefit.PatPlanNum = patplan.PatPlanNum, benefit.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum) AND benefit.BenefitType = 5 AND benefit.CovCatNum = 0 AND benefit.CoverageLevel = 1 AND benefit.CodeNum = 0 WHERE patplan.Ordinal = 1 GROUP BY patplan.PatPlanNum ) ins ON ins.PatNum = p.PatNum ) core WHERE ((core.AnnualMax-core.BenefitsUsed) <= @AmtRemaining)

request: Daily Employee Time Clock Report
query: SET @Date = '2023-03-10'; SET @Clinic = ''; SELECT CONCAT(emp.FName, ' ', emp.LName) AS 'EmployeeName' , COALESCE(( SELECT TIME(MIN(ce1.TimeDisplayed1)) FROM clockevent ce1 LEFT JOIN clinic c1 ON c1.ClinicNum = ce1.ClinicNum WHERE ce1.EmployeeNum = emp.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ce1.TimeDisplayed1) = @Date AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinic)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(c1.Abbr,"None"),@Clinic)) ),'') AS 'TimeIn' , COALESCE(( SELECT TIME(MAX(ce2.TimeDisplayed2)) FROM clockevent ce2 LEFT JOIN clinic c2 ON c2.ClinicNum = ce2.ClinicNum WHERE ce2.EmployeeNum = emp.EmployeeNum AND DATE(ce2.TimeDisplayed2) = @Date AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinic)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(c2.Abbr,"None"),@Clinic)) ),'') AS 'TimeOut' , IF(LENGTH(@Clinic)=0, "All", @Clinic) AS 'Clinic' FROM employee emp WHERE NOT emp.IsHidden;

request: Misc sheet field report for specified sheets created in the specified date range
query: SET @SheetName='Hormone Survey'; SET @ReportableName='Hormone Sat Lev'; SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat , CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name' , sheet.DateTimeSheet , sheet.request AS 'SheetName' , sheetfield.ReportableName AS 'FieldReportableName' , sheetfield.FieldValue AS 'FieldReportableValue' FROM sheet INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = sheet.PatNum INNER JOIN sheetfield ON sheetfield.SheetNum = sheet.SheetNum WHERE sheet.request LIKE @SheetName AND sheetfield.ReportableName LIKE @ReportableName AND sheet.DateTimeSheet BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY

request: Employee Time Card Log. Break clock events are not included.
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-01-01', @ToDate = '2024-01-31'; SET @Employee = 'FirstName LastName'; SELECT DATE(ce.TimeDisplayed1) AS 'Date' ,TIME_FORMAT(ce.TimeDisplayed1,'%h:%i %p') AS 'Clock In' ,IF(DATE(ce.TimeDisplayed2) = '0001-01-01','',TIME_FORMAT(ce.TimeDisplayed2,'%h:%i %p')) AS 'Clock Out' ,IF(DATE(ce.TimeDisplayed2) = '0001-01-01','',FORMAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND,ce.TimeDisplayed1,ce.TimeDisplayed2) / 3600,2)) AS 'Total' ,ce.Note FROM clockevent ce INNER JOIN employee e ON ce.EmployeeNum = e.EmployeeNum AND CONCAT(e.FName,' ',e.LName) = @Employee WHERE ce.TimeDisplayed1 BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ce.ClockStatus != 2 GROUP BY ce.ClockEventNum ORDER BY ce.TimeDisplayed1

request: Appointment Information with Additional Patient Information
query: SET @FromDate="2022-03-01", @ToDate="2023-03-31"; SET @EmploymentStatus='Employment Status'; SET @FedPovLevel='Monthly Income'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(appointment.AptDateTime, "%m/%d/%Y") AS 'Appointment Date', CONCAT( patient.LName, ', ', patient.FName ) AS 'Patient Name', patient.City AS 'Patient City', (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,patient.Birthdate,appointment.AptDateTime) > 120 THEN 'Not Entered' ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,patient.Birthdate,appointment.AptDateTime) END) AS 'Patient Age', appointment.ProvNum, COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(( SELECT procedurecode.ProcCode FROM procedurecode WHERE procedurecode.CodeNum = apptprocs.CodeNum )), '') AS 'Procedure Codes', CAST(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ), 0) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS '$Production', COALESCE( IF(appointment.InsPlan1 = 0, "No Insurance", NULL), ( SELECT carrier.CarrierName FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.CarrierNum = carrier.CarrierNum INNER JOIN claimproc ON claimproc.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum AND claim.ClaimType = 'P' INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ORDER BY claimproc.ClaimProcNum LIMIT 1 ), "No Claim" ) AS 'Insurance Carrier', COALESCE(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(IF(claim.DateSent > claim.DateResent, claim.DateSent, claim.DateResent), "%m/%d/%Y") FROM claim INNER JOIN claimproc ON claimproc.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0, 1) INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE claim.ClaimType = "P" AND procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ORDER BY claimproc.ClaimprocNum LIMIT 1 ), '') AS 'Claim Sent Date', COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP, "%m/%d/%Y") ORDER BY claimproc.DateCP) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4) AND pl.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ), '') AS 'Insurance Payment Date', CAST(COALESCE(SUM(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4) AND claimproc.ProcNum = apptprocs.ProcNum )), 0) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS '$Insurance Payment', COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(paysplit.DatePay, "%m/%d/%Y") ORDER BY paysplit.DatePay) FROM paysplit INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = paysplit.ProcNum WHERE pl.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ), '') AS 'Patient Payment Date', CAST(COALESCE(SUM(( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.ProcNum = apptprocs.ProcNum )), 0) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS '$Patient Payment', CAST(COALESCE(SUM(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = apptprocs.ProcNum )), 0) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS '$Adjustment' ,ELT(patient.Gender + 1, "Male","Female","Unknown","Other") AS 'Gender' ,ELT(patient.Position + 1, "Single", "Married", "Child", "Widowed", "Divorced") AS 'Marital Status' ,COALESCE(( SELECT pf1.FieldValue FROM patfield pf1 WHERE pf1.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND pf1.FieldName = @EmploymentStatus ),'') AS 'Employment Status' ,COALESCE(( SELECT pf2.FieldValue FROM patfield pf2 WHERE pf2.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND pf2.FieldName = @FedPovLevel ),'') AS 'Federal Poverty Level' ,(CASE patient.language WHEN 'aar' THEN 'Afar' WHEN 'afr' THEN 'Afrikaans' WHEN 'agq' THEN 'Aghem' WHEN 'aka' THEN 'Akan' WHEN 'sqi' THEN 'Albanian' WHEN 'gsw' THEN 'Alsatian' WHEN 'amh' THEN 'Amharic' WHEN 'ara' THEN 'Arabic' WHEN 'hye' THEN 'Armenian' WHEN 'asm' THEN 'Assamese' WHEN 'ast' THEN 'Asturian' WHEN 'asa' THEN 'Asu' WHEN 'aze' THEN 'Azerbaijani' WHEN 'aze' THEN 'Azerbaijani (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'aze' THEN 'Azerbaijani (Latin)' WHEN 'ksf' THEN 'Bafia' WHEN 'bam' THEN 'Bambara' WHEN 'bam' THEN 'Bambara (Latin)' WHEN 'ben' THEN 'Bangla' WHEN 'bas' THEN 'Basaa' WHEN 'bak' THEN 'Bashkir' WHEN 'eus' THEN 'Basque' WHEN 'bel' THEN 'Belarusian' WHEN 'bem' THEN 'Bemba' WHEN 'bez' THEN 'Bena' WHEN 'byn' THEN 'Blin' WHEN 'brx' THEN 'Bodo' WHEN 'bos' THEN 'Bosnian' WHEN 'bos' THEN 'Bosnian (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'bos' THEN 'Bosnian (Latin)' WHEN 'bre' THEN 'Breton' WHEN 'bul' THEN 'Bulgarian' WHEN 'mya' THEN 'Burmese' WHEN 'cat' THEN 'Catalan' WHEN 'tzm' THEN 'Central Atlas Tamazight (Arabic)' WHEN 'kur' THEN 'Central Kurdish' WHEN 'kur' THEN 'Central Kurdish (Arabic)' WHEN 'che' THEN 'Chechen' WHEN 'chr' THEN 'Cherokee' WHEN 'chr' THEN 'Cherokee (Cherokee)' WHEN 'cgg' THEN 'Chiga' WHEN 'zho' THEN 'Chinese' WHEN 'zho' THEN 'Chinese (Simplified)' WHEN 'zho' THEN 'Chinese (Simplified) Legacy' WHEN 'zho' THEN 'Chinese (Traditional)' WHEN 'zho' THEN 'Chinese (Traditional) Legacy' WHEN 'chu' THEN 'Church Slavic' WHEN 'ksh' THEN 'Colognian' WHEN 'cor' THEN 'Cornish' WHEN 'cos' THEN 'Corsican' WHEN 'hrv' THEN 'Croatian' WHEN 'ces' THEN 'Czech' WHEN 'dan' THEN 'Danish' WHEN 'prs' THEN 'Dari' WHEN 'div' THEN 'Divehi' WHEN 'dua' THEN 'Duala' WHEN 'nld' THEN 'Dutch' WHEN 'dzo' THEN 'Dzongkha' WHEN 'bin' THEN 'Edo' WHEN 'ebu' THEN 'Embu' WHEN 'eng' THEN 'English' WHEN 'epo' THEN 'Esperanto' WHEN 'est' THEN 'Estonian' WHEN 'ewe' THEN 'Ewe' WHEN 'ewo' THEN 'Ewondo' WHEN 'fao' THEN 'Faroese' WHEN 'fil' THEN 'Filipino' WHEN 'fin' THEN 'Finnish' WHEN 'fra' THEN 'French' WHEN 'fry' THEN 'Frisian' WHEN 'fur' THEN 'Friulian' WHEN 'ful' THEN 'Fulah' WHEN 'ful' THEN 'Fulah (Latin)' WHEN 'glg' THEN 'Galician' WHEN 'lug' THEN 'Ganda' WHEN 'kat' THEN 'Georgian' WHEN 'deu' THEN 'German' WHEN 'ell' THEN 'Greek' WHEN 'kal' THEN 'Greenlandic' WHEN 'grn' THEN 'Guarani' WHEN 'guj' THEN 'Gujarati' WHEN 'guz' THEN 'Gusii' WHEN 'hau' THEN 'Hausa' WHEN 'hau' THEN 'Hausa (Latin)' WHEN 'haw' THEN 'Hawaiian' WHEN 'heb' THEN 'Hebrew' WHEN 'hin' THEN 'Hindi' WHEN 'hun' THEN 'Hungarian' WHEN 'ibb' THEN 'Ibibio' WHEN 'isl' THEN 'Icelandic' WHEN 'ibo' THEN 'Igbo' WHEN 'ind' THEN 'Indonesian' WHEN 'ina' THEN 'Interlingua' WHEN 'iku' THEN 'Inuktitut' WHEN 'iku' THEN 'Inuktitut (Latin)' WHEN 'iku' THEN 'Inuktitut (Syllabics)' WHEN 'ivl' THEN 'Invariant Language (Invariant Country)' WHEN 'gle' THEN 'Irish' WHEN 'xho' THEN 'isiXhosa' WHEN 'zul' THEN 'isiZulu' WHEN 'ita' THEN 'Italian' WHEN 'jpn' THEN 'Japanese' WHEN 'jav' THEN 'Javanese' WHEN 'jav' THEN 'Javanese' WHEN 'jav' THEN 'Javanese (Javanese)' WHEN 'dyo' THEN 'Jola-Fonyi' WHEN 'kea' THEN 'Kabuverdianu' WHEN 'kab' THEN 'Kabyle' WHEN 'kkj' THEN 'Kako' WHEN 'kln' THEN 'Kalenjin' WHEN 'kam' THEN 'Kamba' WHEN 'kan' THEN 'Kannada' WHEN 'kau' THEN 'Kanuri' WHEN 'kas' THEN 'Kashmiri' WHEN 'kas' THEN 'Kashmiri (Devanagari)' WHEN 'kas' THEN 'Kashmiri (Perso-Arabic)' WHEN 'kaz' THEN 'Kazakh' WHEN 'khm' THEN 'Khmer' WHEN 'quc' THEN 'K\'iche\'' WHEN 'quc' THEN 'K\'iche\'' WHEN 'kik' THEN 'Kikuyu' WHEN 'kin' THEN 'Kinyarwanda' WHEN 'swa' THEN 'Kiswahili' WHEN 'kok' THEN 'Konkani' WHEN 'kor' THEN 'Korean' WHEN 'khq' THEN 'Koyra Chiini' WHEN 'ses' THEN 'Koyraboro Senni' WHEN 'nmg' THEN 'Kwasio' WHEN 'kir' THEN 'Kyrgyz' WHEN 'lkt' THEN 'Lakota' WHEN 'lag' THEN 'Langi' WHEN 'lao' THEN 'Lao' WHEN 'lat' THEN 'Latin' WHEN 'lav' THEN 'Latvian' WHEN 'lin' THEN 'Lingala' WHEN 'lit' THEN 'Lithuanian' WHEN 'dsb' THEN 'Lower Sorbian' WHEN 'lub' THEN 'Luba-Katanga' WHEN 'luo' THEN 'Luo' WHEN 'ltz' THEN 'Luxembourgish' WHEN 'luy' THEN 'Luyia' WHEN 'mkd' THEN 'Macedonian (FYROM)' WHEN 'jmc' THEN 'Machame' WHEN 'mgh' THEN 'Makhuwa-Meetto' WHEN 'kde' THEN 'Makonde' WHEN 'mlg' THEN 'Malagasy' WHEN 'msa' THEN 'Malay' WHEN 'mal' THEN 'Malayalam' WHEN 'mlt' THEN 'Maltese' WHEN 'mni' THEN 'Manipuri' WHEN 'glv' THEN 'Manx' WHEN 'mri' THEN 'Maori' WHEN 'arn' THEN 'Mapudungun' WHEN 'mar' THEN 'Marathi' WHEN 'mas' THEN 'Masai' WHEN 'mzn' THEN 'Mazanderani' WHEN 'mer' THEN 'Meru' WHEN 'mgo' THEN 'Meta\'' WHEN 'moh' THEN 'Mohawk' WHEN 'mon' THEN 'Mongolian' WHEN 'mon' THEN 'Mongolian (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'mon' THEN 'Mongolian (Traditional Mongolian)' WHEN 'mfe' THEN 'Morisyen' WHEN 'mua' THEN 'Mundang' WHEN 'naq' THEN 'Nama' WHEN 'nep' THEN 'Nepali' WHEN 'nnh' THEN 'Ngiemboon' WHEN 'jgo' THEN 'Ngomba' WHEN 'nqo' THEN 'N\'ko' WHEN 'nde' THEN 'North Ndebele' WHEN 'lrc' THEN 'Northern Luri' WHEN 'nob' THEN 'Norwegian' WHEN 'nob' THEN 'Norwegian (Bokmal)' WHEN 'nno' THEN 'Norwegian (Nynorsk)' WHEN 'nus' THEN 'Nuer' WHEN 'nyn' THEN 'Nyankole' WHEN 'oci' THEN 'Occitan' WHEN 'ori' THEN 'Odia' WHEN 'orm' THEN 'Oromo' WHEN 'oss' THEN 'Ossetic' WHEN 'pap' THEN 'Papiamento' WHEN 'pus' THEN 'Pashto' WHEN 'fas' THEN 'Persian' WHEN 'pol' THEN 'Polish' WHEN 'por' THEN 'Portuguese' WHEN 'prg' THEN 'Prussian' WHEN 'pan' THEN 'Punjabi' WHEN 'pan' THEN 'Punjabi (Arabic)' WHEN 'qub' THEN 'Quechua' WHEN 'ron' THEN 'Romanian' WHEN 'roh' THEN 'Romansh' WHEN 'rof' THEN 'Rombo' WHEN 'run' THEN 'Rundi' WHEN 'rus' THEN 'Russian' WHEN 'rwk' THEN 'Rwa' WHEN 'ssy' THEN 'Saho' WHEN 'sah' THEN 'Sakha' WHEN 'saq' THEN 'Samburu' WHEN 'smn' THEN 'Sami (Inari)' WHEN 'smj' THEN 'Sami (Lule)' WHEN 'sme' THEN 'Sami (Northern)' WHEN 'sms' THEN 'Sami (Skolt)' WHEN 'sma' THEN 'Sami (Southern)' WHEN 'sag' THEN 'Sango' WHEN 'sbp' THEN 'Sangu' WHEN 'san' THEN 'Sanskrit' WHEN 'gla' THEN 'Scottish Gaelic' WHEN 'seh' THEN 'Sena' WHEN 'srp' THEN 'Serbian' WHEN 'srp' THEN 'Serbian (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'srp' THEN 'Serbian (Latin)' WHEN 'nso' THEN 'Sesotho sa Leboa' WHEN 'tsn' THEN 'Setswana' WHEN 'ksb' THEN 'Shambala' WHEN 'sna' THEN 'Shona' WHEN 'sna' THEN 'Shona (Latin)' WHEN 'sin' THEN 'Sindhi' WHEN 'sin' THEN 'Sindhi (Arabic)' WHEN 'sin' THEN 'Sindhi (Devanagari)' WHEN 'sin' THEN 'Sinhala' WHEN 'slk' THEN 'Slovak' WHEN 'slv' THEN 'Slovenian' WHEN 'xog' THEN 'Soga' WHEN 'som' THEN 'Somali' WHEN 'nbl' THEN 'South Ndebele' WHEN 'sot' THEN 'Southern Sotho' WHEN 'spa' THEN 'Spanish' WHEN 'zgh' THEN 'Standard Moroccan Tamazight' WHEN 'zgh' THEN 'Standard Moroccan Tamazight (Tifinagh)' WHEN 'ssw' THEN 'Swati' WHEN 'swe' THEN 'Swedish' WHEN 'syr' THEN 'Syriac' WHEN 'shi' THEN 'Tachelhit' WHEN 'shi' THEN 'Tachelhit (Latin)' WHEN 'shi' THEN 'Tachelhit (Tifinagh)' WHEN 'dav' THEN 'Taita' WHEN 'tgk' THEN 'Tajik' WHEN 'tgk' THEN 'Tajik (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'tzm' THEN 'Tamazight' WHEN 'tzm' THEN 'Tamazight (Latin)' WHEN 'tzm' THEN 'Tamazight (Tifinagh)' WHEN 'tam' THEN 'Tamil' WHEN 'twq' THEN 'Tasawaq' WHEN 'tat' THEN 'Tatar' WHEN 'tel' THEN 'Telugu' WHEN 'teo' THEN 'Teso' WHEN 'tha' THEN 'Thai' WHEN 'bod' THEN 'Tibetan' WHEN 'tig' THEN 'Tigre' WHEN 'tir' THEN 'Tigrinya' WHEN 'ton' THEN 'Tongan' WHEN 'tso' THEN 'Tsonga' WHEN 'tur' THEN 'Turkish' WHEN 'tuk' THEN 'Turkmen' WHEN 'ukr' THEN 'Ukrainian' WHEN 'hsb' THEN 'Upper Sorbian' WHEN 'urd' THEN 'Urdu' WHEN 'uig' THEN 'Uyghur' WHEN 'uzb' THEN 'Uzbek' WHEN 'uzb' THEN 'Uzbek (Cyrillic)' WHEN 'uzb' THEN 'Uzbek (Latin)' WHEN 'uzb' THEN 'Uzbek (Perso-Arabic)' WHEN 'vai' THEN 'Vai' WHEN 'vai' THEN 'Vai (Latin)' WHEN 'vai' THEN 'Vai (Vai)' WHEN 'ven' THEN 'Venda' WHEN 'vie' THEN 'Vietnamese' WHEN 'vol' THEN 'Volapuk' WHEN 'vun' THEN 'Vunjo' WHEN 'wae' THEN 'Walser' WHEN 'cym' THEN 'Welsh' WHEN 'wal' THEN 'Wolaytta' WHEN 'wol' THEN 'Wolof' WHEN 'yav' THEN 'Yangben' WHEN 'iii' THEN 'Yi' WHEN 'yid' THEN 'Yiddish' WHEN 'yor' THEN 'Yoruba' WHEN 'dje' THEN 'Zarma' WHEN '' THEN 'English' ELSE patient.Language END) AS 'Language' ,COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( (CASE pr.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' WHEN -1 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdcrec) > 0 THEN (SELECT cdcrec.request FROM cdcrec WHERE cdcrec.CdcrecCode = pr.CdcrecCode AND cdcrec.HeirarchicalCode LIKE 'R%') ELSE (CASE pr.CdcrecCode WHEN '2054-5' THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN '1002-5' THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN '2028-9' THEN 'Asian' WHEN '2076-8' THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN '2131-1' THEN 'Other' WHEN '2106-3' THEN 'White' WHEN 'ASKU-RACE' THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' ELSE NULL END) END) ELSE NULL END) ORDER BY IF(FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11) = 0,pr.cdcreccode,FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)) SEPARATOR ";") FROM patientrace pr WHERE pr.PatNum = patient.PatNum ) ,'') AS 'Race' ,COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( (CASE pr.Race WHEN 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN 10 THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 11 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyEthnicity' WHEN -1 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdcrec) > 0 THEN (SELECT cdcrec.request FROM cdcrec WHERE cdcrec.CdcrecCode = pr.CdcrecCode AND cdcrec.HeirarchicalCode LIKE 'E%') ELSE (CASE pr.CdcrecCode WHEN '2135-2' THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN '2186-5' THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 'ASKU-ETHNICITY' THEN 'Declined To Specify' ELSE NULL END) END) ELSE NULL END) ORDER BY IF(FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)=0,pr.cdcreccode,FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)) SEPARATOR ';') AS 'Ethnicity' FROM patientrace pr WHERE pr.PatNum = patient.PatNum ) ,'') AS 'Ethnicity' ,IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(procedurelog.ProcDate) FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate <> '0001-01-01' AND procedurelog.CodeNum NOT IN( SELECT procedurecode.CodeNum FROM procedurecode WHERE procedurecode.ProcCode IN ('D9986', 'D9987') ) ), '') AS 'Date of First Visit' FROM appointment INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = appointment.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog apptprocs ON apptprocs.AptNum = appointment.AptNum WHERE appointment.AptStatus = 2 AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY appointment.AptNum ORDER BY appointment.AptDateTime, `Patient Name`;

request: New Patient Appointments Report - Lists patients with no completed procedures (excluding D9986 & D9987) that have a future scheduled appointment, as of the report run date, that was created in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-01-01', @ToDate = '2024-01-01'; SET @Clinics = ''; SET @BrokenCodes = ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D9986','D9987') ); SELECT a.PatNum ,(CASE p.PatStatus WHEN 0 THEN 'Patient' WHEN 1 THEN 'NonPatient' WHEN 2 THEN 'Inactive' WHEN 3 THEN 'Archived' WHEN 4 THEN 'Deleted' WHEN 5 THEN 'Deceased' WHEN 6 THEN 'Prospective' END) AS 'PatStatus' ,IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,a.AptDateTime AS 'Appt Date' ,a.SecDateTEntry AS 'Created On' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON a.ClinicNum = c.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND NOT FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum,@BrokenCodes) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE a.SecDateTEntry BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptDateTime > CURDATE() AND ISNULL(pl.PatNum) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinics)) AND a.AptStatus = 1 AND p.PatStatus != 4

request: Families with credit balances before insurance
query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @Broken FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ("D9986","D9987"); SELECT g.PatNum AS "Pat ,g.FName ,g.LName ,g.MiddleI ,g.Address ,g.Address2 ,g.City ,g.State ,g.Zip ,g.SSN ,g.BalTotal AS "$TotalCreditBal_" ,( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.DefNum = g.BillingType ) AS "Billing Type" ,IFNULL(lastVis.Date,'') AS "DateLastVisit" ,IFNULL(nextVis.AptDT,'') AS "DateNextVisit" FROM patient g LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.Guarantor ,MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS "Date" FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum,@Broken) GROUP BY p.Guarantor ) lastVis ON lastVis.Guarantor = g.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pa.Guarantor ,MIN(apt.AptDateTime) AS "AptDT" FROM patient pa INNER JOIN appointment apt ON pa.PatNum = apt.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus = 1 AND apt.AptDateTime > NOW() GROUP BY pa.Guarantor ) nextVis ON nextVis.Guarantor = g.PatNum WHERE g.PatNum = g.Guarantor AND g.BalTotal < 0 ORDER BY g.LName, g.FName

request: Patients that have active popups on their account and are not deleted (for version 22.2 and up).
query: SELECT popup.PatNum AS 'Pat , p.PatNum , popup.request FROM popup INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = popup.PatNum WHERE (popup.DateTimeDisabled = '0001-01-01' OR popup.DateTimeDisabled > CURDATE()) AND IsArchived = 0 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum

request: List of same day patient payment amounts attached to procedures and adjustments, summed by payment type.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-03-01', @ToDate='2023-03-31'; SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate, '%m/%d/%Y'), ' - ', DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate, '%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'Payment Type', '' AS 'Amt' UNION ALL SELECT ptype.ItemName AS 'PayType' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(trans.SplitAmt), 0.00), 2) AS 'Amt' FROM definition ptype LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayType = ptype.DefNum AND pay.PayDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TrType' ,pl.ProcNum AS 'TrNum' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'TrDate' ,plps.SplitAmt ,plps.PayNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN paysplit plps ON plps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND plps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND plps.DatePay = pl.ProcDate UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TrType' ,adj.AdjNum AS 'TrNum' ,adj.AdjDate AS 'TrDate' ,adjps.SplitAmt ,adjps.PayNum FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN paysplit adjps ON adjps.AdjNum = adj.AdjNum AND adjps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND adjps.DatePay = adj.AdjDate ) trans ON trans.PayNum = pay.PayNum WHERE ptype.Category = 10 GROUP BY ptype.DefNum

request: Procedure production and income report for completed procedures in the date range for patients with discount plans.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @Provider=''; SET @DiscountPlan='%%'; SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT core.PatNum , core.request AS 'DiscountPlan' , IF(@EasyNoClinics, '', COALESCE(core.Clinic,'Unassigned')) AS 'Clinic' , core.Provider , core.DOS , core.ProcCode AS 'Procedure Code' , FORMAT(core.GrossProd, 2) AS 'GrossProd' , FORMAT(core.Adjustments, 2) AS 'Adjustments' , FORMAT(core.GrossProd + core.Adjustments, 2) AS 'NetProd' , FORMAT(core.Payments, 2) AS 'Payments' FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(c.Abbr, 'None') AS 'Clinic' ,p.PatNum , CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' , pl.ProcDate AS 'DOS' , pc.ProcCode AS 'ProcCode' , pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'GrossProd' , pl.ProcNum , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'Adjustments' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND ps.DatePay = pl.ProcDate ), 0) AS 'Payments' , dp.request , pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = p.PriProv AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Provider)) INNER JOIN discountplansub dps ON dps.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN discountplan dp ON dp.DiscountPlanNum = dps.DiscountPlanNum AND dp.request LIKE @DiscountPlan LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND (cp.ClaimNum != 0 OR (cp.Status = 5)) WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(c.Abbr, 'None'), @Clinics)) AND ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) ) core ORDER BY core.Patient, core.PatNum, core.DOS, core.Provider, core.ProcCode, core.ProcNum

request: Patient Appointments in a specified date range. Visit columns report information from inside the date range only. See Specifications for details on columns.
query: SET @FromDate="2024-02-01", @ToDate="2024-02-07"; SELECT CONCAT( patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient Name' ,patient.Email AS 'Email' ,COUNT(DISTINCT appointment.AptNum) AS 'Number of Visits' ,DATE_FORMAT(MIN(appointment.AptDateTime), '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'First Visit' ,DATE_FORMAT(MAX(appointment.AptDateTime), '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Last Visit' ,COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(referral.LName, IF(LENGTH(referral.FName) = 0, '', CONCAT(', ', referral.FName))) ORDER BY refattach.ItemOrder SEPARATOR '; ') FROM refattach INNER JOIN referral ON referral.ReferralNum = refattach.ReferralNum WHERE refattach.RefType = 1 AND refattach.PatNum = patient.PatNum ), '')AS 'Referral' ,CAST(COALESCE(SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)), 0) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS 'Production' FROM patient INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 AND appointment.AptDateTime >= @FromDate LEFT JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum GROUP BY patient.PatNum HAVING MAX(appointment.AptDateTime) <= @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY

request: Patient Payment Report for specified patient. See variable comments for details about how they are used.
query: SET @Year='2024'; SET @PatNum=2; SET @FamilyOrIndividual='I'; SET @IncludePaymentsToSelf='Y'; SET @IncludeOutsidePayments='Y'; SET @IncludePaymentsForOthers='N'; SET @ExcludedPayTypes='Conv Ins Payment'; SET @IncludePrepayments='Attached'; SET @AttachedPrepayDate='Pay'; SET @IncludeTPPrePays='N'; SET @ShowDetails='Y'; SET @ShowProvs='N'; SET @ShortDescripts='Y'; SET @ShortDescLength=20; SET @PracticeName='Default'; SET @PracticePhone='Default'; SET @PracticeAddressStreet='Default'; SET @PracticeAddressSuite='Default'; SET @PracticeAddressCityStZip='Default'; SET @ExcludedPayTypesUse=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ExcludedPayTypes)=0 THEN '^$' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ExcludedPayTypes,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @PracticeTitle = IF( @PracticeName='Default' , (SELECT pracinfo.ValueString FROM preference pracinfo WHERE pracinfo.PrefNum = 5) , @PracticeTitle := @PracticeName ) ,@PracticePhoneNum = IF( @PracticePhone='Default' , (SELECT CONCAT('Phone: (', LEFT(pracinfo.ValueString, 3), ')', LEFT(SUBSTRING(pracinfo.ValueString, 4), 3), '-', SUBSTRING(pracinfo.ValueString, 7)) FROM preference pracinfo WHERE pracinfo.PrefNum = 11) , @PracticePhoneNum := @PracticePhone ) ,@PracAddStreet = IF( @PracticeAddressStreet='Default' , (SELECT pracinfo.ValueString FROM preference pracinfo WHERE pracinfo.PrefNum = 6) , @PracAddStreet := @PracticeAddressStreet ) ,@PracAddSuite = IF( @PracticeAddressSuite='Default' , (SELECT pracinfo.ValueString FROM preference pracinfo WHERE pracinfo.PrefNum = 7) , @PracAddSuite := @PracticeAddressSuite ) ,@PracAddCityStateZip = IF( @PracticeAddressCityStZip='Default' , (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pracinfo.ValueString SEPARATOR ', ') FROM preference pracinfo WHERE pracinfo.PrefNum IN (8,9,10)) , @PracAddCityStateZip := @PracticeAddressCityStZip ); SELECT IF(@FamilyOrIndividual = 'F', p.Guarantor, p.PatNum) INTO @PatNumUse FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = @PatNum; SELECT ValueString INTO @LanguagePref FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'LanguageAndRegion'; SELECT (CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN @PracticeTitle WHEN 2 THEN @PracticePhoneNum WHEN 3 THEN @PracAddStreet WHEN 4 THEN @PracAddSuite WHEN 5 THEN @PracAddCityStateZip WHEN 6 THEN CONCAT( 'Date Range: \n' , DATE_FORMAT(DATE(CONCAT(@Year,'-01-01')), '%m/%d/%Y') , '-' , DATE_FORMAT(DATE(CONCAT(@Year,'-12-31')), '%m/%d/%Y') ) WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 8 THEN CONCAT(g.FName,' ',g.LName) WHEN 9 THEN g.Address WHEN 10 THEN g.Address2 WHEN 11 THEN CONCAT(g.city,', ',g.State,' ', g.zip) WHEN 12 THEN '' WHEN 13 THEN 'Payor:' END) AS ' ,(CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 8 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 10 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' WHEN 12 THEN '' WHEN 13 THEN 'Patient:' END) AS ' ,(CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 8 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 10 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' WHEN 12 THEN '' WHEN 13 THEN 'Pay Date:' END) AS ' ,(CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 8 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 10 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' WHEN 12 THEN '' WHEN 13 THEN 'Date of Service:' END) AS ' ,(CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 8 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 10 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' WHEN 12 THEN '' WHEN 13 THEN 'Pay Type/Details:' END) AS ' ,(CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 8 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 10 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' WHEN 12 THEN '' WHEN 13 THEN 'Amount:' END) AS ' ,(CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' WHEN 8 THEN '' WHEN 9 THEN '' WHEN 10 THEN '' WHEN 11 THEN '' WHEN 12 THEN '' WHEN 13 THEN 'Split Amt:' END) AS ' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 ) dup1 LEFT JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = @PatNumUse WHERE IF(LENGTH(@PracAddSuite) = 0, dup1.Num != 4, TRUE) UNION ALL SELECT IF(pays.Num = 3, '', pays.Payor) AS 'Payor' ,IF(pays.Num = 3, '', pays.Payee) AS 'Patient' ,IF(pays.Num = 3, '', pays.DatePay) AS 'DatePay' ,IF(pays.Num = 3, '', IFNULL(pays.DateofService,'')) AS 'DateofService' ,IF(pays.Num = 3, 'Total:', IFNULL(pays.PayTypeDetails,'')) AS 'PayTypeDetails' ,IF(pays.Num IN (1,3), pays.Amount,'') AS 'Amount' ,IF(pays.Num = 2, pays.Amount,'') AS 'SplitAmount' FROM ( SELECT dupd.Num, IF( dupd.Num IN (1,2) ,CONCAT(DatePay,' ', pay.PayNum,' ', ps.PatNum,' ', dupd.Num,' ', dup.Num,' ', SplitNum) ,CONCAT('z') ) AS 'Ordering' ,( CASE WHEN dupd.Num = 1 THEN CONCAT(dupd.Num, '+', dup.Num, '+', pay.PayNum, '+', ps.PatNum) WHEN @ShowDetails = 'Y' AND dupd.Num = 2 THEN CONCAT(dupd.Num, '+', dup.Num, '+', ps.SplitNum, '+', ps.PatNum) WHEN dupd.Num = 3 THEN dupd.Num END ) AS 'Grouping' ,CONCAT( TRIM(p.LName), ', ', TRIM(p.FName), IF(LENGTH(TRIM(p.MiddleI)) > 0, CONCAT(' ', TRIM(p.MiddleI)), '') ) AS 'Payor' ,IF(p.PatNum = pps.PatNum ,'Same' ,CONCAT( TRIM(pps.LName), ', ', TRIM(pps.FName), IF(LENGTH(TRIM(pps.MiddleI)) > 0, CONCAT(' ', TRIM(pps.MiddleI)), '') )) AS 'Payee' ,IF( dupd.Num = 1 ,IF( COALESCE(@LanguagePref,'en-US') LIKE '%-US' ,DATE_FORMAT(ps.DatePay,'%m/%d/%Y') ,DATE_FORMAT(ps.DatePay,'%d/%m/%Y') ) , '' ) AS 'DatePay' ,MAX(IF( dupd.Num = 2 AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 , IF( COALESCE(@LanguagePref,'en-US') LIKE '%-US' ,DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%Y') ,DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate,'%d/%m/%Y') ) , '' )) AS 'DateofService' ,MAX(IF( dupd.Num=1 ,CONCAT( COALESCE(paytype.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') ,IF( ps.UnearnedType > 0 AND NOT ISNULL(unepaytype.ItemName) ,CONCAT(': ', unepaytype.ItemName) ,'' ) ,IF( LENGTH(pay.CheckNum)>0 ,CONCAT(' - Check ,'' ) ) ,CONCAT( ' ', IF( pl.ProcStatus = 1 , '(TP)' ,'' ) ,pc.ProcCode ,': ' ,IF( @ShortDescripts = 'Y' , LEFT(pc.Descript, @ShortDescLength) , pc.Descript ) ,IF( @ShowProvs = 'Y' AND pay.PayType = 0 ,CONCAT(' | Provider: ', (SELECT prov.LName FROM provider prov WHERE prov.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum)) ,'' ) ) )) AS 'PayTypeDetails' ,FORMAT(SUM(ps.SplitAmt), 2) AS 'Amount' FROM patient p INNER JOIN payment pay ON p.PatNum = pay.PatNum INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum AND ABS(ps.SplitAmt) > 0 AND ps.AdjNum = 0 INNER JOIN patient pps ON ps.PatNum = pps.PatNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 ) dupd ON IF( (@ShowDetails = 'Y' AND dupd.Num = 2) , ( ps.ProcNum > 0 OR ps.UnearnedType > 0 ) , dupd.Num != 2 ) INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 ) dup ON (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @IncludePaymentsToSelf = 'Y' THEN IF( @FamilyOrIndividual = 'I' ,pay.PatNum = @PatNumUse AND ps.PatNum = @PatNumUse ,pay.PatNum IN( SELECT p2.PatNum FROM patient p2 WHERE p2.Guarantor = @PatNumUse ) AND ps.PatNum IN( SELECT p2.PatNum FROM patient p2 WHERE p2.Guarantor = @PatNumUse ) ) WHEN dup.Num = 2 AND @IncludeOutsidePayments = 'Y' THEN IF( @FamilyOrIndividual = 'I' ,pay.PatNum != @PatNumUse AND ps.PatNum = @PatNumUse ,pay.PatNum NOT IN( SELECT p2.PatNum FROM patient p2 WHERE p2.Guarantor = @PatNumUse ) AND ps.PatNum IN( SELECT p2.PatNum FROM patient p2 WHERE p2.Guarantor = @PatNumUse ) ) WHEN dup.Num = 3 AND @IncludePaymentsForOthers = 'Y' THEN IF( @FamilyOrIndividual = 'I' ,pay.PatNum = @PatNumUse AND ps.PatNum != @PatNumUse ,pay.PatNum IN( SELECT p2.PatNum FROM patient p2 WHERE p2.Guarantor = @PatNumUse ) AND ps.PatNum NOT IN( SELECT p2.PatNum FROM patient p2 WHERE p2.Guarantor = @PatNumUse ) ) ELSE FALSE END) LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON paytype.DefNum = pay.PayType LEFT JOIN definition unepaytype ON unepaytype.DefNum = ps.UnearnedType LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND dupd.Num = 2 WHERE IF( @IncludePrepayments IN ('All', 'Attached') AND @AttachedPrepayDate = 'Proc' AND NOT ISNULL(unepaytype.DefNum) AND NOT ISNULL(pl.ProcNum) , pl.ProcDate , pay.PayDate ) BETWEEN DATE(CONCAT(@Year,'-01-01')) AND DATE(CONCAT(@Year,'-12-31')) AND COALESCE(paytype.ItemName, 'IncTransfer') NOT REGEXP @ExcludedPayTypesUse AND (CASE WHEN @IncludePrepayments = 'Attached' AND ps.UnearnedType > 0 THEN ps.ProcNum > 0 WHEN @IncludePrepayments = 'Unattached' AND ps.UnearnedType > 0 THEN ps.ProcNum = 0 WHEN @IncludePrepayments = 'None' AND ps.UnearnedType > 0 THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END) AND IF( @IncludeTPPrePays = 'Y' , TRUE , (pl.ProcStatus = 2 OR ISNULL(pl.ProcNum)) ) GROUP BY Grouping ORDER BY Ordering ) pays GROUP BY pays.Ordering

request: Procedure Code Category Production Analysis
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-04-01', @ToDate = '2024-04-30'; SELECT def.ItemName AS 'Procedure Code Category' ,COUNT(*) AS 'CompletedCount' ,FORMAT(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)),2) AS 'CompletedFee' ,CONCAT(FORMAT((COUNT(*) / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedurelog pl2 WHERE pl2.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl2.ProcStatus = 2 )) * 100,2),'%') AS 'CompletedPercentage' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = pc.ProcCat WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY def.ItemName ORDER BY def.ItemOrder;

request: Current fees from each fee schedule for procedures completed in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2023-04-01', @ToDate='2023-04-26'; SELECT fs.request AS 'Fee Schedule' , (CASE core.ProvNum WHEN 0 THEN 'Default' ELSE ( SELECT pr.Abbr FROM provider pr WHERE pr.ProvNum = core.ProvNum ) END) AS 'Provider' , def.ItemName AS 'Category' , pc.Descript , pc.ProcCode , COALESCE(( SELECT FORMAT(f.Amount, 2) FROM fee f WHERE f.CodeNum = core.CodeNum AND f.FeeSched = core.FeeSched AND f.ProvNum = core.ProvNum AND f.ClinicNum = 0 LIMIT 1 ), 'None') AS 'Amount' , COUNT(DISTINCT core.ProcNum) AS 'Count' FROM ( SELECT procfs.ProcNum , procfs.FeeSched , COALESCE(( SELECT f.ProvNum FROM fee f WHERE f.CodeNum = procfs.CodeNum AND f.FeeSched = procfs.FeeSched AND f.ProvNum = procfs.ProvNum AND f.ClinicNum = 0 ), 0) AS 'ProvNum' , procfs.CodeNum FROM ( SELECT procs.ProcNum , (CASE WHEN procs.PriClaimFeeSched != 0 THEN procs.PriClaimFeeSched WHEN procs.CapFeeSched != 0 THEN procs.CapFeeSched WHEN procs.PatFeeSched != 0 THEN procs.PatFeeSched WHEN procs.ProcProvFeeSched != 0 THEN procs.ProcProvFeeSched WHEN procs.AptProvFeeSched != 0 THEN procs.AptProvFeeSched WHEN procs.OtherAptProvFeeSched != 0 THEN procs.OtherAptProvFeeSched WHEN procs.PatProvFeeSched != 0 THEN procs.PatProvFeeSched END) AS 'FeeSched' , procs.CodeNum , procs.ProvNum FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcNum , pl.CodeNum , pl.ProvNum , COALESCE(( SELECT ip.FeeSched FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType = 'P' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ORDER BY cp.DateCP DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS 'PriClaimFeeSched' , COALESCE(( SELECT ip.CopayFeeSched FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType = 'Cap' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ORDER BY cp.DateCP DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS 'CapFeeSched' , p.FeeSched AS 'PatFeeSched' , COALESCE(( SELECT pr.FeeSched FROM provider pr INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.ProvNumDefault = pr.ProvNum WHERE pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum ), 0) AS 'ProcProvFeeSched' , COALESCE(( SELECT pr.FeeSched FROM provider pr INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum WHERE apt.AptNum = pl.AptNum ), 0) AS 'AptProvFeeSched' , COALESCE(( SELECT pr.FeeSched FROM provider pr INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND apt.AptStatus IN (1,2,3,5) WHERE apt.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN pl.ProcDate AND pl.ProcDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY apt.PatNum ), 0) AS 'OtherAptProvFeeSched' , ( SELECT pr.FeeSched FROM provider pr WHERE pr.ProvNum = p.PriProv ) AS 'PatProvFeeSched' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 ) procs ) procfs GROUP BY procfs.ProcNum ) core INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum = core.FeeSched INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = core.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = pc.ProcCat GROUP BY core.CodeNum, core.FeeSched, core.ProvNum ORDER BY core.FeeSched, core.ProvNum, core.CodeNum

request: Patient referral sources with at least the specified number of patients referred in the date range
query: SET @FromDate = '2023-05-01', @ToDate='2023-05-31'; SET @Referrals = 2; SELECT core.Patient ,core.Address ,core.Address2 ,core.City ,core.State ,core.Zip ,core.Birthdate AS 'Birthdate' ,DATE_FORMAT(core.NextApt,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'NextApt' ,core.Referrals ,core.FamBal AS 'ReferrerFamBalance' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(p.FName,' ', p.LName) AS 'Patient' ,p.Address ,p.Address2 ,p.City ,p.State ,p.Zip ,CONCAT(p.Address, IF(LENGTH(p.Address2) = 0, ', ', CONCAT(', ', p.Address2, ', ')), p.City, ', ', p.State, ' ', p.Zip) AS 'FullAddress' ,IF(p.Birthdate = '0001-01-01', '', DATE_FORMAT(p.Birthdate,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'Birthdate' ,IFNULL(( SELECT DATE(MIN(nextappt.AptDateTime)) FROM appointment nextappt WHERE nextappt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND nextappt.AptStatus = 1 AND nextappt.AptDateTime > CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY ), '') AS 'NextApt' ,( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pat.PatNum) FROM patient pat INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.PatNum = pat.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.RefDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN referral ref ON ref.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum WHERE ref.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'Referrals' ,( SELECT (g.BalTotal - g.InsEst) FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum = p.Guarantor ) AS 'FamBal' FROM patient p INNER JOIN referral ref ON ref.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum ) core WHERE core.Referrals >= @Referrals AND core.NextApt != '';

request: Appointments requiring additional work before sending claims
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-01-01', @ToDate = '2024-01-31'; SET @Provider = ''; SET @Hygienist = ''; SET @Confirm = 'Not Signed,Checkout,AttnNeeded'; SELECT DATE(a.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDate' ,p.PatNum AS 'Patient Number' ,CONCAT(p.LName, ', ', p.FName) AS 'Patient Name' ,CONCAT(pr.LName,', ',pr.FName) AS 'Provider Name' ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider Abbr' ,IFNULL(NULLIF(CONCAT(hyg.LName,', ',hyg.FName),', '),'') AS 'Hygienist Name' ,IFNULL(hyg.Abbr,'') AS 'Hygienist Abbr' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.AptNum = a.AptNum ),0) AS 'Appt Fees' ,def.ItemValue AS 'Appt Status' ,COALESCE(( SELECT clinic.request FROM clinic WHERE clinic.ClinicNum = a.ClinicNum ), 'None') AS 'Clinic' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON a.PatNum = p.PatNum INNER JOIN definition def ON a.Confirmed = def.DefNum AND FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemValue,@Confirm) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = a.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Provider)) LEFT JOIN provider hyg ON hyg.ProvNum = a.ProvHyg WHERE a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND IF(LENGTH(@Hygienist) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(hyg.Abbr,@Hygienist))

request: Code usage
query: SET @FromDate='2023-01-01', @ToDate='2023-01-31'; SET @Codes='D0150,D0120,D0140'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @Providers=''; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT a.PatNum AS 'Pat Num' ,a.AptDateTime ,GROUP_CONCAT(pr.Abbr) AS 'ProcLevelProviders' ,GROUP_CONCAT((CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') ELSE '' END)) AS 'ProcLevelClinics' ,FORMAT(( SELECT SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.AptNum = a.AptNum ),2) AS 'GrossProd' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON a.AptNum = pl.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Codes) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'Unassigned') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY a.AptNum

request: Carrier and Provider Writeoffs
query: SET @FromDate='2023-05-01', @ToDate='2023-05-31'; SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate, '%m/%d/%Y'), '-', DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate, '%m/%d/%Y')) AS 'Carrier' , '' AS 'Provider', '' AS 'Writeoff' UNION ALL SELECT ( SELECT CarrierName FROM carrier WHERE carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum ) AS 'Carrier' ,( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = claimproc.ProvNum ) AS 'Provider' ,FORMAT(SUM(claimproc.WriteOff), 2) AS 'Writeoff' FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claim ON claim.ClaimNum = claimproc.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = claim.PlanNum WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) AND claimproc.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND claimproc.WriteOff != 0 GROUP BY `Carrier`, `Provider`

request: Gross production per clock hour over a date range
query: SET @FromDate='2023-05-01', @ToDate='2023-05-31'; SET @FromHour='7', @ToHour='21'; SET @Provider=''; SELECT TIME_FORMAT(clock.increment, '%r') AS 'Hour' ,FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE( (( SELECT SUM((procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cpc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cpc WHERE cpc.Status IN(7, 8) AND cpc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum ),0)) AS 'ProcFee' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @Provider)) WHERE procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum ) / CHAR_LENGTH(appointment.Pattern)), 0)) , 2) AS 'Production' FROM ( SELECT SEC_TO_TIME(nums.num * 300) AS increment FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(n2.num,n1.num,n0.num) + 0 AS 'num' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 ) AS n0 JOIN ( SELECT 0 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 ) AS n1 JOIN ( SELECT 0 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 ) AS n2 ORDER BY num LIMIT 288 )nums WHERE SEC_TO_TIME(nums.num * 300) BETWEEN MAKETIME(@FromHour,0,0) AND MAKETIME(@ToHour,0,0) ) clock LEFT JOIN appointment ON clock.Increment BETWEEN TIME(appointment.AptDateTime) AND TIME(TIMESTAMPADD(MINUTE, CHAR_LENGTH(appointment.Pattern) * 5 - 1 , appointment.AptDateTime)) AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY HOUR(clock.increment)

request: List of users who have login and logout entries in the audit trail for the specified day.
query: SET @Date='2023-05-23'; SELECT COALESCE(core.EmployeeName, '') AS 'Employee Name' , core.Username , COALESCE(core.ProviderName, '') AS 'Provider Name' , core.Date , DATE_FORMAT(core.LoginTime, '%h:%i %p') AS 'Login Time' , core.LoginComputer AS 'Login Computer' , DATE_FORMAT(core.LogoutTime, '%h:%i %p') AS 'Logout Time' , core.LogoutComputer AS 'Logout Computer' , COALESCE(core.AutoLogoutTimes, '') AS 'Auto Logout Times' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(emp.FName, ' ', emp.LName) AS 'EmployeeName' , uo.UserName AS 'Username' , CONCAT(pr.FName, ' ', pr.LName) AS 'ProviderName' , DATE(sl.LogDateTime) AS 'Date' , SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(IF(sl.LogText LIKE '%has logged on%', sl.LogDateTime, NULL) ORDER BY sl.LogDateTime ASC SEPARATOR '|'), '|', 1) AS 'LoginTime' , SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(IF(sl.LogText LIKE '%has logged on%', sl.CompName, NULL) ORDER BY sl.LogDateTime ASC SEPARATOR '|'), '|', 1) AS 'LoginComputer' , SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(IF(sl.LogText LIKE '%has% logged off%', sl.LogDateTime, NULL) ORDER BY sl.LogDateTime DESC SEPARATOR '|'), '|', 1) AS 'LogoutTime' , SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(IF(sl.LogText LIKE '%has% logged off%', sl.CompName, NULL) ORDER BY sl.LogDateTime DESC SEPARATOR '|'), '|', 1) AS 'LogoutComputer' , GROUP_CONCAT(IF(sl.LogText LIKE '%has auto logged off%', DATE_FORMAT(sl.LogDateTime, '%h:%i %p'), NULL)) AS 'AutoLogoutTimes' FROM securitylog sl INNER JOIN userod uo ON uo.UserNum = sl.UserNum LEFT JOIN employee emp ON emp.EmployeeNum = uo.EmployeeNum LEFT JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = uo.ProvNum WHERE sl.PermType = 83 AND sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@Date) AND DATE(@Date) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY sl.UserNum HAVING !ISNULL(LoginTime) AND !ISNULL(LogoutTime) ) core

request: Production and Income by procedure, for procedures completed in the date range. Ability to filter by procedure code, treating provider, and clinic. Requires procedures to be attached to adjustments and payments.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @Providers=''; SET @Clinics=''; SET @SalesTaxAdjTypes='Sales Tax'; SELECT COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum), '') INTO @SalesTaxDefNums FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 1 AND FIND_IN_SET(definition.ItemName, @SalesTaxAdjTypes); SELECT (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.PatNum WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN rep.Category WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN 'Total' END) AS 'PatNum', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.ProcDate WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN rep.Category WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN 'Total' END) AS 'Date', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.ProcCode WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN 'SubTotal' WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'ProcCode', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Descript WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN '' END) AS 'Descript', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN rep.Count WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN SUM(rep.Count) WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN SUM(rep.Count) END) AS 'Count', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.GrossProd,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd),2) WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd),2) END) AS 'GrossProd', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.AdjAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.AdjAmt),2) WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.AdjAmt),2) END) AS 'Adjust', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.WriteOff,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.WriteOff),2) WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.WriteOff),2) END) AS 'WriteOff', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.GrossProd + rep.AdjAmt - rep.WriteOff,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd + rep.AdjAmt - rep.WriteOff),2) WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.GrossProd + rep.AdjAmt - rep.WriteOff),2) END) AS 'NetProd', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.SalesTaxAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.SalesTaxAmt),2) WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.SalesTaxAmt),2) END) AS 'SalesTax', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.PatPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt),2) WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt),2) END) AS 'PatPay', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.InsPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.InsPayAmt),2) WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.InsPayAmt),2) END) AS 'InsPay', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(rep.PatPayAmt + rep.InsPayAmt,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt + rep.InsPayAmt),2) WHEN 4 THEN ' WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(rep.PatPayAmt + rep.InsPayAmt),2) END) AS 'TotalPaid' FROM ( SELECT def.ItemName AS 'Category', pl.PatNum, pl.ProcNum, pl.ProcDate, pc.ProcCode, pc.Descript, COUNT(DISTINCT pl.ProcNum) AS 'Count', SUM(COALESCE(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits),0)) AS GrossProd, SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND NOT FIND_IN_SET(adjustment.AdjType, @SalesTaxDefNums) ), 0)) AS 'AdjAmt', SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS AdjAmt FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND FIND_IN_SET(adjustment.AdjType, @SalesTaxDefNums) ), 0)) AS 'SalesTaxAmt', SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (0,1,4,6) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS WriteOff, SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'PatPayAmt', SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0)) AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN definition def ON pc.ProcCat = def.DefNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON pl.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics)) GROUP BY pl.Procnum ) rep LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS num UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',rep.ProcNum) WHEN 2 THEN dup.num WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',rep.Category) WHEN 4 THEN dup.num WHEN 5 THEN dup.num END) ORDER BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',rep.PatNum, '-', rep.ProcDate) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup.num) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(rep.Category,'-',dup.num) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT('zzzzzzzzzzzz',dup.num) WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT('zzzzzzzzzzzz',dup.num) END);

request: Production by Day of the Week. Filtered by specified Provider and Clinic, and excludes specified weekdays.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-09-01', @ToDate='2024-09-04'; SET @Clinic=''; SET @Provider=''; SET @ExcludedDays=''; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(wkday.RowDate, '%W') AS 'Day', FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(proc.Fee,0)),2) AS 'Prod' FROM ( SELECT @FromDate + INTERVAL nums.num DAY AS 'RowDate' , DATE_FORMAT((@FromDate + INTERVAL nums.num DAY), '%W') AS 'RowWeekDay' FROM ( SELECT n0.num AS 'num' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 ) AS n0 ORDER BY num )nums ) wkday LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'Fee' ,pl.ProcDate FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Provider)) LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinic) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinic)) ) proc ON DATE_FORMAT(proc.ProcDate, '%W') = wkday.RowWeekDay WHERE NOT FIND_IN_SET(wkday.RowWeekDay, @ExcludedDays) GROUP BY wkday.RowWeekDay ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(wkday.RowDate, '%w') ASC

request: Payments By Procedure Code Or Procedure Category
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-06-01', @ToDate = '2024-06-15'; SET @PatientPayType = 'Check,Credit Card'; SET @InsurancePayType = 'Check,EFT'; SET @GroupBy = 'Cat'; SELECT d.ItemName AS 'Category' ,IF(@GroupBy = 'Category','',pc.ProcCode) AS 'ProcCode' ,FORMAT(SUM(pay.Amt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN definition d ON pc.ProcCat = d.DefNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT ps.ProcNum ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Amt' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pa ON ps.PayNum = pa.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition d2 ON pa.PayType = d2.DefNum WHERE (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@PatientPayType) = 0 THEN TRUE WHEN @PatientPayType = 'None' THEN FALSE ELSE FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(d2.ItemName,'txfr'),@PatientPayType) END) AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY ps.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT cp.ProcNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) 'Amt' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpa ON cpa.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition d3 ON cpa.PayType = d3.DefNum WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@InsurancePayType) = 0 THEN TRUE WHEN @InsurancePayType = 'None' THEN FALSE ELSE FIND_IN_SET(d3.ItemName,@InsurancePayType) END) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) pay ON pay.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum GROUP BY IF(@GroupBy = 'Cat',d.DefNum,pc.ProcCode) ORDER BY IF(@GroupBy = 'Cat',d.ItemName,pc.ProcCode)

request: Recall rescheduling efficiency
query: SET @FromDate='2023-03-01', @ToDate='2023-03-01'; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @Broken = 'D9986,D9987'; SELECT (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.PatNum WHEN dup.Num = 2 THEN 'New Patients' WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN 'All Patients' END) AS 'PatNum' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.Seen WHEN dup.Num = 2 THEN COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.New = 'Yes',core.PatNum,NULL)) WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum) END) AS 'Last Seen' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.Scheduled WHEN dup.Num = 2 THEN COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.New = 'Yes' AND core.Scheduled = 'Yes',core.PatNum,NULL)) WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Scheduled = 'Yes',core.PatNum,NULL)) END) AS 'Scheduled?' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN core.NextApt WHEN dup.Num = 2 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(IFNULL( COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.New = 'Yes' AND core.Scheduled = 'Yes',core.PatNum,NULL)) / COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.New = 'Yes',core.PatNum,NULL)) * 100 ,0),2) ,'%') WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN CONCAT(ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT IF(core.Scheduled = 'Yes',core.PatNum,NULL)) / COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum) * 100 ,2) ,'%') END) AS 'Next Appt' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.New,'') AS 'New Patient?' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.NextProcs,'') AS 'Codes' ,IF(dup.Num = 1,core.Provs,'') AS 'Provs' FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' ,MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Seen' ,IF(!ISNULL(sched.PatNum),'Yes','No') AS 'Scheduled' ,IF(!ISNULL(sched.PatNum),sched.NextApt,'') AS 'NextApt' ,IF(!ISNULL(minvis.PatNum),'Yes','No') AS 'New' ,IF(ISNULL(sched.PatNum),'',( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(npc.ProcCode ORDER BY npc.ProcCode, npl.ProcNum) FROM procedurelog npl INNER JOIN procedurecode npc ON npc.CodeNum = npl.CodeNum WHERE npl.AptNum = sched.aptNum )) AS 'NextProcs' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pr.Abbr ORDER BY pc.ProcCode, pl.ProcNum, pr.ProvNum) AS 'Provs' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Broken) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.PatNum ,MIN(a.AptDateTime) AS 'NextApt' ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime ASC, a.AptNum SEPARATOR '|'), '|', 1) AS 'AptNum' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pla ON pla.AptNum = a.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pca ON pla.CodeNum = pca.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pca.ProcCode,@ProcCodes)) WHERE a.AptStatus = 1 AND a.AptDateTime > CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY a.PatNum ) sched ON sched.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT plf.PatNum ,MIN(plf.ProcDate) AS 'Date' FROM procedurelog plf INNER JOIN procedurecode pcf ON plf.CodeNum = pcf.CodeNum AND !FIND_IN_SET(pcf.ProcCode,@Broken) WHERE plf.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY plf.PatNum ) minvis ON minvis.PatNum = p.PatNum AND minvis.Date BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY p.PatNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(core.PatNum,'+',dup.Num),dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Patient, core.PatNum

request: Production and income in a date range for specified providers, excluding specified hygiene procedure codes.
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-05-01', @ToDate = '2024-05-31'; SET @Provs = ''; SET @HygCodes = 'D1110,D1120,D4341,D4342,D4910'; SET @ReportType = 'Monthly'; SET @i = -1; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(Abbr, @Provs); SELECT (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Monthly' THEN DATE_FORMAT(dates.Date, '%m/%d/%Y') WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Annual' THEN dates.Month WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Provider' THEN COALESCE(summed.Abbr, 'No Provider') ELSE '' END) AS 'Prov/Date' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Monthly' THEN DATE_FORMAT(dates.Date, '%a') WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Annual' THEN '' WHEN dup.Num = 2 AND @ReportType IN ('Monthly', 'Annual') THEN 'Total Production' WHEN dup.Num = 3 AND @ReportType IN ('Monthly', 'Annual') THEN 'Total Pt Income' WHEN dup.Num = 4 AND @ReportType IN ('Monthly', 'Annual') THEN 'Total Income' ELSE '' END) AS 'Day' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 THEN FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Production), 0), 2) WHEN dup.Num = 2 AND @ReportType = 'Monthly' THEN FORMAT(SUM(summed.Production) + SUM(summed.Scheduled) + SUM(summed.Adjustments) + SUM(summed.Writeoffs), 2) WHEN dup.Num = 2 AND @ReportType = 'Annual' THEN FORMAT(SUM(summed.Production) + SUM(summed.Adjustments) + SUM(summed.Writeoffs), 2) WHEN dup.Num = 3 AND @ReportType IN ('Monthly', 'Annual') THEN FORMAT(SUM(summed.Pt_Income) + SUM(summed.Unearned_Pt_Income), 2) WHEN dup.Num = 4 AND @ReportType IN ('Monthly', 'Annual') THEN FORMAT(SUM(summed.Pt_Income) + SUM(summed.Unearned_Pt_Income) + SUM(summed.Ins_Income), 2) ELSE '' END) AS 'Production' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Monthly', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Scheduled), 0), 2), '') AS 'Sched' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Adjustments), 0), 2), '') AS 'Adj' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Writeoffs), 0), 2), '') AS 'Write-off' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Monthly' THEN FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Scheduled), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(summed.Tot_Prod), 0), 2) WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType IN ('Annual', 'Provider') THEN FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Tot_Prod), 0), 2) ELSE '' END) AS 'Tot Prod' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Pt_Income), 0), 2), '') AS 'Pt Income' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Unearned_Pt_Income), 0), 2), '') AS 'Unearned Pt Income' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Ins_Income), 0), 2), '') AS 'Ins Income' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(summed.Total_Income), 0), 2), '') AS 'Total Income' FROM ( SELECT rawDates.Date ,DATE_FORMAT(rawDates.Date, '%b %Y') AS 'Month' ,MONTH(rawDates.Date) AS 'OrdMonth' ,YEAR(rawDates.Date) AS 'OrdYear' FROM ( SELECT ADDDATE('1970-01-01', t4.i * 10000 + t3.i * 1000 + t2.i * 100 + t1.i * 10 + t0.i) AS 'Date' FROM (SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t0 ,(SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t1 ,(SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t2 ,(SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t3 ,(SELECT 0 i UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) t4 ) rawDates WHERE rawDates.Date BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) dates LEFT JOIN ( SELECT core.Date ,core.Prov ,prov.Abbr ,prov.ItemOrder ,SUM(core.Prod) AS 'Production' ,SUM(core.Sched) AS 'Scheduled' ,SUM(core.Adj) AS 'Adjustments' ,SUM(core.Writeoff) AS 'Writeoffs' ,SUM(core.Prod) + SUM(core.Adj) + SUM(core.Writeoff) AS 'Tot_Prod' ,SUM(core.PtInc) AS 'Pt_Income' ,SUM(core.Unearned) AS 'Unearned_Pt_Income' ,SUM(core.InsInc) AS 'Ins_Income' ,SUM(core.PtInc) + SUM(core.Unearned) + SUM(core.InsInc) AS 'Total_Income' FROM( SELECT pl.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - SUM(IF(ISNULL(cp.WriteOff), 0, cp.WriteOff)) AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'Writeoff' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @HygCodes) LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT IF(pc.IsHygiene,apt.ProvHyg,apt.ProvNum) AS 'Prov' ,DATE(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,(tp.ProcFee * (tp.UnitQty + tp.BaseUnits)) - SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0)) AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'Writeoff' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog tp INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON tp.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @HygCodes) INNER JOIN appointment apt ON tp.AptNum = apt.AptNum AND apt.AptStatus = 1 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(IF(pc.IsHygiene,apt.ProvHyg,apt.ProvNum), @ProvNums)) LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = tp.ProcNum GROUP BY tp.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adj.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,adj.AdjAmt AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'Writeoff' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = adj.ProcNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(adj.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(adj.ProcNum = 0, TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @HygCodes)) UNION ALL SELECT cp2.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,cp2.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,-cp2.Writeoff ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp2 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp2.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @HygCodes) WHERE cp2.Status IN (1,4) AND cp2.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp2.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) UNION ALL SELECT ps.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,ps.DatePay AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'Writeoff' ,IF(ps.UnearnedType = 0,ps.SplitAmt,0) AS 'PtInc' ,IF(ps.UnearnedType != 0,ps.SplitAmt,0) AS 'Unearned' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(ps.ProcNum = 0, TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @HygCodes)) UNION ALL SELECT cp3.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,cp3.DateCP AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Sched' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'Writeoff' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'Unearned' ,cp3.InsPayAmt AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp3 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp3.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @HygCodes) WHERE cp3.Status IN (1,4) AND cp3.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND IF(ISNULL(@ProvNums), TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp3.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) ) core LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = core.Prov GROUP BY core.Date, core.Prov ORDER BY YEAR(core.Date), MONTH(core.Date) ) summed ON summed.Date = dates.Date INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 ) dup WHERE (IF(dup.Num != 1 AND @ReportType = 'Provider', FALSE, TRUE)) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Monthly' THEN dates.Date WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Annual' THEN CONCAT(dates.OrdYear, '+', Dates.OrdMonth) WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Provider' THEN CONCAT(summed.Prov, '+', summed.Abbr) ELSE dup.Num END) ORDER BY (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Monthly' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', dates.Date) WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Annual' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', dates.Date) WHEN dup.Num = 1 AND @ReportType = 'Provider' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', summed.ItemOrder) ELSE dup.Num END)

request: List of procedures in a date range that are overpaid.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SET @Clinics=''; SELECT p.PatNum , COALESCE(cl.Abbr, 'None') AS 'Clinic' , pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' , pc.ProcCode , FORMAT(pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits), 2) AS 'Amount' , FORMAT(cp.PayAmt, 2) AS 'InsPaid+W/O' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT cp.ProcNum , cp.PatNum , cp.ProcDate , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt + cp.Writeoff) PayAmt FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4,5,7) AND cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY cp.ProcNum HAVING SUM(cp.InsPayAmt + cp.Writeoff) > 0 ) cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee > 0 AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(cl.Abbr, 'None'), @Clinics)) AND (pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits)) < cp.PayAmt GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, pl.ProcDate

request: Referral production and collection
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-07-31'; SELECT ( SELECT CONCAT(referral.FName, IF(LENGTH(referral.FName) = 0, '', ' '), referral.LName) FROM referral WHERE referral.ReferralNum = main.ReferralSource ) AS 'Referral Source' , COUNT(DISTINCT main.PatNum) AS '$Patients_' , FORMAT(SUM(main.Production), 2) AS '$Production_' , FORMAT(SUM(main.Adjustments) - SUM(main.WriteOffs), 2) AS '$Write-Off_' , FORMAT(SUM(main.Production) + SUM(main.Adjustments) - SUM(main.WriteOffs), 2) AS '$NetProduction_' , FORMAT(SUM(main.InsPay) + SUM(main.PatPay), 2) AS '$Collections_' FROM ( SELECT refattach.ReferralNum AS 'ReferralSource' , firstproc.PatNum , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.BaseUnits + procedurelog.UnitQty)) FROM procedurelog WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate = firstproc.FirstDate AND procedurelog.PatNum = firstproc.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 ), 0) AS 'Production' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (0,1,4,5,7) AND claimproc.ProcDate = firstproc.FirstDate AND claimproc.PatNum = firstproc.PatNum ), 0) AS 'WriteOffs' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcDate = firstproc.FirstDate AND adjustment.PatNum = firstproc.PatNum ), 0) AS 'Adjustments' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1,4) AND claimproc.ProcDate = firstproc.FirstDate AND claimproc.PatNum = firstproc.PatNum ), 0) AS 'InsPay' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = paysplit.ProcNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate = firstproc.FirstDate AND paysplit.PatNum = firstproc.PatNum ), 0) AS 'PatPay' FROM refattach INNER JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , MIN(procedurelog.ProcDate) AS 'FirstDate' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode NOT IN('D9986','D9987') WHERE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY procedurelog.PatNum HAVING FirstDate BETWEEN @Fromdate AND @ToDate ) firstproc ON firstproc.PatNum = refattach.PatNum WHERE refattach.RefType = 1 ) main GROUP BY main.ReferralSource

request:
Procedure Payment Summary. Shows individual payments on procedures completed
	in the specified date range. Since procedures may show more than once, the ProcNum
	is listed so you can identify the duplicate procedures.
	
	For one row per procedure, see Example #1168
query: SET @FromDate='2024-07-01', @ToDate='2024-07-31'; SELECT procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'Date' , procedurelog.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum AS 'ProcNum' , procedurecode.ProcCode AS 'Procedure Code' , procedurecode.Descript AS 'Procedure request' , ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum ) AS 'Provider' , CAST((procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits)) -
