COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cpc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cpc WHERE cpc.Status IN(7, 8) AND cpc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum ),0) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS 'Production' , CAST(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum ), 0) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS 'Adjustments' , CAST(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.WriteOff) FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) ), 0) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS 'Write-Offs' , COALESCE(( SELECT paytypes.ItemName FROM definition paytypes WHERE paytypes.DefNum = payments.PayType) , 'Income Tx') AS 'Payment Type' , payments.PayAmt AS 'Payment Amount' , payments.PayDate AS 'Payment Date ' , payments.CheckNum AS 'Check Number' FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT paysplit.ProcNum , payment.PayDate , CAST(SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS 'PayAmt' , payment.PayType , payment.CheckNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payment ON payment.PayNum = paysplit.PayNum WHERE paysplit.ProcNum > 0 GROUP BY payment.PayNum, paysplit.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT claimproc.ProcNum , claimpayment.CheckDate , CAST(SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) AS DECIMAL(12, 2)) AS 'PayAmt' , claimpayment.PayType , claimpayment.CheckNum FROM claimproc INNER JOIN claimpayment ON claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum = claimproc.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum AND procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) GROUP BY claimpayment.ClaimPaymentNum, claimproc.ProcNum ) payments ON payments.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum WHERE procedurelog.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate)

request: Adjustments in the Specified Date Range Attached to Procedures with a Procedure Date Prior to the Specified Cut Off Date
query: SET @FromDate='2021-11-01', @ToDate='2021-11-30'; SET @CutOffDate='2021-11-01'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ad.AdjDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Adjustment Date' , pl.ProcDate AS 'Date of Service' , COALESCE(( SELECT carrier.CarrierName FROM carrier INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.carrierNum = carrier.CarrierNum INNER JOIN inssub ON inssub.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.InsSubNum = inssub.InsSubNum AND patplan.Ordinal = 1 WHERE patplan.PatNum = p.PatNum ), '') AS 'CarrierName' , CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', p.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName' , ( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.DefNum = ad.AdjType ) AS 'AdjustmentType' , FORMAT(ad.AdjAmt,2) AS '$Amount' FROM adjustment ad INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ad.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ad.ProcNum AND pl.ProcDate < DATE(@CutOffDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE ad.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ORDER BY ad.AdjDate ASC

request: Outstanding Claims Report for claims with specific procedures attached.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-09-01', @ToDate='2024-09-30'; SET @ProviderAbbr=''; SET @FromCode='D8000', @ToCode='D8999'; SELECT core.Carrier , core.Phone , core.Type , core.PatNum , core.SubscriberID , core.Birthdate AS 'Birthdate' , core.DateService , core.DateSent , core.DateSentOrig , FORMAT(core.Amount, 2) AS 'Amount' , FORMAT(core.ProcFee, 2) AS 'ProcFee' , core.LastInsPayDate AS 'LastInsPayDate' , IFNULL(FORMAT(( SELECT SUM(lastcp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc lastcp WHERE lastcp.ClaimNum = core.ClaimNum AND lastcp.DateCP = core.LastInsPayDate ), 2), '') AS 'LastInsPayAmt' , IFNULL(FORMAT(core.ClaimAmountPaid, 2), '') AS 'ClaimAmountPaid' , FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(core.InsPayEst - core.ClaimAmountPaid), 0), 2) AS 'ClaimAmountOwed' , FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(core.ProcAdj), 0), 2) AS 'Adjust' , FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(core.ProcWoEst), 0), 2) AS 'Writeoff' , IFNULL(core.LastPatPayDate, '') AS 'LastPatPayDate' , IFNULL(FORMAT(core.LastPatPayAmt, 2), '') AS 'LastPatPayAmt' , IFNULL(FORMAT(core.PatAmountPaid, 2), '') AS 'PatAmountPaid' , FORMAT(SUM(core.ProcFee + core.ProcAdj - core.ProcInsEst - core.ProcWoEst - core.PatAmountPaid) , 2) AS 'PatAmountOwed' FROM ( SELECT carrier.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' , carrier.Phone , (CASE claim.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN 'Cap' THEN 'Capitation' ELSE claim.ClaimType END) AS 'Type' , patient.PatNum , ( SELECT inssub.SubscriberID FROM inssub INNER JOIN patplan ON patplan.InsSubNum = inssub.InsSubNum WHERE inssub.PlanNum = insplan.PlanNum AND patplan.PatNum = patient.PatNum ) AS 'SubscriberID' , patient.Birthdate , claim.DateService , claim.DateSent , claim.DateSentOrig , claim.ClaimFee AS 'Amount' , IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN claimproc cp1 ON cp1.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE cp1.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum AND cp1.Status IN (0, 1) ), 0) AS 'ProcFee' , IFNULL(MAX(IF(claimproc.Status IN (1, 4), DATE_FORMAT(claimproc.DateCP, '%Y-%m-%d'), NULL)), '') AS 'LastInsPayDate' , SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) AS 'ClaimAmountPaid' , SUM(claimproc.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' , DATE_FORMAT(patpay.LastPatDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS 'LastPatPayDate' , patpay.LastPatAmt AS 'LastPatPayAmt' , IFNULL(patpay.PatAmtPaid, 0) AS 'PatAmountPaid' , IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN claimproc cp2 ON cp2.ProcNum = adj.ProcNum WHERE adj.ProcNum != 0 AND cp2.Status IN (0, 1) AND cp2.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum AND cp2.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum ), 0) AS 'ProcAdj' , IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp3.InsPayEst) FROM claimproc cp3 WHERE cp3.Status IN (0, 1, 4) AND cp3.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'ProcInsEst' , IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp4.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp4 WHERE cp4.Status IN (0, 1, 4) AND cp4.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'ProcWoEst' , claim.ClaimNum FROM claim INNER JOIN insplan ON insplan.PlanNum = claim.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = claim.PatNum INNER JOIN provider provtreat ON provtreat.ProvNum=claim.ProvTreat AND IF(LENGTH(@ProviderAbbr) = 0, TRUE, provtreat.Abbr = @ProviderAbbr) INNER JOIN claimproc ON claimproc.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum AND claimproc.Status IN (0, 1, 4) INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND procedurecode.ProcCode BETWEEN @FromCode AND @ToCode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patpayday.ClaimNum , MAX(patpayday.DatePay) AS 'LastPatDate' , SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(patpayday.PatPaid ORDER BY patpayday.DatePay DESC SEPARATOR '|'), '|', 1) AS 'LastPatAmt' , SUM(patpayday.PatPaid) AS 'PatAmtPaid' FROM( SELECT paysplit.DatePay , SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) AS 'PatPaid' , cp.ClaimNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = paysplit.ProcNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.ClaimNum > 0 AND cp.Status IN (0, 1) WHERE paysplit.ProcNum != 0 GROUP BY cp.ClaimNum, paysplit.DatePay ) patpayday GROUP BY patpayday.ClaimNum ) patpay ON patpay.ClaimNum = claim.ClaimNum WHERE claim.ClaimStatus = 'S' AND claim.DateService BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND claim.ClaimType != 'Preauth' GROUP BY claim.ClaimNum ORDER BY carrier.Phone,insplan.PlanNum ) core GROUP BY core.ClaimNum

request: Patients with a positive outstanding balance that have the specified insurance carrier
query: SET @Carrier = '%Delta%'; SELECT c.CarrierName AS 'Insurance' ,pat.PatNum ,FORMAT(pat.BalAfterIns,2) AS 'Balance' FROM patplan pp INNER JOIN inssub iss ON pp.InsSubNum = iss.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON iss.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON ip.CarrierNum = c.CarrierNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Carrier) = 0,TRUE,c.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier) INNER JOIN ( SELECT p.PatNum ,p.EstBalance - IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayEst + cp.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status = 0 AND cp.PatNum = p.PatNum ),0) AS 'BalAfterIns' FROM patient p ) pat ON pat.PatNum = pp.PatNum LEFT JOIN claim cl ON cl.PatNum = pat.PatNum AND cl.ClaimStatus != 'R' AND cl.ClaimType != 'Preauth' WHERE ISNULL(cl.PatNum) AND pat.BalAfterIns > 0.005

request: Families with credit balances before insurance where the last date of activity for any family member is prior to the specified date
query: SET @AsOf = '2023-05-01'; SELECT core.PatNum ,FORMAT(core.BalTotal,2) AS 'Credit Amount' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum ,g.BalTotal ,COALESCE( GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ( SELECT MAX(pl.PatNum) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND pl.ProcDate >= @AsOf AND pl.PatNum = p.PatNum )) ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ( SELECT MAX(a.PatNum) FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus IN (1,2) AND a.AptDateTime >= @AsOf AND a.PatNum = p.PatNum )) ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ( SELECT MAX(adj.PatNum) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.AdjDate >= @AsOf AND adj.PatNum = p.PatNum )) ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ( SELECT MAX(ps.PatNum) FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON ps.PayNum = pay.PayNum AND pay.PayType != 0 WHERE ps.DatePay >= @AsOf AND ps.PatNum = p.PatNum )) ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ( SELECT MAX(cp.PatNum) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.DateCP >= @AsOf AND cp.PatNum = p.PatNum )) ,'this one') AS 'check' FROM patient p INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor AND g.BalTotal < 0 GROUP BY p.Guarantor ) core WHERE core.Check = 'this one'

request: Payment and Adjustment Report, similar to the Internal Payment Report but Includes Adjustments.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-16', @ToDate='2025-01-16'; SET @Provider=''; SET @PracticeName='Default'; SET @PaymentTypes=''; SET @AdjTypes=''; SET @Provider=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Provider)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@Provider,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ProvNums = ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provs.ProvNum) FROM provider provs WHERE provs.Abbr REGEXP @Provider AND !provs.IsHidden ); SET @PracticeTitle = IF(@PracticeName='Default', (SELECT pracname.ValueString FROM preference pracname WHERE pracname.PrefNum = 5), @PracticeTitle := @PracticeName); SELECT display.Date AS ' ' , display.PatientNumber AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Patient, 35) AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Carrier, 35) AS ' ' , display.Provider AS ' ' , display.CheckNum AS ' ' , display.Amount AS ' ' FROM ( SELECT 'A' AS 'ItemType' , 1 AS 'GroupPayType' , dup1.Num , '0001-01-01' AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date' END ) AS 'Date' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Pat END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Name' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN 'Daily Payments Report' WHEN 2 THEN @PracticeTitle WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT( 'Date Range:' , DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate, '%m/%d/%Y') , '-' , DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate, '%m/%d/%Y') ) WHEN 4 THEN 'Carrier' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Prov' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Check END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Amount' END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 ) dup1 UNION ALL SELECT ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.ItemType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 3 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 4 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) WHEN 6 THEN 'PaymentTotal' WHEN 7 THEN 'GrandTotal' END ) AS 'ItemType' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 3 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 4 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 7 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) END ) AS 'GroupPayType' , dup2.Num , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 2 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 3 THEN pays.Date WHEN 4 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 7 THEN MAX(pays.Date) END ) AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 2 THEN pays.PayType WHEN 3 THEN DATE_FORMAT(pays.Date, '%m/%d/%Y') WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.PatNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT CONCAT( UPPER(p.LName) ,', ' ,UPPER(p.FName) ) FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = pays.PatNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.Carrier WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.PayType) WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 6 THEN 'Total All Payments' WHEN 7 THEN 'Total All Payments + Adjustments' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = pays.ProvNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.CheckNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' WHEN 7 THEN '' END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.IncAmt), 2) WHEN 7 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) END ) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT 'Insurance Payment' AS 'ItemType' , cpayt.ItemName AS 'PayType' , cpay.ClaimPaymentNum AS 'PayNum' , cpay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , cp.DateCP AS 'Date' , cp.PatNum , c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' , cp.ProvNum , cpay.CheckNum , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'Amount' , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'IncAmt' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition cpayt ON cpayt.DefNum = cpay.PayType AND cpayt.Category = 32 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND IF(LENGTH(@PaymentTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cpayt.ItemName, @PaymentTypes)) GROUP BY cp.ProvNum, cpay.ClaimPaymentNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Patient Payment' AS 'ItemType' , COALESCE(paytype.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS 'PayType' , pay.PayNum , pay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , ps.DatePay AS 'Date' , pay.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , '' AS 'Carrier' , ps.ProvNum AS 'ProvNum' , pay.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' , SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Amount' , SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'IncAmt' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON paytype.DefNum = pay.PayType AND paytype.Category = 10 WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND IF(LENGTH(@PaymentTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(paytype.ItemName, @PaymentTypes)) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum, pay.PayNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adjustment' AS 'ItemType' , adjtype.ItemName AS 'PayType' , adj.AdjNum AS 'PayNum' , adj.AdjType AS 'GroupPayType' , adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' , adj.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , '' AS 'Carrier' , adj.ProvNum AS 'ProvNum' , '' AS 'CheckNum' , SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS 'Amount' , '' AS 'IncAmt' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN definition adjtype ON adjtype.DefNum = adj.AdjType AND adjtype.Category = 1 AND (CASE WHEN @AdjTypes = 'Positive' THEN adjtype.ItemValue = '+' WHEN @AdjTypes = 'Negative' THEN adjtype.ItemValue IN ('-', 'dp') ELSE IF(LENGTH(@AdjTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(adjtype.ItemName, @AdjTypes)) END) WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(adj.ProvNum, @ProvNums) GROUP BY adj.ProvNum, adj.AdjNum ) pays INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 ) dup2 ON TRUE GROUP BY ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, ', ', dup2.Num) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(pays.ProvNum, ', ', pays.PayType, ', ', pays.PayNum) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 5 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 6 THEN dup2.Num WHEN 7 THEN dup2.Num END ) ORDER BY FIELD(ItemType, 'A', 'Insurance Payment', 'Patient Payment', 'Adjustment', 'PaymentTotal', 'GrandTotal'), GroupPayType, Num, OrDate ) display

request: Count of appointments, unique patients seen, and appointments with lab cases for completed appointments in a specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-11-01', @ToDate='2025-11-30'; SELECT COUNT(apt.AptNum) AS 'Total Appointments' , COUNT(DISTINCT apt.PatNum) AS 'Unique Patients Seen' , COUNT(( SELECT lc.AptNum FROM labcase lc WHERE lc.AptNum = apt.AptNum GROUP BY lc.AptNum )) AS 'Total Appointments With Labs' FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus = 2 HAVING COUNT(apt.AptNum) > 0

request: Collection verification
query: SET @FromDate = '2023-07-01', @ToDate = '2023-07-31'; SET @Clinics = ''; SET @Provider = ''; SET @Codes = ''; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT core.ClinAbbr AS 'ClinicAbbr' ,core.ClinDesc AS 'ClinicName' ,core.Prov AS 'Provider' ,core.ProvNum AS 'ProviderNumber' ,IFNULL(( SELECT def.ItemName FROM definition def WHERE def.DefNum = core.Specialty ),'') AS 'ProviderSpecialty' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',core.ProvCross,'') AS 'ProvCrossPosted' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',core.ClinCross,'') AS 'ClinicCrossPosted' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient Name' ,core.PatNum AS 'Patient Number' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',core.ProcCode,'NA') AS 'ProcCode' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',core.AbbrDesc,'NA') AS 'AbbrDesc' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',core.ProcNum,'NA') AS 'Procedure Number' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',core.ProcStatus,'NA') AS 'ProcStatus' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',DATE_FORMAT(core.ProcDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),'NA') AS 'Procedure Date' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',DATE_FORMAT(core.ProcDate,'%m/01/%Y'),'NA') AS 'ProcMo' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',FORMAT(core.Prod,2),'NA') AS 'ProcFee' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',FORMAT(core.Adj,2),'NA') AS 'Adjustments' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',FORMAT(core.Wo,2),'NA') AS 'Writeoffs' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',FORMAT(core.Prod + core.Adj + core.Wo,2),'NA') AS 'Tot Production' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.InsDR),2) AS 'InsPmtInRange' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PtDR),2) AS 'PatPmtInRange' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.InsDR) + SUM(core.PtDR),2) AS 'TotPmtInRange' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',FORMAT(core.InsAll,2),'NA') AS 'InsPmtAll' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',FORMAT(core.PtAll,2),'NA') AS 'PatPmtAll' ,IF(core.RowType = 'Proc',FORMAT(core.InsAll + core.PtAll,2),'NA') AS 'TotPmtAll' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'RowType' ,pl.ProcNum ,(CASE pl.ProcStatus WHEN 0 THEN '' WHEN 1 THEN 'TP' WHEN 2 THEN 'C' WHEN 3 THEN 'EC' WHEN 4 THEN 'EO' WHEN 5 THEN 'R' WHEN 6 THEN 'D' WHEN 7 THEN 'Cn' WHEN 8 THEN 'TPi' END) AS 'ProcStatus' ,pl.ProcDate ,pl.PatNum ,pc.ProcCode ,pc.AbbrDesc ,pr.Abbr AS 'Prov' ,pr.Specialty ,pl.ProvNum ,(CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'None') ELSE '' END) AS 'ClinAbbr' ,(CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.request,'None') ELSE '' END) AS 'ClinDesc' ,pay.ClinicNum ,MAX(IF(pay.ProvNum != pl.ProvNum,'X','')) AS 'ProvCross' ,MAX(IF(pay.ClinicNum != pl.ClinicNum,'X','')) AS 'ClinCross' ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'Prod' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'Adj' ,IFNULL(( SELECT -SUM(wo.Writeoff) FROM claimproc wo WHERE wo.Status IN (1,4) AND wo.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'Wo' ,SUM(IFNULL(pay.PatAmt,0)) AS 'PtDR' ,SUM(IFNULL(pay.InsAmt,0)) AS 'InsDR' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(psa.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit psa WHERE psa.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'PtAll' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cpa.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cpa WHERE cpa.Status IN (1,4) AND cpa.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'InsAll' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Codes)) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Provider)) INNER JOIN ( SELECT ps.PatNum ,ps.ProcNum ,ps.SplitAmt AS 'PatAmt' ,0 AS 'InsAmt' ,ps.ProvNum ,ps.ClinicNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum != 0 AND ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) UNION ALL SELECT cp.PatNum ,cp.ProcNum ,0 AS 'PatAmt' ,cp.InsPayAmt AS 'InsAmt' ,cp.ProvNum ,cp.ClinicNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum != 0 AND cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) pay ON pay.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON pay.ClinicNum = c.ClinicNum WHERE (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(c.Abbr,'None') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum, pay.ClinicNum UNION ALL SELECT 'pPay' AS 'RowType' ,NULL AS 'ProcNum' ,NULL AS 'ProcStatus' ,NULL AS 'ProcDate' ,paysplit.PatNum ,NULL AS 'ProcCode' ,NULL AS 'AbbrDesc' ,IFNULL(prov.Abbr,'None') AS 'Prov' ,prov.Specialty ,paysplit.ProvNum ,(CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(clin.Abbr,'None') ELSE '' END) AS 'ClinAbbr' ,(CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(clin.request,'None') ELSE '' END) AS 'ClinDesc' ,paysplit.ClinicNum ,'' AS 'ProvCross' ,'' AS 'ClinicCross' ,NULL AS 'ProcFee' ,NULL AS 'Adj' ,NULL AS 'Wo' ,SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) AS 'PtDR' ,0 AS 'InsDR' ,NULL AS 'PtAll' ,NULL AS 'InsAll' FROM paysplit LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = paysplit.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON paysplit.ClinicNum = clin.ClinicNum WHERE paysplit.ProcNum = 0 AND paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(clin.Abbr,'None') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('None',@Codes),TRUE,FALSE) AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(prov.Abbr,'None'),@Provider)) GROUP BY paysplit.PatNum, paysplit.ProvNum, paysplit.ClinicNum UNION ALL SELECT 'iPay' AS 'RowType' ,NULL AS 'ProcNum' ,NULL AS 'ProcStatus' ,NULL AS 'ProcDate' ,claimproc.PatNum ,NULL AS 'ProcCode' ,NULL AS 'AbbrDesc' ,IFNULL(provider.Abbr,'None') AS 'Prov' ,provider.Specialty ,claimproc.ProvNum ,(CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(clinic.Abbr,'None') ELSE '' END) AS 'ClinAbbr' ,(CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(clinic.request,'None') ELSE '' END) AS 'ClinDesc' ,claimproc.ClinicNum ,'' AS 'ProvCross' ,'' AS 'ClinicCross' ,NULL AS 'ProcFee' ,NULL AS 'Adj' ,NULL AS 'Wo' ,0 AS 'PtDR' ,SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsDR' ,NULL AS 'PtAll' ,NULL AS 'InsAll' FROM claimproc LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.ProvNum = claimproc.ProvNum LEFT JOIN clinic ON claimproc.ClinicNum = clinic.ClinicNum WHERE claimproc.ProcNum = 0 AND claimproc.Status IN (1,4) AND claimproc.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(clinic.Abbr,'None') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END) AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('None',@Codes),TRUE,FALSE) AND IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(provider.Abbr,'None'),@Provider)) GROUP BY claimproc.PatNum, claimproc.ProvNum, claimproc.ClinicNum ) core ON core.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY (CASE WHEN core.RowType = 'Proc' THEN CONCAT(core.ProcNum,'+',core.ClinicNum) ELSE CONCAT(core.PatNum,'|',core.ProvNum,'+',core.ClinicNum) END) ORDER BY FIELD(core.RowType,'Proc','pPay','iPay'), core.PatNum, core.ProcDate, core.ProvNum, core.ClinicNum

request: Patient production, adjustments, and income per specialty
query: SET @FromDate='2023-08-01', @ToDate='2023-08-31'; SET @ClinicSpecialty=''; SELECT IF(dupe.RowType = 'Detail', main.PatNum, '') AS 'PatNum' , COALESCE(SUM(main.Production), 0.00) AS 'Production' , COALESCE(SUM(main.Adjustments), 0.00) AS 'Adjustments' , COALESCE(SUM(main.Income), 0.00) AS 'income' , IF(dupe.RowType = 'Detail', main.ClinicSpecialty, '') AS 'Clinic Specialty' FROM ( SELECT 'Detail' AS 'RowType' UNION ALL SELECT 'Total' ) dupe LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patient.PatNum AS 'PatNum' ,CONCAT( patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' ,CAST(SUM((procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cpc.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cpc WHERE cpc.Status IN(7, 8) AND cpc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum ),0)) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Production' ,CAST(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.AdjDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND adjustment.PatNum = patient.PatNum ), 0) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Adjustments' ,CAST( COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit INNER JOIN procedurelog patpayproc ON patpayproc.ProcNum = paysplit.ProcNum AND patpayproc.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE paysplit.ProcNum > 0 AND paysplit.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND paysplit.PatNum = patient.PatNum ), 0) + COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(claimproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc INNER JOIN procedurelog inspayproc ON inspayproc.ProcNum = claimproc.ProcNum AND inspayproc.ProcStatus = 2 WHERE claimproc.ProcNum > 0 AND claimproc.Status IN (1, 4) AND claimproc.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND claimproc.PatNum = patient.PatNum ), 0) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Income' ,COALESCE(( SELECT MAX(spec.ItemName) FROM deflink INNER JOIN definition spec ON spec.DefNum = deflink.DefNum AND spec.Category = 44 WHERE deflink.LinkType = 1 AND deflink.FKey = patient.PatNum ), 'None') AS 'ClinicSpecialty' FROM patient INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.PatNum = patient.PatNum AND procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.procDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate GROUP BY patient.PatNum HAVING IF(LENGTH(@ClinicSpecialty) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ClinicSpecialty, @ClinicSpecialty)) ) main ON TRUE WHERE IF(dupe.RowType = 'Detail' AND ISNULL(main.PatNum), FALSE, TRUE) GROUP BY dupe.RowType, IF(dupe.RowType='Detail', main.PatNum, 0) ORDER BY dupe.RowType, main.PatName, main.PatNum

request: Consent Form Signature Verification
query: SET @FromDate='2023-08-01', @ToDate='2023-08-31'; SET @ExcludedCodes=''; SET @ExcludedCats=''; SELECT appointment.PatNum AS 'PatNum' ,DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) AS 'DateofService' ,GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.ProcCode ORDER BY procedurecode.ProcCode, procedurelog.ProcNum) AS 'Procedures' ,COALESCE(consents.requests, 'None') AS 'ConsentName' ,COALESCE(consents.SheetNums, 'None') AS 'ConsentNum' ,COALESCE(consents.Signed, 'None') AS 'ConsentSigned' FROM appointment INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.AptNum = appointment.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludedCodes) = 0, TRUE, NOT FIND_IN_SET(procedurecode.ProcCode, @ExcludedCodes)) INNER JOIN DEFINITION category ON category.DefNum = procedurecode.ProcCat AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludedCats) = 0, TRUE, NOT FIND_IN_SET(category.ItemName, @ExcludedCats)) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sheets.PatNum , sheets.Date , GROUP_CONCAT(sheets.SheetNum ORDER BY sheets.SheetNum) AS 'SheetNums' , GROUP_CONCAT(sheets.request ORDER BY sheets.SheetNum) AS 'requests' , GROUP_CONCAT(sheets.Signed ORDER BY sheets.SheetNum) AS 'Signed' FROM ( SELECT sheet.PatNum ,DATE(sheet.DateTimeSheet) AS 'Date' ,sheet.SheetNum ,sheet.request ,IF(SUM(IF(ISNULL(sheetfield.FieldValue), 0, 1)) = 0, 'N', 'Y') AS 'Signed' FROM sheet LEFT JOIN sheetfield ON sheetfield.SheetNum = sheet.SheetNum AND sheetfield.FieldType = 9 AND LENGTH(sheetfield.FieldValue) > 0 WHERE sheet.SheetType = 6 AND sheet.DateTimeSheet BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY - INTERVAL 1 SECOND GROUP BY sheet.SheetNum ) sheets GROUP BY sheets.PatNum, sheets.Date ) consents ON consents.PatNum = appointment.PatNum AND appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN consents.Date AND consents.Date + INTERVAL 1 DAY - INTERVAL 1 SECOND WHERE appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY appointment.PatNum, DATE(appointment.AptDateTime)

request: Treatment planned procedures for a patient excluding specified codes where the patient doesn't have a planned appointment
query: SET @ExcludedCodes='D1110,D1120,D4910,D4342'; SELECT CONCAT(p.LName, ', ',p.FName, ' ', p.MiddleI) AS Patient ,p.patnum ,p.PriProv ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) AS '$FeeSum' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND ProcStatus = 1 AND NOT FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ExcludedCodes) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT papt.PatNum ,GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(sapt.AptStatus, 0)) AS 'AptStatuses' FROM appointment papt LEFT JOIN appointment sapt ON sapt.NextAptNum = papt.AptNum WHERE papt.AptStatus = 6 GROUP BY papt.PatNum ) paptatch ON paptatch.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE (ISNULL(paptatch.PatNum) OR NOT paptatch.AptStatuses REGEXP '0|1|[3-5]') AND p.PatStatus = 0 GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName ASC;

request: Provider Next Month Goal. One row per Provider name.
query: SET @Clinics=''; SET @Blockouts='Meeting,Lunch'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(blockdef.DefNum) INTO @BlockOutNums FROM definition blockdef WHERE blockdef.Category = 25 AND FIND_IN_SET(blockdef.ItemName, @Blockouts); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(operatory.OperatoryNum,0)) INTO @OpNums FROM operatory LEFT JOIN clinic ON clinic.ClinicNum = operatory.ClinicNum WHERE FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clinic.Abbr, "HQ"), @Clinics); SELECT DATE(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')), LAST_DAY(CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 MONTH) INTO @FromDate, @ToDate; SELECT CONCAT(provider.FName, ' ', provider.LName) AS 'Prov Name' ,MAX(sched.Hours) AS 'Sched Hours' ,CAST(MAX(provider.HourlyProdGoalAmt) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Hourly Goal' ,CAST(MAX(sched.Hours) * MAX(provider.HourlyProdGoalAmt) AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Monthly goal' FROM provider INNER JOIN ( SELECT provtime.ProvNum , COUNT(DISTINCT IF(provtime.NoBlock, provtime.Num, NULL), IF(provtime.NoBlock, provtime.SchedDate, NULL)) /12 AS 'Hours' FROM ( SELECT schedule.SchedDate , apptincrements.Num , SEC_TO_TIME(apptincrements.Num * 300) AS 'IncTime' , schedule.ProvNum , SUM(IF(ISNULL(blocks.SchedDate), 1,0)) AS 'NoBlock' FROM schedule INNER JOIN scheduleop ON scheduleop.ScheduleNum = schedule.ScheduleNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(scheduleop.OperatoryNum, @OpNums)) INNER JOIN ( SELECT nums.Num FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(n2.num,n1.num,n0.num) + 1 AS 'num' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 ) AS n0 JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 ) AS n1 JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 0 ) AS n2 ORDER BY num LIMIT 288 )nums ) apptincrements ON SEC_TO_TIME(apptincrements.Num * 300) BETWEEN schedule.StartTime AND SUBTIME(schedule.StopTime, '00:00:01') LEFT JOIN ( SELECT blockout.SchedDate , blockout.StartTime , blockout.StopTime , blockop.OperatoryNum FROM schedule blockout INNER JOIN scheduleop blockop ON blockop.ScheduleNum = blockout.ScheduleNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) =0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(blockop.OperatoryNum, @OpNums)) WHERE blockout.SchedType = 2 AND blockout.SchedDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(blockout.BlockoutType, @BlockoutNums) ) blocks ON blocks.OperatoryNum = scheduleop.OperatoryNum AND blocks.SchedDate = schedule.SchedDate AND SEC_TO_TIME(apptincrements.Num * 300) BETWEEN blocks.StartTime AND SUBTIME(blocks.StopTime, '00:00:01') WHERE schedule.SchedDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND schedule.SchedType = 1 GROUP BY schedule.SchedDate, apptincrements.Num, schedule.ProvNum ) provtime GROUP BY provtime.ProvNum ) sched ON sched.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum GROUP BY `Prov Name` ORDER BY `Prov Name`

request: Completed procedures with patient payments and no insurance estimates
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-01-01', @ToDate = '2024-03-31'; SELECT core.ProcCode AS 'Procedure Code' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.ProcNum) AS 'Count' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Paid) / COUNT(DISTINCT core.ProcNum),2) AS 'Average Collected' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcNum ,pl.ProcDate ,pc.ProcCode ,SUM(ps.SplitAmt) AS 'Paid' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN paysplit ps ON ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND ISNULL(cp.ProcNum) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) core GROUP BY core.ProcCode

request: Count of Patients Created in a Specified Date Range and Count of Created Patients with a Completed Appointment by User
query: SET @FromDate='2024-09-01', @ToDate='2024-09-30'; SELECT u.UserName AS 'User' , COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS 'PatCount' , COUNT(DISTINCT apt.PatNum) AS 'CompletedPats' FROM userod u INNER JOIN securitylog sl ON sl.UserNum = u.UserNum AND sl.PermType = 106 AND sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = sl.PatNum LEFT JOIN appointment apt ON apt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND apt.AptStatus = 2 WHERE !u.IsHidden GROUP BY u.UserNum ORDER BY u.UserName,u.UserNum

request: Paysplits in a date range for the specified clinic(s) that are not attached to a procedure or are attached to a treatment planned procedure.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @IncludeZeroSplits='Yes'; SET @Clinics=''; SELECT COALESCE(c.Abbr, 'Unassigned') AS 'ClinicAbbr' , CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName' , ps.PatNum AS 'PatientNumber' , CONCAT( g.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(g.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', g.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', g.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(g.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', g.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'GuarantorName' , g.PatNum AS 'GuarantorNumber' , DATE_FORMAT(ps.DatePay, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'PaymentDate' , FORMAT(ps.SplitAmt, 2) AS 'PaySplitAmount' , COALESCE(CONCAT(pr.FName, ' ', pr.LName), 'No Provider') AS 'Provider' , COALESCE(pr.ProvNum, 'No Provider') AS 'Provider Number' , COALESCE(prs.ItemName, 'No Provider') AS 'Provider Specialty' , pay.SecUserNumEntry AS 'PostingUserID' , COALESCE(uod.UserName, 'None') AS 'PostingUserName' , IF(pscount.SplitCount > 1, 1, 0) AS 'PaymentSplit?' , IFNULL(pl.ProcStatus, 0) AS 'TxPlan?' , IFNULL(pc.ProcCode, 'N/A') AS 'TxProc' , FORMAT(pay.PayAmt, 2) AS 'FullPaymentAmt' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ps.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN userod uod ON uod.UserNum = pay.SecUserNumEntry LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = ps.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = ps.ProvNum LEFT JOIN definition prs ON prs.DefNum = pr.Specialty LEFT JOIN( SELECT psc.PayNum , COUNT(psc.SplitNum) AS 'SplitCount' FROM paysplit psc WHERE psc.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY psc.PayNum ) pscount ON pscount.PayNum = ps.PayNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND (ps.ProcNum = 0 OR pl.ProcStatus = 1) AND IF(@IncludeZeroSplits = 'Yes', TRUE, (ps.SplitAmt < -0.005 OR ps.SplitAmt > 0.005)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(c.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics)) ORDER BY ps.DatePay,ps.PatNum,ps.SplitNum

request: Insurance Aging Report for Specified Codes
query: SET @AsOf=''; SET @Codes='D8090,D8080,D8040,D8030'; SET @AsOf = IF(LENGTH(@AsOf) = 0,CURDATE(),@AsOf); SELECT core.CarrierName ,core.InsPayEst030 AS 'InsPayEst 0-30' ,core.InsPayEst3160 AS 'InsPayEst 31-60' ,core.InsPayEst6190 AS 'InsPayEst 61-90' ,core.InsPayEst90 AS 'InsPayEst >90' ,core.InsPayEstTotal AS 'InsPayEstTotal' FROM ( SELECT c.CarrierName ,c.CarrierNum ,FORMAT(SUM(IF(cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND @AsOf,cp.InsPayEst,0)),2) AS 'InsPayEst030' ,FORMAT(SUM(IF(cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 31 DAY,cp.InsPayEst,0)),2) AS 'InsPayEst3160' ,FORMAT(SUM(IF(cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 61 DAY,cp.InsPayEst,0)),2) AS 'InsPayEst6190' ,FORMAT(SUM(IF(cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf - INTERVAL 91 DAY,cp.InsPayEst,0)),2) AS 'InsPayEst90' ,FORMAT(SUM(IF(cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf,cp.InsPayEst,0)),2) AS 'InsPayEstTotal' FROM carrier c INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.CarrierNum = c.CarrierNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum AND cl.ClaimType != 'Preauth' INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ClaimNum = cl.ClaimNum AND cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND IF(cp.Status = 1 ,cp.DateCP > @AsOf,cp.Status = 0 ) INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Codes)) GROUP BY c.CarrierName ) core ORDER BY core.CarrierName, core.CarrierNum

request: Aging for families with a positive balance before insurance as of the specified AsOf date, includes aging buckets up to and after the specified Date2 date
query: SET @AsOf=''; SET @Date2='2023-04-26'; SET @ProvAbbrs=''; SET @AgingLevel='Family'; SET @ClinicAbbrs=''; SET @BillingTypes=''; SET @ExcludePendingIns='No'; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays'),0) INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'),1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @ProvAbbrs); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @ClinicAbbrs); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @ClinicAbbrs),'0,',''),IFNULL(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @BillTypeNums FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(definition.ItemName, @BillingTypes); SELECT (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatName WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'Patient', (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_0_30 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_0_30) END) AS '0-30 Days', (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_31_60 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_31_60) END) AS '31-60 Days', (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_61_90 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_61_90) END) AS '61-90 Days', (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_91_date2 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_91_date2) END) AS '91 Days-Date2', (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_Before_date2 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_Before_date2) END) AS 'Before Date2', (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.BalTotal WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.BalTotal) END) AS 'Total', (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsWoEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsWoEst) END) AS 'W/O Est', (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsPayEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsPayEst) END) AS 'Ins Est', (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.PatEst) END) AS 'Patient' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum, CONCAT( patient.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred,'''') ELSE '' END), ' ', patient.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName', guarAging.Bal_0_30, guarAging.Bal_31_60, guarAging.Bal_61_90, guarAging.Bal_91_date2, guarAging.Bal_Before_date2, guarAging.BalTotal, guarAging.InsWoEst, guarAging.InsPayEst, guarAging.BalTotal-guarAging.InsPayEst-guarAging.InsWoEst AS 'PatEst', guarAging.PayPlanDue FROM ( SELECT tSums.PatNum, CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) 'Bal_Before_date2', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits <= tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 THEN tSums.Charges91Todate2 WHEN tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.Charges91Todate2 + tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_91_date2', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits <= tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 THEN tSums.Charges_61_90 WHEN tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 + tSums.Charges_61_90 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 + tSums.Charges_61_90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_61_90', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 + tSums.Charges_61_90 THEN tSums.Charges_31_60 WHEN tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_31_60', CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 THEN tSums.Charges_0_30 WHEN tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesBeforedate2 + tSums.Charges91Todate2 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Bal_0_30', CAST(tSums.BalTotal AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'BalTotal', CAST(tSums.InsWoEst AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'InsWoEst', CAST(tSums.InsPayEst AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'InsPayEst', CAST(tSums.PayPlanDue AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) AS 'PatNum', SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount > 0 OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@Date2) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesBeforedate2', SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount > 0 OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@Date2) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges91Todate2', SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount > 0 OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < @AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_61_90', SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount > 0 OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < @AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= @AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_31_60', SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount > 0 OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate >= @AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_0_30', -SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount < 0 AND NOT(trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TotalCredits', SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotal', SUM(trans.InsWoEst) AS 'InsWoEst', SUM(trans.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst', SUM(trans.PayPlanAmount) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.PatNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= @AsOf THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > @AsOf)) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > @AsOf)) THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog p ON cp.ProcNum = p.ProcNum WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (cp.ProcNum = 0 OR p.ProcStatus = 2) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , a.PatNum , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey' , ps.PatNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= @AsOf AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmount' , ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum , pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate' , -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.PatNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Discount' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , p.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , p.Discount + p.DiscountPlanAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplanlink ppl ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog p ON ppl.FKey = p.ProcNum AND ppl.LinkType = 2 AND p.ProcStatus = 1 WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND p.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 AND pp.DynamicPayPlanTPOption = 2 AND (p.Discount != 0 OR p.DiscountPlanAmt != 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType , ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey' , prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum , procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjustment.ProcNum , adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay' , SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff' , claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , 0 ProcNum , DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND ppl.SecDateTEntry < @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) trans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = trans.PatNum GROUP BY (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) ) tSums ) guarAging INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=guarAging.PatNum WHERE guaraging.BalTotal > 0.005 AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@ClinicAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(@ExcludePendingIns != 'Yes', TRUE, ABS(guaraging.InsPayEst + guaraging.InsWoEst) < 0.005) AND IF(LENGTH(@ProvAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.PriProv, @ProvNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.BillingType, @BillTypeNums)) ) aging INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Spacer' UNION SELECT 'Total' ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY dup.Type, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', aging.PatNum, NULL) ORDER BY dup.Type, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', aging.PatName, NULL), IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', aging.PatNum, NULL)

request: New Patient appointments in the specified date range with the specified code(s) attached
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-09-01', @ToDate = '2024-09-30'; SET @Codes = 'D0150,D0120,D1110,D1120,D0140,D4942,D4943'; SELECT a.PatNum ,IFNULL(( SELECT op.Abbrev FROM operatory op WHERE op.OperatoryNum = a.Op ),'') AS 'Operatory' ,a.AptDateTime ,IFNULL(( SELECT uo.UserName FROM userod uo WHERE uo.UserNum = a.SecUserNumEntry ),'') AS 'Scheduler' ,IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(apt.AptDateTime) FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 1 AND apt.PatNum = a.PatNum AND DATE(apt.AptDateTime) > DATE(a.AptDateTime) AND apt.AptNum != a.AptNum ),'') AS 'Next Apt' ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.ProcCode, ' ', ELT(pl.ProcStatus, 'TP','C','EC','EO','R','D','Cn','TPi')) AS 'Procedures' FROM appointment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON a.AptNum = pl.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@Codes)) WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.IsNewPatient GROUP BY a.AptNum

request: Production from fee schedules associated with completed appointments with appointment date in the specified date range
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-01-01', @ToDate = '2024-06-30'; SET @InsFeeSchedules = ''; SET @OfficeFeeSchedule='Standard'; SELECT core.request AS 'Fee Schedule Name' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum) AS 'Patient Count' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.UCR),2) AS 'Total Gross Production' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Writeoff),2) AS 'Total Writeoffs' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.UCR) - SUM(core.Writeoff),2) AS 'Total Net Production' FROM ( SELECT fs.request ,fs.FeeSchedNum ,a.PatNum ,a.AptNum ,a.AptDateTime ,a.InsPlan1 = ip.PlanNum AS 'Primary' ,COALESCE(perappt.ProcFees, 0) AS 'ProcFees' ,COALESCE(perappt.UCR, 0) AS 'UCR' ,COALESCE(perappt.Writeoffs, 0) AS 'Writeoff' FROM feesched fs INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.FeeSched = fs.FeeSchedNum INNER JOIN appointment a ON (a.InsPlan1 = ip.PlanNum OR a.InsPlan2 = ip.PlanNum) AND a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procs.AptNum ,procs.PatNum ,SUM(procs.Fees) AS 'ProcFees' ,SUM(procs.UCR) AS 'UCR' ,SUM(procs.Writeoffs) AS 'Writeoffs' FROM ( SELECT pl.AptNum ,pl.PatNum ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'Fees' ,IFNULL(( SELECT fee.Amount FROM fee INNER JOIN feesched ucr ON fee.FeeSched = ucr.FeeSchedNum AND ucr.request = @OfficeFeeSchedule AND ucr.IsGlobal WHERE fee.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND fee.ProvNum = 0 AND fee.ClinicNum = 0 ),0) AS 'UCR' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ) ,0)AS 'Writeoffs' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN appointment appt ON pl.AptNum = appt.AptNum AND appt.AptStatus = 2 AND appt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) procs GROUP BY procs.AptNum ) perappt ON perappt.AptNum = a.AptNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@InsFeeSchedules) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(fs.request,@InsFeeSchedules)) GROUP BY a.AptNum, fs.FeeSchedNum ORDER BY a.AptNum, IF(a.InsPlan1 = ip.PlanNum,1,2), fs.FeeSchedNum ) core GROUP BY core.FeeSchedNum

request: Count of Appointments That Were Broken/Cancelled/Deleted/Moved In Specified Date Range On The Date Of The Appointment And Count Completed In The Specified Date Range By Clinic
query: SET @FromDate='2023-10-01', @ToDate='2024-10-20'; SELECT c.Abbr AS 'Clinic' ,IFNULL(counts.Count,0) + IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(a.AptNum) FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.ClinicNum = c.ClinicNum ),0) AS 'Schedule' ,IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(a.AptNum) FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.ClinicNum = c.ClinicNum ),0) AS 'Complete' FROM ( SELECT c.ClinicNum ,c.Abbr FROM clinic c UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS 'ClinicNum' ,'None' AS 'Abbr' ) c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT core2.FKey) AS 'Count' ,core2.Clinic FROM ( SELECT moved.AptNum AS 'FKey' ,moved.ClinicNum AS 'Clinic' ,'Moved' AS 'Type' FROM( SELECT DATE(ha.AptDateTime) AS 'NewAptDate' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(DATE(ha2.AptDateTime) ORDER BY ha2.HistDateTStamp DESC),',',1) FROM histappointment ha2 WHERE ha2.HistDateTSTamp < ha.HistDateTStamp AND ha2.AptNum = ha.AptNum ),'N/A') AS 'OldAptDate' ,ha.AptNum ,ha.ClinicNum ,DATE(ha.HistDateTStamp) AS 'AptChangeDate' ,ha.AptStatus FROM histappointment ha WHERE ha.HistDateTStamp BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ha.HistApptAction = 1 GROUP BY ha.HistApptNum ) moved WHERE moved.OldAptDate = moved.AptChangeDate AND (moved.OldAptDate != moved.NewAptDate OR moved.AptStatus = 3 ) GROUP BY moved.AptNum UNION ALL SELECT core.FKey ,core.ClinicNum AS 'Clinic' ,'BrokenApt' AS 'Type' FROM( SELECT sl.SecurityLogNum ,sl.FKey ,sl.PatNum ,sl.LogDateTime ,sl.UserNum ,sl.PermType ,STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(CASE WHEN sl.PermType = 27 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%broken%' THEN SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText, ', Broken', 1), -22) END),'%c/%e/%Y %r') AS OldAptDate ,sl.LogText ,a.ClinicNum FROM securitylog sl LEFT JOIN appointment a ON sl.FKey = a.AptNum WHERE sl.PermType = 27 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%broken%' AND sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY sl.SecurityLogNum HAVING DATE(LogDateTime) = DATE(OldAptDate) ORDER BY sl.PatNum ) core GROUP BY core.FKey UNION ALL SELECT ha.AptNum AS 'FKey' ,ha.ClinicNum AS 'Clinic' ,'DeletedApt' AS 'Type' FROM histappointment ha WHERE ha.HistApptAction = 4 AND DATE(ha.HistDateTStamp) = DATE(ha.AptDateTime) AND ha.HistDateTStamp BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY ha.AptNum ) core2 GROUP BY core2.Clinic ) counts ON counts.Clinic = c.ClinicNum GROUP BY c.ClinicNum

request: List of pending supplemental insurance payments.
query: SELECT p.PatNum AS 'PatID' , p.PatNum , cl.DateService , ( SELECT carrier.CarrierName FROM insplan INNER JOIN carrier ON carrier.CarrierNum = insplan.CarrierNum WHERE insplan.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum ) AS 'Carrier' , (CASE cl.ClaimStatus WHEN 'U' THEN 'Unsent' WHEN 'H' THEN 'Hold until pri received' WHEN 'W' THEN 'Waiting to send' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Sent' WHEN 'R' THEN 'Received' WHEN 'I' THEN 'Hold for In Process' ELSE 'Other' END) AS 'ClaimStatus' , (CASE cl.ClaimType WHEN 'P' THEN 'Primary' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Secondary' WHEN 'PreAuth' THEN 'PreAuthorization' ELSE 'Other' END) AS 'ClaimType' , pc.ProcCode , CAST(cp.InsPayEst AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'Pending Amount' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = cp.PatNum WHERE cp.IsOverpay = 1 AND cp.Status = 0 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, cl.DateService, cl.ClaimNum, cp.ClaimProcNum

request: Patients with a completed procedure with one of the specified procedure codes, where the patient had a subsequent completed appointment.
query: SET @FromDate ='2023-10-01', @ToDate ='2024-10-31'; SET @ProcCodes ='D0150'; SELECT lastproc.PatNum ,DATE_FORMAT(MAX(apt.AptDateTime), '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Last Completed Appt' FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,MAX(pl.ProcDate) AS 'LastCompProc' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes) GROUP BY p.PatNum ) lastproc INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.PatNum = lastproc.PatNum AND apt.AptDateTime >= lastproc.LastCompProc AND apt.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY lastproc.PatNum

request: Patient status patients with no scheduled appointments whose last completed appointment is in the specified date range
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT p.PatNum AS 'Pat , p.PatNum , DATE_FORMAT(comp.AptDT, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Last Visit Date' , IFNULL(( SELECT clin.Abbr FROM clinic clin WHERE clin.ClinicNum = comp.AptClin ),'None') AS 'Last Visit Clinic' , IFNULL(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(r.DatePrevious), '%m/%d/%Y') FROM recall r WHERE r.PatNum = p.PatNum ), 'Never') AS 'Last Recall Done' , IFNULL(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(r.DateDue), '%m/%d/%Y') FROM recall r WHERE !r.IsDisabled AND r.PatNum = p.PatNum ), 'Never') AS 'Next Recall Due' , IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT 'Yes') FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 1 AND pl.PatNum = p.PatNum ), 'No') AS 'Unfinished Tx Plan?' , ( SELECT g.BalTotal FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum = p.Guarantor ) AS '$Outstanding Family Balance_' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT apt.PatNum , MAX(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDT' , GROUP_CONCAT(apt.ClinicNum ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime DESC LIMIT 1) AS 'AptClin' FROM appointment apt WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY apt.PatNum ) comp ON comp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND comp.AptDT BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.PatNum FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus = 1 GROUP BY a.PatNum ) sched ON sched.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND ISNULL(sched.PatNum) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName

request: Aging for patients with any positive balance after insurance estimates. Limited to patients assigned to a specified clinic.
query: SET @AsOf=CURDATE(); SET @ClinicName=''; SET @PayPlanVersion=IFNULL((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1); SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays'),0) INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'),1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SET @ClinicNameUse=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ClinicName)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ClinicName,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ab.Clinic ,ab.PatNum ,ab.Pat0to30 AS 'Pat 0-30 Days' ,ab.Pat31to60 AS 'Pat 31-60 Days' ,ab.Pat61to90 AS 'Pat 61-90 Days' ,ab.Pat91to180 AS 'Pat 91-180 Days' ,ab.Pat181to360 AS 'Pat 181-360 Days' ,ab.Pat361to720 AS 'Pat 361-720 Days' ,ab.Pat721to1095 AS 'Pat 721-1095 Days' ,ab.PatOver1095 AS 'Pat Over 1095 Days' ,ab.Total AS 'Pat Total Balance' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'ItemOrder' ,cc.Clinic ,cc.PatNum ,FORMAT( (CASE WHEN cc.Credits < cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 + cc.Charges61to90 + cc.Charges31to60 THEN cc.Charges0to30 WHEN cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 + cc.Charges61to90 + cc.Charges31to60 + cc.Charges0to30 <= cc.Credits THEN 0 ELSE cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 + cc.Charges61to90 + cc.Charges31to60 + cc.Charges0to30 - cc.Credits END) - COALESCE(cc.InsEst0to30,0) ,2) AS 'Pat0to30' ,FORMAT( (CASE WHEN cc.Credits < cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 + cc.Charges61to90 THEN cc.Charges31to60 WHEN cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 + cc.Charges61to90 + cc.Charges31to60 <= cc.Credits THEN 0 ELSE cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 + cc.Charges61to90 + cc.Charges31to60 - cc.Credits END) - COALESCE(cc.InsEst31to60,0) ,2) AS 'Pat31to60' ,FORMAT( (CASE WHEN cc.Credits < cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 THEN cc.Charges61to90 WHEN cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 + cc.Charges61to90 <= cc.Credits THEN 0 ELSE cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 + cc.Charges61to90 - cc.Credits END) - COALESCE(cc.InsEst61to90,0) ,2) AS 'Pat61to90' ,FORMAT( (CASE WHEN cc.Credits < cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 THEN cc.Charges91to180 WHEN cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 <= cc.Credits THEN 0 ELSE cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 + cc.Charges91to180 - cc.Credits END) - COALESCE(cc.InsEst91to180,0) ,2) AS 'Pat91to180' ,FORMAT( (CASE WHEN cc.Credits < cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 THEN cc.Charges181to360 WHEN cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 <= cc.Credits THEN 0 ELSE cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 + cc.Charges181to360 - cc.Credits END) - COALESCE(cc.InsEst181to360,0) ,2) AS 'Pat181to360' ,FORMAT( (CASE WHEN cc.Credits < cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 THEN cc.Charges361to720 WHEN cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 <= cc.Credits THEN 0 ELSE cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 + cc.Charges361to720 - cc.Credits END) - COALESCE(cc.InsEst361to720,0) ,2) AS 'Pat361to720' ,FORMAT( (CASE WHEN cc.Credits <= cc.ChargesOver1095 THEN cc.Charges721to1095 WHEN cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 <= cc.Credits THEN 0 ELSE cc.ChargesOver1095 + cc.Charges721to1095 - cc.Credits END) - COALESCE(cc.InsEst721to1095,0) ,2) AS 'Pat721to1095' ,FORMAT( (CASE WHEN cc.Credits >= cc.ChargesOver1095 THEN 0 ELSE cc.ChargesOver1095 - cc.Credits END) - COALESCE(cc.InsEstOver1095,0) ,2) AS 'PatOver1095' ,FORMAT(cc.Bal - (COALESCE(cc.InsEst0to30,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst31to60,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst61to90,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst91to180,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst181to360,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst361to720,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst721to1095,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEstOver1095,0)) ,2) AS 'Total' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(cc.InsEst0to30,0),2) AS 'InsEst0to30' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(cc.InsEst31to60,0),2) AS 'InsEst31to60' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(cc.InsEst61to90,0),2) AS 'InsEst61to90' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(cc.InsEst91to180,0),2) AS 'InsEst91to180' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(cc.InsEst181to360,0),2) AS 'InsEst181to360' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(cc.InsEst361to720,0),2) AS 'InsEst361to720' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(cc.InsEst721to1095,0),2) AS 'InsEst721to1095' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(cc.InsEstOver1095,0),2) AS 'InsEstOver1095' FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(cl.Abbr, 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,p.PatNum ,SUM(patlevel.PatBal) AS 'Bal' ,SUM(patlevel.Charges0to30) AS 'Charges0to30' ,SUM(patlevel.Charges31to60) AS 'Charges31to60' ,SUM(patlevel.Charges61to90) AS 'Charges61to90' ,SUM(patlevel.Charges91to180) AS 'Charges91to180' ,SUM(patlevel.Charges181to360) AS 'Charges181to360' ,SUM(patlevel.Charges361to720) AS 'Charges361to720' ,SUM(patlevel.Charges721to1095) AS 'Charges721to1095' ,SUM(patlevel.ChargesOver1095) AS 'ChargesOver1095' ,SUM(patlevel.Credits) AS 'Credits' ,SUM(COALESCE(claim.InsEst0to30,0)) AS 'InsEst0to30' ,SUM(COALESCE(claim.InsEst31to60,0)) AS 'InsEst31to60' ,SUM(COALESCE(claim.InsEst61to90,0)) AS 'InsEst61to90' ,SUM(COALESCE(claim.InsEst91to180,0)) AS 'InsEst91to180' ,SUM(COALESCE(claim.InsEst181to360,0)) AS 'InsEst181to360' ,SUM(COALESCE(claim.InsEst361to720,0)) AS 'InsEst361to720' ,SUM(COALESCE(claim.InsEst721to1095,0)) AS 'InsEst721to1095' ,SUM(COALESCE(claim.InsEstOver1095,0)) AS 'InsEstOver1095' FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum ,SUM(RawPatTrans.TranAmount) AS 'PatBal' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount > 0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate <= @AsOf AND RawPatTrans.TranDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges0to30' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount > 0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges31to60' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount > 0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges61to90' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount > 0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 180 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges91to180' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount > 0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 180 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 360 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges181to360' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount > 0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 360 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 720 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges361to720' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount > 0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 720 DAY) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 1095 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Charges721to1095' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount > 0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 1095 DAY)) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'ChargesOver1095' ,-SUM((CASE WHEN (RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0 AND RawPatTrans.TranDate <= @AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END)) AS 'Credits' FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.PatNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= @AsOf THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog p ON cp.ProcNum = p.ProcNum WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (cp.ProcNum = 0 OR p.ProcStatus = 2) HAVING TranAmount != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , a.PatNum , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey' , ps.PatNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= @AsOf AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmount' , ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum , pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate' , -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.PatNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= @AsOf AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Discount' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , p.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , p.Discount + p.DiscountPlanAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplanlink ppl ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog p ON ppl.FKey = p.ProcNum AND ppl.LinkType = 2 AND p.ProcStatus = 1 WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND p.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 AND pp.DynamicPayPlanTPOption = 2 AND (p.Discount != 0 OR p.DiscountPlanAmt != 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType , ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey' , prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum , procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjustment.ProcNum , adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay' , SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff' , claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , 0 ProcNum , DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND ppl.SecDateTEntry < @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) RawPatTrans WHERE TranDate <= @AsOf GROUP BY RawPatTrans.PatNum ) patlevel LEFT JOIN ( SELECT insests.PatNum ,SUM((CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND insests.ProcDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS 'InsEst0to30' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS 'InsEst31to60' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS 'InsEst61to90' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 180 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS 'InsEst91to180' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 180 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 360 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS 'InsEst181to360' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 360 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 720 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS 'InsEst361to720' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 720 DAY) AND insests.ProcDate >= (@AsOf - INTERVAL 1095 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS 'InsEst721to1095' ,SUM((CASE WHEN (insests.ProcDate < (@AsOf - INTERVAL 1095 DAY)) THEN insests.InsEst ELSE 0 END)) AS 'InsEstOver1095' FROM( SELECT cp.PatNum ,SUM(cp.InsPayEst + cp.Writeoff) AS 'InsEst' ,cp.ProcDate FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum != 0 AND ((cp.Status = 0 AND cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf) OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > @AsOf)) AND cp.ProcDate <= @ASOf GROUP BY cp.PatNum, cp.ProcDate ) insests GROUP BY insests.PatNum ) claim ON claim.PatNum = patlevel.PatNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = patlevel.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum WHERE IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@ClinicName) = 0, TRUE, IFNULL(cl.Abbr, 'Unassigned') REGEXP @ClinicNameUse) GROUP BY p.PatNum ) cc WHERE cc.Bal - (COALESCE(cc.InsEst0to30,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst31to60,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst61to90,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst91to180,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst181to360,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst361to720,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEst721to1095,0) + COALESCE(cc.InsEstOver1095,0)) > 0.005 ) ab ORDER BY ab.ItemOrder, ab.PatNum;

request: Insurance plans with benefits last verified in the specified date range
query: SET @FromDate='2024-10-01', @ToDate='2024-10-31'; SELECT '' AS 'Date' ,( SELECT pracname.ValueString FROM preference pracname WHERE pracname.PrefName = 'PracticeTitle' ) AS 'Group Name' ,'' AS 'Group Number' ,'' AS 'DateLastVerified' UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() AS 'Date' ,IFNULL(NULLIF(ip.GroupName,''),'No Group Name') AS 'Group Name' ,IFNULL(NULLIF(ip.GroupNum,''),'No Group Number') AS 'Group Number' ,iv.DateLastVerified FROM insplan ip INNER JOIN insverify iv ON iv.FKey = ip.PlanNum AND iv.VerifyType = 1 AND iv.DateLastVerified BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) WHERE (ip.GroupNum != '' OR ip.GroupName != '')

request: Canada: Payment report like internal, but payment amounts allocated to codes 99111, 99333/99112, 99222/99113 and 99555/99121 are in their own columns, and not included in the Amount column.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ProvList=''; SET @PracticeName='Default'; SET @Codes=''; SET @ProvList=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@ProvList)=0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(REPLACE(@ProvList,', ','$|^'), ',','$|^'),'$') END); SET @ProvNums = ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provs.ProvNum) FROM provider provs WHERE provs.Abbr REGEXP @ProvList AND !provs.IsHidden ); SET @PracticeTitle = IF(@PracticeName='Default', (SELECT pracname.ValueString FROM preference pracname WHERE pracname.PrefNum = 5), @PracticeTitle := @PracticeName); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @CodeNums FROM procedurecode pc WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @Codes)); SELECT COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum), '') INTO @LabCode FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode = '99111'; SELECT COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum), '') INTO @InHouseLabCode FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('99333','99112'); SELECT COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum), '')
