INTO @BiopsyLabCode FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('99222','99113'); SELECT COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum), '') INTO @MaterialsCode FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('99555', '99121'); SELECT CONCAT(@LabCode, ',',@InHouseLabCode, ',',@BiopsyLabCode, ',',@MaterialsCode) INTO @AllLabCodes; SELECT display.Date AS ' ' , display.DateIssued AS ' ' , display.PatientNumber AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Patient, 35) AS ' ' , LEFT(display.Carrier, 35) AS ' ' , display.Provider AS ' ' , display.CheckNum AS ' ' , display.Amount AS ' ' , display.99111 AS ' ' , display.99112 AS ' ' , display.99113 AS ' ' , display.99121 AS ' ' FROM ( SELECT 'A' AS 'ItemType' , 1 AS 'GroupPayType' , dup1.Num , '0001-01-01' AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date' END ) AS 'Date' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Date Issued' END ) AS 'DateIssued' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Pat END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Name' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN 'Daily Payments Report' WHEN 2 THEN @PracticeTitle WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT( 'Date Range:' , DATE_FORMAT(@FromDate, '%m/%d/%Y') , '-' , DATE_FORMAT(@ToDate, '%m/%d/%Y') ) WHEN 4 THEN 'Carrier' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Prov' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Check END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'Amount' END ) AS 'Amount' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'For LabFee' END ) AS '99111' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'For InHouseLab' END ) AS '99112' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'For Biopsy' END ) AS '99113' , ( CASE dup1.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN '' WHEN 4 THEN 'For Materials' END ) AS '99121' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 ) dup1 UNION ALL SELECT ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.ItemType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 3 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 4 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.ItemType) END ) AS 'ItemType' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 2 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 3 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 4 THEN pays.GroupPayType WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.GroupPayType) END ) AS 'GroupPayType' , dup2.Num , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 2 THEN MIN(pays.Date) WHEN 3 THEN pays.Date WHEN 4 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 5 THEN MAX(pays.Date) WHEN 6 THEN MAX(pays.Date) END ) AS 'OrDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 2 THEN pays.PayType WHEN 3 THEN DATE_FORMAT(pays.Date, '%m/%d/%Y') WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN IF(pays.DateIssued = '0001-01-01', '', DATE_FORMAT(pays.DateIssued, '%m/%d/%Y')) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'DisIssDate' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.PatNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'PatientNumber' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT CONCAT( UPPER(p.LName) ,', ' ,UPPER(p.FName) ) FROM patient p WHERE p.PatNum = pays.PatNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Patient' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.Carrier WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.PayType) WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT('Total ', pays.ItemType, 's') WHEN 6 THEN 'Total All Payments' END ) AS 'Carrier' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN ( SELECT provider.Abbr FROM provider WHERE provider.ProvNum = pays.ProvNum ) WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'Provider' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN pays.CheckNum WHEN 4 THEN '' WHEN 5 THEN '' WHEN 6 THEN '' END ) AS 'CheckNum' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.Amount), 2) END ) AS 'Amount' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99111), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99111), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99111), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99111), 2) END ) AS '99111' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99112), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99112), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99112), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99112), 2) END ) AS '99112' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99113), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99113), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99113), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99113), 2) END ) AS '99113' , ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99121), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99121), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99121), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(pays.99121), 2) END ) AS '99121' FROM ( SELECT 'Insurance Payment' AS 'ItemType' , cpayt.ItemName AS 'PayType' , cpay.ClaimPaymentNum AS 'PayNum' , cpay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , cp.DateCP AS 'Date' , cpay.DateIssued , cp.PatNum , c.CarrierName AS 'Carrier' , cp.ProvNum , cpay.CheckNum , SUM(IF(!FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @AllLabCodes), cp.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS 'Amount' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @LabCode), cp.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS '99111' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @InHouseLabCode), cp.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS '99112' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @BiopsyCode), cp.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS '99113' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @MaterialCode), cp.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS '99121' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cp.ClaimPaymentNum INNER JOIN definition cpayt ON cpayt.DefNum = cpay.PayType AND cpayt.Category = 32 INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier c ON c.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @CodeNums)) GROUP BY cp.ProvNum, cpay.ClaimPaymentNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Patient Payment' AS 'ItemType' , COALESCE(paytype.ItemName, 'Income Transfer') AS 'PayType' , pay.PayNum , pay.PayType AS 'GroupPayType' , ps.DatePay AS 'Date' , '' AS DateIssued , pay.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , '' AS 'Carrier' , ps.ProvNum AS 'ProvNum' , pay.CheckNum AS 'CheckNum' , SUM(IF(!FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @AllLabCodes), ps.SplitAmt, 0)) AS 'Amount' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @LabCode), ps.SplitAmt, 0)) AS '99111' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @InHouseLabCode), ps.SplitAmt, 0)) AS '99112' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @BiopsyLabCode), ps.SplitAmt, 0)) AS '99113' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @MaterialsCode), ps.SplitAmt, 0)) AS '99121' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN payment pay ON pay.PayNum = ps.PayNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum LEFT JOIN definition paytype ON paytype.DefNum = pay.PayType AND paytype.Category = 10 WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @CodeNums)) GROUP BY ps.ProvNum, pay.PayNum ) pays INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 ) dup2 ON TRUE GROUP BY ( CASE dup2.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(pays.ItemType, ', ', dup2.Num) WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(pays.ProvNum, ', ', pays.PayNum, ', ', pays.ItemType) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT(dup2.Num, ', ', pays.GroupPayType, ', ', pays.ItemType) WHEN 5 THEN pays.ItemType WHEN 6 THEN dup2.Num END ) ORDER BY ItemType, GroupPayType, Num, OrDate ) display

request: List of patients with either Text or Email selected in 'Exclude Automated Messages', with the patient's assigned clinic
query: SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics' INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT IF(@EasyNoClinics, '', COALESCE(( SELECT clinic.Abbr FROM clinic WHERE clinic.ClinicNum = patient.ClinicNum ), 'None')) AS 'PatClinic' , patient.PatNum , IF(MAX(commoptout.OptOutSms), 'X', '') AS 'Text' , IF(MAX(commoptout.OptOutEmail), 'X', '') AS 'Email' FROM commoptout INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum = commoptout.PatNum AND patient.PatStatus != 4 GROUP BY commoptout.PatNum HAVING MAX(commoptout.OptOutSms) OR MAX(commoptout.OptOutEmail) ORDER BY PatClinic, patient.LName, patient.FName, patient.PatNum

request: Patients needing perio
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SET @Providers=''; SET @PerioProcCodes = 'D4940,D4341,D4342'; SET @Depth='5'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.CodeNum ORDER BY procedurecode.CodeNum) INTO @PerioCodeNums FROM procedurecode WHERE FIND_IN_SET(procedurecode.ProcCode, @PerioProcCodes); SELECT ( SELECT CONCAT(patient.LName, ', ', patient.FName) FROM patient WHERE patient.PatNum = pexam.PatNum ) AS 'Patient' , DATE_FORMAT(pexam.ExamDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date Seen' , pexam.ExamProv , COALESCE(examappt.Dentist, '') AS 'Appt Dentist' , COALESCE(examappt.Hygienist, '') AS 'Appt Hygienist' FROM ( SELECT perioexam.PatNum , MAX(perioexam.ExamDate) AS 'ExamDate' , SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(peprov.Abbr ORDER BY perioexam.ExamDate DESC, perioexam.PerioExamNum DESC), ',',1) AS 'ExamProv' , SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(perioexam.PerioExamNum ORDER BY perioexam.ExamDate DESC, perioexam.PerioExamNum DESC), ',',1) AS 'PerioExamNum' FROM perioexam INNER JOIN provider peprov ON peprov.ProvNum = perioexam.ProvNum GROUP BY perioexam.PatNum ORDER BY perioexam.PatNum ) pexam LEFT JOIN ( SELECT appointment.PatNum , DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDate' , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT dentist.Abbr ORDER BY appointment.AptNum) AS 'Dentist' , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT hygienist.Abbr ORDER BY appointment.AptNum) AS 'Hygienist' FROM appointment INNER JOIN provider dentist ON dentist.ProvNum = appointment.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider hygienist ON hygienist.ProvNum = appointment.ProvHyg WHERE appointment.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY appointment.PatNum, DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) ORDER BY appointment.PatNum, DATE(appointment.AptDateTime), appointment.AptNum ) examappt ON examappt.PatNum = pexam.PatNum AND examappt.AptDate = pexam.ExamDate WHERE pexam.ExamDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers), FIND_IN_SET(pexam.ExamProv, @Providers), TRUE) AND EXISTS ( SELECT periomeasure.PerioExamNum FROM periomeasure WHERE periomeasure.SequenceType = 4 AND (periomeasure.MBvalue >= CAST(@Depth AS UNSIGNED) OR periomeasure.Bvalue >= CAST(@Depth AS UNSIGNED) OR periomeasure.DBvalue >= CAST(@Depth AS UNSIGNED) OR periomeasure.MLvalue >= CAST(@Depth AS UNSIGNED) OR periomeasure.Lvalue >= CAST(@Depth AS UNSIGNED) OR periomeasure.DLvalue >= CAST(@Depth AS UNSIGNED)) AND periomeasure.PerioExamNum = pexam.PerioExamNum ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum FROM procedurelog LEFT JOIN appointment ON appointment.AptNum = procedurelog.AptNum WHERE FIND_IN_SET(procedurelog.CodeNum, @PerioCodeNums) AND ((procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 AND procedurelog.ProcDate > pexam.ExamDate) OR (procedurelog.ProcStatus = 1 AND appointment.AptStatus IN(1,4) AND appointment.AptDateTime > CURDATE()) ) AND procedurelog.PatNum = pexam.PatNum ) GROUP BY pexam.PatNum ORDER BY pexam.ExamDate ASC, pexam.PatNum

request: Treatment planned procedures in a specified procedure code range for patients with a future scheduled appointment in the specified date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-11-01', @ToDate='2024-12-31'; SET @FromProc='D1100', @ToProc='D5999'; SELECT p.PatNum ,( SELECT prov.Abbr FROM provider prov WHERE prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum ) AS 'TP Prov' ,pc.ProcCode AS 'TP Code' ,pc.Descript AS 'TP request' ,DATE_FORMAT(pl.DateTP, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'TP Date' ,p.Email ,GROUP_CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(apt.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime ASC SEPARATOR ' | ') AS 'Future Appts' ,GROUP_CONCAT(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pcode.ProcCode, '-', pcode.AbbrDesc ORDER BY pcode.ProcCode ASC) FROM procedurecode pcode INNER JOIN procedurelog plog ON plog.CodeNum = pcode.CodeNum WHERE plog.AptNum = apt.AptNum ) ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime ASC SEPARATOR ' | ') AS 'Future Appt Procs' ,GROUP_CONCAT(aptprov.Abbr, IF(ISNULL(apthyg.ProvNum), '', CONCAT(',', apthyg.Abbr)) ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime ASC SEPARATOR ' | ') AS 'Future Appt Provs' FROM patient p INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.PatNum = p.PatNum AND apt.AptDateTime > CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus = 1 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 1 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode BETWEEN @FromProc AND @ToProc INNER JOIN provider aptprov ON aptprov.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum LEFT JOIN provider apthyg ON apthyg.ProvNum = apt.ProvHyg GROUP BY pl.ProcNum

request: Prescriptions with specific drug names that were deleted in a date range.
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-02-01', @ToDate ='2024-02-29'; SET @DrugName ='Oxycodone,hydrocodone,Tylenol SET @DrugName = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@DrugName) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE REPLACE(@DrugName,',','|') END); SELECT SUBSTRING(sl.LogText,6,10) AS 'PrescriptionDate' ,p.PatNum ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING(sl.LogText,17),',',1) AS 'DrugName' ,pr.Abbr AS 'ProvAbbr' ,CONCAT(pr.LName, ', ', pr.FName) AS 'ProvName' ,DATE(sl.LogDateTime) AS 'DateDeleted' ,uo.UserName AS 'User' ,sl.CompName AS 'CompName' FROM securitylog sl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = sl.PatNum INNER JOIN userod uo ON uo.UserNum = sl.UserNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(sl.LogText,',',3),',',-1) = pr.ProvNum WHERE sl.PermType = 76 AND sl.LogText LIKE '%deleted%' AND sl.LogDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING(sl.LogText,17),',',1) REGEXP @DrugName

request: New patients report with clinic totals and grand total
query: SET @StartDate='2024-01-01', @EndDate='2024-12-31'; SET @Clinic='%%'; SET @ReferralLName='%%'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @Broken FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D9986','D9987'); SET @pos=0; SELECT IF(core.CountPats = 0,'',core.CountPats) AS 'CountPats' ,core.DateFirstProc ,core.Patient ,core.Referral ,core.Clinic ,core.Production ,core.Adjustments ,core.Writeoffs ,core.PatPayments ,core.InsPayments FROM( SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,@pos:=@pos+1,0) AS 'CountPats' ,IF(dup.Num IN (2,3,4,5),'',result.dateFirstProc) AS 'DateFirstProc' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(result.LName,', ',result.FName) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT('Clinic Totals: ',COUNT(DISTINCT result.PatNum)) WHEN 5 THEN CONCAT('Office Total: ',COUNT(DISTINCT result.PatNum)) ELSE '' END) AS 'Patient' ,IF(dup.Num IN (2,3,4,5),'',result.RefName) AS 'Referral' ,IF(dup.Num IN (2,4,5),'',result.request) AS 'Clinic' ,IF(dup.Num IN (2,4),'',FORMAT(SUM(result.Production),2)) AS 'Production' ,IF(dup.Num IN (2,4),'',FORMAT(SUM(result.Adjustments),2)) AS 'Adjustments' ,IF(dup.Num IN (2,4),'',FORMAT(SUM(result.Writeoffs),2)) AS 'Writeoffs' ,IF(dup.Num IN (2,4),'',FORMAT(SUM(result.PatPay),2)) AS 'PatPayments' ,IF(dup.Num IN (2,4),'',FORMAT(SUM(result.InsPay),2)) AS 'InsPayments' FROM( SELECT table1.DateFirstProc ,p.LName ,p.FName ,p.PatNum ,IFNULL(cl.request,'NONE') AS 'request' ,IFNULL(CONCAT(r.LName,IF(r.FName = '', '', ','),r.FName),'') AS 'RefName' ,r.ReferralNum ,SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 ),0)) AS 'Production' ,SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(a.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment a WHERE a.PatNum = p.PatNum ),0)) AS 'Adjustments' ,SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ),0)) AS 'Writeoffs' ,SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PatNum = p.PatNum ),0)) AS 'PatPay' ,SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) ),0)) AS 'InsPay' ,cl.ClinicNum FROM( SELECT pl2.PatNum ,MIN(pl2.ProcDate) AS 'DateFirstProc' FROM procedurelog pl2 WHERE pl2.ProcStatus = 2 AND NOT FIND_IN_SET(pl2.CodeNum,@Broken) GROUP BY pl2.PatNum HAVING DateFirstProc BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate ) table1 INNER JOIN patient p ON table1.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum=ra.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.ItemOrder = ( SELECT MIN(ra2.ItemOrder) FROM refattach ra2 WHERE ra2.PatNum = ra.PatNum AND ra2.RefType = 1 ) LEFT JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum WHERE IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') LIKE @Clinic AND IFNULL(r.LName,'None') LIKE @ReferralLName GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY table1.DateFirstProc,p.LName,p.FName ) result LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',result.PatNum) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',result.ClinicNum) ELSE dup.Num END) ORDER BY dup.Num,CountPats,Referral,result.ReferralNum,Clinic,result.ClinicNum,result.PatNum ) core

request: Completed appointments in the date range with the specified provider, with specified procedure codes assigned to the hygienist on the appointment
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-10-01', @ToDate ='2024-10-31'; SET @Providers =''; SET @FromCode ='D0200', @ToCode ='D0399'; SELECT ap.PatNum AS 'Patient Number' ,DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'Date' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,provh.Abbr AS 'Hygienist' ,GROUP_CONCAT(pc.ProcCode) AS 'Procedure Codes' ,FORMAT(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)),2) AS 'Procedure Fees' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = ap.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode BETWEEN @FromCode AND @ToCode INNER JOIN provider prov ON ap.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr,@Providers)) INNER JOIN provider provh ON ap.ProvHyg = provh.ProvNum AND pl.ProvNum = provh.ProvNum WHERE ap.AptStatus = 2 AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY ap.AptNum

request: Patients that have active popups on their account and are not deleted (for version 22.2 and up).
query: SELECT popup.PatNum AS 'Pat ,p.PatNum , (CASE popup.PopupLevel WHEN 0 THEN 'Patient' WHEN 1 THEN 'Family' WHEN 2 THEN 'SuperFamily' WHEN 3 THEN 'Automation' ELSE '' END ) AS 'PopupLevel' ,popup.request FROM popup INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = popup.PatNum WHERE (popup.DateTimeDisabled = '0001-01-01' OR popup.DateTimeDisabled > NOW()) AND IsArchived = 0 ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum

request: List of patients with the specified problem and note
query: SET @Problem ='Sleep Apnea'; SET @Note =''; SET @Problem = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Problem) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE REPLACE(@Problem,',','|') END); SET @Note = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Note) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE REPLACE(@Note,',','|') END); SELECT di.PatNum ,p.FName ,p.LName ,p.WirelessPhone ,p.Email ,dd.DiseaseName AS 'Problem' ,di.PatNote AS 'ProblemNote' FROM disease di INNER JOIN diseasedef dd ON dd.DiseaseDefNum = di.DiseaseDefNum AND dd.DiseaseName REGEXP @Problem INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = di.PatNum WHERE di.PatNote REGEXP @Note GROUP BY p.PatNum, dd.DiseaseName ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, di.DiseaseNum

request: List of specified procedures completed in the date range, assigned to specified providers, with a sum of insurance payments that is greater than or equal to the specified InsPaidOver amount.
query: SET @FromDate ='2023-06-01', @ToDate ='2023-06-30'; SET @ProviderAbbrs =''; SET @ProcCodes =''; SET @InsPaidOver=''; SELECT procdata.Patient AS 'Pt Name' ,procdata.Insurance ,procdata.Provider AS 'Prov' ,procdata.Date AS 'Date' ,procdata.ToothNum AS 'T ,procdata.ProcCode AS 'Code' ,procdata.Descript AS 'Dscrp' ,FORMAT(procdata.ProcFee,2) AS '$Charge' ,FORMAT(procdata.Adjust,2) AS '$Adj' ,FORMAT(procdata.InsPayEst,2) AS '$Ins Est' ,FORMAT(procdata.InsPayAmt,2) AS '$Ins Pay' ,FORMAT(procdata.WriteOff,2) AS '$W/O' ,FORMAT(procdata.ProcFee + procdata.Adjust - procdata.InsPayAmt - procdata.WriteOff, 2) AS '$Pt Port' ,FORMAT(procdata.PatPay,2) AS '$Pt Paid' ,FORMAT(procdata.ProcFee + procdata.Adjust - procdata.InsPayAmt - procdata.WriteOff - procdata.PatPay, 2) AS '$Need Coll' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcNum ,p.PatNum ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' ,COALESCE(( SELECT ca1.CarrierName FROM patplan pp1 INNER JOIN inssub ib1 ON ib1.InsSubNum = pp1.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum = ib1.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca1 ON ca1.CarrierNum = ip1.CarrierNum WHERE pp1.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pp1.Ordinal = 1 ORDER BY ca1.CarrierNum LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT dp.request FROM discountplansub dps INNER JOIN discountplan dp ON dp.DiscountPlanNum = dps.DiscountPlanNum WHERE dps.PatNum = pl.PatNum ), '') AS 'Insurance' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,pl.ToothNum ,pc.ProcCode ,pc.Descript ,(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - COALESCE(( (CASE WHEN cp.Status = 7 THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) ),0) AS 'ProcFee' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment WHERE adjustment.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'Adjust' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'PatPay' ,SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1, 4) THEN cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) ,0)) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (0, 6) THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) ,0)) AS 'InsPayEst' ,SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1, 4) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) ,0)) AS 'WriteOff' ,SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1, 4, 7) THEN 0 WHEN cp.Status IN (0) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END) ,0)) AS 'WriteOffEst' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProviderAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr, @ProviderAbbrs)) LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 6, 7) WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum HAVING IF(LENGTH(@InsPaidOver) = 0, TRUE, SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) >= @InsPaidOver) ) procdata GROUP BY procdata.ProcNum ORDER BY procdata.Provider, procdata.Date, procdata.Patient, procdata.ProcCode, procdata.ProcNum

request: Production, collections, adjustments, and writeoffs summary by date for a given provider
query: SET @FromDate='2024-04-01', @ToDate='2024-04-30'; SET @Provider='DocA'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pr.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNum FROM provider pr WHERE pr.Abbr = @Provider; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,DATE_FORMAT(display.RowDate,'%m/%d/%Y'),'') AS 'Date' ,FORMAT(SUM(display.Prod),2) AS 'Gross Prod' ,FORMAT(SUM(display.PtInc) + SUM(display.InsInc),2) AS 'Collection' ,FORMAT(SUM(display.Adj),2) AS 'Adjustment' ,FORMAT(IF(SUM(display.WoAmt) = 0,0,- SUM(display.WoAmt)),2) AS 'Rec\'d Writeoff' FROM ( SELECT rowdata.RowDate ,main.Prov ,main.Date ,COALESCE(main.Prod,0) AS 'Prod' ,COALESCE(main.Adj,0) AS 'Adj' ,COALESCE(main.WoAmt,0) AS 'WoAmt' ,COALESCE(main.PtInc,0) AS 'PtInc' ,COALESCE(main.InsInc,0) AS 'InsInc' FROM ( SELECT @FromDate + INTERVAL nums.num DAY AS 'RowDate' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(n0.num,n1.num,n2.num) + 0 AS 'num' FROM ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 ) AS n0 JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 ) AS n1 JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 0 ) AS n2 ORDER BY num ) nums HAVING RowDate <= DATE(@ToDate) ) rowdata LEFT JOIN( SELECT pl.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,pl.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) - SUM(COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cap.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cap WHERE cap.Status = 7 AND cap.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum) ,0)) AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoAmt' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum,@ProvNum) GROUP BY pl.ProcDate UNION ALL SELECT pl.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,adj.AdjDate AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,SUM(adj.AdjAmt) AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoAmt' ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = adj.ProcNum WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum,@ProvNum) GROUP BY adj.AdjDate UNION ALL SELECT pl.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,cp2.DateEntry AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,SUM(COALESCE(cp2.Writeoff,0)) AS "WoAmt" ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp2 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp2.ProcNum WHERE cp2.Status IN (1,4) AND cp2.DateEntry BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum,@ProvNum) GROUP BY cp2.DateEntry UNION ALL SELECT pl.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,cp3.DateCP AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS "WoAmt" ,0 AS 'PtInc' ,SUM(cp3.InsPayAmt) AS 'InsInc' FROM claimproc cp3 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = cp3.ProcNum WHERE cp3.Status IN (1,4) AND cp3.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum,@ProvNum) GROUP BY cp3.DateCP UNION ALL SELECT pl.ProvNum AS 'Prov' ,ps.DatePay AS 'Date' ,0 AS 'Prod' ,0 AS 'Adj' ,0 AS 'WoAmt' ,SUM(IF(ps.UnearnedType = 0,ps.SplitAmt,0)) AS 'PtInc' ,0 AS 'InsInc' FROM paysplit ps INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ps.ProcNum WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum,@ProvNum) GROUP BY ps.DatePay ) main ON main.Date = rowdata.RowDate ) display INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'-',display.RowDate),dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, display.RowDate

request: Count of patients with a scheduled appointment in a date range for each clinic and appointment type that do not have a completed appointment.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-01-31'; SET @AppointmentTypes=''; SELECT clin.Abbr AS 'Clinic' ,apttype.AppointmentTypeName AS 'Type' ,COUNT(DISTINCT patapt.PatNum) AS 'Count' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'ClinicNum' ,'Unassigned' AS 'Abbr' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT clinic.ClinicNum ,clinic.Abbr FROM clinic ) clin INNER JOIN ( SELECT 0 AS 'AppointmentTypeNum' ,'None' AS 'AppointmentTypeName' FROM DUAL WHERE IF(LENGTH(@AppointmentTypes) = 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('None', @AppointmentTypes), TRUE, FALSE) UNION ALL SELECT apttype.AppointmentTypeNum ,apttype.AppointmentTypeName FROM appointmenttype apttype WHERE !apttype.IsHidden AND IF(LENGTH(@AppointmentTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(apttype.AppointmentTypeName, @AppointmentTypes)) ) apttype ON TRUE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT apt.PatNum ,apt.ClinicNum ,apt.AppointmentTypeNum FROM appointment apt LEFT JOIN appointment compapt ON compapt.PatNum = apt.PatNum AND compapt.AptStatus = 2 WHERE apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus = 1 AND ISNULL(compapt.AptNum) ) patapt ON patapt.ClinicNum = clin.ClinicNum AND patapt.AppointmentTypeNum = apttype.AppointmentTypeNum GROUP BY clin.ClinicNum, apttype.AppointmentTypeNum

request: Appointments List For Broken And Unscheduled Appointments
query: SET @FromDate='2024-09-01', @ToDate='2024-09-30'; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1 ,core.Patient ,CONCAT('Appt Count: ',COUNT(DISTINCT core.AptNum)) ) AS 'Patient Name' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 ,core.Date ,'' ) AS 'Date' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 ,core.ApptStatus ,'' ) AS 'Appt Status' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 ,core.ApptType ,'' ) AS 'Appt Type' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 ,core.Procedures ,'' ) AS 'Procedures' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 ,core.ReferralSource ,'' ) AS 'Referral Source' ,IF(dup.Num = 1 ,IFNULL(FORMAT(core.Production,2),'') ,CONCAT('Total: ',FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(core.Production),0),2)) ) AS 'Production' FROM( SELECT CONCAT( p.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', p.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Patient' ,DATE_FORMAT(a.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date' ,IF(a.AptStatus = 3 ,'Unscheduled','Broken') AS 'ApptStatus' ,IFNULL(atype.AppointmentTypeName,'') AS 'ApptType' ,a.ProcDescript AS 'Procedures' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(r.LName,IF(LENGTH(r.FName) > 0,CONCAT(', ', r.FName),'') ORDER BY ra.RefDate DESC SEPARATOR '|'),'|',1) FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral r ON ra.ReferralNum = r.ReferralNum WHERE ra.PatNum = p.PatNum AND ra.RefType = 1 ),'') AS 'ReferralSource' ,( SELECT SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.AptNum = a.AptNum ) AS 'Production' ,a.AptNum ,a.AptDateTime FROM appointment a INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = a.PatNum LEFT JOIN appointmenttype atype ON atype.AppointmentTypeNum = a.AppointmentTypeNum WHERE a.AptStatus IN (3,5) AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,',',core.AptNum),dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num,core.AptDateTime, core.AptNum

request: Treatment planned procedures attached to scheduled appointments in a date range. Shows gross and net production, as well as the total of patient paysplits attached to each procedure.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-12-02', @ToDate='2024-12-06'; SET @Providers=''; SET @Clinics=''; SET @ExcludeCodes='D0150,D0120,D1110,D1120'; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1, core.Clinic, '') AS 'Clinic' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, core.Provider, '') AS 'Provider' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, core.PatientName, '') AS 'Patient Name' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, core.SchedApptDate, '') AS 'Sched Appt Date' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, core.ProcCode, '') AS 'Procedure Code' ,IF(dup.Num = 1, core.ProcDescript, '') AS 'Proc Descript' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, core.ProcFee, SUM(core.ProcFee)), 2) AS 'Gross Production Scheduled' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, core.NetProd, SUM(core.NetProd)), 2) AS 'Net Production Scheduled' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, core.NetProd - core.InsEstAmt, SUM(core.NetProd) - SUM(core.InsEstAmt)), 2) AS 'Estimated Patient Portion' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, core.PrepaidAmt, SUM(core.PrepaidAmt)), 2) AS 'Prepaid Amount' ,FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, core.NetProd - core.InsEstAmt - core.PrepaidAmt, SUM(core.NetProd) - SUM(core.InsEstAmt) - SUM(core.PrepaidAmt)), 2) AS 'Remaining Patient Portion' FROM ( SELECT procs.ProcNum ,procs.Clinic ,procs.Provider ,procs.PatientName ,procs.LName ,procs.FName ,procs.SchedApptDate ,procs.AptDateTime ,procs.ProcCode ,procs.ProcDescript ,procs.ProcFee ,procs.ProcFee - procs.Discount - procs.DiscountPlanAmt - procs.WriteOffEst AS 'NetProd' ,procs.InsPayEst AS 'InsEstAmt' ,procs.PrepaidAmt FROM ( SELECT pl.ProcNum ,COALESCE(clin.Abbr, 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,prov.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,CONCAT( p.LName ,',' ,(CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', p.Preferred, '\'') ELSE '' END) ,' ' ,p.FName ,(CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName' ,p.LName ,p.FName ,DATE_FORMAT(apt.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'SchedApptDate' ,apt.AptDateTime ,pc.ProcCode ,pc.AbbrDesc AS 'ProcDescript' ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) AS 'ProcFee' ,pl.Discount ,pl.DiscountPlanAmt ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.InsEstTotalOverride, -1), cp.InsPayEst)) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status != 2 ), 0) AS 'InsPayEst' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp.WriteOffEst, -1), 0)) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status != 2 ), 0) AS 'WriteOffEst' ,COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'PrepaidAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludeCodes) = 0, TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ExcludeCodes)) INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND apt.AptStatus = 1 INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0 ,!prov.IsHidden ,FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr, @Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 1 AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clin.Abbr, 'Unassigned'), @Clinics)) ) procs ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num', 'Proc' AS 'RowType' UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Total' ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1, CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.ProcNum), dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.AptDateTime ASC, core.LName, core.FName, core.ProcNum

request: List of patients with primary and secondary carrier names and group names for active and inactive patients with dual insurance that have been seen in the specified date range. Seen counts as a completed procedure in the date range.
query: SET @StartDate='2024-01-01', @EndDate='2024-12-31'; SET @Carriers='Sun Life,CDCP,Accerta'; SET @Carriers=(CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Carriers) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE REPLACE(@Carriers,',','|') END); SELECT p.PatNum , ca1.CarrierName AS 'Prim Ins' , ip1.GroupName AS 'Prim Ins Group Name' , ca2.CarrierName AS 'Sec Ins' , ip2.GroupName AS 'Sec Ins Group Name' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@StartDate) AND DATE(@EndDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN patplan pp1 ON p.PatNum=pp1.PatNum AND pp1.Ordinal = 1 INNER JOIN inssub ib1 ON ib1.InsSubNum = pp1.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip1 ON ip1.PlanNum = ib1.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca1 ON ip1.CarrierNum = ca1.CarrierNum INNER JOIN patplan pp2 ON p.PatNum = pp2.PatNum AND pp2.Ordinal = 2 INNER JOIN inssub ib2 ON ib2.InsSubNum = pp2.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip2 ON ip2.PlanNum = ib2.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca2 ON ip2.CarrierNum = ca2.CarrierNum WHERE p.PatStatus IN (0,2) AND (ca1.CarrierName REGEXP @Carriers OR ca2.CarrierName REGEXP @Carriers) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY ca1.CarrierName,ca2.CarrierName,p.PatNum;

request: - Sum of fees by procedure code using the specified fee schedule fees
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-01-01', @ToDate ='2024-12-31'; SET @FeeSched ='Cigna'; SELECT core.ProcCode AS 'CDT Code' ,core.Descript AS 'Code request' ,COALESCE(FORMAT(core.Amount,2),'') AS 'Fee Sched Fee' ,COUNT(DISTINCT(core.ProcNum)) AS 'Code Count' ,COALESCE(FORMAT((core.Amount * COUNT(DISTINCT core.ProcNum)),2),'') AS 'Total Amount' FROM ( SELECT pc.ProcCode ,pc.Descript ,pl.ProcNum ,fee.Amount ,pc.CodeNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimType = 'P' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum = ip.FeeSched AND fs.request = @FeeSched LEFT JOIN fee ON fee.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND fee.FeeSched = fs.FeeSchedNum AND fee.ProvNum = 0 AND fee.ClinicNum = 0 WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) core GROUP BY core.CodeNum ORDER BY `Code Count` DESC, core.ProcCode, core.CodeNum

request: Operatory utilization. Appointment fill rate for specified operatories in a date range. Only includes dates with scheduled hours for each operatory.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-11-04', @ToDate='2024-11-10'; SET @Operatories=''; SET @PrevType = '', @Weight = 0; SELECT preference.ValueString INTO @ApptTimeInc FROM preference WHERE prefname = 'AppointmentTimeIncrement'; SET @count = 0, @op = 0, @date = '0001-01-01'; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1, main.Date, '') AS 'Date' ,IF(dup.Num IN (1,3), main.Operatory, '') AS 'Operatory' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(main.AvailableTime, 2) WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(main.AvailableTime), 2) END) AS 'Available Chair Time' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(main.ApptTime, 2) WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(main.ApptTime), 2) END) AS 'Appointment Time' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT((main.ApptTime / main.AvailableTime) * 100, 2) WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT((SUM(main.ApptTime) / SUM(main.AvailableTime)) * 100, 2) END) AS 'Appointment Fill Rate' FROM ( SELECT ophrs.SchedDate AS 'Date' ,op.OpName AS 'Operatory' ,ophrs.Hours AS 'AvailableTime' ,CAST(ophrs.Hours - ophrs.Open AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'ApptTime' ,op.OperatoryNum FROM operatory op INNER JOIN ( SELECT hrs.SchedDate ,hrs.OperatoryNum ,COALESCE(CAST((SUM(IF(hrs.Type = 'Stop', hrs.mins, 0)) - SUM(IF(hrs.Type = 'Start', hrs.mins, 0))) / 60 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)), 0) AS 'Hours' ,COALESCE(apptcore.Hours, 0) AS 'Open' FROM ( SELECT sched.SchedDate ,sched.OperatoryNum ,sched.Mins ,IF(@PrevType = sched.Type ,IF(@PrevType = 'Start' ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(@PrevType := sched.Type, ',', @Weight := @Weight + 1), ',', 1) ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(@PrevType := sched.Type, ',', @Weight := @Weight - 1), ',', 1) ) ,@PrevType := sched.Type ) AS 'Type' ,@Weight AS 'Weight' FROM ( SELECT 'Start' AS 'Type' ,sched.SchedDate ,schedop.OperatoryNum ,TIME_TO_SEC(sched.StartTime) / 60 AS 'Mins' FROM schedule sched INNER JOIN scheduleop schedop ON schedop.ScheduleNum = sched.ScheduleNum WHERE sched.SchedDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND sched.SchedType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Stop' AS 'Type' ,sched.SchedDate ,schedop.OperatoryNum ,TIME_TO_SEC(sched.StopTime) / 60 AS 'Mins' FROM schedule sched INNER JOIN scheduleop schedop ON schedop.ScheduleNum = sched.ScheduleNum WHERE sched.SchedDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND sched.SchedType = 1 ORDER BY `SchedDate`, `OperatoryNum`, `Mins` LIMIT 999999999 ) sched ) hrs LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ophrs.SchedDate ,ophrs.OpNum ,COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT ophrs.IncStart), 0) * @ApptTimeInc / 60 AS 'Hours' FROM ( SELECT core.SchedDate ,core.OpNum ,(CASE WHEN core.OpNum != @op THEN CONCAT(@op := @op * 0 + core.OpNum, '|', @date := DATE_FORMAT(@date * 0 + REPLACE(core.SchedDate, '-', ''), '%Y-%m-%d'), '||', @count := @count * 0 + 1) WHEN core.OpNum = @op AND core.SchedDate = @date THEN CONCAT(@op, '|', @date, '||', @count := @count * 0 + 1) WHEN core.OpNum = @op AND core.SchedDate != @date THEN CONCAT(@op, '|', @date := DATE_FORMAT(@date * 0 + REPLACE(core.SchedDate, '-', ''), '%Y-%m-%d'), '||', @count := @count * 0 + 1) ELSE CONCAT(@op, '|', @date, '||', @count) END) AS 'OpDateMins' ,core.StartTime ,core.StopTime ,core.IncStart ,core.Increment FROM ( SELECT sched.SchedDate ,schedop.OperatoryNum AS 'OpNum' ,sched.StartTime ,incs.Increment ,SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(sched.StartTime) + ((CAST(incs.increment AS SIGNED) * CAST(@ApptTimeInc AS SIGNED)) * 60)) AS 'IncStart' ,sched.StopTime FROM schedule sched INNER JOIN scheduleop schedop ON schedop.ScheduleNum = sched.ScheduleNum INNER JOIN operatory op ON op.OperatoryNum = schedop.OperatoryNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT CONCAT(ones.Num, tens.Num, hundreds.Num) + 0 AS 'Increment' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS num UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 ) ones INNER JOIN ( SELECT 0 AS num UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 ) tens INNER JOIN ( SELECT 0 AS num UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 ) hundreds HAVING increment < 289 ORDER BY increment ) incs ON TRUE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDate' ,ap.Op ,TIME(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'AptStart' ,incs.Increment ,SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(TIME(ap.AptDateTime)) + ((CAST(incs.increment AS SIGNED) * CAST(@ApptTimeInc AS SIGNED)) * 60)) AS 'AptStarts' ,SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(TIME(ap.AptDateTime)) + ((CHAR_LENGTH(ap.Pattern) * 5) * 60) - 1) AS 'AptTimeEnd' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN scheduleop apptop ON apptop.OperatoryNum = ap.OP INNER JOIN operatory opapt ON opapt.OperatoryNum = apptop.OperatoryNum INNER JOIN schedule apptschedprov ON apptschedprov.ScheduleNum = apptop.ScheduleNum AND apptschedprov.SchedDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate INNER JOIN( SELECT CONCAT(ones.Num, tens.Num) + 0 AS 'increment' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS num UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 ) ones INNER JOIN ( SELECT 0 AS num UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 ) tens HAVING increment < 50 ORDER BY increment ) incs WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY ap.AptNum, SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(TIME(ap.AptDateTime)) + ((CAST(incs.increment AS SIGNED) * CAST(@ApptTimeInc AS SIGNED)) * 60)) HAVING AptStarts <= AptTimeEnd ) apts ON apts.Op = schedop.OperatoryNum AND apts.AptDate = sched.SchedDate AND apts.AptStarts = SEC_TO_TIME(TIME_TO_SEC(sched.StartTime) + ((CAST(incs.increment AS SIGNED) * CAST(@ApptTimeInc AS SIGNED)) * 60)) WHERE sched.SchedDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND sched.SchedType = 1 AND ISNULL(apts.AptStarts) GROUP BY schedop.OperatoryNum, op.ProvDentist, incs.Increment, sched.SchedDate, sched.StartTime HAVING IncStart < StopTime ORDER BY sched.SchedDate, schedop.OperatoryNum, incs.Increment ) core ) ophrs GROUP BY ophrs.SchedDate, ophrs.OpNum ) apptcore ON apptcore.OpNum = hrs.OperatoryNum AND apptcore.SchedDate = hrs.SchedDate WHERE hrs.Weight = 0 GROUP BY hrs.SchedDate, hrs.OperatoryNum ) ophrs ON ophrs.OperatoryNum = op.OperatoryNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Operatories) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(op.OpName, @Operatories)) GROUP BY ophrs.SchedDate, op.OperatoryNum ) main LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', main.Date, '+', main.OperatoryNum) WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', main.OperatoryNum) ELSE dup.Num END) ORDER BY dup.Num, main.Date, main.Operatory, main.OperatoryNum

request: Completed Appointments in a Date Range for Patients with a Past Due Recall
query: SET @FromDate='2024-05-01', @ToDate='2024-05-31'; SELECT core.PatNum , DATE_FORMAT(core.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS 'AptDateTime' , core.ProcsDue AS 'Procedures Due and Not Completed' , core.ApptProcs AS 'Procedures on Appointment' , core.Provider , core.Hygienist FROM( SELECT apt.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , apt.AptDateTime AS 'AptDateTime' , IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(rtpast.Procedures ORDER BY recpast.RecallNum ASC) FROM recall recpast INNER JOIN recalltype rtpast ON rtpast.RecallTypeNum = recpast.RecallTypeNum WHERE recpast.DateDue != '0001-01-01' AND recpast.DateDue <= apt.AptDateTime AND recpast.PatNum = apt.PatNum ), 'None') AS 'ProcsDue' , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(procedurecode.ProcCode ORDER BY procedurecode.ProcCode, procedurecode.Codenum ASC) FROM procedurelog INNER JOIN procedurecode ON procedurecode.CodeNum = procedurelog.CodeNum WHERE procedurelog.AptNum = apt.AptNum ) AS 'ApptProcs' , ( SELECT pr.Abbr FROM provider pr WHERE pr.ProvNum = apt.ProvNum ) AS 'Provider' , IFNULL(( SELECT hyg.Abbr FROM provider hyg WHERE hyg.ProvNum = apt.ProvHyg ), 'None') AS 'Hygienist' ,rec.DateDue FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = apt.AptNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT recall.Patnum , recall.DateDue , GROUP_CONCAT(recalltrigger.CodeNum) AS 'TriggerNum' FROM recall INNER JOIN recalltype ON recalltype.RecallTypeNum = recall.RecallTypeNum INNER JOIN recalltrigger ON recalltrigger.RecallTypeNum = recall.RecallTypeNum GROUP BY recall.PatNum, recalltype.RecallTypeNum ) rec ON rec.PatNum = apt.PatNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, rec.TriggerNum) WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY apt.AptNum ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime ASC, apt.AptNum ) core WHERE core.ProcsDue != 'None';

request: Assistant Productivity Tracker by Day
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-05-01', @ToDate ='2024-05-31'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ap.AptDateTime,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date' ,CONCAT(emp.FName, ' ', emp.LName) AS 'Assistant' ,COUNT(DISTINCT ap.AptNum) AS 'Count of Appointments' FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN employee emp ON emp.EmployeeNum = ap.Assistant WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ap.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY DATE(ap.AptDateTime), ap.Assistant ORDER BY DATE(ap.AptDateTime) ASC, CONCAT(emp.FName, ' ', emp.LName)

request: Provider Production and Income. Similar to the internal report, but it is grouped by clinic as well as provider, and also includes the provider's specialty.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-05-01', @ToDate='2024-05-31'; SET @Providers=''; SET @Clinics=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @Providers); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @Providers), '0,', ''), IFNULL(@ProvNums, '')) INTO @ProvNums; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'), 1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @Clinics); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('Unassigned', @Clinics), '0,', ''), IFNULL(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1, main.Clinic, '') AS 'Clinic' , IF(dup.Num = 1, main.Provider, '') AS 'Provider' , IF(dup.Num = 1, main.Specialty, '') AS 'Specialty' , FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, main.Production, SUM(main.Production)), 2) AS 'Production' , FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, main.Adjustments, SUM(main.Adjustments)), 2) AS 'Adjustments' , FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, main.Writeoffs, SUM(main.Writeoffs)), 2) AS 'Write-off' , FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, main.TotProd, SUM(main.TotProd)), 2) AS 'Tot Prod' , FORMAT(IF(dup.Num = 1, main.TotInc, SUM(main.TotInc)), 2) AS 'Total Income' FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT clin.Abbr FROM clinic clin WHERE clin.ClinicNum = core.ClinicNum ), 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' , COALESCE(( SELECT prov.Abbr FROM provider prov WHERE prov.ProvNum = core.ProvNum ), 'No Provider') AS 'Provider' , COALESCE(( SELECT spec.ItemName FROM definition spec INNER JOIN provider prov ON prov.Specialty = spec.DefNum WHERE prov.ProvNum = core.ProvNum ), '') AS 'Specialty' , SUM(core.ProcFee) AS 'Production' , SUM(core.AdjAmt) AS 'Adjustments' , IF(SUM(core.WriteOff) = 0 , 0 , -SUM(core.WriteOff) ) AS 'Writeoffs' , SUM(core.ProcFee) + SUM(core.AdjAmt) - SUM(core.WriteOff) AS 'TotProd' , SUM(core.InsPayAmt) + SUM(core.SplitAmt) AS 'TotInc' , core.ProvNum , core.ClinicNum FROM ( SELECT pl.ClinicNum , pl.ProvNum , pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status = 7 AND cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ), 0) AS 'ProcFee' , 0 AS 'AdjAmt' , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' , 0 AS 'SplitAmt' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) UNION ALL SELECT adj.ClinicNum , adj.ProvNum , 0 AS 'ProcFee' , adj.AdjAmt , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' , 0 AS 'SplitAmt' FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(adj.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(adj.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) UNION ALL SELECT cproc.ClinicNum , cproc.ProvNum , 0 AS 'ProcFee' , 0 AS 'AdjAmt' , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , cproc.InsPayAmt AS 'InsPayAmt' , 0 AS 'SplitAmt' FROM claimproc cproc INNER JOIN claimpayment cpay ON cpay.ClaimPaymentNum = cproc.ClaimPaymentNum AND cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) WHERE cproc.Status IN (1,4) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cproc.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cproc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) UNION ALL SELECT cp.ClinicNum , cp.ProvNum , 0 AS 'ProcFee' , 0 AS 'AdjAmt' , cp.WriteOff , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' , 0 AS 'SplitAmt' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND cp.Status IN (1,4) AND ABS(cp.WriteOff) > 0.005 AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) UNION ALL SELECT ps.ClinicNum , ps.ProvNum , 0 AS 'ProcFee' , 0 AS 'AdjAmt' , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' , ps.SplitAmt FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN definition utype ON utype.DefNum = ps.UnearnedType AND utype.ItemValue = 'X' WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ps.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND ISNULL(utype.DefNum) ) core GROUP BY core.ProvNum, core.ClinicNum ) main LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1, CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', main.ProvNum, '+', main.ClinicNum), dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, main.Provider, main.Clinic, main.ProvNum, main.ClinicNum

request: - New patients and their referrals, with amount treatment planned, scheduled, completed, and collected.
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-11-01', @ToDate ='2024-11-30'; SET @RefLNames =''; SET @Clinics =''; SELECT display.DateFirstVisit ,display.PatNum ,display.Clinic ,display.WirelessPhone ,display.Email ,display.RefName ,display.SumComplete AS '$Complete' ,display.TreatPlan AS '$TPTotal' ,display.TPSched AS '$TPSched' ,FORMAT(display.PatPay + display.InsPay,2) AS '$Collections' FROM ( SELECT np.DateFirstVisit ,(SELECT MAX(DATE(compap.AptDateTime)) AS 'CompAppt' FROM appointment compap WHERE compap.AptStatus = 2 AND compap.PatNum = p.PatNum HAVING CompAppt >= np.DateFirstVisit ) AS 'CompAppt' ,(SELECT MAX(DATE(schedap.AptDateTime)) AS 'SchedAppt' FROM appointment schedap WHERE schedap.AptStatus = 1 AND schedap.PatNum = p.PatNum HAVING SchedAppt > CURDATE() ) AS 'SchedAppt' ,p.PatNum ,p.WirelessPhone ,p.Email ,COALESCE(clin.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(r.LName, ', ', r.FName ORDER BY ra.ItemOrder SEPARATOR ':'),'None') AS 'RefName' ,FORMAT(np.SumComplete, 2) AS 'SumComplete' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(tpprod.TreatPlan, 0), 2) AS 'TreatPlan' ,FORMAT(COALESCE(tpprod.TPSched, 0), 2) AS 'TPSched' ,r.ReferralNum ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PatNum = p.PatNum ),0) AS 'PatPay' ,COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND cp.Status IN(1,4) ),0) AS 'InsPay' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS 'DateFirstVisit' ,SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) AS 'SumComplete' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND pc.ProcCode NOT IN('D9986','D9987') WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum HAVING MIN(pl.ProcDate) BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) np ON np.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl2.PatNum ,SUM(pl2.ProcFee * (pl2.BaseUnits + pl2.UnitQty)) AS 'TreatPlan' ,SUM(IF(ap.AptStatus = 1 ,pl2.ProcFee * (pl2.BaseUnits + pl2.UnitQty),0)) AS 'TPSched' FROM procedurelog pl2 LEFT JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum = pl2.AptNum AND ap.AptStatus = 1 WHERE pl2.ProcStatus = 1 GROUP BY pl2.PatNum ) tpprod ON np.PatNum = tpprod.PatNum LEFT JOIN refattach ra ON p.PatNum = ra.PatNum LEFT JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum AND ra.RefType = 1 LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@RefLNames) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(r.LName,'None'),@RefLNames)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(clin.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinics)) GROUP BY p.PatNum ORDER BY np.DateFirstVisit, clin.ClinicNum, p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum ) display

request: Outstanding Payment Plan Review
query: SET @Status='Open,Closed'; SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-12-31'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @Providers=''; SELECT REPLACE(@Status, ', ', ',') INTO @Status; SELECT CONCAT(IF(LENGTH(@Clinics)=0, '0,', ''), GROUP_CONCAT(clin.ClinicNum)) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic clin WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinics)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(clin.Abbr, @Clinics)); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @Clinics), '0,', ''), COALESCE(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(prov.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider prov WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Providers)=0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.Abbr, @Providers)); SELECT pp.PatNum AS 'Patient , COALESCE(( SELECT CONCAT(g.FName, ' ', g.LName) FROM patient g WHERE g.PatNum = pp.Guarantor ), ' ') AS 'Guarantor' , p.LName AS 'Patient Last Name' , p.FName AS 'Patient First Name' , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(prov.Abbr ORDER BY prov.Abbr, prov.ProvNum) FROM provider prov WHERE FIND_IN_SET(prov.ProvNum, ppinfo.ProvNums) ) AS 'Provider' , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clin.Abbr ORDER BY clin.Abbr, clin.ClinicNum) FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'ClinicNum' , 'None' AS 'Abbr' UNION ALL SELECT clinic.ClinicNum , clinic.Abbr FROM clinic ) clin WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clin.ClinicNum, ppinfo.ClinicNums) ) AS 'Clinic' , IF(pp.PlanNum != 0 , ( SELECT ca.CarrierName FROM insplan ip INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE ip.PlanNum = pp.PlanNum ) , '' ) AS 'Carrier' , DATE_FORMAT(pp.PayPlanDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date of Agreement' , FORMAT(ppinfo.Principal, 2) AS 'Total Principal Due' , FORMAT(IF(!pp.IsDynamic, pp.DownPayment, ppinfo.DownPayment), 2) AS 'Down Payment' , FORMAT(IF(pp.PayAmt != 0 , pp.PayAmt , (ppinfo.Principal - IF(!pp.IsDynamic, pp.DownPayment, ppinfo.DownPayment)) / pp.NumberOfPayments ), 2) AS 'Estimated Payment Amount' , IF(pp.NumberOfPayments != 0 , pp.NumberOfPayments , CEIL((ppinfo.Principal - IF(!pp.IsDynamic, pp.DownPayment, ppinfo.DownPayment)) / pp.PayAmt) ) AS 'Total Number of Installments' , (CASE WHEN (pp.IsDynamic AND pp.ChargeFrequency = 0 ) OR (!pp.IsDynamic AND pp.PaySchedule = 2 ) THEN 'Weekly' WHEN (pp.IsDynamic AND pp.ChargeFrequency = 1 ) OR (!pp.IsDynamic AND pp.PaySchedule = 3 ) THEN 'Every other week' WHEN (pp.IsDynamic AND pp.ChargeFrequency = 2 ) OR (!pp.IsDynamic AND pp.PaySchedule = 1 ) THEN 'Specific day of month' WHEN (pp.IsDynamic AND pp.ChargeFrequency = 3 ) OR (!pp.IsDynamic AND pp.PaySchedule = 0 ) THEN 'Monthly' WHEN (pp.IsDynamic AND pp.ChargeFrequency = 4 ) OR (!pp.IsDynamic AND pp.PaySchedule = 4 ) THEN 'Quarterly' END) AS 'Payment Plan Schedule' , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(ppinfo.LastPaidDate, '%m/%d/%Y'), '') AS 'Last Paid Date' , (CASE WHEN !pp.IsDynamic AND pp.PlanNum = 0 AND !ISNULL(ppinfo.LastPaidDate) THEN FORMAT(( SELECT SUM(psplit.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit psplit WHERE psplit.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND psplit.DatePay = ppinfo.LastPaidDate ), 2) WHEN !pp.IsDynamic AND pp.PlanNum != 0 AND !ISNULL(ppinfo.LastPaidDate) THEN FORMAT(( SELECT SUM(cproc.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cproc WHERE cproc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND cproc.DateCP = ppinfo.LastPaidDate ), 2) WHEN pp.IsDynamic AND !ISNULL(ppinfo.LastPaidDate) THEN FORMAT(( SELECT SUM(pay.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit pay WHERE pay.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND pay.DatePay = ppinfo.LastPaidDate AND (FIND_IN_SET(pay.ProcNum, ppinfo.ProductionPriKeys) OR FIND_IN_SET(pay.AdjNum, ppinfo.ProductionPriKeys)) ), 2) ELSE '' END) AS 'Last Paid Amt' , FORMAT(ppinfo.PaidSoFar, 2) AS 'Paid So Far' , FORMAT(ppinfo.DueNow - ppinfo.PaidSoFar, 2) AS 'Amt Due Now' , IFNULL(( SELECT ELT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(rc.ChargeStatus ORDER BY rc.DateTimeCharge DESC, rc.RecurringChargeNum SEPARATOR '|'),'|',1) + 1 ,'Pending' ,'Approved' ,'Denied' ,'Denied') FROM recurringcharge rc INNER JOIN creditcard cc ON cc.CreditCardNum = rc.CreditCardNum WHERE cc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum ),'NA') AS 'Last Recurring Charge' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Old/Ins' AS 'PayPlanType' , ppc.PayPlanNum , pplan.PatNum , SUM(IF(ppc.ChargeType = 0 , ppc.Principal, 0)) AS 'Principal' , '' AS 'DownPayment' , ppc.ClinicNum AS 'ClinicNums' , ppc.ProvNum AS 'ProvNums' , MAX(lastpaid.LastPaidDate) AS 'LastPaidDate' , '' AS 'ProductionPriKeys' , COALESCE(lastpaid.PaidSoFar, 0) AS 'PaidSoFar' , SUM(IF(ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND ppc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE(), ppc.Principal + ppc.Interest, 0)) AS 'DueNow' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pplan ON pplan.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum AND !pplan.IsDynamic LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'PayType' , pays.PayPlanNum , MAX(pays.DatePay) AS 'LastPaidDate' , SUM(pays.SplitAmt) AS 'PaidSoFar' FROM paysplit pays WHERE pays.PayPlanNum != 0 GROUP BY pays.PayPlanNum UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'PayType' , cp.PayPlanNum , MAX(cp.DateCP) AS 'LastPaidDate' , SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'PaidSoFar' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.PayPlanNum != 0 GROUP BY cp.PayPlanNum ) lastpaid ON lastpaid.PayPlanNum = pplan.PayPlanNum WHERE FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(ppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) GROUP BY ppc.PayPlanNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Dynamic' AS 'PayPlanType' , ppl.PayPlanNum , prodlink.PatNum , SUM(IF(ppl.AmountOverride = 0, prodlink.Fee, ppl.AmountOverride)) AS 'Principal' , COALESCE(downpay.DownPayment, 0) AS 'DownPayment' , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT prodlink.ClinicNum ORDER BY prodlink.ClinicNum ASC) AS 'ClinicNums' , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT prodlink.ProvNum ORDER BY prodlink.ProvNum ASC) AS 'ProvNums' , MAX(( SELECT MAX(ps.DatePay) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum AND (ps.ProcNum = prodlink.PriKey OR ps.AdjNum = prodlink.PriKey) )) AS 'LastPaidDate' , GROUP_CONCAT(prodlink.PriKey) AS 'ProductionPriKeys' , COALESCE(SUM(( SELECT SUM(psplt.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit psplt WHERE psplt.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum AND (psplt.ProcNum = prodlink.PriKey OR psplt.AdjNum = prodlink.PriKey) )), 0) AS 'PaidSoFar' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(dyppc.Principal + dyppc.Interest) FROM payplancharge dyppc WHERE dyppc.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum AND dyppc.ChargeType = 0 AND dyppc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE() AND FIND_IN_SET(dyppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(dyppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) ), 0) AS 'DueNow' FROM payplanlink ppl INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pplpl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , pl.PatNum , (pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) - IF(pl.ProcStatus != 2 , pl.Discount + pl.DiscountPlanAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , pl.ClinicNum , pl.ProvNum FROM payplanlink pplpl INNER JOIN payplan pppl ON pppl.PayPlanNum = pplpl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = pplpl.FKey AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @ProvNums) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjust.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjust.ProcNum , adjust.PatNum , adjust.ProvNum , adjust.ClinicNum FROM adjustment adjust GROUP BY adjust.ProcNum, adjust.PatNum, adjust.ProvNum, adjust.ClinicNum ) procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT -SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN cp.InsPayAmt WHEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN cp.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE cp.InsPayEst END), 0)) AS 'InsPay' , -SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN cp.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN cp.WriteOff WHEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN cp.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN cp.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN cp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS 'WriteOff' , cp.ProcNum FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status != 2 GROUP BY cp.ProcNum ) procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT -SUM(pspl.SplitAmt) AS 'SplitAmt' , pspl.ProcNum FROM paysplit pspl WHERE pspl.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY pspl.ProcNum ) procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum WHERE pplpl.LinkType = 2 AND !(pppl.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND pl.ProcStatus != 2) UNION ALL SELECT adj.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , ppladj.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , adj.PatNum , adj.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) AS 'Fee' , adj.ClinicNum , adj.ProvNum FROM payplanlink ppladj INNER JOIN adjustment adj ON adj.AdjNum = ppladj.FKey AND FIND_IN_SET(adj.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(adj.ProvNum, @ProvNums) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT -SUM(COALESCE(psadj.SplitAmt, 0)) AS 'SplitAmt' , psadj.AdjNum FROM paysplit psadj WHERE psadj.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY psadj.AdjNum ) adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adj.AdjNum WHERE ppladj.LinkType = 1 ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dppc.PayPlanNum , SUM(dppc.Principal) AS 'DownPayment' FROM payplancharge dppc INNER JOIN payplan dpp ON dpp.PayPlanNum = dppc.PayPlanNum AND dpp.IsDynamic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(dppc.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums) AND FIND_IN_SET(dppc.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND dppc.Note = 'Down Payment' GROUP BY dppc.PayPlanNum ) downpay ON downpay.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum GROUP BY ppl.PayPlanNum ) ppinfo ON ppinfo.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum WHERE pp.PayPlanDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND (CASE WHEN FIND_IN_SET('Open', @Status) AND FIND_IN_SET('Closed', @Status) THEN TRUE WHEN FIND_IN_SET('Open', @Status) THEN !pp.IsClosed WHEN FIND_IN_SET('Closed', @Status) THEN pp.IsClosed END) ORDER BY pp.PlanNum ASC, pp.IsDynamic ASC, pp.PatNum, pp.PayPlanNum

request: Writeoffs in the date range by carrier, with option to filter for clinic
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-07-01', @ToDate ='2024-07-01'; SET @Clinic =''; SELECT car.CarrierName ,FORMAT(SUM(cp.WriteOff),2) AS '$Writeoff' FROM carrier car INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.CarrierNum = car.CarrierNum AND ip.PlanType = 'p' INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum AND cp.Status IN(1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = cp.ClinicNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinic) = 0,TRUE,COALESCE(clin.Abbr,'Unassigned') = @Clinic) GROUP BY car.CarrierNum ORDER BY car.CarrierName, car.CarrierNum

request: Average amount per visit by provider. Only considers completed appointments with completed procedures attached that have a procedure fee greater than zero. Appointments with multiple providers count as a visit for each provider.
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-07-01', @ToDate ='2024-07-31'; SELECT pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,CAST(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) / COUNT(DISTINCT ap.AptNum) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'Average Amount per Patient Visit' FROM provider pr INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee > 0.005 INNER JOIN appointment ap ON ap.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND ap.AptStatus = 2 AND ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY pr.ProvNum ORDER BY pr.Abbr, pr.ProvNum

request: List of specified users with metrics on scheduled and completed appointemnts, hygiene and non hygiene appointments, and production.
query: SET @FromDate='2024-08-01', @ToDate='2024-08-31'; SET @Users=''; SET @Codes='D1110,D0120'; SELECT uo.UserName , IFNULL(SUM(IF(appts.HasCode > 0, 1, 0)), 0) AS 'ApptsSched' , IFNULL(SUM(IF(appts.HasCode, appts.Complete, 0)), 0) AS 'ApptsComp' , IFNULL(SUM(IF(appts.HasCode, appts.Hygiene, 0)), 0) AS 'HygAppts' , IFNULL(SUM(IF(appts.HasCode, appts.Doctor, 0)), 0) AS 'DocAppts' , FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(IF(appts.HasCode, appts.Production, 0)), 0), 2) AS 'Production' , FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(IF(appts.HasCode, appts.ProductionComp, 0)), 0), 2) AS 'ProductionComp' , IFNULL(comms.TotalComms, 0) AS 'NumCommLogs' , IFNULL(comms.CommLogTypes, '') AS 'CommLogTypes' FROM userod uo LEFT JOIN( SELECT apt.AptNum , apt.SecUserNumEntry AS 'UserNum' , IF(apt.AptStatus = 1 , 1, 0) AS 'Scheduled' , IF(apt.AptStatus = 2 , 1, 0) AS 'Complete' , IF(SUM(pc.IsHygiene) > 0, 1, 0) AS 'Hygiene' , IF(SUM(pc.IsHygiene) = 0, 1, 0) AS 'Doctor' , SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) AS 'Production' , SUM(IF(pl.ProcStatus = 2 , pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits), 0)) AS 'ProductionComp' , SUM(IF(LENGTH(@Codes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @Codes))) AS 'HasCode' , apt.PatNum , apt.AptDateTime FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = apt.AptNum INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum WHERE apt.AptStatus IN (1,2,3) AND apt.SecDateTEntry BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY apt.AptNum HAVING HasCode > 0 ) appts ON appts.UserNum = uo.UserNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT clcore.UserNum , SUM(clcore.CommCount) AS 'TotalComms' , GROUP_CONCAT(clcore.TypeSummary ORDER BY clcore.TypeSummary SEPARATOR ', ') AS 'CommLogTypes' FROM ( SELECT cl.UserNum , COUNT(cl.CommLogNum) AS 'CommCount' , CONCAT(ctype.ItemName, ' (', COUNT(cl.CommlogNum), ')') AS 'TypeSummary' FROM commlog cl INNER JOIN definition ctype ON ctype.DefNum = cl.CommType WHERE cl.DateTEntry BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY cl.UserNum, cl.CommType ) clcore GROUP BY clcore.UserNum ) comms ON comms.UserNum = uo.UserNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Users) = 0, !ISNULL(appts.UserNum), FIND_IN_SET(uo.UserName, @Users)) GROUP BY uo.UserNum ORDER BY uo.UserName, uo.UserNum

request: Insurance plans without specified code group name frequency limitations entered
query: SET @CodeGroup=''; SELECT car.CarrierName AS 'Carrier Name' ,ip.GroupNum AS 'Group Number' ,ip.PlanNum AS 'Insurance Plan ID' FROM insplan ip INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE ip.PlanNum NOT IN( SELECT ben.PlanNum FROM benefit ben INNER JOIN codegroup cg ON cg.CodeGroupNum = ben.CodeGroupNum AND IF(LENGTH(@CodeGroup) = 0, TRUE, cg.GroupName = @CodeGroup) WHERE ben.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum AND ben.BenefitType = 5 AND ben.QuantityQualifier NOT IN(0,2) AND ben.Percent = -1 AND ben.MonetaryAmt = -1 ) ORDER BY car.CarrierName, ip.GroupNum, car.CarrierNum, ip.PlanNum;

request: Monthly, Quarterly, and Annual production and income in the specified years for the specified providers.
query: SET @Year1='2023'; SET @Year2='2022'; SET @Providers='Doc1,Doc2,Doc3,None'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @Providers); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @Providers), '0,', ''), IFNULL(@ProvNums, '')) INTO @ProvNums; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @HiddenUnearnedTypes FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 29 AND definition.ItemValue = 'X'; SELECT display.request , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', display.Year) AS 'Year' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(display.Production, 2)) AS 'Production' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(display.Adjustments, 2)) AS 'Adjustments ' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(display.Writeoffs, 2)) AS 'Write Offs' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(display.NetProduction, 2)) AS 'Net Production' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(COALESCE(display.NetProduction / display.TotalNetProductionPerc, 0) * 100, 2)) AS '% of Total Net Production' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(display.TotalIncome, 2)) AS 'Total Income' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(COALESCE(display.TotalIncome / display.TotalIncomePerc, 0) * 100, 2)) AS '% of Total Office Income' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(display.HoursWorked, 2)) AS 'Hours Worked' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(display.DaysWorked, 2)) AS 'Days Worked' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(COALESCE(display.NetProduction / display.HoursWorked, 0), 2)) AS 'Net Production per Hour' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(COALESCE(display.TotalIncome / display.HoursWorked, 0), 2)) AS 'Income per Hour' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(COALESCE(display.NetProduction / display.DaysWorked, 0), 2)) AS 'Net Production per Day' , IF(display.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', FORMAT(COALESCE(display.TotalIncome / display.DaysWorked, 0), 2)) AS 'Income per Day' FROM ( SELECT dup.Num, dup.Type, (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN 'Annual Analysis' WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT(core.Abbr, ' Annual Total') WHEN 3 THEN 'Grand Total All Providers' WHEN 5 THEN 'Quarterly Analysis' WHEN 6 THEN CONCAT('Q', core.Quarter, ' ', core.Abbr) WHEN 7 THEN CONCAT('Total Q', core.Quarter, ' All Providers') WHEN 9 THEN 'Monthly Analysis' WHEN 10 THEN core.Abbr WHEN 11 THEN core.MonthShort WHEN 12 THEN CONCAT(core.Abbr, ' Annual Total') ELSE '' END) AS 'request' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', core.Year) AS 'Year' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', SUM(core.Production)) AS 'Production' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', SUM(core.Adjustments)) AS 'Adjustments' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', SUM(core.Writeoffs)) AS 'Writeoffs' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', SUM(core.Production) + SUM(core.Adjustments) - SUM(core.Writeoffs)) AS 'NetProduction' , (CASE WHEN dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13) THEN '' WHEN dup.Num IN (2,3,12) THEN SUM(SUM(core.Production) + SUM(core.Adjustments) - SUM(core.Writeoffs)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Year ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Year) WHEN dup.Num IN (6,7) THEN SUM(SUM(core.Production) + SUM(core.Adjustments) - SUM(core.Writeoffs)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Quarter, core.Year ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Year, core.Quarter) WHEN dup.Num = 11 THEN SUM(SUM(core.Production) + SUM(core.Adjustments) - SUM(core.Writeoffs)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Month, core.Year ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Year, core.Month) END) AS 'TotalNetProductionPerc' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)) AS 'TotalIncome' , (CASE WHEN dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13) THEN '' WHEN dup.Num IN (2,3,12) THEN SUM(SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Year ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Year) WHEN dup.Num IN (6,7) THEN SUM(SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Quarter, core.Year ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Year, core.Quarter) WHEN dup.Num = 11 THEN SUM(SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Month, core.Year ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Year, core.Month) END) AS 'TotalIncomePerc' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', SUM(core.HoursWorked)) AS 'HoursWorked' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,4,5,8,9,10,13), '', SUM(core.DaysWorked)) AS 'DaysWorked' FROM ( SELECT prov.ProvNum , prov.Abbr , prov.Order , YEAR(months.Date) AS 'Year' , QUARTER(months.Date) AS 'Quarter' , LPAD(months.Month, 2, 0) AS 'Month' , DATE_FORMAT(months.Date, '%b') AS 'MonthShort' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'Proc', rawtrans.TranAmt, 0)) AS 'Production' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'Adj', rawtrans.TranAmt, 0)) AS 'Adjustments' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'ClaimProc', rawtrans.WriteOff, 0)) AS 'Writeoffs' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'PatPay', rawtrans.TranAmt, 0)) AS 'PatPay' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'ClaimProc', rawtrans.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS 'InsPay' , COALESCE(schedhrs.HoursWorked, 0) AS 'HoursWorked' , COALESCE(schedhrs.HoursWorked, 0) / 8 AS 'DaysWorked' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'ProvNum' , 'No Provider' AS 'Abbr' , '***No Provider' AS 'Order' UNION ALL SELECT pr.ProvNum , pr.Abbr , pr.Abbr AS 'Order' FROM provider pr ) prov INNER JOIN ( SELECT monthcore.Month , monthcore.Year , CONCAT(monthcore.Year, '-', LPAD(monthcore.Month, 2, 0), '-01') AS 'Date' FROM ( SELECT mth.seq AS 'Month' , (CASE WHEN ISNULL(dup.seq) OR dup.seq = 1 THEN @Year1 WHEN dup.seq = 2 THEN @Year2 END) AS 'Year' FROM seq_1_to_12 mth LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_2 dup ON IF(LENGTH(@Year2) = 0, FALSE, TRUE) ) monthcore ) months ON TRUE INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProvNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) - COALESCE(SUM(cp.Writeoff), 0) AS 'TranAmt' , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND (IF(LENGTH(@Year1) = 0, NULL, pl.ProcDate BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year1, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year1, '-12-31')) OR IF(LENGTH(@Year2) = 0, NULL, pl.ProcDate BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year2, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year2, '-12-31'))) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , adj.ProvNum , adj.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , adj.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmt' , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM adjustment adj WHERE (IF(LENGTH(@Year1) = 0, NULL, adj.AdjDate BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year1, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year1, '-12-31')) OR IF(LENGTH(@Year2) = 0, FALSE, adj.AdjDate BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year2, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year2, '-12-31'))) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(adj.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) UNION ALL SELECT 'ClaimProc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ProvNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmt' , cp.WriteOff AS 'WriteOff' , IF(cp.ClaimPaymentNum != 0 , cp.InsPayAmt, 0) AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND (IF(LENGTH(@Year1) = 0, NULL, cp.DateCP BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year1, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year1, '-12-31')) OR IF(LENGTH(@Year2) = 0, FALSE, cp.DateCP BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year2, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year2, '-12-31'))) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(cp.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.ProvNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , ps.SplitAmt AS 'TranAmt' , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM paysplit ps WHERE (IF(LENGTH(@Year1) = 0, NULL, ps.DatePay BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year1, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year1, '-12-31')) OR IF(LENGTH(@Year2) = 0, FALSE, ps.DatePay BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year2, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year2, '-12-31'))) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) AND IF(ISNULL(@HiddenUnearnedTypes), TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(ps.UnearnedType, @HiddenUnearnedTypes)) ORDER BY `TranType`, `TranDate` ) rawtrans ON rawtrans.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum AND MONTH(rawtrans.TranDate) = months.Month AND YEAR(rawtrans.TranDate) = months.Year LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MONTH(ce.TimeDisplayed1) AS 'Month' , YEAR(ce.TimeDisplayed1) AS 'Year' , DATE_FORMAT(ce.TimeDisplayed1, '%b %Y') AS 'MonthYear' , uo.ProvNum , CAST(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC( (CASE WHEN ce.TimeDisplayed2 > ce.TimeDisplayed1 AND ce.ClockStatus IN (0,1) THEN TIMEDIFF(ce.TimeDisplayed2, ce.TimeDisplayed1) WHEN ce.ClockStatus = 2 THEN 0 ELSE TIMEDIFF(NOW(), ce.TimeDisplayed1) END) )) / 3600 AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'HoursWorked' FROM employee emp INNER JOIN userod uo ON uo.EmployeeNum = emp.EmployeeNum AND uo.ProvNum != 0 INNER JOIN clockevent ce ON ce.EmployeeNum = emp.EmployeeNum AND (IF(@Year1 = YEAR(CURDATE()) , ce.TimeDisplayed1 BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year1, '-01-01') AND CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY , ce.TimeDisplayed1 BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year1, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year1, '-12-31') + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) OR IF(@Year2 = YEAR(CURDATE()) , ce.TimeDisplayed1 BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year2, '-01-01') AND CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY , ce.TimeDisplayed1 BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year2, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year2, '-12-31') + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) ) GROUP BY uo.ProvNum, YEAR(ce.TimeDisplayed1), MONTH(ce.TimeDisplayed1) ) schedhrs ON schedhrs.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum AND schedhrs.Month = months.Month AND schedhrs.Year = months.Year WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(prov.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY prov.ProvNum, months.Year, months.Month ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num', 'AnnualDesc' AS 'Type' UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'ProvAnnual' UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'AnnualTotals' UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'Separator1' UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'QuarterlyDesc' UNION ALL SELECT 6, 'ProvQuarterly' UNION ALL SELECT 7, 'QuarterlyTotals' UNION ALL SELECT 8, 'Separator2' UNION ALL SELECT 9, 'MonthlyDesc' UNION ALL SELECT 10, 'ProvAbbr' UNION ALL SELECT 11, 'ProvMonthly' UNION ALL SELECT 12, 'ProvAnnualTotals' UNION ALL SELECT 13, 'Separator3' ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Type IN ('AnnualDesc','QuarterlyDesc','MonthlyDesc','Separator1') THEN dup.Num WHEN dup.Type = 'Separator2' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.Quarter) WHEN dup.Type = 'Separator3' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.ProvNum) WHEN dup.Type IN ('ProvAnnual','ProvAnnualTotals') THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.ProvNum, '+', core.Year) WHEN dup.Type = 'AnnualTotals' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.Year) WHEN dup.Type = 'ProvQuarterly' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.ProvNum, '+', core.Year, '+', core.Quarter) WHEN dup.Type = 'QuarterlyTotals' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.Year, '+', core.Quarter) WHEN dup.Type = 'ProvAbbr' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.ProvNum) WHEN dup.Type = 'ProvMonthly' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.ProvNum, '+', core.Year, '+', core.Month) END) ORDER BY ELT(dup.Num, 1,2,3,4,5,6,6,6,7,8,8,8,8) , (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 2 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.Order, '+', core.Year) WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.Year) WHEN dup.Num = 6 THEN CONCAT(core.Quarter, '+', dup.Num, '+', core.Order, '+', core.Year) WHEN dup.Num IN (7,8) THEN CONCAT(core.Quarter, '+', dup.Num, '+', core.Year) WHEN dup.Num IN (10,13) THEN CONCAT(core.Order, '+', dup.Num) WHEN dup.Num = 11 THEN CONCAT(core.Order, '+', dup.Num, '+', core.Month, '+', core.Year) WHEN dup.Num = 12 THEN CONCAT(core.Order, '+', dup.Num, '+', core.Year) ELSE dup.Num END) ) display

request: List of global fees for specified fee schedules. Fees will be separated by a comma if there is more than one fee scheduled with the same name.
query: SET @FeeSched1='Office Fees'; SET @FeeSched2='Insurance'; SET @FeeSched3=''; SET @ShowHidden='Yes'; SELECT ' ,@FeeSched1 AS 'FeeSched1' ,@FeeSched2 AS 'FeeSched2' ,@FeeSched3 AS 'FeeSched3' ,' ,' UNION ALL ( SELECT pc.ProcCode ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT FORMAT(fee.Amount, 2) SEPARATOR ', ') FROM fee INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum = fee.FeeSched AND fs.request = @FeeSched1 WHERE fee.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND fee.ClinicNum = 0 AND fee.ProvNum = 0 ), '') AS 'FeeSched1' ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT FORMAT(fee.Amount, 2) SEPARATOR ', ') FROM fee INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum = fee.FeeSched AND fs.request = @FeeSched2 WHERE fee.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND fee.ClinicNum = 0 AND fee.ProvNum = 0 ), '') AS 'FeeSched2' ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT FORMAT(fee.Amount, 2) SEPARATOR ', ') FROM fee INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum = fee.FeeSched AND fs.request = @FeeSched3 WHERE fee.CodeNum=pc.CodeNum AND fee.ClinicNum = 0 AND fee.ProvNum = 0 ), '') AS 'FeeSched3' ,pc.AbbrDesc ,pc.Descript FROM procedurecode pc INNER JOIN definition d ON pc.ProcCat = d.DefNum WHERE IF(@ShowHidden='Yes', TRUE, !d.IsHidden) ORDER BY pc.ProcCode LIMIT 999999999 )

request: List of all payment plans in a date range.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-07-01', @ToDate='2025-07-31'; SET @ShowCompleted='Yes'; SELECT CONCAT( core.LName, ',', (CASE WHEN LENGTH(core.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'', core.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END), ' ', core.FName, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(core.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', core.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'Guarantor' , DATE_FORMAT(core.PayPlanDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Payplan Date' , IFNULL(cl.Abbr, 'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' , bt.ItemName AS 'BillingType' , IF(core.InsPlanNum = 0, '', 'X') AS 'Ins' , FORMAT(core.TotalPrincipal, 2) AS 'Principal' , FORMAT(core.TotalPaid + core.TotalInsPaid, 2) AS 'Paid' , FORMAT(core.TotalCurrentCharges - (core.TotalPaid + core.TotalInsPaid), 2) AS 'Due Now' , FORMAT((core.TotalPrincipal + core.TotalInterest) - (core.TotalPaid + core.TotalInsPaid), 2) AS
