'Balance' FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(guar.FName, pat.FName) AS 'FName' , COALESCE(guar.LName, pat.LName) AS 'LName' , COALESCE(guar.MiddleI, pat.MiddleI) AS 'MiddleI' , COALESCE(guar.Preferred, pat.Preferred) AS 'Preferred' , COALESCE(guar.BillingType, pat.BillingType) AS 'BillingType' , pp.PayPlanNum , pp.PayPlanDate , pp.PlanNum AS 'InsPlanNum' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(adppc.Principal + adppc.Interest) FROM payplancharge adppc WHERE adppc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND adppc.ChargeType = 0 AND adppc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE()) , 0) 'TotalCurrentCharges' , COALESCE( (CASE WHEN pp.IsDynamic = 0 THEN ( SELECT SUM(pppc.Principal) FROM payplancharge pppc WHERE pppc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND pppc.ChargeType = 0 ) WHEN pp.IsDynamic = 1 THEN dppprincipal.TotalPrincipal ELSE 0 END) , 0) 'TotalPrincipal' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(ippc.Interest) FROM payplancharge ippc WHERE ippc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND ippc.ChargeType = 0 AND ippc.ChargeDate <= CURDATE() ), 0) 'TotalInterest' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit pps WHERE pps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND pps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') AND pps.PayPlanNum != 0 ), 0) 'TotalPaid' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(icp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc icp WHERE icp.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND icp.Status IN (1, 4, 5) AND icp.PayPlanNum != 0 ), 0) 'TotalInsPaid' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cppc.Principal) FROM payplancharge cppc WHERE cppc.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND cppc.ChargeType = 1 ), 0) 'PPCredits' , COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(dtd.Principal) FROM payplancharge dtd WHERE dtd.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND dtd.ChargeType = 0 AND dtd.ChargeDate BETWEEN CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND CURDATE() + INTERVAL 10 DAY ), 0) 'DueTenDays' , IF(pp.IsDynamic AND CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-'), DAY(pp.PayPlanDate)) BETWEEN CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND CURDATE() + INTERVAL 10 DAY, pp.PayAmt, 0)'DppDueTenDays' , COALESCE(guar.PatNum, pat.PatNum) AS 'PatNum' , COALESCE(payplancharge.ProvNum, dppprincipal.ProvNum) AS 'ProvNum' , COALESCE(payplancharge.ClinicNum, dppprincipal.ClinicNum, 0) AS 'ClinicNum' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN patient pat ON pat.PatNum = pp.PatNum LEFT JOIN patient guar ON guar.PatNum = pp.Guarantor LEFT JOIN payplancharge ON pp.PayPlanNum = payplancharge.PayPlanNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ppl.PayPlanNum , ROUND( SUM( (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride != 0 THEN ppl.AmountOverride ELSE (CASE WHEN ppl.LinkType = 1 THEN ppladj.AdjAmt WHEN ppl.LinkType = 2 THEN pplpl.ProcFee * GREATEST(1, pplpl.BaseUnits + pplpl.UnitQty) - IF(pplpl.ProcStatus = 2 , 0, pplpl.Discount + pplpl.DiscountPlanAmt) ELSE 0 END) - COALESCE(sumsplit.SumSplit, 0) + COALESCE(sumprocadj.SumProcAdj, 0) - COALESCE(sumins.SumIns, 0) END) ) , 2) AS 'TotalPrincipal' , COALESCE(pplpl.ClinicNum, ppladj.ClinicNum, 0) 'ClinicNum' , COALESCE(pplpl.ProvNum, ppladj.ProvNum) 'ProvNum' FROM payplanlink ppl INNER JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum AND pp.PayPlanDate BETWEEN @FromDate AND @ToDate LEFT JOIN adjustment ppladj ON ppladj.AdjNum = ppl.FKey AND ppl.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN procedurelog pplpl ON pplpl.ProcNum = ppl.FKey AND ppl.LinkType = 2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dps.ProcNum , 0 AS 'AdjNum' , SUM(dps.SplitAmt) AS 'SumSplit' FROM paysplit dps INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON dps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN payplanlink pldpp ON pl.ProcNum = pldpp.FKey AND pldpp.LinkType = 2 WHERE dps.PayPlanNum = 0 AND dps.PayPlanChargeNum = 0 AND dps.ProcNum != 0 GROUP BY dps.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS 'ProcNum' ,dps2.AdjNum AS 'AdjNum' ,SUM(dps2.SplitAmt) AS 'SumSplit' FROM paysplit dps2 INNER JOIN adjustment a ON dps2.AdjNum = a.AdjNum INNER JOIN payplanlink adpp ON a.AdjNum = adpp.FKey AND adpp.LinkType = 1 WHERE dps2.PayPlanNum = 0 AND dps2.PayPlanChargeNum = 0 AND dps2.AdjNum != 0 GROUP BY dps2.AdjNum ) sumsplit ON (ppl.FKey = sumsplit.ProcNum AND sumsplit.ProcNum != 0 AND ppl.LinkType = 2 ) OR (ppl.FKey = sumsplit.AdjNum AND sumsplit.AdjNum != 0 AND ppl.LinkType = 1 ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dadj.ProcNum , SUM(dadj.AdjAmt) AS 'SumProcAdj' FROM adjustment dadj INNER JOIN payplanlink dppl ON dppl.FKey = dadj.procNum AND dppl.LinkType = 2 GROUP BY dadj.ProcNum ) sumprocadj ON sumprocadj.ProcNum = pplpl.ProcNum AND ppl.LinkType = 2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dcp.ProcNum , SUM( (CASE WHEN dcp.Status IN (1, 4, 5, 7) THEN dcp.InsPayAmt + dcp.WriteOff WHEN dcp.Status IN (0, 6, 8, 9) THEN dcp.InsPayEst + (CASE WHEN dcp.WriteOffEstOverride != - 1 THEN dcp.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN dcp.WriteOffEst != - 1 THEN dcp.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'SumIns' FROM claimproc dcp INNER JOIN payplanlink dppl ON dppl.FKey = dcp.ProcNum AND dppl.LinkType = 2 GROUP BY dcp.ProcNum ) sumins ON pplpl.ProcNum = sumins.ProcNum AND ppl.LinkType = 2 GROUP BY ppl.PayPlanNum ) dppprincipal ON dppprincipal.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 WHERE pp.PayPlanDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(@ShowCompleted = 'Yes', TRUE, !PP.IsClosed) GROUP BY FName, LName, MiddleI, Preferred, pp.PayPlanNum ) core INNER JOIN definition bt ON bt.DefNum = core.BillingType LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = core.ClinicNum ORDER BY core.ClinicNum, core.LName, core.FName, core.PatNum, core.PayPlanNum

request: UTM Tracking: How many Web Sched sessions resulted in scheduled appointments, per Campaign/Medium/Source
query: SET @FromDate = '2024-01-01', @ToDate = '2024-12-31'; SELECT sessions.Campaign AS 'UTM Campaign' , IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', sessions.Medium, '') AS 'UTM Medium' , IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', sessions.Source, 'Campaign Total:') AS 'UTM Source' , COUNT(sessions.LogGuid) AS 'UTM Results: Total Visits' , COUNT(IF(sessions.Scheduled, sessions.LogGuid, NULL)) AS 'UTM Results: Count of Visits with Scheduled Appointments' , COUNT(IF(NOT sessions.Scheduled, sessions.LogGuid, NULL)) AS 'UTM Results: Count of Visits Without Scheduled Appointments' FROM ( SELECT e.LogGuid , COALESCE(u.CampaignName, 'Unknown') AS 'Campaign' , COALESCE(u.MediumInfo, '') AS 'Medium' , COALESCE(u.SourceInfo, '') AS 'Source' , SUM(IF(es.EServiceAction = 12, 1, 0)) AS 'Scheduled' FROM eservicelog e LEFT JOIN utm u ON e.FKey = u.UtmNum LEFT JOIN eservicelog es ON e.LogGuid = es.LogGuid WHERE TRUE AND e.KeyType = 4 AND e.EServiceAction = 1 AND e.LogDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY - INTERVAL 1 SECOND GROUP BY e.LogGuid ) sessions LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Campaign' ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY sessions.Campaign, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', CONCAT(sessions.Medium, '||', sessions.Source), TRUE) ORDER BY sessions.Campaign, dup.Type DESC

request: Appointments for a specified clinic scheduled using Web Sched, with UTM info
query: SET @FromDate='2024-01-01', @ToDate='2024-12-31'; SET @ClinicAbbrs=''; SELECT COALESCE(u.CampaignName, 'Unknown') AS 'UTM Campaign' , COALESCE(u.MediumInfo, 'Unknown') AS 'UTM Medium' , COALESCE(u.SourceInfo, 'Unknown') AS 'UTM Source' , p.PatNum AS 'Pat , p.FName AS 'First Name' , p.LName AS 'Last Name' , p.HmPhone AS 'Home Phone' , p.WirelessPhone AS 'Cell Phone' , p.Email , apt.AptDateTime , apt.AptStatus , c.Abbr AS 'AptClinic' FROM ( SELECT esl.LogGuid , esl.ClinicNum , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT IF(esl.KeyType = 1 AND esl.EServiceAction = 13 , esl.FKey, NULL)) AS 'AptNum' , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT IF(esl.KeyType = 4, esl.FKey, NULL)) AS 'UtmNum' , MAX(esl.PatNum) AS 'PatNum' FROM eservicelog esl WHERE esl.LogDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY - INTERVAL 1 SECOND GROUP BY esl.LogGuid ) sessions INNER JOIN appointment apt ON FIND_IN_SET(apt.AptNum, sessions.AptNum) LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = apt.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN patient p ON sessions.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN utm u ON sessions.UtmNum = u.UtmNum WHERE IF(LENGTH(@ClinicAbbrs), FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(c.Abbr, 'None'), @ClinicAbbrs), TRUE) ORDER BY u.CampaignName, apt.AptDateTime, apt.AptNum

request: Production per Clinic for specified Specialists
query: SET @StartDate='2024-01-01', @EndDate='2024-01-31'; SET @ExcludeZeroProduction='0'; SET @Specialty='Surgery'; SELECT prcl.Abbr AS 'Procedure Clinic' , patcl.Abbr AS 'Home Clinic' , DATE_FORMAT(@StartDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Start Date' , DATE_FORMAT(@EndDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'End Date' , def.ItemName AS 'Specialty' , FORMAT(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)), 2) AS 'Production' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN clinic prcl ON prcl.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum INNER JOIN clinic patcl ON patcl.ClinicNum = p.ClinicNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = pr.Specialty AND def.Category = 35 AND def.ItemName = @Specialty WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@StartDate) AND DATE(@EndDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(@ExcludeZeroProduction = 0,TRUE,pl.ProcFee != 0) GROUP BY prcl.ClinicNum, patcl.ClinicNum ORDER BY prcl.Abbr, prcl.ClinicNum, patcl.Abbr, patcl.ClinicNum

request: Payment daily totals in the specified date range by pay type. Requires MariaDB 10.5+
query: SET @FromDate='2024-12-01', @ToDate='2024-12-31'; SELECT IF(LAG(core.PayDate) OVER (ORDER BY core.PayDate, core.PayType, core.TypeGroup) = core.PayDate ,'' ,core.PayDate) AS 'Date' ,core.PayType AS 'PayType' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Amt),2) AS 'Amount' FROM ( SELECT CONCAT('P:',pay.PayNum) AS 'ID' ,IF(def.ItemName = 'Check',def.ItemName,CONCAT('P:',pay.PayType)) AS 'TypeGroup' ,pay.PayDate ,IFNULL(def.ItemName,'Income Transfer') AS 'PayType' ,pay.PayAmt AS 'Amt' FROM payment pay LEFT JOIN definition def ON pay.PayType = def.DefNum WHERE pay.PayDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('I:',cpay.ClaimPaymentNum) AS 'ID' ,IF(d.ItemName = 'Check',d.ItemName,CONCAT('I:',cpay.PayType)) AS 'TypeGroup' ,cpay.CheckDate AS 'PayDate' ,IFNULL(d.ItemName,'!undefined!') AS 'PayType' ,cpay.CheckAmt AS 'Amt' FROM claimpayment cpay LEFT JOIN definition d ON cpay.PayType = d.DefNum WHERE cpay.CheckDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) core GROUP BY core.PayDate, core.TypeGroup ORDER BY core.PayDate, core.PayType, core.TypeGroup

request: Supplies report. Shows all supply orders placed in the specified date range.
query: SET @StartPlaceDate='2022-09-01', @EndPlaceDate='2022-09-30'; SET @StartReceiveDate='', @EndReceiveDate=''; SET @Supplier='%%'; SET @ItemNum='%%'; SET @Desc='%%'; SET @SearchNote='%%'; SET @User='%%'; SET @Cat='%%'; SELECT IF(dup.Num=1,core.Name,'') AS 'Name' , IF(dup.Num=1,core.DatePlaced,'') AS 'Date Placed' , IF(dup.Num=1,core.DateReceived,'') AS 'Date Received' , IF(dup.Num=1,core.ItemNum,'') AS 'Item , IF(dup.Num=1,core.Category,' ') AS 'Category' , IF(dup.Num=1,core.Descript,'') AS 'request' , IF(dup.Num=1,core.Qty,'') AS 'Qty' , IF(dup.Num=1,FORMAT(core.PricePerUnit,2),'') AS 'Price Per Unit' , FORMAT(IF(dup.Num=1,core.OrderTotal,SUM(core.OrderTotal)),2) AS 'Order Total' , IF(dup.Num=1,core.OrderNote,'') AS 'Order Note' , IF(dup.Num=1,core.User,'') AS 'User' FROM ( SELECT so.SupplyOrderNum , supply.SupplyNum , si.SupplyOrderItemNum , sup.Name , so.DatePlaced , so.DateReceived , supply.CatalogNumber AS 'ItemNum' , cat.ItemName AS 'Category' , supply.Descript , si.Qty , si.Price AS 'PricePerUnit' , si.Qty*si.Price AS 'OrderTotal' , so.Note AS 'OrderNote' , COALESCE(uo.UserName,'None') AS 'User' FROM supplyorder so INNER JOIN supplyorderitem si ON si.SupplyOrderNum = so.SupplyOrderNum INNER JOIN supplier sup ON sup.SupplierNum = so.SupplierNum AND sup.Name LIKE @Supplier INNER JOIN supply ON supply.SupplyNum = si.SupplyNum AND supply.CatalogNumber LIKE @ItemNum AND supply.Descript LIKE @Desc INNER JOIN definition cat ON cat.DefNum = supply.Category AND cat.ItemName LIKE @Cat LEFT JOIN userod uo ON uo.UserNum = so.UserNum WHERE so.DatePlaced BETWEEN DATE(@StartPlaceDate) AND DATE(@EndPlaceDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@StartReceiveDate) = 0 OR LENGTH(@EndReceiveDate) = 0 , TRUE , so.DateReceived BETWEEN DATE(@StartReceiveDate) AND DATE(@EndReceiveDate) ) AND so.Note LIKE @SearchNote AND COALESCE(uo.UserName,'None') LIKE @User ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num=1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',core.SupplyOrderItemNum),dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num,core.DatePlaced DESC,core.SupplyOrderNum,core.Descript,core.SupplyOrderItemNum;

request: Aging for families or patients with any balance, showing how much of the balance comes from the specified date range
query: SET @AsOf =''; SET @AgingLevel ='Family'; SET @AgeOfAccount =''; SET @IncludeNegativeBalances='Yes'; SET @ProvAbbrs =''; SET @ClinicAbbrs =''; SET @BillingTypes =''; SET @ExcludeInactive='No'; SET @ExcludeArchived='No'; SET @ExcludePendingIns='No'; SET @ShowDateHeader='No'; SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays'),0) INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'),1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlanItemDateShowProc'), 0) INTO @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @ProvAbbrs); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @ClinicAbbrs); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @ClinicAbbrs),'0,',''),IFNULL(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @BillTypeNums FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(definition.ItemName, @BillingTypes); SELECT CAST(CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', 2) , LPAD(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', -2),'.',''),4,'0') ) AS DECIMAL(6,4)) INTO @ProgramVersion FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'ProgramVersion'; SELECT (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'Pat , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN CONCAT('As of: ', DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf, '%m/%d/%Y')) WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'PatNum' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_DR WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_DR) END) AS 'Bal_DateRange' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.BalTotal WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.BalTotal) END) AS 'BalTotal' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsWoEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsWoEst) END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsPayEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsPayEst) END) AS 'InsPayEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.PatEst) END) AS 'PatEst' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum , CONCAT( patient.LName , ',' , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred, '''') ELSE '' END) , ' ' , patient.FName , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' , guarAging.Bal_DR , guarAging.Bal_0_30 , guarAging.Bal_31_60 , guarAging.Bal_61_90 , guarAging.BalOver90 , guarAging.BalTotal , guarAging.InsWoEst , guarAging.InsPayEst , guarAging.BalTotal - guarAging.InsPayEst - guarAging.InsWoEst AS 'PatEst' , guarAging.PayPlanDue , guarAging.DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT tSums.PatNum , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'BalOver90' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits <= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN tSums.Charges_61_90 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_61_90' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 THEN tSums.Charges_31_60 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_31_60' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 THEN tSums.Charges_0_30 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_0_30' , CAST((CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.PriorCharges THEN tSums.DateRangeCharges WHEN tSums.DateRangeCharges + tSums.PriorCharges <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.DateRangeCharges + tSums.PriorCharges - tSums.TotalCredits END) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_DR' , CAST((CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.PriorCharges THEN tSums.PriorCharges WHEN tSums.PriorCharges <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.DateRangeCharges - tSums.TotalCredits END) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_Prior' , CAST(tSums.BalTotal AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'BalTotal' , CAST(tSums.InsWoEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsWoEst' , CAST(tSums.InsPayEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsPayEst' , CAST(tSums.PayPlanDue AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'PayPlanDue' , DATE(tSums.DateLastPay) AS 'DateLastPay' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) AS 'PatNum' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate)) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'DateRangeCharges' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@FromDate)) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'PriorCharges' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesOver90' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_61_90' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE) ) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig') ) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_31_60' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE) ) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig') ) AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_0_30' , -SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount < 0 AND NOT(trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig'))) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND trans.TranType = 'PatPay') THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TotalCredits' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotal' , SUM(trans.InsWoEst) AS 'InsWoEst' , SUM(trans.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' , SUM(trans.PayPlanAmount) AS 'PayPlanDue' , MAX( CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN trans.TranDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END ) DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.PatNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= DATE(@AsOf) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog p ON cp.ProcNum = p.ProcNum AND @ProgramVersion >= 22.2055 WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 22.2055 THEN TRUE ELSE (cp.ProcNum = 0 OR p.ProcStatus = 2) END) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , a.PatNum , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey' , ps.PatNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmount' , ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum , pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate' , -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.PatNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Discount' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , p.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , p.Discount + p.DiscountPlanAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplanlink ppl ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog p ON ppl.FKey = p.ProcNum AND ppl.LinkType = 2 AND p.ProcStatus = 1 AND p.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 23.2023 AND 24.1999 AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 AND pp.DynamicPayPlanTPOption = 2 AND (p.Discount != 0 OR p.DiscountPlanAmt != 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType , ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey' , prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate ELSE DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) END) AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum , procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 24.2001 THEN !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) ELSE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 END) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjustment.ProcNum , adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = adjustment.ProcNum GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay' , SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff' , claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.ProcNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , 0 ProcNum , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2024 THEN adjustment.AdjDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END) AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 1 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.AdjNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) ELSE ppl.SecDateTEntry < DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL 1 DAY END) ) trans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = trans.PatNum GROUP BY (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) ) tSums ) guarAging INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=guarAging.PatNum WHERE (IF(@IncludeNegativeBalances IN ('Yes','Only'), guarAging.BalTotal <= -0.005, FALSE) OR IF(@IncludeNegativeBalances ='Only', FALSE, (guarAging.BalOver90 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_61_90 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_31_60 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_0_30 >= 0.005) ) ) AND (CASE CAST(@AgeOfAccount AS DECIMAL(2,0)) WHEN 90 THEN guarAging.BalOver90 >= 0.005 WHEN 60 THEN guarAging.Bal_61_90 + guarAging.BalOver90 >= 0.005 WHEN 30 THEN guarAging.Bal_31_60 + guarAging.Bal_61_90 + guarAging.BalOver90 >= 0.005 ELSE TRUE END ) AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@ClinicAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(@ExcludePendingIns != 'Yes', TRUE, ABS(guarAging.InsPayEst + guarAging.InsWoEst) < 0.005) AND IF(LENGTH(@ProvAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.PriProv, @ProvNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.BillingType, @BillTypeNums)) AND IF(@ExcludeInactive !='Yes', TRUE, patient.PatStatus != 2) AND IF(@ExcludeArchived !='Yes', TRUE, patient.PatStatus != 3) ) aging INNER JOIN ( SELECT IF(@ShowDateHeader='Yes', 'AHeader', NULL) AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Spacer' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Total' AS 'Type' ) dup ON dup.Type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dup.Type, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', aging.PatNum, NULL) ORDER BY dup.Type, aging.PatName, aging.PatNum

request: Aging for families or patients with any balance, with additional aging buckets
query: SET @AsOf =''; SET @AgingLevel ='Family'; SET @AgeOfAccount =''; SET @IncludeNegativeBalances='Yes'; SET @ProvAbbrs =''; SET @ClinicAbbrs =''; SET @BillingTypes =''; SET @ExcludeInactive='No'; SET @ExcludeArchived='No'; SET @ExcludePendingIns='No'; SET @ShowDateHeader='No'; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays'),0) INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'),1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlanItemDateShowProc'), 0) INTO @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @ProvAbbrs); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @ClinicAbbrs); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @ClinicAbbrs),'0,',''),IFNULL(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @BillTypeNums FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(definition.ItemName, @BillingTypes); SELECT CAST(CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', 2) , LPAD(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', -2),'.',''),4,'0') ) AS DECIMAL(6,4)) INTO @ProgramVersion FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'ProgramVersion'; SELECT (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'Pat , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN CONCAT('As of: ', DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf, '%m/%d/%Y')) WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'PatNum' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_0_30 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_0_30) END) AS 'Bal_0_30' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_31_60 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_31_60) END) AS 'Bal_31_60' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_61_90 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_61_90) END) AS 'Bal_61_90' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_91_180 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_91_180) END) AS 'Bal_91_180' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_181_365 WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_181_365) END) AS 'Bal_181_365' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_1yr_2yr WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_1yr_2yr) END) AS 'Bal_1yr_2yr' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_2yr_3yr WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_2yr_3yr) END) AS 'Bal_2yr_3yr' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.BalOver3Yr WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.BalOver3Yr) END) AS 'BalOver3Yr' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.BalTotal WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.BalTotal) END) AS 'BalTotal' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsWoEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsWoEst) END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsPayEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsPayEst) END) AS 'InsPayEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.PatEst) END) AS 'PatEst' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum , CONCAT( patient.LName , ',' , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred, '''') ELSE '' END) , ' ' , patient.FName , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' , guarAging.Bal_0_30 , guarAging.Bal_31_60 , guarAging.Bal_61_90 , guarAging.Bal_91_180 , guarAging.Bal_181_365 , guarAging.Bal_1yr_2yr , guarAging.Bal_2yr_3yr , guarAging.BalOver3Yr , guarAging.BalTotal , guarAging.InsWoEst , guarAging.InsPayEst , guarAging.BalTotal - guarAging.InsPayEst - guarAging.InsWoEst AS 'PatEst' , guarAging.PayPlanDue , guarAging.DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT tSums.PatNum , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.ChargesOver3yr THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver3yr - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'BalOver3Yr' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver3yr THEN tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr WHEN tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_2yr_3yr' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr THEN tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr WHEN tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_1yr_2yr' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr THEN tSums.Charges_181_365 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_181_365' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 THEN tSums.Charges_91_180 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_91_180' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 THEN tSums.Charges_61_90 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 + tSums.Charges_61_90 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 + tSums.Charges_61_90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_61_90' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 + tSums.Charges_61_90 THEN tSums.Charges_31_60 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_31_60' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 THEN tSums.Charges_0_30 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver3yr + tSums.Charges_2yr_3yr + tSums.Charges_1yr_2yr + tSums.Charges_181_365 + tSums.Charges_91_180 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_0_30' , CAST(tSums.BalTotal AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'BalTotal' , CAST(tSums.InsWoEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsWoEst' , CAST(tSums.InsPayEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsPayEst' , CAST(tSums.PayPlanDue AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'PayPlanDue' , DATE(tSums.DateLastPay) AS 'DateLastPay' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) AS 'PatNum' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 3 YEAR) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesOver3yr' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 3 YEAR) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_2yr_3yr' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 1 YEAR AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_1yr_2yr' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 180 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 365 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_181_365' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 180 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_91_180' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_61_90' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE) ) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig') ) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_31_60' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE) ) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig') ) AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_0_30' , -SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount < 0 AND NOT(trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig'))) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND trans.TranType = 'PatPay') THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TotalCredits' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotal' , SUM(trans.InsWoEst) AS 'InsWoEst' , SUM(trans.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' , SUM(trans.PayPlanAmount) AS 'PayPlanDue' , MAX( CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN trans.TranDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END ) DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.PatNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= DATE(@AsOf) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog p ON cp.ProcNum = p.ProcNum AND @ProgramVersion >= 22.2055 WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 22.2055 THEN TRUE ELSE (cp.ProcNum = 0 OR p.ProcStatus = 2) END) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , a.PatNum , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey' , ps.PatNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmount' , ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum , pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate' , -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.PatNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Discount' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , p.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , p.Discount + p.DiscountPlanAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplanlink ppl ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog p ON ppl.FKey = p.ProcNum AND ppl.LinkType = 2 AND p.ProcStatus = 1 AND p.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 23.2023 AND 24.1999 AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 AND pp.DynamicPayPlanTPOption = 2 AND (p.Discount != 0 OR p.DiscountPlanAmt != 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType , ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey' , prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate ELSE DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) END) AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum , procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 24.2001 THEN !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) ELSE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 END) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjustment.ProcNum , adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = adjustment.ProcNum GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay' , SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff' , claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.ProcNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , 0 ProcNum , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2024 THEN adjustment.AdjDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END) AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 1 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.AdjNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) ELSE ppl.SecDateTEntry < DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL 1 DAY END) ) trans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = trans.PatNum GROUP BY (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) ) tSums ) guarAging INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=guarAging.PatNum WHERE (IF(@IncludeNegativeBalances IN ('Yes','Only'), guarAging.BalTotal <= -0.005, FALSE) OR IF(@IncludeNegativeBalances ='Only' , FALSE , (guarAging.BalOver3Yr >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_2yr_3yr >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_1yr_2yr >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_181_365 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_91_180 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_61_90 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_31_60 >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_0_30 >= 0.005) ) ) AND (CASE CAST(@AgeOfAccount AS DECIMAL(3,0)) WHEN 3 THEN guarAging.BalOver3Yr >= 0.005 WHEN 2 THEN guarAging.Bal_2yr_3yr + guarAging.BalOver3Yr >= 0.005 WHEN 1 THEN guarAging.Bal_1yr_2yr + guarAging.Bal_2yr_3yr + guarAging.BalOver3Yr >= 0.005 WHEN 180 THEN guarAging.Bal_181_365 + guarAging.Bal_1yr_2yr + guarAging.Bal_2yr_3yr + guarAging.BalOver3Yr >= 0.005 WHEN 90 THEN guarAging.Bal_91_180 + guarAging.Bal_181_365 + guarAging.Bal_1yr_2yr + guarAging.Bal_2yr_3yr + guarAging.BalOver3Yr >= 0.005 WHEN 60 THEN guarAging.Bal_61_90 + guarAging.Bal_91_180 + guarAging.Bal_181_365 + guarAging.Bal_1yr_2yr + guarAging.Bal_2yr_3yr + guarAging.BalOver3Yr >= 0.005 WHEN 30 THEN guarAging.Bal_31_60 + guarAging.Bal_61_90 + guarAging.Bal_91_180 + guarAging.Bal_181_365 + guarAging.Bal_1yr_2yr + guarAging.Bal_2yr_3yr + guarAging.BalOver3Yr >= 0.005 ELSE TRUE END ) AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@ClinicAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(@ExcludePendingIns != 'Yes', TRUE, ABS(guarAging.InsPayEst + guarAging.InsWoEst) < 0.005) AND IF(LENGTH(@ProvAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.PriProv, @ProvNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.BillingType, @BillTypeNums)) AND IF(@ExcludeInactive !='Yes', TRUE, patient.PatStatus != 2) AND IF(@ExcludeArchived !='Yes', TRUE, patient.PatStatus != 3) ) aging INNER JOIN ( SELECT IF(@ShowDateHeader='Yes', 'AHeader', NULL) AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Spacer' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Total' AS 'Type' ) dup ON dup.Type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dup.Type, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', aging.PatNum, NULL) ORDER BY dup.Type, aging.PatName, aging.PatNum

request: Aging for families or patients with any balance, broken into yearly buckets
query: SET @AsOf =''; SET @AgingLevel ='Family'; SET @IncludeNegativeBalances='Yes'; SET @ProvAbbrs =''; SET @ClinicAbbrs =''; SET @BillingTypes =''; SET @ExcludeInactive='No'; SET @ExcludeArchived='No'; SET @ExcludePendingIns='No'; SET @ShowDateHeader='No'; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays'),0) INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'),1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlanItemDateShowProc'), 0) INTO @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @ProvAbbrs); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @ClinicAbbrs); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @ClinicAbbrs),'0,',''),IFNULL(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @BillTypeNums FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(definition.ItemName, @BillingTypes); SELECT CAST(CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', 2) , LPAD(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', -2),'.',''),4,'0') ) AS DECIMAL(6,4)) INTO @ProgramVersion FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'ProgramVersion'; SELECT (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'Pat , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN CONCAT('As of: ', DATE_FORMAT(@AsOf, '%m/%d/%Y')) WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'PatNum' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_AsOf WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_AsOf) END) AS 'BalAsOf' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_Prev WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_Prev) END) AS 'BalPreviousYear' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Bal_Prior WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_Prior) END) AS 'BalPriorYear' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.BalTotal WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.BalTotal) END) AS 'BalTotal' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsWoEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsWoEst) END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.InsPayEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsPayEst) END) AS 'InsPayEst' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'AHeader' THEN '' WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.PatEst) END) AS 'PatEst' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum , CONCAT( patient.LName , ',' , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred, '''') ELSE '' END) , ' ' , patient.FName , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' , guarAging.Bal_AsOf , guarAging.Bal_Prev , guarAging.Bal_Prior , guarAging.Bal_Before , guarAging.BalTotal , guarAging.InsWoEst , guarAging.InsPayEst , guarAging.BalTotal - guarAging.InsPayEst - guarAging.InsWoEst AS 'PatEst' , guarAging.PayPlanDue , guarAging.DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT tSums.PatNum , CAST((CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.ChargesBefore THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesBefore - tSums.TotalCredits END) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_Before' , CAST((CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesBefore THEN tSums.ChargesPrior WHEN tSums.ChargesBefore + tSums.ChargesPrior <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesBefore + tSums.ChargesPrior - tSums.TotalCredits END) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_Prior' , CAST((CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesBefore + tSums.ChargesPrior THEN tSums.ChargesPrev WHEN tSums.ChargesBefore + tSums.ChargesPrior + tSums.ChargesPrev <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesBefore + tSums.ChargesPrior + tSums.ChargesPrev - tSums.TotalCredits END) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_Prev' , CAST((CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesBefore + tSums.ChargesPrior + tSums.ChargesPrev THEN tSums.ChargesAsOf WHEN tSums.ChargesBefore + tSums.ChargesPrior + tSums.ChargesPrev + tSums.ChargesAsOf <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesBefore + tSums.ChargesPrior + tSums.ChargesPrev + tSums.ChargesAsOf - tSums.TotalCredits END) AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_AsOf' , CAST(tSums.BalTotal AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'BalTotal' , CAST(tSums.InsWoEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsWoEst' , CAST(tSums.InsPayEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsPayEst' , CAST(tSums.PayPlanDue AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'PayPlanDue' , DATE(tSums.DateLastPay) AS 'DateLastPay' FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) AS 'PatNum' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE_FORMAT(DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR,'%Y-01-01')) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesBefore' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR,'%Y-01-01') AND DATE_FORMAT(DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 2 YEAR,'%Y-12-31')) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesPrior' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 1 YEAR,'%Y-01-01') AND DATE_FORMAT(DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 1 YEAR,'%Y-12-31')) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesPrev' , SUM(CASE WHEN (((trans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,trans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE)) OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE(@AsOf),'%Y-01-01') AND DATE(@AsOf)) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesAsOf' , -SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount < 0 AND NOT(trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig'))) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND trans.TranType = 'PatPay') THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TotalCredits' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotal' , SUM(trans.InsWoEst) AS 'InsWoEst' , SUM(trans.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' , SUM(trans.PayPlanAmount) AS 'PayPlanDue' , MAX( CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN trans.TranDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END ) DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.PatNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= DATE(@AsOf) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog p ON cp.ProcNum = p.ProcNum AND @ProgramVersion >= 22.2055 WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 22.2055 THEN TRUE ELSE (cp.ProcNum = 0 OR p.ProcStatus = 2) END) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , a.PatNum , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey' , ps.PatNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmount' , ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum , pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate' , -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.PatNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Discount' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , p.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , p.Discount + p.DiscountPlanAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplanlink ppl ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog p ON ppl.FKey = p.ProcNum AND ppl.LinkType = 2 AND p.ProcStatus = 1 AND p.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 23.2023 AND 24.1999 AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 AND pp.DynamicPayPlanTPOption = 2 AND (p.Discount != 0 OR p.DiscountPlanAmt != 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType , ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey' , prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate ELSE DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) END) AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum , procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 24.2001 THEN !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) ELSE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 END) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjustment.ProcNum , adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = adjustment.ProcNum GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay' , SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff' , claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.ProcNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , 0 ProcNum , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2024 THEN adjustment.AdjDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END) AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 1 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.AdjNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) ELSE ppl.SecDateTEntry < DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL 1 DAY END) ) trans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = trans.PatNum GROUP BY (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) ) tSums ) guarAging INNER JOIN patient ON patient.PatNum=guarAging.PatNum WHERE (IF(@IncludeNegativeBalances IN ('Yes','Only'), guarAging.BalTotal <= -0.005, FALSE) OR IF(@IncludeNegativeBalances ='Only' , FALSE , (guarAging.Bal_Before >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_Prev >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_Prior >= 0.005 OR guarAging.Bal_AsOf >= 0.005) ) ) AND IF(@EasyNoClinics OR LENGTH(@ClinicAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(@ExcludePendingIns != 'Yes', TRUE, ABS(guarAging.InsPayEst + guarAging.InsWoEst) < 0.005) AND IF(LENGTH(@ProvAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.PriProv, @ProvNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.BillingType, @BillTypeNums)) AND IF(@ExcludeInactive !='Yes', TRUE, patient.PatStatus != 2) AND IF(@ExcludeArchived !='Yes', TRUE, patient.PatStatus != 3) ) aging INNER JOIN ( SELECT IF(@ShowDateHeader='Yes', 'AHeader', NULL) AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Spacer' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Total' AS 'Type' ) dup ON dup.Type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dup.Type, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail', aging.PatNum, NULL) ORDER BY dup.Type, aging.PatName, aging.PatNum

request: List of procedures completed in a date range, with a specified procedure code, on a received claim for a specified carrier.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-04-01', @ToDate='2025-04-30'; SET @Carriers=''; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @AdjustTypes='Misc Neg Adjustment'; SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics' INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT pl.PatNum AS 'Patient ID' ,pl.PatNum ,pc.ProcCode AS 'Proc Code' ,DATE_FORMAT(pl.ProcDate, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Proc Date' ,IF(@EasyNoClinics, '', COALESCE(c.Abbr,'None')) AS 'Clinic' ,COALESCE(( SELECT 'Yes' FROM adjustment adj INNER JOIN definition adef ON adef.DefNum = adj.AdjType AND IF(LENGTH(@AdjustTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(adef.ItemName, @AdjustTypes)) WHERE adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum LIMIT 1 ), 'No') AS 'Adjustment?' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum AND cl.ClaimStatus = 'R' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cp.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Carriers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(car.CarrierName, @Carriers)) INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, p.PatNum, pl.ProcDate, pl.ProcNum

request: Families with credit balances
query: SET @AsOf=''; SET @ProvAbbrs =''; SET @ClinicAbbrs =''; SET @BillingTypes =''; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion'),1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ValueString FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'EasyNoClinics'),1) INTO @EasyNoClinics; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @ProvAbbrs); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @ClinicAbbrs); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('None', @ClinicAbbrs),'0,',''),IFNULL(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @BillTypeNums FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(definition.ItemName, @BillingTypes); SELECT CAST(CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', 2) , LPAD(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(ValueString, '.', -2),'.',''),4,'0') ) AS DECIMAL(6,4)) INTO @ProgramVersion FROM preference WHERE prefName LIKE 'ProgramVersion'; SELECT (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatName WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'Patient Name' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN TRIM(',' FROM TRIM(CONCAT(aging.StreetAddress, ', ', aging.City, ', ', aging.State, ' ', aging.Zip))) WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'Patient Address' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.Email WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'Patient Email' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(aging.DateLastVisit, '%m/%d/%Y'), '') WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'DateLastVisit' ,(CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(aging.DateNextVisit, '%m/%d/%Y'), '') WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN '' END) AS 'DateNextVisit' , (CASE dup.Type WHEN 'Detail' THEN aging.PatEst WHEN 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.PatEst) END) AS 'BalTotal' FROM ( SELECT patient.PatNum , CONCAT( patient.LName , ',' , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ''', patient.Preferred, '''') ELSE '' END) , ' ' , patient.FName , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(patient.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ', patient.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatName' , TRIM(BOTH FROM CONCAT(patient.Address, ' ', patient.Address2)) AS 'StreetAddress' , patient.Address2 , patient.City , patient.State , patient.Zip , patient.Email , ( SELECT MAX(appointment.AptDateTime) FROM patient family INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = family.PatNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 2 WHERE family.Guarantor = patient.PatNum ) AS 'DateLastVisit' , ( SELECT MIN(appointment.AptDateTime) FROM patient family INNER JOIN appointment ON appointment.PatNum = family.PatNum AND appointment.AptStatus = 1 AND appointment.AptDateTime > NOW() WHERE family.Guarantor = patient.PatNum ) AS 'DateNextVisit' , guarAging.Bal_0_30 , guarAging.Bal_31_60 , guarAging.Bal_61_90 , guarAging.BalOver90 , guarAging.BalTotal , guarAging.InsWoEst , guarAging.InsPayEst , guarAging.BalTotal - guarAging.InsPayEst - guarAging.InsWoEst AS 'PatEst' , guarAging.PayPlanDue , guaraging.DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT tSums.PatNum , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits >= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'BalOver90' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits <= tSums.ChargesOver90 THEN tSums.Charges_61_90 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_61_90' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 THEN tSums.Charges_31_60 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_31_60' , CAST(CASE WHEN tSums.TotalCredits < tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 THEN tSums.Charges_0_30 WHEN tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 <= tSums.TotalCredits THEN 0 ELSE tSums.ChargesOver90 + tSums.Charges_61_90 + tSums.Charges_31_60 + tSums.Charges_0_30 - tSums.TotalCredits END AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'Bal_0_30' , CAST(tSums.BalTotal AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'BalTotal' , CAST(tSums.InsWoEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsWoEst' , CAST(tSums.InsPayEst AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'InsPayEst' , CAST(tSums.PayPlanDue AS DECIMAL(14, 2)) AS 'PayPlanDue' , DATE(tSums.DateLastPay) AS 'DateLastPay' FROM ( SELECT p.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount > 0 OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'ChargesOver90' , SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount > 0 OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_61_90' , SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount > 0 OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_31_60' , SUM(CASE WHEN (trans.TranAmount > 0 OR trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) AND trans.TranDate >= DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'Charges_0_30' , -SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount < 0 AND NOT(trans.TranType IN ('WriteoffOrig')) THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'TotalCredits' , SUM(CASE WHEN trans.TranAmount != 0 THEN trans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) AS 'BalTotal' , SUM(trans.InsWoEst) AS 'InsWoEst' , SUM(trans.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst' , SUM(trans.PayPlanAmount) AS 'PayPlanDue' , MAX( CASE WHEN trans.TranType = 'PatPay' THEN trans.TranDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END ) DateLastPay FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee', payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', procedurelog.ProcNum, procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt', adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay', SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff', claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum, adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee, payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum', 0 ProcNum, DATE('0001-01-01') AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt', paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND ppl.SecDateTEntry < @AsOf + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) trans GROUP BY trans.PatNum ORDER BY NULL ) tSums ) pataging ON pataging.PatNum = patient.PatNum INNER JOIN definition billtype ON billtype.DefNum = patient.BillingType AND IF(LENGTH(@BillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(billtype.ItemName, @BillingTypes)) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pats.PatNum ,pats.CarrierName ,pats.GroupName ,pats.InsPayEst_0_30 ,pats.InsPayEst_31_60 ,pats.InsPayEst_61_90 ,pats.InsPayEst_91_120 ,pats.InsPayEst_120 ,pats.InsPayEst_Total ,IF(pats.PatNum = @prevPat ,1 ,SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(0, ',', @prevPat := pats.PatNum * 1),',',1) ) AS 'samePat' FROM ( SELECT cp.PatNum ,car.CarrierName ,ip.GroupName ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate >= @AsOf - INTERVAL 30 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst_0_30' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 31 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) 'InsPayEst_31_60' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 90 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 61 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) 'InsPayEst_61_90' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate BETWEEN @AsOf - INTERVAL 120 DAY AND @AsOf - INTERVAL 91 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) 'InsPayEst_91_120' ,SUM(CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate < @AsOf - INTERVAL 120 DAY THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst_120' ,SUM(cp.InsPayEst) AS 'InsPayEst_Total' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN claim cl ON cl.ClaimNum = cp.ClaimNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = cl.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier car ON car.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE cp.ProcDate <= @AsOf AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > @AsOf)) GROUP BY cp.PatNum, ip.GroupName, car.CarrierName HAVING (ABS(InsPayEst_Total) >=
