0.005 OR ABS(InsPayEst_0_30) > 0.005 OR ABS(InsPayEst_31_60) > 0.005 OR ABS(InsPayEst_61_90) > 0.005 OR ABS(InsPayEst_91_120) > 0.005 OR ABS(InsPayEst_120) > 0.005) ORDER BY cp.PatNum, ip.GroupName, car.CarrierName ) pats ) insaging ON insaging.PatNum = patient.PatNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(patient.PriProv, @ProvNums)) AND IF(ISNULL(DATE(@ProcedureCompletedSinceDate)), TRUE, patient.PatNum IN ( SELECT pl.PatNum FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND patient.PatNum = pl.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate >= DATE(@ProcedureCompletedSinceDate) )) AND IF(LENGTH(@Carriers) = 0,TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(insaging.CarrierName, 'None'),@Carriers)) GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', patient.PatNum, '+', IFNULL(insaging.CarrierName,'NC'), '+', IFNULL(insaging.GroupName,'NG')),'Totals') ORDER BY dup.Num, patient.LName, patient.FName, patient.PatNum, insaging.CarrierName, insaging.GroupName, guarantor.LName, guarantor.FName, guarantor.MiddleI, patient.Guarantor, patient.PatNum = patient.Guarantor DESC

request: Scheduling efficiency by operatory
query: SET @FromDate ='2025-01-01', @ToDate ='2025-01-31'; SET @Operatories =''; SET @Blockouts =''; SET @PrevType='', @Weight=0; WITH aptblk (Apts, Blks, OpNum) AS ( SELECT CAST((SUM(main.Apts) * 5) / 60 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ,CAST((SUM(main.Blks) * 5) / 60 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ,main.OpNum FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT apts.AptDate) AS 'Apts' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(!ISNULL(apts.AptDate),NULL,blk.SchedDate)) AS 'Blks' ,sched.SchedDate ,sched.OpNum FROM seq_0_to_288 seq INNER JOIN ( SELECT s1.SchedDate ,s1.StopTime ,s1.StartTime ,sop1.OperatoryNum AS 'OpNum' FROM schedule s1 INNER JOIN scheduleop sop1 ON sop1.ScheduleNum = s1.ScheduleNum WHERE s1.SchedDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND s1.SchedType = 1 ) sched ON (sched.StartTime <= SEC_TO_TIME(seq.Seq * 300) AND sched.StopTime >= SEC_TO_TIME(seq.Seq * 300) + INTERVAL 1 SECOND) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TIME(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'AptTime' ,DATE(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'AptDate' ,LENGTH(ap.Pattern) * 5 AS 'AptLength' ,ap.Op FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ap.AptStatus IN(1,2) ) apts ON (apts.AptTime <= SEC_TO_TIME(seq.Seq * 300) AND apts.AptTime + INTERVAL apts.AptLength MINUTE >= SEC_TO_TIME(seq.Seq * 300) + INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AND apts.AptDate = sched.SchedDate AND apts.Op = sched.OpNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT blk.StartTime ,blk.StopTime ,blk.SchedDate ,blkop.OperatoryNum AS 'OpNum' FROM schedule blk INNER JOIN scheduleop blkop ON blkop.ScheduleNum = blk.ScheduleNum INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = blk.BlockoutType AND IF(LENGTH(@Blockouts) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(def.ItemName,@Blockouts)) WHERE blk.SchedType = 2 AND blk.SchedDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) blk ON (blk.StartTime <= SEC_TO_TIME(seq.Seq * 300) AND blk.StopTime >= SEC_TO_TIME(seq.Seq * 300) + INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AND blk.SchedDate = sched.SchedDate AND blk.OpNum = sched.OpNum GROUP BY sched.OpNum, seq.Seq ORDER BY sched.OpNum ) main GROUP BY main.OpNum ) ,sched (OperatoryNum, Hours) AS ( SELECT hrs.OperatoryNum, COALESCE(CAST((SUM(IF(hrs.Type = 'Stop', hrs.mins, 0))-SUM(IF(hrs.Type = 'Start', hrs.mins, 0))) / 60 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)),0) AS 'Hours' FROM ( SELECT sched.SchedDate ,sched.OperatoryNum ,sched.mins ,IF(@PrevType = sched.Type, IF(@PrevType = 'Start', SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(@PrevType := sched.Type,',',@Weight := @Weight + 1),',',1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(@PrevType := sched.Type,',',@Weight := @Weight - 1),',',1) ), @PrevType := sched.Type ) AS 'Type' ,@Weight AS 'Weight' FROM ( SELECT sch.SchedDate ,sop2.OperatoryNum AS 'OperatoryNum' ,'Start' AS 'Type' ,(TIME_TO_SEC(sch.StartTime)/60) AS 'Mins' FROM schedule sch INNER JOIN scheduleop sop2 ON sop2.ScheduleNum = sch.ScheduleNum WHERE sch.SchedDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND sch.SchedType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT sch.SchedDate ,sop3.OperatoryNum ,'Stop' AS 'Type' ,(TIME_TO_SEC(sch.StopTime)/60) AS 'Mins' FROM schedule sch INNER JOIN scheduleop sop3 ON sop3.ScheduleNum = sch.ScheduleNum WHERE sch.SchedDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND sch.SchedType = 1 ORDER BY SchedDate, OperatoryNum, Mins ) sched ) hrs WHERE hrs.Weight = 0 GROUP BY hrs.OperatoryNum ) SELECT IF(dup.Seq = 1,op.OpName,'') AS 'Operatory' ,SUM(sched.Hours) AS 'Total Hours' ,SUM(aptblk.Apts) AS 'Total Booked Hours' ,SUM(aptblk.Blks) AS 'Total Blocked Hours' ,IF(dup.Seq = 1 ,CAST(sched.Hours - SUM(aptblk.Apts) - SUM(aptblk.Blks) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ,CAST(SUM(sched.Hours) - SUM(aptblk.Apts) - SUM(aptblk.Blks) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ) AS 'Total Available Hours' FROM operatory op INNER JOIN sched ON sched.OperatoryNum = op.OperatoryNum LEFT JOIN aptblk ON aptblk.OpNum = op.OperatoryNum LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_2 dup ON TRUE WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Operatories) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(op.OpName,@Operatories)) GROUP BY IF(dup.Seq = 1,op.OperatoryNum,'Total') ORDER BY dup.Seq, op.OpName, op.OperatoryNum

request: Count and percentage of currently insured Patient status patients per insurance carrier
query: SET @IncludeUninsured='No'; SELECT IFNULL(ca.CarrierName,'Uninsured') AS 'Carrier' ,COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) AS 'PatCount' ,CAST((COUNT(DISTINCT p.PatNum) / SUM(COUNT(p.PatNum)) OVER ()) * 100 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'Percent' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pp.Ordinal = 1 LEFT JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = pp.InsSubNum LEFT JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = ib.PlanNum LEFT JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND IF(@IncludeUninsured = 'No',!ISNULL(pp.PatNum),TRUE) GROUP BY IFNULL(ca.CarrierName,'Uninsured') ORDER BY IF(ISNULL(pp.PatNum),1,2), `Percent` DESC, ca.CarrierName

request: List of completed appointments in the date range, with the specified completed procedure attached.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-07-01', @ToDate='2025-07-31'; SET @ProcCode='D1110'; SELECT DATE_FORMAT(apt.SecDateTEntry, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date Appt was Booked' , IFNULL(aptu.UserName, 'None') AS 'Booked By' , apt.PatNum , IFNULL(( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(r.LName, IF(LENGTH(r.FName) = 0, '', CONCAT(', ', r.FName)) ORDER BY ra.RefDate, ra.ItemOrder ASC SEPARATOR '|'), '|', 1) FROM refattach ra INNER JOIN referral r ON r.ReferralNum = ra.ReferralNum WHERE ra.RefType = 1 AND ra.PatNum = apt.PatNum ), '') AS 'Referral Source' , DATE_FORMAT(apt.AptDateTime, '%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date of Appointment' , IFNULL(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(a.AptDateTime), '%m/%d/%Y') FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus = 1 AND a.PatNum = apt.PatNum AND a.AptDateTime > DATE(apt.AptDateTime) ), '') AS 'Next Scheduled Appointment' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN procedurelog aptproc ON aptproc.AptNum = apt.AptNum AND aptproc.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode aptcode ON aptcode.CodeNum = aptproc.CodeNum AND aptcode.ProcCode = @ProcCode INNER JOIN patient aptpat ON aptpat.PatNum = apt.PatNum LEFT JOIN userod aptu ON aptu.UserNum = apt.SecUserNumEntry WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY apt.AptNum ORDER BY `Booked By`, apt.AptDateTime, apt.PatNum

request: Monthly, Quarterly, and Annual production and income in the specified year and quarters for Secondary and Non-Secondary providers.
query: SET @Year='2025'; SET @Quarter=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @HiddenUnearnedTypes FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 29 AND definition.ItemValue = 'X'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(qdisp.Quarter ORDER BY qdisp.Quarter) INTO @QuartDisp FROM ( SELECT 'Q1' AS 'Quarter' UNION ALL SELECT 'Q2' UNION ALL SELECT 'Q3' UNION ALL SELECT 'Q4' ) qdisp WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Quarter) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(qdisp.Quarter, @Quarter)); SELECT display.request , IF(display.Num IN (2,3,7,10), '', display.TimePeriod) AS 'Time Period' , (CASE WHEN display.Num = 1 THEN @QuartDisp WHEN display.Num IN (2,3,7,10) THEN '' ELSE CONCAT('$',FORMAT(display.Production, 2)) END) AS 'Production' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', IF(display.Adjustments < -0.005, CONCAT('($',FORMAT(ABS(display.Adjustments), 2),')'), CONCAT('$',FORMAT(display.Adjustments, 2)))) AS 'Adjustments ' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(display.Writeoffs, 2))) AS 'Writeoffs' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(display.NetProduction, 2))) AS 'NetProduction' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', CONCAT(FORMAT(COALESCE(display.NetProduction / display.TotalNetProductionPerc, 0) * 100, 0), '%')) AS '% Total NetProd' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(display.TotalIncome, 2))) AS 'Total Income' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', CONCAT(FORMAT(COALESCE(display.TotalIncome / display.TotalIncomePerc, 0) * 100, 0), '%')) AS '% Total Income' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', FORMAT(display.HoursWorked, 1)) AS 'Hours Worked' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', FORMAT(display.DaysWorked, 1)) AS 'Days Worked' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE(display.NetProduction / display.HoursWorked, 0), 0))) AS 'NetProd per Hour' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE(display.TotalIncome / display.HoursWorked, 0), 0))) AS 'Income per Hour' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE(display.NetProduction / display.DaysWorked, 0), 0))) AS 'NetProd per Day' , IF(display.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE(display.TotalIncome / display.DaysWorked, 0), 0))) AS 'Income per Day' FROM ( SELECT dup.Num, dup.Type, (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN (SELECT pref.ValueString FROM preference pref WHERE pref.PrefName = 'PracticeTitle') WHEN 3 THEN IF(core.ProvType = 0, 'Non-Secondary Only - All Providers', 'Secondary Only - All Providers') WHEN 4 THEN core.MonthShort WHEN 5 THEN 'QUARTER TOTAL' WHEN 6 THEN IF(core.ProvType = 0, 'Non-Secondary Only - All Prov. Total', 'Secondary Only - All Prov. Total') WHEN 8 THEN 'Month Total' WHEN 9 THEN 'QUARTER TOTAL' WHEN 11 THEN 'GRAND TOTAL' ELSE '' END) AS 'request' , (CASE WHEN dup.Num IN (1,4,6) THEN core.Year WHEN dup.Num IN (5,9) THEN CONCAT('Q',core.Quarter) WHEN dup.Num = 8 THEN core.MonthShort WHEN dup.Num = 11 THEN @QuartDisp ELSE '' END) AS 'TimePeriod' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', SUM(core.Production)) AS 'Production' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', SUM(core.Adjustments)) AS 'Adjustments' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', SUM(core.Writeoffs)) AS 'Writeoffs' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', SUM(core.Production) + SUM(core.Adjustments) - SUM(core.Writeoffs)) AS 'NetProduction' , (CASE WHEN dup.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10) THEN '' WHEN dup.Num IN (6,8,9,11) THEN SUM(SUM(core.Production) + SUM(core.Adjustments) - SUM(core.Writeoffs)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Year ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Year) WHEN dup.Num = 4 THEN SUM(SUM(core.Production) + SUM(core.Adjustments) - SUM(core.Writeoffs)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Month ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Month) WHEN dup.Num = 5 THEN SUM(SUM(core.Production) + SUM(core.Adjustments) - SUM(core.Writeoffs)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Quarter ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Quarter) END) AS 'TotalNetProductionPerc' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)) AS 'TotalIncome' , (CASE WHEN dup.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10) THEN '' WHEN dup.Num IN (6,8,9,11) THEN SUM(SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Year ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Year) WHEN dup.Num = 4 THEN SUM(SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Month ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Month) WHEN dup.Num = 5 THEN SUM(SUM(core.PatPay) + SUM(core.InsPay)) OVER (PARTITION BY dup.Num, core.Quarter ORDER BY dup.Num, core.Quarter) END) AS 'TotalIncomePerc' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', SUM(core.HoursWorked)) AS 'HoursWorked' , IF(dup.Num IN (1,2,3,7,10), '', SUM(core.DaysWorked)) AS 'DaysWorked' FROM ( SELECT prov.ProvNum , prov.Abbr , prov.ProvType AS 'Order' , prov.ProvType , YEAR(months.Date) AS 'Year' , QUARTER(months.Date) AS 'Quarter' , LPAD(months.Month, 2, 0) AS 'Month' , DATE_FORMAT(months.Date, '%b') AS 'MonthShort' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'Proc', rawtrans.TranAmt, 0)) AS 'Production' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'Adj', rawtrans.TranAmt, 0)) AS 'Adjustments' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'ClaimProc', rawtrans.WriteOff, 0)) AS 'Writeoffs' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'PatPay', rawtrans.TranAmt, 0)) AS 'PatPay' , SUM(IF(rawtrans.TranType = 'ClaimProc', rawtrans.InsPayAmt, 0)) AS 'InsPay' , COALESCE(schedhrs.HoursWorked, 0) AS 'HoursWorked' , COALESCE(schedhrs.HoursWorked, 0) / 8 AS 'DaysWorked' FROM ( SELECT 0 AS 'ProvNum' , 'No Provider' AS 'Abbr' , '***No Provider' AS 'Order' , 0 AS 'ProvType' UNION ALL SELECT pr.ProvNum , pr.Abbr , pr.Abbr AS 'Order' , pr.IsSecondary AS 'ProvType' FROM provider pr ) prov INNER JOIN ( SELECT monthcore.Month , monthcore.Year , CONCAT(monthcore.Year, '-', LPAD(monthcore.Month, 2, 0), '-01') AS 'Date' FROM ( SELECT mth.seq AS 'Month' , @Year AS 'Year' FROM seq_1_to_12 mth ) monthcore ) months ON TRUE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProvNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) - COALESCE(SUM(cp.Writeoff), 0) AS 'TranAmt' , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM procedurelog pl LEFT JOIN claimproc cp ON cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status = 7 WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(LENGTH(@Year) = 0, NULL, pl.ProcDate BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year, '-12-31')) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , adj.ProvNum , adj.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , adj.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmt' , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM adjustment adj WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Year) = 0, NULL, adj.AdjDate BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year, '-12-31')) UNION ALL SELECT 'ClaimProc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ProvNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmt' , cp.WriteOff AS 'WriteOff' , IF(cp.ClaimPaymentNum != 0 , cp.InsPayAmt, 0) AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND IF(LENGTH(@Year) = 0, NULL, cp.DateCP BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year, '-12-31')) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.ProvNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , ps.SplitAmt AS 'TranAmt' , 0 AS 'WriteOff' , 0 AS 'InsPayAmt' FROM paysplit ps WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Year) = 0, NULL, ps.DatePay BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year, '-12-31')) AND IF(ISNULL(@HiddenUnearnedTypes), TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(ps.UnearnedType, @HiddenUnearnedTypes)) ORDER BY `TranType`, `TranDate` ) rawtrans ON rawtrans.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum AND MONTH(rawtrans.TranDate) = months.Month AND YEAR(rawtrans.TranDate) = months.Year LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MONTH(ce.TimeDisplayed1) AS 'Month' , YEAR(ce.TimeDisplayed1) AS 'Year' , DATE_FORMAT(ce.TimeDisplayed1, '%b %Y') AS 'MonthYear' , uo.ProvNum , CAST(SUM(TIME_TO_SEC( (CASE WHEN ce.TimeDisplayed2 > ce.TimeDisplayed1 AND ce.ClockStatus IN (0,1) THEN TIMEDIFF(ce.TimeDisplayed2, ce.TimeDisplayed1) WHEN ce.ClockStatus = 2 THEN 0 ELSE TIMEDIFF(NOW(), ce.TimeDisplayed1) END) )) / 3600 AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS 'HoursWorked' FROM employee emp INNER JOIN userod uo ON uo.EmployeeNum = emp.EmployeeNum AND uo.ProvNum != 0 INNER JOIN clockevent ce ON ce.EmployeeNum = emp.EmployeeNum AND (IF(@Year = YEAR(CURDATE()) , ce.TimeDisplayed1 BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year, '-01-01') AND CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY , ce.TimeDisplayed1 BETWEEN CONCAT(@Year, '-01-01') AND CONCAT(@Year, '-12-31') + INTERVAL 1 DAY ) ) GROUP BY uo.ProvNum, YEAR(ce.TimeDisplayed1), MONTH(ce.TimeDisplayed1) ) schedhrs ON schedhrs.ProvNum = prov.ProvNum AND schedhrs.Month = months.Month AND schedhrs.Year = months.Year GROUP BY prov.ProvNum, months.Year, months.Month HAVING IF(LENGTH(@Quarter) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(CONCAT('Q', `Quarter`), @Quarter)) ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num', 'MainHeader' AS 'Type' UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'HeaderSeparator' UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'ProvTypeHeader' UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'ProvTypeMonth' UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'ProvTypeQuarter' UNION ALL SELECT 6, 'ProvTypeTotal' UNION ALL SELECT 7, 'ProvTypeSeparator' UNION ALL SELECT 8, 'MonthTotal' UNION ALL SELECT 9, 'QuarterTotal' UNION ALL SELECT 10, 'QuarterSeparator' UNION ALL SELECT 11, 'GrandTotal' ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Type IN ('MainHeader', 'HeaderSeparator', 'GrandTotal') THEN dup.Num WHEN dup.Type IN ('ProvTypeHeader', 'ProvTypeSeparator', 'ProvTypeTotal') THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.ProvType) WHEN dup.Type = 'ProvTypeMonth' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.ProvType, '+', core.Month) WHEN dup.Type = 'ProvTypeQuarter' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.ProvType, '+', core.Quarter) WHEN dup.Type = 'MonthTotal' THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.Month) WHEN dup.Type IN ('QuarterTotal', 'QuarterSeparator') THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '+', core.Quarter) END) ORDER BY ELT(dup.Num, 1,2,3,3,3,3,3,4,4,4,5) , (CASE WHEN dup.Num = 3 THEN CONCAT(core.Order, '+', core.Order) WHEN dup.Num IN (6,7) THEN CONCAT(core.Order, '+', dup.Num) WHEN dup.Num IN (4,5,8,9,10) THEN CONCAT(core.Order, '+', core.Quarter, '+', LPAD(dup.Num, 2, 0), '+', core.Month) ELSE dup.Num END) ) display

request: Treatment plan statistics by provider
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @LastProc=0; SET @LastProvNum=0; SET @IsDup=0; SELECT (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN main.Abbr WHEN 2 THEN 'Totals:' END) AS 'Provider' ,COUNT(DISTINCT main.TreatPlanNum) AS ' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(main.ProcStatus = 1 , main.ProcNum, NULL)) AS ' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(main.AptNum != 0, main.ProcNum, NULL)) AS ' ,COUNT(DISTINCT IF(main.ProcStatus = 2 , main.ProcNum, NULL)) AS ' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 1 , main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) WHEN 2 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 1 AND main.IsDup=0, main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) END) AS 'GrossTPAmt' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 1 AND main.AptNum != 0, main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) WHEN 2 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 1 AND main.AptNum != 0 AND main.IsDup=0, main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) END) AS 'GrossSchedAmt' ,(CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 2 , main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) WHEN 2 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 2 AND main.IsDup=0, main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) END) AS 'GrossCompAmt' ,CONCAT(CAST((( (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 1 AND main.AptNum != 0, main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) WHEN 2 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 1 AND main.AptNum != 0 AND main.IsDup=0, main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) END) + (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 2 , main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) WHEN 2 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 2 AND main.IsDup=0, main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) END)) / ((CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 1 , main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) WHEN 2 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 1 AND main.IsDup=0, main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) END) + (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 2 , main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) WHEN 2 THEN CAST(IFNULL(SUM(IF(main.ProcStatus = 2 AND main.IsDup=0, main.Fee, NULL)), 0) AS DECIMAL (14,2)) END)) * 100) AS DECIMAL (14,2)), '%') AS 'Percentage' FROM( SELECT core.TreatPlanNum ,core.Abbr ,core.ProvNum ,core.ProcNum ,core.ProcStatus ,core.AptNum ,(CASE WHEN core.ProcNum = @LastProc AND core.ProvNum = @LastProvNum THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT('', ',', @IsDup := @IsDup * 0),',', 1) WHEN core.ProcNum = @LastProc AND core.ProvNum != @LastProvNum THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(core.Fee, ',', @LastProvNum := core.ProvNum, @IsDup := @IsDup + 1), ',', 1) ELSE SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(core.Fee, ',', @LastProc := core.ProcNum, @LastProvNum := core.ProvNum, @IsDup := @IsDup * 0), ',', 1) END) AS 'Fee' ,@IsDup AS 'IsDup' FROM( SELECT tp.TreatPlanNum ,pr.Abbr ,pr.ProvNum ,pl.ProcNum ,pl.ProcStatus ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) AS 'Fee' ,a.AptNum FROM treatplan tp INNER JOIN proctp ptp ON ptp.TreatPlanNum = tp.TreatPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ptp.ProcNumOrig AND pl.ProcStatus IN(1,2) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = ptp.ProvNum LEFT JOIN appointment a ON a.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND a.AptStatus = 1 WHERE tp.TPStatus = 0 AND tp.DateTP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ORDER BY pl.ProcNum, tp.TreatplanNum, pr.ProvNum LIMIT 99999999 ) core ) main INNER JOIN( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num=1, CONCAT(main.ProvNum,'+',dup.Num), dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, main.Abbr, main.ProvNum

request: Currently scheduled appointments that were moved in a date range to a new operatory.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Providers=''; SET @Operatories=''; SET @PatNumber=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr,@Providers); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(operatory.OperatoryNum) INTO @OpNums FROM operatory WHERE FIND_IN_SET(operatory.OpName,@Operatories); SELECT core.HistDateTStamp AS 'Appointment Moved Date' , core.PatNum , core.PrevAptDateTime AS 'Prev AptDateTime' , ( SELECT opPrev.OpName FROM operatory opPrev WHERE opPrev.OperatoryNum = core.PrevOp ) AS 'Prev Op' , ( SELECT provPrev.Abbr FROM provider provPrev WHERE provPrev.ProvNum = core.PrevProvNum ) AS 'Prev Prov' , COALESCE(( SELECT hygPrev.Abbr FROM provider hygPrev WHERE hygPrev.ProvNum = core.PrevProvHyg ),'') AS 'Prev Hyg' , core.NewAptDateTime AS 'New AptDateTime' , ( SELECT op.OpName FROM operatory op WHERE op.OperatoryNum = core.NewOp ) AS 'New Op' , ( SELECT provNew.Abbr FROM provider provNew WHERE provNew.ProvNum = core.NewProvNum ) AS 'New Prov' , COALESCE(( SELECT hygNew.Abbr FROM provider hygNew WHERE hygNew.ProvNum = core.NewProvHyg ),'') AS 'New Hyg' FROM ( SELECT histapt.HistDateTStamp , histapt.HistApptAction , histapt.PatNum , histapt.AptNum , LAG(histapt.AptDateTime,1) OVER perApt AS 'PrevAptDateTime' , LAG(histapt.Op,1) OVER perApt AS 'PrevOp' , LAG(histapt.ProvNum,1) OVER perApt AS 'PrevProvNum' , LAG(histapt.ProvHyg,1) OVER perApt AS 'PrevProvHyg' , histapt.AptDateTime AS 'NewAptDateTime' , histapt.Op AS 'NewOp' , histapt.ProvNum AS 'NewProvNum' , histapt.ProvHyg AS 'NewProvHyg' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN histappointment histapt ON histapt.AptNum = apt.AptNum AND ((histapt.HistDateTStamp BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND histapt.HistApptAction = 1 AND histapt.Op != 0) OR histapt.HistApptAction = 0) WHERE apt.AptStatus = 1 AND IF(LENGTH(@PatNumber) = 0 ,TRUE,apt.PatNum = @PatNumber) WINDOW perApt AS (PARTITION BY histapt.AptNum ORDER BY histapt.AptNum,histapt.HistDateTStamp,histapt.HistApptNum) ORDER BY histapt.AptNum,histapt.HistDateTStamp,histapt.HistApptNum LIMIT 99999999 ) core WHERE core.HistApptAction = 1 AND core.PrevOp != core.NewOp AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers)=0 , TRUE , (FIND_IN_SET(core.PrevProvNum,@ProvNums) OR FIND_IN_SET(core.PrevProvHyg,@ProvNums) OR FIND_IN_SET(core.NewProvNum,@ProvNums) OR FIND_IN_SET(core.NewProvHyg,@ProvNums) ) ) AND IF(LENGTH(@Operatories)=0 , TRUE , (FIND_IN_SET(core.PrevOp,@OpNums) OR FIND_IN_SET(core.NewOp,@OpNums) ) )

request: Patient status patients with a specified fee schedule set as the Allowed Fee Schedule
query: SET @PatsNotSeen=''; SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @FeeSchedules=''; SET @PriOrAll=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @Broken FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D9986', 'D9987'); SELECT p.PatNum , p.PatStatus , fs.request AS 'Fee Schedule' , IFNULL(ELT(pp.Ordinal, 'Primary', 'Secondary', 'Tertiary'),'Other') AS 'Which Plan' , (CASE ip.PlanType WHEN '' THEN 'Category Percentage' WHEN 'p' THEN (CASE WHEN ip.CopayFeeSched > 0 AND ( SELECT fs1.FeeSchedType FROM feesched fs1 WHERE fs1.FeeSchedNum = ip.CopayFeeSched ) = 3 THEN 'PPO Fixed Benefit' ELSE 'PPO Percentage' END) WHEN 'f' THEN 'Medicaid/Flat Co-Pay' WHEN 'c' THEN 'Capitation' END) AS 'Plan Type' , ( SELECT ca.CarrierName FROM carrier ca WHERE ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum ) AS 'Carrier' , ip.GroupName , ip.GroupNum FROM patient p INNER JOIN patplan pp ON p.PatNum = pp.PatNum AND IF(@PriOrAll = 'Primary', pp.Ordinal = 1 , TRUE) INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fs.FeeSchedNum = ip.AllowedFeeSched AND IF(LENGTH(@FeeSchedules) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(fs.request, @FeeSchedules)) LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @Broken) WHERE p.PatStatus = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PatsNotSeen = 'No' THEN pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) WHEN @PatsNotSeen = 'Only' THEN ISNULL(pl.PatNum) ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY p.PatNum, pp.PatPlanNum ORDER BY p.LName, p.FName, pp.PatNum, pp.Ordinal, pp.PatPlanNum, fs.request, fs.FeeSchedNum

request: Treatment acceptance percentages per presenter for treatment on saved treatment plans that was scheduled or completed
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2025-12-31'; SET @ExcludedCodes='N,D0,D1'; SET @CodeExcl=REPLACE(@ExcludedCodes, ',', '|'); SELECT uod.UserName AS 'User' ,FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM( (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus = 1 AND !ISNULL(a.AptNum) THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) WHEN pl.ProcStatus = 2 THEN pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty) ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.BaseUnits + pl.UnitQty)) * 100, 0), 1) AS 'TxAcceptance%' ,FORMAT(IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN pl.ProcStatus = 1 AND !ISNULL(a.AptNum) THEN tp.PatNum WHEN pl.ProcStatus = 2 THEN tp.PatNum ELSE NULL END)) / COUNT(DISTINCT tp.PatNum) * 100, 0), 1) AS 'PatAcceptance%' FROM ( SELECT uo.UserName ,uo.UserNum FROM userod uo UNION ALL SELECT 'None' AS 'UserName' ,0 AS 'UserNum' ) uod INNER JOIN treatplan tp ON tp.UserNumPresenter = uod.UserNum AND tp.TPStatus = 0 AND tp.DateTP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) INNER JOIN proctp ptp ON ptp.TreatPlanNum = tp.TreatPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.ProcNum = ptp.ProcNumOrig INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludedCodes) = 0, TRUE, pc.ProcCode NOT REGEXP @CodeExcl) LEFT JOIN appointment a ON a.AptNum = pl.AptNum AND a.AptStatus = 1 GROUP BY uod.UserNum ORDER BY uod.UserNum

request: New and Returning Patients
query: SET @FromDate='2021-09-01', @ToDate='2025-10-31'; SET @Clinics=''; SET @NewPatYearsSinceLastAppt='3'; SET @ImageCat = 'Patient Pictures'; SET @Clinics = (CASE WHEN LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0 THEN '^' ELSE CONCAT('^',REPLACE(@Clinics,',','$|^'),'$') END); SELECT ValueString INTO @EasyNoClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT IFNULL(clin.Abbr,'None') AS 'Clinic' ,(CASE WHEN p.Birthdate = '0001-01-01' THEN 'N/A' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.Birthdate,core.VisDate) <= 13 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'A' END) AS 'Adult/Youth' ,CONCAT(p.LName,', ',p.FName) AS 'Patient Name' ,DATE_FORMAT(core.VisDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date of Exam' ,IF(core.Type LIKE 'Return%','Yes','No') AS 'Old/New' ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(IF(r.PatNum != 0,'PT: ','O: '), r.LName, IF(LENGTH(r.FName) = 0,'',CONCAT(', ',r.FName))) ORDER BY IF(r.PatNum = 0,1,0), ra.RefAttachNum SEPARATOR ';') FROM referral r INNER JOIN refattach ra ON ra.ReferralNum = r.ReferralNum AND ra.RefType = 1 WHERE ra.PatNum = p.PatNum ),'') AS 'Referral Source' ,IFNULL(( SELECT u.UserName FROM userod u WHERE u.UserNum = core.Creator ),'UNKNOWN') AS 'Scheduled By' ,DATE_FORMAT(core.CreationDate,'%m/%d/%Y') AS 'Date Scheduled' ,( SELECT pr.Abbr FROM provider pr WHERE pr.ProvNum = core.ProvNum ) AS 'Provider' ,( SELECT pn.Treatment FROM patientnote pn WHERE pn.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'NP Interview' ,IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ca.CarrierName) FROM patplan pp INNER JOIN inssub ib ON ib.InsSubNum = pp.InsSubNum INNER JOIN insplan ip ON ip.PlanNum = ib.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ca.CarrierNum = ip.CarrierNum WHERE pp.Ordinal = 1 AND pp.PatNum = p.PatNum ),'Self') AS 'Dental Insurance' ,IFNULL(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(aptnxt.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%Y') FROM appointment aptnxt WHERE aptnxt.AptStatus IN (1,2) AND aptnxt.AptDateTime > core.VisDate AND aptnxt.PatNum = p.PatNum ),'') AS 'Next Appointment' ,( SELECT IF(COUNT(DISTINCT doc.DocNum) >= 1,'Yes','No') FROM document doc INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = doc.DocCategory AND def.ItemName = @ImageCat WHERE doc.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'Photo' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT ap.PatNum ,'FirstComp' AS 'Type' ,NULL AS 'AptNum' ,MIN(ap.AptDateTime) AS 'VisDate' ,GROUP_CONCAT(ap.ClinicNum ORDER BY ap.AptDateTime, ap.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'ClinicNum' ,GROUP_CONCAT(ap.SecUserNumEntry ORDER BY ap.AptDateTime, ap.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'Creator' ,GROUP_CONCAT(ap.SecDateTEntry ORDER BY ap.AptDateTime, ap.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'CreationDate' ,GROUP_CONCAT(ap.ProvNum ORDER BY ap.AptDateTime, ap.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'ProvNum' FROM appointment ap WHERE ap.AptStatus = 2 AND ap.AptDateTime <= CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY ap.PatNum HAVING `VisDate` BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY UNION ALL SELECT apt1.PatNum ,'ReturnComp' AS 'Type' ,apt1.AptNum ,apt1.FirstInDR AS 'VisDate' ,apt1.ClinicNum ,apt1.Creator ,apt1.CreationDate ,apt1.ProvNum FROM ( SELECT a.PatNum ,MIN(a.AptDateTime) AS 'FirstInDR' ,GROUP_CONCAT(a.AptNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, a.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'AptNum' ,GROUP_CONCAT(a.ClinicNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, a.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'ClinicNum' ,GROUP_CONCAT(a.SecUserNumEntry ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, a.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'Creator' ,GROUP_CONCAT(a.SecDateTEntry ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, a.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'CreationDate' ,GROUP_CONCAT(a.ProvNum ORDER BY a.AptDateTime, a.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'ProvNum' FROM appointment a WHERE a.AptStatus = 2 AND a.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND a.AptDateTime <= CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY a.PatNum ) apt1 INNER JOIN appointment apt ON apt.PatNum = apt1.PatNum AND apt.AptDateTime <= DATE(@FromDate) AND apt.AptStatus = 2 GROUP BY apt1.PatNum HAVING apt1.FirstInDR >= MAX(apt.AptDateTime) + INTERVAL @NewPatYearsSinceLastAppt YEAR UNION ALL SELECT firstvis.PatNum ,'FirstSched' AS 'Type' ,GROUP_CONCAT(firstvis.AptNum ORDER BY firstvis.AptDateTime, firstvis.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'AptNum' ,MIN(firstvis.AptDateTime) AS 'VisDate' ,GROUP_CONCAT(firstvis.ClinicNum ORDER BY firstvis.AptDateTime, firstvis.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'ClinicNum' ,GROUP_CONCAT(firstvis.SecUserNumEntry ORDER BY firstvis.AptDateTime, firstvis.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'Creator' ,GROUP_CONCAT(firstvis.SecDateTEntry ORDER BY firstvis.AptDateTime, firstvis.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'CreationDate' ,GROUP_CONCAT(firstvis.ProvNum ORDER BY firstvis.AptDateTime, firstvis.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'ProvNum' FROM appointment firstvis LEFT JOIN appointment excl ON excl.PatNum = firstvis.PatNum AND excl.AptStatus = 2 AND excl.AptDateTime <= CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY WHERE firstvis.AptStatus = 1 AND ISNULL(excl.PatNum) GROUP BY firstvis.PatNum HAVING `VisDate` BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND `VisDate` > CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY UNION ALL SELECT sched1.PatNum ,'ReturnSched' AS 'Type' ,sched1.AptNum ,sched1.FirstInDR AS 'VisDate' ,sched1.ClinicNum ,sched1.Creator ,sched1.CreationDate ,sched1.ProvNum FROM ( SELECT sched.PatNum ,MIN(sched.AptDateTime) AS 'FirstInDR' ,GROUP_CONCAT(sched.AptNum ORDER BY sched.AptDateTime, sched.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'AptNum' ,GROUP_CONCAT(sched.ClinicNum ORDER BY sched.AptDateTime, sched.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'ClinicNum' ,GROUP_CONCAT(sched.SecUserNumEntry ORDER BY sched.AptDateTime, sched.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'Creator' ,GROUP_CONCAT(sched.SecDateTEntry ORDER BY sched.AptDateTime, sched.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'CreationDate' ,GROUP_CONCAT(sched.ProvNum ORDER BY sched.AptDateTime, sched.AptNum LIMIT 1) AS 'ProvNum' FROM appointment sched WHERE sched.AptStatus = 1 AND sched.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND sched.AptDateTime >= CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY sched.PatNum ) sched1 INNER JOIN appointment prior ON prior.PatNum = sched1.PatNum AND prior.AptDateTime < sched1.FirstInDR AND prior.AptStatus IN (1,2) GROUP BY sched1.PatNum HAVING sched1.FirstInDR >= MAX(prior.AptDateTime) + INTERVAL @NewPatYearsSinceLastAppt YEAR ) core ON core.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = core.ClinicNum WHERE (CASE WHEN @EasyNoClinics = 0 THEN IFNULL(clin.Abbr,'None') REGEXP @Clinics ELSE TRUE END)

request: New patient utilization per provider
query: SET @FromDate='2021-01-01', @ToDate='2025-02-28'; SET @Providers=''; SET @MonthsSince='6'; SET @Months=CAST(IF(LENGTH(@MonthsSince) = 0,0,@MonthsSince) AS UNSIGNED); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @Broken FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D9986','D9987'); SELECT IF(dup.Num = 1,pr.Abbr,'') AS 'Provider' ,COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum) AS 'New Patients' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod),2) AS 'Total Gross Production' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PtInc + core.InsInc),2) AS 'Total Collections' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.Prod) / COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum),2) AS 'Average Gross Production' ,FORMAT(SUM(core.PtInc + core.InsInc) / COUNT(DISTINCT core.PatNum),2) AS 'Average Collections' FROM provider pr INNER JOIN ( SELECT pl1.PatNum ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pl1.ProvNum) AS 'Provs' ,vis1.Date ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(prod.ProcFee * (prod.UnitQty + prod.BaseUnits)) FROM procedurelog prod WHERE prod.ProcStatus = 2 AND prod.ProcDate BETWEEN pl1.ProcDate AND pl1.ProcDate + INTERVAL @Months MONTH AND prod.PatNum = pl1.PatNum ),0) AS 'Prod' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN pl1.ProcDate AND pl1.ProcDate + INTERVAL @Months MONTH AND ps.PatNum = pl1.PatNum ),0) AS 'PtInc' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.DateCP BETWEEN pl1.ProcDate AND pl1.ProcDate + INTERVAL @Months MONTH AND cp.PatNum = pl1.PatNum ),0) AS 'InsInc' FROM ( SELECT pl.PatNum ,MIN(pl.ProcDate) AS 'Date' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum,@Broken) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY pl.PatNum HAVING `Date` BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) ) vis1 INNER JOIN procedurelog pl1 ON pl1.ProcDate = vis1.Date AND pl1.PatNum = vis1.PatNum AND pl1.ProcStatus = 2 GROUP BY vis1.PatNum ) core ON FIND_IN_SET(pr.ProvNum,core.Provs) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION SELECT 2 ) dup ON TRUE WHERE !pr.IsSecondary AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Providers)) GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1,CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',pr.ProvNum),dup.Num)

request: Procedures Overpaid (like internal). Showing adjustments, writeoffs, insurance payments, and patient payments
query: SET @FromDate ='2021-01-01', @ToDate ='2025-01-31'; SET @Providers =''; SET @Clinics =''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @UnearnedNoShow FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 29 AND definition.ItemValue = 'X'; SELECT a.PatNum ,a.ProcDate AS 'Date' ,a.ProcCode AS 'Code' ,a.ToothNum AS 'Tth' ,a.Abbr AS 'Prov' ,CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.Fee),0),2)) AS 'Fee' ,IF(a.InsPayAmt < 0.00 ,CONCAT('($',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.InsPayAmt * -1),0),2),')') ,CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.InsPayAmt),0),2)) ) AS 'Ins Paid' ,IF(a.WriteOff < 0.00 ,CONCAT('($',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.WriteOff * -1),0),2),')') ,CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.WriteOff),0),2)) ) AS 'Write-off' ,IF(a.PatPayAmt < 0.00 ,CONCAT('($',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.PatPayAmt * -1),0),2),')') ,CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.PatPayAmt),0),2)) ) AS 'Pt Paid' ,IF(a.AdjAmt < 0.00 ,CONCAT('($',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.AdjAmt * -1),0),2),')') ,CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.AdjAmt),0),2)) ) AS 'Adjust' ,IF((a.Fee - a.InsPayAmt - a.WriteOff - a.PatPayAmt + a.AdjAmt) < 0.00 ,CONCAT('($',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.Fee - a.InsPayAmt - a.WriteOff - a.PatPayAmt + a.AdjAmt) * -1,0),2),')') ,CONCAT('$',FORMAT(COALESCE((a.Fee - a.InsPayAmt - a.WriteOff - a.PatPayAmt + a.AdjAmt),0),2)) ) AS 'Overpayment' FROM ( SELECT p.PatNum ,pl.ToothNum ,pl.ProcNum ,pc.ProcCode ,pl.ProcDate ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'Fee' ,p.LName ,p.FName ,pr.Abbr ,IFNULL((SELECT SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,3,4,5) ),0) AS 'InsPayAmt' ,IFNULL((SELECT SUM(cp.WriteOff) FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (0,1,3,4,5) ),0) AS 'WriteOff' ,IFNULL((SELECT SUM(ps.SplitAmt) FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum AND IF(ISNULL(@UnearnedNoShow),TRUE,NOT FIND_IN_SET(ps.UnearnedType,@UnearnedNoShow)) ),0) AS 'PatPayAmt' ,IFNULL((SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'AdjAmt' FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = pl.PatNum INNER JOIN provider pr ON pr.ProvNum = pl.ProvNum AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr,@Providers)) LEFT JOIN clinic clin ON clin.ClinicNum = pl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics) = 0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(clin.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinics)) AND pl.ProcFee >= 0.00 GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) a WHERE (a.Fee - a.InsPayAmt - a.WriteOff - a.PatPayAmt + a.AdjAmt) < -0.005 ORDER BY a.ProcDate, a.LName, a.FName, a.ProcCode, a.Abbr, a.PatNum, a.ProcNum

request: List of completed appointments in the date range with demographics
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01',@ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Composites='D23330,D2331,D2391'; SET @Sealants='D1351'; SET @Crowns='D2932'; SET @PulpTx='D3120'; SET @Extractions='D7140'; SELECT DATE(apt.AptDateTime) AS 'Date of Service' , IF(p.Birthdate = '0001-01-01', 'Unknown', TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthdate, apt.AptDateTime)) AS 'Age' , p.Gender , p.City , p.Zip , p.County , IF(ISNULL(( SELECT MIN(ftapt.AptDateTime) AS 'FirstAppt' FROM appointment ftapt WHERE ftapt.AptStatus = 2 AND ftapt.PatNum = p.PatNum HAVING FirstAppt = apt.AptDateTime )), 'No', 'Yes') AS 'New Patient' , IF(ISNULL(( SELECT MIN(ftapt.AptDateTime) AS 'FirstAppt' FROM appointment ftapt WHERE ftapt.AptStatus = 2 AND ftapt.PatNum = p.PatNum HAVING FirstAppt = apt.AptDateTime )), 'Yes', 'No') AS 'Returning Patient' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @Composites), 1, 0)) AS 'Composites' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @Sealants), 1, 0)) AS 'Sealants' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @Crowns), 1, 0)) AS 'Crowns' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @PulpTx), 1, 0)) AS 'Pulp Treatments' , SUM(IF(FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode, @Extractions), 1, 0)) AS 'Extractions' , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (CASE pr.Race WHEN 6 THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN 10 THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 11 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyEthnicity' WHEN -1 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdcrec) > 0 THEN IF(pr.CdcrecCode = 'ASKU-ETHNICITY', 'Declined To Specify', ( SELECT cdcrec.request FROM cdcrec WHERE cdcrec.CdcrecCode = pr.CdcrecCode AND cdcrec.HeirarchicalCode LIKE 'E%' )) ELSE (CASE pr.CdcrecCode WHEN '2135-2' THEN 'Hispanic' WHEN '2186-5' THEN 'NotHispanic' WHEN 'ASKU-ETHNICITY' THEN 'Declined To Specify' ELSE NULL END) END) ELSE NULL END) ORDER BY IF(FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)=0,pr.cdcreccode,FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)) SEPARATOR ','), 'None') AS 'Ethnicity' , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (CASE pr.Race WHEN 0 THEN 'Aboriginal' WHEN 1 THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN 2 THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Asian' WHEN 4 THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN 5 THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN 7 THEN 'Multiracial' WHEN 8 THEN 'Other' WHEN 9 THEN 'White' WHEN -1 THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdcrec) > 0 THEN IF(pr.CdcrecCode = 'ASKU-RACE', 'Declined To Specify', ( SELECT cdcrec.request FROM cdcrec WHERE cdcrec.CdcrecCode = pr.CdcrecCode AND cdcrec.HeirarchicalCode LIKE 'R%' )) ELSE (CASE pr.CdcrecCode WHEN '2054-5' THEN 'AfricanAmerican' WHEN '1002-5' THEN 'AmericanIndian' WHEN '2028-9' THEN 'Asian' WHEN 'ASKU-RACE' THEN 'DeclinedToSpecifyRace' WHEN '2076-8' THEN 'HawaiiOrPacIsland' WHEN '2131-1' THEN 'Other' WHEN '2106-3' THEN 'White' ELSE NULL END) END) ELSE NULL END) ORDER BY IF(FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11) = 0,pr.cdcreccode,FIELD(pr.Race,0,1,2,3,5,7,8,9,4,6,10,11)) SEPARATOR ','), 'None') AS 'Race' , p.MedUrgNote AS 'Med Urg Note' FROM appointment apt INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = apt.PatNum LEFT JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.AptNum = apt.AptNum LEFT JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum LEFT JOIN patientrace pr ON pr.PatNum = p.PatNum WHERE apt.AptStatus = 2 AND apt.AptDateTime BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY apt.AptNum ORDER BY apt.AptDateTime, apt.AptNum

request: Patients with a completed exam code in a date range that also have a Referred From referral.
query: SET @FromDate='2025-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @ExamCodes='D0140,D0180'; SELECT (CASE dup.Num WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN 'Referral Office' ELSE core.ReferralSource END) AS 'Referral Office' , (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN core.PatientName WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN 'Count of Exams' WHEN 4 THEN SUM(core.ProcCount) END) AS 'Patient Name' , (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(core.Production,2) WHEN 2 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN 'Total Production' WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(core.Production),2) END) AS 'Total Production' FROM ( SELECT refs.LastReferralNum , ( SELECT CONCAT(ref.FName,IF(LENGTH(ref.FName),' ',''),ref.LName) FROM referral ref WHERE ref.ReferralNum = refs.LastReferralNum ) AS 'ReferralSource' , p.PatNum , CONCAT( p.LName , ',' , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.Preferred) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' \'',p.Preferred,'\'') ELSE '' END) , ' ' , p.FName , (CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.MiddleI) > 0 THEN CONCAT(' ',p.MiddleI) ELSE '' END) ) AS 'PatientName' , COUNT(pl.ProcNum) AS 'ProcCount' , ( SELECT SUM(pl2.ProcFee * (pl2.BaseUnits + pl2.UnitQty)) FROM procedurelog pl2 WHERE pl2.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl2.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl2.PatNum = p.PatNum ) AS 'Production' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pc.CodeNum = pl.CodeNum AND FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ExamCodes) INNER JOIN ( SELECT ra.PatNum , SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(ra.ReferralNum ORDER BY ra.RefDate DESC,ra.ItemOrder DESC),',',1) AS 'LastReferralNum' FROM refattach ra WHERE ra.RefType = 1 GROUP BY ra.PatNum ) refs ON refs.PatNum = p.PatNum GROUP BY p.PatNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',core.PatNum) WHEN 4 THEN CONCAT(dup.Num,'+',core.LastReferralNum) ELSE dup.Num END) ORDER BY dup.Num,IF(dup.Num=1,core.PatientName,NULL),IF(dup.Num=4,SUM(core.ProcCount),NULL) DESC,IF(dup.Num=4,SUM(core.Production),NULL) DESC,core.ReferralSource,core.PatNum,core.LastReferralNum

request: Insurance Fee Verification
query: SET @FromDate='2020-01-01', @ToDate='2025-01-31'; SET @Provider='%%'; SET @ProcCodes=''; SET @Carrier='%%'; SET @Clinics=''; SELECT core.Clinic ,core.Provider ,core.PatNum ,core.Carrier ,core.ProcDate ,core.ProcCode ,FORMAT(core.ProcFee,2) AS 'Production' ,FORMAT(core.Wo,2) AS 'WriteOff' ,FORMAT(core.Adj,2) AS 'AdjAmt' ,FORMAT(core.PriPaid, 2) AS 'InsPd' ,FORMAT(core.ProcFee + core.Adj - core.Wo,2) AS 'NetProduction' ,core.FeeSchedDesc AS 'FeeSchedName' ,FORMAT(core.FeeSchedFee,2) AS 'FeeSchedFee' ,FORMAT(core.ProcFee + core.Adj - core.Wo - core.FeeSchedFee,2) AS 'FeeSchedDifference' ,IF(!ISNULL(core.SecIns),'X','') AS 'SecIns' ,core.LastPayEntry AS 'LastInsEntryDate' ,core.LastPayDate AS 'LastInsPayDate' FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Clinic' ,pr.Abbr AS 'Provider' ,pl.PatNum ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ca.CarrierName ORDER BY c.ClaimNum, ca.CarrierName, ca.CarrierNum) AS 'Carrier' ,pl.ProcDate ,pc.ProcCode ,pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits) AS 'ProcFee' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(cp1.Writeoff) FROM claimproc cp1 WHERE cp1.Status IN (1,4) AND cp1.Writeoff != 0 AND cp1.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'Wo' ,IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(adj.AdjAmt) FROM adjustment adj WHERE adj.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ),0) AS 'Adj' ,( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT fee.Amount ORDER BY fee.FeeNum) FROM fee INNER JOIN feesched fs ON fee.FeeSched = fs.FeeSchedNum WHERE fee.ProvNum = 0 AND fee.ClinicNum = 0 AND fs.FeeSchedNum = ip.FeeSched AND fee.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum ) AS 'FeeSchedFee' ,( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT fs.request ORDER BY fs.request, fs.FeeSchedNum) FROM feesched fs WHERE fs.FeeSchedNum = ip.FeeSched ) AS 'FeeSchedDesc' ,( SELECT MAX(cp2.ProcNum) FROM claimproc cp2 INNER JOIN claim c1 ON c1.ClaimNum = cp2.ClaimNum AND c1.ClaimType = 'S' WHERE !cp2.NoBillIns AND cp2.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ) AS 'SecIns' ,( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(cp3.DateEntry ORDER BY cp3.DateEntry, cp3.ClaimProcNum DESC SEPARATOR '|'),'|',1) FROM claimproc cp3 WHERE cp3.Status IN (1,4) AND cp3.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ) AS 'LastPayEntry' ,( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(cp3.DateCP ORDER BY cp3.DateCP, cp3.ClaimProcNum DESC SEPARATOR '|'),'|',1) FROM claimproc cp3 WHERE cp3.Status IN (1,4) AND cp3.ProcNum = pl.ProcNum ) AS 'LastPayDate' ,SUM(cp.InsPayAmt) AS 'PriPaid' ,pl.ProcNum FROM procedurelog pl INNER JOIN procedurecode pc ON pl.CodeNum = pc.CodeNum AND IF(LENGTH(@ProcCodes)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ProcCodes)) INNER JOIN provider pr ON pl.ProvNum = pr.ProvNum AND pr.Abbr LIKE @Provider INNER JOIN claimproc cp ON pl.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND cp.Status IN (1,4) AND cp.DateEntry BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) INNER JOIN claim c ON cp.ClaimNum = c.ClaimNum AND c.ClaimType = 'P' INNER JOIN insplan ip ON c.PlanNum = ip.PlanNum INNER JOIN carrier ca ON ip.CarrierNum = ca.CarrierNum AND ca.CarrierName LIKE @Carrier LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON pl.ClinicNum = cl.ClinicNum WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(LENGTH(@Clinics)=0,TRUE,FIND_IN_SET(IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned'),@Clinics)) GROUP BY pl.ProcNum ) core WHERE core.ProcFee + core.Adj - core.Wo != core.FeeSchedFee GROUP BY core.ProcNum ORDER BY core.LastPayEntry, core.ProcNum

request: Patient status patients with problems, medications, and/or allergies
query: SELECT (CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,5,8) THEN p.PatNum WHEN s1.Seq = 1 THEN ' WHEN s1.Seq = 4 THEN ' WHEN s1.Seq = 7 THEN ' ELSE ' ' END) AS 'PatNum' ,(CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,5,8) THEN probcore.request ELSE '' END) AS 'request' ,(CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,5,8) THEN probcore.Status ELSE '' END) AS 'Status' FROM patient p INNER JOIN ( SELECT d.PatNum ,CONCAT('P:',d.DiseaseNum) AS 'Type' ,dd.DiseaseName AS 'request' ,ELT(d.ProbStatus + 1,'Active','Resolved','Inactive') AS 'Status' FROM disease d INNER JOIN diseasedef dd ON dd.DiseaseDefNum = d.DiseaseDefNum GROUP BY d.PatNum, d.DiseaseNum UNION ALL SELECT mp.PatNum ,CONCAT('M:',mp.MedicationPatNum) AS 'Type' ,m.MedName AS 'request' ,(CASE WHEN mp.DateStart = '0001-01-01' AND mp.DateStop = '0001-01-01' THEN 'Verify' WHEN mp.DateStart > CURDATE() OR mp.DateStop <= CURDATE() THEN 'Inactive' ELSE 'Active' END) AS 'Status' FROM medication m INNER JOIN medicationpat mp ON mp.MedicationNum = m.MedicationNum GROUP BY mp.PatNum, mp.MedicationPatNum UNION ALL SELECT al.PatNum ,CONCAT('A:',al.AllergyNum) AS 'Type' ,ad.request ,IF(al.StatusIsActive,'Active','Inactive') AS 'Status' FROM allergy al INNER JOIN allergydef ad ON al.AllergyDefNum = ad.AllergyDefNum GROUP BY al.PatNum, al.AllergyNum ) probcore ON probcore.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN seq_1_to_8 s1 ON TRUE WHERE (CASE WHEN s1.Seq = 2 THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(probcore.Type,':',1) = 'P' AND p.PatStatus = 0 WHEN s1.Seq = 5 THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(probcore.Type,':',1) = 'M' AND p.PatStatus = 0 WHEN s1.Seq = 8 THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(probcore.Type,':',1) = 'A' AND p.PatStatus = 0 ELSE TRUE END) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN s1.Seq IN (2,5,8) THEN CONCAT(s1.Seq,'+',p.PatNum,'|',probcore.Type) ELSE s1.Seq END) ORDER BY s1.Seq, p.PatNum, probcore.Type

request: Families with credit balances
query: SET @AsOf=''; SET @AgingLevel ='Family'; SELECT IFNULL(( SELECT pref.ValueString FROM preference pref WHERE pref.PrefName LIKE 'PayPlansVersion' ),1) INTO @PayPlanVersion; SELECT pref1.ValueString INTO @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays FROM preference pref1 WHERE pref1.PrefName LIKE 'PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays'; SELECT pref2.ValueString INTO @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate FROM preference pref2 WHERE pref2.PrefName LIKE 'PayPlanItemDateShowProc'; SELECT IF(ISNULL(DATE(@AsOf)), CURDATE(), DATE(@AsOf)) INTO @AsOf; SELECT CAST(CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(pref3.ValueString, '.', 2), LPAD(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(pref3.ValueString, '.', -2),'.',''),4,'0')) AS DECIMAL(6,4)) INTO @ProgramVersion FROM preference pref3 WHERE pref3.PrefName LIKE 'ProgramVersion'; SELECT (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.PatNum WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN ' ' END) AS 'PatNum', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.Guarantor WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN 'TOTALS:' END) AS 'Guarantor', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.Abbr WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Clinic', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.Address WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Address', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.City WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'City', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.State WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'State', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.Zip WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'Zip', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.LastApptDate WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'LastApptDate', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN E.NextSchedAppt WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN '' END) AS 'NextSchedAppt', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.0to30,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.0to30),2) END) AS 'Bal_0_30', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.31to60,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.31to60),2) END) AS 'Bal_31_60', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.61to90,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.61to90),2) END) AS 'Bal_61_90', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.91to120,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.91to120),2) END) AS 'Bal_91_120', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.121to365,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.121to365),2) END) AS 'Bal_121_365', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.366to730,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.366to730),2) END) AS 'Bal_366_730', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.731to1095,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.731to1095),2) END) AS 'Bal_731_1095', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.1096to1460,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.1096to1460),2) END) AS 'Bal_1096_1460', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.1461to1825,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.1461to1825),2) END) AS 'Bal_1461_1825', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.Over1825,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.Over1825),2) END) AS 'BalOver1825', (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN FORMAT(E.Total,2) WHEN 2 THEN ' WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(E.Total),2) END) AS 'BalTotal' FROM ( SELECT D.PatNum, CONCAT(D.LName,', ',D.FName) AS 'Guarantor', D.Address, D.City, D.State, D.Zip, D.Abbr, D.LastApptDate, D.NextSchedAppt, -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60 THEN D.FamCredits0to30 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCredits0to30<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60+D.FamCredits0to30-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '0to30', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90 THEN D.FamCredits31to60 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90+D.FamCredits31to60-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '31to60', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120 THEN D.FamCredits61to90 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120+D.FamCredits61to90-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '61to90', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365 THEN D.FamCredits91to120 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120 <=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365+D.FamCredits91to120-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '91to120', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730 THEN D.FamCredits121to365 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365 <=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730+D.FamCredits121to365-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '121to365', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095 THEN D.FamCredits366to730 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730 <=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095+D.FamCredits366to730-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '366to730', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460 THEN D.FamCredits731to1095 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460+D.FamCredits731to1095-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '731to1095', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825 THEN D.FamCredits1096to1460 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825+D.FamCredits1096to1460-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '1096to1460', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges<=D.FamCreditsOver1825 THEN D.FamCredits1461to1825 WHEN D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825<=D.FamCharges THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825+D.FamCredits1461to1825-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS '1461to1825', -CAST( (CASE WHEN D.FamCharges>=D.FamCreditsOver1825 THEN 0 ELSE D.FamCreditsOver1825-D.FamCharges END) AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'Over1825', CAST(D.FamBal AS DECIMAL(46,2)) AS 'Total' FROM ( SELECT g.PatNum, g.LName, g.FName, g.Address, g.City, g.State, g.Zip, IFNULL(cl.Abbr,'Unassigned') AS 'Abbr', SUM(B.PatBal) AS 'FamBal', SUM(B.Credits0to30) AS 'FamCredits0to30', SUM(B.Credits31to60) AS 'FamCredits31to60', SUM(B.Credits61to90) AS 'FamCredits61to90', SUM(B.Credits91to120) AS 'FamCredits91to120', SUM(B.Credits121to365) AS 'FamCredits121to365', SUM(B.Credits366to730) AS 'FamCredits366to730', SUM(B.Credits731to1095) AS 'FamCredits731to1095', SUM(B.Credits1096to1460) AS 'FamCredits1096to1460', SUM(B.Credits1461to1825) AS 'FamCredits1461to1825', SUM(B.CreditsOver1825) AS 'FamCreditsOver1825', SUM(B.Charges) AS 'FamCharges', COALESCE(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(ap.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%y') FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum WHERE ap.AptStatus = 2 AND p.Guarantor = g.Patnum ),'') AS 'LastApptDate', COALESCE(( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ap.AptDateTime),'%m/%d/%y') FROM appointment ap INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = ap.PatNum WHERE ap.AptStatus = 1 AND p.Guarantor = g.Patnum ),'') AS 'NextSchedAppt' FROM ( SELECT RawPatTrans.PatNum ,SUM( (CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'PatBal' ,-(SUM( (CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND DATE(@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) )) AS 'Credits0to30' ,-(SUM( CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 60 DAY AND DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 31 DAY THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Credits31to60' ,-(SUM( CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 90 DAY AND DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 61 DAY THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Credits61to90' ,-(SUM( CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 120 DAY AND DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 91 DAY THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Credits91to120' ,-(SUM( CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 365 DAY AND DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 121 DAY THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Credits121to365' ,-(SUM( CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 730 DAY AND DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 366 DAY THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Credits366to730' ,-(SUM( CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 1095 DAY AND DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 731 DAY THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Credits731to1095' ,-(SUM( CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 1460 DAY AND DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 1096 DAY THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Credits1096to1460' ,-(SUM( CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate BETWEEN DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 1825 DAY AND DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 1461 DAY THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Credits1461to1825' ,-(SUM( CASE WHEN ((RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount < 0) OR (@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057 AND RawPatTrans.TranType = 'PatPay')) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate < DATE(@AsOf) - INTERVAL 1825 DAY THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Creditsover1825' ,(SUM( CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType != 'InsEst' AND RawPatTrans.TranAmount > 0 AND IF(@ProgramVersion >= 24.3057,RawPatTrans.TranType != 'PatPay', TRUE) AND RawPatTrans.TranDate <= DATE(@AsOf) THEN RawPatTrans.TranAmount ELSE 0 END) ) AS 'Charges' ,SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END),0)) AS 'InsEst' ,SUM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN RawPatTrans.TranType = 'InsEst' THEN RawPatTrans.InsWoEst ELSE 0 END),0)) AS 'WriteOff' ,SUM(COALESCE(RawPatTrans.PayPlanAmount,0)) AS 'PayPlanDue' FROM ( SELECT 'Proc' AS 'TranType' , pl.ProcNum AS 'PriKey' , pl.PatNum , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , pl.ProcFee*(pl.UnitQty+pl.BaseUnits) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcFee != 0 AND pl.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'Claimproc' AS 'TranType' , cp.ClaimProcNum AS 'PriKey' , cp.PatNum , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN cp.Status != 0 AND cp.DateCP <= DATE(@AsOf) THEN (CASE WHEN cp.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -cp.InsPayAmt ELSE 0 END) - cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.WriteOff ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsWoEst' , (CASE WHEN cp.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND (cp.Status = 0 OR (cp.Status = 1 AND cp.DateCP > DATE(@AsOf))) THEN cp.InsPayEst ELSE 0 END) AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp LEFT JOIN procedurelog p ON cp.ProcNum = p.ProcNum AND @ProgramVersion >= 22.2055 WHERE cp.Status IN (0, 1, 4, 5, 7) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 22.2055 THEN TRUE ELSE (cp.ProcNum = 0 OR p.ProcStatus = 2) END) HAVING TranAmount != 0 OR InsWoEst != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'TranType' , a.AdjNum AS 'PriKey' , a.PatNum , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' , a.AdjAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM adjustment a WHERE a.AdjAmt != 0 AND a.AdjDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'TranType' , ps.SplitNum AS 'PriKey' , ps.PatNum , ps.DatePay AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3) AND ps.PayPlanNum = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(2, 4) THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion IN(1, 3, 4) AND ps.PayPlanNum !=0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 AND ps.PayPlanNum != 0 AND COALESCE(pp.IsClosed, 0) = 0 THEN -ps.SplitAmt ELSE 0 END) AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM paysplit ps LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON ps.PayPlanNum = pp.PayPlanNum AND @PayPlanVersion = 2 WHERE ps.SplitAmt != 0 AND ps.DatePay <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ps.UnearnedType NOT IN(SELECT def.DefNum FROM definition def WHERE def.Category = 29 AND def.ItemValue = 'X') UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCharge' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , 0 AS 'TranAmount' , ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc INNER JOIN payplan pp ON ppc.PayPlanNum=pp.PayPlanNum WHERE ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL @PayPlansBillInAdvanceDays DAY AND ppc.ChargeType = 0 AND (CASE WHEN @PayPlanVersion = 2 THEN !pp.IsClosed ELSE TRUE END) AND ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest != 0 AND pp.PlanNum = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'PPComplete' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum , pp.PayPlanDate AS 'TranDate' , -pp.CompletedAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN(1) AND pp.CompletedAmt != 0 AND pp.PayPlanDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType = 0 THEN ppc.Guarantor ELSE pp.PatNum END) AS 'PatNum' , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppc.ChargeType != 0 THEN -ppc.Principal WHEN pp.PlanNum = 0 THEN ppc.Principal+ppc.Interest ELSE 0 END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) UNION ALL SELECT 'PPCComplete' AS 'TranType' , ppc.PayPlanChargeNum AS 'PriKey' , ppc.PatNum , ppc.ChargeDate AS 'TranDate' , -ppc.Principal AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplancharge ppc LEFT JOIN payplan pp ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppc.PayPlanNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (3) AND ppc.ChargeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) AND ppc.ChargeType = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Discount' AS 'TranType' , pp.PayPlanNum AS 'PriKey' , pp.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , p.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' , p.Discount + p.DiscountPlanAmt AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplan pp INNER JOIN payplanlink ppl ON pp.PayPlanNum = ppl.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog p ON ppl.FKey = p.ProcNum AND ppl.LinkType = 2 AND p.ProcStatus = 1 AND p.ProcDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 23.2023 AND 24.1999 AND pp.IsDynamic = 1 AND pp.DynamicPayPlanTPOption = 2 AND (p.Discount != 0 OR p.DiscountPlanAmt != 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'PayPlanLink' TranType , ppl.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'PriKey' , prodlink.PatNum AS 'PatNum' , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate ELSE DATE(ppl.SecDateTEntry) END) AS 'TranDate' , (CASE WHEN ppl.AmountOverride=0 THEN -prodlink.Fee ELSE -ppl.AmountOverride END) AS 'TranAmount' , 0 AS 'PayPlanAmount' , 0 AS 'InsWoEst' , 0 AS 'InsPayEst' FROM payplanlink ppl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT procedurelog.PatNum , (procedurelog.ProcFee * (procedurelog.UnitQty + procedurelog.BaseUnits) + COALESCE(procAdj.AdjAmt, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.InsPay, 0) + COALESCE(procClaimProc.WriteOff, 0) + COALESCE(procSplit.SplitAmt, 0) ) AS 'Fee' , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , procedurelog.ProcNum , procedurelog.ProcDate AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN payplan ON payplanlink.PayPlanNum = payplan.PayPlanNum INNER JOIN procedurelog ON procedurelog.ProcNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion < 24.2001 THEN !(payplan.dynamicPayPlanTPOption = 1 AND procedurelog.ProcStatus != 2) ELSE procedurelog.ProcStatus = 2 END) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(adjustment.AdjAmt) AS 'AdjAmt' , adjustment.ProcNum , adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.ProvNum , adjustment.ClinicNum FROM adjustment INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = adjustment.ProcNum GROUP BY adjustment.ProcNum, adjustment.PatNum, adjustment.ProvNum, adjustment.ClinicNum )procAdj ON procAdj.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum AND procAdj.PatNum = procedurelog.PatNum AND procAdj.ProvNum = procedurelog.ProvNum AND procAdj.ClinicNum = procedurelog.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.InsPayAmt WHEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.InsEstTotalOverride ELSE claimproc.InsPayEst END), 0) * -1) AS 'InsPay' , SUM(COALESCE( (CASE WHEN claimproc.Status IN (1,4,7) THEN claimproc.WriteOff WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEstOverride WHEN claimproc.WriteOffEst != -1 THEN claimproc.WriteOffEst ELSE 0 END), 0) * -1) AS 'WriteOff' , claimproc.ProcNum FROM claimproc INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = claimproc.ProcNum WHERE claimproc.Status != 2 GROUP BY claimproc.ProcNum )procClaimProc ON procClaimProc.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(paysplit.SplitAmt) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.ProcNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 2 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.ProcNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.ProcNum )procSplit ON procSplit.ProcNum = procedurelog.ProcNum UNION ALL SELECT adjustment.PatNum , adjustment.AdjAmt + COALESCE(adjSplit.SplitAmt, 0) Fee , payplanlink.PayPlanLinkNum AS 'LinkNum' , 0 ProcNum , (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2024 THEN adjustment.AdjDate ELSE '0001-01-01' END) AS 'AgeDate' FROM payplanlink INNER JOIN adjustment ON adjustment.AdjNum = payplanlink.FKey AND payplanlink.LinkType = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(paysplit.SplitAmt, 0)) * -1 AS 'SplitAmt' , paysplit.AdjNum FROM paysplit INNER JOIN payplanlink ON payplanlink.LinkType = 1 AND payplanlink.FKey = paysplit.AdjNum WHERE paysplit.PayPlanNum = 0 GROUP BY paysplit.AdjNum )adjSplit ON adjSplit.AdjNum = adjustment.AdjNum ) prodlink ON prodlink.LinkNum = ppl.PayPlanLinkNum WHERE @PayPlanVersion IN (2, 3) AND (CASE WHEN @ProgramVersion BETWEEN 24.2001 AND 24.2050 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) WHEN @ProgramVersion >= 24.2051 AND @PayPlanCreditUseProductionDate = 1 THEN prodlink.AgeDate <= DATE(@AsOf) ELSE ppl.SecDateTEntry < DATE(@AsOf) + INTERVAL 1 DAY END) ) RawPatTrans INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = RawPatTrans.PatNum WHERE TranDate <= DATE(@AsOf) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN @AgingLevel = 'Patient' THEN p.PatNum ELSE p.Guarantor END) ) B INNER JOIN patient p ON p.PatNum = B.PatNum INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = p.Guarantor LEFT JOIN clinic cl ON cl.ClinicNum = g.ClinicNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT patplanpat.PatNum, patplanpat.Guarantor FROM patient patplanpat INNER JOIN payplan ON payplan.PatNum = patplanpat.PatNum AND !payplan.IsClosed GROUP BY patplanpat.Guarantor ) fampatplans ON fampatplans.Guarantor = g.PatNum WHERE ISNULL(fampatplans.Guarantor) GROUP BY g.PatNum ) D WHERE D.FamBal < -0.005 GROUP BY D.PatNum ORDER BY D.LName, D.FName )E LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'num' UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',E.PatNum) WHEN 2 THEN dup.num WHEN 3 THEN dup.num END) ORDER BY (CASE dup.num WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT(dup.num,'-',E.Guarantor) WHEN 2 THEN dup.num WHEN 3 THEN dup.num END)

request: Provider Production Metrics for the Specified Date, MTD, and YTD
query: SET @Date='2025-05-01'; SET @Provider=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pr.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider pr WHERE IF(LENGTH(@Provider) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Provider)) AND !(pr.IsHidden OR pr.IsHiddenReport); SELECT CONCAT('As of ',DATE_FORMAT(@Date,'%m-%d-%Y')) AS 'Metric', '' AS 'Day', '' AS 'MTD', '' AS 'YTD' UNION ALL SELECT display.Metric ,display.Day ,display.MTD ,display.YTD FROM ( SELECT (CASE dup.Num WHEN 1 THEN provider.Abbr WHEN 2 THEN 'Total Provider Net Prod' WHEN 3 THEN 'Total Provider Net Coll' WHEN 4 THEN 'Total Provider Diagnosed' WHEN 5 THEN 'Adjustments - Provider' WHEN 6 THEN CONCAT(' ',trans.Type) WHEN 7 THEN 'Writeoffs - Provider' ELSE '' END) AS 'Metric' , (CASE dup.Num WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'NetProd' AND trans.Date = DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID IN ('PatPay', 'InsPay') AND trans.Date = DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'TotDiag' AND trans.Date = DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'Adj' AND trans.Date = DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'Adj' AND trans.Date = DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 7 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'WO' AND trans.Date = DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) ELSE '' END) AS 'Day' , (CASE dup.Num WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'NetProd' AND trans.Date BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-', MONTH(DATE(@Date)),'-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID IN ('PatPay', 'InsPay') AND trans.Date BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-', MONTH(DATE(@Date)),'-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'TotDiag' AND trans.Date BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-', MONTH(DATE(@Date)),'-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'Adj' AND trans.Date BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-', MONTH(DATE(@Date)),'-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'Adj' AND trans.Date BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-', MONTH(DATE(@Date)),'-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 7 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'WO' AND trans.Date BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-', MONTH(DATE(@Date)),'-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) ELSE '' END) AS 'MTD' , (CASE dup.Num WHEN 2 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'NetProd', trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 3 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID IN ('PatPay', 'InsPay'), trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 4 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'TotDiag', trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 5 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'Adj', trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 6 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'Adj', trans.Amount, 0)), 2) WHEN 7 THEN FORMAT(SUM(IF(trans.ID = 'WO', trans.Amount, 0)), 2) ELSE '' END) AS 'YTD' FROM provider LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'NetProd' AS 'ID' , NULL AS 'Type' , pl1.ProcFee*(pl1.UnitQty+pl1.BaseUnits) + IFNULL(a1.AdjAmt, 0) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN cp1.Status IN (0,1,4,7) THEN cp1.WriteOff ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(cp1.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp1.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END)) FROM claimproc cp1 WHERE cp1.Status IN (0,1,4,6,7) AND cp1.ProcNum = pl1.ProcNum ),0) AS 'Amount' , pl1.ProcDate AS 'Date' , pl1.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl1 LEFT JOIN adjustment a1 ON a1.ProcNum = pl1.ProcNum WHERE pl1.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl1.ProcDate BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-01','-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl1.ProvNum, @ProvNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'PatPay' AS 'ID' , NULL AS 'Type' , ps.SplitAmt AS 'Amount' , ps.DatePay AS 'Date' , ps.ProvNum FROM paysplit ps WHERE ps.DatePay BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-01','-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date) AND FIND_IN_SET(ps.ProvNum, @ProvNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'InsPay' AS 'ID' , NULL AS 'Type' , cp2.InsPayAmt AS 'Amount' , cp2.DateCP AS 'Date' , cp2.ProvNum FROM claimpayment cpay INNER JOIN claimproc cp2 ON cp2.ClaimPaymentNum = cpay.ClaimPaymentNum AND cp2.DateCP BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-01','-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date) AND FIND_IN_SET(cp2.ProvNum, @ProvNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'TotDiag' AS 'ID' , NULL AS 'Type' , pl2.ProcFee*(pl2.UnitQty+pl2.BaseUnits) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM((CASE WHEN cp3.Status IN (0,1,4,7,8) THEN cp3.WriteOff ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(cp3.WriteOffEstOverride, -1), NULLIF(cp3.WriteOffEst, -1), 0) END)) FROM claimproc cp3 WHERE cp3.Status IN (0,1,4,6,7,8) AND cp3.ProcNum = pl2.ProcNum ),0) AS 'Amount' , pl2.DateTP AS 'Date' , pl2.ProvNum FROM procedurelog pl2 WHERE pl2.ProcStatus IN (1,2) AND pl2.DateTP BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-01','-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date) AND FIND_IN_SET(pl2.ProvNum, @ProvNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'Adj' AS 'ID' , def.ItemName AS 'Type' , a.AdjAmt AS 'Amount' , a.AdjDate AS 'Date' , a.ProvNum FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN definition def ON def.DefNum = a.AdjType AND def.Category = 1 WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-01','-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date) AND FIND_IN_SET(a.ProvNum, @ProvNums) UNION ALL SELECT 'WO' AS 'ID' , NULL AS 'Type' , cp4.Writeoff AS 'Amount' , cp4.DateCP AS 'Date' , cp4.ProvNum FROM claimproc cp4 WHERE cp4.Status IN (1,4) AND cp4.DateCP BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(DATE(@Date)),'-01','-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(@Date) AND FIND_IN_SET(cp4.ProvNum, @ProvNums) ) trans ON trans.ProvNum = provider.ProvNum LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num' UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 ) dup ON TRUE WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.ProvNum, @ProvNums) AND (CASE WHEN dup.Num IN (1,2,3,4,5,7,8) THEN TRUE ELSE !ISNULL(trans.Type) END) GROUP BY (CASE WHEN dup.Num IN (1,2,3,4,5,7,8) THEN CONCAT(dup.Num, '|+|', provider.ProvNum) ELSE CONCAT(dup.Num, '|+|', provider.ProvNum, '|+|', trans.Type) END) ORDER BY provider.ProvNum, dup.Num, trans.Type ) display

request: Family Aging for all Open Dental versions, for all families that have a balance before insurance.Sinliar to Example #1732, but also includes the number of outstanding claims, last statement date, and family financial note
query: SET @GuarantorClinics =''; SET @GuarantorBillingTypes =''; SET @GuarantorProviderAbbrs =''; SELECT IF(DATE(preference.ValueString) = CURDATE(), 1, 0) INTO @AgingIsCurrent FROM preference WHERE prefname = 'DateLastAging'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(clinic.ClinicNum) INTO @ClinicNums FROM clinic WHERE FIND_IN_SET(clinic.Abbr, @GuarantorClinics); SELECT CONCAT(IF(FIND_IN_SET('Unassigned', @GuarantorClinics), '0,', ''),COALESCE(@ClinicNums, '')) INTO @ClinicNums; SELECT (LENGTH(@GuarantorClinics) = 0 OR ValueString) INTO @ShowAllClinics FROM preference WHERE PrefName = 'EasyNoClinics'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(definition.DefNum) INTO @BillingNums FROM definition WHERE definition.Category = 4 AND FIND_IN_SET(definition.ItemName, @GuarantorBillingTypes); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(provider.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider WHERE FIND_IN_SET(provider.Abbr, @GuarantorProviderAbbrs); SELECT (CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN ' ' END) AS 'Guar Pat ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN aging.PatNum WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN ' ' END) AS 'PatNum' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_0_30) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_0_30) END) AS 'Bal 0 30' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_31_60) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_31_60) END) AS 'Bal 31 60' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_61_90) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.Bal_61_90) END) AS 'Bal 61 90' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN SUM(aging.BalOver90) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.BalOver90) END) AS 'Bal Over 90' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN SUM(aging.BalTotal) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.BalTotal) END) AS 'Bal Total' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN SUM(aging.InsWoEst) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsWoEst) END) AS 'Ins Wo Est' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN SUM(aging.InsPayEst) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.InsPayEst) END) AS 'Ins Pay Est' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN SUM(aging.NumClaims) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.NumClaims) END) AS 'NumClaims' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN SUM(aging.FamEst) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN SUM(aging.FamEst) END) AS 'FamEst' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN MAX(aging.LastStmnt) WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN ' ' END) AS 'LastStmnt' ,(CASE WHEN dup.Type = 'Detail' THEN IFNULL(pn.FamFinancial,'') WHEN dup.Type = 'Spacer' THEN ' WHEN dup.Type = 'Total' THEN ' ' END) AS 'FamFinancial' FROM ( SELECT p.Guarantor AS 'PatNum' ,CAST(MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.Bal_0_30, NULL)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'Bal_0_30' ,CAST(MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.Bal_31_60, NULL)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'Bal_31_60' ,CAST(MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.Bal_61_90, NULL)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'Bal_61_90' ,CAST(MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.BalOver90, NULL)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'BalOver90' ,CAST(MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.BalTotal, NULL)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'BalTotal' ,CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cpest.InsWoEst), 0) AS DECIMAL (10, 2)) AS 'InsWoEst' ,CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cpest.InsPayEst), 0) AS DECIMAL (10, 2)) AS 'InsPayEst' ,CAST(MAX(IF(p.Guarantor = p.PatNum, p.BalTotal, NULL)) - CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cpest.InsPayEst), 0) AS DECIMAL (10, 2)) - CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cpest.InsWoEst), 0) AS
