DECIMAL (10, 2)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'FamEst' ,(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cl.ClaimNum) FROM claim cl INNER JOIN patient claimguars ON claimguars.PatNum = cl.PatNum WHERE cl.ClaimStatus != 'R' AND cl.ClaimType != 'PreAuth' AND claimguars.Guarantor = p.Guarantor ) AS 'NumClaims' ,IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(MAX((SELECT MAX(st.DateSent) FROM statement st WHERE st.IsSent AND NOT st.IsReceipt AND st.PatNum = p.PatNum )),'%m/%d/%Y'),'') AS 'LastStmnt' FROM patient p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cp.PatNum ,cp.WriteOff AS 'InsWoEst' ,cp.InsPayEst AS 'InsPayEst' FROM claimproc cp WHERE cp.Status = 0 AND cp.DateCP <= CURDATE() AND (WriteOff != 0 OR InsPayEst != 0) ) cpest ON p.PatNum = cpest.PatNum WHERE @AgingIsCurrent GROUP BY p.Guarantor HAVING (BalOver90 >= 0.005 OR Bal_61_90 >= 0.005 OR Bal_31_60 >= 0.005 OR Bal_0_30 >= 0.005) ORDER BY p.Guarantor ) aging INNER JOIN patient g ON g.PatNum = aging.PatNum AND (@ShowAllClinics OR FIND_IN_SET(g.ClinicNum, @ClinicNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@GuarantorBillingTypes) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(g.BillingType, @BillingNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@GuarantorProviderAbbrs) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(g.PriProv, @ProvNums)) INNER JOIN patientnote pn ON pn.PatNum = g.PatNum INNER JOIN ( SELECT 'Detail' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Spacer' AS 'Type' UNION SELECT 'Total' AS 'Type' ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY dup.Type, IF(dup.Type = 'Detail',aging.PatNum,NULL) UNION ALL ( SELECT 'Aging needs to run. See', 'https://www.opendental.com/manual/aging.html', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT @AgingIsCurrent )

request: Adjusted Production by date, for the specified providers, excluding the specified codes
query: SET @FromDate ='2024-10-01', @ToDate ='2024-10-31'; SET @Providers=''; SET @ExcludedCodes=''; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @ExclCodeNums FROM procedurecode pc WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pc.ProcCode,@ExcludedCodes); SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pr.ProvNum) INTO @ProvNums FROM provider pr WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pr.Abbr, @Providers); SELECT IF(dup.Row = 'Detail', DATE_FORMAT(core.TranDate,'%m/%d/%Y'), '') AS 'Date' , IF(dup.Row = 'Detail' , IFNULL(( SELECT pr.Abbr FROM provider pr WHERE pr.ProvNum = core.ProvNum ), 'None') , 'Total') AS 'Provider' , FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.Fee, 0)), 2) AS 'Production' , FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.Adj, 0)), 2) AS 'Adjustments' , FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.WO, 0)), 2) AS 'Writeoffs' , FORMAT(SUM(COALESCE(core.Fee, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(core.Adj, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(core.WO,0)), 2) AS 'Net Production' FROM ( SELECT pl.ProvNum , CAST(SUM(pl.ProcFee * (pl.UnitQty + pl.BaseUnits)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'WO' , 0 AS 'Adj' , pl.ProcDate AS 'TranDate' FROM procedurelog pl WHERE pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludedCodes) = 0, TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @ExclCodeNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pl.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) GROUP BY pl.ProcDate, pl.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT cp.ProvNum , 0 AS 'Fee' , CAST(SUM(cp.WriteOff) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'WO' , 0 AS 'Adj' , cp.DateCP AS 'TranDate' FROM claimproc cp INNER JOIN procedurelog plcp ON plcp.ProcNum = cp.ProcNum AND plcp.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludedCodes) = 0, TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(plcp.CodeNum, @ExclCodeNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(plcp.ProvNum ,@ProvNums)) WHERE cp.DateCP BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND cp.Status IN (1,4) GROUP BY cp.DateCP, cp.ProvNum UNION ALL SELECT a.ProvNum , 0 AS 'Fee' , 0 AS 'WO' , CAST(SUM(a.AdjAmt) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'Adj' , a.AdjDate AS 'TranDate' FROM adjustment a INNER JOIN procedurelog pladj ON pladj.ProcNum = a.ProcNum AND pladj.ProcStatus = 2 AND IF(LENGTH(@ExcludedCodes) = 0, TRUE, !FIND_IN_SET(pladj.CodeNum, @ExclCodeNums)) AND IF(LENGTH(@Providers) = 0, TRUE, FIND_IN_SET(pladj.ProvNum, @ProvNums)) WHERE a.AdjDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) GROUP BY a.AdjDate, a.ProvNum ) core LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS 'Num', 'Detail' AS 'Row' UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Total' ) dup ON TRUE GROUP BY IF(dup.Num = 1, CONCAT(dup.Num, '|', core.TranDate, '+', core.ProvNum), dup.Num) ORDER BY dup.Num, core.TranDate, core.ProvNum

request: Count of patients with a completed procedure in the specified date range who are insured, use a discount plan, or neither
query: SET @FromDate='2024-11-01', @ToDate='2024-11-30'; SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pc.CodeNum) INTO @Broken FROM procedurecode pc WHERE pc.ProcCode IN ('D9986', 'D9987'); SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pp.PatNum) AS 'Insured' , COUNT(DISTINCT dps.PatNum) AS 'Discount Plan' , COUNT(DISTINCT IF(ISNULL(pp.PatNum) AND ISNULL(dps.PatNum), p.PatNum, NULL)) AS 'Self-Pay' FROM patient p INNER JOIN procedurelog pl ON pl.PatNum = p.PatNum AND pl.ProcStatus = 2 AND pl.ProcDate BETWEEN DATE(@FromDate) AND DATE(@ToDate) AND !FIND_IN_SET(pl.CodeNum, @Broken) LEFT JOIN patplan pp ON pp.PatNum = p.PatNum LEFT JOIN discountplansub dps ON dps.PatNum = p.PatNum
